Matthew1:1 Nanku umlibo wokuzalwa kukaYesu Krestu, unyana kaDavide, unyana ka-Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 UAbraham wazala uIsake; uIsake wazala uYakobi; uYakobi wazala uJuda nabantakwabo; 
Matthew1:3 uJuda wazala uPerezi noZera, abanina wabo unguTamare; uPerezi wazala uHezeron; uHezeron wazala uAram;" 
Matthew1:4 uAram wazala uAminadabhi; uAminadabhi wazala uNashon; uNashon wazala uSalman; 
Matthew1:5 uSalman wazala uBhowazi, onina unguRahabhi; uBhowazi wazala uObhedi, onina unguRute; uObhedi wazala uJese;" 
Matthew1:6 uJese wazala uDavide ukumkani. UDavide wazala uSolomon, onina wayengumka-Uriya;" 
Matthew1:7 uSolomon wazala uRewobhowam; uRewobhowam wazala uAbhiya; uAbhiya wazala uAsa; 
Matthew1:8 uAsa wazala uYoshafati; uYoshafati wazala uYoram; uYoram wazala u-Uziya; 
Matthew1:9 u-Uziya wazala uYotam; uYotam wazala uAhazi; uAhazi wazala uHezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 uHezekiya wazala uManase; uManase wazala uAmon; uAmon wazala uYosiya; 
Matthew1:11 uYosiya wazala uJoyakin nabantakwabo ngemihla yokufuduselwa kwabo eBhabheli. 
Matthew1:12 Emva kokufuduselwa kwabo eBhabheli uJoyakin wazala uShalatiyeli; uShalatiyeli wazala uZerubhabheli; 
Matthew1:13 uZerubhabheli wazala uAbhihudi; uAbhihudi wazala uEliyakim; uEliyakim wazala uAzore; 
Matthew1:14 uAzore wazala uZadoki; uZadoki wazala uAkim; uAkim wazala uElihudi; 
Matthew1:15 uElihudi wazala uElazare; uElazare wazala uMatan; uMatan wazala uYakobi; 
Matthew1:16 uYakobi wazala uJosefu, umyeni kaMariya, unina kaYesu, lo kuthiwa *nguKrestu." 
Matthew1:17 Izizukulwana bezilishumi elinane ukususela kuAbraham kuye kuDavide; zilishumi elinane ukususela kuDavide kuye ekufuduselweni kwabo eBhabheli; zikwalishumi elinane ukususela ekufuduselweni kwabo eBhabheli kuye ekuzalweni kukaKrestu. 
Matthew1:18 Ukuzalwa kukaYesu Krestu kwakungolu hlobo: UMariya, unina, wayesendela kuJosefu, bengekatshati, kwabonakala ukuba uMoya oyiNgcwele wenze ukuba abe nzima." 
Matthew1:19 Ke uJosefu, umyeni wakhe, wayelilungisa, engafuni ukumhlaza uMariya, waza wazimisela ukumala ngasese." 
Matthew1:20 Esazicinga ezi zinto, naso isithunywa seNkosi sibonakala kuye ephupheni, sisithi: “Josefu, nyana kaDavide, sukoyika ukumthatha uMariya abe ngumfazi wakho, kuba oko akukhawuleyo kungoMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Matthew1:21 Úya kuzala unyana, ùmthiye igama *elinguYesu, kuba nguye oya kubasindisa abantu bakhe ezonweni zabo.”" 
Matthew1:22 Konke oku kwênzeka ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi leNkosi elathethwa *ngumshumayeli, esithi:" 
Matthew1:23 “Niyabona, intombi le iya kumitha, izale unyana, abizwe ngokuba nguImanuweli” (oko kukuthi “uThixo unathi”)." 
Matthew1:24 Akuvuka ebuthongweni uJosefu, wênza njengoko isithunywa seNkosi besitshilo kuye, wamthatha uMariya, waba ngumfazi wakhe;" 
Matthew1:25 kodwa akahlangananga naye de wamzala unyana wakhe. UJosefu ke wamthiya igama elinguYesu. 
Matthew2:1 Kwathi akuba uYesu ezelwe eBhetelehem kwaJuda, ngemihla kakumkani uHerode, kwabonakala kufika iingcali zeenkwenkwezi eJerusalem, zivela empumalanga," 
Matthew2:2 zisithi: “Uphi na lo kumkani wamaJuda uzelweyo? Sibone inkwenkwezi yakhe empumalanga; ke size kumnqula.” 
Matthew2:3 Akukuva oku ukumkani uHerode, wakhathazeka, nayo yonke iJerusalem." 
Matthew2:4 Ebahlanganisile ke bonke ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho balapho, wabuza kubo ukuba uKrestu ubeya kuzalelwa phi na." 
Matthew2:5 Bathi kuye: “EBhetelehem kwaJuda, kuba kubhaliwe *ngumshumayeli kwathiwa:" 
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Wena Bhetelehem, sithili sakwaJuda, akunguye oyena udelekileyo kubalawuli bakwaJuda, kuba kuwe kuya kuphuma uMlawuli oya kuba nguMalusi wabantu bam amaSirayeli.’”" 
Matthew2:7 UHerode ke uzibizele ngasese iingcali ezo, waqondisisa kakuhle kuzo ixesha lokubonakala kwenkwenkwezi leyo." 
Matthew2:8 Wazithumela eBhetelehem, esithi: “Hambani niye kubuzisa kakuhle ngomntwana lowo. Ze nithi ke, nakumfumana, nindixelele, ukuze nam ndiye kumnqula.”" 
Matthew2:9 Zakuba zimvile ukumkani, iingcali zahamba; nantso inkwenkwezi leyo zayibonayo empumalanga, izikhokela, de yaya kuma phezu kwendawo abekuyo umntwana lowo." 
Matthew2:10 Zathi ke, zakuyibona inkwenkwezi, zavuya gqitha." 
Matthew2:11 Zingenile endlwini, zambona umntwana enoMariya unina, zaqubuda, zamnqula; zaza zathi, zivule iingxowa zazo, zanikela kuye ngezipho: igolide, intlaka yokuqhumisa, nentlaka yokuqhola." 
Matthew2:12 Zathi ke, ziyalelwe nguThixo ephupheni ukuba zingabuyi ziye kuHerode, zemka ngandlela yimbi ukuya kwelakowazo." 
Matthew2:13 Zakuba zimkile iingcali, kwabonakala isithunywa seNkosi kuJosefu ephupheni, sisithi: “Vuka, uthathe umntwana nonina, ubalekele eJiputa, uhlale apho de ndikuxelele, kuba uHerode uzimisele ukumbulala umntwana.”" 
Matthew2:14 Wavuka ke uJosefu, wamthatha umntwana nonina ebusuku, wabalekela eJiputa," 
Matthew2:15 wahlala khona de wabhubha uHerode. Oku kwênzeka ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi leNkosi elathethwa *ngumshumayeli, lisithi: “Ndambiza unyana wam waphuma eJiputa.”" 
Matthew2:16 Ke kaloku uHerode, akubona ukuba iingcali zeenkwenkwezi zimkhohlisile, waba nomsindo kakhulu, wayalela ukuba kubulawe bonke abantwana abangamakhwenkwe abaseBhetelehem nakuwo wonke loo mmandla, abaminyaka mibini bezelwe nangaphantsi, elungelelanisa nexesha abeliqondisise kakuhle kwiingcali." 
Matthew2:17 Kwazaliseka ke ngoko okwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli uJeremiya esithi: 
Matthew2:18 “ERama kwavakala isililo nesijwili esikhulu, uRakeli elilela abantwana bakhe, engavumi ukuthuthuzeleka, kuba babengasekho.”" 
Matthew2:19 Akuba ebhubhile uHerode, nâko kubonakala isithunywa seNkosi kuJosefu ephupheni eseJiputa," 
Matthew2:20 sisithi: “Vuka, uthathe umntwana nonina, uye kwelakwaSirayeli, kuba bafile abo babefuna ukumbulala umntwana.”" 
Matthew2:21 Wavuka, wamthatha umntwana nonina, waya kwelakwaSirayeli." 
Matthew2:22 UJosefu akuva ukuba uArkelawo ungukumkani kwelakwaJuda esikhundleni sikayise uHerode, woyika ukuya khona; wathi, eyalelwe nguThixo ephupheni, wemka waya kwiphondo laseGalili," 
Matthew2:23 waya kuhlala kwidolophu ekuthiwa yiNazarete. Oku kwênzeka ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo *ngabashumayeli, besithi wobizwa ngokuba ngumNazarete." 
Matthew3:1 Ke kaloku ngaloo mihla kwafika uYohane umbhaptizi eshumayela entlango yelakwaJuda," 
Matthew3:2 esithi: “Guqukani, kuba ulawulo lukaThixo lusemnyango!”" 
Matthew3:3 Ngulo ke wayexela yena *umshumayeli uIsaya xa wayesithi: “Kuvakala ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi: ‘Yilungiseleleni indlela iNkosi, niyihlahlele umgaqo wayo.’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 UYohane lo wayesambatha ingubo yoboya benkamela, abhinqe ngethwathwa. Ukutya kwakhe kwakuziinkumbi nobusi." 
Matthew3:5 Babephuma besiya kuye abantu baseJerusalem, nabakulo lonke elakwaJuda, nabommandla wonke waseJordan." 
Matthew3:6 Babezixela izono zabo, aze ababhaptize emlanjeni iJordan." 
Matthew3:7 Ke kaloku, akubona into eninzi *yabaFarasi *nabaSadusi besiza ekubhaptizeni kwakhe, uYohane wathi kubo: “Nzalandini yamarhamba, ngubani na onilumkisileyo ukuba niyibaleke ingqumbo ezayo?" 
Matthew3:8 Ke ngoko velisani iziqhamo ezifanele inguquko. 
Matthew3:9 Ze ningafane nithi: ‘Siyinzala ka-Abraham.’ Ndiyanixelela mna, uThixo unako kuwo la matye ukumvelisela abantwana uAbraham." 
Matthew3:10 Kanti ke izembe selikulungele ukuyinqumla ezingcanjini imithi. Ngoko ke wonke umthi ongavelisi siqhamo sihle uyagawulwa utshiswe. 
Matthew3:11 Mna okunene ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi, ndibonisa ukuguquka kwenu; kodwa lowo uzayo emva kwam unamandla kunam. Andikufanelanga nokukhulula izihlangu ezi zakhe. Yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangomlilo." 
Matthew3:12 Ingobozi isesandleni sakhe. Uya kukwela kuthi tu okusesandêni, ayigalele kuvimba ingqolowa. Ke wona umququ uya kuwutshisa ngomlilo ongacimiyo.”" 
Matthew3:13 Wafika eJordan uYesu, evela eGalili, eze kubhaptizwa nguYohane." 
Matthew3:14 UYohane ke wayengavumi, esithi: “Indim nje ofanele ukubhaptizwa nguwe, nguwe na oza kum?”" 
Matthew3:15 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Vuma okwangoku, kuba kusifanele thina ukwenjenjalo, ukuze senze konke okufunwa nguThixo.” Wavuma ke uYohane." 
Matthew3:16 Ebhaptiziwe uYesu, waphuma kwangoko emanzini. Lasuka izulu lavuleka, wabona uMoya kaThixo enjengehobe esihla esiza kuye." 
Matthew3:17 Kwavakala izwi, livela ezulwini, lisithi: “Lo nguNyana wam endimthandayo; ndikholisiwe nguye.”" 
Matthew4:1 Waza uYesu wakhokelelwa entlango nguMoya, ukuba ahendwe ngumtyholi." 
Matthew4:2 Uthe ke, ezile ukutya iintsuku ezimashumi mane, walamba ekupheleni kwazo." 
Matthew4:3 Wafika umhendi, wathi kuye: “Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, yitsho la matye abe zizonka.”" 
Matthew4:4 Waphendula yena wathi: “*IziBhalo zithi: ‘Umntu akaphili ngasonka sodwa; uphila ngamazwi onke athethwa nguThixo.’” 
Matthew4:5 Umtyholi ke wasa uYesu kwisiXeko esiNgcwele, wammisa phezu *kwendlu kaThixo," 
Matthew4:6 wathi kuye: “Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, ziphose ezantsi phaya; kuba iziBhalo zithi: “ ‘UThixo uya kuziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe; ziya kukufunqula, hleze ukhubeke elityeni.’”" 
Matthew4:7 UYesu wathi kuye: “IziBhalo zikwathi: ‘Uze ungayilingi iNkosi uThixo wakho.’” 
Matthew4:8 Kwakhona umtyholi wasa uYesu entabeni ephakame kakhulu, wambonisa onke amazwe ezikumkani zehlabathi, nobuhle bazo," 
Matthew4:9 wathi kuye: “Zonke ezi zinto ndokunika, ukuba uthe wazithoba wandinqula.”" 
Matthew4:10 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Hamb' umke, Sathana; kuba iziBhalo zithi: ‘Uze unqule iNkosi uThixo wakho, ukhonze yona yodwa.’”" 
Matthew4:11 Waza umtyholi wamyeka uYesu, zafika izithunywa zezulu zamlungiselela." 
Matthew4:12 Ke uYesu akuva ukuba uYohane ubanjiwe, wahamba waya kwelaseGalili." 
Matthew4:13 Wemka ke eNazarete, wafudukela eKapernahum ngaselwandle, emideni yakwaZebhulon neyakwaNafetali." 
Matthew4:14 Kwazaliseka ke ngoko okwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli uIsaya esithi: 
Matthew4:15 “Wena sithili sakwaZebhulon, nawe sithili sakwaNafetali, nina eningakwindlela yaselwandle, phesheya kweJordan, nina baseGalili yeentlanga," 
Matthew4:16 bantu ababehleli ebumnyameni, niboné ukukhanya okukhulu; nina enanihleli ezweni nasethunzini lokufa, nivelelwe kukukhanya.”" 
Matthew4:17 Ukususela ngoko uYesu washumayela esithi: “Guqukani, kuba ulawulo lukaThixo lusemnyango.”" 
Matthew4:18 Kuthe uYesu ehamba ngakuLwandle lwaseGalili wabona abantu ababini, uSimon, lo kuthiwa nguPetros, noAndreya, umninawe wakhe, bephosa umnatha elwandle, kuba babengabalobi." 
Matthew4:19 Wathi kubo: “Ndilandeleni; ndonenza abalobi babantu.” 
Matthew4:20 Bayishiya kwangoko ke iminatha yabo, bamlandela." 
Matthew4:21 Uthe ke, ehambele phambili esuka apho, wabona omnye umntu nomntakwabo, uYakobi unyana kaZebhedi, noYohane umninawe wakhe, besesikhitshaneni noZebhedi uyise, belungisa iminatha yabo; wababiza ke." 
Matthew4:22 Basishiya kwangoko isikhitshana noyise, balandela uYesu." 
Matthew4:23 UYesu wayelityhutyha lonke elaseGalili, efundisa *ezindlwini zesikhungo, evakalisa iindaba ezimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo, ephilisa abantu kwizifo zonke nemikhuhlane yonke." 
Matthew4:24 Lwaphuma udumo lwakhe, lwavakala kulo lonke elaseSiriya, babazisa kuye bonke abagulayo, benezifo neentuthumbo, nabaphethwe ziindimoni, nabanesithuthwane, nabafe umzimba, waza wabaphilisa." 
Matthew4:25 Ke izihlwele zabantu zazimlandela uYesu, zivela eGalili, nakwiiDolophu eziliShumi, naseJerusalem, nakwelakwaJuda, naphesheya kweJordan." 
Matthew5:1 Akusibona isihlwele sabantu, uYesu wenyuka intaba; kwathi, akuhlala phantsi, beza kuye abafundi bakhe;" 
Matthew5:2 waza wabafundisa, esithi:" 
Matthew5:3 “Banoyolo abo bazilahlela kuThixo, kuba balawulwa nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:4 Banoyolo abo basezintsizini, kuba baya konwatyiswa nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:5 Banoyolo abo balulamileyo, kuba baya kwabelwa ihlabathi nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:6 Banoyolo abo balambela banxanelwe ubulungisa, kuba baya kwaneliswa nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:7 Banoyolo abo banenceba, kuba baya kwenzelwa inceba nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:8 Banoyolo abo bantliziyo ihlambulukileyo, kuba baya kumbona uThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:9 Banoyolo abo bangabaxolisi, kuba uThixo uya kuthi bangabantwana bakhe!" 
Matthew5:10 Banoyolo abo batshutshiswayo ngokuba besenza ubulungisa, kuba balawulwa nguThixo bona!" 
Matthew5:11 “Ninoyolo nina xa bathe abantu baningcikiva ngenxa yam, benitshutshisa, bethetha zonke izinto ezikhohlakeleyo ngani bexoka." 
Matthew5:12 Vuyani ke, nigcobe, kuba ninomvuzo omkhulu ezulwini. Kakade babesenjenjalo abantu ukubatshutshisa *abashumayeli ababekho ngaphambi kwenu.”" 
Matthew5:13 “Niyityiwa yehlabathi nina. Ke ukuba ityiwa ithe yaphelelwa sisongo, yothiwani na ukubuyiselwa isongo sayo? Ayisenamsebenzi; kuphela kukuba ilahlwe phandle, inyathelwe ngabantu." 
Matthew5:14 “Nina nilukhanyiso lwehlabathi. Umzi omi phezu kwentaba awunakufihlakala. 
Matthew5:15 Kananjalo isibane asilunyekwa siqutyudelwe ngethunga; koko sixhonywa endaweni yaso, sikhanyisele bonke abasendlwini." 
Matthew5:16 Makukhanye ngokukwanjalo ukukhanya kwenu phambi kwabantu, ukuze bayibone imisebenzi yenu elungileyo, bamdumise uYihlo osezulwini.”" 
Matthew5:17 “Ze ningabi ndize kuchitha *umthetho kaMosis nomyalelo *wabashumayeli bamandulo. Andizanga kuchitha; ndize kuzalisekisa. 
Matthew5:18 Inene, lingaphela izulu nehlabathi, kodwa akuyi kupheliswa nalinye iganyana nokuba lisuntswana emthethweni, kungathanga kwenzeka konke." 
Matthew5:19 Ke ngoko othe wajika nokuba mnye kule mithetho mincinane, wakufundisa abantu oko, kothiwa ungoyena mncinane kwabalawulwa nguThixo. Kanti ke othe wawenza umthetho, wawufundisa, woba newonga kwabalawulwa nguThixo." 
Matthew5:20 Inene, ukuba anithanga naba ngamalungisa kunabachazi-mthetho *nabaFarasi, soze nibe ngabalawulwa nguThixo.”" 
Matthew5:21 “Nivile ukuba kwathiwa kubantu bakudala: ‘Uze ungabulali;’ kusithiwa: ‘Othe wabulala usisisulu somgwebo.’ 
Matthew5:22 Ke mna ndithi kuni, wonke umntu osuka amqumbele uwabo usisisulu somgwebo. Nothi kuwabo: ‘Ntw' ingento,’ usisisulu sokugwetywa yinkundla ephakamileyo. Ke othi: ‘Siyathandini,’ usisisulu sesihogo somlilo." 
Matthew5:23 Ke ngoko, ukuba usondeza esibingelelweni into oyinikela kuThixo, wathi ulapho wakhumbula ukuba uwenu unendawo ngakuwe," 
Matthew5:24 wushiye apho umnikelo wakho phambi kweqonga lamadini, uhambe uye kuxolisana nowenu kuqala, uze emva koko uwusondeze umnikelo wakho." 
Matthew5:25 “Visisana kamsinya nokumangalelayo, usesendleleni kunye naye, hleze ummangaleli wakho akunikele kumgwebi, aze umgwebi akunikele epoliseni, uze uphoswe entolongweni." 
Matthew5:26 Inene, akusayi kuphuma apho de uhlawule neyona malana yokugqibela.”" 
Matthew5:27 “Nivile ukuba kwathiwa: ‘Uze ungakrexezi.’ 
Matthew5:28 Ke mna ndithi kuni, wonke umntu okhangela umntu obhinqileyo embawela, uselekrexezile entliziyweni yakhe." 
Matthew5:29 Ukuba iliso lakho lasekunene liyakulahlekisa, lincothule ulilahle. Kukulungele kanye ukuba kutshabalale libe linye emalungwini akho, kunokuba umzimba wakho uphela uphoswe esihogweni." 
Matthew5:30 Nokuba isandla sakho sokunene siyakulahlekisa, sinqumle usilahle. Kukulungele kanye ukuba kutshabalale libe linye emalungwini akho, kunokuba umzimba wakho uphela uye esihogweni.”" 
Matthew5:31 “Kwathiwa: ‘Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, makamnike incwadi yoqhawulo-mtshato.’" 
Matthew5:32 Ke mna ndithi kuni, othe wamala umfazi wakhe, engakrexezanga umfazi lowo, woba uyamkrexezisa; nothe wazeka loo mfazi waliweyo, uyakrexeza.”" 
Matthew5:33 “Kananjalo nivile ukuba kwâthiwa kubantu bakudala: ‘Uze ungafungi buxoki. Xa uthe wasenza isifungo, uze ukwenze oko uthembise ngako phambi kweNkosi.’" 
Matthew5:34 Ke mna ndithi kuni, maningakhe nifunge nento le; nokuba lizulu, ngokuba likomkhulu likaThixo;" 
Matthew5:35 nokuba lihlabathi eli, ngokuba lingamathânga akhe; nokuba yiJerusalem, ngokuba ngumzi weKumkani yeekumkani." 
Matthew5:36 Uze ungayifungi nentloko yakho, ngokuba ungenako ukwenza nalunye unwele lube mhlophe okanye lube mnyama." 
Matthew5:37 Uewe wenu makabe nguewe, nohayi abe nguhayi. Okugqithe koko kuvela kongendawo.”" 
Matthew5:38 “Nivile ukuba kwâthiwa: ‘Iliso maliphindezelwe ngeliso, nezinyo liphindezelwe ngezinyo.’" 
Matthew5:39 Ke mna ndithi kuni, musani ukuziphindezela kulowo unonayo. Othe wakuqhwaba kwisidlele sokunene, mguqulele nesinye." 
Matthew5:40 Nalowo ufuna ukukusa enkundleni, akuhluthe isambatho sangaphantsi, myekele nesokwaleka." 
Matthew5:41 Ukuba onegunya ukunyanzela ukuba uhambe ikhilomitha ibe nye, hamba neyesibini." 
Matthew5:42 Mphe lowo ucelayo, nalowo ufuna ukuboleka kuwe ungambandezi.”" 
Matthew5:43 “Nivile ukuba kwathiwa: ‘Mthande umhlobo wakho, uluthiye utshaba lwakho.’" 
Matthew5:44 Ke mna ndithi kuni, zithandeni iintshaba zenu, nibathandazele abo banitshutshisayo," 
Matthew5:45 ize nibe ngabantwana boYihlo osezulwini, yena ovelisa ilanga phezu kwabakhohlakeleyo nabalungileyo, anise nemvula phezu kwabalungisayo nabangalungisiyo." 
Matthew5:46 Xa nithe nathanda abo banithandayo nina, ninamvuzo mni ke? Kakade àbenzi kwaloo nto, yini na, nabaqokeleli-rhafu?" 
Matthew5:47 Naxa nithi nibulise amawenu odwa, ningcono ngantoni na kunabanye abantu? Abenzi kwaloo nto, yini na, nabantu abangakholwayo?" 
Matthew5:48 Njengoko uYihlo osezulwini anothando olugqibeleleyo, nani yibani ngabagqibeleleyo.”" 
Matthew6:1 “Lumkani, okulungileyo enikwenzayo ningakwenzi phambi kwabantu ngenjongo yokuba banibone. Nákwenjenjalo aninamvuzo kuYihlo osezulwini." 
Matthew6:2 Ke ngoko, xa sukuba usipha ihlwempu, uze ungemi phezu kwendlu umemeze, njengokuba besenjenjalo abahanahanisi *ezindlwini zesikhungo nasezitalatweni, ukuze banconywe ngabantu. Inene, sebewufumene umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:3 Ke wena, xa sukuba usipha ihlwempu, masingakwazi isandla sakho sasekhohlo okwenziwa sisandla sakho sasekunene," 
Matthew6:4 ukuze ke izinwe zakho zingabonwa ngabantu, ze ke uYihlo obona okwenzeka emfihlekweni akuvuze yena ekuhleni.”" 
Matthew6:5 “Xa uthandazayo, uze ungabi njengabahanahanisi, bona bathand' ukuthandaza bemi *ezindlwini zesikhungo nasezikoneni zezitalato, ngenjongo yokuba babonwe ngabantu. Inene, sebewufumene umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:6 Ke wena, xa uthandazayo, ngena egumbini lakho, uluvale ucango, uthandaze kuYihlo ongabonwayo. Ke uYihlo, yena obona okwenzeka emfihlekweni, wokuvuza." 
Matthew6:7 “Ngoko ke, xa nithandazayo, ze ningenzi milembelele ingento, njengabangakholwayo, bona baba boviwa ngenxa yamazwi abo amaninzi." 
Matthew6:8 Ze ningafani nabo, kuba uYihlo uyakwazi enikusweleyo ningekaceli." 
Matthew6:9 Thandazani ke ngoko nina nithi: “ ‘Bawo wethu osezulwini: Malaziwe lihlonelwe igama lakho," 
Matthew6:10 malongame ulawulo lwakho, makwenziwe ukuthanda kwakho, emhlabeni njengasezulwini." 
Matthew6:11 Sibonelele kwiintswelo zethu zemihla ngemihla; 
Matthew6:12 usixolele amatyala ethu, njengokuba nathi sibaxolela abasonayo;" 
Matthew6:13 ungasiyekeli ekulingweni, koko sihlangule kumtyholi; [kuba ngenene nguwe olawulayo, namandla ngawakho, nodumo, kude kube ngunaphakade! Amen.]’" 
Matthew6:14 “Kaloku xa nibaxolela abantu izigqitho zabo, uYihlo osezulwini wonixolela nani." 
Matthew6:15 Xa ningabaxoleli abantu izigqitho zabo, noYihlo akayi kunixolela iziphoso zenu.”" 
Matthew6:16 “Xa nizila ukutya, ze ningabi njengabo bazenzisayo, abazifanisa nabahluphekileyo. Kaloku babenza bubi ubuso babo, ukuze babonwe ngabantu ukuba bazilile. Inene, sebewufumene umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:17 Ke wena, xa uzilayo, uzungayeki ukuthambisa intloko yakho nokuhlamba ubuso bakho." 
Matthew6:18 Kothi ke ukuzila kwakho kungabonakali ebantwini, koko kubonakale kuYihlo ongabonwayo, aze yena uYihlo obona okwenzeka emfihlekweni akuvuze.”" 
Matthew6:19 “Ze ningaziqwebeli ubutyebi emhlabeni, apho konakalisa inundu nomhlwa, nalapho amasela aqhekezayo ebe." 
Matthew6:20 Koko ziqwebeleni ubutyebi ezulwini, apho kungonakalisi nundu namhlwa, nalapho amasela angaqhekeziyo ebe." 
Matthew6:21 Kaloku apho bukhoyo ubutyebi benu, yoba lapho nentliziyo yenu.”" 
Matthew6:22 “Isibane somzimba liliso. Xa iliso lakho lilungile, umzimba wakho uphela uya kukhanyiseleka." 
Matthew6:23 Kodwa ukuba iliso lakho alilunganga, umzimba wakho uphela woba sebumnyameni. Ke, ukuba ukukhanya okukuwe kububumnyama, koba mnyama kangakanani!”" 
Matthew6:24 “Akukho mntu unokukhonza iinkosi ezimbini, kuba uya kuyithiya le, ayithande leya, okanye abambelele kule, ayidele leya. Aninako ukukhonza uThixo kwanobutyebi." 
Matthew6:25 “Kungoko ndithi kuni, musani ukubuxhalela ubomi benu nisithi notya ntoni, nisele ntoni. Kwanomzimba wenu ze ningawuxhaleli, nisithi niya kunxiba ntoni. Ubomi abungaphezulu na kokutyiwayo; wona umzimba awungaphezulu na kokunxitywayo?" 
Matthew6:26 Khaniqwalasele iintaka. Azihlwayeli, azivuni, azigcini siseleni, kanti uYihlo osezulwini uyazondla. Ke, kungakanani na ukuxabiseka kwenu kunazo!" 
Matthew6:27 Nguwuphi na kuni onokuthi ngokuxhala abongeze nangemini enye le ubomi bakhe? 
Matthew6:28 “Kananjalo yini na ukuba nixhalele into yokunxiba? Khaniqwalasele ukukhula kweenyibiba zasendle; azisebenzi, azithungi nokuthunga;" 
Matthew6:29 kanti ngenene, noSolomon kubo bonke ubunewu-newu bakhe, wayengavathiswanga nanjenganye yazo." 
Matthew6:30 Ukuba ke uThixo wenjenje ukuyambesa ingca yasendle, ethi namhlanje ibekho, ze ngomso iphoswe eziko, akayi kugqithisa na ukunambathisa nina, bantundini balukholo luncinane?" 
Matthew6:31 “Musani ke ukuxhala, nisithi: ‘Sodla ntoni na; sosela ntoni na; sonxiba ntoni na?’" 
Matthew6:32 Zezi zinto kanye abahlala besukelana nazo abangakholwayo beentlanga. Ke yena uYihlo osezulwini uyazi ukuba ezo zinto zonke ziyimfuneko kuni. 
Matthew6:33 Ke ngoko kuqala zondelelani ukulawulwa nguThixo, nenze ubulungisa obufunwa nguye, waye ke yena eya kunongezelela zonke ezi zinto." 
Matthew6:34 Ngenxa yoko musani ukulixhalela ingomso. Ingomso liya kuxhalela okwalo. Ziyanele imini nganye iingxaki zayo.” 
Matthew7:1 “Musani ukugweba, ze nani ningagwetywa nguThixo –" 
Matthew7:2 kuba ngokugweba enigweba abanye ngako, uThixo uya kunigweba kwangako nani; nendlela enabela abanye ngayo, nani niya kwabelwa kwangayo nguThixo." 
Matthew7:3 Yini na ukuba usibone isibi esiselisweni lowenu, kanti wona umqadi okwelakho iliso akuwuboni?" 
Matthew7:4 Ungáthini ukuthi kuwenu: ‘Khawume ndikhuphe isibi esiselisweni lakho,’ kanti nango umqadi kwelakho iliso?" 
Matthew7:5 Mhanahanisindini, wukhuphe kuqala loo mqadi ukwelakho iliso! Wôbona kakuhle ke, ube nako ukusikhupha isibi esiselisweni lowenu." 
Matthew7:6 “Musani ukukunika izinja okungcwele, kananjalo *iiperile zenu musani ukuziphosa ezihagwini, hleze zizinyathele ngamanqina, zijike ziniqwenge.”" 
Matthew7:7 “Celani nophiwa, funani nofumana, nkqonkqozani novulelwa;" 
Matthew7:8 kuba wonke umntu ocelayo uyazúza, nalowo ufunayo uyafumana, nalowo unkqonkqozayo uyavulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 Ngubani na kuni onokuthi enonyana ocela isonka, asuke amnike ilitye;" 
Matthew7:10 okanye athi, akucela intlanzi, asuke amnike inyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Ukuba ke ngoko nina, nikhohlakele nje, niyakwazi ukubapha abantwana benu izipho ezilungileyo, wobeka phi na ke yena uYihlo osezulwini ukugqithisa ukubapha okulungileyo abo bacelayo kuye?" 
Matthew7:12 “Zonke izinto ke enifuna ukuba abantu bazenze kuni, yenzani ezikwanjalo nani kubo. Yiyo leyo ke intsingiselo *yomthetho kaMosis nomyalelo *wabashumayeli bamandulo.”" 
Matthew7:13 “Ngenani ngesango elimxinwa, kungabi ngelibanzi, kuba abangena ngesango elibanzi, bahambe ngendlela ephangaleleyo, basinga entshabalalweni; yaye baninzi abenjenjalo." 
Matthew7:14 Ke abangena ngesango elimxinwa, bahambe ngendlela ecutheneyo, basinga ebomini; yaye bambalwa abenjenjalo.”" 
Matthew7:15 “Balumkeleni *abashumayeli abaxokayo, abo beza kuni bezifanisa neegusha, kanti ngaphakathi baziingcuka eziqwengayo." 
Matthew7:16 Nobaqonda ngezenzo zabo, njengokuba nemithi iqondwa ngeziqhamo zayo. Kakade, khe kukhiwe iidiliya emqaqobeni, okanye amakhiwane emngeni?" 
Matthew7:17 Kaloku wonke umthi olungileyo uvelisa iziqhamo ezihle, kodwa wona umthi ongalunganga uvelisa iziqhamo ezibi." 
Matthew7:18 Umthi olungileyo awunakuvelisa ziqhamo zibi, nomthi ongalunganga awunakuvelisa ziqhamo zihle." 
Matthew7:19 Ke wonke umthi ongavelisi ziqhamo zihle uyagawulwa, uphoswe emlilweni." 
Matthew7:20 Ke ngoko abashumayeli abaxokayo nobaqonda ngezenzo zabo.” 
Matthew7:21 “Asingabo bonke abathi kum: ‘Nkosi, Nkosi,’ abaya kubuxhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo; kuphela ngabayenzayo intando kaBawo osezulwini." 
Matthew7:22 Baninzi abaya kuthi kum ngaloo mini: ‘Nkosi, besingashumayeli egameni lakho na, sikhuphe neendimoni ngegama lakho, size kwangegunya legama lakho senze imimangaliso emininzi?’" 
Matthew7:23 Ke mna ndiya kuthi kubo: ‘Andizange ndanazi; mkani kum, nina benzi bokuchasene nomthetho.’”" 
Matthew7:24 “Wonke ke umntu owevayo la mazwi am, aze awenze, unokufanekiswa nendoda eyingqondi, ethe yayakhela phezu kwesiseko samatye indlu yayo." 
Matthew7:25 Yana ke imvula, satsho isikhukula, wavuthuza umoya, yonke loo nto yagaleleka kuloo ndlu; ayawa, kuba ibisekelwe." 
Matthew7:26 Ke wonke umntu owevayo la mazwi am, angawenzi, unokufanekiswa nendoda esisiyatha, ethe yayakha entlabathini indlu yayo." 
Matthew7:27 Yana ke imvula, satsho isikhukula, wavuthuza umoya, yonke loo nto yagaleleka kuloo ndlu; yawa, yadilika didli!”" 
Matthew7:28 Akuba ewathethile la mazwi uYesu, isihlwele sabantu samangaliswa kukufundisa kwakhe," 
Matthew7:29 kuba wayefundisa ngegunya, engafundisi njengabachazi-mthetho." 
Matthew8:1 Akuhla entabeni apho uYesu, walandelwa ngabantu abaninzi." 
Matthew8:2 Kwabonakala kusiza umntu oneqhenqa, owaqubuda phambi kwakhe, wathi: “Nkosi, ndiyazi ukuba unako ukundihlambulula ukuba uyathanda.”" 
Matthew8:3 Wasolula isandla uYesu, wamchukumisa esithi: “Ndiyathanda, hlambuluka.” Lahlambuluka kwangoko iqhenqa lakhe." 
Matthew8:4 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Lumka ungaxeleli bani. Hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, wenze umnikelo wezo zinto uMosis wazimiselayo, ube bubungqina ebantwini bokuhlanjululwa kwakho.”" 
Matthew8:5 Kwathi uYesu akungena eKapernahum, wahlangatyezwa ngumphathi-butho wamajoni, owambongozayo" 
Matthew8:6 esithi: “Nkosi, isicaka sam silele ngendlu. Asisaphakami; sithuthunjelwa gqitha.”" 
Matthew8:7 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ndofika ndisiphilise.” 
Matthew8:8 Waphendula umphathi-butho wathi: “Nkosi, andifanelekanga ukuba ungene phantsi kwentungo yendlu yam. Thetha nje ilizwi; sophiliswa isicaka sam." 
Matthew8:9 Nam ndingumntu ophantsi kwegunya labanye, kwaye ndikwanamajoni aphantsi kwam: kweli ndithi: ‘Yiya,’ liye; kweliya ndithi: ‘Yiza,’ lize; kwisicaka sam ndithi: ‘Yenza oku,’ sikwenze.”" 
Matthew8:10 UYesu wamangaliswa akukuva oku, waza wathi kwababemlandela: “Inene, andikafumani namnye onokholo olungaka nkqu nakwaSirayeli." 
Matthew8:11 Ndithi kuni, baninzi abaya kuvela empumalanga nasentshonalanga babe sesidlweni kunye noAbraham noIsake noYakobi apho lukhona ulawulo lukaThixo olufezekileyo." 
Matthew8:12 Kodwa abo babekade bengabohlanga olulawulwa nguThixo bolahlelwa phandle ebumnyameni lee, apho baya kulila khona bengcungcutheka.”" 
Matthew8:13 Waza uYesu wathi kumphathi-butho: “Hamba ke; ngenxa yokuba ukholiwe, wokwenzelwa oko.” Saza saphila kwangelo xesha isicaka eso." 
Matthew8:14 UYesu waya kwaPetros, wabona umkhwekazi kaPetros elele ephethwe yifiva." 
Matthew8:15 Wabamba isandla sakhe; yamyeka ifiva, waphakama, walungiselela uYesu ukutya." 
Matthew8:16 Kwakuhlwa kwaziswa kuYesu abantu abaninzi ababeneendimoni. Wazikhupha ngelizwi ezo ndimoni, wabaphilisa bonke abantu ababegula." 
Matthew8:17 Oku wakwenza ukuze kuzaliseke ilizwi *lomshumayeli uIsaya elithi: “Wabuthathela kuye ubulwelwe bethu, wazisusa kuthi izifo zethu.”" 
Matthew8:18 UYesu akuyibona indimbane emngqongileyo, wayalela ukuba kuyiwe phesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili." 
Matthew8:19 Kweza mchazi-mthetho uthile kuye, wathi: “Mfundisi, ndiya kuba ngumlandeli wakho, ndiye naphi na apho uthe waya khona.”" 
Matthew8:20 UYesu wathi kuye: “Iimpungutye zinemingxuma, neentaka zineendlwane, kodwa yena *uNyana woLuntu akanayo nendawo le yokufaka intloko.”" 
Matthew8:21 Omnye umfundi wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, ndivumele ndiye kungcwaba ubawo kuqala.”" 
Matthew8:22 UYesu wathi kuye: “Yiba ngumlandeli wam wena, ubayeke abafileyo, bangcwabe abafileyo babo.”" 
Matthew8:23 Kwathi uYesu akukhwela esikhitshaneni, bahamba naye abafundi bakhe." 
Matthew8:24 Kwehla isaqhwithi esikhulu elwandle apho, kangangokuba isikhitshana saphantse sagutyungelwa ngamaza. UYesu yena wayelele." 
Matthew8:25 Abafundi baya kuye, bamvusa, besithi: “Safa! Nkosi, sisindise!”" 
Matthew8:26 Wathi kubo: “Kutheni na ukuba noyike kangaka, nina balukholo luncinane?” Waphakama ke, wawukhalimela umoya namaza, kwabakho ukuzola okukhulu." 
Matthew8:27 Bamangaliswa abantu, baza bathi: “He bethu, ngumntu onjani lo ode alulanyelwe ngumoya nalulwandle!”" 
Matthew8:28 UYesu wafika kummandla waseGadara ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili, wadibana namadoda amabini awayevela emangcwabeni. Ayeneendimoni, ekhohlakele kangangokuba kwakungekho mntu wayenokuhamba ngaloo ndlela." 
Matthew8:29 Asuka akhala esithi: “Ufuna ntoni kuthi, Nyana kaThixo? Ngaba uze kusivisa iintlungu na, kungekabi lilo ixesha lazo?”" 
Matthew8:30 Mgama kwakukho umhlambi omkhulu weehagu edlelweni. 
Matthew8:31 Iindimoni zambongoza uYesu zisithi: “Ukuba uyasikhupha, sithumele kulaa mhlambi weehagu.”" 
Matthew8:32 Wathi kuzo: “Yiyani.” Zaphuma ke, zaya kungena ezihagwini. Wasuka umhlambi lowo wonke waphaphatheka, wehla ethambekeni, weyela elwandle, warhaxwa ngamanzi." 
Matthew8:33 Abalusi bezi hagu babaleka, bemka baya edolophini, bakuxela konke okwenzekileyo, bekubalisa nokwenzeke kwababephethwe ziindimoni." 
Matthew8:34 Yaphuma ke yonke loo dolophu ukuba ibonane noYesu. Bakudibana naye bambongoza okokuba aphume emideni yabo. 
Matthew9:1 UYesu wakhwela esikhitshaneni, wawela uLwandle lwaseGalili, waya edolophini yakowabo." 
Matthew9:2 Kwaza kwafika abantu bezise kuye ngokhuko indoda efe umzimba. UYesu elubona ukholo lwabo, wathi kofe umzimba: “Yomelela, nyana! Izono zakho zixolelwe.”" 
Matthew9:3 Baza abathile kubachazi-mthetho bathetha bodwa besithi: “Lo mfo unyelisa uThixo!” 
Matthew9:4 UYesu ke, ezazi iingcamango zabo, wathi: “Kutheni na ukuba nibe neengcamango ezikhohlakele kangaka?" 
Matthew9:5 Okukona kulula kukuphi na: kukho ukuthi: ‘Zixolelwe izono zakho,’ kukho nokuthi: ‘Vuka uhambe’?" 
Matthew9:6 Ke ukuze nazi ukuba yena uNyana woLuntu unalo igunya lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha – úthi kofe umzimba – vuka, uthathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe ugoduke!”" 
Matthew9:7 Waphakama ke, wagoduka." 
Matthew9:8 Bakukubona oku abantu, batsho boyika, bamdumisa uThixo, yena onika abantu igunya elingaka." 
Matthew9:9 UYesu waphuma apho, wathi edlula, wabona indoda egama linguMatewu, ihleli eofisini yerhafu, wathi kuyo: “Ndilandele.” Yaphakama, yamlandela." 
Matthew9:10 Kwathi xa uYesu wayesitya endlwini, into eninzi yabaqokeleli-rhafu *neyaboni yeza yahlala kunye naye nabafundi bakhe etafileni." 
Matthew9:11 Bakukubona oku *abaFarasi, bâthi kubafundi bakhe: “Kutheni na okokuba umfundisi wenu atye kunye nabaqokeleli-rhafu naboni?”" 
Matthew9:12 Ekuvile oko uYesu, wathi kubo: “Ugqirha akafuneki nganto kwabaphilileyo, ufuneka kwabagulayo." 
Matthew9:13 Khaniye kufunisisa okokuba ithetha ukuthini na le ndawo eziBhalweni ithi: ‘Ndithanda inceba, andithandi mbingelelo.’ Ke mna andizanga kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni.”" 
Matthew9:14 Abafundi bakaYohane umbhaptizi beza kuYesu, bambuza bathi: “Kutheni na okokuba thina *nabaFarasi sisoloko sizila ukutya nje, kanti bona abafundi bakho abazili?”" 
Matthew9:15 Wabaphendula wathi: “Ngaba abakhaphi bomyeni bangákhedama na umyeni esenabo? Abangekhe! Kodwa lofika ixesha lokuba umyeni asuswe kubo, bandule ke ukuzila." 
Matthew9:16 “Kaloku akukho mntu uthungela isiziba esitsha kwisambatho esidala, kuba sofinyela, sisikrazule isambatho eso." 
Matthew9:17 Kananjalo akukho mntu uyitha kwiimvaba ezindala iwayini entsha engekabili, kuba ukuba uthe wenjenjalo, zogqabhuka zonakale iimvaba, ichitheke iwayini. Kaloku iwayini engekabili ithiwa kwiimvaba ezintsha, ize ke igcinakale iwayini, zingonakali iimvaba.”" 
Matthew9:18 Kwathi esazithetha kubo uYesu ezi zinto, kwafika igosa *lendlu yesikhungo, laqubuda kuye, lathi: “Intombi yam isand' ukubhubha. Yiza, uyibeke isandla; iya kuphila.”" 
Matthew9:19 Waphakama uYesu, walilandela, ehamba nabafundi bakhe." 
Matthew9:20 Ke umfazi owayehlamba engaphezi iminyaka elishumi elinambini esifa, wasondela ngasemva, wachukumisa umqukumbelo wesambatho sikaYesu," 
Matthew9:21 kuba wayesithi: “Ukuba ndithe ndachukumisa nokuba sisambatho sakhe esi, ndophiliswa.”" 
Matthew9:22 UYesu wajika, wambona, wathi: “Yomelela, ntombi! Ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile.” Waphiliswa kwangoko loo mfazi." 
Matthew9:23 Wafika ke uYesu endlwini yegosa elo, wazibona iimvumi zomngcwabo, ekubona ukukhathazeka kwesihlwele ebesikho," 
Matthew9:24 waza wathi: “Khaniphume. Intombazana le ayibhubhanga; ilele nje.” Basuka bamwa ngentsini. 
Matthew9:25 Bakuba bonke bekhutshiwe endlwini, uYesu wangena, wabamba isandla sentombazana leyo, wayivusa." 
Matthew9:26 Yaduma loo nto kuwo wonke loo mmandla. 
Matthew9:27 UYesu wemka apho, kwathi edlula walandelwa ziimfama ezimbini, zikhwaza zisithi: “Nyana kaDavide, senzele inceba.”" 
Matthew9:28 Akungena endlwini uYesu, zeza kuye iimfama ezo, waza uYesu wathi kuzo: “Niyakholwa na okokuba ndinako ukukwenza oku?” Zaphendula zathi: “Ewe, Nkosi.”" 
Matthew9:29 Waza uYesu wawachukumisa amehlo azo, esithi: “Makwenzeke kuni ngokokholo lwenu.”" 
Matthew9:30 Avuleka ke amehlo azo. Waza uYesu waziyala kakhulu, esithi: “Lumkani kungàziwa mntu oku.”" 
Matthew9:31 Kodwa zona zemka zazibhengeza iindaba ezingoYesu kuwo wonke loo mmandla. 
Matthew9:32 Ukuphuma kwazo ezi mfama, nako kufika isimumu esiphethwe yindimoni, siziswa kuYesu." 
Matthew9:33 Kwathi yakukhutshwa indimoni wasuka wathetha lowo ubesisimumu; baza bamagaliswa abantu, besithi: “Into enje ayizange yenzeke kwaSirayeli.”" 
Matthew9:34 Kodwa bona *abaFarasi bâthi: “Ngumphathi weendimoni lo umnika amandla okukhupha iindimoni ezi.” 
Matthew9:35 UYesu wayejikeleza kuzo zonke izixeko needolophu, efundisa *ezindlwini zesikhungo, eshumayela iindaba ezimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo, ephilisa abantu kwizifo ngezifo." 
Matthew9:36 Akuzibona izihlwele, wavelana nazo, kuba bezinxubile, zityhafile ngokweegusha ezingenamalusi." 
Matthew9:37 Ke wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Umsebenzi wokuvuna mkhulu, kodwa bambalwa abavuni." 
Matthew9:38 Thandazani ke ngoko kuMnini-sivuno, okokuba athumele abasebenzi, baye kuvuna.”" 
Matthew10:1 UYesu wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini, wabanika igunya lokukhupha iindimoni nelokuphilisa abantu kwizifo ngezifo." 
Matthew10:2 Nânga ke amagama abafundi abalishumi elinambini: kuqala, uSimon, lo kuthiwa nguPetros, noAndreya umntakwabo; uYakobi, noYohane umntakwabo, oonyana bakaZebhedi;" 
Matthew10:3 uFilipu noBhartolomeyu; uTomas noMatewu, umqokeleli-rhafu; uYakobi, unyana ka-Alifeyu, noTadeyu;" 
Matthew10:4 uSimon iTsha-ntliziyo, noJudas Sikariyoti, owayeza kungcatsha uYesu." 
Matthew10:5 UYesu wabathuma aba bafundi balishumi elinambini, ebayalele ngokuthi: “Ze ningayithathi indlela eya kweleentlanga, ningangeni kwiidolophu zamaSamariya." 
Matthew10:6 Yiyani kanye kwiigusha ezilahlekileyo zakwaSirayeli. 
Matthew10:7 Ekuhambeni kwenu ze nishumayele nisithi: ‘Ulawulo lukaThixo lusemnyango!’ 
Matthew10:8 Philisani abagulayo, nivuse abafileyo, nihlambulule abaneqhenqa, nikhuphe iindimoni. Namkelé ngesisa, ke ngoko yiphani ngesisa." 
Matthew10:9 Ze ningazameli ukuba nibe nemali emibhinqweni yenu, nokuba yigolide, nokuba yisiliva, nokuba lubhedu." 
Matthew10:10 Ze ningaphathi ngxowa, nazambatho ngazibini, nazihlangu, namsimelelo. Kaloku umvuzo ulilungelo kumntu osebenzayo." 
Matthew10:11 “Nakusiphi na isixeko okanye idolophu enithe nangena kuyo, funani lowo unokuthi anamkele, nihlale khona de nimke kuloo ndawo." 
Matthew10:12 Nakungena emzini, ze nibabulise abakuwo." 
Matthew10:13 Ukuba abantu baloo mzi bayanamkela, basikeleleni, kodwa ukuba abanamkeli, uxolo lwenu malubuyele kuni." 
Matthew10:14 Ukuba bathe àbanamkela, okanye àbawaphulaphula amazwi enu, ze nithi nakuphuma kuloo mzi, okanye kweso sixeko, nivuthulule uthuli olusezinyaweni zenu nikhalala." 
Matthew10:15 Inene, eso sixeko siya kuva ubunzima ngaphezu kweSodom neGomora ngomhla womgwebo.”" 
Matthew10:16 “Niyabona, ndinithuma njengeegusha phakathi kweengcuka. Ke ngoko yibani nobulumko njengeenyoka, nilulame njengamahobe." 
Matthew10:17 Balumkeleni abantu, kuba baya kuninikela ezinkundleni, nikatswe *ezindlwini zesikhungo." 
Matthew10:18 Nomiswa phambi kwabalawuli nookumkani ngenxa yam. Kulapho niya kundingqinela khona kubo nakuzo iintlanga. 
Matthew10:19 Xa bathe banisa enkundleni yamatyala, ze ningaxhaleli ukuba nothetha ntoni na, nokuba nothetha njani na; kothi, lakufika elo xesha, niyinikwe into eniya kuyithetha," 
Matthew10:20 kuba asinini abaya kuthetha, nguMoya kaYihlo oya kuthetha kuni." 
Matthew10:21 “Oonyana bomntu omnye baya kusana ekufeni, uyise anikele umntwana, bathi nabantwana babavukele abazali, babanikele ukuba babulawe." 
Matthew10:22 Niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam. Ke lowo unyamezelayo kude kube sekupheleni wosindiswa. 
Matthew10:23 Xa banitshutshisayo kule dolophu, yiyani kwenye, kuba inene, aniyi kuzigqiba iidolophu zakwaSirayeli engekafiki *uNyana woLuntu." 
Matthew10:24 “Akukho mfundi mkhulu kunomfundisi wakhe, kungekho sicaka sikhulu kunenkosi yaso." 
Matthew10:25 Makaneliseke umfundi kukuphatheka njengomfundisi wakhe, nesicaka kukuphatheka njengenkosi yaso. Ukuba umninimzi babemthuka ngokuthi unguSathana, ungáthini na ukungàthukwa ngakumbi ngoSathana umzi wakhe?”" 
Matthew10:26 “Musani ukuboyika abantu. Akukho nto igqunyiweyo ingayi kutyhilwa, nefihlakeleyo ingayi kwaziwa." 
Matthew10:27 Endikuthethayo kuni ebumnyameni, kuthetheni nina ekukhanyeni; enikusetyezelweyo nikubhengeze." 
Matthew10:28 Musani ukuboyika abo banibulala ngokwasenyameni, kodwa bengenako ukubulala umphefumlo. Yoyikani uThixo, yena onako ukutshabalalisa umphefumlo kwanomzimba esihogweni." 
Matthew10:29 Andithi, iintaka ezincinci zithengiswa ngambini ngesenti? Kanti akukho nanye kuzo iya kuwa emhlabeni engavumanga uYihlo." 
Matthew10:30 Nina ke, kwaneenwele ezi zentloko yenu zibaliwe zonke." 
Matthew10:31 Ke musani ukoyika: nixabisekile kuneentaka ezininzi nina!” 
Matthew10:32 “Wonke umntu othe wandivuma phambi kwabantu, nam ndothi ndimvume kuBawo osezulwini." 
Matthew10:33 Ke ondikhanyelayo ebantwini, nam ndiya kumkhanyela kuBawo osezulwini.”" 
Matthew10:34 “Ze ningabi ndizise uxolo ehlabathini. Hayi, andizisanga luxolo, koko ndizise imbambano." 
Matthew10:35 Ndize kuxabanisa unyana noyise, intombi nonina, umolokazana no ninazala." 
Matthew10:36 Iintshaba zomntu zoba ngabendlu yakhe. 
Matthew10:37 “Othe wathanda uyise nokuba ngunina ngaphezu kwam, akandifanelanga; nothe wathanda unyana nokuba yintombi yakhe ngaphezu kwam, akandifanelanga." 
Matthew10:38 Nalowo uthe akawuthwala umnqamlezo wakhe andilandele, akandifanelanga." 
Matthew10:39 Othe wabuzuza ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo; nothe walahlekelwa bubomi bakhe ngenxa yam, wobuzuza." 
Matthew10:40 “Othe wanamkela nina, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, wamkela lowo wandithumayo." 
Matthew10:41 Othe wamkela *umshumayeli ngokuba engumshumayeli, wofumana umvuzo womshumayeli; nothe wamkela ilungisa ngokuba lililungisa, wofumana umvuzo welungisa." 
Matthew10:42 Othe wapha nokuba mnye kwaba bancinane nekomityi le yamanzi, ngokuba engumfundi wam, inene ngekhe aphosane nomvuzo wakhe nakanjani na.”" 
Matthew11:1 Kwathi uYesu akugqiba ukubayalela abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini, wemka apho, waya kushumayela kwiidolophu zalapho." 
Matthew11:2 UYohane, esentolongweni, weva ngemisebenzi kaKrestu, waza wathumela abafundi bakhe," 
Matthew11:3 ukuba babuze kuye, bathi: “Ungulowo uzayo na wena, okanye masilinde omnye?”" 
Matthew11:4 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo: “Hambani niye kumbalisela uYohane ezi zinto nizibonayo nenizivayo;" 
Matthew11:5 okokuba iimfama zibuya zibone, iziqhwala ziyahamba, abaneqhenqa bayahlanjululwa, izithulu ziyeva, abafileyo bayavuswa, abasweleyo bayazishunyayezwa iindaba ezimnandi." 
Matthew11:6 Unoyolo othe akakhutyekiswa ndim!” 
Matthew11:7 Bakuba bemkile ke abathunywa bakaYohane, uYesu wathetha ngoYohane kwisihlwele, esithi: “Naniphume nisiya kubona ntoni na entlango? Yayiyingcongolo na izanya-zanyiswa ngumoya?" 
Matthew11:8 Naniphume nisiya kubona ntoni na kakade? Yayingumntu ohombileyo na? Niyabona, abo bahombayo basezindlwini zookumkani." 
Matthew11:9 Ngaba naniphumele ntoni kakade? *Yayingumshumayeli? Ewe, ndithi kuni, nibone oyena ungumshumayeli ngokupheleleyo." 
Matthew11:10 UYohane ngulowo uThixo atshoyo ngaye *eziBhalweni ukuthi: “ ‘Naso isigidimi sam esiya kukwandulela, sikugabulele izigcawu.’" 
Matthew11:11 “Ndithi kuni, inene, kubo bonke abazelwe kweli hlabathi akukho bani mkhulu kunoYohane umbhaptizi; kanti noyena mncinane ùphantsi kolawulo olutsha lukaThixo, mkhulu kunaye." 
Matthew11:12 Ukususela kwimihla kaYohane umbhaptizi, kude kube ngoku, abantu babegxalathelana ukuya kulo ulawulo lukaThixo, abazimiseleyo bengena benyathelana." 
Matthew11:13 Kwakuvakaliswa izibhalo zabo bonke *abashumayeli *nomthetho kaMosis, de kwafika uYohane." 
Matthew11:14 UYohane nguye uEliya olindelweyo – ukuba ngaba niyavuma ukukwamkela oko. 
Matthew11:15 Oneendlebe zokuva makeve. 
Matthew11:16 “Ndiya kubafanisa nantoni na ke abantu besi sizukulwana? Bafana nabantwana abahleli ebaleni lembutho, abanye bebhekisa kwabanye besithi:" 
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Sanombelela, naza nina anaxhentsa; sanihlabelela ingoma yesililo, naza nina analila!’" 
Matthew11:18 “Kuba kaloku wafika uYohane umbhaptizi, ezila ukutya, engaseli wayini, kwaza kwathiwa: ‘Unendimoni.’" 
Matthew11:19 Wafika yena uNyana woLuntu esidla esela; kwaza kwathiwa: ‘Khanibone, umntu onyolukileyo, indlamanzi, umhlobo wabaqokeleli-rhafu naboni!’ Noko ke ubulumko bukaThixo bubonakala buyinyaniso ngayo yonke imisebenzi esisiqhamo sabo.”" 
Matthew11:20 Waza uYesu wazisola ngokungaguquki kwazo iidolophu apho wayesenza khona inkoliso yemimangaliso yakhe, esithi:" 
Matthew11:21 “Mawoo, wena Korazin! Mawoo, wena Bhetesayida! Ukuba imimangaliso eyenzeke kuni yayenzeke eTire naseSidon, abemi bakhona ngebaguqukayo kwakudala, bambatha ezirhwexayo, bazigalela uthuthu." 
Matthew11:22 Ewe, ndithi kuni, ngomhla womgwebo koba nokunyamezeleka okweTire nokweSidon kunokwenu." 
Matthew11:23 Wena Kapernahum, unga ungaphakanyiselwa ezulwini na? Hayi, uya kuphoswa phantsi kwelabafileyo. Ukuba yayithe yenzeka eSodom imimangaliso eyenzeke kuwe, ngeyisekho nanamhla." 
Matthew11:24 Ewe, ndithi kuni, ngomhla womgwebo koba nokunyamezeleka okweSodom kunokwenu.”" 
Matthew11:25 Ngelo xesha uYesu wathi: “Ndiyakudumisa, wena Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba, ngokuzifihla kwakho ezi zinto kwizilumko neengqondi, wazityhilela iintsana." 
Matthew11:26 Ewe, Bawo, wênjenje kuba kukholekile kuwe." 
Matthew11:27 “Zonke izinto ziphathiswe mna nguBawo; kananjalo akukho bani umaziyo uNyana, ngaphandle koYise, kungekho bani umaziyo uYise ngaphandle koNyana, nalowo uNyana athanda ukumtyhilela." 
Matthew11:28 “Yizani kum, nina nonke nisindwayo, nibulalekayo; ndoniphumza." 
Matthew11:29 Ngenani edyokhweni yam, nifunde kum, kuba mna ndilulamile, ndingontliziyo ithobekileyo. Nothi ke nizifumanele ukuphumla iintliziyo zenu," 
Matthew11:30 kuba idyokhwe yam ayityabuli, nomthwalo wam ulula.”" 
Matthew12:1 Ngelo xesha uYesu wacanda emasimini *ngoMhla wokuPhumla baza bathi abafundi bakhe belambile, bakha izikhwebu zengqolowa, batya." 
Matthew12:2 *AbaFarasi, bekubona oko, bathi kuye: “Khangela, abafundi bakho benza okungavumelekanga ngoMhla wokuPhumla.”" 
Matthew12:3 Wathi kubo: “Anizange nikufunde na awakwenzayo uDavide mhla walamba yena neqela lakhe? 
Matthew12:4 Kaloku wangena endlwini kaThixo, wazitya izonka ezazinikelwe kuThixo. Kanti ngokomthetho ezi zonka yena neqela lakhe babengamelwe kuzitya. Ngababingeleli kuphela ababenelo lungelo." 
Matthew12:5 Khona, anifundanga na *emthethweni kaMosis okokuba ababingeleli bayawaphula umthetho woMhla wokuPhumla endlwini kaThixo, bangabi natyala noko?" 
Matthew12:6 Ke ndithi kuni, lo ulapha mkhulu kunendlu." 
Matthew12:7 Ukuba benisazi okokuba ithetha ukuthini na le ndawo ithi *eziBhalweni: ‘Ndithanda inceba, andithandi mbingelelo,’ ngeningabagwebanga abangenatyala." 
Matthew12:8 Kaloku *uNyana woLuntu uyiNkosi yawo noMhla wokuPhumla.” 
Matthew12:9 Emkile apho uYesu, waya kungena *kwindlu yesikhungo." 
Matthew12:10 Apho babona umntu owome isandla. Abantu abathile, benenjongo yokummangalela uYesu, bambuza besithi: “Ngaba kuvumelekile na ukuphilisa *ngoMhla wokuPhumla?”" 
Matthew12:11 Waza wathi kubo: “Ukuba ngaba kukho ubani kuni enegusha, yaza loo gusha yeyela emngxunyeni ngoMhla wokuPhumla, akayi kuyirhola na?" 
Matthew12:12 Ubeke phi ke umntu ukuxabiseka kunegusha? Ngoko ke kulungile ukwenza inceba ngoMhla wokuPhumla.” 
Matthew12:13 Wathi ke kuloo mntu: “Solule isandla sakho.” Wasolula, saza saphila isandla sakhe, safana nesinye." 
Matthew12:14 Baphuma ke abaFarasi, babhunga ukumbulala uYesu." 
Matthew12:15 Ekwazile oko, uYesu wemka apho. UYesu walandelwa ngabantu abaninzi, waza wabaphilisa bonke," 
Matthew12:16 ebayala ukuba bangaxeleli bani ngaye," 
Matthew12:17 ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi likaThixo elathethwa *ngumshumayeli uIsaya lisithi: 
Matthew12:18 “Naso isiCaka sam endisinyulileyo, eso sisenyongweni kum, endikholiweyo siso. Ndosifaka uMoya wam, sizazise isigwebo iintlanga." 
Matthew12:19 Asiyi kuba nephike sikhwaze, lingayi kuviwa bani ezitalatweni izwi laso." 
Matthew12:20 Ingcongolo eyaphukileyo asiyi kuyiqhawula, nesibane esilozizayo asiyi kusicima. Siya kubuzinzisa bude bongame ubulungisa." 
Matthew12:21 Kananjalo iintlanga zokholosa ngaso.” 
Matthew12:22 Kwathi kwaziswa kuYesu umntu ophethwe yindimoni, eyimfama, esisimumu. UYesu wamphilisa loo mntu, wathetha, wabona nokubona." 
Matthew12:23 Samangaliswa sonke isihlwele, sathi: “Akungebi nguNyana kaDavide lo?”" 
Matthew12:24 Kodwa bona *abaFarasi, bakukuva oku, bathi: “Iindimoni ezi uzikhupha ngoSathana, umphathi weendimoni.”" 
Matthew12:25 UYesu, ezazi iingcamango zabo, wathi kubo: “Bonke uburhulumente obuvukelana bodwa buyabhanga; nedolophu, nokuba ngumzi, ovukelana wodwa, awunakuba nankqubela." 
Matthew12:26 Ke ukuba uSathana ukhupha uSathana, evukelene kwayedwa nje, lothini na ukungawi ulawulo lwakhe?" 
Matthew12:27 Ukuba iindimoni ndizikhupha ngoSathana, bazikhupha ngabani bona oonyana benu? Mabaphendule, nigwetywe ngabo." 
Matthew12:28 Ukuba ke ndizikhupha ngoMoya kaThixo iindimoni, ulawulo lukaThixo aluthwasanga, lugalelekile kuni." 
Matthew12:29 “Angathini umntu ukungena endlwini yegorha, ahluthe impahla yalo, engathanga kuqala alibophe igorha elo, aze ke andule ukuyiphanga indlu leyo." 
Matthew12:30 “Lowo ungekho kwicala lam, uchasene nam, nalowo ungandincedisiyo ukuqokelela, uyachitha." 
Matthew12:31 Ke ngoko, ndithi kuni, zonke izono nezinyeliso baya kuzixolelwa abantu, kodwa kona ukunyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele akuyi kuxolelwa." 
Matthew12:32 Othe wathetha ilizwi elichasene naye *uNyana woLuntu uya kuxolelwa, kodwa othe wathetha elichasene noMoya oyiNgcwele akayi kuxolelwa kweli phakade nakwelizayo.”" 
Matthew12:33 “Ukuba nithi umthi ulungile, mawuvelise iziqhamo ezilungileyo; ukuba ke nithi ngumthi ombi, mawuvelise iziqhamo ezibi. Kaloku umthi uqondwa ngeziqhamo zawo." 
Matthew12:34 Nzalandini yamarhamba, ningáthini na ukuba nako ukuthetha okulungileyo, nikhohlakele nje? Kaloku umlomo womntu uphuphuma oko intliziyo izele kuko." 
Matthew12:35 Umntu olungileyo uvelisa ukulunga okukuye. Ke okhohlakeleyo uvelisa inkohlakalo ekuye. 
Matthew12:36 “Ke, ndithi kuni, ngomhla womgwebo abantu baya kuziphendulela ngelizwi ngalinye eliphuthileyo abathe balithetha." 
Matthew12:37 Umntu uya kugwetywa, okanye akhululwe, ngokwamazwi akhe.”" 
Matthew12:38 Abathile kubachazi-mthetho *nabaFarasi bathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, sicela ukuba usibonise umqondiso.”" 
Matthew12:39 Wabaphendula wathi kubo: “Sisizukulwana esikhohlakeleyo, esikrexezayo ngokunganyaniseki kuThixo, esifuna umqondiso; kanti asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, ingenguwo umqondiso kaJona;" 
Matthew12:40 kuba njengokuba uJona wayemihla mithathu nabusuku buthathu esiswini sesilo esikhulu solwandle, wothi naye *uNyana woLuntu abe mihla mithathu nabusuku buthathu emathunjini omhlaba." 
Matthew12:41 Ngomhla womgwebo abantu baseNiniva bophakama babamangalele abantu besi sizukulwana, kuba bona bâguquka ngentshumayelo kaJona, kanti ke omkhulu kunoJona nanku phakathi kwenu." 
Matthew12:42 Ngomhla womgwebo ukumkanikazi wasezantsi wophakama abamangalele abantu besi sizukulwana, kuba wavela eziphelweni zomhlaba, esiza kuva ubulumko bukaSolomon, kanti ke omkhulu kunoSolomon nanku phakathi kwenu.”" 
Matthew12:43 “Xa indimoni ithe yaphuma emntwini, icanda ezinkqantosini, ifuna indawo yokuphumla; ize yakuba ingayifumani," 
Matthew12:44 isuke ithi: ‘Ndiya kubuyela endlwini yam endaphuma kuyo.’ Ithi yakufika, iyifumane izé, itshayelwe, ilungisiwe;" 
Matthew12:45 ize ke ijike iye kuphuthuma ezinye iindimoni ezisixhenxe ezikhohlakeleyo kunayo, zingene ke zihlale khona; ize imeko yamva yaloo mntu ibe mbi kuneyakuqala. Kuya kuba njalo nakwesi sizukulwana singendawo.”" 
Matthew12:46 Kwathi uYesu esathetha nesihlwele, kwafika abantakwabo nonina, bema phandle, befuna ukuthetha naye." 
Matthew12:47 Kwaza kwakho othi kuye: “Nanku unyoko nabantakwenu phandle, befuna ukuthetha nawe.”" 
Matthew12:48 Waphendula wathi kulowo wayesitsho: “Ngubani umama? Ngoobani bona abantakwethu?” 
Matthew12:49 Esalatha abafundi bakhe ngesandla, wathi: “Nanku umama, naba abantakwethu." 
Matthew12:50 Kaloku lowo uyenzayo intando kaBawo osezulwini nguye ongumntakwethu, nodade wethu, nomama.”" 
Matthew13:1 Kwangaloo mini uYesu waphuma endlwini, waya kuhlala ngaselwandle. Sahlanganisana ngakuye isihlwele," 
Matthew13:2 saba sikhulu kangangokuba yena waya kukhwela esikhitshaneni, wahlala kuso. Isihlwele sona sema elunxwemeni." 
Matthew13:3 UYesu ke wasifundisa isihlwele izinto ezininzi ngemizekeliso, esithi: “Kwakukho umhlwayeli owaphuma waya kuhlwayela." 
Matthew13:4 Ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe inxenye yembewu yawa endleleni, zeza iintaka zayichola zayigqiba." 
Matthew13:5 Enye imbewu yawa endaweni elulwalwa, apho ibingenamhlaba waneleyo; yantshula ke kwangoko, ngenxa yokungabi nabunzulu bamhlaba." 
Matthew13:6 Kuthe ke, lakuba shushu ilanga, yatsha, yathi ngenxa yokuba ingenazingcambu zendeleyo, yoma kwaphela." 
Matthew13:7 Enye yawa endaweni enokhula, olwathi lwakukhula lwayiminxa." 
Matthew13:8 Enye yawa kumhlaba olungileyo, yavelisa isiqhamo: enye yanika ikhulu, enye amashumi amathandathu, nenye amashumi amathathu." 
Matthew13:9 Oneendlebe zokuva makeve.” 
Matthew13:10 Beza kuYesu abafundi bakhe, bathi kuye: “Kutheni na ukuba uthethe nabo ngemizekeliso?”" 
Matthew13:11 Waphendula wathi: “Kungenxa yokuba nina nikunikiwe ukuzazi iimfihlelo ezingolawulo lukaThixo, kodwa bona abakunikwanga." 
Matthew13:12 Lowo unako uya kunikwa, abe nako nangaphezulu; kodwa lowo ungenako uya kuhluthwa kwanoko anako." 
Matthew13:13 Ngenxa yoko ndithetha nabo ngemizekeliso. Kaloku bebona nje, ababoni; besiva nje abeva, bengaqondi nakuqonda." 
Matthew13:14 Kwenzeka kubo njengoko *umshumayeli uIsaya walithethayo ilizwi likaThixo esithi: “ ‘Nàkuphulaphula niphulaphule, ningaqondi noko; nàkujonga nijonge, ningaboni nto." 
Matthew13:15 Kuba ingqiqo yaba bantu ibuthuntu, bazivingcile iindlebe zabo, bawavala namehlo abo. Kungenjalo babeya kubona, beve ngeendlebe zabo, baqonde ngeengqondo zabo, baze babuyele kum, ndize ndibaphilise.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Kodwa nina ninoyolo, kuba ninamehlo abonayo, kwaneendlebe ezivayo." 
Matthew13:17 Ke ndithi kuni, inene, baninzi *abashumayeli nabantu abangamalungisa ababenqwenela ukuzibona izinto enizibonayo, àbazibona, nokuziva izinto enizivayo, àbaziva.”" 
Matthew13:18 “Nina ke, yiveni ingcaciso yomzekeliso ngomhlwayeli." 
Matthew13:19 Ukuba ubani uthi azive iindaba ezingolawulo lukaThixo, angàziqondi, uyeza ongendawo akuhluthe oko kwakuhlwayelwe entliziyweni yakhe. Yiyo leyo imbewu ehlwayelwe endleleni." 
Matthew13:20 Imbewu eyahlwayelwa elulwalweni ifanekisa lowo uzivayo iindaba ezi, athi kwangoko azamkele ngovuyo." 
Matthew13:21 Onjalo akanazingcambu zendeleyo; uma okomzuzwana kuphela, athi kwakufika imbandezelo okanye intshutshiso ngenxa yeendaba ezi, oyisakale kwangoko." 
Matthew13:22 Eyahlwayelwa endaweni enokhula izekelisa lowo uzivayo iindaba ezi, aze ke amaxhala eli phakade, nokulukuhla kobutyebi, kuziminxe iindaba, kungabikho siqhamo." 
Matthew13:23 Eyahlwayelwa emhlabeni olungileyo ifanekisa lowo uzivayo aziqonde iindaba ezi, aze avelise isiqhamo, omnye ikhulu, omnye amashumi amathandathu, nomye amashumi amathathu.”" 
Matthew13:24 Wabenzela nomnye umzekeliso uYesu, esithi: “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa, nomntu owahlwayela imbewu elungileyo entsimini yakhe." 
Matthew13:25 Kwathi ke, xa baleleyo abantu, kwafika utshaba lwakhe, lwahlwayela ukhula phakathi kwengqolowa, lwemka." 
Matthew13:26 Yakudubula ke ingqolowa, iqala ukuba neenkozo, lwabonakala ukhula." 
Matthew13:27 Zaza izicaka zaya kumnini-mzi, zathi kuye: ‘Nkosi, ibingeyombewu ilungileyo na oyihlwayeleyo entsimini yakho? Ngaba luvela phi na ke ukhula?’" 
Matthew13:28 Wathi kuzo: ‘Le nto yenziwe lutshaba.’ Zaza izicaka zathi kuye: ‘Ngaba ufuna siye kuluncothula na ukhula?’ 
Matthew13:29 Kodwa yena wathi: ‘Hayi, hleze kuthi xa nincothula ukhula, nincothule kwanengqolowa." 
Matthew13:30 Luyekeni ukhula, lukhule kunye nengqolowa, kude kube lixesha lokuvuna. Xa kuvunwayo ke, ndothi kubavuni: “Kuqala qokelelani ukhula, nilubophe izithungu, nilutshise, nize ke ingqolowa niyiqokelelele esiseleni sam.” ’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Wabenzela nomnye umzekeliso uYesu, esithi: “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nokhozo lwembewu yemostade, athe ubani waluthatha, waluhlwayela entsimini yakhe." 
Matthew13:32 Ukhozo lwemostade lolona luncinane kunazo zonke iintlobo zembewu, kanti lwakukhula luba lukhulu kunayo yonke imifuno, lube ngumthi omkhulu kangangokuba neentaka zifike, zakhele emasebeni awo.”" 
Matthew13:33 UYesu wabenzela nomnye umzekeliso, esithi: “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa negwele awalithathayo umfazi, walixovulela kumgubo ozizitya ezithathu, laza layinyusa intlama.”" 
Matthew13:34 Zonke ezi zinto uYesu wazithetha kwizihlwele ngemizekeliso. Akathethanga nto kuzo kungengamizekeliso. 
Matthew13:35 Ngokwenjenjalo wakuzalisekisa okwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli esithi: “Ndiya kuthetha ngemizekeliso, ndizityhile izinto ezazifihlakele kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi.”" 
Matthew13:36 Wazindulula ke izihlwele uYesu, wangena endlwini. Beza kuye abafundi bakhe, bathi: “Khawusicacisele umzekeliso ngokhula olusentsimini.”" 
Matthew13:37 Waphendula wathi: “Lowo uhlwayela imbewu elungileyo *nguNyana woLuntu. 
Matthew13:38 Intsimi le lihlabathi. Yona imbewu elungileyo ngabantu abalawulwa nguThixo. Ke lona ukhula ngabantu bongendawo. 
Matthew13:39 Utshaba oluluhlwayelayo ngumtyholi. Ukuvuna kukupheliswa kweli phakade. Abavuni zizithunywa zezulu. 
Matthew13:40 Njengoko luqokelelwayo ukhula, lutshiswe, koba njalo ekuphelisweni kweli phakade." 
Matthew13:41 UNyana woLuntu wozithuma izithunywa zakhe, zibaqokelele bangabikho apho alawula khona bonke abalahlekisayo, nabo bonke abenza okuchasene nomthetho," 
Matthew13:42 zibaphose kwiziko elivutha umlilo, apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokungcungcutheka." 
Matthew13:43 Bothi ke abangamalungisa baqaqambe ngokwelanga bekwikomkhulu likaYise. Oneendlebe zokuva makeve.” 
Matthew13:44 “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nobutyebi obufihlwe entsimini, waza ubani wabubhaqa, wabugqumelela kwakhona, wathi, evuya kakhulu, waya kuthengisa konke anako, wayithenga loo ntsimi.”" 
Matthew13:45 “Kananjalo ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nomrhwebi ohamba efuna *iiperile ezintle," 
Matthew13:46 othi akubhaqa perile ithile ixabisekileyo, aye kuthengisa konke anako, ayithenge loo perile.”" 
Matthew13:47 “Kananjalo ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nomnatha owaphoswa elwandle, wabambisa iintlobo ngeentlobo zeentlanzi;" 
Matthew13:48 ekuthe, wakuzala, watsalelwa elunxwemeni, kwahlalwa phantsi, ezilungileyo zaqokelelwa esityeni, ezimbi zalahlwa." 
Matthew13:49 Kuya kuba njalo ekuphelisweni kweli phakade. Zophuma izithunywa zezulu, zibakhethe abakhohlakeleyo kwabalungileyo," 
Matthew13:50 zibaphose kwiziko elivutha umlilo, apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokungcungcutheka.”" 
Matthew13:51 UYesu wathi: “Ngaba nikuqondile na konke oku?” Baphendula bathi: “Ewe.” 
Matthew13:52 Waza wathi kubo: “Ke ngoko, umchazi-mthetho ngamnye othe waba ngumfundi wezolawulo lukaThixo, ufana nomninimzi onokukhupha izinto ezintsha kwanezindala kuvimba wakhe.”" 
Matthew13:53 Kwathi, uYesu akugqiba ukuyenza le mizekeliso, wemka apho." 
Matthew13:54 Efikile kowabo, wafundisa endlwini yesikhungo. Bâmangaliseka kakhulu abo bamváyo, besithi: “Ngaba ubufumene phi na obu bulumko? Le mimangaliso yona?" 
Matthew13:55 Akanguye na unyana womchweli? Unina akanguye na uMariya? Abantakwabo asingabo na ooYakobi, noYose, noSimon, noJuda?" 
Matthew13:56 Noodade wabo àbahlali apha bonke na? Ngaba lo mntu uzifumene phi zonke ezi zinto?” 
Matthew13:57 Ngenxa yale nto ke bambukula. Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Kakade umshumayeli uyayinikwa imbeko; kukwelakowabo kuphela, ekhayeni lakhe, apho angayifumani khona.”" 
Matthew13:58 Ngenxa yokungakholwa kwabo akenzanga mimangaliso mininzi apho. 
Matthew14:1 Ngelo xesha uHerode, owayephethe, waziva iindaba ezingoYesu," 
Matthew14:2 waza wathi kwizicaka zakhe: “Lo nguYohane umbhaptizi. Uvukile kwabafileyo; yiyo le nto anamandla okwenza ezi zinto.” 
Matthew14:3 Kaloku uHerode wambamba uYohane, wamkhonkxa, wamfaka entolongweni. Oku wakwenza ngenxa yokuba yena Herode wayehlalisana noHerodiya umka-Filipu, umninawe wakhe." 
Matthew14:4 UYohane wasola uHerode, wamxelela ukuba akuvumelekanga ukuba ahlalisane naye." 
Matthew14:5 UHerode wafuna ukumbulala uYohane, kodwa wayesoyika abantu, kuba babesithi ungomnye *wabashumayeli bamandulo." 
Matthew14:6 Ngomhla wesikhumbuzo sokuzalwa kukaHerode, intombi kaHerodiya yangqungqa phambi kwababekho kwelo theko, yamkholisa uHerode," 
Matthew14:7 waza wayithembisa efunga okokuba woyinika nantoni na esukuba iyicela. 
Matthew14:8 Ke yona, iqhutywe ngunina, yathi: “Ndinike ngoku ngesitya intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi.”" 
Matthew14:9 Waba buhlungu ukumkani, kodwa ngenxa yesifungo, nangenxa yâbo babesethekweni kunye naye, wathi mayiyinikwe;" 
Matthew14:10 wathumela okokuba uYohane anqunyulwe intloko entolongweni apho. 
Matthew14:11 Yeziswa ke ngesitya intloko yakhe, yanikwa intombi leyo, eyathi yona yayisa kunina." 
Matthew14:12 Beza ke abafundi bakaYohane, basithatha isidumbu sakhe, basingcwaba; baza baya kuxelela uYesu." 
Matthew14:13 UYesu, evile ngokufa kukaYohane, wemka ngesikhitshana, waya kwindawo engenabantu eyedwa. Bekuvile oku abantu, baya kuye ngeenyawo, bevela ezidolophini." 
Matthew14:14 Ehlile ke esikhitshaneni, uYesu wabona isihlwele sabantu, wavelana naso, wabaphilisa abagulayo ababekuso." 
Matthew14:15 Kwakuhlwa abafundi bakaYesu beza kuye, bathi: “Le ndawo ayinamizi, nexesha selimkile; bandulule abantu bemke, baye ezidolophaneni, bazithengele ukutya.”" 
Matthew14:16 Kodwa uYesu wathi kubo: “Akukho mfuneko yakuba bemke. Bapheni nina ukutya.” 
Matthew14:17 Bathi ke kuye: “Asinakutya apha. Sinezonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini kuphela.” 
Matthew14:18 Wathi: “Ziziseni apha.” 
Matthew14:19 Esiyalele isihlwele ukuba sihlale phantsi engceni, wazithatha ezo zonka zihlanu nezo ntlanzi zimbini, wathi ekhangele ezulwini, wabulela, waziqhekeza izonka, wazinika abafundi bakhe, baza bazabela abantu." 
Matthew14:20 Batya ke bonke bahlutha, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iingobozi ezilishumi elinambini zokutya okuseleyo." 
Matthew14:21 Amadoda atyáyo aba kumawaka amahlanu, bengekho kwelo nani abafazi nabantwana." 
Matthew14:22 Kwangoko ke uYesu wabanyanzela abafundi bakhe ukuba bakhwele esikhitshaneni, bamandulele baye ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili, ngeli xa yena asindululayo isihlwele." 
Matthew14:23 Akuba ke esindulule isihlwele, wenyuka intaba eyedwa, esiya kuthandaza. Kwahlwa eyedwa khona apho." 
Matthew14:24 Ngelo xesha isikhitshana sasesiphakathi elwandle, sintlithwa ngamaza, kuba umoya wawuvela ngaphambili." 
Matthew14:25 Kwathi ke, kungekasi, uYesu weza kubo, ehamba phezu kwamanzi olwandle." 
Matthew14:26 Abafundi bakumbona ehamba phezu kwamanzi, bankwantya, bathi: “Ngumhlola lo!” Batsho bakhala kukoyika." 
Matthew14:27 Kwangoko ke wathetha nabo uYesu, esithi: “Yomelelani; ndim; musani ukoyika.”" 
Matthew14:28 Wavakala uPetros esithi: “Nkosi, ukuba ngaba nguwe ngenene, yitsho ndize kuwe ndihamba phezu kwamanzi.”" 
Matthew14:29 UYesu wathi: “Yiza.” Wehla ke esikhitshaneni uPetros, wahamba phezu kwamanzi, waya kuYesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kodwa akuva amandla omoya, usuke woyika, wathi, esaqala ukutshona, wakhala esithi: “Nkosi, ndisindise!”" 
Matthew14:31 Kwangoko uYesu wasolula isandla sakhe, wambamba, wathi: “Wena ulukholo luncinane, bekutheni na ukuba uthandabuze?”" 
Matthew14:32 Bakhwela ke esikhitshaneni, wadamba umoya;" 
Matthew14:33 baza abo basesikhitshaneni baqubuda kuYesu, besithi: “Inene, ùnguNyana kaThixo.”" 
Matthew14:34 Beluwelile uLwandle lwaseGalili, bâfika ezweni laseGenesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Amqonda amadoda alapho ukuba nguYesu, athumela kuwo wonke loo mmandla, azisa kuye bonke abagulayo," 
Matthew14:36 ambongoza okokuba abagulayo bachukumise nokuba ngumqukumbelo nje wesambatho sakhe. Bathi ke abo bawuchukumisáyo baphila mpela. 
Matthew15:1 Kwafika *abaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho kuYesu, bevela eJerusalem, bambuza besithi:" 
Matthew15:2 “Kutheni abafundi bakho bengasilandeli nje isithethe samanyange, le nto batya isonka ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?”" 
Matthew15:3 Wabaphendula wathi: “Nina, kutheni ukuba nithi ngenxa yesithethe senu, ningawenzi umthetho kaThixo?" 
Matthew15:4 Kaloku uThixo wathi: ‘Beka uyihlo nonyoko,’ watsho nokuthi: ‘Othuka uyise, nokuba ngunina, makabulawe.’" 
Matthew15:5 Kanti nina nithi ukuba ubani unento angamnceda ngayo uyise nokuba ngunina, kodwa asuke athi loo nto ingumnikelo kuThixo," 
Matthew15:6 akasavumelekanga ukumenzela nto ngaloo nto uyise nokuba ngunina. Ngokwenjenjalo nithi ngenxa yesithethe senu, nilenze into engento ilizwi likaThixo." 
Matthew15:7 Bahanahanisindini, uIsaya wayenyanisile ukushumayela ngani, esithi:" 
Matthew15:8 “ ‘Aba bantu bandibeka ngomlomo, kanti yona intliziyo ikude lee kum,’ itsho iNkosi." 
Matthew15:9 ‘Bafumana bendihlonela, kuba bafundisa iimfundiso eziyimithetho nje yabantu.’”" 
Matthew15:10 UYesu, eyibizele kuye indimbane, wathi: “Phulaphulani niqonde." 
Matthew15:11 Umntu akangcoliswa yiloo nto ingena kuye ngomlomo; zizinto azithetha ziphume kuye ngomlomo ezimngcolisayo.” 
Matthew15:12 Basondela kuYesu abafundi bakhe, bathi kuye: “Uyazi nje ukuba *abaFarasi bakhutyekisiwe yintetho yakho?”" 
Matthew15:13 Waphendula wathi: “Zonke izityalo ezingatyalwanga nguBawo osezulwini ziya kuncothulwa. 
Matthew15:14 Bayekeni; baziinkokheli eziziimfama. Ke ukuba imfama ikhokela enye imfama, ziya kweyela zombini ezindongeni.”" 
Matthew15:15 Waza uPetros wathi: “Khawusicacisele lo mzekeliso.” 
Matthew15:16 UYesu wathi kubo: “Kanti nani nikwanje na ukungaqondi? 
Matthew15:17 Aniqondi na ukuba konke okungena emlonyeni, kuya esiswini, kuze kulahlwe ngasese?" 
Matthew15:18 Ke zona izinto ezithethwa ngomlomo, zisuka entliziyweni. Zezo zinto ke ezimenza angcole umntu." 
Matthew15:19 Kaloku ziphuma entliziyweni iingcamango ezimbi. Kusentliziyweni apho kuphuma khona ukubulala, ukukrexeza, ubuhenyu, ubusela, ukungqina ubuxoki, nokunyelisa." 
Matthew15:20 Zezi zinto ezimenza angcole umntu; kodwa ukutya ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga akumenzi angcole umntu.” 
Matthew15:21 Emkile apho uYesu, waya kummandla waseTire naseSidon." 
Matthew15:22 Kwathi thu umKananekazi, evela kuloo mimandla, ekhala esithi: “Nkosi, Nyana kaDavide, yiba nenceba kum. Intombi yam iphethwe kakubi yindimoni.”" 
Matthew15:23 Kodwa uYesu akamphendulanga tu. Basondela abafundi bakhe, bambongoza besithi: “Mvumele, kuba nanku ekhwaza emva kwethu.”" 
Matthew15:24 Waphendula wathi: “Ndithunyelwe kuphela kwiigusha ezilahlekileyo zakwaSirayeli.” 
Matthew15:25 Weza ke, waqubuda kuye, wathi: “Nkosi, ndincede.”" 
Matthew15:26 Yena waphendula wathi: “Akufanelekanga ukuba ukutya kuthathwe kubantwana, kunikwe iinjana.”" 
Matthew15:27 Waphendula yena wathi: “Kunjalo, Nkosi, kodwa noko iinjana ziyatya kwimvuthuluka ewayo etafileni yabaninizo.”" 
Matthew15:28 Ke ngoko uYesu waphendula wathi kuye: “Mfazindini, lukhulu ukholo lwakho. Makwenzeke kuwe ngokomnqweno wakho.” Yaphiliswa ke intombi yakhe kwangelo xesha." 
Matthew15:29 Akumka apho, uYesu wafika ngakuLwandle lwaseGalili, wenyuka intaba, wahlala phantsi." 
Matthew15:30 Kweza kuye ke izihlwele zabantu, zizisa iziqhwala, neemfama, nezilima, nezimumu, nabanye abaninzi ababeyimilwelwe, zababeka phambi koYesu, waza yena wabaphilisa." 
Matthew15:31 Zamangaliswa ke izihlwele ezo, zakubona izimumu zithetha, izilima ziphilile, iziqhwala zihamba, neemfama zibona; zaza zamdumisa uThixo kaSirayeli." 
Matthew15:32 UYesu, ebabizele kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi: “Ndiyasivela esi sihlwele saba bantu bangakanana, kuba sekuziintsuku ezintathu bekunye nam, yaye ke àbasenanto ityiwayo. Andifuni ukubandulula bengatyanga, hleze baphelelwe endleleni.”" 
Matthew15:33 Baza bathi kuye abafundi: “Zingafumaneka phi na entlango apha izonka ezinokubanela abantu abangaka?” 
Matthew15:34 Waza wathi kubo uYesu: “Zingaphi izonka eninazo?” Bathi ke bona: “Zisixhenxe, neentlanzi ezimbalwa.”" 
Matthew15:35 UYesu ke wasiyalela ukuba sihlale phantsi isihlwele; 
Matthew15:36 wazithatha ezo zonka zisixhenxe nezo ntlanzi, wabulela, waziqhekeza, wazinika abafundi bakhe, baza bona banika isihlwele." 
Matthew15:37 Batya bonke, bahlutha, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iibhaskiti ezisixhenxe zizele yintsalela." 
Matthew15:38 Amadoda atyáyo aba kumawaka amane, bengekho kwelo nani abafazi nabantwana." 
Matthew15:39 Wasindulula ke uYesu isihlwele, wakhwela esikhitshaneni, wafika kummandla waseMagadan." 
Matthew16:1 *AbaFarasi *nabaSadusi beza kuYesu, bathi bemlinga bacela okokuba ababonise umqondiso ophuma ezulwini." 
Matthew16:2 Waphendula ke wathi kubo: [“Ukutshona kwelanga nithi: ‘Liya kuba lihle, kuba amafu abomvu.’" 
Matthew16:3 Kusasa nithi: ‘Namhlanje liza kuna, kuba lisibekele.’ Niyayahlula ke imo yezulu. Kutheni na phofu ningayahluli nje imiqondiso yeli xesha sikulo?]" 
Matthew16:4 Sisizukulwana esikhohlakeleyo, nesikrexezayo ngokunganyaniseki kuThixo, esifuna umqondiso; kwaye asiyi kunikwa mqondiso ngaphandle komqondiso kaJona.” Wabashiya ke wemka." 
Matthew16:5 Ekuluweleni kwabo abafundi bakaYesu uLwandle lwaseGalili, bâlibala ukuphatha isonka;" 
Matthew16:6 waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Ligqaleni nililumkele igwele *labaFarasi *nabaSadusi.” 
Matthew16:7 Bona ke babesithi omnye komnye: “Útsho ngokuba singaphathanga zonka.” 
Matthew16:8 UYesu, ekwazi oko bakuthethayo, wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nithethe ngokungabi nazonka, nina balukholo luncinane?" 
Matthew16:9 Anikaqondi na? Anikhumbuli na ukuba zazingaphi iingobozi ezazizele yintsalela okuya ndandiqhekezela amawaka amahlanu izonka ezihlanu? 
Matthew16:10 Anikhumbuli na ukuba zazingaphi iibhaskiti ezazizele yintsalela okuya ndandiqhekezela amawaka amane izonka ezisixhenxe? 
Matthew16:11 Yini na okokuba ningaqondi ukuba bendingathethi sonka xa bendisithi kuni: ‘Lilumkeleni igwele labaFarasi nabaSadusi’?” 
Matthew16:12 Baqonda ke ngoko ukuba uYesu ubengàtsho ukuthi mabalumkele igwele lesonka, koko wayesithi mabalumkele imfundiso yabaFarasi nabaSadusi." 
Matthew16:13 UYesu efikile kummandla waseKhesariya-Filipi, wababuza abafundi bakhe, esithi: “Ngaba abantu bathi ùngubani na *uNyana woLuntu?”" 
Matthew16:14 Bamphendula besithi: “Abathile bathi ùnguYohane umbhaptizi. Abanye bathi ùnguEliya; babe abanye besithi ùnguJeremiya, okanye ùngomnye *wabashumayeli bamandulo.”" 
Matthew16:15 Wathi kubo: “Ke nina nithi ndingubani?” 
Matthew16:16 Waphendula uSimon Petros wathi: “Wena unguye *uKrestu, uNyana kaThixo ophilayo.”" 
Matthew16:17 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Unethamsanqa wena, Simon nyana kaJona, kuba le nto akuyityhilelwanga ngumntu, uyityhilelwe nguBawo osezulwini." 
Matthew16:18 Nam ke, ndithi kuwe: UnguPetros, igama elithetha ulwalwa; ndiya kulakhela kolu lwalwa ke ibandla lam, kwaye namandla okufa akayi kuloyisa." 
Matthew16:19 Ndiya kukunika igunya kulawulo olutsha lukaThixo. Kuya kuthi okubophileyo emhlabeni, kubotshwe nasezulwini; kuthi nokukhululeyo emhlabeni, kukhululwe nasezulwini.”" 
Matthew16:20 Wabayala ke abafundi bakhe ukuba bangaxeleli bani ukuba yena unguye uKrestu. 
Matthew16:21 Waqala ke ngoko uYesu ukubacacisela abafundi bakhe ukuba umelwe kukuya eJerusalem, aviswe ubunzima obukhulu ngamadoda amakhulu, nangababingeleli abaziintloko, nangabachazi-mthetho, abulawe, aze avuke ngomhla wesithathu." 
Matthew16:22 UPetros ke, emse bucala uYesu, wamkhalimela esithi: “Wanga uThixo angakunceda, Nkosi; oku kungàze kwenzeke kuwe.”" 
Matthew16:23 Wajika uYesu, wathi kuPetros: “Hamb' umke kum, Sathana. Uyandikhubekisa, kuba akuzinyamekeli izinto zikaThixo, unyamekela ezabantu.”" 
Matthew16:24 UYesu ke wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Ofuna ukuba ngumlandeli wam makazincame, athwale umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele;" 
Matthew16:25 kuba othe wafuna ukusindisa ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo, kodwa othe wabuncama ubomi bakhe ngenxa yam, wobusindisa." 
Matthew16:26 Kaloku komnceda ntoni na umntu, ukuba uthe walizuza ihlabathi liphela, kodwa walahlekelwa bubomi bakhe? Okanye umntu angakhupha ntoni na exabisekileyo ukuze angàlahlekelwa bubomi bakhe?" 
Matthew16:27 Kaloku *uNyana woLuntu selesiza, esebuqaqawulini boYise, enezithunywa zakhe. Akufika uya kubabuyekeza bonke ngabanye ngokwezenzo zabo." 
Matthew16:28 Ndithi kuni, inene, kwabakhoyo apha bakho abangayi kubonana nokufa bade bambone uNyana woLuntu efika engukumkani.”" 
Matthew17:1 Emva kweentsuku ezintandathu uYesu wathatha uPetros noYakobi noYohane, banyuka intaba ephakamileyo bebodwa." 
Matthew17:2 UYesu wênziwa kumila kumbi phambi kwabo, ubuso bakhe babengezela ngokwelanga, izambatho zakhe zaqaqamba njengokukhanya." 
Matthew17:3 Nâko kubonakala uMosis noEliya bethetha noYesu. 
Matthew17:4 Wasuka ke uPetros wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, kulungile ukuba sibe lapha. Ukuba uyafuna masakhe apha amaphempe abe mathathu: elinye libe lelakho, elinye libe lelikaMosis, elinye libe lelikaEliya.”" 
Matthew17:5 Esathetha kwabakho ilifu elibengezelayo, labasibekela; kwavakala nelizwi livela efini apho, lisithi: “Lo nguNyana wam endimthandayo; yivani yena.”" 
Matthew17:6 Bakukuva oko abafundi bawa phantsi ngobuso, besoyika kakhulu." 
Matthew17:7 Waya kubo uYesu, wabavusa esithi: “Phakamani! Musani ukoyika!”" 
Matthew17:8 Bawaphakamisa ke amehlo abo, àbabona mntu ngaphandle koYesu." 
Matthew17:9 Xa babesihla entabeni, uYesu wabayala esithi: “Ze ningawuxeleli bani lo mbono, ade *uNyana woLuntu avuke kwabafileyo.”" 
Matthew17:10 Bambuza ke uYesu abafundi, besithi: “Kungani na ukuba abachazi-mthetho bathi uEliya umelwe kukufika kuqala?”" 
Matthew17:11 Waphendula wathi: “Ewe, okunene nguEliya omelwe kukufika kuqala, azilungise zonke izinto." 
Matthew17:12 Mna ke ndithi kuni: uEliya selefikile, baza abantu àbamazi, koko bênza kuye konke abakuthandayo. Ngokukwanjalo naye uNyana woLuntu seleza kuviswa ubunzima ngabo.”" 
Matthew17:13 Baqonda ke abafundi okokuba wayethetha ngoYohane umbhaptizi. 
Matthew17:14 Bakubuyela esihlweleni, kweza indoda kuYesu, yaguqa phambi kwakhe," 
Matthew17:15 yathi: “Nkosi, menzele inceba unyana wam. Uphethwe kakubi sisithuthwane. Usoloko esiwa emlilweni okanye emanzini." 
Matthew17:16 Ke bendimzisile kubafundi bakho, kodwa àbaba nako ukumphilisa.”" 
Matthew17:17 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Sizukulwanandini esingàkholwayo, esigwenxa, koda kube nini ndinani, ndininyamezele? Mziseni apha kum!”" 
Matthew17:18 Wayikhalimela uYesu indimoni leyo, yaza yaphuma kumntwana lowo, waphila kwangoko." 
Matthew17:19 Abafundi bakaYesu bêza kuye bucala, bathi: “Bekutheni kakade ukuze thina singabi nako ukuyikhupha le ndimoni?”" 
Matthew17:20 Wathi kubo: “Kungenxa yokulambatha kokholo lwenu. Ndithi kuni, inene, ukuba beninokholo olungangokhozo lwemostade, beninokuthi kule ntaba: ‘Suka apha, uye phaya,’ ize iye, kungabikho nto ininqabelayo. [" 
Matthew17:21 “Olu lona uhlobo alunako ukuphuma kungengako ukuthandaza nokuzila ukutya.”] 
Matthew17:22 Xa babelityhutyha elaseGalili, uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “*UNyana woLuntu seleza kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu." 
Matthew17:23 Baya kumbulala, aze abuye avuke ngomhla wesithathu.” Baba buhlungu kakhulu ke." 
Matthew17:24 Kwathi uYesu nabafundi bakhe bakufika eKapernahum, kweza kuPetros abo bamkela umrhumo *wendlu kaThixo, bathi kuye: “Umfundisi wenu akawurholi na umrhumo wendlu kaThixo?”" 
Matthew17:25 Wathi: “Ewe, uyawurhola.” UPetros akungena endlwini, kwathi engekathethi, uYesu wathi kuye: “Simon, ubona njani? Ookumkani beli hlabathi barhafisa bani? Ngaba barhafisa oonyana babo, okanye abasemzini?”" 
Matthew17:26 Waphendula wathi: “Abasemzini.” Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Bakhululekile ke erhafini oonyana," 
Matthew17:27 kodwa ukuze singabakhubekisi, yiya elwandle, uphose umlobothi, uvule umlomo waloo ntlanzi uthe wayibamba kuqala. Wothi ke emlonyeni wayo ufumane iqhosha lemali elanele umrhumo wam nowakho. Yithathe ubanike, urhumele mna nawe.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ngelo xesha abafundi bakaYesu beza kuye, babuza besithi: “Nguwuphi oyena mkhulu kwabalawulwa nguThixo?”" 
Matthew18:2 UYesu wabizela umntwana kuye, wammisa phambi kwabo," 
Matthew18:3 wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, ukuba anithanga nijike nibe njengabantwana, anisoze nifikelele kumgangatho wabalawulwa nguThixo." 
Matthew18:4 Oyena mkhulu kwabalawulwa nguThixo ngulowo uzithobayo abe njengalo mntwana. 
Matthew18:5 Othe egameni lam wamkela nokuba mnye onje, wamkela mna.”" 
Matthew18:6 “Othe wakhubekisa nokuba mnye waba bancinane bakholwayo kum, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba agangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni, antywiliselwe enzonzobileni yolwandle." 
Matthew18:7 Hayi ihlabathi ngezikhubekiso! Azinakungezi izinto ezibakhubekisayo abantu, kodwa hayi loo mntu kuza ngaye ukukhubeka!" 
Matthew18:8 “Ukuba ke isandla sakho, nokuba lunyawo lwakho, luyakukhubekisa, lunqumle, ululahle. Kulunge kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisilima okanye usisiqhwala, kunokuba uthi, unezandla zozibini, okanye uneenyawo zombini, uphoswe emlilweni wangonaphakade." 
Matthew18:9 Nokuba ke iliso lakho lithe lakukhubekisa, likhuphe, ulilahle. Kulunge kanye ukuba ungene ebomini unaliso linye, kunokuba uthi, unamehlo amabini, uphoswe esihogweni somlilo.”" 
Matthew18:10 “Lumkani, ningadeli namnye waba bancinane. Ndithi kuni, izithunywa zabo ezulwini zihlala ziphambi koBawo osezulwini. [" 
Matthew18:11 Kaloku *uNyana woLuntu weza kusindisa abo balahlekileyo.] 
Matthew18:12 “Nithini ke nina? Ukuba ubani unekhulu leegusha, kuze kulahleke ibe nye kuzo, akayi kuzishiya na edlelweni ezo zimashumi alithoba anethoba, aye kufuna leyo ilahlekileyo?" 
Matthew18:13 Ukuba ke uthe wayifumana, ndithi kuni, inene, uyavuya kukuyifumana leyo ngaphezu kokuba evuya zezinye ezimashumi alithoba anesithoba ezingalahlekanga." 
Matthew18:14 Kwangokunjalo naye uYihlo osezulwini akafuni kulahleke nokuba abe mnye kwaba bancinane.” 
Matthew18:15 “Ukuba uwenu uthe wona, yiya uthethe naye ninodwa. Ukuba úthe wakuva, woba umzuzile uwenu." 
Matthew18:16 Ke ukuba úthe akeva, yiya kuye uhamba nomnye umntu, nokuba babini, ukuze loo ngxoxo ibe namangqina amabini okanye amathathu." 
Matthew18:17 Ukuba úthe akabeva nâba, xelela ibandla. Ukuba ke úthe akaliva ibandla, kuwe makabe njengâbo ungenabudlelane nabo mpela." 
Matthew18:18 “Ndithi kuni, inene, konke enithe nakubopha emhlabeni, kuya kubotshwa nasezulwini; nako konke enithe nakukhulula emhlabeni, kuya kukhululwa nasezulwini." 
Matthew18:19 “Kananjalo ndithi kuni, ukuba ababini kuni bathe bavana emhlabeni nangayiphi na indawo abanesicelo ngayo, baya kuyenzelwa nguBawo osezulwini;" 
Matthew18:20 kuba apho bathe bahlangana khona egameni lam ababini nokuba ngabathathu, nam ndikho phakathi kwabo.”" 
Matthew18:21 Weza uPetros kuYesu, wabuza esithi: “Nkosi, koda kube kangaphi na uwethu endona ndimxolela? Ngaba koba kasixhenxe na?”" 
Matthew18:22 UYesu wathi kuye: “Hayi, akuyi kuba kasixhenxe, kuya kuba ngamashumi asixhenxe aphindwe kasixhenxe." 
Matthew18:23 Kaloku ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nokumkani owafuna ukuphicotha amatyala ezicaka zakhe. 
Matthew18:24 Zisukanje kwaziswa kuye isicaka esinetyala elikhulu lemali. 
Matthew18:25 Esi sicaka sasingenanto yakulihlawula eli tyala, yaza ke inkosi yayalela ngelithi makuthengiswe ngaso, nomfazi waso, nabantwana baso, babe ngamakhoboka, kuthengiswe nangako konke esinako, kuhlawulwe eli tyala." 
Matthew18:26 Eso sicaka ke sawa ngamadolo phambi kokumkani, sambongoza sisithi: ‘Nkosi yam, khawundinyamezele; ndokuhlawula konke.’" 
Matthew18:27 Yavelana naso inkosi, yasixolela elo tyala, yasikhulula." 
Matthew18:28 “Kwathi siphumanje eso sicaka, sadibana nomnye osisicaka kunye naso, owayesibamba imalana engephi, sambamba, samkrwitsha, sisithi: ‘Khupha imali yam!’" 
Matthew18:29 Sawa phantsi isicaka eso, sasibongoza esinye, sisithi: ‘Khawundimele; ndoyihlawula yonke.’" 
Matthew18:30 Asivumanga, saya sasiphosa entolongweni esinye, lide libe lihlawulekile elo tyala." 
Matthew18:31 Zathi ke ezinye izicaka, zikubonile okwenzekileyo, zakhathazeka kakhulu, zaya kuxelela inkosi yazo konke okwenzekileyo." 
Matthew18:32 Yaza inkosi yasibiza eso sicaka senze loo nto, yathi kuso: ‘Sicakandini esikhohlakeleyo, ndâkuxolela lonke elaa tyala wakundibongoza;" 
Matthew18:33 ubungamelwe na kukuba ube nenceba nawe kosisicaka kunye nawe, njengokuba nam ndikwenzele inceba?’" 
Matthew18:34 Yacaphuka inkosi yaso, yasithumela entolongweni ukuba sohlwaywe de silihlawule lonke ityala laso." 
Matthew18:35 Uya kwenjenjalo ke nakuni uBawo osezulwini, ukuba anithanga nonke ngabanye nawaxolela ngokupheleleyo amawenu iziphoso zawo.”" 
Matthew19:1 Wathi uYesu akugqiba ukuwathetha la mazwi, wemka eGalili, wafika kwimida yelakwaJuda, phesheya kweJordan." 
Matthew19:2 Walandelwa yinkitha yabantu, wabaphilisa." 
Matthew19:3 Bafika kuye *abaFarasi, bambuza bemlinga, bathi: “Ngaba kuvumelekile na okokuba indoda imale umfazi wayo nangasiphi na isizathu?”" 
Matthew19:4 Wabaphendula wathi: “Aniyifundanga na *eziBhalweni le ndawo ithi: ‘UMdali wabadala kwasekuqalekeni bayindoda nomfazi. 
Matthew19:5 Yiyo ke loo nto indoda ishiya uyise nonina nje, inamathele kumkayo, baze bamanyane’?" 
Matthew19:6 Ke ngoko àbasebabini, koko banye. Abo ke uThixo abamanyileyo mabangahlulwa mntu.”" 
Matthew19:7 AbaFarasi bathi kuye: “Kwakutheni ke ngoko ukuba uMosis avumele indoda ukuba ibhale incwadi yokuqhawula umtshato, ize imale umfazi wayo?”" 
Matthew19:8 UYesu wathi kubo: “Kwakungokuba lukhuni kweentliziyo zenu ukuba uMosis anivumele nibàle abafazi benu, kodwa ekuqalekeni kwakungenjalo." 
Matthew19:9 Ke mna ndithi kuni, othe wamala umfazi wakhe, engakrexezanga, aze athathe omnye, nguye okrexezayo.”" 
Matthew19:10 Ke abafundi bakaYesu bathi kuye: “Ukuba unjalo umcimbi wendoda nomfazi, ukuzeka akulunganga.”" 
Matthew19:11 Waza wathi kubo: “Asingabo bonke abanako ukungàzeki, kuphela ngabo baphiweyo nguThixo." 
Matthew19:12 Kuba kaloku bakho abangenamnqweno wakuzeka, ngenxa yokuba bâzalwa benjalo, okanye bênziwa banjalo ngabantu, kanti bakwakho nâbo bakuncamileyo ukuzeka ngenxa yokuthobela ulawulo lukaThixo. Onako ukuyiva le nto makaqiqe.”" 
Matthew19:13 Kwaziswa abantwana kuYesu, ukuba ababeke izandla, abathandazele. Basuka abafundi bakaYesu babakhalimela abo babezisa abantwana;" 
Matthew19:14 waza uYesu wathi: “Bayekeni abantwana beze kum, ningabanqandi, kuba ábalawulwa nguThixo ngabanjengabo.”" 
Matthew19:15 Wababeka izandla abantwana, wemka." 
Matthew19:16 Kwabonakala mntu uthile esiza kuYesu, wathi: “Mfundisi, ndingenza ntoni ilungileyo ukuze ndibe nobomi obungunaphakade?”" 
Matthew19:17 UYesu wathi kuye: “Kutheni ukuba undibuze ngokulungileyo? Mnye kuphela olungileyo. Ukuba ufuna ukubudla ubomi, yigcine imiyalelo.”" 
Matthew19:18 Waza wathi: “Yiyiphi le miyalelo?” UYesu wathi: “Yile ithi: Uze ungabulali, uze ungakrexezi, uze ungebi, uze ungangqini buxoki,"
