Matthew19:19 beka uyihlo nonyoko, uze umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.”" 
Matthew19:20 Ke umfana lowo wathi kuYesu: “Zonke ezi zinto ndazigcina. Ngaba kusafuneka ndenze ntoni na?” 
Matthew19:21 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ukuba ufuna ukufeza konke ngokupheleleyo, hamba uye kuzithengisa zonke izinto onazo, wabele amahlwempu imali leyo; woba nobutyebi ezulwini; uze kum ke, undilandele.”" 
Matthew19:22 Ekuvilé oku, umfana lowo wemka ebuhlungu, kuba wayesisinhanha." 
Matthew19:23 Waza uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Ndithi kuni, inene, kunzima kakhulu ukuba isityebi sibuxhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo." 
Matthew19:24 Kananjalo ndithi kuni, kungálula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi sixhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo.”" 
Matthew19:25 Bakukuva oku abafundi, bamangaliswa kunene, bathi: “Ngubani na ke onokusindiswa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Waza uYesu wabakhangela wathi: “Abantu bona abanako ukuyenza le nto, kodwa yena uThixo unako ukuzenza zonke izinto.”" 
Matthew19:27 Wathi ke uPetros: “Khangela, thina sishiye zonke izinto sakulandela. Ngaba siya kufumana ntoni na ke thina?”" 
Matthew19:28 Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, nina eningabalandeli bam nothi kwiphakade elitsha, xa *uNyana woLuntu ahleli ebhotwe lobungangamsha bakhe, nani nihlale kwizihlalo zobukhosi ezilishumi elinambini, nibagwebe abezindlu ezilishumi elinambini zakwaSirayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Wonke umntu oncame ikhaya nokuba ngabantakwabo, nokuba ngoodade wabo, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngunina, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yegama lam, uya kwamkela ngokuphinda-phindiweyo, abe nenxaxheba kubomi obungunaphakade." 
Matthew19:30 Baninzi phofu abaya kuthi bengabokuqala babe ngabokugqibela, nabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala.”" 
Matthew20:1 “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nomninimzi owaphuma kusasa, waya kuqesha abantu bokusebenza esidiliyeni sakhe." 
Matthew20:2 Akuba evumelene nabo ukubanika loo mali baqhele ukuyamkela ngemini, wabathumela ke esidiliyeni sakhe." 
Matthew20:3 Emva kwexesha uphinde waya ebaleni lembutho, wabona amanye amadoda emi apho engasebenzi," 
Matthew20:4 waza wathi kuwo: ‘Nani yiyani kusebenza esidiliyeni sam. Ndonamkelisa umvuzo ofanelekileyo.’ 
Matthew20:5 Aya ke. Uphinde wenjenjalo nasemini, nasemva kwemini." 
Matthew20:6 Emalanga uphinde waya, wabona amanye amadoda emi apho, wathi kuwo: ‘Kutheni na ukuba nime apha imini yonke ningasebenzi?’" 
Matthew20:7 Athi kuye: ‘Kungenxa yokuba kungekho mntu usiqeshileyo.’ Waza wathi kuwo: ‘Nani yiyani kusebenza esidiliyeni sam.’ 
Matthew20:8 “Kwakuhlwa ke umninimzi wathi kunobhalana wakhe: ‘Babize abasebenzi, ubamkelise, uqale ngabafike ekugqibeleni, uye kwabafike kuqala.’" 
Matthew20:9 Beza ke abo babeqeshwe emalanga, baza banikwa loo mali baqhele ukuyamkela ngemini." 
Matthew20:10 Bakufika ke abo babeqeshwe kuqala, baba baya kwamkeliswa ngaphezulu, kodwa kwanabo banikwa loo mali baqhele ukuyamkela ngemini." 
Matthew20:11 Beyamkele ke basuke bamkhalazela umninimzi," 
Matthew20:12 besithi: ‘La madoda afike mva asebenza nje ixeshana, kanti wena uwamkelise ngokulingana nathi, thina esibulaleke kangaka ngumsebenzi, sitshiswa lilanga imini yonke!’" 
Matthew20:13 Umninimzi wabhekisa komnye, wathi: ‘Mfondini, andiqhathanga mntu. Besingavumelananga na ngemali eqhele ukwamkeliswa umntu ngemini?" 
Matthew20:14 Thatha imali yakho, uhambe. Ndizithandele okokuba lo mntu ufike mva ndimamkelise njengawe." 
Matthew20:15 Kakade ndingenza nayiphi na into endiyithandayo ngemali yam. Kutheni ukuba wena ube nomona ngenxa yokuba mna ndinenceba?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Kwangokunjalo ke abokugqibela boba ngabokuqala, nabokuqala babe ngabokugqibela.”" 
Matthew20:17 Kwathi, xa uYesu wayeza kuya eJerusalem, wababizela ecaleni abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini, wathetha nabo behamba endleleni, wathi:" 
Matthew20:18 “Niyabona, siya eJerusalem, apho *uNyana woLuntu aya kunikelwa khona kubabingeleli abaziintloko nakubachazi-mthetho. Baya kumgwebela ukufa," 
Matthew20:19 bamnikele ezandleni zeentlanga. Zona ke ziya kumenza intlekisa, zimkatse, zimbethelele emnqamlezweni; aze athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke ekufeni.”" 
Matthew20:20 Ngelo xesha unina woonyana bakaZebhedi weza kuYesu, ehamba noonyana bakhe; wafika wavova phambi kwakhe enesicelo." 
Matthew20:21 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ufuna ntoni?” Wathi yena: “Ndicela ukuba aba nyana bam babini ubanike ezona zikhundla ziphezulu xa wena ungukumkani.” 
Matthew20:22 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ninako ukuyinyamezela intlungu endiza kuyiva mna?” Bathi ke bona kuye: “Sinako.” 
Matthew20:23 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Okunene, intlungu yam niya kuyiva; kodwa kona ukwaba izikhundla akulolungelo lam. Ezo zikhundla zezabo bazilungiselelweyo nguBawo.”" 
Matthew20:24 Bekuvile oku abafundi abalishumi, bakhathazeka yile nto yaba bafo bakaZebhedi." 
Matthew20:25 Waza uYesu wababizela kuye, wathi: “Niyazi ukuba ezintlangeni abo balawulayo banobukhosi; nâbo bazizikhulu zazo benza ngegunya." 
Matthew20:26 Kodwa ke ze kungabi njalo phakathi kwenu. Ofuna ukuba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumkhonzi wenu;" 
Matthew20:27 nofuna ukuba ngowokuqala kuni, makabe sisicaka senu;" 
Matthew20:28 abe njengaye *uNyana woLuntu, yena ongezanga kukhonzwa, koko oweza kukhonza nokuncama ubomi bakhe bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Ekuphumeni kwabo eJeriko, uYesu walandelwa sisihlwele esikhulu sabantu." 
Matthew20:30 Kwakukho iimfama ezimbini zihleli ngasendleleni, ezathi, zakuva ukuba kugqitha uYesu, zadanduluka zisithi: “Nkosi, Nyana kaDavide, senzele inceba!”" 
Matthew20:31 Isihlwele sazikhalimela ukuba zithi tu, kodwa zadanduluka ngakumbi zisithi: “Nkosi, Nyana kaDavide, senzele inceba!”" 
Matthew20:32 Wema ke uYesu, wazibiza, wathi: “Nifuna ndinenzele ntoni na?”" 
Matthew20:33 Zona zathi kuye: “Nkosi, sicela ukuba kuvulwe amehlo ethu sibone.”" 
Matthew20:34 Wavelana nazo ke uYesu, wawachukumisa amehlo azo, zaza kwangoko zaba nokubona, zamlandela." 
Matthew21:1 Kwathi bakusondela eJerusalem, befikile eBhetefage ngaseNtabeni yemiNquma, uYesu wathuma ababini kubafundi bakhe," 
Matthew21:2 esithi kubo: “Hambani niye kule dolophana nikhangelene nayo. Nothi ke kwangoko nifumane idonki ibotshelelwe, inenkonyane yayo. Yikhululeni, nizizise kum." 
Matthew21:3 Ukuba kukho umntu othethayo, yithini kuye: ‘Ziyafuneka eNkosini. Ziza kubuyiswa kwangoku.’ ”" 
Matthew21:4 Oku kwênzeka ukuze kuzaliseke okwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli, esithi:" 
Matthew21:5 “Yithini kwisixeko saseZiyon: ‘Khangela, uKumkani wakho uza kuwe, elulamile, ekhwele idonki, ekhwele inkonyane, ithole lento ebotshwayo.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Baya ke abo bafundi, benza njengoko uYesu wayebayalele," 
Matthew21:7 beza nayo idonki nenkonyane yayo, baza babeka izambatho zabo phezu kwayo, uYesu wakhwela." 
Matthew21:8 Isihlwele esikhulu sabantu sazandlala izambatho zaso endleleni. Abanye baqhuzula amasebe emithini, bawandlala endleleni." 
Matthew21:9 Izihlwele ezazihamba phambi koYesu nezazimlandela zazidanduluka zisithi: “Camagu! Nyana kaDavide! Makabongwe lo uzayo egameni leNkosi! Sithi: ‘Bayethe!’ kuPhezukonke!” 
Matthew21:10 Akungena uYesu eJerusalem, isixeko sonke saphithizela, sisithi: “Ngubani na lo?”" 
Matthew21:11 Izihlwele zathi: “Lo *ngumshumayeli uYesu waseNazarete eGalili.” 
Matthew21:12 UYesu wangena *endlwini kaThixo, waza wabakhupha abathengayo nabathengisayo, wathi neetafile zabatshintshi bemali nezihlalo zabathengisa ngamahobe wazibhukuqa;" 
Matthew21:13 waza wathi kubo: “*EziBhalweni uThixo uthi: ‘Indlu yam yindlu yokuthandaza.’ Ke nina niyenze umqolomba wezihange.” 
Matthew21:14 Beza kuye ke endlwini kaThixo apho abaziimfama nabaziziqhwala, waza wabaphilisa." 
Matthew21:15 Bona ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho bahlabeka bakuyibona imimangaliso ayenzayo, bebona nabantwana endlwini kaThixo bekhwaza besithi: “Camagu! Nyana kaDavide!”" 
Matthew21:16 Baza ke bathi kuYesu: “Uyayiva na le nto bayithethayo aba?” UYesu wathi kubo: “Ewe. Aniyifundanga na eziBhalweni indawo ethi: ‘Wênza ukuba udunyiswe ngabantwana naziintsana.’” 
Matthew21:17 Wabashiya, waphuma esixekweni, waya eBhetani, walala khona." 
Matthew21:18 Ngentsasa elandelayo, xa wayebuyela esixekweni, walamba." 
Matthew21:19 Wathi ebone umkhiwane ngasendleleni, waya kuwo, kodwa akafumana siqhamo, yaba ngamagqabi kuphela. Wathi kuwo: “Makungaze kubekho siqhamo kuwe naphakade.” Waza woma kwangoko umkhiwane lowo." 
Matthew21:20 Bekubonile oku, abafundi bakaYesu bamangaliswa, bathi: “Kutheni ukuba usuke wome ngokukhawuleza kangaka lo mkhiwane?”" 
Matthew21:21 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, ukuba niyakholwa, ningathandabuzi, niya kuba nako ukuyenza le nto ndiyenzé kulo mkhiwane, ngaphezu koko nibe nokuthi nakule ntaba: ‘Funquka, uphoseke elwandle,’ ize yenzeke loo nto." 
Matthew21:22 Konke enikucelayo ngomthandazo nikholwa, nokwamkela.”" 
Matthew21:23 UYesu wangena endlwini kaThixo wafundisa. Beza kuye ababingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu, bathi: “Ezi zinto uzenza ngagunya lini? Ngubani okunike eli gunya?”" 
Matthew21:24 UYesu wabaphendula esithi: “Nam ndiya kunibuza umbuzo ube mnye. Ukuba nithe nandiphendula, ndonixelela ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Matthew21:25 Ngaba igunya likaYohane lokubhaptiza laliphuma ezulwini, okanye laliphuma ebantwini?” Baxoxa ke bodwa, besithi: “Ukuba sithe: ‘Laliphuma ezulwini,’ wothi: ‘Bekungani na phofu ukuba ningàkholwa kuye?’" 
Matthew21:26 Kodwa ukuba sithe: ‘Laphuma ebantwini,’ soyika isihlwele kuba bonke bathi uYohane *ungumshumayeli.”" 
Matthew21:27 Baphendula bathi kuYesu: “Asazi.” Waza yena wathi kubo: “Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto.” 
Matthew21:28 “Kwakukho umntu enoonyana ababini. Wathi kowokuqala: ‘Mntanam, yiya kusebenza esidiliyeni namhlanje.’" 
Matthew21:29 Wasuka waphendula wathi: ‘Andicingi.’ Kodwa kamva wazohlwaya, waya." 
Matthew21:30 UYise lowo wathetha kwaloo nto nakomnye unyana, waza yena wathi: ‘Ewe, tata.’ Kodwa àkaya." 
Matthew21:31 Khanitsho, nguwuphi kwaba bantwana oyenzileyo intando kayise?” Baza bathi: “Ngowokuqala.” Ke uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, abaqokeleli-rhafu namahenyukazi baxhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo ningekabuva nina." 
Matthew21:32 Kaloku uYohane weza kuni ekweyona ndlela iyiyo, naza nina ànamamkela. Ke bona abaqokeleli-rhafu namahenyukazi bâmamkela. Naxa nakubonáyo oko, anizange nide nizohlwaye, nimamkele.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Nangu omnye umzekeliso. Kwakukho umninimzi owatyala isidiliya, wasibiyela, wemba isixovulelo seediliya, wakha imboniselo, wasiqeshisa kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe." 
Matthew21:34 Lakufika ixesha lokuvuthwa kweziqhamo, wathumela izicaka zakhe kwabo balimi, ukuze amkele esakhe isabelo eziqhameni zesidiliya eso." 
Matthew21:35 Basuka bona abalimi basibetha esinye isicaka, esinye basibulala, esinye basigibisela ngamatye." 
Matthew21:36 Wabuya ke wathuma ezinye izicaka, zizininzi kunezokuqala, baza benza kwaloo nto nakuzo." 
Matthew21:37 Emva koko wathumela unyana wakhe kubo, esithi: ‘Noko bomhlonela yena unyana wam.’" 
Matthew21:38 Kodwa abalimi, bakumbona unyana, bathethana bodwa, besithi: ‘Yindlalifa le. Yizani siyibulale, ilifa libe lelethu.’" 
Matthew21:39 Bambamba, bamphosa ngaphandle kwesidiliya, bambulala." 
Matthew21:40 “Akufika ke umnini-sidiliya, uya kubathini abo balimi?”" 
Matthew21:41 Baza bathi kuye: “Uya kubatshabalalisa kakubi abo bantu bakhohlakeleyo, isidiliya eso asiqeshise kwabanye abalimi, abaya kumnika isabelo sakhe seziqhamo ngexesha lokuvuthwa kwazo.”" 
Matthew21:42 UYesu wathi kubo: “Aniyifundanga na *eziBhalweni le ndawo ithi: “ ‘Ilitye abalidelayo abakhi lilo elaba lelona libalulekileyo lesiseko. Oku kwênzeka kuvela eNkosini; kungummangaliso emehlweni ethu.’ 
Matthew21:43 “Ke ngoko, ndithi kuni, ukulawulwa nguThixo kuya kuniphosa, kufunyanwe luhlanga oluzivelisayo iziqhamo zolawulo lukaThixo. [" 
Matthew21:44 Bonke abathe bawa phezu kweli litye botyumka; ke bona elithe labawela bocoleka.]” 
Matthew21:45 Bakuyiva imizekeliso kaYesu, ababingeleli abaziintloko *nabaFarasi baqonda okokuba uthetha ngabo," 
Matthew21:46 baza bafuna ukumbamba, kodwa babesoyika isihlwele esasisithi uYesu *ungumshumayeli." 
Matthew22:1 Waphinda uYesu wathetha nabo ngemizekeliso, esithi:" 
Matthew22:2 “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nokumkani owamenzela umsitho unyana wakhe. 
Matthew22:3 Wazithuma izicaka zakhe ukuba ziye kubabiza abamenyiweyo, beze emsithweni. Kodwa bona abavumanga;" 
Matthew22:4 waphinda wathuma ezinye izicaka, esithi mazithi kwâbo bamenyiweyo: ‘Niyabona, isidlo sam sendisilungisile. Iinkomo zam nempahla yam etyetyisiweyo sezixheliwe. Konke sekulungile; yizani emsithweni.’" 
Matthew22:5 Kodwa nangoko abo bamenyiweyo abayikhathalelanga loo nto, basuka omnye waya emasimini akhe, omnye waya evenkileni yakhe;" 
Matthew22:6 baza bathi abanye bazibamba izicaka ezi, baziphatha kakubi, bazibulala." 
Matthew22:7 Waba nomsindo ke ukumkani, wathuma amajoni akhe, wabatshabalalisa abo babulali, wayitshisa idolophu yabo." 
Matthew22:8 Waza wathi kwizicaka zakhe: ‘Okunene umsitho sewulungile, kodwa abamenyiweyo abafanelekanga." 
Matthew22:9 Ke ngoko yiyani apho zihlangana khona iindlela, nibamemele emsithweni bonke abantu enibafumanayo.’" 
Matthew22:10 Zaphuma ezo zicaka, zaya ezindleleni, zabahlanganisa bonke abo zabafumanáyo, abakhohlakeleyo kwanabalungileyo. Indlu yomsitho yazala yema ngeembambo." 
Matthew22:11 “Kwathi, akungena ukumkani, esiya kubona abasemsithweni, wabona kukho umntu ongayambathanga ingubo yomsitho," 
Matthew22:12 waza wathi kuye: ‘Mfondini, ungene njani na apha ungenáyo ingubo yomsitho?’ Wakhohlwa kukuphendula." 
Matthew22:13 Waza ukumkani wathi kwizicaka: ‘Mbopheni izandla neenyawo, nimphose phandle ebumnyameni lee, apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokungcungcutheka.’" 
Matthew22:14 Kaloku baninzi abamenyiweyo, kodwa bambalwa abanyuliweyo.”" 
Matthew22:15 Bâya kubhunga ke *abaFarasi, becebisana ngokumbambisa ngamazwi uYesu." 
Matthew22:16 Bathumela abafundi babo kuye, *benamaHerode, bathi: “Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uthembekile, uyifundisa ngenyaniso indlela kaThixo, kuba akucengi bani, ungenamkhethe." 
Matthew22:17 Khawutsho ke, ngaba kuvumelekile na ukurhafa *kuKhesare, okanye akuvumelekanga?”" 
Matthew22:18 Ke uYesu, eyazi inkohlakalo yabo, wathi kubo: “Bahanahanisindini, nindilingelani na?" 
Matthew22:19 Ndiboniseni imali ekurhafwa ngayo.” Bayizisa ke," 
Matthew22:20 waza wathi kubo: “Ngokabani lo mfanekiso neli gama?” Bathi kuye: “NgokaKhesare.” 
Matthew22:21 Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Ke, nikani uKhesare okufanele uKhesare, ninike uThixo okufanele uThixo.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bakuva bamangaliswa, bamyeka bemka." 
Matthew22:23 Kwangaloo mini kweza *abaSadusi kuYesu (bona abo bathi akukho luvuko lwabafileyo), bambuza" 
Matthew22:24 besithi: “Mfundisi, uMosis wathi: ‘Ukuba ubani uthe wafa engekabi nabantwana, makathi umntakwabo amngene umfazi womfi lowo, azalelwe abantwana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Ke kaloku, phakathi kwethu kwakukho oonyana bomntu omnye abasixhenxe, yaza inkulu yazeka umfazi, yasweleka ingenabantwana, waza umfazi lowo waba ngowomninawa." 
Matthew22:26 Nomninawa lowo wabhubha kungekho mntwana, umfazi waba ngowowesithathu. Kwaba ngokunjalo nakulo mninawa, kwada kwaya kowesixhenxe." 
Matthew22:27 Emva kwabo bonke wasweleka naye umfazi. 
Matthew22:28 Ke ngoko eluvukweni lwabafileyo uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi kubo? Kuba kaloku bosixhenxe babenaye.” 
Matthew22:29 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo: “Nilahlekiswa kukuba ningaziqondi *iziBhalo, ningawazi namandla kaThixo." 
Matthew22:30 Kaloku xa abafileyo bathe babuya bavuka àbazeki, àbendiswa; banjengezithunywa ezisezulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Ngokusingisele kukuvuswa kwabafileyo, aniyifundanga na into ethethwe kuni nguThixo, esithi:" 
Matthew22:32 ‘Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi’? UThixo ke akaThixo wabafileyo, ungowabaphilayo.”" 
Matthew22:33 Zathi izihlwele, zakukuva oku, zamangaliswa yimfundiso yakhe." 
Matthew22:34 *AbaFarasi, bakuva ukuba uYesu ubavale umlomo *abaSadusi, bahlanganisana," 
Matthew22:35 waza omnye kubo, onolwazi ngomthetho, wambuza emlinga," 
Matthew22:36 wathi: “Mfundisi, owona myalelo mkhulu emthethweni nguwuphi?”" 
Matthew22:37 Waza uYesu wathi: “ ‘Uze uyithande iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela.’" 
Matthew22:38 Nguwo lowo owokuqala nomkhulu umthetho. 
Matthew22:39 Owesibini ke ufana nawo: ‘Uze umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.’ 
Matthew22:40 Wonke umthetho kaMosis nako konke okufundiswa ngabashumayeli bamandulo kuxhomekeke kule miyalelo mibini.” 
Matthew22:41 Xa babehlanganisene *abaFarasi, uYesu wababuza esithi:" 
Matthew22:42 “Nithini na nina ngaye *uKrestu? Úyinto kabani?” Baza bathi: “NgokaDavide.” 
Matthew22:43 Waza wathi kubo: “Kutheni na ke phofu ukuba ngamandla oMoya uDavide abize uKrestu ngokuthi ‘Nkosi’, apho athi:" 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam: Hlala ngakum kweli wonga, lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho’?" 
Matthew22:45 “Ukuba uDavide uthi uKrestu yiNkosi, angathini na ukuba ngunyana wakhe?”" 
Matthew22:46 Akubangakho namnye unako ukuphendula nelizwi eli; kwathi, ukususela kuloo mini, akwaba sabakho bani unesibindi sakumbuza nento le." 
Matthew23:1 Waza uYesu wathetha nesihlwele nabafundi bakhe," 
Matthew23:2 esithi: “Abachazi-mthetho *nabaFarasi banegunya lokuchaza *umthetho kaMosis. 
Matthew23:3 Ke ngoko kuveni nikwenze konke abanokuthi banixelele kona; kodwa ukwenza ze ningenzi ngokwezenzo zabo, kuba bayathetha baze kwabona bangakwenzi oko bakuthethileyo." 
Matthew23:4 Kaloku iimfundiso zabo ziyimithwalo enzima, abayibeka emagxeni abantu, kanti bona ngokwabo abafuni ukuyichukumisa nangomnwe lo." 
Matthew23:5 Konke okulungileyo abakwenzayo, bakwenzela ukuze babonwe ngabantu. Bawabopha ngemixwayo ebanzi amaqhaga anezicatshulwa zomthetho; bazenze nde iintshinga zezambatho zabo;" 
Matthew23:6 bathande iindawo zamawonga ezidlweni, nezihlalo eziphambili ezindlwini zesikhungo;" 
Matthew23:7 bathande ukuba kukhahlelwe kubo emabaleni embutho, bethanda nokuba abantu bathi kubo: ‘Mfundisi!’" 
Matthew23:8 Ke kuni ze kungathiwa ‘mfundisi,’ kuba mnye uMfundisi eninaye, nibe nina nonke niyimilowo." 
Matthew23:9 Ze ningabizi mntu emhlabeni apha ngokuthi nguyihlo, kuba mnye uYihlo, lowo ke usezulwini." 
Matthew23:10 Ngokukwanjalo ze kungàthiwa niziinkokheli, kuba mnye uMkhokeli wenu, *uKrestu ke." 
Matthew23:11 Omkhulu kuni makabe sisicaka senu. 
Matthew23:12 Lowo uziphakamisayo uya kuthotywa, athi lowo uzithobayo aphakanyiswe.”" 
Matthew23:13 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani *baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Niyabathintela abantu ekulawulweni nguThixo, kuba nina ngokwenu anivumi ukulawulwa nguye, nize nibanqande nâbo bafuna ukulawulwa nguye. [" 
Matthew23:14 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Niyayiphanga imizi yabahlolokazi, nize nihanahanise nitsho ngemilembelele yemithandazo. Ngenxa yoko niya kufumana esona sohlwayo sikhulu.]" 
Matthew23:15 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Nityhutyha ulwandle nomhlaba ukuze nizuze nokuba mnye ongenayo ebuJudeni; kuthi ke, nakuba nimzuzile, nimenze ofanelwe sisihogo ngokuphindiweyo kunani." 
Matthew23:15 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Nityhutyha ulwandle nomhlaba ukuze nizuze nokuba mnye ongenayo ebuJudeni; kuthi ke, nakuba nimzuzile, nimenze ofanelwe sisihogo ngokuphindiweyo kunani." 
Matthew23:16 “Mawoo, nina zinkokheli ziziimfama, nina enithi: ‘Ofunge *indlu kaThixo, akunto oko; kodwa ofunge igolide yendlu leyo, ubotshiwe sisifungo sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:17 Zidengendini zeemfama, kanene yintoni na enkulu? Ngaba yigolide leyo, okanye yindlu eyenza ibaluleke loo golide?" 
Matthew23:18 Kwakhona nithi: ‘Ofunge iqonga lamadini, akunto oko; kodwa ofunge umnikelo ophezu kweqonga, ubotshiwe sisifungo sakhe.’" 
Matthew23:19 Zimfamandini, ngaba yintoni na enkulu? Ngaba ngumnikelo lowo, okanye liqonga lamadini elenza ubaluleke loo mnikelo?" 
Matthew23:20 Ngoko ke, othe wafunga iqonga lamadini, ufunga lona kwanako konke okuphezu kwalo;" 
Matthew23:21 nalowo uthe wafunga indlu kaThixo, ufunga yona kwanalowo iyindlu yakhe." 
Matthew23:22 Othe wafunga izulu, ufunga ikomkhulu likaThixo, efunga lowo uphetheyo apho." 
Matthew23:23 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Ninikela kuThixo ngesishumi sayo imifuno enjengetyeleba nedile nekumin, kanti niyazityeshela ezona zinto zizizo zomthetho: ubulungisa, inceba, nentembeko. Ezi zinto benimelwe kukuzenza, nithi neziya ningazityesheli." 
Matthew23:24 Zinkokhelindini eziziimfama, nihluza imbuzane, nisuke niginye isilo esingangenkamela." 
Matthew23:25 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Nihlamba umphandle wendebe nesitya, kanti ngaphakathi zizele kokufunyenwe ngokuphanga nokunyoluka." 
Matthew23:26 MFarasindini oyimfama, kuqala hlambulula umphakathi wendebe, wothi ke nomphandle ube uhlambulukile." 
Matthew23:27 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Nifana namangcwaba avetiweyo, ambonakalo intle, kanti ngaphakathi azele ngamathambo ezidumbu nako konke okungcolileyo." 
Matthew23:28 Ngokukwanjalo nani okunene nibonakala ebantwini ngathi ningamalungisa, kanti ngaphakathi ezintliziyweni nizele luhanahaniso nenkcaso-mthetho.”" 
Matthew23:29 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho nani *baFarasi, mamenemenendini! Nakha amangcwaba *abashumayeli, nizihombise iindawo zokufihlwa kwamalungisa." 
Matthew23:30 Nithi: ‘Ukuba sasikho thina kwimihla yoobawo, ngesingahambisananga nabo ngokubulawa kwabashumayeli.’" 
Matthew23:31 Ngokutsho nina ngokwenu niyangqina ukuba ningoonyana bâbo bababulalayo abashumayeli. 
Matthew23:32 Qhubelani phambili ke, nikufeze oko kwaqalwayo ngooyihlo." 
Matthew23:33 Zinyokandini, nzalandini yamarhamba, nothini na ukusinda ningàgwetyelwa isihogo?" 
Matthew23:34 Ke ngoko, niyabona, ndonithumela abashumayeli, nezilumko, nabachazi-mthetho. Inxenye yabo niya kuyibulala, niyibethelele eminqamlezweni; inxenye niyikatse *ezindlwini zenu zesikhungo, nibatshutshisa kwizixeko ngezixeko." 
Matthew23:35 Ngako oko lobizwa kuni igazi lawo onke amalungisa elithe laphalazwa emhlabeni, ukususela kwelika-Abheli olilungisa, kuse kwelikaZakariya, unyana kaBherekiya, enambulalela endlwini kaThixo phakathi kwengcwele neqonga lamadini." 
Matthew23:36 Ndithi kuni, inene, isohlwayo sazo zonke ezo zinto siya kuba phezu kwabantu besi sizukulwana.”" 
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem, wena mbulali *wabashumayeli, ubaxuluba ngamatye abo bathunywe kuwe nguThixo! Kunini na ndifuna ukubawola abantu bakho ngokwesikhukukazi esigquma amantshontsho aso ngamaphiko, waza àwavuma!" 
Matthew23:38 Niyabona ke, uThixo uyanifulathela nomzi wenu." 
Matthew23:39 Ndithi kuni, ukususela ngoku anisayi kuba sandibona, de nithi: ‘Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi.’”" 
Matthew24:1 Xa uYesu wayephuma *endlwini kaThixo bafika abafundi bakhe, bambonisa isakhiwo sendlu leyo." 
Matthew24:2 Waphendula wathi kubo: “Niyazibona zonke ezi zinto? Ndithi kuni, inene, akuyi kusala litye phezu kwelitye apha elingayi kudilizwa.”" 
Matthew24:3 Kwathi, xa uYesu wayehleli phantsi eNtabeni yemiNquma, beza kuye bebodwa abafundi, bathi: “Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto, nokuba uya kuba yintoni na umqondiso wokuza kwazo nowokupheliswa kweli phakade?”" 
Matthew24:4 Waza waphendula uYesu wathi: “Lumkani, ningàlahlekiswa bani," 
Matthew24:5 kuba baninzi abaya kuza besebenzisa igama lam, besithi banguye *uKrestu, balahlekise into eninzi yabantu." 
Matthew24:6 Niya kuthi nive iimfazwe, namarhe eemfazwe; kodwa lumkani, ningabi navuso, kuba ezo zinto zimelwe kukubakho, kanti ke akukabi kuko ukuphela oko." 
Matthew24:7 Uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nokumkani avukelane nokumkani; kuya kubakho iindlala, neenyikima zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo." 
Matthew24:8 Kunjengokuqala kwenimba ke konke oku. 
Matthew24:9 “Ngelo xesha baya kunibamba, baninikele ekutshutshisweni, banibulale. Niya kuthiywa ziintlanga zonke ngenxa yegama lam." 
Matthew24:10 Ngelo xesha abaninzi baya kurhoxa elukholweni, bangcatshane, bathiyane." 
Matthew24:11 Kuya kuvela *abashumayeli abaxokayo, balahlekise abantu abaninzi." 
Matthew24:12 Ububi buya kwanda kangangokuba luphole uthando lwabaninzi. 
Matthew24:13 Ke lowo uzingisa kude kube sekupheleni wosindiswa. 
Matthew24:14 Ezi ndaba zimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo ziya kushunyayelwa kulo lonke ihlabathi, zibe bubungqina kuzo zonke iintlanga, size ke sifike isiphelo.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Xa ke ngoko nithe nalibona ‘isikizi elimanyumnyezi, mhla ngophanziso;’ elo *umshumayeli uDaniyeli athetha ngalo, limi ‘endaweni engcwele’ (ofundayo makaqiqe)," 
Matthew24:16 mabathi ngelo xesha abakwelakwaJuda babalekele ezintabeni. 
Matthew24:17 Ophezu kwendlu ke makangehli ukuya kuthatha nto endlwini yakhe. 
Matthew24:18 Nalowo usentsimini makangabi sayiphuthuma ingubo yakhe. 
Matthew24:19 Hayi ke kwabanzima nabadlezane ngaloo mihla! 
Matthew24:20 Thandazelani ukuba ukubaleka kwenu kungabi sebusika okanye *ngoMhla woPhumlo," 
Matthew24:21 kuba ngelo xesha kuya kubakho imbandezelo engazange ibekho ukususela ekudalweni kwehlabathi kude kube ngoku, kwaye ingasayi kuphinda ibekho enjalo." 
Matthew24:22 Ke ukuba uThixo ebengayicuthanga loo mihla, bekungayi kubakho bani usindayo; kodwa ngenxa yâbo banyuliweyo, uThixo woyicutha loo mihla." 
Matthew24:23 “Ngelo xesha ke, ukuba ubani uthe kuni: ‘Nanku apha uKrestu;’ nokuba uthe: ‘Nankuya phaya;’ musani ukuyamkela loo nto;" 
Matthew24:24 kuba kuya kuvela abathi banguKrestu, abangenguye; kuvele *nabashumayeli abangengabo, benze imiqondiso nemimangaliso emikhulu kangangokuba bade babalahlekise, ukuba bekunokwenzeka oko, kwanabanyulwa bakaThixo." 
Matthew24:25 Niyabona, ndinixelela ezi zinto zingekenzeki." 
Matthew24:26 “Ukuba ke kuthiwa kuni: ‘Nankuya entlango,’ ze ningayi; nokuba kuthiwa: ‘Nankuya endlwini,’ ze ningakwamkeli oko;" 
Matthew24:27 kuba ukufika *koNyana woLuntu kuya kuba njengombane omenyezela empumalanga, ubonakale kude kuse entshonalanga." 
Matthew24:28 “Apho sikhona isidumbu, kulapho aya kuhlanganisana khona amaxhalanga.”" 
Matthew24:29 “Kwangoko emva kwembandezelo yaloo mihla, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, ithi nenyanga ingakhanyi, zithi neenkwenkwezi zivuthuluke ezulwini, nako konke okunamandla esibhakabhakeni kudunga-dungeke." 
Matthew24:30 Ngelo xesha uya kubonakala ezulwini umqondiso *woNyana woLuntu, zize zonke iintlanga zehlabathi zenze isijwili, zimbona uNyana woLuntu esiza esemafini enamandla nobuqaqawuli obukhulu." 
Matthew24:31 Liya kuvakala ke ixilongo elikhulu, azithumele eziphelweni zehlabathi izithunywa zakhe, zibahlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, bevela kumacala omane omhlaba, kususela esiphelweni somhlaba, kuye esiphelweni sawo.”" 
Matthew24:32 “Fundani kuwo umkhiwane ongumzekelo kuni. Xa sewuthe wathamba amasebe, wahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba ihlobo likufuphi." 
Matthew24:33 Ngokukwanjalo ke, xa nithe nazibona ezo zinto zisenzeka, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango." 
Matthew24:34 Ndithi kuni, inene, esi sizukulwana asiyi kudlula zingadanga zenzeke zonke ezi zinto." 
Matthew24:35 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi; ke wona amazwi am akasayi kuze adlule.” 
Matthew24:36 “Ke akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo xesha. Kwanezithunywa ezisezulwini azazi, engazi naye uNyana lo. Kuphela nguYise owaziyo." 
Matthew24:37 Njengoko kwakunjalo ngemihla kaNowa, koba kwanjalo ukufika kwakhe uNyana woLuntu." 
Matthew24:38 Njengokuba babesithi ngemihla yangaphambi konogumbe badle, basele, bazeke, bendise, kwada kwayimini yokungena kukaNowa enqanaweni," 
Matthew24:39 bengaqondi, wada wafika unogumbe wabakhukulisa bonke, koba kwanjalo ukufika kwakhe uNyana woLuntu." 
Matthew24:40 Ngelo xesha kothi ababini besentsimini, omnye athathwe, omnye ashiywe." 
Matthew24:41 Abafazi ababini boba besila elityeni lokusila, omnye athathwe, omnye ashiywe." 
Matthew24:42 “Phaphani ngoko, kuba ningàwazi umhla wokufika kweNkosi yenu." 
Matthew24:43 Kakade ukuba umninimzi ebesazi ukuba isela lofika nini na ebusuku, nge-egadile, waza àkavuma ukuba kuqhekezwe endlwini yakhe." 
Matthew24:44 Nani ke ngoko hlalani nizilungiselele, kuba uNyana woLuntu wofika ngexesha eningalilindelanga.”" 
Matthew24:45 “Ngubani na oseso sicaka sithembekileyo siqondayo, eyathi inkosi yaso yasimisa phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuze sibanike umxhesho wabo ngexesha elililo?" 
Matthew24:46 Siyachulumacha eso sicaka eyothi inkosi yaso yakufika isifumane sisenjenjalo. 
Matthew24:47 Ndithi kuni, inene, eso sicaka inkosi yosiphathisa yonke impahla yayo." 
Matthew24:48 Kodwa ukuba eso sicaka sikhohlakele, sisuke sicinge sithi: ‘Inkosi yam ilibele;’" 
Matthew24:49 size sisuke sibabethe abazizicaka kunye naso, sidle sisele kunye namanxila;" 
Matthew24:50 yofika inkosi yeso sicaka ngemini esingayilindelanga, nangelixa esingalaziyo," 
Matthew24:51 ize isixabele kubini njengokuba kusenziwa kwabangathembekanga. Kuya kubakho ukulila nokungcungcutheka apho.” 
Matthew25:1 “Ngelo xesha ulawulo lukaThixo luya kufana nokweentombi ezilishumi, ezazithathayo izibane zazo, zaya kuhlangabeza umyeni." 
Matthew25:2 Ke ezintlanu kuzo zazizizidenge, ezintlanu zizizilumko." 
Matthew25:3 Ezizizidenge zazithatha izibane zazo, kodwa azayipatha ioyile yokongeza." 
Matthew25:4 Zona ezizizilumko zathi kunye nezibane zazo zahamba ziphethe ioyile ngezitya. 
Matthew25:5 Umyeni walibazisa ukufika, zaza iintombi ezi zonke zozela zalala." 
Matthew25:6 “Ezinzulwini zobusuku kwamenyezwa kusithiwa: ‘Nanko umyeni; phumani niye kumhlangabeza!’ 
Matthew25:7 Zavuka ke zonke iintombi ezo, zazilungisa izibane zazo." 
Matthew25:8 Zaza ezizizidenge zathi kwezizizilumko: ‘Sipheni kwioyile yenu leyo, kuba izibane zethu ziyacima.’" 
Matthew25:9 Kodwa zalandula ezizizilumko, zisithi: ‘Hleze inganeli kuthi nakuni, yiyani kwabayithengisayo, nizithengele.’" 
Matthew25:10 Kwathi ke, zisaya, wafika umyeni, zaza ezo ntombi bezisezilungile zangena kunye naye emsithweni, kwaza kwavalwa emnyango." 
Matthew25:11 “Kamva zafika nezinye iintombi ezo, zathi: ‘Nkosi, sivulele.’" 
Matthew25:12 Yaphendula yona yathi: ‘Ndithi kuni, inene, nina àndinazi.’" 
Matthew25:13 “Phaphani ke ngoko, ngokuba ningayazi imini kwanalo ilixa.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Kuya kuba njengomntu owathi, eza kuhambela kwelinye ilizwe, wazibiza izicaka zakhe, wayigcinisa kuzo impahla yakhe." 
Matthew25:15 Esinye usinike imali ekumawaka amahlanu eerandi, esinye ekumawaka amabini, nesinye ekwiwaka elinye, ezinika ngokwamandla azo. Wahamba ke." 
Matthew25:16 Eso sanikwa ekumawaka amahlanu, sithe kwangoko sasebenza ngawo, sazuza amanye amahlanu." 
Matthew25:17 Ngokukwanjalo neso sanikwa ekumawaka amabini, sazuza amanye amabini." 
Matthew25:18 Ke sona eso sasinikwe ekwiwaka elinyé, semka saya kuyimbela siyifihla imali yenkosi yaso." 
Matthew25:19 “Emva kwexesha elide yabuya inkosi yezi zicaka, yafuna ingxelo kuzo." 
Matthew25:20 Seza eso sasinikwe ekumawaka amahlanu, siphethe kwanamanye amahlanu, sathi: ‘Nkosi, ubundigcinise imali ekumawaka amahlanu eerandi. Nantsi ke enye, mhlekazi, ekumawaka amahlanu endithe ndayizuza.’" 
Matthew25:21 Yaza yathi kuso inkosi yaso: ‘Ngxatsho ke, sicaka sam esilungileyo, esithembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwizinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukuphathisa izinto ezininzi. Ngena uchwayite kunye nenkosi yakho.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Seza neso sicaka sasinikwe ekumawaka amabini, sathi: ‘Nkosi, ubundigcinise imali ekumawaka amabini eerandi. Nantsi ke, mhlekazi, enye ekumawaka amabini endithe ndayizuza.’" 
Matthew25:23 Yaza yathi kuso inkosi yaso: ‘Ngxatsho ke, sicaka sam esilungileyo, esithembekileyo! Ubuthembekile kwizinto ezimbalwa; ndiya kukuphathisa izinto ezininzi. Ngena uchwayite kunye nenkosi yakho.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Seza ke neso sicaka sasinikwe ekwiwaka elinyé, sathi: ‘Nkosi, bendikwazi wena ukuba ungumntu ongqongqo, ovuna ongakuhlwayelanga, uqokelele ongakulimanga." 
Matthew25:25 Bendisoyika, ndaza ndaya kuyembela ndayifihla imali yakho. Nantsi ke imali yakho, mhlekazi.’" 
Matthew25:26 Yaphendula inkosi yaso, yathi kuso: ‘Sicakandini esikhohlakeleyo, esilivila, ubusazi nje ukuba ndingumntu ovuna apho angahlwayelanga khona, aqokelele apho angachithanga khona." 
Matthew25:27 Ubumelwe ke ngoko ukuyifaka ebhankini imali yam, ndize ndithi, ndakufika, ndiyifumane inenzala." 
Matthew25:28 Ke ngoko esi sicaka sihlutheni iwaka elo, nilinike eso siphethe ekumawaka alishumi." 
Matthew25:29 Wonke umntu onolutho uya kunikwa, abe nezinto ngakumbi; kodwa lowo ungenanto uya kuhluthwa naloo nto anayo." 
Matthew25:30 Ke sona esi sifede sesicaka siphoseni phandle lee ebumnyameni, apho kuya kubakho ukulila nokungcungcutheka.’ ”" 
Matthew25:31 “Xa athe wafika *uNyana woLuntu esebuqaqawulini bakhe, enazo zonke izithunywa zezulu, uya kuhlala enkundleni yakhe yobungangamsha," 
Matthew25:32 zihlanganiselwe phambi kwakhe zonke iintlanga. Wothi ke abahlule abanye kwabanye ngokomalusi esahlula iigusha ezibhokhweni. 
Matthew25:33 Zona iigusha wozibeka ngasekunene kwakhe, iibhokhwe ngasekhohlo." 
Matthew25:34 Ukumkani ke uya kuthi kwabangasekunene: ‘Yizani, nina basikelelweyo nguBawo, nixhamle uyolo lolawulo enalulungiselelwayo kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi;" 
Matthew25:35 kuba ndandilambile, nandipha ukutya; ndandinxaniwe, nandipha amanzi; ndandingowasemzini, nandamkela;" 
Matthew25:36 ndandihamba ze, nandambathisa; ndandigula, nandihambela; ndandisentolongweni, nandivelela.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Omphendula ke amalungisa esithi: ‘Nkosi, ngaba sakubona nini na ulambile, sakupha ukutya; unxaniwe, sakunika amanzi?" 
Matthew25:38 Ngaba sakubona nini na ungowasemzini, sakwamkela; uhamba ze, sakwambathisa?" 
Matthew25:39 Ngaba sakubona nini na ugula, okanye usentolongweni, sakuhambela?’" 
Matthew25:40 Wophendula ukumkani athi kuwo: ‘Ndithi kuni, inene, ekubeni nithe nenjenjalo nakomnye kula mawethu angawona agqusha eluthulini, nithe nenjenjalo nakum.’" 
Matthew25:41 “Wothi ke kwabo bangasekhohlo: ‘Mkani kum, nina baqalekisiweyo nguThixo, niye emlilweni ongunaphakade, olungiselelwe umtyholi nezithunywa zakhe;" 
Matthew25:42 kuba ndandilambile, naza ànandipha kutya; ndandinxaniwe, naza anandipha manzi;" 
Matthew25:43 ndandingowasemzini, naza anandamkela; ndandihamba ze, naza anandambathisa; ndandigula, ndandisentolongweni, naza ànandihambela.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Bophendula ke bathi: ‘Nkosi, ngaba sakubona nini na ulambile, unxaniwe, ungowasemzini, uhamba ze, ugula, okanye usentolongweni, saza àsakunceda?’" 
Matthew25:45 Wobaphendula ke athi: ‘Ndithi kuni, inene, ekubeni ningenzanga njalo nakumnye waba bangabona bancinane, anenzanga njalo nakum.’" 
Matthew25:46 Baya kumka aba, baye esohlwayweni esingunaphakade. Ke wona amalungisa aya kuya ebomini obungunaphakade.”" 
Matthew26:1 Xa uYesu wayewagqibile onke la mazwi, wathi kubafundi bakhe:" 
Matthew26:2 “Niyazi ukuba emva kweentsuku ezimbini iza kuba *yiPasika. Wothi ke *uNyana woLuntu anikelwe ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni.” 
Matthew26:3 Ngelo xesha ababingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu abantu babehlanganisene emzini kaKayafa, umbingeleli omkhulu." 
Matthew26:4 Babebhunga iqhinga lokumbamba uYesu, bambulale." 
Matthew26:5 Kodwa babesithi: “Oku makungenziwa ngePasika, hleze kubekho isiphithi-phithi.”" 
Matthew26:6 Kwathi uYesu eseBhetani, endlwini kaSimon uZitshangubana," 
Matthew26:7 kwafika umntu obhinqileyo eneqhaga lelitye lelabhastile, linesiqholo esixabiso likhulu kunene. Kwathi, uYesu esetafileni, le ntokazi yamgalela entloko ngesiqholo eso." 
Matthew26:8 Bekubona oku, abafundi bakaYesu bakhathazeka, bathi: “Bekutheni ukuze kwenziwe le nkcitho ingaka?" 
Matthew26:9 Esi siqholo ngesithengiswe ngemali eninzi, kwaphiwa amahlwempu.”" 
Matthew26:10 UYesu, ekwazi abakuthethayo, wathi kubo: “Niyikhathazelani na le ntokazi? Indenzele into entle." 
Matthew26:11 Kaloku amahlwempu nisoloko ninawo; ke mna anisoloko ninam. 
Matthew26:12 Le ntokazi ithe ngokwenjenje yawuthambisela ukungcwatywa umzimba wam. 
Matthew26:13 Ndithi kuni, inene, naphi na apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zimnandi kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto iyenzileyo yona, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngayo.”" 
Matthew26:14 Ngelo xesha uJudas Sikariyoti, omnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, waya kubabingeleli abaziintloko," 
Matthew26:15 wathi: “Nondinika ntoni na ukuba ndithe uYesu ndamnikela kuni?” Ke bamnika amaqhosha amashumi mathathu emali yesiliva. 
Matthew26:16 Ukususela ngoko uJudas wazungula ukufumana ithuba lokumbambisa uYesu. 
Matthew26:17 Ke kaloku ngowokuqala umhla *wetheko lezonka ezingenagwele, abafundi bakaYesu beza kuye, bathi: “Ufuna ukuba siye kuyilungiselela phi na *iPasika?”" 
Matthew26:18 Waza wathi: “Hambani niye esixekweni kumntu othile, nithi kuye: ‘UMfundisi uthi: Ixesha lam lisondele. Mna nabafundi bam siya kuyityela kwakho iPasika.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Benza ke abafundi njengoko uYesu wayebayalele ngako, bayilungiselela iPasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kwakuhlwa ke, uYesu waya kuhlala etafileni, enabafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini." 
Matthew26:21 Xa babesitya, uYesu wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, omnye kuni uya kundingcatsha.”" 
Matthew26:22 Baza ke baba buhlungu, besithi kuye ngabanye: “Ngaba iya kuba ndim na, Nkosi?”" 
Matthew26:23 Wabaphendula wathi: “Lowo usithi nkxu esityeni isonka kunye nam, nguye oya kundingcatsha." 
Matthew26:24 Okunene yena *uNyana woLuntu uyemka, njengoko zitshoyo ngaye *iziBhalo; kodwa hayi loo mntu angcatshwa nguye uNyana woLuntu! Ngekumlungele loo mntu ukuba ebengazalwanga.”" 
Matthew26:25 Waphendula uJudas, lowo wayeza kumngcatsha, wathi: “Ngaba iya kuba ndim na, Mfundisi?” UYesu wathi: “Nawe utsho.”" 
Matthew26:26 Xa babesitya uYesu wathatha isonka, wabulela, wasiqhekeza, wabanika abafundi bakhe, wathi: “Thathani nitye; ngumzimba wam lo.”" 
Matthew26:27 Wathatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika, wathi: “Selani kuyo nonke;" 
Matthew26:28 kuba ligazi lam eli elisisiqinisekiso somnqophiso, eliphalazelwa abaninzi, ukuze baxolelwe izono." 
Matthew26:29 Ndithi kuni, andiyi kuphinda ndisele kwincindi yeediliya, kude kube yiloo mini ndiyisela kunye nani iyentsha kwikomkhulu likaBawo.”" 
Matthew26:30 Bakuba becule indumiso, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma." 
Matthew26:31 Ngelo xesha uYesu wathi kubo: “Ngobu busuku nonke niya kukhubeka ngenxa yam, kuba *iziBhalo zithi: ‘Ndiya kubulala umalusi, zichithakale iigusha.’" 
Matthew26:32 Xa ke ndithe ndavuswa ekufeni, ndiya kunandulela, ndiye kwelaseGalili.”" 
Matthew26:33 Waphendula uPetros, wathi kuye: “Nokuba baya kukhubeka bonke, mna andingekhe!”" 
Matthew26:34 UYesu ke wathi kuye: “Ndithi kuwe, inene, kwangobu busuku, ingekakhali inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu.”" 
Matthew26:35 UPetros wathi kuye: “Nokuba ndingade ndibe ndiza kufa kunye nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele!” Batsho bonke ke abafundi." 
Matthew26:36 Ke uYesu nabafundi bakhe bafika kwisitiya ekuthiwa yiGetsemane, wathi kubo: “Hlalani apha, ndikhe ndiye kuthandaza phaya.”" 
Matthew26:37 Wahamba noPetros noonyana ababini bakaZebhedi, waza waba buhlungu, wadandatheka," 
Matthew26:38 wathi kubo: “Intliziyo yam ibuhlungu ukufa, iligazi. Hlalani apha nilinde kunye nam.”" 
Matthew26:39 Esukile kubo wathi qelele, wawa emhlabeni, wathandaza esithi: “Bawo, ukuba kunokwenzeka, yidlulise kum le ntlungu. Noko ke, makungabi kokuthandwa ndim, makube kukuthanda kwakho.”" 
Matthew26:40 Wafika ke, wabafumana abo bafundi belele, wathi kuPetros: “Ubungenakulinda na nokweli thutyana?" 
Matthew26:41 Lindani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni. Intliziyo yona okunene inentumekelelo, ke wona umzimba ubuthathaka.”" 
Matthew26:42 Wabuya wemka, waya kuthandaza, esithi: “Bawo, ukuba le ntlungu ayinako ukudlula kum ndingathanga ndayiva, makwenzeke ukuthanda kwakho.”" 
Matthew26:43 Kwathi, akubuya kwakhona, wabafumana abo bafundi belele, kuba babesoyiswa bubuthongo." 
Matthew26:44 Wabashiya kwakhona uYesu, waya kuthandaza okwesithathu kwangaloo mazwi." 
Matthew26:45 Wabuya waya kwabo bafundi, wathi kubo: “Nisalele? Nisaphumle na? Niyabona, lifikile ixesha! *UNyana woLuntu unikelwa ezandleni zaboni." 
Matthew26:46 Vukani sihambe. Nanko; ufikile lowo undinikelayo.” 
Matthew26:47 Kwathi, uYesu esathetha, wathi gqi uJudas ongomnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, ehamba nendimbane inamakrele neentonga, iphuma kubabingeleli abaziintloko nakumadoda amakhulu." 
Matthew26:48 Ke kaloku umngcatshi lowo wayevumelene nabo ngomqondiso, esithi: “Lowo ndithe ndamanga, nguye. Mbambeni.”" 
Matthew26:49 UJudas ke waya kuYesu kwangoko, wathi: “Aa, Mfundisi!” Wamanga." 
Matthew26:50 Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Mfondini, uzokwenza ntoni apha?” Basondela ke, bambamba uYesu." 
Matthew26:51 Wasuka omnye wâbo babenoYesu warhola ikrele, waxabela isicaka sombingeleli omkhulu, wasinqumla indlebe." 
Matthew26:52 Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Libuyisele endaweni yalo ikrele lakho. Bonke abasebenzisa ikrele, baya kutshabalala ngekrele." 
Matthew26:53 Ngaba ùba andinako ukumcela uBawo, aze kwangoku andikhuphele amawaka-waka ezithunywa zezulu eziyimikhosi engaphezu kweshumi elinambini?" 
Matthew26:54 Bezinokuthini ke ngoko *iziBhalo ukungazaliseki, zona zithi kumele ukuba kube nje?”" 
Matthew26:55 UYesu ke ngelo xesha wathi kwindimbane: “Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna na, ninamakrele neentonga nje, ngokungathi niphumele isihange? Bendinani ndifundisa imihla ngemihla *endlwini kaThixo, naza anandibamba." 
Matthew26:56 Kodwa kunje ukuze kuzaliseke okwabhalwayo *ngabashumayeli bamandulo.” Emva koko ke babaleka bonke abafundi bakhe, bamshiya." 
Matthew26:57 Abo babembambile uYesu, bamsa kuKayafa, umbingeleli omkhulu, apho babehlanganisene khona abachazi-mthetho namadoda amakhulu." 
Matthew26:58 Ke yena uPetros wamlandela uYesu, ebekele kude, wada waya kungena eyadini yomzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wahlala phantsi ndawonye nezicaka, ukuze abone ukuba kuya kuphelela phi na." 
Matthew26:59 Ke ababingeleli abaziintloko nalo lonke *iBhunga babefuna ubungqina bobuxoki ngoYesu, ukuze bambulalise," 
Matthew26:60 kodwa ababufumananga, nangona babebaninzi ababengqina ubuxoki ngaye. Ekugqibeleni kwavela ababini," 
Matthew26:61 bathi: “Lo mntu uthe: ‘Mna ndingayichitha indlu kaThixo, ndibuye ndiyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Waphakama ke umbingeleli omkhulu, wathi kuYesu: “Akuphenduli nento le na? Yintoni kanye le aba bayingqinayo ngawe?”" 
Matthew26:63 Kodwa uYesu wahlala wathi tu. Waphinda umbingeleli omkhulu wathi kuye: “Ndikufungisa uThixo ophilayo okokuba usixelele ukuba unguye na *uKrestu, uNyana kaThixo.”" 
Matthew26:64 Wamphendula uYesu wathi: “Nawe utsho. Ke ndithi kuni, ukususela ngoku niya kumbona uNyana woLuntu ehleli ewongeni kwaSomandla, nimbone esiza ngamafu ezulu.”" 
Matthew26:65 Wazikrazula ke izambatho zakhe umbingeleli omkhulu, esithi: “Únyelise uThixo! Sisawafunelani na amangqina? Niyabona, nikuvile ngoku ukunyelisa kwakhe." 
Matthew26:66 Nithini nina?” Baphendula bathi: “Úfanele ukufa.” 
Matthew26:67 Bamtshicela ebusweni ke, bemxhimfa, baza abanye bembetha," 
Matthew26:68 bathi: “Sixelele, Krestu; ngubani lo ukubethileyo?”" 
Matthew26:69 UPetros ke wayehleli ngaphandle eyadini. Seza kuye esinye sezicakazana, sathi: “Nawe ubunaye uYesu waseGalili.”" 
Matthew26:70 Kodwa yena wakhanyela phambi kwabo bonke, esithi: “Andazani konke nale nto uyithethayo.”" 
Matthew26:71 Waphuma ke, esiya ngasesangweni, wabonwa sesinye isicakazana, esathi kwababelapho: “Naye lo wayenaye uYesu waseNazarete.”" 
Matthew26:72 Waphinda ke wakhanyela uPetros, wathi: “Inene, andimazi loo mntu.”" 
Matthew26:73 Kwakuba mzuzwana, abo babemi apho baya kuPetros, bathi: “Inene, ungomnye wabo. Nokuthetha oku kwakho kuyakudiza.”" 
Matthew26:74 Wasuka waziqalekisa efunga esithi: “Andimazi loo mntu!” Kwathi ke kwangoko yakhala inkuku. 
Matthew26:75 Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi awayelithethe kuye uYesu, esithi: “Ingekakhali inkuku, woba undikhanyele kathathu.” Waphuma waya phandle, walila kabuhlungu." 
Matthew27:1 Kwakusa, bonke ababingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu babhunga ngoYesu ngenjongo yokuba abulawe." 
Matthew27:2 Bambopha ke uYesu, bemka naye, bamnikela kwirhuluneli uPilato." 
Matthew27:3 UJudas, lowo wangcatsha uYesu, akubona ukuba uYesu ugwetyiwe, usuke wazohlwaya, wawabuyisela kubabingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu loo maqhosha amashumi mathathu emali yesiliva," 
Matthew27:4 esithi: “Ndonile ngokungcatsha igazi elingenatyala.” Kodwa bona bathi kuye: “Iyintoni ke loo nto kuthi? Zibonele ngokwakho.” 
Matthew27:5 Wayiphosa phantsi *endlwini kaThixo apho loo mali, wemka, waya kuzixhoma." 
Matthew27:6 Ababingeleli abaziintloko bayichola-chola loo mali, bathi: “Akuvumelekanga ukuba siyifake kweyeminikelo, kuba le mali yethenge igazi lomntu.”" 
Matthew27:7 Babhunga ke, baza ngaloo mali bathenga umhlaba owawungowombumbi-zitya, ukuze ube yindawo yokungcwabela abasemzini." 
Matthew27:8 Kungoko nanamhla oku lo mhlaba ubizwa ngokuba nguMhlaba weGazi. 
Matthew27:9 Kwazaliseka ke okwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli uJeremiya, esithi: “Bâwathatha loo maqhosha amashumi mathathu emali yesiliva, wona alixabiso lomntu (kuba lilo elo ixabiso lemali awamiselwa lona umntu ngoonyana bakaSirayeli)," 
Matthew27:10 baza bathenga umhlaba wombumbi-zitya ngawo, njengoko yandiyalelayo iNkosi.”" 
Matthew27:11 Wema ke uYesu phambi kwerhuluneli, yambuza isithi: “Unguye na ukumkani wamaJuda?” UYesu wathi: “Nawe utsho.”" 
Matthew27:12 Baza bammangalela ababingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu, kodwa yena akaphendula nento le." 
Matthew27:13 Waza wathi kuye uPilato: “Akuziva na ezi zinto zininzi bakumangalela ngazo?” 
Matthew27:14 Kodwa uYesu akaphendulanga konke, kangangokuba yada yamangaliseka mpela irhuluneli." 
Matthew27:15 Ke kaloku *ngePasika irhuluneli yayidla ngokusikhululela isihlwele umbanjwa abe mnye – lowo ke sasisithi simcele. 
Matthew27:16 Babenombanjwa owayesaziwa kakhulu, ekuthiwa nguBharabha." 
Matthew27:17 Sakuba ke isihlwele sihlanganisene, uPilato wathi kuso: “Nifuna ndinikhululele bani na: uBharabha okanye uYesu ekuthiwa nguKrestu?”" 
Matthew27:18 Watsho kuba esazi ukuba bamnikele ngomona uYesu. 
Matthew27:19 Kwathi, uPilato ehleli esihlalweni sokugweba, inkosikazi yakhe yathumela kuye, isithi: “Uze ungamenzi nto loo mntu ulilungisa. Andonwabanga mpela namhlanje ngenxa yephupha endiliphuphe ngaye.”" 
Matthew27:20 Ke bona ababingeleli abaziintloko namadoda amakhulu basifunza isihlwele ukuba sicele uBharabha, yena uYesu atshatyalaliswe." 
Matthew27:21 Yabuza irhuluneli yathi kuso: “Nguwuphi na kwaba babini enifuna ndinikhululele yena?” Sathi sona: “UBharabha.” 
Matthew27:22 UPilato wathi kuso: “Ndimenze ntoni na ke uYesu ekuthiwa nguKrestu?” Isihlwele sonke sathi: “Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni!” 
Matthew27:23 Kodwa yena wathi: “Ngenxa yokuba enze bubi buni na?” Kodwa kwaba kokukhona isihlwele sidanduluka ngakumbi sisithi: “Makabethelelwe emnqamlezweni!” 
Matthew27:24 UPilato, akubona ukuba akuncedi nto, kungathi kungasuka kubekho isiphithi-phithi, uthathe amanzi, wahlamba izandla zakhe phambi kwesihlwele, esithi: “Ndimsulwa egazini lalo mntu. Ziboneleni ngokwenu.”" 
Matthew27:25 Baphendula ke bonke abo bantu babelapho, bathi: “Igazi lakhe malibe phezu kwethu naphezu kwabantwana bethu.”" 
Matthew27:26 Wabakhululela uBharabha ke, waza yena uYesu wanikelwa ukuba akatswe, abethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:27 Amajoni ke amsa uYesu eyadini yomzi werhuluneli, aza alibizela apho ibutho lawo liphela." 
Matthew27:28 Amhluba izambatho uYesu, amambathisa ezibomvu," 
Matthew27:29 athi, eluke isithsaba sameva, amthi jize ngaso entloko, amphathisa ingcongolo ngesandla sokunene, aza aqubuda phambi kwakhe, ahlekisa ngaye, esithi: “Aa, kumkani wamaJuda!”" 
Matthew27:30 Amtshicela, ayithatha ingcongolo, ambetha entloko." 
Matthew27:31 Athi ke akuba ehlekise ngaye, amhluba loo ngubo, amambathisa kwaezakhe, aphuma naye, esiya kumbethelela emnqamlezweni." 
Matthew27:32 Ekuphumeni kwamajoni noYesu, afumana umntu waseKirene, ogama linguSimon, aza amnyanzela ukuba athwale umnqamlezo kaYesu." 
Matthew27:33 Afika ke kwindawo ekuthiwa yiGolgota (oko kukuthi iNdawo yoKhakhayi)," 
Matthew27:34 amnika iwayini exutywe nenyongo, ukuba ayisele. Akuyiva akavumanga ukuyisela." 
Matthew27:35 Ambethelela ke emnqamlezweni uYesu, aza abelana ngezambatho zakhe, esenza amaqashiso ngazo." 
Matthew27:36 Ahlala phantsi ke, amgada apho." 
Matthew27:37 Ngasentla kwentloko yakhe abeka ityala lakhe, kubhalwe kwathiwa: “Lo nguYesu uKumkani wamaJuda.”" 
Matthew27:38 Kunye naye kwabethelelwa nezihange ezibini eminqamlezweni, esinye ngasekunene esinye ngasekhohlo." 
Matthew27:39 Abadlulayo babemnyelisa uYesu, behlunguzela iintloko," 
Matthew27:40 besithi: “Wena ochitha *indlu kaThixo, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu, zisindise, ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo. Yihla emnqamlezweni.”" 
Matthew27:41 Ngokukwanjalo nababingeleli abaziintloko bahlekisa ngaye, bekunye nabachazi-mthetho namadoda amakhulu, besithi:" 
Matthew27:42 “Abanye wabasindisa, kodwa yena ngokwakhe akanako ukuzisindisa. Ukuba únguKumkani wakwaSirayeli makehle kaloku emnqamlezweni; sothi ke sikholwe kuye." 
Matthew27:43 Wayekholosa ngoThixo, esithi unguNyana wakhe; uThixo makamsindise ke ngoku ukuba uyamthanda.”" 
Matthew27:44 Nezihange ezazibethelelwe eminqamlezweni kunye naye zazimngcikiva. 
Matthew27:45 Kuthe ke, ukususela kwintsimbi yeshumi elinambini emini, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, kwada kwayintsimbi yesithathu emva kwemini." 
Matthew27:46 Malunga nentsimbi yesithathu uYesu wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, esithi: “Eli, Eli, lama sabhaktani?” (Oko kukuthi: “Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiyeleni na?”)" 
Matthew27:47 Ithe ke inxenye yababekho, yakukuva oko, yathi: “Lo ubiza uEliya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Wabaleka kwangoko omnye, wathatha imfunxa, wayithi nkxu kwiwayini emuncu, wayincula ngoluthi, waza wambambela ukuba ayifunxe." 
Matthew27:49 Kodwa abanye bathi: “Khawuyeke, sibone ukuba uEliya uza kumsindisa na.”" 
Matthew27:50 UYesu ke wakhala kwakhona ngezwi elikhulu, wawunikela umphefumlo wakhe." 
Matthew27:51 Lasuka ke lakrazuka kubini ikhuselo legumbi elingcwele *endlwini kaThixo ukususela phezulu kuye ezantsi; umhlaba wanyikima, namawa acandeka," 
Matthew27:52 namangcwaba avuleka, bathi nabantu abaninzi bakaThixo ababefile bavuka," 
Matthew27:53 baza baphuma emangcwabeni emva kokuvuka kukaYesu ekufeni, bangena kuso isiXeko esiNgcwele, babonakala kubantu abaninzi." 
Matthew27:54 Umphathi-butho wamajoni, namajoni awayegade uYesu kunye naye, bathi bakubona ukunyikima komhlaba nokunye okwenzekayo, boyika kakhulu, besithi: “Inene, lo mntu ebenguNyana kaThixo.”" 
Matthew27:55 Kwakukho nabafazi abaninzi, bekhangele bemgama. Bona babengabalandeli bakaYesu ukususela eGalili, bemlungiselela." 
Matthew27:56 Kubo kwakukho uMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYakobi noYose, ekho kwanonina woonyana bakaZebhedi." 
Matthew27:57 Kuthe ke lakutshona ilanga, kwafika umntu waseArimati owayesisityebi, ogama linguJosefu. Wayengumfundi kaYesu naye." 
Matthew27:58 Yena waya kuPilato, wawucela umzimba kaYesu; waza uPilato wayalela ngokuthi makawunikwe." 
Matthew27:59 Wawuthatha ke uJosefu umzimba kaYesu, wawusongela ngelinen ecocekileyo," 
Matthew27:60 wawubeka kwelakhe ingcwaba awayesand' ukulixhola eliweni; waza waqengqa ilitye elikhulu, walivala ngalo ingcwaba, wemka." 
Matthew27:61 Babelapho ngasengcwabeni ooMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, behleli phantsi bebukele." 
Matthew27:62 Ngengomso, ngemini elandela eyokulungiselela *iPasika, ababingeleli abaziintloko *nabaFarasi badibana noPilato," 
Matthew27:63 bathi: “Nkosi, sikhumbule okokuba esahleli umlahlekisi lowa wathi: ‘Emva kweentsuku ezintathu ndiya kuvuka ekufeni.’" 
Matthew27:64 Ke ngoko yalela okokuba ingcwaba linqatyiswe de kube lusuku lwesithathu, hleze abafundi bakhe beze bambe, ze bathi ebantwini uvukile ekufeni, luze olu lahlekiso lokugqibela lube ngaphezulu kunolokuqala.”" 
Matthew27:65 Waza uPilato wathi kubo: “Ningáwafumana amajoni okugada. Yiyani, nilitywine ingcwaba kangangoko nazi ngako.”" 
Matthew27:66 Baya ke, balinqabisa ingcwaba ngokulitywina, laza lalindwa ngoomantshingilane." 
Matthew28:1 Wakuba udlule *uMhla woPhumlo, ekuseni ngeCawe, kwafika uMariya waseMagadala nomnye uMariya, beze kukhangela ingcwaba." 
Matthew28:2 Kwasuka kwabakho ukunyikima okukhulu komhlaba, kuba isithunywa seNkosi sehla ezulwini, saza saliqengqa ilitye, sahlala phezu kwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Imbonakalo yaso yayinjengombane, izambatho zaso zimhlophe ngokwekhephu." 
Matthew28:4 Bathi ke ababegadile basoyika kangangokuba babe njengabafileyo. 
Matthew28:5 Isithunywa sathi kubafazi abo: “Sanukoyika nina. Ndiyazi ukuba nifuna uYesu obebethelelwe emnqamlezweni. 
Matthew28:6 Akakho apha. Uvukile, njengoko watshoyo. Yizani apha, niyibone indawo awayekuyo." 
Matthew28:7 Khawulezani ke, niye kubaxelela abafundi bakhe okokuba uvukile kwelabafileyo. Niyabona, uyanandulela ukuya eGalili, apho niya kumbona khona. Nivile ke, ndinixelele.”" 
Matthew28:8 Bemka ke engcwabeni ngokukhawuleza, babaleka bephethwe luloyiko naluvuyo olukhulu, besiya kuxelela abafundi bakhe." 
Matthew28:9 Nanko uYesu ebahlangabeza, ebabulisa. Baza baya kuye, baqubuda, babambelela ezinyaweni zakhe." 
Matthew28:10 Waza wathi kubo uYesu: “Sanukoyika. Yiyani kuxelela amawethu ukuba makaye eGalili, apho aya kundibona khona.”" 
Matthew28:11 Bakuba bemkile abo bafazi, gqi amajoni athile kulawo awayegade ingcwaba, angena esixekweni, axelela ababingeleli abaziintloko konke okwenzekileyo." 
Matthew28:12 Ababingeleli abaziintloko bacebisana namadoda amakhulu, baza bathatha imali eninzi, bayinika amajoni lawo," 
Matthew28:13 bathi: “Ze nithi abafundi bakhe beze ebusuku, bamba nilele." 
Matthew28:14 Ukuba le nto ithe yavakala kwirhuluneli, thina soyithomalalisa, ningabi naxhala nina.”" 
Matthew28:15 Amajoni ayithatha loo mali, enza njengoko ayexelelwe. Eli bali ke lasasazwa kumaJuda kwada kwaba namhlanje." 
Matthew28:16 Bahamba ke abafundi abalishumi elinanye, baya eGalili kuloo ntaba uYesu wayebayalele ngayo." 
Matthew28:17 Bathi bakumbona, baqubuda kuye, kodwa abanye babethandabuza." 
Matthew28:18 Wasondela uYesu, wathi kubo: “Anikwe mna onke amagunya ezulwini nasemhlabeni." 
Matthew28:19 Ke ngoko hambani niye kuzenza abafundi zonke iintlanga, nibabhaptize egameni loYise, neloNyana, neloMoya oyiNgcwele;" 
Matthew28:20 nibafundisa ukuba bazenze zonke izinto endiniyalele ngazo. Niyabona, mna ndinani yonke imihla, kude kube sekuphelisweni kwephakade eli.”" 
Mark1:1 Naku ukusungulwa kweendaba ezimnandi ezingoYesu Krestu, uNyana kaThixo." 
Mark1:2 Kunjengoko umshumayeli uIsaya walithethayo ilizwi likaThixo esithi: “Naso isigidimi sam esiya kukwandulela sikugabulele izigcawu. 
Mark1:3 Kuvakala ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi: ‘Yilungiseleleni indlela iNkosi, niyihlahlele umgaqo wayo.’”" 
Mark1:4 Entlango ke kwabonakala uYohane ebhaptiza, eshumayela ukuba abantu mabaguquke babhaptizwe, aze uThixo abaxolele izono zabo." 
Mark1:5 Babephuma besiya kuye bonke abakwaJuda nabaseJerusalem, bezixela izono zabo, aze ababhaptize emlanjeni iJordan." 
Mark1:6 UYohane wayesambatha ingubo yoboya benkamela, abhinqe ngethwathwa. Wayesitya iinkumbi nobusi." 
Mark1:7 Wayeshumayela esithi: “Lowo uza emva kwam unamandla kunam. Bendingubani mna kakade ukuba ndingade ndikhulule imitya yezihlangu zakhe? 
Mark1:8 Mna okunene ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi, kodwa yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele.”" 
Mark1:9 Ngaloo mihla ke weza uYesu, evela eNazarete kwelaseGalili, wabhaptizwa nguYohane eJordan apho." 
Mark1:10 Kuthe kwangoko, akuphuma uYesu emanzini, izulu lavuleka, wabona uMoya oyiNgcwele esihla phezu kwakhe njengehobe." 
Mark1:11 Kwavakala nelizwi elivela ezulwini, lisithi: “UnguNyana wam endimthandayo wena; ndikholisiwe nguwe.”" 
Mark1:12 Kwangoko uMoya oyiNgcwele wamqhubela entlango uYesu. 
Mark1:13 Waba lapho entlango iintsuku ezimashumi mane, elingwa nguSathana, ephakathi kwezilo zasendle. Izithunywa zezulu ke zazimlungiselela kwiintswelo zakhe." 
Mark1:14 Emva kokubanjwa kukaYohane, uYesu waya eGalili, evakalisa iindaba ezimnandi ezivela kuThixo," 
Mark1:15 esithi: “Lifikile ngoku ixesha. Luthwasile ulawulo lukaThixo. Guqukani, nikholwe kuzo ezi ndaba zimnandi.”" 
Mark1:16 Ke kaloku kwathi ehamba ngakuLwandle lwaseGalili, wabona uSimon noAndreya umninawe wakhe bephosa umnatha elwandle. Kaloku bona babengabalobi beentlanzi." 
Mark1:17 UYesu wathi kubo: “Yizani apha nindilandele; ndonenza nibe ngabalobi babantu.” 
Mark1:18 Bayishiya kwangoko ke iminatha yabo, bamlandela." 
Mark1:19 Uthe ke, ehambele phambili kancinane, wabona uYakobi noYohane umninawe wakhe, oonyana bakaZebhedi, besesikhitshaneni sabo, belungisa iminatha yabo." 
Mark1:20 Wababiza, baza ke bamshiya uyise uZebhedi esikhitshaneni apho enabaqeshwa, balandela uYesu." 
Mark1:21 Bangena ke kwidolophu yaseKapernahum, waza ke uYesu *ngoMhla wokuqala wokuPhumla wafundisa *endlwini yesikhungo." 
Mark1:22 Bamangaliswa abantu kukufundisa kwakhe, kuba wayefundisa ngegunya, engafundisi njengabachazi-mthetho." 
Mark1:23 Kwakukho umntu onendimoni endlwini yesikhungo apho, owayekhala esithi:" 
Mark1:24 “Ufuna ntoni kuthi, Yesu waseNazarete? Ngaba uze kusitshabalalisa na? Ndiyakwazi ukuba ungubani na: ungoyiNgcwele kaThixo!”" 
Mark1:25 UYesu wayikhalimela loo ndimoni, esithi: “Yithi tu, uphume kulo mntu!”" 
Mark1:26 Ke indimoni leyo yamxhuzula loo mntu, yaphuma kuye ibhomboloza." 
Mark1:27 Bamangaliswa bonke abantu, babuzana besithi: “Yaz'ba yintoni na le nto! Ngaba yimfundiso entsha? Ngathi lo mfo ufundisa ngegunya! Ewe, neendimoni ezi uyazikhalimela zimthobele!”" 
Mark1:28 Lwathi ke udumo lukaYesu lwavakala kulo lonke elaseGalili. 
Mark1:29 Baphuma ke *endlwini yesikhungo, kwangoko baya kwindlu kaSimon noAndreya, benoYakobi noYohane." 
Mark1:30 Ke umkhwekazi kaSimon wayelele, egula yifiva, baza bamxelela uYesu ukuba akaphilanga." 
Mark1:31 Waya kuye uYesu, wamphakamisa embambe ngesandla; yaphela kwangoko loo fiva, waza wabalungiselela ukutya." 
Mark1:32 Kwathi ke ngokuhlwa, selitshonile ilanga, abantu bazisa kuye bonke abagulayo nabaneendimoni." 
Mark1:33 Bonke abantu baloo dolophu babehlanganisene ngasemnyango apho. 
Mark1:34 UYesu ke waphilisa abaninzi abagula zizifo ngezifo, ekhupha neendimoni. Iindimoni ezi wayengazivumeli ukuba zithethe, kuba zazimazi." 
Mark1:35 Kwathi kusesekuseni kakhulu, kusemnyama, wavuka uYesu, waya kuthandaza ngasese." 
Mark1:36 USimon nâbo babenaye baya kumfuna. 
Mark1:37 Bakuba bemfumene, bathi kuye: “Uyafunwa ngumntu wonke.”" 
Mark1:38 Kambe ke yena wathi kubo: “Masihambe siye kwezinye iidolophu zalapha, ukuze nakhona ndizivakalise iindaba ezimnandi. Kaloku ndizele kanye loo nto.”" 
Mark1:39 Walityhutyha lonke elaseGalili, eshumayela *ezindlwini zesikhungo, ekhupha iindimoni." 
Mark1:40 Kwasuka mntu uthile uneqhenqa weza kuYesu, wambongoza eguqe phambi kwakhe, wathi: “Unako ukundihlambulula ukuba uyathanda.”" 
Mark1:41 UYesu wavelana naye, wasolula isandla, wamchukumisa, wathi kuye: “Ndiyathanda; hlambuluka.”" 
Mark1:42 Kwangoko laphela iqhenqa, wahlambuluka." 
Mark1:43 Akuba emyale kabukhali, wamndulula kwangoko," 
Mark1:44 esithi kuye: “Lumka ungaxeleli bani nento le. Hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, wenze umnikelo ngezo zinto wazimiselayo uMosis, ube bubungqina ngokuhlanjululwa kwakho.”" 
Mark1:45 Kodwa yena akuphuma, wasuka wayibhengeza kakhulu le nto. Ngenxa yoko uYesu akabanga saba nako ukungena edolophini ebonwa ngabantu, koko wahlala emaphandleni. Abantu ke babesiza kuye, bevela macala onke." 
Mark2:1 Kwakuba ntsuku, uYesu wabuyela eKapernahum; kwavakala ukuba usekhayeni lakhe." 
Mark2:2 Ke kwahlanganisana into eninzi yabantu, kwada akwabikho ndawo nangasemnyango. Kwathi ke xa uYesu wayesashumayela," 
Mark2:3 kwafika abantu, bezise kuye umntu ofe umzimba, ethwelwe ngabané." 
Mark2:4 Bakuba bengenakusondela kuYesu ngenxa yokuxinana kwendimbane, baqhaqhe uphahla ngakuloo ndawo wayekuyo. Begqobhozile ke, bamhlisa ngokhuko lowo ufe umzimba." 
Mark2:5 UYesu akulubona ukholo lwabo, wathi kofe umzimba: “Nyana, izono zakho zixolelwe.”" 
Mark2:6 Abachazi-mthetho abathile, ababekhona, bathi ezintliziyweni zabo:" 
Mark2:7 “Yini na ukuba lo athethe ngolu hlobo? Uyanyelisa! Ngubani onako ukuxolela izono ingenguye uThixo kuphela?” 
Mark2:8 Kwangoko uYesu wazazi iingcamango zabo, wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nibe nezi ngcamango ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Mark2:9 Okukona kulula kukuphi na? Kukho ukuthi kofe umzimba: ‘Izono zakho zixolelwe,’ kukho nokuthi: ‘Vuka, uthathe ukhuko lwakho uhambe’?" 
Mark2:10 Ke ukuze nazi ukuba *uNyana woLuntu unalo igunya lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha – úthi kofe umzimba – 
Mark2:11 ndithi kuwe: ‘Vuka, uthathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe ugoduke.’ ”" 
Mark2:12 Wavuka kwangoko ke, wathatha ukhuko, wemka. Bamangaliswa bonke, bemdumisa uThixo, besithi: “Asizange siyibone into enje!”" 
Mark2:13 UYesu wabuya waphuma waya ngaselwandle. Kwaza ke kwahlanganisana isihlwele ngakuye, wasifundisa." 
Mark2:14 Wathi edlula wabona uLevi, unyana ka-Alifeyu, ehleli eofisini yerhafu; wathi kuye: “Ndilandele.” Waphakama ke, wamlandela." 
Mark2:15 Kwathi, xa wayesitya kwaLevi, kwakho nento eninzi yabaqokeleli-rhafu *naboni, isitya ndawonye noYesu nabafundi bakhe, kuba babebaninzi, bemlandela." 
Mark2:16 Ke abachazi-mthetho beqela *labaFarasi, bakumbona esitya kunye nabaqokeleli-rhafu naboni, bathi kubafundi bakhe: “Yini na ukuba atye kunye nabaqokeleli-rhafu naboni?”" 
Mark2:17 Ekuvile oko uYesu, wathi kubo: “Ugqirha akafuneki nganto kwabaphilileyo, ufuneka kwabagulayo. Andizanga kubiza malungisa, ndizé kubiza aboni.”" 
Mark2:18 Abafundi bakaYohane *nabaFarasi babezila ukutya. Ke abantu beza kuYesu, bathi kuye: “Kutheni abafundi bakaYohane nababaFarasi besoloko bezila ukutya nje, kanti bona abakho abazili?”" 
Mark2:19 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Ngaba abakhaphi bomyeni bangakuzila na ukutya lo gama umyeni asekunye nabo? Nakanye! Ngalo lonke ixesha asephakathi kwabo umyeni, abangekhe bakuzile!" 
Mark2:20 Kodwa lofika ixesha lokuba umyeni asuswe kubo, bandule ke ukuzila." 
Mark2:21 “Kaloku akukho mntu uthungela isiziba esitsha kwisambatho esidala, kuba ukuba uthe wenjenjalo, sofinyela, sisikrazule ngakumbi isambatho eso." 
Mark2:22 Kananjalo akukho mntu uyitha kwiimvaba ezindala iwayini entsha engekabili, kuba ukuba uthe wenjenjalo, zogqabhuka ziphele iimvaba, ichitheke iwayini. Kaloku iwayini engekabili ithiwa kwiimvaba ezintsha.”" 
Mark2:23 Kwathi uYesu ecanda emasimini *ngoMhla wokuPhumla, abafundi bakhe basuka bakha izikhwebu zengqolowa." 
Mark2:24 Bathi ke kuye *abaFarasi: “Khawutsho, kungani na ukuba abafundi bakho benze okungavumelekanga ngoMhla woPhumlo?”" 
Mark2:25 Uthe ke yena kubo: “Anizange nikufunde na awakwenzayo uDavide, mhla walamba engenanto ityiwayo, yena neqela lakhe?" 
Mark2:26 Kaloku wangena endlwini kaThixo ngemihla ka-Abhiyatare umbingeleli omkhulu, wazitya izonka ezazinikelwe kuThixo, wanika neqela lakhe. Kanti ngokomthetho ezi zonka azimelwe kutyiwa ngabangengobabingeleli.”" 
Mark2:27 Waza wathi ke kubo: “UMhla woPhumlo lo wabakho ngenxa yomntu, asinguye umntu owabakho ngenxa yawo." 
Mark2:28 Ngoko ke uNyana woLuntu uyiNkosi yawo noMhla woPhumlo.” 
Mark3:1 Waphinda uYesu wangena *endlwini yesikhungo. Apho kwakukho umntu owayome isandla. 
Mark3:2 Babemlalele ke befuna ukubona ukuba womphilisa na *ngoMhla woPhumlo, ukuze bammangalele." 
Mark3:3 UYesu wathi kuloo mntu wayome isandla: “Phakama, uze ngaphambili.”" 
Mark3:4 Waza wathi kubo: “Okuvumelekileyo ngoMhla woPhumlo kukwenza okulungileyo, kukwenza okubi; kukuphilisa, kukubulala; kusini na?” Kwathi cwaka." 
Mark3:5 Akuba ebasingasingile, ebuhlungu ngenxa yokuqaqadeka kweentliziyo zabo, wathi kumntu lowo: “Solule isandla sakho.” Wasolula, saza saphila isandla sakhe." 
Mark3:6 Kwangoko ke baphuma *abaFarasi, baya kubhunga *namaHerode, becebisana ngokubulala uYesu." 
Mark3:7 Wemka uYesu, enabafundi bakhe, waya elwandle. Yamlandela inkitha yabantu, ivela kwelaseGalili, nakwelakwaJuda," 
Mark3:8 naseJerusalem, nase-Edom, naphesheya kweJordan, nakwimimandla yeTire neSidon. Loo nkitha ininzi yeza kuYesu, kuba yayivile ngemimangaliso yakhe." 
Mark3:9 Wathi kubafundi bakhe mabamlungiselele isikhitshana, hleze axinwe sisihlwele," 
Mark3:10 kuba wayephilise abantu abaninzi, baza bonke abanezifo bathi ngunga phezu kwakhe, ukuze bamchukumise." 
Mark3:11 Naxa sukuba abantu abaneendimoni bembona, babesiwa phambi kwakhe, bakhale, besithi: “Unguye wena uNyana kaThixo!”" 
Mark3:12 Wayebakhalimela kakhulu ke ukuba bangamazisi ebantwini. 
Mark3:13 UYesu ke wenyuka intaba, wabiza abo wayefuna bamlandele. Baya kuye ke," 
Mark3:14 waza wamisela abalishumi elinambini awababiza ngokuba *ngabathunywa, ebamisela ukuba babe kunye naye nokuba abathume baye kushumayela," 
Mark3:15 ebanike igunya lokukhupha iindimoni. 
Mark3:16 Wamisela aba ke: uSimon, awamthiya igama elinguPetros;" 
Mark3:17 uYakobi, unyana kaZebhedi, noYohane umninawe wakhe, awathi bona wabathiya amagama okuba ngooBhowanerges, oko kukuthi ngooSatsha;" 
Mark3:18 uAndreya noFilipu, noBhartolomeyu, noMatewu, noTomas, noYakobi unyana ka-Alifeyu, noTadeyu, noSimon owayengoweqela lamaTsha-ntliziyo," 
Mark3:19 noJudas Sikariyoti, owayeza kumngcatsha." 
Mark3:20 UYesu ke wangena endlwini, kwaza kwakhona kwabuthelana isihlwele. Kwakuxinene kangangokuba yena nabafundi bakhe bangabi nako nokutya oku." 
Mark3:21 Bevile ngale nto, abakowabo baphuma besiya kumphuthuma, kuba kwakusithiwa: “Ushiywe ziingqondo.”" 
Mark3:22 Ke abachazi-mthetho ababevela eJerusalem babesithi unoSathana, besithi iindimoni ezi uzikhupha ngomphathi wazo." 
Mark3:23 Ebabizele kuye abantu, uthethe nabo ezekelisa, esithi: “Angáthini na uSathana ukukhupha uSathana?" 
Mark3:24 Kaloku isizwe esivukelana sodwa siyachithakala; 
Mark3:25 nomzi ovukelana wodwa uyachithakala. 
Mark3:26 NoSathana ke, ukuba uvukelana noSathana, uya kuphanza angabikho." 
Mark3:27 “Akukho bani unako ukungena endlwini yegorha, aze aphange impahla yalo, engathanga kuqala alibophe elo gorha, aze ke andule ukuyiphanga indlu yalo." 
Mark3:28 “Inene, baya kuzixolelwa zonke izono oonyana babantu, kwanezinyeliso abasukuba benyelisa ngazo;" 
Mark3:29 kodwa yena othe wanyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele akanako ukuxolelwa naphakade; unetyala lesono esingatshitshiyo.” 
Mark3:30 UYesu watsho kuba babesithi unendimoni. 
Mark3:31 Kwafika abantakwabo-Yesu kunye nonina, baza bathi, bemi ngaphandle, bayaleza ukuba makabizwe." 
Mark3:32 Wayengqongwe sisihlwele sabantu, kwaza kwakho othi kuye: “Uxolo, nanku unyoko nabantakwenu ngaphandle, bekufuna.”" 
Mark3:33 Wabaphendula esithi: “Ngubani umama? Ngoobani bona abantakwethu?” 
Mark3:34 Ebasingasingile ke abo babemngqongile, wathi: “Nguye lo umama nabantakwethu." 
Mark3:35 Kaloku lowo uthe wakwenza ukuthanda kukaThixo nguye ongumntakwethu, nodade wethu, nomama.”" 
Mark4:1 Kwakhona uYesu wafundisa ngaselwandle. Saza isihlwele esasihlanganisene ngakuye saba sikhulu kangangokude yena aye kukhwela esikhitshaneni, ahlale kuso elwandle. Isihlwele sona sasiselunxwemeni apho." 
Mark4:2 Ke wayebafundisa iindawo ezininzi ngemizekeliso, esithi:" 
Mark4:3 “Kwakukho umhlwayeli owaphuma waya kuhlwayela. 
Mark4:4 Ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe inxenye yembewu yawa endleleni, zafika iintaka zayichola zayigqiba." 
Mark4:5 Enye imbewu yawa endaweni elulwalwa, apho kwakungekho mhlaba waneleyo; yantshula ke kwangoko, ngenxa yokungabi nabunzulu bamhlaba." 
Mark4:6 Kuthe ke, lakuba shushu ilanga, yatsha, yathi ngenxa yokuba ingenazingcambu zendeleyo, yoma kwaphela." 
Mark4:7 Enye yawa endaweni enokhula, olwathi lwakukhula, lwayiminxa, ayaba nasiqhamo." 
Mark4:8 Enye yawa kumhlaba olungileyo, yakhula, yachuma, yavelisa isiqhamo: enye amashumi amathathu, enye amashumi amathandathu, nenye ikhulu.”" 
Mark4:9 Wathi ke kubo uYesu: “Oneendlebe zokuva makeve.” 
Mark4:10 Ke kaloku kwathi xa uYesu wayenâbo babengakuye, bekunye nabafundi abalishumi elinambini, bambuza ngale mizekeliso." 
Mark4:11 Wathi kubo: “Nikuphiwe nina okokuba niyazi indlela yokulawula kukaThixo, kodwa abo bangakuphiwanga baziva ngemizekeliso nje zonke ezi zinto;" 
Mark4:12 ukuze, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo, “ ‘Bebona nje, babone bangaqiqi; besiva nje, beve bangaqondi; hleze baguquke, baxolelwe.’”" 
Mark4:13 Wathi ke kubo uYesu: “Aniwulandeli na lo mzekeliso? Niya kuyazi kanjani kakade imizekeliso? 
Mark4:14 Umhlwayeli lo uhlwayela ilizwi. 
Mark4:15 Abo ke basendleleni, apho ilizwi likaThixo lihlwayelwa khona, ngâbo bathi, bakuba bevile, bafikelwe kwangoko nguSathana, emke nalo ilizwi elihlwayelweyo kubo." 
Mark4:16 Ke abo banjengendawo elulwalwa ekuhlwayelwe kuyo ngabathi, bakuba belivile ilizwi, balamkele kwangoko bevuya;" 
Mark4:17 kodwa babe bengenazingcambu zendeleyo, beme umzuzwana kuphela; bathi emva koko, kwakufika imbandezelo okanye intshutshiso ngenxa yelizwi, boyisakale kwangoko." 
Mark4:18 Abo banjengendawo enokhula ekuhlwayelwe kuyo ngabathi balive ilizwi," 
Mark4:19 aze ke amaxhala eli phakade, nokulukuhla kobutyebi, nokunqwenela ezinye izinto, kungene kuliminxe ilizwi, lize lingabi nasiqhamo." 
Mark4:20 Abo banjengomhlaba olungileyo ekuhlwayelwe kuwo ngabathi, bakuliva ilizwi, balamkele, baxakathe isiqhamo: omnye amashumi amathathu, omnye amashumi amathandathu, nomnye ikhulu.”" 
Mark4:21 Kwakhona uYesu wathi kubo: “Ngaba isibane sikhe siqutyudelwe ngethunga okanye sifakwe phantsi kwebhedi na? Asixhonywa endaweni yaso yini na? 
Mark4:22 Kaloku akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kude ityhilwe; kananjalo akukho nto ifihliweyo ingayi kude ivele. 
Mark4:23 Ke oneendlebe zokuva makeve.” 
Mark4:24 Kwakhona wathi kubo: “Yilumkeleni into eniyivayo. Umlinganiselo enibalinganisela ngawo abanye, niya kulinganiselwa kwangawo nguThixo nani, kuze kongezwe kuni, nina nivayo." 
Mark4:25 Lowo sukuba enolutho uya kunikwa, athi lowo ungenanto ahluthwe kwanaloo nto anayo.”" 
Mark4:26 Kwakhona uYesu wathi: “Ukulawula kukaThixo kunokufaniswa nokuthi umntu ahlwayele imbewu entsimini," 
Mark4:27 aze alale avuke imihla ngemihla, ibe yona imbewu intshula ikhula ngohlobo angalwaziyo." 
Mark4:28 Kaloku umhlaba uvelisa iziqhamo ngokwawo: kuqala iba likhaba, ize ibe yindubulo, ize ibe sisikhwebu esivuthiweyo." 
Mark4:29 Xa ke ithe yavuthwa ingqolowa, ingenwa ngerhenqe kwangoko, kuba ixesha lokuvuna lifikile.”" 
Mark4:30 Kwakhona uYesu wathi: “Singakufanekisa nantoni na ukulawula kukaThixo? Singakuzekelisa ngamzekeliso mni? 
Mark4:31 Kunjengokhozo lwembewu yemostade. Ukhozo lwemostade lulolona luncinane kuzo zonke iintlobo zembewu emhlabeni," 
Mark4:32 kodwa xa luthe lwatyalwa, lukhula lube lukhulu kunazo zonke izityalo, lube namasebe amakhulu kangangokuba iintaka zibe nokwakhela iindlwane zazo kuwo zisemthunzini.”" 
Mark4:33 UYesu wayelithetha kubo ilizwi ngemizekeliso emininzi elolu hlobo, ebafundisa kangangoko babenako ukuqonda." 
Mark4:34 Ebethetha nabo ngemizekeliso kuphela, kodwa akuba yedwa nabafundi bakhe wayebacacisela yonke into." 
Mark4:35 Kwangaloo mini ngokuhlwa uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Masiwele siye ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili.” 
Mark4:36 Basishiya ke isihlwele, bemka noYesu esesikhitshaneni apho, kukho nezinye izikhitshana." 
Mark4:37 Ke kwabakho isaqhwithi esikhulu, amaza aphoseka esikhitshaneni, saza isikhitshana saphantse sazala ngamanzi." 
Mark4:38 UYesu wayephakathi esikhitshaneni, ethathe umqamelo walala ubuthongo. Bamvusa ke, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, akukhathali na, sitshabalala nje?”" 
Mark4:39 Wavuka ke, wawukhalimela umoya, wathi kulo ulwandle: “Yithi cwaka, uzole.” Wadamba umoya, kwabakho ukuzola okukhulu." 
Mark4:40 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba noyike kangaka? Kutheni ukuba ningakholwa?” 
Mark4:41 Babesoyika kakhulu, omnye esithi komnye: “He bethu, ngumntu onjani na lo ude alulanyelwe ngumoya nalulwandle!”" 
Mark5:1 Bafika phesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili, kummandla welaseGerasa." 
Mark5:2 Akuba uYesu ephumile esikhitshaneni, wahlangatyezwa ngumntu onendimoni, esuka emangcwabeni," 
Mark5:3 apho wayehlala khona. Ke kwakungekho bani unako ukumbopha nangamatyathanga. 
Mark5:4 Wayemana ebotshwa ngamakhamandela nangamatyathanga, kodwa awaqhawule amatyathanga, awakroboze namakhamandela. Kwakungekho bani unako ukumthoboza." 
Mark5:5 Wayesithi ubusuku nemini ahlale ezintabeni nasemangcwabeni, ekhala, ezixuzula ngamatye." 
Mark5:6 Uthe ke, akubona uYesu esekude, wabaleka, waya kuguqa phambi kwakhe," 
Mark5:7 wakhala kakhulu, wathi: “Ufuna ntoni na kum, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo uPhezukonke? Funga uThixo ukuba akuyi kundithuthumbisa.”" 
Mark5:8 Wayesitsho kuba uYesu wayethe kuye: “Phuma kuloo mntu, ndimonindini.”" 
Mark5:9 UYesu ke wambuza esithi: “Ungubani wena igama lakho?” Waphendula esithi: “NdinguMkhosi, kuba sibaninzi.”" 
Mark5:10 Watsho ebongoza uYesu ukuba iindimoni ezo angazigxothi zimke kwelo zwe. 
Mark5:11 Kwakukho umhlambi omkhulu weehagu usidla apho ngasentabeni; 
Mark5:12 zaza iindimoni ezo zambongoza uYesu, zisithi: “Sithumele ezihagwini, singene kuzo.”" 
Mark5:13 Wazivumela ke; zaza zaphuma iindimoni, zaya kungena ezihagwini. Ke umhlambi lowo, owawumalunga namawaka amabini eehagu, waphaphatheka, wehla ethambekeni, waya kweyela elwandle, warhaxwa." 
Mark5:14 Bathe ke abo babezalusa ezi hagu babaleka, bakuxela edolophini nasemaphandleni okwenzekileyo. Baphuma ke abantu baya kubona oko kwenzekileyo." 
Mark5:15 Bafika kuYesu, bambona lowo ubephethwe ngumkhosi weendimoni ehleli phantsi, enxibile, esezingqondweni; baza boyika." 
Mark5:16 Abo babeyibonile loo nto babaxelela okwenzekileyo kobephethwe ziindimoni, nokwenzekileyo ezihagwini." 
Mark5:17 Baza ke bambongoza uYesu ukuba emke kuloo mmandla wabo. 
Mark5:18 Xa wayengene esikhitshaneni uYesu, lowo ubephethwe ziindimoni wambongoza ukuba ahambe naye." 
Mark5:19 Kodwa akamvumelanga; koko wathi kuye: “Goduka, ubaxelele abakowenu oko ikwenzeleyo iNkosi: inceba engaka!”" 
Mark5:20 Wemka ke, wakuxela kummandla weeDolophu eziliShumi oko uYesu wayemenzele kona. Bamangaliswa bonke abantu." 
Mark5:21 Akuba uYesu ebuye wawela uLwandle lwaseGalili ngesikhitshana, kwahlanganisana ngaselwandle apho isihlwele esikhulu." 
Mark5:22 Kwathi ke kwafika igosa lendlu yesikhungo, eligama linguJayiro, elathi lakumbona, lakhahlela," 
Mark5:23 laza lambongoza, lisithi: “Intombi yam isindekile. Khawuze ubeke izandla zakho phezu kwayo, ukuze ichache, iphile.”" 
Mark5:24 UYesu ke wahamba nalo, ephahlwe yindimbane enkulu eyayimxinile." 
Mark5:25 Kwakukho nomfazi owayehlamba engaphezi iminyaka elishumi elinambini esifa," 
Mark5:26 ephatheke kabuhlungu kumagqirha amaninzi. Wayedleke konke awayenako, engancedakali, kodwa eya egula ngakumbi." 
Mark5:27 Evile ke ngoYesu, wasondela kuye ngasemva esesihlweleni apho, wayichukumisa ingubo yakhe;" 
Mark5:28 kuba wayesithi: “Ukuba ndithe ndachukumisa nokuba yingubo yakhe le, ndophila.”" 
Mark5:29 Lanqamka kwangoko igazi, waziva emzimbeni wakhe ukuba uphilile kweso sifo." 
Mark5:30 Ngoko nangoko uYesu waqonda ukuba kukho amandla aphumileyo kuye, wabheka ngasemva esendimbaneni apho, wathi: “Ngubani lo uchukumise ingubo yam?”" 
Mark5:31 Abafundi bakhe bathi kuye: “Ubona nje ukuba isihlwele sikuxinile, ungáthini ke ukuthi: ‘Ngubani lo undichukumisileyo?’ ”" 
Mark5:32 Noko yena wasinga-singa ukuba ambone lowo uyenzileyo le nto. 
Mark5:33 Uthe ke umfazi lowo, ekuqondile okwenzeke kuye, weza esoyika, engcangcazela, wazikhahlela phambi kwakhe, wamxelela inyaniso yonke." 
Mark5:34 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ntombi yam, ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile. Hamba ngoxolo, uphile kweso sifo sakho.”" 
Mark5:35 Kwathi uYesu esathetha, kwafika abakulogosa lendlu yesikhungo, besithi: “Intombi yakho ibhubhile; usamkhathazelani na uMfundisi?”" 
Mark5:36 UYesu yena, eyivile loo nto, wathi kwigosa lendlu yesikhungo: “Musa ukoyika; kuphela kholwa wena.”" 
Mark5:37 Ke akavumela mntu ukuba ahambe naye, ngaphandle koPetros noYakobi noYohane, umninawe kaYakobi." 
Mark5:38 Bafika ke emzini wegosa lendlu yesikhungo, waza uYesu wasibona isiphithi-phithi sabalilayo nabenza isijwili esikhulu." 
Mark5:39 Akungena, wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nenjenje ukuphithizela nokulila? Akafanga umntwana; ulele.”" 
Mark5:40 Basuka bamwa ngentsini. Wabakhuphela phandle ke bonke, wathatha uyise womntwana nonina, nâbo bafundi babenaye, wangena apho wayekhona umntwana." 
Mark5:41 UYesu ke wambamba ngesandla umntwana, wathi kuye: “Talita, kum;” oko kukuthi: “Ntombazana, vuka!”" 
Mark5:42 Yavuka kwangoko intombazana leyo, yahamba-hamba. (Yayineminyaka elishumi elinambini izelwe.) Bamangaliswa abantu, bakhwankqiswa." 
Mark5:43 UYesu wabayala kakhulu ukuba bangaxeleli mntu, waza wathi mayinikwe into etyiwayo intombazana leyo." 
Mark6:1 Wemka apho uYesu, wabuyela kowabo, elandelwa ngabafundi bakhe." 
Mark6:2 Uthe ke, kwakuba *nguMhla woPhumlo, wafundisa *endlwini yesikhungo. Kwakukho abantu abaninzi apho, abathe, bakuva, bamangaliswa, besithi: “Lo uyithathe phi na yonke le nto? Bulumko buni na obu abunikiweyo ukuze enze imimangaliso elolu hlobo?" 
Mark6:3 Lo akanguye na umchweli, unyana kaMariya, umntakwabo-Yakobi noYose noJuda noSimon? Noodade wabo abakho na apha phakathi kwethu?” Ngenxa yale nto ke bambukula." 
Mark6:4 Ke uYesu wathi kubo: “Kakade *umshumayeli uyayinikwa imbeko; kukowabo kuphela, kwizizalwana zakhe, ekhayeni lakhe, apho angayifumaniyo khona.”" 
Mark6:5 Wayengenako ke ukwenza namnye ummangaliso apho, ngaphandle kokuba abeke izandla kwimilwelwe embalwa, ayiphilise." 
Mark6:6 Wayemangaliswa kukungakholwa kwabo. Wayejikeleza uYesu ezityhutyha iidolophana efundisa. 
Mark6:7 Wababizela kuye abafundi abalishumi elinambini, waza wabathuma ngababini, ebanike igunya lokoyisa iindimoni." 
Mark6:8 Wabayalela ukuba bangaphathi nto ngaphandle komsimelelo. Wayesithi mabangaphathi nangxowa, nasonka, namali embhinqweni;" 
Mark6:9 bathi noko banxibe izihlangu, kodwa bangaphathi zambatho zingazibini." 
Mark6:10 Ngaphezu koko wathi kubo: “Kuloo ndlu nithe naya kungena kuyo, hlalani kuyo nide nimke kuloo dolophu." 
Mark6:11 Ukuba nithe nafika endaweni apho sukuba ningàmkelwa khona, okanye ningàphulaphulwa nokuphulaphulwa oku, mkani apho, nivuthulule uthuli olusezinyaweni zenu, ukuze oko kube bubungqina bokuba abanamkelanga.”" 
Mark6:12 Baphuma ke, bashumayela besithi abantu mabaguquke." 
Mark6:13 Bakhupha iindimoni ezininzi, bayithambisa ngeoyile imilwelwe emininzi, bayiphilisa." 
Mark6:14 Wakuva ke oko ukumkani uHerode, kuba igama likaYesu lalithe laduma, kusithiwa: “UnguYohane umbhaptizi ovusiweyo kwabafileyo; kungoko ayenzayo le mimangaliso.”" 
Mark6:15 Abanye babesithi: “ÚnguEliya;” abanye besithi: “*Úngumshumayeli ofana nabashumayeli bamandulo.” 
Mark6:16 Ekuvile ke oko uHerode, wathi: “Lo nguYohane, lowa ndamnqumla intloko. Naku evukile ngoku!”" 
Mark6:17 Kuba uHerode ngokwakhe wayethumele ukuba abanjwe uYohane, afakwe entolongweni. UHerode wakwenza oku ngenxa kaHerodiya awayethe wamzeka nangona angumka-Filipu, umninawe wakhe." 
Mark6:18 Kaloku uYohane wayethe kuHerode: “Akuvumelekanga ukuba umthathe umfazi womntakwenu.” 
Mark6:19 UHerodiya ke wamxhiba, wazungula ukumbulala. Kodwa wayengenako," 
Mark6:20 kuba uHerode wayemoyika uYohane, emazi ukuba uyindoda elungileyo, engcwele, waza wambeka elugcinweni. UHerode wayethanda ukumphulaphula uYohane, nangona wayedideka kakhulu akumva." 
Mark6:21 Lada ke lafika ithuba elihle kuHerodiya. Yayisisikhumbuzo sokuzalwa kukaHerode, waza wazenzela itheko izikhulu zakhe, neenjengele zakhe, namanene elaseGalili." 
Mark6:22 Yangena ke intombi kaHerodiya, yangqungqa yamkholisa uHerode nabo babesethekweni kunye naye. Waza ukumkani wathi kwintombi leyo: “Cela nantoni na oyifunayo; ndokupha.”" 
Mark6:23 Wafunga esithi: “Into othe wayicela kum ndokupha, nokuba sisiqingatha sobukumkani bam.”" 
Mark6:24 Yaphuma ke intombi, yaya kunina, yathi: “Ndicelè ntoni, mama?” Wathi yena: “Cela intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi.”" 
Mark6:25 Kwangoko intombi leyo yaya kungena ngokungxama kukumkani, yacela isithi: “Ndifuna undinike intloko kaYohane umbhaptizi ngesitya ngoku.”" 
Mark6:26 Waba buhlungu kakhulu ukumkani, kodwa akabanga nakulandula, kuba wayefunge phambi kwabo bonke ababesethekweni." 
Mark6:27 Kwangoko ke ukumkani wathuma umxhomi, emyalela ukuba azise intloko kaYohane. Waya ke, wamnqumla intloko entolongweni apho," 
Mark6:28 waza wayizisa ngesitya intloko yakhe, wayinika intombi leyo; yaza yona yayinika unina." 
Mark6:29 Bekuvile oko abafundi bakaYohane, beza basithatha isidumbu sakhe, baya kusingcwaba." 
Mark6:30 *Abathunywa ke babuyele kuYesu, bamxelela zonke izinto ababezenzile kwanababezifundisile."
