Mark6:31 UYesu wathi kubo: “Yizani ngasese kwindawo engenabantu, niphumle kancinane;” kuba babebaninzi abaphuma bengena, baza ababa nalo nethutyana eli lokuba batye." 
Mark6:32 Bemka ngesikhitshana ke bebodwa, besiya kwindawo engenabantu." 
Mark6:33 Babonwa besimka, baza baziwa ngabaninzi. Bathi ke abantu, bevela kuzo zonke iidolophu, bakhawuleza baya khona ngeenyawo, bafika ngaphambi kwabo." 
Mark6:34 Uthe ke uYesu, akuphuma esikhitshaneni, wasibona eso sihlwele, wavelana naso, kuba sasinjengeegusha ezingenamalusi, waza ke wasifundisa izinto ezininzi." 
Mark6:35 Lakuba limkile ixesha, abafundi bakhe beza kuye, bathi: “Le ndawo ayinamizi, nexesha selimkile;" 
Mark6:36 bandulule abantu bemke, baye emizini ejikelezileyo nasezidolophaneni, bazithengele ukutya.”" 
Mark6:37 Kodwa waphendula wathi kubo: “Bapheni nina ukutya.” Bathi kuye ke: “Masithini ke? Uthi masiye kuthenga izonka zeerandi ezingamakhulu amabini, sibaphe batye?”" 
Mark6:38 Wathi yena kubo: “Izonka eninazo zingaphi? Hambani niye kukhangela.” Besazi ke, bathi: “Sinezonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini.”" 
Mark6:39 UYesu wabayalela abafundi bakhe ukuba babahlalise phantsi bonke engceni eluhlaza, babe ngamaqela ngamaqela." 
Mark6:40 Bahlala phantsi ke bengamaqela ngamaqela, bengamakhulu namashumi ngamahlanu." 
Mark6:41 Wazithatha uYesu ezo zonka zihlanu nezo ntlanzi zimbini, wathi, ekhangele ezulwini, wabulela, waziqhekeza izonka, wazinika abafundi bakhe, ukuba bazabele abantu. Kwanezo ntlanzi zimbini wazabela bona bonke." 
Mark6:42 Batya ke bonke bahlutha. 
Mark6:43 Kwaqokelelwa okuseleyo esonkeni nasentlanzini, kwazalisa iingobozi ezilishumi elinambini." 
Mark6:44 Abo bâthi bazitya izonka ezo babekumawaka amahlanu amadoda. 
Mark6:45 Kwangoko ke uYesu wabanyanzela abafundi bakhe ukuba bangene esikhitshaneni, bamandulele baye ngaphesheya eBhetesayida, ngeli xa yena asindululayo isihlwele." 
Mark6:46 Akuba ke ebulisile, wemka waya kuthandaza entabeni." 
Mark6:47 Kuhlwe isikhitshana siphakathi elwandle, yena uYesu esele yedwa emhlabeni." 
Mark6:48 Wababona ke abafundi bebulaleka kukubheqa isikhitshana, kuba umoya wawuvela ngaphambili. Ke, emva kwentsimbi yesithathu ekuseni, waya kubo ehamba phezu kwamanzi olwandle. Xa wayeza kugqitha kubo," 
Mark6:49 bambona ehamba phezu kwamanzi olwandle, baza bathi: “Ngumhlola lo!” Batsho bakhala," 
Mark6:50 kuba bambona bonke, babethwa luvalo. Kwangoko ke wathetha nabo, wathi kubo: “Zolani; ndim; musani ukoyika.”" 
Mark6:51 Waya kukhwela apho esikhitshaneni, waza umoya wadamba. Bamangaliswa kunene," 
Mark6:52 kuba nommangaliso wezonka babengawuqondanga, kuba iintliziyo zabo zaziqaqadekile." 
Mark6:53 Bakuwelela ngaphesheya uYesu nabafundi bakhe bafika kwelaseGenesarete, basirhuqela elunxwemeni isikhitshana." 
Mark6:54 Bakuphuma esikhitshaneni, abantu bamqonda kwangoko uYesu," 
Mark6:55 bathi saa kuwo wonke loo mmandla, baza babathwala ngeenkukho abagulayo, bebasa apho babesiva ukuba ukho khona." 
Mark6:56 Naphi na apho wayehamba khona, nokuba kusezidolophaneni, nokuba kusezidolophini, nokuba kusemaphandleni, babesithi bababeke abagulayo kwiindawo zembutho, bambongoze ukuba khe bachukumise nokuba ngumqukumbelo nje wesambatho sakhe. Baphila ke abo bâmchukumisáyo." 
Mark7:1 *AbaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho abathile bahlanganisana ngakuYesu, bevela eJerusalem," 
Mark7:2 baza babona abathile kubafundi bakhe besitya isonka ngezandla ezinomlaza, ezingahlanjwanga." 
Mark7:3 Kaloku abaFarasi namaJuda onke abatyi bengazihlambanga izandla ngokwesiko, begcine isithethe samanyange." 
Mark7:4 Naxa bevela emarikeni abatyi bengahlambanga. Zikho ke nezinye izinto ezininzi abazamkele ukuba bazigcine, ezinjengokutshizwa kweendebe, neebhekile, nezitya." 
Mark7:5 AbaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho bambuza ke uYesu, besithi: “Kutheni na ukuba abafundi bakho bangenzi ngokwesithethe samanyange, le nto batya isonka ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?”" 
Mark7:6 Wabaphendula esithi: “UIsaya wayenyanisile ukushumayela ngani, bahanahanisindini, njengokuba kubhaliwe kwathiwa: “ ‘Aba bantu bandibeka ngomlomo, kanti yona intliziyo ikude lee kum,’ itsho iNkosi." 
Mark7:7 ‘Bafumana bendihlonela, kuba bafundisa iimfundiso eziyimithetho nje yabantu.’" 
Mark7:8 “Kaloku niwuyekile umyalelo kaThixo, nasuka nagcina isithethe sabantu.”" 
Mark7:9 Kwakhona wathi kubo: “Ningamachule ekuwutshitshiseni umyalelo kaThixo, nokuze niphakamise esenu isithethe." 
Mark7:10 Andithi uMosis wathi: ‘Beka uyihlo nonyoko;’ watsho nokuthi: ‘Othuka uyise, nokuba ngunina, makabulawe’?" 
Mark7:11 Kanti ukuba ubani unento angámnceda ngayo uyise nokuba ngunina, aze asuke athi uzimisele ukuyenza umnikelo kuThixo loo nto, nina ngokwesithethe senu nithi" 
Mark7:12 akasavumelekanga ukumenzela nto ngaloo nto uyise nokuba ngunina. 
Mark7:13 Ngokwenjenjalo nilenza into engento ilizwi likaThixo, nilandele isithethe senu enisifundisayo. Zikho ke nezinye izinto ezininzi ezilolu hlobo enizenzayo.”" 
Mark7:14 UYesu wayibizela kuye kwakhona indimbane, wathi: “Phulaphulani nonke, nivisise." 
Mark7:15 Umntu akangcoliswa yiloo nto ingena kuye ngomlomo; zizinto eziphuma kuye entliziyweni ngaphakathi ezimngcolisayo. [ 
Mark7:16 Ke oneendlebe zokuva makeve.]” 
Mark7:17 Akungena endlwini, evela kwindimbane leyo, abafundi bakhe bambuza intsingiselo yala mazwi." 
Mark7:18 Wathi kubo: “Nikwanje nani na ukungaqondi? Aniqondi na ukuba konke akutyayo umntu, akunako ukumngcolisa?" 
Mark7:19 Kaloku akungeni entliziyweni yakhe, kungena esiswini, kuze kuphume xa aye ngasese.” Ngala mazwi uYesu wayesithi zonke izidlo zihlambulukile." 
Mark7:20 Wahambisa wathi: “Zizenzo eziphuma entliziyweni yomntu ezimngcolisayo. 
Mark7:21 Kaloku zivela ngaphakathi entliziyweni yomntu iingcamango ezimbi. Kulapho kuvela khona ubuhenyu, ubusela, ukubulala," 
Mark7:22 ukukrexeza, ukunyoluka, inkohlakalo, inkohliso, ukurheletya, umona, ukunyelisa uThixo, ikratshi, ububhanxa." 
Mark7:23 Zonke ezi zinto zikhohlakeleyo ziphuma entliziyweni yomntu, zize zimngcolise.”" 
Mark7:24 Emkile apho uYesu, waya emideni yaseTire; wangena endlwini, engafuni ukuba kwaziwe ukuba ukho, kodwa akaba nako ukufihlakala." 
Mark7:25 Umfazi othile, ontombazana yayinendimoni, uthe kwangoko akuva ngaye, waya kuye, wazikhahlela ngasezinyaweni zakhe." 
Mark7:26 Lo mfazi, ontetho yayisisiGrike, wayengumSirofenikazi ngokuzalwa. Wabongoza uYesu ukuba ayikhuphe kwintombazana yakhe indimoni leyo." 
Mark7:27 Wathi ke uYesu kuye: “Khawuyeke kuhluthe abantwana kuqala. Kaloku akufanelekanga ukuba ukutya kwabantwana kunikwe iinjana.” 
Mark7:28 Waphendula yena wathi kuye: “Kunjalo, Nkosi, kodwa noko iinjana eziphantsi kwetafile zitya imvuthuluka yokutya kwabantwana.”" 
Mark7:29 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Ngenxa yokuthethileyo, hamba uhambe: indimoni iphumile kwintombazana yakho.”" 
Mark7:30 Egodukile ke, wayifumana intombazana yakhe ingqengqe ebhedini, iphumile indimoni." 
Mark7:31 UYesu ke waphuma emideni yaseTire, wadlula eSidon, waya kuLwandle lwaseGalili, ecanda kweleeDolophu eziliShumi." 
Mark7:32 Kweziswa kuye isithulu esithintithayo, wabongozwa ukuba abeke isandla phezu kwaso." 
Mark7:33 UYesu ke wasishenxisa esihlweleni sasodwa, wafaka iminwe ezindlebeni zaso, wathi etshicile, wachukumisa ulwimi lwaso," 
Mark7:34 wakhangela ezulwini, wancwina wathi kuso: “Efata;” (oko kukuthi: “Vuleka”)." 
Mark7:35 Zavuleka ke kwangoko iindlebe zaso, yacombuluka ingqambu yolwimi lwaso, sathetha kakuhle." 
Mark7:36 UYesu wabayala ukuba bangaxeleli bani, kodwa okukhona wabayalayo, kwaba kokukhona bakuvakalisayo ngakumbi." 
Mark7:37 Abantu bamangaliswa bathi nqa, besithi: “Konke akwenzayo ukwenza kakuhle; uzenza nezithulu zive, nezimumu zithethe.”" 
Mark8:1 Ngaloo mihla, xa kwakuhlanganisene isihlwele kwakhona, singenanto sinokuyitya, uYesu wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo:" 
Mark8:2 “Ndiyavelana nesi sihlwele, kuba sekuziintsuku ezintathu aba bantu bekunye nam. Ke abasenanto ityiwayo." 
Mark8:3 Ukuba ndiyabandulula bagoduke bengatyanga, bophelelwa endleleni, kuba inxenye yabo ivela kude.”" 
Mark8:4 Bamphendula abafundi bakhe besithi: “Kungafumaneka phi apha entlango ukutya okunokubanela aba bantu?” 
Mark8:5 Wababuza ke esithi: “Zingaphi izonka eninazo?” Bathi ke bona: “Zisixhenxe.” 
Mark8:6 UYesu ke wasiyalela ukuba sihlale phantsi isihlwele; wazithatha ezo zonka zisixhenxe, wabulela, waziqhekeza, wazinika abafundi bakhe ukuba bazabele isihlwele. Benjenjalo ke." 
Mark8:7 Babenazo neentlanzana ezimbalwa. Akuba uYesu ebulele kuThixo, wathi mazabelwe isihlwele nazo." 
Mark8:8 Batya ke, bahlutha, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iibhaskiti ezisixhenxe zizele yintsalela." 
Mark8:9 UYesu wasindulula ke eso sihlwele esasikumawaka amane abantu; 
Mark8:10 waza kwangoko wakhwela esikhitshaneni kunye nabafundi bakhe, waya kummandla waseDalmanuta." 
Mark8:11 Bafika ke *abaFarasi, baza bamgocagoca ngemibuzo uYesu, befuna umqondiso ovela ezulwini, bemlinga." 
Mark8:12 Watsho ngesingqala esibuhlungu, wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba esi sizukulwana singxamele umqondiso? Ndithi kuni, inene, soze siwunikwe umqondiso onjalo esi sizukulwana!”" 
Mark8:13 Wabashiya, waphinda wakhwela esikhitshaneni, wemka waya ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili." 
Mark8:14 Abafundi babelibele ukuphatha izonka, benesonka esinye kuphela esikhitshaneni." 
Mark8:15 Wabayala uYesu esithi: “Ligqaleni nililumkele igwele labaFarasi negwele likaHerode.” 
Mark8:16 Bona ke babesithi omnye komnye: “Útsho ngokuba singenazonka.” 
Mark8:17 UYesu, ekwazi oko bakuthethayo, wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nithethe ngokungabi nazonka? Anikaqiqi na; aniqondi na? Ngaba iqaqadekile na intliziyo yenu?" 
Mark8:18 Ninamehlo nje, aniboni na? Nineendlebe nje, aniva na? Anikhumbuli na" 
Mark8:19 ukuba zazingaphi iingobozi ezizele ngamasalela okuyá ndandiqhekezela amawaka amahlanu izonka ezihlanu?” Bathi kuye: “Zazilishumi elinambini.” 
Mark8:20 Kwakhona wathi: “Okuyá ke izonka ezisixhenxe ndandiziqhekezela amawaka amane, zazingaphi na iibhaskiti ezazizele yintsalela?” Bathi ke: “Zazisixhenxe.”" 
Mark8:21 Wathi ke kubo: “Phofu yini na ke ukuba ningaqondi?” 
Mark8:22 Bafika ke eBhetesayida, kweziswa imfama kuYesu, wabongozwa ukuba ayichukumise." 
Mark8:23 UYesu wayibamba ngesandla imfama leyo, waphuma nayo edolophini; waza wayiqaba ngamathe emehlweni, wayibeka izandla, wayibuza ukuba inanto iyibonayo na." 
Mark8:24 Yaphakamisa intloko, yathi: “Ndibona abantu, bengathi yimithi. Nâbo behamba.”" 
Mark8:25 Kwakhona ke uYesu wazibeka izandla emehlweni ayo, yaza yakhangela yondela, yaphila, yabona konke ngokucacileyo." 
Mark8:26 UYesu ke wayiyalela ukuba igoduke, esithi: “Sukubuyela edolophini.”" 
Mark8:27 Wemka uYesu nabafundi bakhe, waya ezidolophini zaseKhesariya-Filipi. Endleleni wababuza abafundi bakhe esithi: “Ngaba abantu bathi ndingubani na?”" 
Mark8:28 Bamphendula besithi: “Kuthiwa ùnguYohane umbhaptizi. Abanye bathi ùnguEliya. Kanti abanye bathi ùngomye *wabashumayeli.” 
Mark8:29 Wathi ke yena kubo: “Ke nina nithi ndingubani?” Waphendula uPetros esithi kuye: “Wena unguye *uKrestu.” 
Mark8:30 UYesu ke wabayala ukuba bangaxeleli bani ngaye. 
Mark8:31 Waqala ke uYesu ukubafundisa abafundi bakhe, esithi: “*UNyana woLuntu umelwe kukuba eve ubunzima obukhulu; achaswe ngamadoda amakhulu, nangababingeleli abaziintloko, nangabachazi-mthetho; aze abulawe, athi emva kweentsuku ezintathu abuye avuke.”" 
Mark8:32 Wakuthetha oku kubo ngokucacileyo. UPetros ke, emse ngasese uYesu, wamkhalimela." 
Mark8:33 Uthe ke uYesu, ejikile wajonga kubafundi bakhe, wakhalimela uPetros, esithi: “Suka umke kum, Sathana. Akuzinyamekeli izinto zikaThixo; unyamekela ezabantu.”" 
Mark8:34 UYesu wasibizela kuye isihlwele kwanabafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: “Othanda ukundilandela makazincame, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe, andilandele." 
Mark8:35 Kuba othe wathanda ukusindisa ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo; kodwa othe wabuncama ubomi bakhe ngenxa yam, nangenxa yeendaba ezimnandi ezi, wobusindisa." 
Mark8:36 Kuba kaloku komnceda ntoni umntu, ukuba uthe walizuza ihlabathi liphela, kodwa walahlekelwa bubomi bakhe?" 
Mark8:37 Okanye umntu wobeka ntoni elingana nexabiso lobomi bakhe? 
Mark8:38 Othe ke waneentloni ndim nangamazwi am kwesi sizukulwana sonayo, sikrexezayo ngokunganyaniseki kuThixo, naye uNyana woLuntu woba neentloni nguye, xa athe weza esebuqaqawulini boYise, enezithunywa ezingcwele.”" 
Mark9:1 Wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, kukho abathile kwabakhoyo apha abangayi kuze beve kufa, bade bakubone ukuthwasa kolawulo lukaThixo olunobunganga.”" 
Mark9:2 Emva kweentsuku ezintandathu, uYesu uthathe uPetros noYakobi noYohane, banyuka intaba ephakamileyo bebodwa. UYesu ke wenziwa kumila kumbi phambi kwabo." 
Mark9:3 Zasuka nezambatho zakhe zabengezela, zamhlophe qhwa; zamhlophe ngangokuba kungabikho bani emhlabeni apha unokuzenza njalo." 
Mark9:4 Kwabonakala uEliya noMosis bethetha noYesu. 
Mark9:5 Wasuka ke uPetros wathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, kulungile ukuba sibe lapha. Masakhe amaphempe abe mathathu: elinye libe lelakho, elinye libe lelikaMosis, elinye libe lelikaEliya.”" 
Mark9:6 Wayesitsho kuba ebengayazi into anokuyithetha, kuba babesoyika kakhulu." 
Mark9:7 Ke kwabakho ilifu elibagubungelayo, kwavakala nelizwi livela efini apho, lisithi: “Lo nguNyana wam endimthandayo; yivani yena.”" 
Mark9:8 Bakusinga-singa ke, ababa sabona mntu wumbi ngaphandle koYesu." 
Mark9:9 Xa babesihla entabeni, uYesu wabayala ukuba bangazixeleli bani ezo zinto bazibonileyo, ade yena *uNyana woLuntu avuke kwabafileyo." 
Mark9:10 Babambelela kule ntetho, bebuzana bodwa ukuba ngaba ukuvuka kubo abafileyo kukuthini na." 
Mark9:11 Bambuza uYesu besithi: “Kungani na ukuba abachazi-mthetho bathi uEliya umelwe kukufika kuqala?” 
Mark9:12 Waphendula wathi kubo: “Ewe, okunene nguEliya ofikayo kuqala azilungise zonke izinto. Kodwa ke kutheni ukuba *iziBhalo zitsho ukuthi uNyana woLuntu ufanele ukuva ubunzima obukhulu, enziwe into engento yanto?" 
Mark9:13 Mna ke ndithi kuni: ufikile uEliya, baza abantu benza kuye konke abakuthandayo, kwanjengoko zitshoyo ngaye iziBhalo.”" 
Mark9:14 Bakufika kubafundi, babona isihlwele sibangqongile, nabachazi-mthetho bebaxoxisa." 
Mark9:15 Sakumbona isihlwele, savuyiseka kakhulu sonke, sasuka kwangoko saya kuye sibaleka, sambulisa." 
Mark9:16 Wababuza ke esithi: “Nixoxisana ngantoni na?” 
Mark9:17 Waphendula omnye esihlweleni apho wathi: “Mfundisi, bendizise unyana wam kuwe, kuba unendimoni emenza angathethi." 
Mark9:18 Ithi le ndimoni yakumqubula axhuzule, alephuze amagwebu, atshixize namazinyo, asuke ome. Ndithethe nabafundi bakho ukuba bayikhuphe, kodwa bakhohlwa.”" 
Mark9:19 UYesu waphendula wathi kubo: “Sizukulwanandini esingakholwayo, koda kube nini na ndinani? Koda kube nini na ndininyamezela? Mziseni kum!”" 
Mark9:20 Bamsa ke. Loo ndimoni, yakumbona uYesu, yesuka kwangoko yamhlasela watsho waxhuzula unyana lowo, wawa emhlabeni, wamana eqika-qikeka, elephuza amagwebu." 
Mark9:21 UYesu ke wabuza kuyise ukuba únaxesha lingakanani na ehliwe yile nto. Wathi yena: “Kwasebuntwaneni bakhe. 
Mark9:22 Le ndimoni imphose kaninzi emlilweni, kwanasemanzini, ukuba imtshabalalise. Ke ukuba unako ukwenza into, sincede uvelane nathi.”" 
Mark9:23 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Oo, uthi: ‘Ukuba ndinako;’ – zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kokholwayo.”" 
Mark9:24 Kwangoko ke wakhala uyise womntwana lowo, wathi: “Ndiyakholwa! Ndincede apho ukholo lwam lungenakufikelela khona!”" 
Mark9:25 UYesu ke, ebona isihlwele sibuthelana ngakumbi, wayikhalimela indimoni, esithi kuyo: “Ndimonindini engathethiyo, esisithulu, ndithi kuwe, phuma kuye, ungaze uphinde ungene!”" 
Mark9:26 Yakhala indimoni, yambetha watsho waxhuzula kunene umntwana, yaphuma. Umntwana lowo ke waba njengofileyo, bada abaninzi bathi: “Ufile.”" 
Mark9:27 UYesu ke wambamba ngesandla, wamvusa, wesuka wema." 
Mark9:28 UYesu eye kungena endlwini, abafundi bakhe bambuza ngasese besithi: “Bekutheni ukuba singabi nako ukuyikhupha le ndimoni thina?”" 
Mark9:29 Wathi kubo: “Olu lona uhlobo alunako ukuphuma kungengako ukuthandaza.” 
Mark9:30 Bemkile apho, bahamba becanda kwelaseGalili. UYesu wayengafuni ukuba aziwe apho akhona," 
Mark9:31 kuba wayebaxelela abafundi bakhe, esithi kubo: “UNyana woLuntu wonikelwa ezandleni zabantu abaya kumbulala. Wothi ke ebulewe njalo, abuye avuke ngomhla wesithathu.”" 
Mark9:32 Bona babengayiqondi into ayithethayo, besoyika nokumbuza ngayo." 
Mark9:33 Bafika ke eKapernahum, waza uYesu akuba sendlwini, wababuza abafundi bakhe esithi: “Benibuzana ngantoni endleleni?”" 
Mark9:34 Bahlala bathi tu, kuba endleleni babephikisana ngokuthi ngubani na omkhulu kunabanye." 
Mark9:35 UYesu wahlala phantsi, wababiza abafundi abalishumi elinambini, wathi kubo: “Ukuba ubani ufuna ukuba ngoyena mkhulu, makazenze oyena mncinci kubo bonke, abe sisicaka sabo bonke.”" 
Mark9:36 Wathatha umntwana, wammisa phakathi kwabo, wamsingatha, wathi kubo:" 
Mark9:37 “Othe egameni lam wamkela noko amnye wabantwana abanje, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, akamkeli mna nje, wamkela lowo wandithumayo.”" 
Mark9:38 UYohane wathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, sibone umntu okhupha iindimoni egameni lakho, saza samnqanda ke, kuba engenguye oweqela labafundi bakho.”" 
Mark9:39 Wathi uYesu: “Hayi, ngeningamnqandanga, kuba akukho namnye unokuthi enze ummangaliso egameni lam, aze andigxeke." 
Mark9:40 Ongachasaniyo nathi ungakuthi. 
Mark9:41 Inene, othe wanipha nekomityi le yamanzi ngenxa yam, ngokuba ningabakaKrestu, wowamkela ngokuqinisekileyo umvuzo wakhe.”" 
Mark9:42 “Othe wakhubekisa nokuba mnye wabancinane abakholwayo, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba ebegangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni, waphoswa elwandle." 
Mark9:43 Ukuba ke isandla sakho sithe sakukhubekisa sinqumle. Kulunge kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisilima, kunokuba uthi, unezandla zozibini, umke uye esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimiyo, [" 
Mark9:44 apho ‘kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo.’]" 
Mark9:45 Nokuba unyawo lwakho luthe lwakukhubekisa, lunqumle. Kulunge kanye ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqhwala, kunokuba uthi uneenyawo zombini, uphoswe esihogweni, [emlilweni ongacimiyo," 
Mark9:46 apho ‘kumpethu, ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo.’]" 
Mark9:47 Nokuba ke iliso lakho lithe lakukhubekisa, likhuphe. Kulunge kanye ukuxhamla ukulawulwa nguThixo unaliso linye, kunokuba uthi, unamehlo omabini, uphoswe esihogweni," 
Mark9:48 apho ‘kumpethu ingafiyo, kumlilo ungacimiyo.’" 
Mark9:49 “Umntu ngamnye uya kugalelwa umlilo ngokungathi yityiwa. 
Mark9:50 Ityiwa ilungile, kodwa ukuba ithe ayaba nasongo noyithini na ukuyibuyisela isongo sayo? Yibani nesongo setyiwa phakathi kwenu, nihlale ninoxolo omnye nomnye.”" 
Mark10:1 Emkile apho, uYesu waya kwelakwaJuda naphesheya kweJordan. Kwabuya ke kwahlanganisana izihlwele ngakuye, waza wathi ngokwesiqhelo sakhe wazifundisa." 
Mark10:2 Bafika *abaFarasi, bathi ngokumlinga bambuza ukuba kuvumelekile na ukuba indoda imale umfazi wayo." 
Mark10:3 Waphendula wathi kubo: “UMosis waniwisela mthetho mni na?” 
Mark10:4 Bathi bona: “UMosis uyayivumela indoda ukuba ibhale incwadi yokuqhawula umtshato, ize ke imale umfazi wayo.”" 
Mark10:5 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Wanibhalela lo mthetho ngenxa yokuba lukhuni kweentliziyo zenu," 
Mark10:6 kodwa kwasekuqalekeni kokudalwa ‘uThixo wabenza bayindoda nomfazi. 
Mark10:7 Yiyo ke loo nto indoda ishiya uyise nonina nje, inamathele kumkayo," 
Mark10:8 baze bamanyane.’ Ngako oko ke àbasebabini; banye. 
Mark10:9 Abo ke ngoko uThixo abamanyileyo mabangahlulwa mntu.” 
Mark10:10 Endlwini abafundi bakhe babuya bambuza uYesu ngayo loo nto. 
Mark10:11 Wathi ke kubo: “Othe wamala umfazi wakhe, wazeka omnye, uyakrexeza." 
Mark10:12 Nokuba umfazi uthe wayala indoda yakhe, wendela kwenye, uyakrexeza.”" 
Mark10:13 Kwathi xa kwakuziswa abantwana kuYesu ukuba abachukumise, basuka abafundi babakhalimela abo babazisayo." 
Mark10:14 Ke kaloku ekubonile oku uYesu, wakhathazeka, wathi kubo: “Bayekeni abantwana beze kum, ningabanqandi, kuba ábalawulwa nguThixo ngabanjengabo." 
Mark10:15 Ndithi kuni, inene, othe akakuthobela njengomntwana ukulawulwa nguThixo, soze abuve ubuncwane bolo lawulo.”" 
Mark10:16 Waza wabasingatha abantwana, wabasikelela ebabeka izandla." 
Mark10:17 Xa wayephuma uYesu ehamba, umntu othile weza ebaleka, waguqa phambi kwakhe, wambuza esithi: “Mfundisi olungileyo, ndingenza ntoni ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?”" 
Mark10:18 UYesu ke wathi kuye: “Kutheni usithi ndilungile nje? Akukho mntu ulungileyo. Mnye kuphela olungileyo: nguThixo. 
Mark10:19 Uyayazi le mithetho ithi: ‘Uze ungabulali; uze ungakrexezi; uze ungebi; uze ungangqini ubuxoki; uze ungaqhathi; beka uyihlo nonyoko.’” 
Mark10:20 Waphendula yena wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, zonke ezo zinto ndazenza kwasebuncinaneni bam.”" 
Mark10:21 UYesu wathi akumondela, weva emthanda, wathi kuye: “Kukho nto inye uyisweleyo: hamba uye kuzithengisa zonke izinto onazo, uyiphe amahlwempu imali leyo; woba nobutyebi ezulwini; uze kum ke, undilandele.”" 
Mark10:22 Wadana akukuva oko, wemka ebuhlungu, kuba wayesisinhanha." 
Mark10:23 UYesu ke esinga-singile, wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Hayi ubunzima bokuba izityebi zikuxhamle ukulawulwa nguThixo!”" 
Mark10:24 Ke abafundi bakhe bamangaliswa ngala mazwi akhe. Waza uYesu waphinda wathetha nabo, wathi kubo: “Bantwana bam, hayi ubunzima bokuxhamla ukulawulwa nguThixo." 
Mark10:25 Kungálula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi sixhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo.”" 
Mark10:26 Bamangaliswa kunene, bathi omnye komnye: “Ngubani ke onokusindiswa?”" 
Mark10:27 Ondele kubo, uYesu wathi: “Kubantu oku akunakwenzeka, kodwa kuThixo akunakungenzeki, kuba zonke izinto zinokwenzeka kuThixo.”" 
Mark10:28 Waza uPetros wathi kuye: “Khangela, thina sishiye zonke izinto sakulandela.”" 
Mark10:29 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, akukho namnye ushiye indlu, nokuba ngabantakwabo, nokuba ngoodade wabo, nokuba ngunina, nokuba nguyise, nokuba ngabantwana, nokuba ngamasimi, ngenxa yam nangenxa yeendaba ezimnandi," 
Mark10:30 ongayi kuthi amkele kalikhulu: izindlu, nabantakwabo, noodade wabo, noonina, nabantwana, namasimi, zikunye neentshutshiso kweli phakade; aze ke athi kwelizayo iphakade amkele ubomi obungunaphakade." 
Mark10:31 Baninzi ke phofu abaya kuthi bengabokuqala babe ngabokugqibela, nabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala.”" 
Mark10:32 Ke kaloku babesendleleni, benyuka besiya eJerusalem, uYesu ehamba ngaphambili. Abafundi bakhe babemangalisiwe; abo bamlandelayo besoyika. Waphinda wabathatha abafundi abalishumi elinambini, waza wabaxelela izinto eziza kumhlela," 
Mark10:33 esithi: “Niyabona, siyenyuka, siya eJerusalem, apho *uNyana woLuntu aya kunikelwa khona kubabingeleli abaziintloko, nakubachazi-mthetho. Baya kumgwebela ukufa, bamnikele kwabasemzini." 
Mark10:34 Bona ke baya kumenza intlekisa, bamtshicele, bamkatse, bambulale; aze athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke.”" 
Mark10:35 Ke kaloku uYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, beza kuYesu, bathi: “Mfundisi, sifuna ukuba usenzele oko sothi sikucele kuwe.”" 
Mark10:36 Wathi kubo: “Nifuna ukuba ndinenzele ntoni na?” 
Mark10:37 Bathi bona kuye: “Sicela ukuba usinike ezona zikhundla ziphezulu xa usewongeni.” 
Mark10:38 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ninako na ukuyisela indebe endiyiselayo mna, nibhaptizwe ngobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna?”" 
Mark10:39 Bathi ke bona kuye: “Sinako.” Wathi ke uYesu kubo: “Okunene intlungu endiyivayo mna niya kuyiva nani, nobhaptizo endibhaptizwa ngalo mna niya kubhaptizwa kwangalo;" 
Mark10:40 kodwa kona ukwaba izikhundla akulolungelo lam. Ezo zikhundla zezâbo bazilungiselelweyo nguThixo.” 
Mark10:41 Bakuyiva le nto ithethwa nguYakobi noYohane, abanye abafundi abalishumi bakhathazeka." 
Mark10:42 UYesu ke, ebabizele kuye, wathi kubo: “Niyazi ukuba ezintlangeni abo bathi bayalawula banobukhosi kuzo; nâbo bazizikhulu zazo benza ngegunya kuzo." 
Mark10:43 Kodwa ke akunjalo phakathi kwenu. Ofuna ukuba mkhulu phakathi kwenu, makabe ngumkhonzi wenu;" 
Mark10:44 nofuna ukuba ngowokuqala, makabe sisicaka sabo bonke." 
Mark10:45 Kuba kaloku *noNyana woLuntu akezanga kukhonzwa, weza kukhonza, nokuncama ubomi bakhe, bube yintlawulelo yokukhulula abaninzi.”" 
Mark10:46 Bafika ke eJeriko. Xa uYesu nabafundi bakhe nesihlwele esikhulu babephuma apho eJeriko, unyana kaTimeyu, uBhartimeyu, imfama, wayehleli ngasendleleni engqiba." 
Mark10:47 Wathi ke akuva ukuba nguYesu waseNazarete, wadanduluka esithi: “Yesu, Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba!”" 
Mark10:48 Abaninzi babemkhalimela besithi makathi tu, kodwa kwaba kokukhona wadandulukayo ngakumbi esithi: “Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba!”" 
Mark10:49 Wema uYesu, wathi: “Mbizeni.” Bayibiza imfama, besithi kuyo: “Yomelela; phakama; úyakubiza.”" 
Mark10:50 Ithe ke imfama, ilahle ingubo yayo, yaphakama, yeza kuYesu." 
Mark10:51 UYesu wathi kuyo: “Ufuna ukuba ndikwenzele ntoni na?” Yathi kuye imfama: “Nkosi yam, ndifuna ukuba ndibone.”" 
Mark10:52 Wathi kuyo uYesu: “Hamba uhambe; ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile.” Yabona ke kwangoko, yamlandela uYesu endleleni apho." 
Mark11:1 Ke kaloku, bakusondela eJerusalem, eBhetefage naseBhetani, ngaseNtabeni yemiNquma, uYesu wathuma ababini kubafundi bakhe," 
Mark11:2 esithi kubo: “Hambani niye kule dolophana ikhangelene nani. Nothi ke ningenanje nifumane inkonyana yedonki ibotshelelwe, ekungazange kukhwele mntu kuyo. Yikhululeni ke, niyizise apha." 
Mark11:3 Ukuba ubani uthe kuni: ‘Kutheni na ukuba nikwenze oku?’ ze nithi: ‘Iyafuneka eNkosini. Iza kubuyiswa kwangoku.’ ” 
Mark11:4 Basuka ke baya, bayifumana inkonyana ibotshelelwe ngasesangweni esitalatweni. Bakuyikhulula ke," 
Mark11:5 abathile kwababemi khona bathi kubo: “Nenza ntoni na, niyikhulula nje inkonyana?”" 
Mark11:6 Bathetha ke njengoko babeyalelwe nguYesu, baza bayekwa." 
Mark11:7 Bayizisa inkonyana kuYesu, bandlala iingubo zabo phezu kwayo, wakhwela." 
Mark11:8 Abaninzi ke bandlala iingubo zabo endleleni, bathi abanye bandlala amahlamvu abawakhe emasimini." 
Mark11:9 Abo babehamba ngaphambili nabo babelandela ngasemva babedanduluka besithi: “Camagu! Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi! 
Mark11:10 Makabongwe oza kuvusa ulawulo lukaBawo uDavide! Sithi: ‘Bayethe!’ kuPhezukonke.” 
Mark11:11 UYesu ke wangena eJerusalem, wangena *nasendlwini kaThixo, wahamba ezibuka izinto zonke, wathi, ngenxa yokuba kwakusekuhlwile, waphuma waya eBhetani, enabafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini." 
Mark11:12 Ngengomso, bakuba bephumile eBhetani, uYesu waziva elambile," 
Mark11:13 waza wathi, akuba ebone umkhiwane uthe qelele, unamagqabi, waya kukhangela ukuba angafumana siqhamo na kuwo. Akufika kuwo akafumananga nto ngaphandle kwamagqabi, kuba kwakungelilo ixesha lamakhiwane." 
Mark11:14 UYesu ke wathi kuwo umkhiwane: “Ze kungaze kutyiwe siqhamo kuwe naphakade!” Babesiva abafundi bakhe. 
Mark11:15 Bafika ke eJerusalem, uYesu waya kungena *endlwini kaThixo, waza wabakhupha abathengayo nabathengisayo, wathi neetafile zabatshintshi bemali nezihlalo zabathengisa amahobe wazibhukuqa." 
Mark11:16 Wayengavumi ukuba kubekho bani ucanda endlwini kaThixo ethwele nokuba yintoni na. 
Mark11:17 Wabafundisa esithi: “Akatsho na uThixo *eziBhalweni ukuthi: ‘Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuba yindlu ekuthandazelwa kuyo ziintlanga zonke’? Ke nina niyenzé umqolomba wezihange.” 
Mark11:18 Bekuvile oku ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho, bafuna indlela abanokumbulala ngayo uYesu. Babesoyika, kuba indimbane yonke yayimangalisiwe yimfundiso yakhe." 
Mark11:19 Kwakuhlwa, uYesu nabafundi bakhe baphuma esixekweni." 
Mark11:20 Kwaza kwathi kusasa, ukubuya kwabo, bawubona umkhiwane lowo womile ukususela ezingcanjini." 
Mark11:21 UPetros ke ekhumbule okwezolo, wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, khangela umkhiwane owuqalekisileyo womile.”" 
Mark11:22 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Kholwani kuThixo. Ndithi kuni, inene," 
Mark11:23 othe kule ntaba: ‘Funquka, uphoseke elwandle;’ abe ke esitsho engathandabuzi entliziyweni yakhe, kodwa ekholwa ukuba oko akuthethayo kuya kwenzeka, wokwenzelwa." 
Mark11:24 Ngenxa yoko ndithi kuni, zonke izinto enizicela nithandaza, kholwani ukuba senizinikiwe; nozifumana ke." 
Mark11:25 Naxa nithandazayo, ukuba ninendawo ngakubani, mxoleleni, ukuze noYihlo osezulwini anixolele iziphoso zenu. [" 
Mark11:26 Ke, ukuba anixoleli, nàye uYihlo osezulwini akayi kunixolela iziphoso zenu.]”" 
Mark11:27 Bafika ke eJerusalem kwakhona, kwaza kwathi, uYesu ehamba-hamba *endlwini kaThixo kwafika kuye ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho namadoda amakhulu." 
Mark11:28 Bona bambuza besithi: “Ezi zinto uzenza ngagunya lini na? Ingubani na kakade okunike elo gunya lokwenza ezi zinto?” 
Mark11:29 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Nam ndiya kunibuza mbuzo mnye. Ukuba nithe nandiphendula, ndonixelela ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto." 
Mark11:30 Khanindixelele, ngaba ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluvela ezulwini, okanye lwaluvela ebantwini?”" 
Mark11:31 Baxoxa bodwa, besithi: “Ukuba sithe: ‘Lwaluvela ezulwini,’ wothi: ‘Kwakutheni ke phofu ukuze ningamamkeli?’" 
Mark11:32 Ngaba sinokuthi: ‘Lwaluvela ebantwini’?” – kodwa babesoyika isihlwele, kuba bonke babesithi uYohane *wayengumshumayeli ngokwenene." 
Mark11:33 Baphendula ke bathi kuYesu: “Asazi.” Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto.” 
Mark12:1 Waza ke uYesu wathetha nabo ngemizekeliso, esithi: “Umntu othile watyala isidiliya, wasibiyela, wemba isixovulelo seediliya, wakha imboniselo, wasiqeshisa kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe." 
Mark12:2 Ngexesha lokuvuthwa kweziqhamo ke, wathuma isicaka kwabo balimi, ukuze bamnike eziqhameni zesidiliya eso." 
Mark12:3 Basuka bona basihlasela, basibetha, basindulula singaphathanga nto." 
Mark12:4 Wabuya ke wathuma esinye isicaka kubo. Sona basigqebha iinduma, basihlazisa." 
Mark12:5 Wabuya wathuma esinye, baza basibulala eso sicaka. Wathuma nezinye ke zazininzi, baza inxenye bayibetha, inxenye bayibulala." 
Mark12:6 Wathi ngoko, kusele mntu mnye angámthumayo, unyana oyintanda, wamthuma kubo ekugqibeleni, esithi: ‘Baya kumhlonela yena unyana wam.’" 
Mark12:7 Ke bona abo balimi bathi omnye komnye: ‘Yindlalifa le. Masiyibulale, ilifa libe lelethu.’" 
Mark12:8 Bambamba ke unyana lowo, bambulala, bamphosa ngaphandle kwesidiliya." 
Mark12:9 “Uya kwenza ntoni na ke ngoko umnini-sidiliya? Wofika abatshabalalise abo balimi, asinikele bantu bambi eso sidiliya." 
Mark12:10 Niyifundile kaloku *eziBhalweni indawo ethi: “ ‘Ilitye abalidelayo abakhi lilo elaba lelona libalulekileyo lesiseko. 
Mark12:11 Oku kwênzeka kuvela eNkosini; kungummangaliso emehlweni ethu.’” 
Mark12:12 Ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho namadoda amakhulu babefuna ukumbamba ke uYesu, kuba kwakuqondakele ukuba uzekelisa ngabo. Kodwa babesoyika isihlwele, baza bamyeka bemka." 
Mark12:13 Kwathunyelwa ke kuYesu abathile *babaFarasi nabathile beqela *lamaHerode, ukuze bambambise ngamazwi." 
Mark12:14 Befikile ke bona, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba uthembekile, ungenamkhethe, kuba akucengi bani, kodwa uyifundisa ngenyaniso indlela kaThixo. Khawutsho ke, ngaba kuvumelekile na ukurhafa *kuKhesare, okanye akuvumelekanga; masiyirhole irhafu, singayirholi, kusini na?”" 
Mark12:15 Ke yena, ekwazi ukuhanahanisa kwabo, wathi kubo: “Nindilingelani na? Ndiziseleni imali ndiyibone.”" 
Mark12:16 Bayizisa ke, waza wathi kubo: “Ngokabani na lo mfanekiso neli gama?” Bathi kuye: “NgokaKhesare.”" 
Mark12:17 Waphendula ke uYesu, wathi kubo: “Ke, nikani uKhesare okufanele uKhesare, ninike uThixo okufanele uThixo.” Bamangaliseka yimpendulo yakhe." 
Mark12:18 Kweza *nabaSadusi kuYesu (bona bathi akukho luvuko lwabafileyo), bambuza besithi:" 
Mark12:19 “Mfundisi, uMosis wasibhalela umthetho esithi: ‘Ukuba ubani uthe wafa, eshiya umfazi engekabi nabantwana, makathi umntakwabo amngene umfazi lowo, baze bamzalele abantwana umfi lowo.’" 
Mark12:20 Ke kaloku kwakukho oonyana bomntu abasixhenxe, yaza inkulu yazeka umfazi, yasweleka ingenabantwana." 
Mark12:21 Wathi ke owesibini wamngena, kodwa naye wasweleka engenabantwana. Benjenjalo ke" 
Mark12:22 bosixhenxe, kodwa abashiya mntwana. Emva kwabo bonke wasweleka naye umfazi." 
Mark12:23 Ke ngoko eluvukweni lwabafileyo uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi kubo? Kuba kaloku bosixhenxe babemthathile.” 
Mark12:24 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Nilahlekiswa kukuba ningaziqondi *iziBhalo, ningawazi namandla kaThixo." 
Mark12:25 Kaloku xa abafileyo bathe babuya bavuka, àbazeki, àbendiswa; banjengezithunywa ezisezulwini." 
Mark12:26 Ngokusingisele kukuvuswa kwabafileyo, anifundanga na encwadini kaMosis, kwisiqendu esithetha ngetyholo elivuthayo, okokuba uThixo wathetha naye esithi: ‘Mna ndinguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi’?" 
Mark12:27 AkaThixo wabafileyo; unguThixo wabaphilayo. Ke nina nilahleke kakhulu.” 
Mark12:28 Kwafika omnye wabachazi-mthetho, wabeva bebambene ngemibuzo, waqonda ukuba uYesu ubaphendule kakuhle. Wambuza ke esithi: “Owona myalelo mkhulu kunayo yonke nguwuphi?”" 
Mark12:29 UYesu wamphendula esithi: “Owona myalelo mkhulu ngulo uthi: ‘Yiva, Sirayeli, iNkosi uThixo wethu yiNkosi ényé." 
Mark12:30 Uze uyithande ke iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangengqondo yakho iphela, nangamandla akho ephela.’" 
Mark12:31 Owesibini ke ngulo: ‘Uze umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.’ Akukho myalelo wumbi ubalulekileyo kunalé mibini.” 
Mark12:32 Umchazi-mthetho ke wathi kuye: “Ngxatsho ke, Mfundisi, unyanisile ukuthi mnye uThixo, kungekho wumbi ngaphandle kwakhe;" 
Mark12:33 nokuthi umthande yena ngentliziyo iphela, nangengqiqo iphela, nangamandla ephela, nokuthi umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo, kungaphezulu lee kunayo yonke imibingelelo namadini atshiswayo.”" 
Mark12:34 UYesu embonile ukuba uphendule ngengqiqo, wathi kuye: “Akukude wena ekulawulweni nguThixo.” Emva koko akwaba sabakho mntu unobuganga bakumbuza nto." 
Mark12:35 Efundisa *endlwini kaThixo uYesu, wabuza esithi: “Batsho ngani na abachazi-mthetho ukuthi: ‘UKrestu ngunyana kaDavide’?" 
Mark12:36 Kaloku uDavide ngokwakhe, ekhokelwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wathi: “ ‘Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam: Hlala ngakum kweli wonga lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho.’" 
Mark12:37 “Ukuba uDavide ngokwakhe uthi uKrestu yiNkosi, angathini na ke ukuba ngunyana wakhe?” Yamphulaphula ngomdla loo ndimbane yabantu." 
Mark12:38 Ekusifundiseni kwakhe uYesu isihlwele wayesithi: “Balumkeleni abachazi-mthetho, abathanda ukuhamba ngezambatho ezide, bethanda ukuba kukhahlelwe kubo kwiindawo zembutho," 
Mark12:39 befuna izihlalo eziphambili *ezindlwini zesikhungo, neendawo zamawonga ezidlweni." 
Mark12:40 Abo bayiphangayo imizi nemfuyo yabahlolokazi, baze bazenzise besitsho ngemilembelele yemithandazo, ngabo abaya kufumana esona sohlwayo sikhulu.”" 
Mark12:41 UYesu waya kuhlala phantsi *endlwini kaThixo malunga nesikhongozeli-mali, wasibukela isihlwele sifaka imali kwisikhongozeli apho. Izityebi ezininzi zazinikela kakhulu." 
Mark12:42 Ke kwafika mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu, wafaka iimalana zambini, ezixabiso limalunga nesenti." 
Mark12:43 UYesu wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, lo mhlolokazi ulihlwempu unikele ngaphezu kwabo bonke abafake imali kwisikhongozeli." 
Mark12:44 Kuba bonke abanye banikele bekhupha kwintabalala yabo, kanti yena eswele nje, uzibhokoxile, wanikela konke abenako.”" 
Mark13:1 Xa ke uYesu wayephuma *endlwini kaThixo, omnye umfundi wakhe wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, uyawabona la matye angaka, nezi zakhiwo zingaka?”" 
Mark13:2 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Uyazibona ezi zakhiwo zingaka? Akusayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye elingayi kudilizwa.” 
Mark13:3 UYesu wayehleli eNtabeni yemiNquma, ejongene *nendlu kaThixo, baza bambuza bebodwa ooPetros noYakobi noYohane noAndreya, besithi:" 
Mark13:4 “Sixelele ukuba ziya kubakho nini na ezo zinto, nokuba uya kuba yintoni na umqondiso wokuzalisekiswa kwazo.”" 
Mark13:5 Waza wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Lumkani ningalahlekiswa bani," 
Mark13:6 kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam, besithi banguye *uKrestu, balahlekise into eninzi yabantu." 
Mark13:7 Xa nithe neva ngeemfazwe nangamarhe eemfazwe, ze ningoyiki, kuba ezo zinto zimelwe kukubakho, kanti ke akukabi kuko ukuphela oko." 
Mark13:8 Uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nokumkani avukelane nokumkani; kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba kwiindawo ngeendawo, kubekho neendlala. Kunjengokuqala kwenimba ke oko." 
Mark13:9 “Zilumkeleni ke okwenu. Baya kuninikela ezinkundleni, nikatswe *ezindlwini zesikhungo, nimiswe phambi kwabalawuli nookumkani ngenxa yam, ningqine kubo." 
Mark13:10 Kuqala ke iindaba ezimnandi ezi zimelwe kukuvakaliswa kuzo zonke iintlanga. 
Mark13:11 Xa banibambayo banise ezinkundleni, musani ukuyixhalela into eniya kuyithetha, kodwa thethani oko nithe nakunikwa ngelo xesha, kuba asinini abathethayo, nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Mark13:12 Ke kaloku oonyana bomntu omnye baya kunikelana ekufeni, aze uyise anikele umntwana wakhe, baze nabantwana bavukele abazali, bababulale." 
Mark13:13 Niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam. Ke lowo unyamezelayo kude kube sekupheleni wosindiswa.” 
Mark13:14 “Ke kaloku, xa nithe nalibona ‘isikizi elimanyumnyezi, mhla ngophanziso,’ lilapho lingamelwe kukuba khona (ofundayo makaqiqe), mabathi ngelo xesha abakwelakwaJuda babalekele ezintabeni." 
Mark13:15 Ophezu kwendlu ke makangehli ukuya kuthatha nto endlwini yakhe. 
Mark13:16 Nalowo usentsimini makangabi sayiphuthuma ingubo yakhe. 
Mark13:17 Hayi ke kwabanzima nabadlezana ngaloo mihla! 
Mark13:18 Thandazelani ukuba oku kungenzeki ebusika," 
Mark13:19 kuba ngaloo mihla kuya kubakho imbandezelo engazange ibekho ukususela ekudalweni kwendalo nguThixo, kude kube ngoku, kwaye ingasayi kuphinda ibekho enjalo." 
Mark13:20 Ke ukuba iNkosi ibingayinciphisanga loo mihla, bekungayi kubakho bani usindayo; kodwa iNkosi ithe, ngenxa yabanyulwa abachongwe yiyo, yayinciphisa imihla leyo." 
Mark13:21 “Ngelo xesha ke, ukuba ubani uthe kuni: ‘Nanku apha *uKrestu;’ nokuba uthe: ‘Nankuya phaya;’ musani ukukholwa kuloo nto;" 
Mark13:22 kuba kuya kuvela abathi banguKrestu bengenguye, kuvele *nabashumayeli abangengabo, benze imiqondiso nemimangaliso kangangokuba bade balahlekise nabanyulwa bakaThixo, ukuba oko bekunokwenzeka." 
Mark13:23 Lumkani ke nina! Kaloku ndinixelele ezi zinto zingekenzeki.” 
Mark13:24 “Ngaloo mihla, emva kwayo loo mbandezelo, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, ithi nenyanga ingakhanyi," 
Mark13:25 zithi neenkwenkwezi zivuthuluke ezulwini, nako konke okunamandla esibhakabhakeni kudunga-dungeke." 
Mark13:26 Baya kumbona ke ngelo xesha *uNyana woLuntu esiza esemafini, enamandla amakhulu nobuqaqawuli." 
Mark13:27 Ngelo xesha uya kuthuma izithunywa zezulu zibahlanganisele ndawonye abanyulwa bakhe, bevela kumacala omane omhlaba, kususela esiphelweni sehlabathi kuse esiphelweni sezulu.”" 
Mark13:28 “Fundani kuwo umkhiwane ongumzekelo kuni. Xa sewuthe wathamba amasebe, wahluma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba ihlobo likufuphi." 
Mark13:29 Ngokukwanjalo ke, xa nithe nazibona ezo zinto zisenzeka, yazini ukuba kukufuphi, sekusemnyango." 
Mark13:30 Ndithi kuni, inene, esi sizukulwana asiyi kudlula, zingadanga zenzeke zonke ezi zinto." 
Mark13:31 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi; ke wona amazwi am akasayi kuze adlule.” 
Mark13:32 “Ke akukho bani uwaziyo loo mhla nelo xesha. Nezithunywa ezisezulwini azazi, engazi naye uNyana lo. Kuphela nguYise owaziyo." 
Mark13:33 Lumkani ke ningozeli, kuba anazi ukuba lofika nini na ixesha elo." 
Mark13:34 Kufana nomntu ohambeleyo eshiya indlu yakhe, aze azinike igunya izicaka zakhe, enika umsebenzi isicaka ngasinye, amyalele umgcinisango ukuba alinde." 
Mark13:35 Lindani ke, kuba ningâzi ukuba wofika nini na umninindlu. Kaloku angafika nanini na: nokuba kungolwemivundla, nokuba kusezinzulwini zobusuku, nokuba kungeenkuku zokuqala, nokuba kuxa kumpondo zankomo." 
Mark13:36 Lindani ke, hleze afike ngebhaqo, anifumane nilele." 
Mark13:37 Ke oko ndikuthethayo kuni, ndikutsho kubo bonke: Lindani!”" 
Mark14:1 Ke kaloku kwakuziintsuku ezimbini phambi *kwePasika *netheko lezonka ezingenagwele. Ke ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho babefuna iqhinga lokumbamba uYesu, bambulale." 
Mark14:2 Kodwa babesithi: “Oku makungenziwa ngePasika, hleze kubekho isiphithi-phithi.”" 
Mark14:3 Kwathi uYesu eseBhetani, esetafileni endlwini kaSimon uZitshangubana, kwafika umntu obhinqileyo, eneqhaga lelitye lelabhastile, linamafutha angangxengwanga axabiso likhulu esiqholo esiyinadusi. Waliqhekeza ke elo qhaga, wathambisa intloko kaYesu ngamafutha lawo." 
Mark14:4 Kwakukho abathile abacaphukáyo, besithi omnye komnye: “Kutheni na ukuba kwenziwe le nkcitho yamafutha aqholiweyo?" 
Mark14:5 Ngethengiswe ngemali engaphezu kweerandi ezingamakhulu amathathu, kwaphiwa amahlwempu.” Baza ke bayikhalazela loo ntokazi." 
Mark14:6 UYesu ke wathi: “Myekeni; nimkhathazelani? Úndenzele into entle. 
Mark14:7 Kaloku amahlwempu lawo nihleli ninawo: nanini na nakuthanda ningawanceda. Mna ke anihleli ninam. 
Mark14:8 Le ntokazi yenze loo nto ibinokuyenza. Umzimba wam iwuthambisele ukungewatywa kwangaphambili. 
Mark14:9 Ndithi kuni, inene, naphi na apho zithe zavakaliswa khona ezi ndaba zimnandi kulo lonke ihlabathi, iya kuxelwa nayo le nto iyenzileyo yona, ibe sisikhumbuzo ngayo.”" 
Mark14:10 UJudas Sikariyoti, omnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, wesuka ke waya kubabingeleli abaziintloko ukuze amnikele kubo uYesu." 
Mark14:11 Bathi bona bakuva bavuya, bamthembisa ngemali. Yena ke wahlala efuna ithuba lokuba amnikele." 
Mark14:12 Ke kaloku ngowokuqala umhla *wetheko lezonka ezingenagwele, xa kwakubingelelwa itakane *lePasika, abafundi bakaYesu bathi kuye: “Ufuna ukuba siye kuyilungiselela phi na iPasika?”" 
Mark14:13 Ke wathuma bababini kubafundi bakhe, wathi kubo: “Hambani niye esixekweni. Nodibana nomfo ophethe ingqayi yamanzi. Mlandeleni ke," 
Mark14:14 niye kuloo ndlu angena kuyo, nithi kumnini-mzi: ‘Uthi uMfundisi: “Liphi na igumbi leendwendwe elilungiselelwe mna, apho ndingáyidlela khona iPasika nabafundi bam?” ’" 
Mark14:15 Yena wonibonisa igumbi elikhulu, eliphezulu, linempahla yalo. Lungiselelani apho ke.”" 
Mark14:16 Bahamba abo bafundi, baya kungena esixekweni, bafika kunjengoko wayetshilo, bayilungiselela iPasika." 
Mark14:17 Kwakuhlwa, wafika uYesu, enabafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini." 
Mark14:18 Bakuba behleli besitya, uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, omnye kuni apha, nina nityayo kunye nam, uya kundingcatsha.”" 
Mark14:19 Baza ke baba buhlungu, besithi kuye ngabanye ngabanye: “Ngaba iya kuba ndim na? Ngaba iya kuba ndim na?”" 
Mark14:20 Waphendula ke wathi kubo: “Iya kuba ngomnye kubafundi abalishumi elinambini, lowo usithi nkxu kunye nam isonka esityeni." 
Mark14:21 Okunene *uNyana woLuntu uyemka, njengoko zitshoyo ngaye *iziBhalo; kodwa hayi loo mntu angcatshwa nguye uNyana woLuntu! Ngekumlungele ukuba ebengazalwanga.”" 
Mark14:22 Xa babesitya, uYesu wathatha isonka, wabulela, wasiqhekeza, wabanika, wathi: “Thathani nitye; ngumzimba wam lo.”" 
Mark14:23 Wathatha nendebe, wabulela, wabanika, basela kuyo bonke." 
Mark14:24 Wathi ke kubo: “Ligazi lam eli elitywina umnqophiso, eliphalazwa ngenxa yabaninzi." 
Mark14:25 Ndithi kuni, inene, andiyi kuphinda ndisele kwincindi yomdiliya, kude kube yiloo mini ndiyisela intsha kwikomkhulu likaThixo.”" 
Mark14:26 Bakuba becule indumiso, baphuma baya eNtabeni yemiNquma." 
Mark14:27 UYesu wathi kubo: “Ndiya kuba sisikhubekiso kuni nonke, kuba *iziBhalo zithi: ‘Ndiya kubulala umalusi, zichithakale iigusha!’" 
Mark14:28 Xa ke ndithe ndavuswa ekufeni, ndiya kunandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili.”" 
Mark14:29 Wathi ke uPetros kuye: “Nokuba baya kukhubeka bonke, mna andingekhe!”" 
Mark14:30 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ndithi kuwe, inene, namhlanje, kwangobu busuku, ingekakhali kabini inkuku, uya kundikhanyela kathathu.”" 
Mark14:31 Kodwa yena waqokela wathi: “Noba kungade kufuneke ndife kunye nawe, andingekhe ndikukhanyele!” Batsho ke bonke." 
Mark14:32 Ke kaloku bafika kumhlatyana ogama liyiGetsemane; waza uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Hlalani apha ngeli xa ndithandazayo.” 
Mark14:33 Wahamba noPetros noYakobi noYohane, waza wangenwa luvalo, wadandatheka kakhulu," 
Mark14:34 wathi kubo: “Intliziyo yam ibuhlungu ukufa, iligazi. Hlalani apha nilinde.”" 
Mark14:35 Ehambele phambili umganyana ke, wawa emhlabeni, wathandazela ukuba loo ndebe ikrakra idlule kuye ukuba kunokwenzeka." 
Mark14:36 Wayesithi ke: “Bawo, wena akuxakwa nto. Yisuse kum le ntlungu. Noko ke, makungabi kokuthandwa ndim, makube kukuthanda kwakho.”" 
Mark14:37 Wafika ke, wabafumana abo bafundi belele, wathi kuPetros: “Simon, ulele? Ubungenakulinda na okweli thutyana?" 
Mark14:38 Lindani nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekuhendweni. Umoya wona okunene unentumekelelo, ke wona umzimba ubuthathaka.”" 
Mark14:39 Wabuya wemka, waya kuthandaza kwangalawa mazwi." 
Mark14:40 Wathi akubuya wabafumana belele, kuba babesoyiswa bubuthongo. Bona ke baxakwa kukumphendula." 
Mark14:41 Wafika ke okwesithathu, wathi kubo: “Nisalele? Nisaphumla na? Kwanele! Lifikile ixesha! Ngoku *uNyana woLuntu unikelwa ezandleni zaboni." 
Mark14:42 Vukani, sihambe! Nanko lowo undinikelayo.”" 
Mark14:43 Kwangoko, uYesu esathetha, wathi gqi uJudas ongomnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, ehamba nendimbane inamakrele neentonga, iphuma kubabingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho namadoda amakhulu." 
Mark14:44 Ke kaloku umngcatshi lowo wayebanike umqondiso esithi: “Lowo ndithe ndamanga, nguye. Mbambeni, nimke naye angaphuncuki.”" 
Mark14:45 Efikile ke uJudas, uye kuYesu, wathi: “Mfundisi!” Wamanga." 
Mark14:46 Bambamba ke uYesu," 
Mark14:47 waza omnye wâbo babemi khona, warhola ikrele, wasixabela isicaka sombingeleli omkhulu, wasinqumla indlebe." 
Mark14:48 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Niphumele ukuza kubamba mna, ninamakrele neentonga nje, ngokungathi niphumele isihange?" 
Mark14:49 Bendinani imihla ngemihla ndifundisa *endlwini kaThixo, naza anandibamba. Kodwa kunje ukuze zizaliseke *iziBhalo.”" 
Mark14:50 Emva koko ke babaleka bonke abafundi, bamshiya." 
Mark14:51 UYesu wayelandelwa yindodana ethile, ithe wambu ingubo yelinen kuphela. Yona yabanjwa," 
Mark14:52 kodwa yasuka yayishiya ingubo leyo, yabaleka izé." 
Mark14:53 UYesu ke bamsa kumbingeleli omkhulu, baza babuthelana khona bonke ababingeleli abaziintloko, namadoda amakhulu, nabachazi-mthetho." 
Mark14:54 Ke yena uPetros walandela uYesu ebekele kude, wada waya kungena eyadini yomzi wombingeleli omkhulu, wahlala phantsi ndawonye nezicaka, wotha umlilo." 
Mark14:55 Ke ababingeleli abaziintloko nalo lonke *iBhunga babefuna ubungqina ngoYesu, ukuze bambulale, kodwa ababufumananga," 
Mark14:56 kuba nangona babebaninzi ababethetha ubuxoki ngaye, ubungqina babo babungahlangani." 
Mark14:57 Basuka ke abathile bangqina ubuxoki ngaye, besithi:" 
Mark14:58 “Thina samva esithi: ‘Mna ndiya kuyichitha le *ndlu kaThixo yakhiwe ngabantu, ndize ngeentsuku ezintathu ndakhe enye engakhiwanga ngabantu.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Kanti ke nobabo ubungqina babungadibani. 
Mark14:60 Waphakama ke umbingeleli omkhulu, wabuza kuYesu esithi: “Phika, watyholwa! Ithini impendulo yakho?”" 
Mark14:61 Kodwa yena wahlala wathi tu, akaphendula. Waphinda umbingeleli omkhulu wambuza esithi: “Unguye na *uKrestu, uNyana walowo ungowokubongwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Wathi ke uYesu: “Ndinguye. Nangoku niya kumbona *uNyana woLuntu, ehleli ewongeni kwaSomandla, nimbone esiza ngamafu ezulu.”" 
Mark14:63 Wazikrazula iingubo zakhe umbingeleli omkhulu, esithi: “Sisawafunelani na amangqina?" 
Mark14:64 Nikuvile ukunyelisa kwakhe. Nithini na nina?” Bamgweba ke bonke ukuba unetyala, besithi ufanele ukufa." 
Mark14:65 Yaza ke inxenye yabo yamtshicela, yamgquma ubuso, yambetha, isithi kuye: “Xela; ubethwe ngubani?” Nezicaka ke zamntlitha-ntlitha." 
Mark14:66 UPetros ke esezantsi eyadini yomzi, kweza kuye esinye kwizicakazana zombingeleli omkhulu." 
Mark14:67 Sithi sona sakumbona uPetros esotha, samqwalasela, sathi: “Nawe ubunaye umNazarete uYesu.”" 
Mark14:68 Wakhanyela esithi: “Andazani konke nale nto uyithethayo!” Waphuma ke esiya ngasesangweni. 
Mark14:69 Isicakazana eso siphinde sambona, saza sathi kwabo babemi khona: “Lo ngomnye wabo.”" 
Mark14:70 Waphinda ke wakhanyela uPetros. Kwathi, kwakuba mzuzwana, abo babemi khona baphinda bathi kuPetros: “Inene, ungomnye wabo, kuba ungowaseGalili.”" 
Mark14:71 Waza ke uPetros waziqalekisa efunga esithi: “Andimazi lo mntu nithetha ngaye!” 
Mark14:72 Yakhala okwesibini inkuku. Walikhumbula uPetros ilizwi awayelithethe kuye uYesu, esithi: “Ingekakhali kabini inkuku, woba undikhanyele kathathu.” Woyisakala ke, walila." 
Mark15:1 Kwakusa ke, ababingeleli abaziintloko benza isigqibo, benamadoda amakhulu nabachazi-mthetho *neBhunga liphela. Bambopha ke uYesu, bemka naye, bamnikela kuPilato." 
Mark15:2 UPilato wambuza esithi: “Unguye na ukumkani wamaJuda?” Waphendula yena wathi kuye: “Nawe utsho.” 
Mark15:3 Bammangalela ke uYesu ngeendawo ezininzi ababingeleli abaziintloko. 
Mark15:4 Waphinda uPilato wambuza esithi: “Akuphenduli nento le na? Khangela ukuba ninzi kwazo iindawo abakumangalela ngazo.” 
Mark15:5 Noko ke uYesu akaphendulanga nento le, ngokokude amangaliswe uPilato." 
Mark15:6 Ke kaloku *ngePasika uPilato wayedla ngokubakhululela umbanjwa abe mnye – lowo ke babethi bamcele. 
Mark15:7 Ke kwakukho mbanjwa uthile unguBharabha owayebanjwe kunye nabanye abenzi besaqunge, ababebanjwe ngokubulala xa kwakukho isidubedube." 
Mark15:8 Safika ke isihlwele, saza sacela ukuba uPilato enze ngokwesiqhelo." 
Mark15:9 Waphendula uPilato esithi: “Nithanda ukuba ndinikhululele ukumkani wamaJuda na?” 
Mark15:10 Wayesazi ukuba ababingeleli abaziintloko bamnikele ngomona uYesu. 
Mark15:11 Ke bona ababingeleli abaziintloko basifunza isihlwele ukuba sicele ukuba asikhululele uBharabha, ingabi nguYesu." 
Mark15:12 Waphinda wabuza uPilato, esithi: “Ndimthini na ke lowo nina nithi ngukumkani wamaJuda?”" 
Mark15:13 Baphendula bekhwaza besithi: “Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!” 
Mark15:14 Wathi ke kubo uPilato: “Kuba enze bubi buni na?” Kodwa kwaba kukhona bankqangazayo, besithi: “Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!”" 
Mark15:15 UPilato ke, efuna ukusikholisa isihlwele, wamkhulula uBharabha, uYesu yena wamnikela ukuba akatswe, abethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:16 Amajoni amsa uYesu ngaphakathi kweyadi yomzi werhuluneli, alibizela ndawonye ibutho lawo liphela." 
Mark15:17 Amambathisa ingubo ebomvu uYesu, athi, eluke isithsaba sameva, amthi jize ngaso," 
Mark15:18 aza akhahlela esithi: “Aa, kumkani wamaJuda!”" 
Mark15:19 Ambetha entloko ngengcongolo, amtshicela, akhahlela." 
Mark15:20 Athi ke akuba ehlekise ngaye, amhluba loo ngubo ibomvu, amambathisa kwaezakhe, aphuma naye esiya kumbethelela emnqamlezweni." 
Mark15:21 Amajoni ke anyanzela umntu othile, owayedlula evela emaphandleni, ukuba athwale umnqamlezo kaYesu. Lowo wayenguSimon waseKirene, uyise ka-Alesandire noRufo." 
Mark15:22 Amsa ke uYesu endaweni ekuthiwa yiGolgota (oko kukuthi, xa kuguqulwayo, iNdawo yoKhakhayi)." 
Mark15:23 Apho ke amnika iwayini enesiyobisi, kodwa akavumanga ukuyisela." 
Mark15:24 Ambethelela ke emnqamlezweni uYesu, aza abelana ngeengubo zakhe, esenza *amaqashiso ngazo, ukuze othile athathe ethile." 
Mark15:25 Ke kaloku kwakungentsimbi yethoba kusasa ukumbethelela kwabo emnqamlezweni. 
Mark15:26 Phezulu emnqamlezweni kwakubhalwe ityala lakhe, kwathiwa: “UKumkani wamaJuda.”" 
Mark15:27 Kwakubethelelwe kunye naye eminqamlezweni izihange ezibini, esinye ngasekunene, esinye ngasekhohlo. [" 
Mark15:28 Kwazaliseka ke okubhalwe *eziBhalweni kusithiwa: “Wabalelwa kwabachasene nomthetho.” ] 
Mark15:29 Abadlulayo babemnyelisa uYesu, behlunguzela iintloko, besithi: “Tshotsho! Wena uchitha *indlu kaThixo, uyakhe ngeentsuku ezintathu," 
Mark15:30 zisindise uhle emnqamlezweni!” 
Mark15:31 Ngokukwanjalo nababingeleli abaziintloko babehlekisa ngaye, bezithethela bekunye nabachazi-mthetho, besithi: “Abanye wabasindisa, kodwa yena ngokwakhe akanako ukuzisindisa." 
Mark15:32 *UKrestu, uKumkani wakwaSirayeli, makehle kaloku emnqamlezweni, sibone, size sikholwe.” Kwanâbo babebethelelwe eminqamlezweni kunye naye babemenza isigculelo." 
Mark15:33 Ke kaloku ngentsimbi yeshumi elinambini emini, kwehla ubumnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, kwada kwayintsimbi yesithathu emva kwemini." 
Mark15:34 Ngentsimbi yesithathu ke, uYesu wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, esithi: “Eloyi, Eloyi, lama sabaktani?” (Oko kukuthi xa kuguqulwayo: “Thixo wam, Thixo wam, undishiyeleni na?”)" 
Mark15:35 Ithe ke inxenye yababekho, yakukuva oko, yathi: “Yivani, ubiza uEliya.”" 
Mark15:36 Wabaleka omnye, wazalisa imfunxa ngewayini emuncu, wayibeka engcongolweni, wamseza, esithi: “Kahleni, khe sibone ukuba uEliya woza kumthula na.”" 
Mark15:37 UYesu ke wakhala ngezwi elikhulu, waphuma umphefumlo." 
Mark15:38 Lathi ikhuselo legumbi elingcwele *endlwini kaThixo lakrazuka kubini, kususela phezulu kuye ezantsi." 
Mark15:39 Ekubonile ukufa kukaYesu, umphathi-butho wamajoni, owayemi malunga naye, wathi: “Inyaniso, lo mntu ebenguNyana kaThixo.”" 
Mark15:40 Kwakukho nabafazi, bekhangele bemgama. Kubo apho kwakukho uMariya waseMagadala, noMariya unina kaYakobi omncinci noYose, ekho noSalomi." 
Mark15:41 Bona bâmlandela uYesu eseseGalili, bemlungiselela. Kwakukho nabanye abafazi abaninzi ababenyuke naye ukuya eJerusalem." 
Mark15:42 Kuthe ke kwakuba kuhlwile, kwafika uJosefu waseArimati. Yena wayelilungu elibekekileyo *leBhunga, elulindele naye ulawulo lukaThixo. Ekubeni ke kwakuyimini yokulungiselela (oko kukuthi umhla ophambi *kowokuPhumla), yena waya kungena ngobuganga kuPilato, wawucela umzimba kaYesu." 
Mark15:43  
Mark15:44 Wamangaliswa ke uPilato akuva ukuba uYesu selefile, waza wabiza umphathi-butho wamajoni, wambuza ukuba uYesu selenexesha na efile." 
Mark15:45 Wathi ke, akuqonda kumphathi-butho lowo, wamnika uJosefu umzimba kaYesu." 
Mark15:46 UJosefu ke, ethenge ilinen, wamthula uYesu, wamsongela kuyo, wambeka engcwabeni elalixholwe eliweni, waqengqela ilitye, walivala ingcwaba." 
Mark15:47 Babona ke ooMariya waseMagadala noMariya unina kaYose apho wayebekwe khona uYesu. 
Mark16:1 Ekupheleni *koMhla wokuPhumla ooMariya waseMagadala noMariya unina kaYakobi, noSalomi, bathenga iziqholo, ukuze baye kuwuqhola umzimba kaYesu." 
Mark16:2 Bona ke bathi, ukuthi chapha kwelanga, kusekusasa kakhulu ngeCawe, baya engcwabeni." 
Mark16:3 Babethetha bodwa, besithi: “Ngubani na oya kusiqengqela ilitye lisuke engcwabeni?”" 
Mark16:4 Elo litye lalilikhulu kakhulu, baza bathi bakukhangela babona ukuba liqengqiwe lesuka engcwabeni." 
Mark16:5 Bangena ke engcwabeni, babona indodana ehleli ngasekunene, izithe wambu ngengubo ende emhlophe, baza bamangaliswa." 
Mark16:6 Yathi ke yona kubo: “Musani ukumangaliseka. Nifuna uYesu umNazarete, owayebethelelwe emnqamlezweni. Uvukile; akakho apha. Nantsi indawo abebembeke kuyo." 
Mark16:7 Hambani niye kubaxelela abafundi bakhe noPetros ukuba uyanandulela ukuya kwelaseGalili. Nombona khona apho njengoko wayetshilo kuni.” 
Mark16:8 Baphuma ke engcwabeni bebaleka, bengcangcazela besoyika. Abathetha nto ke nakubani, kuba babesoyika. [" 
Mark16:9 Ekuseni ngeCawe, akuba uYesu evukile ekufeni, wabonakala kuqala kuMariya waseMagadala. Ke yena ngulo uYesu wayekhuphe iindimoni ezisixhenxe kuye." 
Mark16:10 UMariya ke waya kubaxelela abalandeli bakaYesu, ababekhedamile belila." 
Mark16:11 Bona ke, bakuva ukuba uYesu uhleli, nokuba ukhe wabonwa nguMariya, basuka àbakholwa.] [" 
Mark16:12 Emva koko wabonakaliswa ngolunye uhlobo kubafundi ababini ababehamba besiya emaphandleni. 
Mark16:13 Kwanabo ke baya kubaxelela abanye abafundi, kodwa àbakholwa nangabo.] [" 
Mark16:14 Emva koko uYesu wazibonakalisa kubafundi abalishumi elinanye besetafileni. Wabakhalimela ngenxa yokungakholwa kwabo nangenxa yokuba lukhuni kweentliziyo zabo, kuba bengakholwa kubo abo babembonile evukile." 
Mark16:15 Wathi ke kubo: “Hambani niye kulo lonke ihlabathi, nizivakalise iindaba ezimnandi kulo lonke elimiweyo." 
Mark16:16 Lowo ukholwayo abhaptizwe wosindiswa; ke yena ongakholwayo wogwetywa. 
Mark16:17 Nantsi imiqondiso eya kulandelana nâbo bakholwayo: baya kuthi egameni lam bakhuphe iindimoni; baya kuthetha ngeelwimi ezintsha; 
Mark16:18 baya kuziphatha ngesandla iinyoka; nokuba bathe basela into ebulalayo, ayiyi kukha ibenzakalise; baya kuyibeka izandla imilwelwe, iphile.”] [" 
Mark16:19 Emva kokuthetha nabo, iNkosi uYesu yanyuselwa ezulwini, yaya kuhlala ewongeni kwaThixo." 
Mark16:20 Ke bona abafundi bâya kushumayela kuzo zonke iindawo, iNkosi isebenza kunye nabo, iwangqina amazwi abo ngemiqondiso.]" 
Luke1:1 Tiyofilo ohloniphekileyo: Ekubeni abaninzi bezame ukulibhala ibali lezo zinto zithe zenzeka phakathi kwethu," 
Luke1:2 bebalisa oko sikuxelelweyo ngâbo bathe kwasekuqalekeni bazibona ngawabo amehlo ezo zinto, baza baba ngabaququzeleli bezi ndaba," 
Luke1:3 nam, mhlekazi, ndibone kulungile ukuba ndibhale ndikucwangcisele ngokuthe ngqo, ekubeni sekulithuba elide nje ndiziphanda kakuhle ezi zinto." 
Luke1:4 Ndenjenje ukuze uyazi ngokuphelelyo inyaniso yezinto ozifundisiweyo. 
Luke1:5 Ngemihla kaHerode, ukumkani wakwaJuda, kwakukho umbingeleli othile, ogama linguZakariya, engoweqela lika-Abhiya. Umkakhe uElizabhete naye wayeyintombi yombingeleli." 
Luke1:6 Bobabini babengamalungisa, beyithobela imiyalelo nemimiselo yeNkosi, bengenakusoleka." 
Luke1:7 Babengenabantwana, kuba uElizabhete wayengazali; kananjalo bobabini babesebaluphele." 
Luke1:8 Ke kaloku uZakariya wayesemsebenzini wakhe wobubingeleli phambi koThixo, kulithuba leqela lakhe." 
Luke1:9 Kwênziwa *amaqashiso ngokwesiqhelo sababingeleli, laza iqashiso laphuma naye ukuba aqhumise ubulawu. Wangena ke endaweni engcwele yeNkosi," 
Luke1:10 kukho inkitha yabantu ithandaza ngaphandle ngexesha lesiqhumiso. 
Luke1:11 Kwabonakala isithunywa seNkosi kuye, simi ngasekunene kweqonga lesiqhumiso." 
Luke1:12 Wothuka uZakariya akusibona, wangenwa luloyiko." 
Luke1:13 Isithunywa eso sathi kuye: “Musa ukoyika, Zakariya. UThixo uwuvile umthandazo wakho. Umfazi wakho uElizabhete uya kuzala unyana. Uze umthiye igama elinguYohane." 
Luke1:14 Ukuzalwa kwakhe kuya kukuphathela uvuyo nolonwabo, ize loo nto ibe luvuyo nakubantu abaninzi." 
Luke1:15 Yena uya kubaluleka eNkosini, angaseli wayini nasiselo sinxilisayo, alawulwe nguMoya oyiNgcwele kwasekuzalweni kwakhe." 
Luke1:16 Uya kubuyisela amaSirayeli amaninzi eNkosini uThixo wawo. 
Luke1:17 Uya kuyibhulela umbethe iNkosi, enamandla njengoEliya, axolelanise uyise nomntwana, ababuyisele ebulungiseni abangevayo, alungiselele iNkosi abantu bayo.”" 
Luke1:18 UZakariya wathi kwisithunywa eso: “Ndiya kuyiqonda ngani le nto? Kaloku mna sendimdala, nomfazi wam selaluphele.”" 
Luke1:19 Saphendula ke isithunywa sathi kuye: “Mna ndinguGabriyeli oma phambi koThixo. Ndithunyiwe ukuba ndithethe nawe, ndikuxelele ezi ndaba zimnandi." 
Luke1:20 Ngenxa yokuba ungakholwa ngamazwi am, uyabona, uya kuvaleka, ungabi nako ukuthetha, kude kube yiloo mini zenzeka ngayo ezi zinto. Kanti ke la mazwi aya kuzalisekiswa ngexesha lawo.”" 
Luke1:21 Abantu babemlindile uZakariya, bemangalisiwe kukulibala kwakhe endaweni engcwele." 
Luke1:22 Uthe ke akuphuma engasenako ukuthetha, baqonda ukuba ubone umbono apho endaweni engcwele. Wathi, ekhohliwe kukuthetha, wamana enqwala." 
Luke1:23 Lakuphela ixesha lokukhonza kweqela lakhe, uZakariya wagoduka." 
Luke1:24 Emva koko uElizabhete umfazi wakhe wamitha, wazifihla iinyanga zade zantlanu," 
Luke1:25 wavakala esithi: “Kwenziwe yiNkosi oku. Ide yandenzela inceba, yaphelisa ukudeleka kwam phakathi kwabantu.”" 
Luke1:26 Ngenyanga yesithandathu isithunywa esinguGabriyeli sathunywa nguThixo kwelaseGalili, kwidolophu eyiNazarete," 
Luke1:27 kwintombi eyayisendela kumfana wendlu kaDavide, ogama linguJosefu. Igama lentombi leyo lalinguMariya." 
Luke1:28 Safika ke isithunywa kuye, sathi: “Bhota, wena ubabalweyo! INkosi inawe.”" 
Luke1:29 UMariya woyika akuweva la mazwi, waza wafuna engqondweni ukuba ngaba ngumbuliso mni na lo." 
Luke1:30 Isithunywa ke sathi kuye: “Musa ukoyika, Mariya, kuba uThixo ukwenzela isisa." 
Luke1:31 Uyabona, uza kumitha, uzale unyana, umthiye igama *elinguYesu." 
Luke1:32 Yena uya kuba mkhulu, abizwe ngokuba nguNyana kaPhezukonke. INkosi uThixo iya kummisela abe ngukumkani kwaDavide uyise," 
Luke1:33 ayilawule indlu kaYakobi kude kube ngunaphakade, nolawulo lwakhe lungaze luphele.”" 
Luke1:34 UMariya ke wathi kuso isithunywa: “Iya kwenzeka njani na loo nto, ndingazani nandoda nje?”" 
Luke1:35 Saphendula isithunywa sathi kuye: “UMoya oyiNgcwele uya kuhlela kuwe, athi amandla kaThixo uPhezukonke akufukamele. Kungoko loo mntwana ungcwele uya kuzalwa nguwe kuya kuthiwa nguNyana kaThixo." 
Luke1:36 Uyabona, naye uElizabhete ozalana nawe, ukhawule unyana ebudaleni bakhe. Le yinyanga yesithandathu kuye, yena lowo bekusithiwa uludlolo." 
Luke1:37 Kaloku akukho nanye into enokumnqabela uThixo.” 
Luke1:38 Wathi ke uMariya: “Ndim lo mna mkhonzazana weNkosi. Makwenzeke kum ngokwamazwi akho.” Saza semka isithunywa kuye. 
Luke1:39 Ngaloo mihla wesuka uMariya, wasinga kweleentaba ngokukhawuleza, esiya edolophini yakwaJuda;" 
Luke1:40 waya kungena endlwini kaZakariya, wafika wambulisa uElizabhete." 
Luke1:41 Kwathi akuwuva uElizabhete umbuliso kaMariya, lwasuka lwaxhuma usana esizalweni sakhe. Wafikelwa ke nguMoya oyiNgcwele uElizabhete," 
Luke1:42 wadanduluka ekhwaza esithi: “Ungoyena usikelelweyo wena phakathi kwabafazi! Nomntwana oya kuzalwa nguwe usikelelwe! 
Luke1:43 Bendiyintoni na kakade, ukuba ndide ndihanjelwe ngunina weNkosi yam?" 
Luke1:44 Yaz' ukuba, kuthe ndakuwuva umbuliso wakho, lwasuka usana lwaxhuma luvuyo esiswini sam." 
Luke1:45 Unoyolo lowo ukholiweyo, kuba ilizwi elithunyelwe kuye yiNkosi liya kuzaliseka.”" 
Luke1:46 Wavakala uMariya esithi: “Umphefumlo wam uyayibonga iNkosi; 
Luke1:47 ndaye ndigcobile ngoThixo uMsindisi wam; 
Luke1:48 kuba wakuphawula ukuthobeka kwesicakazana sakhe. Ewe, ukususela ngoku zonke izizukulwana zothi ndingonoyolo," 
Luke1:49 kuba undenzele izinto ezinkulu uSomandla, yena ogama lakhe lingcwele," 
Luke1:50 yena onceba yakhe ikwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana zâbo bamoyikayo. 
Luke1:51 Wolule ingalo yakhe enamandla, wabachitha-chitha abanekratshi ekuzicingeleni kwabo." 
Luke1:52 Iinganga wazithoba kumawonga azo, waza abathobekileyo wabaphakamisa." 
Luke1:53 Wahluthisa abalambileyo ngezinto ezilungileyo, wathi abazizityebi wabandulula belambatha." 
Luke1:54 Wamxhasa uSirayeli umkhonzi wakhe, akayilibala inceba yakhe" 
Luke1:55 awayethembise ngayo koobawo bethu, kuAbraham nakwinzala yakhe ngonaphakade.”" 
Luke1:56 UMariya ke wahlala noElizabhete iinyanga ngathi zaba ntathu, waza wagoduka." 
Luke1:57 Lafika ke ixesha lokuba uElizabhete abeleke, waza wazala unyana." 
Luke1:58 Bakuva abamelwane bakhe nezizalwana zakhe ngale nceba ingaka ayenzelwe yiNkosi, bavuyisana naye." 
Luke1:59 Kwathi ke ngomhla wesibhozo baya kumàlusa umntwana, befuna ukumthiya ngoyise uZakariya." 
Luke1:60 Kodwa unina wala, esithi: “Hayi, igama lakhe nguYohane!”" 
Luke1:61 Bona ke bathi kuye: “Lingekho nje eli gama kowabo!” 
Luke1:62 Baza babhekisa kuyise ukuba yena unga angathiywa gama lini na. 
Luke1:63 Wabiza icwecwana, wabhala wathi: “Igama lakhe nguYohane.” Baza bamangaliswa bonke." 
Luke1:64 Kwangoko lwacombuluka ulwimi lukaZakariya, wathetha ebonga uThixo." 
Luke1:65 Bangenwa luloyiko ke bonke abamelwane, yaza le nto yonke yaba ngundabamlonyeni kulo lonke eleentaba lakwaJuda." 
Luke1:66 Bathi bonke abayivayo bayimilisela ezingqondweni, besithi: “Yaz'ba, uya kuba yintoni na lo mntwana?” Kuba kaloku amandla eNkosi ayenaye." 
Luke1:67 UZakariya uyise wazala nguMoya oyiNgcwele, watyibela wathi:" 
Luke1:68 “Mayibongwe iNkosi, uThixo kaSirayeli, kuba ibavelele yabakhulula abantu bayo;" 
Luke1:69 kwaDavide isicaka sayo isivelisele uMsindisi otshatsheleyo. 
Luke1:70 Nguwo lo umlomo wayo wamhla-mnene oweza *ngabashumayeli bayo abangcwele," 
Luke1:71 ithembisa ukusisindisa ezintshabeni zethu, nasesandleni sabo bonke abasithiyileyo;" 
Luke1:72 isithi yobenzela inceba oobawo bethu, iwukhumbule umnqophiso wayo ongcwele," 
Luke1:73 isifungo eyasenzela uAbraham ubawo wethu," 
Luke1:74 sokusihlangula ezintshabeni zethu, siyikhonze singenaxhala," 
Luke1:75 ngobungcwele nangobulungisa phambi kwayo, yonke imihla yobomi bethu." 
Luke1:76 Nawe ke, mntwana wam, wobizwa ngokuba *ungumshumayeli kaThixo uPhezukonke, kuba uya kuyibhulela umbethe iNkosi, uyigabulele izigcawu." 
Luke1:77 Wobazisa abantu beNkosi ngosindiso olungoxolelo lwezono zabo," 
Luke1:78 kuba unenceba nemfesane uThixo wethu. Ngoko wosivelisela olilanga lasezulwini," 
Luke1:79 ukuze akhanyisele abasebumnyameni nasethunzini lokufa, nokuze azikhokelele endleleni yoxolo iinyawo zethu.”" 
Luke1:80 Wakhula umntwana, waya esomelela ngokomelela. Wayehlala entlango kwada kwayimini yokubonakala kwakhe kumaSirayeli." 
Luke2:1 Kwathi ngaloo mihla kwaphuma ummiselo *kuKhesare Agasto othi lonke elimiweyo malibhalise. 
Luke2:2 Olu bhaliso lokuqala lwabakho uKireniyo eyirhuluneli yaseSiriya. 
Luke2:3 Babesithi ke bonke baye kubhalisa, elowo kweyakowabo idolophu." 
Luke2:4 UJosefu ke waphuma kwelaseGalili, kwidolophu iNazarete, waya kwelakwaJuda, kwidolophu kaDavide eyiBhetelehem, kuba wayengowomlibo kaDavide." 
Luke2:5 Wayesiya kubhalisa, enoMariya owayesendela kuye. Yena wayeselekhulelwe," 
Luke2:6 kwaza kwathi belapho lafika ixesha lokubeleka kwakhe. 
Luke2:7 Wamzala ke unyana wakhe wamazibulo, wamsongela eziqhiyeni, wamlalisa emkhumbini wesitali, kuba kwakungekho ndawo endlwini yabahambi." 
Luke2:8 Kwakukho abelusi kwakweso sithili, behlala ezindle, belinda imihlambi yabo ebusuku." 
Luke2:9 Babona isithunywa seNkosi simi ngakubo, bathi nobuqaqawuli beNkosi bababengezelela ngeenxa zonke. Baza boyika kakhulu." 
Luke2:10 Isithunywa ke sathi kubo: “Musani ukoyika; kaloku ndinizisele iindaba ezimnandi zovuyo olukhulu oluya kuba kubo bonke abantu. 
Luke2:11 Namhlanje, edolophini kaDavide, nizalelwe uMsindisi *onguKrestu iNkosi." 
Luke2:12 Nantsi into eyoba ngumqondiso kuni: nofumana usana lusongelwe eziqhiyeni, lulele emkhumbini wesitali.”" 
Luke2:13 Ngequbuliso kwabakho inkitha yezithunywa zezulu, ikunye nesithunywa eso, idumisa uThixo, isithi:" 
Luke2:14 “Makadunyiswe uThixo kweliphezulu, kube luxolo emhlabeni kubantu abamkholisayo.”" 
Luke2:15 Zakuba zimkile izithunywa, zisiya ezulwini, abelusi abo bathi omnye komnye: “Masihambe siye eBhetelehem, siyibone le nto ihlileyo, le siyazisiweyo yiNkosi.”" 
Luke2:16 Bakhawuleza ke baya, bafika kuMariya noJosefu, kwanalo usana lulele emkhumbini wesitali." 
Luke2:17 Bathi bakuba bebonile, bawabhengeza amazwi awayethethwe kubo ngaye lo mntwana;" 
Luke2:18 baza bonke abawevileyo bamangaliswa zezo zinto zazithethwa kubo ngabelusi. 
Luke2:19 Yena uMariya wazigcina zonke ezo zinto entliziyweni yakhe, wamana ezetyisa." 
Luke2:20 Abelusi ke babuyela emihlambini yabo, becula bedumisa uThixo ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ababezivile bazifumana zinjengoko zazixeliwe." 
Luke2:21 Akuba ntsuku zisibhozo umntwana ezelwe, kungumhla wokwaluswa kwakhe, uthiywe igama *elinguYesu, elo wayelithiyiwe sisithunywa sezulu engekakhawulwa nokukhawulwa." 
Luke2:22 Zakuba ke zifezekile iintsuku zokuhlanjululwa kwabo *ngokomthetho kaMosis, uJosefu noMariya benyuka naye uYesu, baya eJerusalem, ukuze bamnikele eNkosini," 
Luke2:23 njengoko kubhaliwe emthethweni weNkosi kwathiwa: “Yonke into eliduna eyeyamazibulo mayinikelwe eNkosini.” 
Luke2:24 Babesiya kwenza nomnikelo, njengoko kusitshiwo emthethweni weNkosi ukuthi: “Makunikelwe ngesibini samahobe, nokuba ngamathole amabini evukuthu.”" 
Luke2:25 EJerusalem apho kwakukho umntu ogama linguSimon. Wayelilungisa, emhlonela uThixo, elindele ukuthuthuzelwa kwamaSirayeli, enefuthe likaMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Luke2:26 Wayetyhilelwe nguMoya oyiNgcwele ukuba akayi kufa engekamboni uKrestu weNkosi. 
Luke2:27 Waya endlwini kaThixo, ethunywa nguMoya. Kwathi ke, akungeniswa uYesu ngabazali bakhe, befezekisa umthetho," 
Luke2:28 uSimon wamfunqula, wabonga uThixo, wathi:" 
Luke2:29 “Nkosi, ngokwesithembiso sakho, uyasikhulula ngoku isicaka sakho sinoxolo," 
Luke2:30 kuba amehlo am alubonile usindiso lwakho," 
Luke2:31 olulungiselele bonke abantu," 
Luke2:32 ulukhanyiso lokukhanyisela iintlanga, lubalula abantu bakho amaSirayeli.”" 
Luke2:33 Abazali bakhe bamangaliswa zezo zinto zithethwayo ngoYesu. 
Luke2:34 USimon wabasikelela, wathi kuMariya unina: “Uyabona, lo Mntwana umiselwe ukuwa nokuvuka kwabaninzi kwaSirayeli, nokuba abe ngumqondiso ochasiweyo," 
Luke2:35 ze ngale nkcaso kutyhileke iingcamango zabaninzi. Kanti ke nowakho umphefumlo uya kubindeka.” 
Luke2:36 Kwalapho kwakukho nentokazi *eyayingumshumayeli, uAna, intombi kaFanuweli wendlu ka-Ashere. Wayeselaluphele kakhulu. Akuba endile, uhleli iminyaka esixhenxe kuphela kunye nendoda yakhe," 
Luke2:37 waza waphila de waba minyaka imashumi asibhozo anane engumhlolokazi. Wayengapheli endlwini kaThixo, ekhonza uThixo ngokuzila ukutya nangokuthandaza ebusuku nasemini." 
Luke2:38 Wasondela ke ngelo lixa uAna, wathelela ekudumiseni uThixo. Wayethetha ngoMntwana lowo kubo bonke ababelindele ukukhululwa kweJerusalem." 
Luke2:39 Bakuba ke bezifezekisile zonke izinto ngokomthetho weNkosi, babuyela eNazarete, idolophu yakowabo kwelaseGalili." 
Luke2:40 Ke kaloku uYesu wakhula, waya esomelela, enobulumko obukhulu, ubabalo lukaThixo lunaye." 
Luke2:41 Abazali bakhe babehambela eJerusalem minyaka le, besiya kwitheko *lePasika." 
Luke2:42 Kuthe ke xa uYesu wayeminyaka ilishumi elinambini ezelwe, baya ePasikeni eJerusalem ngokwesiqhelo." 
Luke2:43 Zakuba zigqithile iintsuku zelo theko, bagoduka, kanti uYesu usele eJerusalem. Phofu babengaqondi abazali bakhe." 
Luke2:44 Babeba usemxukuxeleni wabahambi, baza bahamba uhambo lwamini-nye. Bamana bemfuna ke phakathi kwezizalwane nabazana nabo." 
Luke2:45 Bathe bakungamfumani babuyela eJerusalem bemfuna. 
Luke2:46 Kwathi ke emva kweentsuku ezintathu bamfumana *endlwini kaThixo, ehleli nabafundisi, ebaphulaphula, ebabuza nokubabuza." 
Luke2:47 Bonke abamváyo babemangalisiwe yingqondo yakhe naziimpendulo zakhe. 
Luke2:48 Abazali bakhe bakumbona bathi manga, unina wathi kuye: “Mntanam, yini na ukuba usenjenje? Uyabona, uyihlo nam besikufuna sixhalabile.”" 
Luke2:49 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Benindifunela ntoni na? Beningazi na ukuba ndimelwe kukuba sendlwini kaBawo?” 
Luke2:50 Ke bona abayiqondanga into awayeyithetha kubo. 
Luke2:51 Wahamba nabo, waya kufika eNazarete. Wayebalulamela abazali bakhe. Wazigcina unina ezo zinto entliziyweni yakhe." 
Luke2:52 UYesu ke wakhula ngesithomo nangobulumko, ebabalwa nguThixo, ethandwa ngabantu." 
Luke3:1 Ke kaloku ngomnyaka weshumi elinantlanu elawula uTibheriyo *Khesare, inguPontiyo Pilato irhuluneli kwelakwaJuda, inguHerode olawula kwelaseGalili, umntakwabo uFilipu elawula kwelaseJitureya nelaseTrakoniti, inguLisaniyo olawula kwelaseAbhilene," 
Luke3:2 ngemihla yababingeleli abakhulu ooAnas noKayafa, lafika ilizwi likaThixo kuYohane, unyana kaZakariya, entlango." 
Luke3:3 Yena ke wayewujikeleza wonke ummandla weJordan, eshumayela esithi abantu mabaguquke, babhaptizwe, aze uThixo abaxolele izono zabo;" 
Luke3:4 njengoko kubhaliweyo kwincwadi *yomshumayeli uIsaya kusithiwa: “Kuvakala ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi: “ ‘Yilungiseleleni indlela iNkosi, niyihlahlele umgaqo wayo." 
Luke3:5 Mayiditywe yonke imifula, zidilizwe zonke iinduli neentaba. Mazenziwe zithi tye iindawo ezigoso, ziletyelwe ezinamatye." 
Luke3:6 Bonke abantu baya kulubona usindiso oluvela kuThixo.’ ” 
Luke3:7 Ke kaloku izihlwele zaziphuma ziye kubhaptizwa nguYohane. Wayesithi kuzo: “Nzalandini yamarhamba, ngubani lo unilumkisileyo ukuba niyibaleke ingqumbo ezayo?" 
Luke3:8 Ke ngoko yenzani izinto ezibonakalisa inguquko. Ze ningafane nithi: ‘Siyinzala ka-Abraham.’ Ndiyanixelela mna, uThixo unako ngawo la matye ukumvelisela abantwana uAbraham." 
Luke3:9 Kanti ke lona izembe selikulungele ukuyinqumla ezingcanjini imithi. Ngoko ke wonke umthi ongavelisi siqhamo sihle uyagawulwa utshiswe.” 
Luke3:10 Izihlwele zazimbuza zisithi: “Masithini ke ngoko?” 
Luke3:11 Waphendula wathi kuzo: “Lowo uneengubo ezimbini makanike ongenáyo. Nalowo unokutya makenjenjalo.” 
Luke3:12 Abaqokeleli-rhafu beza kubhaptizwa, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, masithini na?”" 
Luke3:13 Wathi kubo: “Ningabizi ngaphezu kwenikumiselweyo.” 
Luke3:14 Namajoni ayebuza kuye esithi: “Masithini thina?” Wathi kuwo: “Ningaphangi mntu ngogonyamelo okanye ngobuxoki. Yanelani yimivuzo yenu.” 
Luke3:15 Ke kaloku lavuseleleka ithemba ebantwini, becamanga bonke ezintliziyweni zabo ngaye uYohane, ukuba akangebi nguye na uKrestu." 
Luke3:16 UYohane ke wabaphendula esithi: “Mna okunene ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi, kodwa uyeza onamandla kunam. Andikufanelanga ukukhulula nemitya le yezihlangu zakhe. Yena uya kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele nangomlilo." 
Luke3:17 Ingobozi isesandleni sakhe. Uya kukwela kuthi tu okusesandêni, ayigalele kuvimba ingqolowa. Ke wona umququ uya kuwutshisa ngomlilo ongacimiyo.”" 
Luke3:18 UYohane wayeyala ekhuthaza nangezinye izinto ezininzi, eshumayela iindaba ezimnandi ebantwini." 
Luke3:19 UHerode, umlawuli waseGalili, wakhalinyelwa nguYohane ngenxa yokungena uHerodiya, umka-mninawe wakhe, nangazo zonke ezinye izinto ezimbi awayezenzile." 
Luke3:20 Suka ke yena uHerode wavalela uYohane lowo entolongweni. 
Luke3:21 Ke ekubhaptizweni kwento eninzi yabantu, noYesu ebhaptiziwe, kwathi ethandaza, lavuleka izulu," 
Luke3:22 wehlela phezu kwakhe uMoya oyiNgcwele enembonakalo yehobe. Kwavakala nezwi livela ezulwini, lisithi: “UnguNyana wam endimthandayo wena; ndikholisiwe nguwe!”" 
Luke3:23 Ukuqala kwakhe ukufundisa uYesu wayemalunga neminyaka emashumi mathathu ezelwe. Kwakusithiwa ungunyana kaJosefu, kaEli," 
Luke3:24 kaMatati, kaLevi, kaMeleki, kaJana, kaJosefu," 
Luke3:25 kaMatatiya, ka-Amos, kaNahum, kaHesli, kaNagayi," 
Luke3:26 kaMathi, kaMatatiya, kaShimeyi, kaYoseki, kaJoda," 
Luke3:27 kaYohanan, kaResha, kaZerubhabheli, kaShalatiyeli, kaNeri," 
Luke3:28 kaMeleki, ka-Adi, kaKosam, kaElmadam, kaEre," 
Luke3:29 kaYoshuwa, kaEliyezere, kaYorim, kaMatati, kaLevi," 
Luke3:30 kaSimon, kaJuda, kaJosefu, kaJonam, kaEliyakim," 
Luke3:31 kaMaleya, kaMina, kaMatata, kaNatan, kaDavide," 
Luke3:32 kaJese, kaObhedi, kaBhowazi, kaSalman, kaNashon," 
Luke3:33 ka-Aminadabhi, ka-Admin, ka-Arni, kaHezeron, kaPerezi, kaJuda," 
Luke3:34 kaYakobi, kaIsake, ka-Abraham, kaTera, kaNahore," 
Luke3:35 kaSeruki, kaRewu, kaPelege, kaHebhere, kaShela," 
Luke3:36 kaKenan, ka-Arpakishadi, kaShem, kaNowa, kaLameki," 
Luke3:37 kaMethusela, kaInoki, kaJerede, kaMahalaleli, kaKenan," 
Luke3:38 kaEnoshe, kaSete, ka-Adam, kaThixo." 
Luke4:1 UYesu wabuya eJordan ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wajikeleza entlango ekhokelwa nguMoya" 
Luke4:2 iintsuku ezimashumi mane, elingwa ngumtyholi. Akatyanga nto ngezo ntsuku, waza walamba ekupheleni kwazo." 
Luke4:3 Ke umtyholi wathi kuye: “Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, yitsho eli litye libe sisonka.”" 
Luke4:4 UYesu wamphendula esithi: “*IziBhalo zithi: ‘Umntu akaphili ngasonka sodwa.’” 
Luke4:5 Ke umtyholi wamnyusela endaweni ephakamileyo uYesu, wathi ngexeshana elingephi wambonisa onke amazwe ezikumkani zehlabathi;" 
Luke4:6 wathi kuye: “Ndokunika igunya kuwo onke, ndikuphe nobutyebi bawo, kuba konke oko kokwam, kwaye ndikunika lowo sukuba ndithanda ukumnika." 
Luke4:7 Ke ngoko, ukuba uthe wandinqula, zonke ezo zinto zoba zezakho.”" 
Luke4:8 UYesu wamphendula wathi: “IziBhalo zithi: ‘Uze unqule iNkosi uThixo wakho, ukhonze yona yodwa.’”" 
Luke4:9 Umtyholi ke waya noYesu eJerusalem, wammisa phezu *kwendlu kaThixo, wathi kuye: “Ukuba unguye uNyana kaThixo, ziphose ezantsi phaya;" 
Luke4:10 kuba iziBhalo zithi: ‘UThixo uya kuziwisela umthetho ngawe izithunywa zakhe, ukuze zikugcine.’" 
Luke4:11 Kananjalo kuthiwa: ‘Ziya kukufunqula, hleze ukhubeke elityeni.’”" 
Luke4:12 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “IziBhalo zithi: ‘Uze ungayilingi iNkosi uThixo wakho.’” 
Luke4:13 Akupheza umtyholi ukulinga uYesu, wemka okwexeshana." 
Luke4:14 UYesu ke, esemandleni kaMoya oyiNgcwele, wabuyela kwelaseGalili, lwaza udumo lwakhe lwavakala kuwo wonke loo mmandla." 
Luke4:15 Wayefundisa *ezindlwini zesikhungo, enconywa ngabo bonke." 
Luke4:16 UYesu ke waya kufika eNazarete, apho wayekhulele khona, wathi ngokwesiqhelo sakhe wangena *endlwini yesikhungo *ngoMhla wokuPhumla. Waphakama ke ukuba afunde;" 
Luke4:17 waza wanikwa incwadi *yomshumayeli uIsaya, watyhila le ndawo ithi:" 
Luke4:18 “UMoya weNkosi undongamele, ngoko ke indithambisile; indalathele ukushumayela iindaba ezimnandi kwabasweleyo. Yandithuma ukuvakalisa inkululeko kubathinjwa, nokubuyisela ukubona kwabaziimfama, ndibandululè bekhululekile abacinezelweyo," 
Luke4:19 ndivakalisè unyaka wokuthululwa kwenceba yeNkosi.” 
Luke4:20 Eyisongile incwadi uYesu, wayibuyisela kwisicaka, wahlala phantsi. Amehlo abo bonke ababesendlwini yesikhungo ayondele kuye;" 
Luke4:21 waza wathi kubo: “Namhlanje esi *siBhalo sizalisekisiwe phambi kwenu.” 
Luke4:22 Babemncoma, bonke bemangalisiwe ngamazwi amnandi awathethayo, besithi: “He bethu, lo mntu asinguye na unyana kaJosefu?”" 
Luke4:23 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Eneneni niya kulibhekisa kum eli qhalo lithi: ‘Gqirha, ziphilise;’ nize nithi: ‘Nakowenu apha yenza okungangoko sive ukuba ukwenzile eKapernahum.’ ” Wathi ke:" 
Luke4:24 “Ndithi kuni, inene, akukho mshumayeli wamkelekileyo kowabo." 
Luke4:25 Enyanisweni babebaninzi abahlolokazi kwaSirayeli ngemihla kaEliya, oko lalibalele iminyaka emithathu eneenyanga ezintandathu, kukho indlala enkulu kulo lonke ilizwe." 
Luke4:26 Kanti ke uEliya zange athunywe nakumnye kubo; kuphela wathunywa kumhlolokazi waseSarfati kwelaseSidon. 
Luke4:27 Kananjalo babebaninzi abaneqhenqa kwaSirayeli ngemihla yomshumayeli uElisha; kanti ke akuhlanjululwanga namnye kubo ngaphandle koNahaman umSiriya.” 
Luke4:28 Bakuziva ezi zinto bacaphuka bonke ababesendlwini yesikhungo," 
Luke4:29 besuka bamkhupha edolophini uYesu, bamsa phezu kweliwa eyayakhelwe phezu kwalo idolophu yabo, ukuze bamphose ezantsi." 
Luke4:30 Kodwa yena wacanda phakathi kwabo, wemka." 
Luke4:31 Wehla ke uYesu waya eKapernahum, idolophu yelaseGalili, wathi khona apho *ngoMhla woPhumlo wafundisa abantu." 
Luke4:32 Bamangaliswa kukufundisa kwakhe, kuba wayefundisa ngegunya." 
Luke4:33 Ke *endlwini yesikhungo apho kwakukho umntu ophethwe yindimoni. 
Luke4:34 Yena ke wabhomboloza, ekhala esithi: “Kwowu! Ufuna ntoni kuthi, Yesu waseNazarete? Ngaba uze kusitshabalalisa? Ndiyakwazi ukuba ungubani na; ungoyiNgcwele kaThixo!”" 
Luke4:35 UYesu wayikhalimela loo ndimoni, esithi: “Yithi tu, uphume kuye!” Yasuka indimoni yamkhahlela phantsi phambi kwabo, yaza yaphuma ingamenzakalisanga." 
Luke4:36 Bamangaliswa bonke abantu, babuzana besithi: “He bethu, mhlola mni lo? Lo mntu ukhalima nje ngelizwi, zitsho ziphume iindimoni!”" 
Luke4:37 Zatsho zaduma ke iindaba ngoYesu kuwo wonke loo mmandla. 
Luke4:38 Waphuma ke uYesu *endlwini yesikhungo, waya kungena endlwini kaSimon. Ke umkhwekazi kaSimon wayephethwe yifiva ngamandla, baza ke baxelela uYesu ngaye." 
Luke4:39 Yena waya kuma ngakuye, wayikhalimela ifiva, waza wachacha. Wavuka kwangoko ke, wabalungiselela ukutya." 
Luke4:40 Kwathi ukutshona kwelanga, bonke abo babenabagula zizifo ngezifo babazisa kuYesu. Yena wababeka izandla bonke ngabanye, wabaphilisa." 
Luke4:41 Neendimoni zaziphuma kwabaninzi, zikhala zisithi: “Wena unguye uNyana kaThixo.” Wayezikhalimela iindimoni ezo, engazivumeli ukuba zithethe, kuba zazisazi ukuba yena unguye *uKrestu." 
Luke4:42 Wasuka uYesu wemka waya endaweni engenabantu. Izihlwele zazimfuna, zathi zakumfumana, zazama ukuba angemki kuzo." 
Luke4:43 Wathi kuzo: “Ndimelwe kukuba ndishumayele iindaba ezimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo nakwezinye iidolophu, kuba yinto endithunywe yona leyo.”" 
Luke4:44 Wayeshumayela ke *ezindlwini zesikhungo zelakwaJuda. 
Luke5:1 Ke kaloku uYesu xa wayemi ngakuLwandle lwaseGenesarete, izihlwele zimxinile, zisiza kuva ilizwi likaThixo," 
Luke5:2 wabona izikhitshana ezibini ziselunxwemeni. Abalobi babephumile kuzo, behlamba iminatha." 
Luke5:3 Wathi ke, engene kwesinye isikhitshana esasisesikaSimon, wamcela ukuba akhe ashenxe kancinane elunxwemeni. UYesu ke wazifundisa izihlwele ehleli esikhitshaneni." 
Luke5:4 Akugqiba ukuthetha, wathi kuSimon: “Yiyani phakathi enzulwini, nihlise iminatha yenu, nibambise.”" 
Luke5:5 Waphendula uSimon wathi kuye: “Mhlekazi, sibulaleke ubusuku bonke, asabamba nento le; kodwa ngokutsho kwakho ndiya kuwuhlisa umnatha.”" 
Luke5:6 Bathi bakwenjenjalo, babambisa inkitha yeentlanzi, kangangokuba waphants' ukuqhaqheka umnatha wabo."
