Luke5:7 Baza bakhweba abalingane babo ababekwesinye isikhitshana, ukuba beze kubancedisa. Beza ke, bazizalisa zozibini izikhitshana, zada zaphants' ukutshona." 
Luke5:8 Ekubonile okwenzekileyo, uPetros waguqa phambi koYesu, wathi: “Mka kum, Nkosi, kuba ndiyindoda engumoni.”" 
Luke5:9 Yena nabo bonke ababenaye babemangalisiwe lolo banjiso lungako lweentlanzi. 
Luke5:10 Babemangalisiwe noYakobi noYohane, oonyana bakaZebhedi, ababengabalingane bakaSimon. UYesu ke wathi kuSimon: “Ungoyiki. Ukususela namhlanje uya kuba ngumlobi wabantu.”" 
Luke5:11 Bakuba ke bezitsalele elunxwemeni izikhitshana, bashiya into yonke, balandela uYesu." 
Luke5:12 Kwathi uYesu ekwidolophu ethile kwafika indoda ithe gqume liqhenqa. Le ndoda ke, yakumbona uYesu, yawa ngobuso phambi kwakhe, yambongoza isithi: “Nkosi, ndiyazi ukuba unako ukundihlambulula, ukuba uyathanda.”" 
Luke5:13 Wasolula uYesu isandla, wayichukumisa, esithi: “Ndiyathanda; hlambuluka.” Kwangoko laphela kuyo iqhenqa." 
Luke5:14 UYesu ke wayiyala esithi mayingaxeleli bani, waza wathi: “Hamba uye kuzibonisa kumbingeleli, wenze umnikelo ngezo zinto wazimiselayo uMosis, ube bubungqina bokuhlanjululwa kwakho.”" 
Luke5:15 Kwaba kukhona ke uYesu angundabamlonyeni; kwaza kwabuthelana isihlwele esikhulu, sisiza kumphulaphula nokuphiliswa nguye kwizifo ngezifo." 
Luke5:16 Ke yena uYesu wayemana ukuya esiguqweni ngasese, athandaze." 
Luke5:17 Kwathi ngamini ithile uYesu efundisa, kwafika *abaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho, bephuma kuzo zonke iindolophu zelaseGalili nelakwaJuda, naseJerusalem. Amandla eNkosi ayekho kuye, ephilisa." 
Luke5:18 Nako ke kufika amadoda ethwele ngokhuko umntu ofe umzimba, efuna ukumngenisa endlwini, ambeke phambi koYesu." 
Luke5:19 Exakiwe kukumngenisa ngenxa yokuxinana kwesihlwele, akhwela phezu kwendlu, aqhaqha uphahla, amhlisa ngokhuko, ambeka phakathi, phambi koYesu." 
Luke5:20 Akulubona uYesu ukholo lwawo, wathi kofe umzimba: “Mfondini, izono zakho zixolelwe.”" 
Luke5:21 Baza abachazi-mthetho nabaFarasi bathetha bodwa besithi: “Yini na ukuba lo mntu anyelise ngolu hlobo? Ngubani kakade onako ukuxolela izono ngaphandle koThixo?” 
Luke5:22 UYesu ke, ezazi iingcamango zabo, wabaphendula wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nibe nezi ngcamango ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Luke5:23 Okukona kulula kukuphi? Kukho ukuthi: ‘Izono zakho zixololwe,’ kukho nokuthi: ‘Vuka uhambe’?" 
Luke5:24 Ke ukuze nazi ukuba yena *uNyana woLuntu unalo igunya lokuxolela izono emhlabeni apha – úthi kofe umzimba – ndithi kuwe: ‘Vuka, uthathe ukhuko lwakho, uhambe ugoduke!’ ”" 
Luke5:25 Waphakama kwangoko bemjongile, waluthatha ukhuko abelele kulo, wagoduka ebulela uThixo." 
Luke5:26 Bamangaliswa ke bonke, bamdumisa uThixo, besoyika kakhulu, besithi: “Sibone umhlola namhlanje.”" 
Luke5:27 Emva koko uYesu waphuma, waza wabona umqokeleli-rhafu, ogama linguLevi, ehleli eofisini yerhafu; wathi kuye: “Ndilandele.”" 
Luke5:28 Washiya konke ke, wamlandela." 
Luke5:29 ULevi ke wamenzela isidlo esikhulu uYesu endlwini yakhe. Kweso sidlo kwakukho iqela elikhulu labaqokeleli-rhafu nabanye abantu. 
Luke5:30 Ke *abaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho babebakrokrela abafundi bakaYesu, besithi: “Yini na ukuba nitye nisele kunye nabaqokeleli-rhafu *naboni?”" 
Luke5:31 Wabaphendula uYesu esithi: “Ugqirha akafuneki nganto kwabaphilileyo, ufuneka kwabagulayo." 
Luke5:32 Andizanga kubiza malungisa, ndize kubiza aboni, ukuba baguquke.”" 
Luke5:33 Ke kaloku abantu abathile bathi kuYesu: “Kutheni na ukuba abafundi bakaYohane *nababaFarasi basoloko bezila ukutya, bethandaza, kanti bona abakho bayatya basele?”" 
Luke5:34 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Ngaba abakhaphi bomyeni ninokubazilisa na ukutya umyeni esenabo? 
Luke5:35 Hayi, kodwa yofika yona imini yokuba umyeni asuswe kubo. Ngaloo mini ke baya kukuzila ukutya.”" 
Luke5:36 Ke kaloku uYesu wathetha umzekeliso kubo, esithi: “Akukho mntu uthatha isiziba kwisambatho esitsha asithungele kwesidala, hleze asonakalise isambatho esitsha, sibe isiziba eso singasilungeli nesidala." 
Luke5:37 Kananjalo akukho mntu uyitha kwiimvaba ezindala iwayini entsha engekabili; kuba, ukuba uthe wenjenjalo, iwayini leyo yobila, izigqabhuze iimvaba, ichitheke, zonakale nezo mvaba." 
Luke5:38 Iwayini engekabili mayithiwe kwiimvaba ezintsha. 
Luke5:39 Kananjalo akukho mntu uthi, esele iwayini endala, athande nengekatsali, kuba uthi: ‘Endala inencasa!’ ”" 
Luke6:1 Kwathi uYesu ecanda emasimini *ngoMhla woPhumlo, abafundi bakhe bakha izikhwebu zengqolowa, bazichuba, batya." 
Luke6:2 Ke abathile *bakubaFarasi bathi kubo: “Kungani na ukuba nenze okungavumelekanga ngoMhla wokuPhumla?” 
Luke6:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Anizange nikufunde na oko wakwenzayo uDavide mhla walamba yena neqela lakhe? 
Luke6:4 Kaloku wangena *endlwini kaThixo, wazithatha wazitya izonka ezazinikelwe kuThixo, wanika neqela lakhe. Kanti ke ngokomthetho ezo zonka azimelwe kutyiwa ngabangengobabingeleli.”" 
Luke6:5 Waza ke wathi kubo: “UNyana woLuntu uyiNkosi yawo noMhla woPhumlo.” 
Luke6:6 Ngomnye *uMhla woPhumlo uYesu wangena endlwini yesikhungo wafundisa. Apho kwakukho umntu owome isandla sokunene. 
Luke6:7 Babemlalele abachazi-mthetho *nabaFarasi, befuna ukubona ukuba wophilisa na ngoMhla woPhumlo, khon' ukuze bafumane isizathu sokummangalela." 
Luke6:8 UYesu ke wayezazi iingcamango zabo, waza wathi kuloo mntu wayome isandla: “Phakama, uze ngaphambili.” Waphakama ke, wema apho." 
Luke6:9 Waza wathi uYesu: “Ndixeleleni: okuvumelekileyo ngoMhla wokuPhumla kukwenza okulungileyo, okanye kukwenza okubi; kukuphilisa umntu, okanye kukubulala, kusini na?”" 
Luke6:10 Akuba ebasingasingile bonke, wathi kuloo mntu: “Solule isandla sakho.” Wenjenjalo ke, saza saphila isandla sakhe." 
Luke6:11 Basuka ke bona bajwaqeka ngumsindo, bebuzana bodwa ukuba bangamthini na uYesu." 
Luke6:12 Kwathi ngaloo mihla uYesu waphuma, wasinga entabeni, esiya kuthandaza. Wachitha ubusuku bonke ezibika kuThixo." 
Luke6:13 Kwakusa wababizela kuye abafundi bakhe, wanyula kubo balishumi elinambini, awababiza ngelokuba ngabathunywa." 
Luke6:14 Yayingâba: USimon, awamthiya ngelokuba nguPetros, noAndreya umntakwabo; uYakobi noYohane; uFilipu noBhartolomeyu;" 
Luke6:15 uMatewu noTomas; uYakobi, lo ka-Alifeyu, noSimon ekuthiwa liTsha-ntliziyo;" 
Luke6:16 uJudas kaYakobi, noJudas Sikariyoti, owaba ngumngcatshi." 
Luke6:17 UYesu wehla nabo entabeni, wema endaweni ethe tyaba, eneqela elikhulu labafundi bakhe, nenkitha enkulu yabantu, bevela kulo lonke elakwaJuda, naseJerusalem, nakuwo ummandla ongaselwandle ojikeleze iTire neSidon," 
Luke6:18 beze kumphulaphula nokuba abaphilise kwizifo zabo. 
Luke6:19 Yonke loo nkitha yabantu yayifuna ukumchukumisa, kuba wayenamandla okuphilisa, bephila bonke." 
Luke6:20 UYesu ebakhangele abafundi bakhe, wathi: “Hayi uyolo lwenu, nina basweleyo, kuba nilawulwa nguThixo!" 
Luke6:21 Hayi uyolo lwenu, nina balambayo ngoku, kuba niya kuhlutha! Hayi uyolo lwenu, nina balilayo ngoku, kuba niya kuhleka!" 
Luke6:22 “Hayi uyolo lwenu xa abantu bathe banithiya ngenxa yakhe *uNyana woLuntu, benigxotha, beningcikiva, benihlamba okwabancanyiweyo." 
Luke6:23 Ze nivuye ngaloo mini, nisuke imitsi; kuba ngenene umvuzo wenu mkhulu ezulwini. Kaloku babesenjenjalo ooyise kubo *abashumayeli bamandulo." 
Luke6:24 “Kodwa mawoo, nina zityebi! Senilufumene ulonwabo lwenu nina kaloku." 
Luke6:25 Mawoo, nina bahluthayo ngoku! Nina niya kulamba. Mawoo, nina bahlekayo ngoku! Niya kukhedama nilile nina." 
Luke6:26 “Kunyembelekile xa bathe bathetha kakuhle ngani bonke abantu! Kaloku babesenjenjalo ooyise kubashumayeli abaxokayo.” 
Luke6:27 “Ke mna ndithi kuni, nina nindivayo: Zithandeni iintshaba zenu, nibenzele okulungileyo abo banithiyileyo." 
Luke6:28 Basikeleleni abo baniqalekisayo, nibathandazele abo banigxekayo." 
Luke6:29 Lowo ukubetha esidleleni, mnike nesinye. Okohlutha isivatho sakho sangaphezulu, ungamaleli nesangaphantsi." 
Luke6:30 Bonke abacela kuwe, baphe. Kothatha izinto zakho uzungabuye uzibize." 
Luke6:31 Benzeleni okulungileyo abanye abantu ngolo hlobo ninga banganenzela ngalo okulungileyo. 
Luke6:32 “Ukuba nithanda abo banithandayo bodwa, ninanzuzoni? Kaloku naboni bayabathanda abo babathandayo!" 
Luke6:33 Xa nithi nenze okulungileyo kwabanenzela okulungileyo bodwa, ninanzuzoni? Kaloku naboni benza kwaloo nto!" 
Luke6:34 Xa nithi niboleke abo nithembe ukubuyiselwa ngabo bodwa, ninanzuzoni? Kaloku naboni bayabolekana, ukuze babuyiselane." 
Luke6:35 Ke nina, zithandeni iintshaba zenu, nenze okulungileyo; niboleke ningathembanga mbuyiselo. Woba mkhulu ke umvuzo wenu, nibe ngoonyana bakaThixo uPhezukonke, kuba yena unobubele kwabangabuleliyo nabakhohlakeleyo." 
Luke6:36 Ngoko ke yibani nenceba, njengokuba naye uYihlo enenceba.”" 
Luke6:37 “Musani ukugweba; nani ke aniyi kugwetywa nguThixo. Musani ukugxeka; nani ke aniyi kugxekwa nguThixo. Xolelani; nani ke niya kuxolelwa nguThixo. 
Luke6:38 Yiphani; nani ke niya kuphiwa nguThixo. Ewe, nophiwa isabelo esihle, esipheleleyo, esigalelwa engubeni yenu. Indlela enabela abanye ngayo, nani niya kwabelwa kwangayo nguThixo.”" 
Luke6:39 UYesu ke wabenzela umzekeliso, wathi: “Ngaba imfama inokuyikhokela na enye imfama? Aziyi kuthi zombini zeyele emhadini yini na?" 
Luke6:40 Akukho mfundi mkhulu kunomfundisi wakhe; xa afundiswe ngokupheleleyo, uya kwandula abe njengomfundisi wakhe." 
Luke6:41 “Yini na ukuba usibone isibi esiselisweni lowenu, kanti wona umqadi okwelakho iliso akuwuboni?" 
Luke6:42 Ungáthini na ukuba nako ukuthi kuwenu: ‘Wethu, khawume ndisikhuphe isibi esiselisweni lakho,’ ukanti wena akuwuboni umqadi okwelakho iliso? Mhanahanisindini, qala ukhuphe umqadi lowo ukwelakho iliso! Wobona kakuhle ke, ube nako ukusikhupha isibi esiselisweni lowenu.”" 
Luke6:43 “Akukho mthi mhle uvelisa iziqhamo ezibi; kananjalo akukho mthi mbi uvelisa iziqhamo ezihle. 
Luke6:44 Kaloku umthi wonke waziwa ngeziqhamo zawo. Amakhiwane akakhiwa emngeni; kananjalo iidiliya azivunwa elubobeni. 
Luke6:45 Umntu olungileyo uvelisa ukulunga okuphuma entliziyweni yakhe. Ke okhohlakeleyo uvelisa inkohlakalo ephuma entliziyweni yakhe. Kaloku loo nto intliziyo iphuphuma yiyo iphuma ngomlomo.” 
Luke6:46 “Yini na ukuba nithi kum: ‘Nkosi, Nkosi!’ kanti noko anikwenzi endikuthethayo?" 
Luke6:47 Ke wonke umntu ozayo kum, aweve amazwi am awenze," 
Luke6:48 ufana nomntu owayesakha indlu, waza wemba ngokunzulu, wenza isiseko samatye. Kwathi ke, kwakubakho isikhukula iimpuphuma zagaleleka kuloo ndlu, zaza azaba nako ukuyishukumisa, kuba yayakhiwe ngokufanelekileyo." 
Luke6:49 Kodwa owavileyo amazwi am waza akawenza, yena ufana nomntu owakhe indlu phezu komhlaba, kungekho siseko. Kwathi ke, zakugaleleka kuyo iimpuphuma, yawa kwangoko, yadilika didli!”" 
Luke7:1 Akuba uYesu egqibile ukuwathetha la mazwi ephulaphulwe ngabantu, waya kungena eKapernahum." 
Luke7:2 Ke apho kwakukho mphathi-butho uthile wamajoni osicaka sakhe asithandayo sasigulela ukufa. 
Luke7:3 Uthe ke akuva ngoYesu, wathumela kuye amadoda amakhulu amaJuda, ecela ukuba eze kusiphilisa isicaka sakhe." 
Luke7:4 Akufika kuYesu, ambongoza enyamekile, esithi: “Mncede lo mntu," 
Luke7:5 kuba uyaluthanda uhlanga lwethu; wada wasakhela *nendlu yesikhungo.” 
Luke7:6 UYesu wahamba nabo. Kwathi ke xa akufuphi nomzi lowo, umphathi-butho wathumela kuye ngezihlobo, esithi: “Nkosi ungàzikhathazi, kuba andifanelekanga ukuba ungade ungene endlwini yam." 
Luke7:7 Mna ngokwam andifanelanga ukuba ndize kuwe. Thetha nje ilizwi: sophila isicaka sam. 
Luke7:8 Nam ndingumntu obekwe phantsi kwegunya, kwaye ndinamajoni aphantsi kwam: kweli ndithi: ‘Yiya,’ liye; kweliya: ‘Yiza,’ lize; kwisicaka sam: ‘Yenza oku,’ sikwenze.”" 
Luke7:9 Ezivile uYesu ezi zinto, wamangaliswa, wajika wathi kwindimbane eyayimlandela: “Ndithi kuni, nkqu nakwaSirayeli andifumananga lukholo lungaka.”" 
Luke7:10 Kwathi ke bakubuyela endlwini abo babethunyiwe, basifumana isicaka siphilile." 
Luke7:11 Emva koko uYesu waya edolophini ekuthiwa yiNayin, ekunye neqela labafundi bakhe, nendimbane enkulu." 
Luke7:12 Ke kaloku, akusondela esangweni ledolophu leyo, nako kuthwalelwa phandle umntu ofileyo. Umfi lowo wayekuphela konyana womhlolokazi. Loo mhlolokazi wayephelekwe yindimbane enkulu yasedolophini apho." 
Luke7:13 Ithe ke iNkosi, yakumbona, yavelana naye, yathi kuye: “Sukulila.”" 
Luke7:14 Yasondela iNkosi, yawachukumisa amanqwanqwa ababemthwele ngawo umfi, baza bema ababemthwele. Yathi: “Mfanandini, vuka!”" 
Luke7:15 Wavuka wathi qwa umfi lowo, waza wathetha. INkosi ke yamnikela kunina." 
Luke7:16 Bonke ke bangenwa luloyiko, bamdumisa uThixo, besithi: “Kuvele *umshumayeli omkhulu phakathi kwethu;” batsho besithi: “UThixo ubavelele abantu bakhe.”" 
Luke7:17 Ke ezi ndaba zingaye uYesu zavakala kulo lonke elakwaJuda, nakuwo wonke loo mmandla." 
Luke7:18 Abafundi bakaYohane bambalisela zonke ezi zinto. UYohane ke, ebize babini kubafundi bakhe," 
Luke7:19 wabathuma ukuba babuze kwiNkosi bathi: “Ungulowo uzayo na wena, okanye masilinde omnye?”" 
Luke7:20 Efikile ke kuYesu, amadoda lawo athi: “UYohane umbhaptizi usithume kuwe esithi: ‘Ungulowo uzayo na wena, okanye masilinde omnye?’ ”" 
Luke7:21 Ke kaloku, kwangelo xesha, uYesu wayephilisa abaninzi kwizifo zabo, nakwizibetho zabo, nakwiindimoni, waza neemfama ezininzi wazinika ukubona." 
Luke7:22 Waphendula ke uYesu wathi kuwo: “Hambani niye kumbalisela uYohane izinto enizibonileyo nenizivileyo; okokuba iimfama zibuya zibone, iziqhwala ziyahamba, abaneqhenqa bayahlanjululwa, izithulu ziyeva, abafileyo bayavuswa, abasweleyo bayazishunyayezwa iindaba ezimnandi." 
Luke7:23 Unoyolo ke othe akakhutyekiswa ndim!” 
Luke7:24 Bakuba bemkile abathunywa bakaYohane, uYesu wathetha ngoYohane kwisihlwele, esithi: “Naphuma nisiya kubona ntoni na entlango? Yayiyingcongolo na, izanya-zanyiswa ngumoya?" 
Luke7:25 Naphuma nisiya kubona ntoni na kakade? Yayingumntu ohombileyo na? Niyabona, abo banxiba izivatho eziqaqambileyo, badle amanqatha elizwe, ngabasezindlwini zookumkani." 
Luke7:26 Ngaba naphuma nisiya kubona ntoni na kakade? Yayingumshumayeli na? Ewe, ndithi kuni, nibone oyena *ungumshumayeli ngokupheleleyo." 
Luke7:27 UYohane ngulowo uThixo atshoyo ngaye eziBhalweni ukuthi: “ ‘Naso isigidimi sam esiya kukwandulela, sikugabulele izigcawu.’" 
Luke7:28 “Ndithi kuni, kubo bonke abazelwe kweli hlabathi akukho bani mkhulu kunoYohane; kanti noyena mncinane ùphantsi kolawulo olutsha lukaThixo mkhulu kunaye.”" 
Luke7:29 Bakukuva oku, bonke abantu, kwanabaqokeleli-rhafu, bakungqina ukulunga kukaThixo, ekubeni babebhaptiziwe ngobhaptizo lukaYohane." 
Luke7:30 Ke bona *abaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho balidela icebo likaThixo lokubasindisa, kuba babengavumanga ukubhaptizwa nguYohane." 
Luke7:31 UYesu yena wayesithi: “Ndingabafanisa nantoni na ke ngoko abantu besi sizukulwana? 
Luke7:32 Bafana nabantwana abahleli ebaleni lembutho, abanye bebhekisa kwabanye besithi: “ ‘Sanombelela, naza anaxhentsa; sanihlabelela ingoma yesililo, naza nina analila!’" 
Luke7:33 “Kaloku wafika uYohane umbhaptizi, ezila ukutya, engaseli wayini, naza nina nathi: ‘Unendimoni.’" 
Luke7:34 Ufikile ke yena *uNyana woLuntu, esidla, esela; naza nina nathi: ‘Khanibone, nanku umntu onyolukileyo, oyindlamanzi, umhlobo wabaqokeleli-rhafu *naboni!’" 
Luke7:35 Kambe ke ubulumko bukaThixo bubonakaliswa buyinyaniso kubo bonke ababamkeleyo.” 
Luke7:36 *UmFarasi othile wamema uYesu ukuba aye kutya kwakhe. UYesu ke wangena endlwini yomFarasi lowo, waya kuhlala etafileni." 
Luke7:37 Kuloo dolophu kwakukho umfazi *owayengumoni, owathi, akuva ukuba uYesu usendlwini yomFarasi lowo, weza ephethe iqhaga lelitye lelabhastile, linamafutha aqholiweyo." 
Luke7:38 Waya kuma ngasemva koYesu, ngasezinyaweni zakhe, elila; waza wazifefa iinyawo zakhe ngeenyembezi, wazisula ngeenwele zakhe, wazanga iinyawo zakhe, wazithambisa ngamafutha lawo." 
Luke7:39 Akukubona oko umFarasi lowo wayememe uYesu, uthethe yedwa esithi: “Ukuba lo mntu *ebengumshumayeli, ngesazi ukuba ngubani, eluhlobo luni na, lo mfazi umchukumisayo; kuba ungumoni.”" 
Luke7:40 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “He Simon, yiva apha!” Wathi ke yena: “Yitsho, Mfundisi.”" 
Luke7:41 Wathi uYesu: “Kwakukho mbolekisi-mali uthile, enabantu ababini abanamatyala kuye. Omnye wayenetyala elingangeerandi ezimakhulu mahlanu, omnye ke zingamashumi amahlanu." 
Luke7:42 Ekubeni bengenanto bangahlawula ngayo, usuke wabaxolela bobabini. Khawutsho ke, nguwuphi kubo oya kumthanda ngakumbi?”" 
Luke7:43 Waphendula uSimon wathi: “Ndiba ngulowo uxolelwe ngokungaphezulu.” Wathi kuye: “Uchane ucwethe!” 
Luke7:44 Wajika ke uYesu, wakhangela kumfazi lowo, wathi kuSimon: “Uyambona ke lo mfazi? Ndingené endlwini yakho, waza wena akwandinika amanzi okuhlamba iinyawo zam; kanti ke yena iinyawo zam uzihlambe ngeenyembezi zakhe, wazisula ngeenwele zakhe." 
Luke7:45 Akundanganga wena; kanti yena, okoko ndingenileyo, akayekanga ukuzanga iinyawo zam." 
Luke7:46 Intloko yam akuyithambisanga ngamafutha; kanti yena iinyawo zam uzithambise ngamafutha aqholiweyo. 
Luke7:47 Ngenxa yoko ke, ndithi kuwe: olu thando lwakhe lungaka lubonakalisa okokuba izono zakhe ebezizininzi zixolelwe. Kanti ke yena oxolelwe kancinane, ukwathanda kancinane.”" 
Luke7:48 UYesu ke wathi kuloo mfazi: “Izono zakho zixolelwe.” 
Luke7:49 Baza abo babehleli naye etafileni bathi omnye komnye: “Ngaba ngubani na lo uxolela nezono?” 
Luke7:50 UYesu ke wathi kumfazi lowo: “Ukholo lwakho lukusindisile; hamba ngoxolo.” 
Luke8:1 Kwathi emva koko uYesu watyhutyha iidolophu ngeedolophu neelali ngeelali, evakalisa eshumayela iindaba ezimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo. Wayehamba nabafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini." 
Luke8:2 Kwakukho nabafazi abathile ababephiliswe kwiindimoni nasebulwelweni. YayinguMariya ekuthiwa ngowaseMagadala, ekwakuphume kuye iindimoni ezisixhenxe," 
Luke8:3 noYohana, umka-Kuza, igosa likaHerode, noSusana, kwanabanye abaninzi. Bona babelungiselela uYesu nabafundi bakhe." 
Luke8:4 Ke kaloku, kwakuba kuhlanganisene isihlwele esikhulu, kusuke abantu beelali ngeelali beza kuye, uYesu wathetha nabo ngomzekeliso, esithi:" 
Luke8:5 “Umhlwayeli waphuma waya kuhlwayela imbewu yakhe. Ekuhlwayeleni kwakhe enye yawa ngasendleleni, yanyathelwa, zathi iintaka zayichola-chola zayigqiba." 
Luke8:6 Yimbi yawa elulwalweni, yathi isantshula yatsha ngenxa yokuba umhlaba ubungafumanga." 
Luke8:7 Yimbi yawa phakathi kokhula, lwasuka ukhula lwakhula kunye nayo, lwayiminxa." 
Luke8:8 Yimbi yawa kumhlaba olungileyo, yakhula, yathwala isiqhamo ngokuphindwe kalikhulu.” Etshilo ke wadanduluka esithi: “Oneendlebe zokuva makeve!”" 
Luke8:9 Ke abafundi bakaYesu bambuza besithi: “Ngaba uthetha ntoni na lo mzekeliso?” 
Luke8:10 Wathi ke yena: “Nikuphiwe nina okokuba nizazi iimfihlelo ezingolawulo lukaThixo, kodwa abo bangakuphiwanga baziva ngemizekeliso nje, ukuze, njengoko zitshoyo iziBhalo ukuthi: “ ‘Bebona nje, bangaboni; besiva nje, bangaqondi.’”" 
Luke8:11 “Ke kaloku lo mzekeliso uchazwa kanje: Imbewu le lilizwi likaThixo. 
Luke8:12 Abo bangasendleleni ngabo bevayo, aze eze umtyholi alisuse ilizwi ezintliziyweni zabo, ukuze bangakholwa basindiswe." 
Luke8:13 Abo ke baselulwalweni ngabathi, bakuliva ilizwi, balamkele ngovuyo, kodwa babe bengenazingcambu zendeleyo, kuba bakholwa okomzuzwana, ze bathi bakuhendwa, balahle." 
Luke8:14 Leyo yawayo elukhuleni, ngabo bathi bevile baminxwe ekuhambeni kwabo ngamaxhala nobutyebi neziyolo zobu bomi, baze bangavelisi ziqhamo." 
Luke8:15 Ke leyo isemhlabeni omhle ngabo bathi ngentliziyo entle, elungileyo, bakuliva ilizwi, balibambe, bathwale iziqhamo benomonde.”" 
Luke8:16 “Akukho bani uthi, esilumekile isibane, asigqume ngesitya, okanye asifake ngaphantsi kwebhedi. Usixhoma endaweni yaso, ukuze abangenayo bakhanyiselwe." 
Luke8:17 Kaloku akukho nto ifihlakeleyo ingayi kude ityhilwe; kananjalo akukho nto ifihliweyo ingayi kude ivele, yaziwe." 
Luke8:18 “Ze nive kakuhle ke; kuba lowo unolutho uya kunikwa, athi lowo ungenanto ahluthwe kwanaloo nto aba unayo.”" 
Luke8:19 Ke kaloku abantakwabo nonina kaYesu bafika, kodwa àbaba nako ukufikelela kuye ngenxa yesihlwele." 
Luke8:20 Waxelelwa ke kusithiwa: “Nanku unyoko nabantakwenu ngaphandle, befuna ukukubona.”" 
Luke8:21 Waphendula yena wathi kubo: “Umama nabantakwethu ngâbo bathi bakuliva ilizwi likaThixo balenze.” 
Luke8:22 Kwathi ngamhla uthile uYesu waya kukhwela esikhitshaneni kuLwandle lwaseGalili. Babekho nabafundi bakhe, waza wathi kubo: “Masiwele siye ngaphesheya.” Banduluka ke." 
Luke8:23 Ekuhambeni kwabo uYesu walala ubuthongo. Kwavuka isaqhwithi elwandle, isikhitshana sazala ngamanzi, baba sengozini." 
Luke8:24 Baza abafundi bamvusa uYesu, besithi: “Mhlekazi, safa!” Wavuka ke uYesu, wawukhalimela umoya namaza alatyuzayo. Wadamba umoya, amaza ayeka ukulatyuza, kwabakho ukuzola." 
Luke8:25 Waza wathi kubo: “Luphi na ukholo lwenu?” Bona ke babesoyika, bemangalisiwe, besithi omnye komnye: “He bethu, ngumntu onjani lo ude alulanyelwe ngumoya nangamanzi!”" 
Luke8:26 Ke kaloku bahamba ngesikhitshana, baya ezweni lamaGergesa, elikhangelene nelaseGalili." 
Luke8:27 Kwathi uYesu akuphumela emhlabeni, wahlangatyezwa yindoda ethile yaloo dolophu, eyayiphethwe ziindimoni. Yayinexesha elide ihamba ze, ingahlali ndlwini, ihlala emangcwabeni." 
Luke8:28 Ithe ke, yakumbona uYesu, yakhala, yawa phambi kwakhe, isithi ngezwi elikhulu: “Ufuna ntoni kum, Yesu, Nyana kaThixo uPhezukonke? Ndiyakubongoza ukuba ungandithuthumbisi.”" 
Luke8:29 Yatsho kuba uYesu wayeyikhalimele indimoni ukuba iphume kuyo, kuba kwakukaninzi le ndimoni iyihlasela, ize ke igcinwe ngokubotshwa ngamatyathanga nangamakhamandela, kanti yayisuka iziqhawule izibophelelo, isiwe entlango yindimoni leyo." 
Luke8:30 UYesu ke wayibuza esithi: “Ungubani wena igama lakho?” Yathi yona: “NdinguMkhosi,” kuba yayingenwe ziindimoni ezininzi." 
Luke8:31 Iindimoni ezi zazimbongoza uYesu ukuba angazigxotheli enzonzobileni. 
Luke8:32 Kwakukho umhlambi omkhulu weehagu usidla apho entabeni, zaza zambongoza ukuba azivumele ziye kungena kuwo. Wazivumela." 
Luke8:33 Zaphuma ke iindimoni endodeni leyo, zangena ezihagwini, waza umhlambi lowo waphaphatheka, wehla ethambekeni, waya kweyela elwandle, warhaxwa." 
Luke8:34 Bakukubona okwenzekileyo, abo babezalusa ezi hagu babaleka, baya kukuxela edolophini nasemaphandleni okuhlileyo." 
Luke8:35 Baphuma ke abantu, baya kuyibona loo nto yenzekileyo. Bafika kuYesu, bayifumana loo ndoda wayekhuphe kuyo iindimoni ihleli phantsi ngakuYesu, inxibile, inengqondo; baza ke boyika." 
Luke8:36 Abo babekubonile okwenzekileyo babaxelela ngendlela yokuphiliswa kwendoda eyayiphethwe ziindimoni. 
Luke8:37 Yaza yonke loo nkitha yommandla wamaGergesa yambongoza uYesu ukuba emke khona, kuba babesoyika kakhulu. UYesu ke waya kungena esikhitshaneni, wemka." 
Luke8:38 Ke kaloku indoda leyo zazikhutshwe kuyo iindimoni yayimbongoza uYesu, ifuna ukuhamba naye, kodwa uYesu wayindulula, esithi:" 
Luke8:39 “Goduka, uyibalise into oyenzelwe nguThixo.” Yemka ke, yahamba iyibalisa kuyo yonke idolophu loo nto iyenzelwe nguYesu." 
Luke8:40 Kwathi akubuya uYesu, izihlwele zamamkela, kuba bonke babemlindile." 
Luke8:41 Kwabonakala kusiza indoda egama linguJayiro, eyayiligosa lendlu yesikhungo. Yona yazikhahlela phantsi ngasezinyaweni zikaYesu, yambongoza ukuba eze endlwini yayo," 
Luke8:42 kuba yayigulelwa yintombi yayo iqhawuka. Le yayikukuphela kwentombi yayo, iminyaka ngathi ilishumi elinambini izelwe. Ke kaloku ekuyeni kukaYesu apho, izihlwele zazimxinile." 
Luke8:43 Ke umfazi owayehlamba engaphezi iminyaka elishumi elinambini, engenakuphiliswa bani," 
Luke8:44 usondele ngasemva, wachukumisa umqukumbelo wesambatho sakhe, lanqamka kwangoko igazi." 
Luke8:45 UYesu wathi: “Ngubani lo undichukumisileyo?” Bakungazi ke bonke, uPetros wathi: “Mhlekazi, isihlwele sikungqongile, sikuxinile.”" 
Luke8:46 Kodwa uYesu wathi: “Ukho ondichukumisileyo, kuba ndiyaqonda ukuba akho amandla aphumileyo kum.”" 
Luke8:47 Uthe ke umfazi lowo, ebona ukuba ubhaqiwe, weza engcangcazela, wazikhahlela phambi kwakhe, waxela phambi kwabo bonke abantu ukuba umchukumisele ntoni na, ekuxela nokuphiliswa kwakhe ngesikhawu." 
Luke8:48 UYesu ke uthe kuye: “Ntombi yam, ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile; hamba ngoxolo!”" 
Luke8:49 Kwathi uYesu esathetha, kwafika mntu uthile, evela emzini wegosa lendlu yesikhungo, wathi kulo: “Intombi yakho ayisekho. Sukuba samkhathaza uMfundisi.”" 
Luke8:50 Eyivile ke le nto uYesu, uphendule wathi: “Sukoyika; kholwa nje wena. Yophiliswa.”" 
Luke8:51 UYesu ke, efikile endlwini, akavumelanga mntu ukuba angene kunye naye, ngaphandle koPetros noYohane noYakobi noyise nonina wentombi leyo." 
Luke8:52 Babelila bonke, besenza isijwili; waza wathi: “Sanukulila! Ayifanga; ilele nje le ntombazana.”" 
Luke8:53 Basuka bamwa ngentsini, besazi ukuba ibhubhile." 
Luke8:54 Ke yena wayibamba ngesandla, wayibiza esithi: “Ntombazana, vuka!”" 
Luke8:55 Wabuya umoya wayo, yaphakama kwangoko; waza wayalela ukuba inikwe ukutya." 
Luke8:56 Bamangaliseka abazali bayo, waza wabayala ukuba bangayixeleli mntu loo nto yenzekileyo." 
Luke9:1 Ke kaloku uYesu ubabizele ndawonye abafundi bakhe abalishumi elinambini, wabanika amandla negunya lokoyisa zonke iindimoni, nokuphilisa izifo." 
Luke9:2 Wabathuma ukuba bashumayele bavakalise ulawulo lukaThixo, baphilise nemilwelwe." 
Luke9:3 Wathi kubo: “Ze ningaphathi nto yandlela: nokuba ngumsimelelo, nokuba yingxowa, nokuba sisonka, nokuba yimali. Ningaphathi zambatho ngazibini." 
Luke9:4 Nasemzini enithe nafikela kuwo, hlalani khona nide nimke kuloo ndawo." 
Luke9:5 Apho sukuba benganamkeli, manithi ekuphumeni kwenu kuloo dolophu, niluvuthulule nothuli olusezinyaweni zenu, ukuze oko kube bubungqina bokuba abanamkelanga.”" 
Luke9:6 Baphuma ke, bazityhutyha iidolophana, beshumayela iindaba ezimnandi, bephilisa kuzo zonke iindawo." 
Luke9:7 UHerode, owayephethe kuloo mmandla, waziva zonke izinto ezenziweyo nguYesu. Wasuka wanexhala, kuba kwakusithiwa: “Kuvuke uYohane kwabafileyo;”" 
Luke9:8 kusithiwa: “Kubonakele uEliya;” kusithiwa ngabanye: “Kubuye kwavuka *umshumayeli wexesha lamanyange.” 
Luke9:9 UHerode ke wathi: “Ndamnqumla intloko nje uYohane. Ngaba ngubani ke lo ndiva kuthethwa ezi zinto ngaye?” Watsho wafuna ukumbona. 
Luke9:10 Ekubuyeni kwabo *abathunywa bamxelela uYesu oko bakwenzileyo. Wabathatha ke, wemka nabo, waya kwidolophu ekuthiwa yiBhetesayida." 
Luke9:11 Sithe isihlwele, sikwazile oko, samlandela; waza uYesu wasamkela, wathetha naso ngolawulo lukaThixo, ephilisa abo baswele impilo." 
Luke9:12 Yakuba ke isimka imini, abafundi abalishumi elinambini bathe kuYesu: “Sindulule isihlwele, abantu bemke, baye ezidolophini ezijikelezileyo nasezilalini, balale, bafumane ukutya, kuba apha sikwindawo engenamizi.”" 
Luke9:13 Ke yena wathi kubo: “Bapheni nina ukutya, batye.” Bathi bona: “Sinezonka ezihlanu neentlanzi ezimbini kuphela. Asinakubatyisa ngaphandle kokuba siye kubathengela ukutya bonke aba bantu.”" 
Luke9:14 (Kwakukho amadoda akumawaka amahlanu.) Wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Bahlaliseni babe ngamaqela ngamaqela, iqela ngalinye libe ngamashumi amahlanu.”" 
Luke9:15 Benjenjalo ke, babahlalisa phantsi bonke." 
Luke9:16 Ezithathile ezo zonka zihlanu nezo ntlanzi zimbini, ukhangele ezulwini, wabulela, waziqhekeza, wamana enika abafundi bakhe ukuba babele isihlwele." 
Luke9:17 Badla ke bahlutha bonke, kwaza kwaqokelelwa iingobozi ezilishumi elinambini zokutya okuseleyo." 
Luke9:18 Kwathi uYesu ethandaza bucala enabafundi bakhe, wababuza esithi: “Ngaba izihlwele ezi zithi ndingubani?”" 
Luke9:19 Baphendula bona bathi: “Kuthiwa unguYohane umbhaptizi. Abanye bathi unguEliya. Kanti abanye bathi kubuye kwavuka mshumayeli uthile wamandulo.” 
Luke9:20 Wathi kubo: “Ke nina nithi ndingubani?” Waphendula uPetros wathi: “Unguye *uKrestu kaThixo.” 
Luke9:21 UYesu wabayala ngqongqo ukuba le nto bangayithethi mntwini. 
Luke9:22 Waza wathi uYesu: “*UNyana woLuntu umelwe kukuba eve ubunzima obukhulu; achaswe ngamadoda amakhulu, nangababingeleli abaziintloko, nangabachazi-mthetho; aze abulawe, athi emva kweentsuku ezintathu abuye avuke.”" 
Luke9:23 UYesu ke wabhekisa kubo bonke wathi: “Osukuba ethanda ukundilandela makazincame, awuthwale umnqamlezo wakhe imihla ngemihla, andilandele;" 
Luke9:24 kuba othe wabukokosa ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo; kodwa othe wabuncama ubomi bakhe ngenxa yam, wobusindisa." 
Luke9:25 Kuba kaloku komnceda ntoni na umntu ukuba uthe walizuza ihlabathi liphela, abe yena ezilahlile okanye onakalelwe?" 
Luke9:26 Kuba othe waneentloni ngam, nangamazwi am, naye uNyana woLuntu woba neentloni ngaye, xa eza esewongeni lakhe nelikaYise nelezithunywa ezingcwele." 
Luke9:27 Inene, kukho abathile kwabakhoyo apha abangayi kuze beve kufa, bade balubone ulawulo olutsha lukaThixo.”" 
Luke9:28 Kwathi, malunga neveki emva kokuba uYesu ezithethile ezi zinto, wathatha uPetros noYohane noYakobi, wenyuka nabo waya entabeni, esiya kuthandaza." 
Luke9:29 Kwathi ethandaza njalo, ubuso bakhe babonakala bububumbi, nesambatho sakhe siqaqambile, simenyezela." 
Luke9:30 Kwavela amadoda amabini, uMosis noEliya, bathetha naye." 
Luke9:31 Babebengezela, baza bancokola naye ngokunduluka kwakhe okwakumele ukuba seJerusalem." 
Luke9:32 Ke kaloku uPetros nâbo babenaye basindwa bubuthongo, kodwa bakuthi balulu, babubona ubuqaqawuli bukaYesu, bewabona naloo madoda mabini ayemi naye." 
Luke9:33 Ke akwahlukana noYesu la madoda, uPetros wathi kuye: “Ngxatsho ke ukuba sibe lapha, Mhlekazi! Masakhe amaphempe abe mathathu: elinye libe lelakho, elinye libe lelikaMosis, elinye libe lelikaEliya.” (Watsho engayazi into ayithethayo.)" 
Luke9:34 Kwathi ke esatsho, kwabakho ilifu elibagubungelayo. Boyika ke abafundi bakungena efini ooMosis." 
Luke9:35 Kwabakho nelizwi liphuma efini apho, lisithi: “Lo nguNyana wam onyuliweyo; mveni yena.”" 
Luke9:36 Lakutsho ke elo lizwi, uYesu bambona seleyedwa. Abafundi bazigcina ezo zinto babezibonile, àbaxelela mntu ngazo ngaloo mihla." 
Luke9:37 Ke kaloku ngomhla olandelayo, xa babehlile entabeni, uYesu wahlangatyezwa sisihlwele." 
Luke9:38 Kwavela indoda esihlweleni apho, ikhwaza isithi: “Mfundisi, ndiyakubongoza, khawundincede ngonyana wam okuphela kwakhe." 
Luke9:39 Ùsuka ahlaselwe yindimoni, atsho ngesikhalo, aquleke, alephuze amagwebu. Uphatheka kakubi yile ndimoni, kube nzima ukwahlukana nayo." 
Luke9:40 Ndibabongozile abafundi bakho ukuba bayikhuphe, kodwa boyiswa.”" 
Luke9:41 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Sizukulwanandini esingakholwayo, esigwenxa, koda kube nini na ndinani, ndininyamezele? Mzise apha unyana wakho.”" 
Luke9:42 Eseza ke, indimoni isuke yamhlasela watsho waxhuzula. Wayikhalimela indimoni uYesu, waphila umntwana, wambuyisela kuyise." 
Luke9:43 Batsho bamangaliswa ke bonke kukusebenza kwamandla kaThixo. Ke bonke babemangalisiwe zizinto zonke awayezenza uYesu; waza wathi kubafundi bakhe: 
Luke9:44 “Waphulaphuleni kakuhle la mazwi: *uNyana woLuntu wonikelwa ezandleni zabantu.” 
Luke9:45 Kodwa bona babengaliqondi eli lizwi – lalifihlakele kubo. Babesoyika nokumbuza ngalo. 
Luke9:46 Ke kaloku babephikisana ngokuba nguwuphi na omkhulu phakathi kwabo. 
Luke9:47 UYesu ke, ezazi iingcamango zeentliziyo zabo, uthathe umntwana, wammisa ngakuye," 
Luke9:48 wathi kubo: “Othe wamamkela lo mntwana egameni lam, wamkela mna; nothe wamkela mna, wamkela lowo undithumileyo; kuba oyena mncinane phakathi kwenu nonke, ngoyena mkhulu.”" 
Luke9:49 Wavakala uYohane esithi: “Mhlekazi, sibone umntu ekhupha iindimoni ngegama lakho, saza samnqanda, kuba akakulandeli kunye nathi.”" 
Luke9:50 Ke uYesu wathi kuye: “Sanukumnqanda, kuba ongachasananga nani ungakuni.”" 
Luke9:51 Yakusondela imihla yokuba uYesu anyuselwe ezulwini, wazimisela ukuya eJerusalem." 
Luke9:52 Ke kaloku wathuma abathunywa bakhe, ukuba bamandulele. Bahamba ke, baya kungena kwidolophana yamaSamariya, khon' ukuze bamlungiselele;" 
Luke9:53 kodwa amaSamariya akavumanga ukumamkela, kuba uYesu wayesinga eJerusalem." 
Luke9:54 Bekubonile oko abafundi bakhe uYakobi noYohane, bathe: “Nkosi, uyafuna na ukuba sitsho kuhle umlilo ezulwini, ubatshabalalise?”" 
Luke9:55 Wathi guququ, wabakhalimela;" 
Luke9:56 baza baya dolophaneni yimbi. 
Luke9:57 Kwathi, besendleleni, othile wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, ndiya kuba ngumlandeli wakho, ndiye naphi na apho uthe waya khona.”" 
Luke9:58 Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Iimpungutye zinemingxuma, neentaka zineendlwana; kodwa yena *uNyana woLuntu akanayo nendawo le yokufaka intloko.”" 
Luke9:59 Wathi komnye: “Yiba ngumlandeli wam.” Ke yena wathi: “Nkosi, ndivumele ndiye kungcwaba ubawo kuqala.”" 
Luke9:60 UYesu wathi kuye: “Bayeke abafileyo, bangcwabe abafileyo babo. Ke wena, hamba uye kushumayela uvakalise ulawulo lukaThixo.”" 
Luke9:61 Wathi nomnye: “Ndiya kuba ngumlandeli wakho, Nkosi, kodwa kuqala ndivumele ndiye kubulisa abendlu yam.”" 
Luke9:62 UYesu wathi kuye: “Umntu ojonga ngasemva, ebambe ikhuba, uyabhanka. Ngokunjalo ke nomntu ophunguzayo ekhonza uThixo, uyaphoswa bubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo.”" 
Luke10:1 Ke kaloku, emva kwezi zinto, iNkosi yanyula abanye abangamashumi asixhenxe anambini, yabathuma ngababini ngababini, ukuba bayandulele baye kuzo zonke iidolophu neendawo eyayiza kuya kuzo," 
Luke10:2 isithi kubo: “Isivuno okunene sikhulu, kodwa bona abasebenzi bambalwa. Mbongozeni ke ngoko uMnini-ntsimi, ukuba athumele abasebenzi, baye kuvuna." 
Luke10:3 Hambani ke. Niyabona, ndinithuma njengamatakane phakathi kweengcuka." 
Luke10:4 Ze ningaphathi ngxowa yamali, nangxowa yamphako, nazihlangu. Ze ningalityaziswa yimibuliso endleleni." 
Luke10:5 Nakuwuphi na umzi enithe nangena kuwo, yithini kuqala: ‘Uxolo malube nani kweli khaya!’" 
Luke10:6 Ukuba ngaba ukho apho owoxolo, intsikelelo yenu yohlala phezu kwakhe; ukuba ke akunjalo, yobuyela kwakuni." 
Luke10:7 Hlalani ke kwakuloo ndlu, nitye nisele oko nikunikwayo; kuba umsébenzi uwufanele umvuzo wakhe. Musani ukuthi nihleli ndlwini ithile, nimke kuyo, niye kuhlala kwenye kwalapho." 
Luke10:8 Edolophini ke enithe nangena kuyo, baza banamkela, kutyeni ukutya enikunikwayo," 
Luke10:9 niyiphilise imilwelwe elapho, nithi kubo: ‘Luthwasile ulawulo lukaThixo!’" 
Luke10:10 Kuloo dolophu nithe nangena kuyo, baza àbanamkela, ze niphume niye ezitalatweni zayo, nithi:" 
Luke10:11 ‘Nothuli olu lwedolophu yenu olusezinyaweni zethu, siluvuthululela kuni. Kodwa ke kwazini oku: Ulawulo lukaThixo luthwasile!’" 
Luke10:12 Ngoko ke ndithi kuni, ngomhla womgwebo soba nganeno isohlwayo seSodom kunesaloo dolophu.”" 
Luke10:13 “Mawoo, wena Korazin! Mawoo, nawe Bhetesayida! Ukuba imimangaliso eyenzeke kuni yayenzeke eTire naseSidon, abalapho ngebaguqukayo kwakudala, bahlala phantsi bambethe ezirhwexayo, bezigalele uthuthu." 
Luke10:14 Ewe, ngomhla wokugwetywa soba nganeno isohlwayo seTire neseSidon kunesenu." 
Luke10:15 Wena Kapernahum, unga ungaphakanyiselwa ezulwini na? Hayi, uya kuphoswa phantsi kwelabafileyo.”" 
Luke10:16 Wathi ke kubafundi bakhe: “Lowo univayo, uva mna; nalowo unganamkeliyo, akamkeli mna. Ke ongandamkeliyo mna, akamkeli lowo undithumileyo.”" 
Luke10:17 Babuya ke abafundi abangamashumi asixhenxe anambini, bevuya, besithi: “Nkosi, neendimoni ezi sizoyisile ngegama lakho.”" 
Luke10:18 Wathi ke kubo: “Ndibone uSathana esiwa ezulwini okombane. 
Luke10:19 Niyabona, ndininike igunya lokunyathela phezu kweenyoka noonomadudwane, naphezu kwawo onke amandla alowo ulutshaba. Ke ayikho konke into enokunenzakalisa." 
Luke10:20 Noko ke sanukuvuyela ukoyisa kwenu iindimoni, vuyani kuba amagama enu ebhaliwe kwaThixo.”" 
Luke10:21 Ngelo xesha uYesu wagcoba ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, wathi: “Ndiyabulela kuwe, Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba, ngokuzifihla kwakho ezi zinto kwizilumko neengqondi, wazityhilela iintsana. Ewe, Bawo, wênjenje kuba kukholekile kuwe." 
Luke10:22 “Zonke izinto zinikelwe kum nguBawo; kananjalo akukho waziyo ukuba ungubani na uNyana, ngaphandle koYise, kungekho waziyo ukuba ungubani na uYise, ngaphandle koNyana, nalowo uNyana athanda ukumtyhilela.”" 
Luke10:23 Ke uYesu waguqukela kubafundi bakhe, wathetha nabo ngasese, wathi: “Hayi uyolo lwâbo babona enikubonayo nina!" 
Luke10:24 Inene, baninzi *abashumayeli nookumkani ababenqwenela ukuzibona izinto enizibonayo nina, baza àbazibona; benqwenela nokuva izinto enizivayo, baza àbaziva.”" 
Luke10:25 Ke kaloku kwafika umchazi-mthetho, walinga uYesu esithi: “Mfundisi, kufuneka ndenze ntoni na ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?”" 
Luke10:26 UYesu wathi kuye: “Khawutsho, kubhalwe ntoni *emthethweni?”" 
Luke10:27 Ke yena wathi: “Kuthiwa: ‘Uze uyithande iNkosi uThixo wakho ngentliziyo yakho iphela, nangomphefumlo wakho uphela, nangamandla akho ephela, nangengqondo yakho iphela; umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.’ ”" 
Luke10:28 UYesu ke wathi kuye: “Uchane ecwethe! Yenjenjalo kanye; wobudla ubomi.” 
Luke10:29 Ke yena umchazi-mthetho, efuna ukuzenza ilungisa, wathi kuYesu: “Ngubani ummelwane wam?”" 
Luke10:30 UYesu wamphendula wathi: “Umntu othile wayesihla evela eJerusalem, esiya eJeriko, waza wagaxeleka ezihangeni, ezamhluba izambatho zakhe, zamngxwelerha, zemka zimshiya esecicini lokufa." 
Luke10:31 Ke kaloku kwakukho mbingeleli uthile owayesihla kwangaloo ndlela, owathi akumbona wacezela phaya." 
Luke10:32 Kwangokunjalo ke *nomLevi, akufika kuloo ndawo, uthe akumbona wacezela phaya." 
Luke10:33 Ke umSamariya othile owayeseluhambeni wafika kuye, wathi akumbona wavelana naye," 
Luke10:34 wasondela, wawabopha amanxeba akhe, ewagalela ioyile newayini. Wamkhwelisa kwidonki yakhe, wamsa kwindlu yabahambi, wamonga." 
Luke10:35 Ukumka kwakhe ngengomso, urhole imali, wanika umnini-ndlu, wathi kuye: ‘Uze umonge; nento othe wadleka yona ngaphezu koku ndoyihlawula ekubuyeni kwam.’ ” Waqhuba uYesu wathi:" 
Luke10:36 “Khawutsho ke, nguwuphi kwabo bathathu owaba ngummelwane walowo wagaxeleka ezihangeni?”" 
Luke10:37 Umchazi-mthetho wathi: “Ngulowo waba novelwano.” Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Hamba uye kwenjenjalo ke nawe.” 
Luke10:38 Kolo hambo lwabo uYesu ungene dolophaneni ithile, waza wamkelwa endlwini ngumfazi othile ogama linguMarta." 
Luke10:39 UMarta wayenodade wabo ogama linguMariya, owathi yena wahlala ngasezinyaweni zeNkosi, ephulaphula amazwi ayo." 
Luke10:40 Ke yena uMarta wayexakeke kakhulu ngamalungiselelo; waya kuYesu, wathi: “Nkosi, akukhathali na kukuba umsakwethu andiyekele ndilungiselele ndendwa? Yitsho kuye andincedise.”" 
Luke10:41 Waphendula ke uYesu, wathi kuye: “Wena Marta, uzikhathaza ngezinto ezininzi," 
Luke10:42 kanti inye kuphela eyimfuneko. UMariya unyule loo nto ilungileyo, kwaye ayiyi kuhluthwa kuye.”" 
Luke11:1 Ke kaloku uYesu wayethandaza ndaweni ithile; kwathi akugqiba, omnye kubafundi bakhe wathi kuye: “Nkosi, sifundise ukuthandaza, kwanjengoko uYohane wabafundisayo ukuthandaza abakhe abafundi.”" 
Luke11:2 Wathi ke kubo uYesu: “Xa nithandazayo yithini: “ ‘Bawo, malaziwe lihlonelwe igama lakho; malongame ulawulo lwakho." 
Luke11:3 Hlala usibonelela kwiintswelo zethu zemihla ngemihla; 
Luke11:4 usixolele izono zethu, kuba nathi sibaxolela bonke abanamatyala kuthi; ungasiyekeli ekulingweni.’ ”" 
Luke11:5 Ke uYesu wathi kubo: “Ukuba ngaba ubani kuni uya kumhlobo wakhe ezinzulwini zobusuku, athi kuye: ‘Sihlobo, ndiboleke izonka zibe zithathu," 
Luke11:6 kuba ndinomhlobo ophambukele kum eseluhambeni, kanti andinanto ityiwayo ndingamnika yona;’" 
Luke11:7 ngekhe kwenzeke ukuba lowo ungaphakathi aphendule athi: ‘Sukundikhathaza; sendivalile emnyango; mna nabantwana bam sesilele; andinako ukuvuka ndikunike.’ 
Luke11:8 Ndithi kuni, nokuba akayi kuvuka amnike ngakuba engumhlobo wakhe, noko wothi ngenxa yokuzingisa kwakhe ecela, avuke amnike ezo zonka." 
Luke11:9 “Mna ke ngoko ndithi kuni: Celani, nophiwa; funani, nofumana; nkqonkqozani, novulelwa;" 
Luke11:10 kuba wonke umntu ocelayo uyazúza, nalowo ufunayo uyafumana, nalowo unkqonkqozayo wovulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Ngubani na kuni onokuthi enonyana ocela intlanzi, asuke amnike inyoka," 
Luke11:12 okanye athi, ecela iqanda, asuke amnike unomadudwane?" 
Luke11:13 Ukuba ngoko nina, nikhohlakele nje, niyakwazi ukubapha abantwana benu izipho ezilungileyo, wobeka phi yena uYihlo osezulwini ukugqithisela ukubapha uMoya oyiNgcwele abo bamcelayo?”" 
Luke11:14 UYesu wayekhupha indimoni edala ubumumu emntwini; kwaza kwathi, yakuphuma indimoni, isimumu eso sathetha. Samangaliswa ke isihlwele," 
Luke11:15 kodwa abathile kuso bathi: “Iindimoni ezi uzikhupha ngoSathana, umphathi weendimoni.”" 
Luke11:16 Abanye babemlinga, befuna umqondiso ophuma ezulwini." 
Luke11:17 Ke uYesu, ezazi iingcamango zabo, wathi kubo: “Bonke uburhulumente obuvukelana bodwa buyawa, nomzi ovukelana wodwa uyachithakala." 
Luke11:18 NoSathana ke, ukuba okwakhe kuthe kwavukelana kodwa, lothini na ukungonakali ulawulo lwakhe? Nina nithi iindimoni ndizikhupha ngoSathana." 
Luke11:19 Ke ukuba iindimoni ndizikhupha ngoSathana, bazikhupha ngabani ke bona oonyana benu? Mabaphendule, nigwetywe ngabo." 
Luke11:20 Ukuba ke iindimoni ndizikhupha ngamandla kaThixo, yazini ukuba ulawulo lukaThixo seluthwasile kuni." 
Luke11:21 “Ukuba igorha lithe laxhoba lafa amacala, lawulinda umzi walo, impahla yalo yohlala igcinakele." 
Luke11:22 Kodwa ukuba kuthe kwafika elinye igorha elinamandla kunalo, laloyisa, lolihlutha sonke isikrweqe salo ebelikholose ngaso, liwabe amaxhoba alo." 
Luke11:23 “Lowo ungekho ngakum, uchasene nam; nalowo ungandiqokelelisiyo, uyachitha-chitha.”" 
Luke11:24 “Xa indimoni ithe yaphuma emntwini, icanda ezinkqantosini, ifuna ukuphumla; ize yakuba ingakufumani, isuke ithi: ‘Ndiya kubuyela endlwini yam endaphuma kuyo.’" 
Luke11:25 Ithi yakufika, iyifumane itshayelwe, ilungisiwe;" 
Luke11:26 ize ke ijike iye kuphuthuma ezinye iindimoni ezisixhenxe ezikhohlakeleyo kunayo, zingene ke zihlale khona; ize imeko yamva yaloo mntu ibe mbi kuneyokuqala.”" 
Luke11:27 Ke kaloku ekuzithetheni kukaYesu ezi zinto, kwavakala umfazi esihlweleni apho, esithi kuye: “Unoyolo umfazi owakuzalayo nowakwanyisayo.”" 
Luke11:28 Ke yena wathi: “Yithi kanye: unoyolo lowo ulivayo ilizwi likaThixo alenze.” 
Luke11:29 Kuthe isihlwele simxinanisile, uYesu wathi: “Esi sisizukulwana esikhohlakeleyo; sifuna umqondiso, kanti asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, ingenguwo umqondiso kaJona;" 
Luke11:30 kuba, njengokuba uJona waba ngumqondiso kwabaseNiniva, uya kuba nguwo *uNyana woLuntu kwesi sizukulwana." 
Luke11:31 Ngomhla womgwebo ukumkanikazi waseZantsi wophakama abamangalele abantu besi sizukulwana, kuba wavela eziphelweni zomhlaba, esiza kuva ubulumko bukaSolomon, kanti ke omkhulu kunoSolomon nanku apha." 
Luke11:32 Ngomhla womgwebo abantu baseNiniva bophakama babamangalele abantu besi sizukulwana, kuba bona bâguquka ngentshumayelo kaJona, kanti ke omkhulu kunoJona nanku apha.”" 
Luke11:33 “Akukho mntu uthi, esilumekile isibane, asibeke endaweni efihlakeleyo okanye phantsi kwesitya; usixhoma endaweni yaso, ukuze abangenayo bakhanyiselwe." 
Luke11:34 Isibane somzimba liliso. Xa ke iliso lakho lilungile, umzimba wakho uphela uyakhanyiseleka; xa lithe alalunga, umzimba wakho usebumnyameni." 
Luke11:35 Lumka ke, hleze ukukhanya okukuwe kube bubumnyama." 
Luke11:36 Ukuba ngoko umzimba wakho uphela ukhanyiselekile, ungenandawo isebumnyameni, úya kukhanyiseleka uphela, kwanjengoko kunjalo xa isibane sithe sakukhanyisela ngelitha laso.”" 
Luke11:37 Akuba uYesu ethethile, *umFarasi othile wammema ukuba aye kutya kwakhe. Wafika ke, waya kuhlala etafileni." 
Luke11:38 Akukubona oku, umFarasi wamangaliswa kukuba uYesu engathanga kuqala ahlambe phambi kokuba atye." 
Luke11:39 INkosi ke yathi kuye: “Kaloku nina baFarasi nihlamba umphandle wendebe nesitya, kanti ngeentliziyo zenu nizungula ukuphanga nenkohlakalo." 
Luke11:40 Ziyathandini, lo wawenzayo umphandle akawenzanga na kwanawo umphakathi?" 
Luke11:41 Ngoko ke yiphani abasweleyo izinto ezingaphakathi kwindebe nesitya. Nakwenjenjalo ke aniyi kuphinda nizikhathaze ngezinto ezinomlaza nezingenawo. 
Luke11:42 “Mawoo, nina baFarasi! Ninikela kuThixo ngesishumi semifuno enjengetyeleba nenxina neminye, kanti niyabutyeshela ubulungisa nokumthanda uThixo. Benimelwe kakade kukuzenza ezi zinto, kodwa nezinye ningazityesheli." 
Luke11:43 “Mawoo, nina baFarasi! Nithanda izihlalo eziphambili *ezindlwini zesikhungo, nokukhahlelwa emabaleni embutho." 
Luke11:44 Mawoo, nina! Ninjengamangcwaba angasabonakaliyo, abathi abantu bahambe phezu kwawo bengawazi.”" 
Luke11:45 Waphendula ke othile wakubachazi-mthetho, wathi kuye: “Mfundisi, uthetha ngolu hlobo nje, uyasigxeka nathi.”" 
Luke11:46 Uthe ke yena uYesu: “Mawoo, nani bachazi-mthetho! Abantu nibathwalisa imithwalo enzima, kanti nina le mithwalo aniyichukumisi nokuyichukumisa nangomnwe lo." 
Luke11:47 Mawoo! Nina nihombisa amangcwaba abashumayeli bamandulo, ukanti bâbuláwa ngooyihlo." 
Luke11:48 Nina ke nibonakalisa ukuvumelana kwenu nooyihlo, kuba bona bababulala *abashumayeli, kanti nina nihombisa amangcwaba abo." 
Luke11:49 Kungoko uThixo ngokobulumko bakhe atshoyo ukuthi: ‘Ndiya kuthumela abashumayeli nabathunywa ebantwini; inxenye baya kuyibulala, inxenye baya kuyitshutshisa.’" 
Luke11:50 Lobizwa kwesi sizukulwana ke igazi labo bonke abashumayeli, elaphalazwayo ukususela ekusekweni kwehlabathi," 
Luke11:51 liqalela egazini lika-Abheli, lide lise egazini likaZakariya, owabulawa phakathi kweqonga lamadini nendawo engcwele. Ewe, nditsho nangoku liya kubizwa kwesi sizukulwana." 
Luke11:52 “Mawoo, nina bachazi-mthetho! Nasisusa isitshixo solwazi. Nina ngokwenu aningeni, kanti nabafuna ukungena niyabalela.”" 
Luke11:53 Ukumka kukaYesu apho, abachazi-mthetho nabaFarasi bacaphuka, bamana bemlinga ngemibuzo emininzi," 
Luke11:54 befuna ukumrhintyela ngentetho yakhe. 
Luke12:1 Ekubeni kwakuhlanganisene amawaka-waka abantu ababebaninzi ngokokude banyathelane, uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe kuqala: “Lilumkeleni igwele *labaFarasi elikukuzenzisa." 
Luke12:2 Akukho nto ifihliweyo ingayi kudizwa, nanto igqunyiweyo ingayi kwaziwa." 
Luke12:3 Ngenxa yoko kothi enikuthethe ebumnyameni kuviwe ekuhleni, nenikusebeze ngasese kukhwazwe phandle.”" 
Luke12:4 “Ndithi kuni, zihlobo zam, musani ukuboyika abo babulala umzimba, baze emva koko bangabi nanto yimbi banokuyenza." 
Luke12:5 Nanku emanimoyike: yoyikani uThixo, yena lowo uthi emva kokubulala, abe negunya lokuphosa esihogweni. Ewe, ndithi kuni, moyikeni yena." 
Luke12:6 “Iintakana ezincinci azithengiswa zibe ntlanu na ngeesenti ezimbini? Kanti akukho nanye kuzo elityelweyo nguThixo. 
Luke12:7 Kwaneenwele ezi zeentloko zenu zibaliwe zonke. Ke musani ukoyika: nixabisekile kuneentakana ezininzi nina.” 
Luke12:8 “Ke ndithi kuni, wonke umntu othe wandivuma phambi kwabantu, wothi kwanaye *uNyana woLuntu amvume phambi kwezithunywa zikaThixo." 
Luke12:9 Ke ondikhanyelayo ebantwini wokhanyelwa naye kwizithunywa zikaThixo. 
Luke12:10 “Nabani na ke othe wathetha ilizwi elichasene naye uNyana woLuntu, woxolelwa; kodwa yena othe wanyelisa uMoya oyiNgcwele, akayi kuxolelwa." 
Luke12:11 “Xa banimangalelayo *ezindlwini zesikhungo, nakwabaphetheyo, nakwabanamagunya, ze ningazixhaleli nisithi noziphendulela njani na, okanye nothini na;" 
Luke12:12 kuba uMoya oyiNgcwele uya kuthi ngelo xesha anifundise oko manikuthethe.” 
Luke12:13 Omnye esihlweleni wathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, yitsho kumntakwethu sahlulelane ngelifa.”" 
Luke12:14 Ke yena wathi kuye: “Mntundini, ndibekwe ngubani na ukuba ndibe ngumgwebi nomahluli phakathi kwenu?”" 
Luke12:15 Wathi kubo: “Kulumkeleni konke ukubawa, kuba ubomi bomntu abuxhomekekanga ebuninzini bezinto anazo.”" 
Luke12:16 Waza uYesu wathetha umzekeliso kubo, esithi: “Umhlaba womntu othile osisityebi wachuma kakhulu." 
Luke12:17 Yena wacinga esithi: ‘Ndiya kuthini na, kuba andinandawo ndinokusigcina kuyo isivuno sam?’" 
Luke12:18 Waza wathi: ‘Nantsi into endiya kuyenza: ndiya kubadiliza oovimba bam, ndakhe abakhulu kunabo, ndiyihlanganisele kubo yonke ingqolowa yam nendyebo yam;" 
Luke12:19 ndize ke ndithi kuwo umphefumlo wam: Mphefumlo wam, unempahla eninzi yeminyaka emininzi; phumla, yitya, sela, chwayita!’" 
Luke12:20 Ke uThixo wathi kuye: ‘Siyathandini, ngobu busuku uya kwahlukana nobomi bakho. Ziya kuba zezikabani ke ezo zinto uzilungisileyo?’" 
Luke12:21 Únjalo ke lowo uziqwebela ubutyebi, kodwa engenabutyebi kuThixo.”" 
Luke12:22 Waza ke uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Kungoko ndithi kuni: musani ukubuxhalela ubomi benu, nisithi notya ntoni na; ningawuxhaleli nomzimba wenu, nisithi nonxiba ntoni na." 
Luke12:23 Ubomi bungaphezulu kunokutya, nomzimba ungaphezulu kunesinxibo." 
Luke12:24 Qondani ngamahlungulu la. Wona akahlwayeli, engavuni nokuvuna; akanasisele, engenavimba; kanti noko uThixo uyawondla! Ke nina nibeke phi na ukuxabiseka kuneentaka!" 
Luke12:25 Nguwuphi na kuni onokuthi ngokuxhala ongeze nentwana le ebudeni bobomi bakhe? 
Luke12:26 Ukuba ke aninako ukwenza neyona nto incinane, kungani na ukuba nizixhalele ezinye?" 
Luke12:27 Qondani ngeenyibiba ukukhula kwazo. Azisebenzi, zingaluki nokuluka oku, kanti ngenene naye uSolomon kubo bonke ubunewu-newu bakhe wayengavathiswanga nanjenganye kuzo." 
Luke12:28 Ukuba ke uThixo wenjenje ukuyambesa ingca, yona isendle namhlanje, ize ngomso iphoswe eziko, wobeka phi na ukunambesa nina, bantundini balukholo luncinane!" 
Luke12:29 Nize ke ningaxhalabi nifuna ukuba ningatya ntoni na, nisele ntoni na!" 
Luke12:30 Ngabangakholwayo abahlala besukelana nazo zonke ezi zinto. Ke nina ninoYihlo owaziyo xa niziswele. 
Luke12:31 Zondelelani ukulawulwa nguye; zothi ke zonke ezo zinto zongezelelwe kuni.” 
Luke12:32 “Musani ukoyika, mhlambi omncinane, kuba kukholekile kuYihlo ukunamkelela kulawulo lwakhe olutsha." 
Luke12:33 Thengisani ngeninako, niphe amahlwempu. Zenzeleni izipaji ezingagugiyo, nibulondoloze ezulwini ubutyebi benu, apho bungapheliyo, kungasondeli sela, kungonakalisi nanundu." 
Luke12:34 Kaloku apho bukhona ubutyebi benu, yoba lapho kwanentliziyo yenu.”" 
Luke12:35 “Hlalani niphaphile, nifinyezile, nezibane zenu zivutha," 
Luke12:36 ninjengabantu abalindele ukubuya kwenkosi yabo emtshatweni, abothi, yakufika inkqonkqoze, bayivulele kwangoko." 
Luke12:37 Zinoyolo ezo zicaka eyothi yakufika inkosi yazo, izifumane zilindile. Ndithi kuni, inene, loo nkosi iya kubhinqa, izihlalise phantsi ezo zicaka, ize isondele izilungiselele." 
Luke12:38 Nokuba ke ithe yafika ezinzulwini zobusuku, okanye ekuzeni kokusa, yazifumana zilindile, zinoyolo ezo zicaka." 
Luke12:39 Kakade ukuba umninindlu ebesazi ukuba isela lofika nini na, ebeya kulinda, angayiyekeli indlu yakhe iqhekezwe." 
Luke12:40 Nani ke ngoko hlalani niphaphile, kuba uNyana woLuntu woza ngexesha eningamlindelanga ngalo.”" 
Luke12:41 Ke uPetros wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, ngaba lo mzekeliso uwuthetha kuthi, okanye uwuthetha kubo bonke abantu?”" 
Luke12:42 INkosi yathi: “Ngubani na osisicaka esithembekileyo nesiqondayo, eyothi inkosi yaso isimisele phezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuze sibanike umxhesho wabo ngexesha elililo?" 
Luke12:43 Sinoyolo eso sicaka eyothi inkosi yaso yakufika, isifumane sisenjenjalo." 
Luke12:44 Ndithi kuni, inene, inkosi yothi eso sicaka isimise phezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo." 
Luke12:45 Kodwa ukuba eso sicaka sisuke sacinga sathi: ‘Inkosi yam ilibele;’ size ke sisuke sizibethe ezinye izicaka nezicakakazi, sidle, sisele, sinxile;" 
Luke12:46 yofika inkosi yeso sicaka ngemini esingayilindelanga, nangelixa esingalaziyo, ize isixabele isinqumle kubini njengoko kusenziwa kwabangathembekanga." 
Luke12:47 “Isicaka esikwaziyo oko kufunwa yinkosi yaso, sisuke singakukhathaleli, singakwenzi, siya kubethwa imivumbo emininzi." 
Luke12:48 Ke isicaka esingaqondiyo sisuke senze okufanelwe yimivumbo, siya kubethwa ibe mbalwa. Kubo bonke abanikwe okuninzi, kuya kufunwa okuninzi; nakulowo unikwe ngokungaphezulu, kuya kubizwa ngokungaphezulu.”" 
Luke12:49 “Ndizise umlilo ehlabathini; hayi ukunqwenela kwam ukunga ungewusewuvutha! 
Luke12:50 Kukho lubhaptizo ndifanele ukubhaptizwa ngalo; ke ndisezimbandezelweni ezinkulu lude lufezeke! 
Luke12:51 Niba ndizise uxolo na ehlabathini? Ndithi kuni, hayi, ndizise imbambano!" 
Luke12:52 Kuya kuthi, ukususela ngoku, kubekho abahlanu ndlwini-nye bengavani; abathathu bengavani nababini, nababini bengavani nabathathu;" 
Luke12:53 ibe yiyantlukwano phakathi koyise nonyana, unyana noyise; unina nentombi, intombi nonina; uninazala nomolokazana, umolokazana no ninazala.”" 
Luke12:54 UYesu wathi kwisihlwele: “Xa nithe nabona ilifu livela entshonalanga nikhawuleza nithi: ‘Iza kuna;’ kuze kube njalo. 
Luke12:55 Naxa kukho umoya ovela entlango, nithi: ‘Kuya kuba shushu;’ kuze kube njalo." 
Luke12:56 Mamenemenendini, niyakwazi ukuyiqonda imo yezulu. Kungani na ke ukuba ningayicaluli yona le mihla?”" 
Luke12:57 “Kungani na ukuba nina ngokwenu ningenzi sigqibo ngoko kulungileyo? 
Luke12:58 Xa usiya enkundleni unommangaleli wakho, yithi kwalapho endleleni uzame ukulungisana naye, hleze akurhuqele enkundleni, aze umgwebi akunikele kumsila, yena akuphose entolongweni." 
Luke12:59 Inene, akusayi kuphuma apho de uhlawule neyona malana yokugqibela.”" 
Luke13:1 Kwangelo xesha ke kwabakho abathile abâmxeleláyo uYesu ngamaGalili, awathi esenzela uThixo amadini, abulawa nguPilato." 
Luke13:2 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Niba loo maGalili ebengabôni ngaphezulu kwawo onke amanye amaGalili, kuba evé ubunzima obunjalo?" 
Luke13:3 Nakanye! Inene, nani ukuba anithanga niguquke, notshabalala kwangokunjalo nonke." 
Luke13:4 Khanitsho ke, bona abo balishumi elinesibhozo abawelwa yinqaba eSilowa bafa, niba babenetyala ngaphezu kwabo bonke abantu baseJerusalem?" 
Luke13:5 Nakanye! Inene, nani ukuba anithanga niguquke notshabalala kwangokunjalo nonke.”" 
Luke13:6 UYesu ke wabenzela lo mzekeliso: “Ubani wayenomkhiwane utyalwe esidiliyeni sakhe, weza efuna isiqhamo kuwo, waza akafumana nto." 
Luke13:7 Wathi ke kosebenza esidiliyeni: ‘Uyabona, ndiminyaka mithathu ndisiza ndifuna isiqhamo kulo mkhiwane, ndingafumani nto. Wugawule! Yini na ukuba ude uphuthise nomhlaba lo?’" 
Luke13:8 Waphendula yena wathi kuye: ‘Nkosi, khawuwuyeke nakulo mnyaka, ndikhe ndimbe ndiwujikeleze, ndigalele umgquba." 
Luke13:9 Ukuba ke uthe wavelisa isiqhamo, woseluwuyeka; kodwa ukuba akubanga njalo, wogawulwa.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Ke kaloku ngomnye *uMhla woPhumlo uYesu wayefundisa *ndlwini yesikhungo ithile. 
Luke13:11 Apho kwakukho umfazi owayenendimoni eyamgulisa iminyaka elishumi elinesibhozo. Wayegobile, engenako mpela ukuma nkqo." 
Luke13:12 Akuba uYesu embonile, wambiza, wathi kuye: “Mfazi, ukhululekile ebulwelweni bakho.”" 
Luke13:13 Wambeka izandla, waza ke lo mfazi wema nkqo kwangoko, wabulela uThixo." 
Luke13:14 Ke lona igosa lendlu yesikhungo, licaphukile kuba uYesu ephilise ngoMhla wokuPhumla, lathi kwisihlwele: “Mithandathu imihla ekufanele ukusetyenzwa ngayo. Yizani ngayo niphiliswe, kungabi ngawo uMhla wokuPhumla.”" 
Luke13:15 Yaphendula ke iNkosi, yathi: “Mamenemenendini, ngubani na kuni ongayikhululiyo ngoMhla woPhumlo emkhumbini wesitali inkomo yakhe, okanye idonki yakhe, ayirhole esiya kuyiseza?" 
Luke13:16 Lo ke, eyintombi ka-Abraham nje, owayebotshiwe le minyaka ilishumi elinesibhozo nguSathana, ubengamelwe kukukhululwa na kulo mabophe ngoMhla woPhumlo?”" 
Luke13:17 Akuba etshilo, basuka badana bonke ababechasene naye. Ke sona isihlwele sasivuya ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ezintle awayezenza." 
Luke13:18 Ke uYesu wathi: “Lufana nantoni na ulawulo lukaThixo? Ndingaluzekelisa ngamzekeliso mni na? 
Luke13:19 Lufana nokhozo lwembewu yemostade, awaluthathayo umntu, waluhlwayela esitiyeni sakhe, lwaza lwakhula lwaba ngumthi, zathi iintaka zakha iindlwane zazo emasebeni awo.”" 
Luke13:20 UYesu waphinda wathi: “Ndingaluzekelisa ngamzekeliso mni na ulawulo lukaThixo? 
Luke13:21 Lufana negwele, awalithathayo umfazi, walixovulela kumgubo ozizitya ezithathu, laza layinyusa yonke intlama.”" 
Luke13:22 UYesu wacanda kwiidolophu needolophana, ehamba efundisa, esinga eJerusalem." 
Luke13:23 Umntu othile wathi kuye: “Nkosi, bambalwa na abo basindiswayo?” UYesu ke wathi kubo:" 
Luke13:24 “Zamani ukungena ngesango elimxinwa. Ndithi kuni, baninzi abaya kufuna ukungena, bangabi nako." 
Luke13:25 “Xa selethe waphakama umninindlu, wavala emnyango, nothi nina, nime ngaphandle, ninkqonkqoze emnyango, nisithi: ‘Nkosi, sivulele.’ Wophendula ke umninindlu, athi kuni: ‘Andinazi apho nivela khona.’" 
Luke13:26 Ke ngoko nina nothi: ‘Kaloku sikhe satya, sasela, ukho nawe; nawe wafundisa ezitalatweni zethu.’" 
Luke13:27 Kodwa yena wothi: ‘Inene, andinazi apho nivela khona. Mkani kum, nina nonke benzi bobubi.’" 
Luke13:28 Khona apho niya kulila ningcungcutheke, xa nibona uAbraham noIsake noYakobi nabo bonke abashumayeli bamandulo bexhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo, nibe nina nikhutshelwe ngaphandle." 
Luke13:29 Abantu bofika bevela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, bevela ngasentla nangasezantsi, babuxhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo." 
Luke13:30 Niyabona ke, bakho abokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala, bekho nabokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela.”" 
Luke13:31 Kwangelo xesha kwafika abaFarasi abathile, bathi kuYesu: “Phuma umke apha, kuba uHerode ufuna ukukubulala.”" 
Luke13:32 Wathi kubo: “Yiyani nithi kuloo mpungutye: ‘Uyabona, ndikhupha iindimoni, ndiphilise, namhlanje nangomso, ndithi ngowesithathu umhla ndigqibe.’" 
Luke13:33 Kodwa ndimelwe kukuthi ndihambe namhlanje nangomso nangomsomnye, kuba umshumayeli akangekhe abulawe kwenye indawo ngaphandle kwaseJerusalem." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalem, Jerusalem, wena ubabulalayo abashumayeli, ubakhande ngamatye abo bathunywa kuwe nguThixo! Kunini na ndifuna ukubawola abantu bakho ngokwesikhukukazi esigquma amantshontsho aso ngamaphiko, waza wena awavuma." 
Luke13:35 Niyabona, uThixo uyanifulathela nomzi wenu. Inene, aniyi kuba sandibona de kufike ixesha eniya kuthi: ‘Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi.’”" 
Luke14:1 *NgoMhla othile wokuPhumla uYesu waya kutya kumzi *womFarasi owayeyinkokheli. Bahlala ke bemlalele. 
Luke14:2 Kwabonakala kukho ndoda ithile phambi kwakhe, inesifo somlambo." 
Luke14:3 Waza ke uYesu wabuza kubachazi-mthetho nabaFarasi, esithi: “Ngaba kuvumelekile na ukuphilisa ngoMhla woPhumlo?”" 
Luke14:4 Bathi cwaka ke bona. Wayithatha ke indoda leyo, wayiphilisa, wayindulula," 
Luke14:5 wathi kubo: “Ngaba ngubani na kuni ongayi kuthi, yakweyela equleni inkwenkwe yakhe okanye inkomo yakhe, angayikhuphi kwangoko, nokuba kungoMhla wokuPhumla?”" 
Luke14:6 Bakhohlwa kukumphendula kwezo zinto. 
Luke14:7 Akuyibona indlela abamenyiweyo abazisukela ngayo izihlalo eziphambili, uYesu uthethe umzekeliso kubo, esithi:" 
Luke14:8 “Xa uthe wamenyelwa emsithweni ngumntu, uze ungayi kuhlala kwesona sihlalo siphambili, hleze kuthi kanti ohloniphekileyo kunawe naye umenyiwe," 
Luke14:9 eze ke lowo unimemileyo aze athi kuwe: ‘Khawudedele lo mntu.’ Ke wena uya kunyoshoza, uye kuhlala kwindawo esekugqibeleni." 
Luke14:10 Ke ngoko, xa uthe wamenywa, uze uye kuhlala kwindawo esekugqibeleni, ze kuthi akufika lowo ukumemileyo, athi kuwe: ‘Sihlobo, nyukela ngasentla.’ Wothi ke uhlonelwe ngabo bonke abo unabo emsithweni;" 
Luke14:11 kaloku wonke umntu oziphakamisayo uya kuthotywa, nozithobayo uya kuphakanyiswa.”" 
Luke14:12 UYesu ke wabhekisa kulowo wayemmemile, wathi: “Xa ubizela abantu esidlweni, uze ungamemi zihlobo zakho, nabantakwenu, nazizalwane zakho, nabamelwane bakho abazizityebi, hleze nabo baphinde bakumeme, kuze oko kube yimbuyekezo kuwe." 
Luke14:13 Yithi xa wena unesidlo, umeme amahlwempu, iziqhwala, izilima, neemfama." 
Luke14:14 Wosikeleleka ke, kuba àbanako ukuphinda bakumeme bona – wena wobuyekezwa ekuvukeni kwamalungisa.”" 
Luke14:15 Ke kaloku, akuziva ezo zinto omnye kwabo babesemsithweni kunye noYesu, wathi kuye: “Unoyolo lowo uxhamla ubuncwane esidlweni solawulo lukaThixo.”" 
Luke14:16 Waza ke yena wathi kuye: “Umntu othile wênza isidlo esikhulu, wamema abantu abaninzi." 
Luke14:17 Ngexesha lesidlo uthume isicaka sakhe ukuba siye kuxelela abamenyiweyo ukuba beze, kuba konke kwakusekulungisiwe." 
Luke14:18 Baza ke bonke ngabanye bazilandula, owokuqala esithi kuye: ‘Ndithenge intsimi. Kufuneka ndiphume ndiye kuyibona. Ndiyakucela, ndixolele; andiphumeleli.’" 
Luke14:19 Omnye wathi: ‘Ndithenge iinkabi ezilishumi. Ndisaya kuziva. Ndiyakucela, ndixolele; andiphumeleli.’" 
Luke14:20 Nomnye wathi: ‘Ndisand' ukutshata. Ngenxa yoko andinakuza.’ 
Luke14:21 Ke isicaka eso sibuyele enkosini yaso, sayixelela ezo zinto. Waza waqumba umnini-ndlu, wathi kwisicaka sakhe: ‘Khawuleza uye ezitalatweni nasezirhangeni zedolophu, uqokelele amahlwempu nezilima neemfama neziqhwala.’" 
Luke14:22 Saza isicaka sathi: ‘Nkosi, kwenzeké njengoko uyalele, kanti indawo isekho.’" 
Luke14:23 Yathi inkosi kwisicaka eso: ‘Phuma uye ezindleleni, nasezindledlaneni, ubanyanzele bangene, ukuze indlu yam izale." 
Luke14:24 Inene, akukho namnye kuloo madoda abemenyiwe iya kusiva isidlo sam.’ ”" 
Luke14:25 Kwakukho isihlwele sihamba noYesu, waza wajika wathi kuso:" 
Luke14:26 “Ukuba ubani uza kum, angancami uyise, nonina, nomfazi, nabantwana, nabantakwabo, noodade wabo, ewe, kwanobakhe ubomi obu, akanakuba ngumfundi wam." 
Luke14:27 Nosukuba engawuthwali umnqamlezo wakhe andilandele, akanakuba ngumfundi wam." 
Luke14:28 “Kaloku nguwuphi na kuni othi, efuna ukwakha inqaba, angàthi kuqala ahlale phantsi, abale indleko, ethelekelela ukuba unazo na izinto zokuyigqiba?" 
Luke14:29 Kungenjalo, kunokuthi selesenzile isiseko, angabi nako ukugqiba, baze bonke ababonelayo bahlekise ngaye," 
Luke14:30 besithi: ‘Lo mntu waqala ukwakha, wakhohlwa kukugqiba.’" 
Luke14:31 “Kananjalo nguwuphi na ukumkani onokuthi esiya kuqubisana nomnye emfazweni, angàthi nqumama, abhunge kuqala ukuba unako na ukumelana notshaba olumkhawulelayo lungamashumi amabini amawaka lona, enashumi linye lamawaka amajoni kuphela nje yena?" 
Luke14:32 Ukuba ke akanako, uthi esekude omnye ukumkani, athumele izigidimi, acele imiqathango yoxolo." 
Luke14:33 Ngokukwanjalo ke, wonke umntu kuni ongazishiyiyo zonke izinto anazo, akanakuba ngumfundi wam.”" 
Luke14:34 “Ityiwa ilungile, kodwa ukuba ithe ayaba nasongo noyithini na ukuyibuyisela isongo?" 
Luke14:35 Ayiwulungelanga umhlaba, ingawulungelanga nomgquba. Iyalahlwa. Oneendlebe zokuva makeve.”" 
Luke15:1 Ke kaloku into eninzi yabaqokeleli-rhafu *naboni yasondela kuYesu, yamngqonga ukuba imphulaphule." 
Luke15:2 *AbaFarasi nabachazi-mthetho babekhalaza, besithi: “Lo mfo uthene nca naboni; utya nabo.”" 
Luke15:3 Waza ke uYesu wenza umzekeliso wathi: 
Luke15:4 “Nguwuphi na kuni onokuthi enekhulu leegusha, kuze kulahleke enye kuzo, angazishiyi endle ezo zimashumi alithoba anethoba, aye kufuna leyo ilahlekileyo, ade ayifumane?" 
Luke15:5 Hayi ukuvuya kwakhe ke akuba eyifumene! Woyithwala emagxeni," 
Luke15:6 athi akufika ekhaya, abizele ndawonye abahlobo nabamelwane, esithi kubo: ‘Vuyisanani nam, kuba ndiyifumene igusha yam ebilahlekile.’" 
Luke15:7 Ndiyanixelela ukuba ngokukwanjalo kuya kubakho uvuyo ezulwini nangomoni omnye oguqukayo kunamashumi alithoba anethoba lamalungisa angaswelanga nguquko.” 
Luke15:8 “Kananjalo nguwuphi na umfazi onokuthi eneenkozo zemali ezilishumi, kuze kulahleke lube lunye kuzo, angalumeki isibane, atshayele indlu, afunisise enyamekile, ade alufumane?" 
Luke15:9 Akulufumana ke, ubabizela ndawonye abahlobo nabamelwane, athi: ‘Vuyisanani nam; ndilufumene ukhozo lwemali obelulahlekile.’" 
Luke15:10 Ngokunjalo ndithi kuni kuya kubakho uvuyo kwizithunywa zikaThixo ngomoni omnye oguqukayo.” 
Luke15:11 Waqhuba uYesu wathi: “Umntu othile wayenoonyana ababini. 
Luke15:12 Yathi ke inci kuyise: ‘Bawo, ndinike isabelo sempahla elilungelo lam.’ Wababela ke impahla leyo." 
Luke15:13 Kwathi, kungekabi ntsuku zingaphi, inci yathatha konke okwayo, yemka kwelakowayo, yaya ezweni elikude, yaza yathi khona apho yayichitha impahla yayo ngokungakhathali." 
Luke15:14 Kwathi yakuba iyichithe yonke, kwabakho indlala enzima kwelo zwe, yaza yaswela nayo." 
Luke15:15 Ke yona yaya kusebenza komnye kubemi belo zwe, owathi yena wayithumela emasimini akhe ukuba iye kwalúsa iihagu." 
Luke15:16 Ke ibinqwenela ukutya amaxolo awayetyiwa ziihagu ezo, kodwa kwakungekho mntu uyiphayo." 
Luke15:17 Ke kaloku, yakubuyela ezingqondweni, yathi: ‘Kanene bangakanani na abaqeshwa bakabawo abahlutha sisonka, kanti ndim lo mna ndisifa yindlala!" 
Luke15:18 Ndiya kusuka ndiye kubawo, ndithi kuye: Bawo, ndimonile uThixo, nawe ndikonile." 
Luke15:19 Andisafanelanga nokuba kuthiwe ndingunyana wakho, ndénze ndibe njengomnye wabaqeshwa bakho.’" 
Luke15:20 Yesuka ke, yaya kuyise. “Ke kaloku kwathi, isekude lee, uyise wayibona, wavelana nayo, wayikhawulela, wayigona, wayanga." 
Luke15:21 Ke unyana wathi kuye: ‘Bawo, ndimonile uThixo, nawe ndikonile. Andisafanelanga nokuba kuthiwe ndingunyana wakho.’" 
Luke15:22 Kodwa uyise wathi kwizicaka zakhe: ‘Khawulezisani, nize nesona sambatho sihle, nimambathise, nifake umsesane emnweni wakhe, nezihlangu ezinyaweni zakhe." 
Luke15:23 Ze ke nize nelaa thole lityetyisiweyo, nilixhele, sitye sichwayite;" 
Luke15:24 kuba lo nyana wam ubefile, wabuya waphila; ubelahlekile, wafunyanwa.’ Baza ke bona bachwayita." 
Luke15:25 “Ke yona inkulu yayivela emasimini, kwathi yakusondela endlwini, yeva iingoma nokududa." 
Luke15:26 Yabizela kuyo esinye kwizicaka, yasibuza ukuba kwenzeka ntoni na." 
Luke15:27 Isicaka sathi kuyo: ‘Umninawe wakho ubuyile. Ke uyihlo uxhele elaa thole lityetyisiweyo, kuba ebuye wamzuza ephilile.’" 
Luke15:28 Yaqumba inkulu, ayavuma nokungena oku, waza uyise waphuma wacengana nayo." 
Luke15:29 Kodwa yona imphendule uyise yathi: ‘Khangela, ndikukhonze le minyaka ingakanana, ndingazange ndagqitha namnye umthetho wakho, kanti akuzange undinike netakane eli, ukuze ndichwayite nezam izihlobo." 
Luke15:30 Kodwa akufika lo nyana wakho, lo wayidlayo wayigqiba impahla yakho namahenyukazi, usuke wamxhelela elaa thole lityetyisiweyo.’" 
Luke15:31 Ke uyise wathi kuyo: ‘Nyana wam, wena uhleli unam, zaye zonke izinto zam zezakho." 
Luke15:32 Kufanelekile ukuba sichwayite sigcobe, kuba umninawa wakho lo ebefile wabuya waphila, ebelahlekile wafunyanwa.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Ke uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Kwakukho sityebi sithile esasinegosa, elathi lona lamangalelwa kuso ngokuyichitha impahla yaso." 
Luke16:2 Silibizile ke, sathi kulo: ‘Yintoni le ndiyivayo ngawe? Khawenze ingxelo yobugosa bakho, kuba akusayi kuba saba ligosa.’" 
Luke16:3 Lacinga ke igosa lathi: ‘Ndiya kuthini, bethu, inkosi yam indisusa nje ebugoseni? Ndiphangele? Hayi, kuyandoyisa! Ndingqibe? Hayi, ndineentloni!" 
Luke16:4 O-o-o, ndiyayazi into endiya kuyenza, ukuze xa ndithe ndasuswa ebugoseni bandamkele ezindlwini zabo abantu.’" 
Luke16:5 “Ke libabizele kulo ngabanye abanamatyala enkosini yalo, lathi kowokuqala: ‘Unatyala lingakanani na enkosini yam?’" 
Luke16:6 Wathi yena: ‘Likhulu leengqayi zeoyile yomnquma.’ Lathi kuye: ‘Thatha iphepha lakho, ukhawuleze uhlale phantsi, ubhale amashumi amahlanu.’" 
Luke16:7 Emva koko lathi komnye: ‘Wena ke unatyala lingakanani?’ Wathi yena: ‘Likhulu leengxowa zengqolowa.’ Lathi kuye: ‘Thatha iphepha lakho, ubhale amashumi asibhozo.’" 
Luke16:8 “Yaza inkosi yalo yalincoma ngokundweba kwalo eli gosa linamaqhinga; kuba kwezobulumko obusingisele koogxa babo, abeli phakade bayabagqitha abakhanyiselwe nguThixo.”" 
Luke16:9 Waqhuba ke uYesu wathi: “Nam ndithi kuni, ubutyebi obu bùdla ngokufunyanwa ngobuqhetseba, busebenziseni nina ngendlela eya kunakhela ubuhlobo, khon' ukuze nakuphelelwa bobo butyebi, nibe nokwamkelwa eminqubeni yaphakade." 
Luke16:10 Othembekileyo kokuncinane, uthembekile nakokukhulu; nongathembekanga kokuncinane, akathembekanga nakokukhulu." 
Luke16:11 Ukuba ngoko anibanga nakuthembeka kubutyebi beli phakade, ngubani na onokunithemba kobo butyebi bububo?" 
Luke16:12 Ukuba anibanga nakuthembeka kokukokomnye, ngubani na onokuninika okukokwenu?" 
Luke16:13 “Akukho sicaka sinokukhonza iinkosi ezimbini, kuba siya kuyithiya le, siyithande leya, okanye sibambelele kule, siyidele leya. Aninako ukukhonza uThixo kwanobutyebi.”" 
Luke16:14 Ke *nabaFarasi, amathanda-mali, bamvile uYesu ekuthetha konke oku, baza bamnximzela;" 
Luke16:15 waza wathi kubo: “Nina ningabazenza amalungisa phambi kwabantu, kodwa uThixo uyazazi iintliziyo zenu. Ke oko kuxatyisiweyo ngabantu kulizothe kuThixo." 
Luke16:16 “Kwakulawula *umthetho kaMosis nezibhalo *zabashumayeli bamandulo kwada kwaba yimihla kaYohane umbhaptizi. Ukususela ngoko kushunyayelwa iindaba ezimnandi zolawulo lukaThixo oluthwasileyo. Ke bonke beza kulo begxalathelana. 
Luke16:17 Kulula ukuba lidlule izulu nehlabathi kunokuba kucinywe nechaphazana eli lomthetho. 
Luke16:18 “Wonke umntu omalayo umfazi wakhe, azeke omnye, uyakrexeza; nomntu wonke ozeka umfazi owalene nendoda yakhe, uyakrexeza.”" 
Luke16:19 “Kwakukho sityebi sithile, esasivatha ezimbeje-mbeje, sisitya oozimuncu-muncu yonke imihla." 
Luke16:20 Esangweni laso kwakudla ngokusiwa hlwempu lithile, ligama linguLazaro, elalizele zizilonda," 
Luke16:21 lisoloko linqwenela ukutya nokuba yimvuthuluka ewa etafileni yesityebi eso. Bezisiza izinja, zikhothe izilonda zalo." 
Luke16:22 “Ke kaloku lafa ihlwempu elo, lasiwa kuAbraham zizithunywa zezulu. Safa ke nesityebi, sangcwatywa." 
Luke16:23 Sathi, sikwelabafileyo, saphakamisa amehlo aso sisentuthumbeni, sambona uAbraham ekude, uLazaro enaye." 
Luke16:24 Samemeza ke, sathi: ‘Bawo, Abraham, ndénzele inceba, uthume uLazaro ukuba athi nkxu incam yomnwe wakhe emanzini, aphozise ulwimi lwam, kuba ndiyathuthunjelwa kweli langatye!’" 
Luke16:25 “Kodwa uAbraham wathi: ‘Nyana, khumbula ukuba wena ebomini bakho wawufumana izinto ezimnandi, uLazaro yena efumana ezimbi; ngoku yena uyathuthuzelwa apha, kanti wena uyathuthunjelwa." 
Luke16:26 Kodwa ke, ngaphandle kwale nto yonke, phakathi kwethu nani kuthiwe zinzi umsantsa omkhulu, ukuze abathanda ukuwela, besuka apha besiya kuni, bangabi nako, nokuthi abalapho kuni bangabi nakuwelela kuthi.’" 
Luke16:27 Sathi ke isityebi: ‘Ndiyakubongoza ke ngoko, bawo, ukuba umthume emzini kabawo," 
Luke16:28 kuba ndinabantakwethu abahlanu. Makabaqononondise ukuze bangàthi nabo beze kule ndawo yentuthumbo.’ 
Luke16:29 “Kodwa uAbraham wathi kuso: ‘*Banomthetho kaMosis neencwadi *zabashumayeli bamandulo; mabeve zona.’ 
Luke16:30 Sathi ke sona: ‘Hayi, bawo Abraham; ukuba kuthe kwaya kubo ovela kwabafileyo, boguquka.’" 
Luke16:31 Wathi kuso: ‘Ukuba bathe ababeva ooMosis nabashumayeli, abayi koyiseka nokuba kuthe kwavuka bani kwabafileyo.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 UYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Azinakungehli izinto ezibakhubekisayo abantu; kodwa hayi ilishwa laloo mntu kuza ngaye ukukhubekisa! 
Luke17:2 Kunokuba akhubekise nokuba mnye kwaba bancinane, ngekumlungele kanye ukuba agangxwe ilitye lokusila entanyeni, aphoswe elwandle." 
Luke17:3 Zilumkeleni. “Ukuba uwenu uthe wakona, mkhalimele; ke ukuba uthe wazohlwaya, mxolele." 
Luke17:4 Nokuba uthe wakona kasixhenxe ngemini, waza wabuyela kuwe kasixhenxe ngemini, esithi: ‘Ndiv' intw' embi, ndixolele;’ wena uze umxolele.”" 
Luke17:5 *Abathunywa bâthi kuyo iNkosi: “Sandisele ukholo.” 
Luke17:6 Ke iNkosi yathi: “Ukuba beninokholo olungangokhozo lwembewu yemostade, beninokuthi kulo mthi: ‘Ncothuka, umiliseleke phakathi elwandle;’ uze unive.”" 
Luke17:7 “Nguwuphi na kuni onokuthi enesicaka silima okanye sisalusa, kuthi sakufika isicaka sivela emasimini, athi kuso kwangoko: ‘Hlala phantsi, utye’?" 
Luke17:8 Úya kuthi: ‘Ndilungiselele into etyiwayo, ubhinqe, undiququzelele nditye ndisele; ze ke emva koko utye usele nawe.’" 
Luke17:9 Isicaka asibulelwa ngokwenza loo nto siyimiselweyo, anditsho?" 
Luke17:10 Ngokukwanjalo nani, xa nithe nazenza zonke izinto enizimiselweyo, yithini: ‘Sizizicaka nje; senzé oko besimelwe kukukwenza.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Ke kaloku ekuhambeni kukaYesu esiya eJerusalem, ucande phakathi kwelamaSamariya nelaseGalili." 
Luke17:12 Ekungeneni kwakhe kwidolophana ethile, wahlangatyezwa ngamadoda alishumi aneqhenqa; aza amela mgama." 
Luke17:13 Akhwaza ke esithi: “Yesu, Mhlekazi, senzele inceba!”" 
Luke17:14 Ewabonile, wathi kuwo: “Hambani niye kuzibonakalisa kubabingeleli.” Kwathi ke ekuyeni kwawo ahlanjululwa." 
Luke17:15 Yathi enye kuwo, yakubona ukuba iphilisiwe, yabuya imncoma kakhulu uThixo;" 
Luke17:16 yaza yaziphosa ezinyaweni zikaYesu, ibulela kuye. Le ndoda yayingumSamariya." 
Luke17:17 Waza ke uYesu wathi: “Bekungahlanjululwanga balishumi na? Baphi na ke abalithoba? 
Luke17:18 Kutheni ke ukuba ibe ngulo wolunye uhlanga yedwa othe wabuya esiza kubulela uThixo?” 
Luke17:19 Wathi kwindoda leyo: “Phakama, uhambe; ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile.”" 
Luke17:20 Ke kaloku uYesu akubuzwa *ngabaFarasi ukuba ukulawula kukaThixo kuya kuqala nini na, uphendule wathi: “Ulawulo lukaThixo alubonakali ukuthwasa kwalo." 
Luke17:21 Kananjalo akuyi kuthiwa: ‘Nalu apha! Naluya phaya!’ Kuba kaloku ulawulo lukaThixo seluthwasile.” 
Luke17:22 Ke wathi kubo abafundi: “Kuya kufika imihla eniya kunqwenela ngayo ukubona nokuba mnye umhla wakhe *uNyana woLuntu ningawuboni. 
Luke17:23 Baya kuthi kuni: ‘Nankuya phaya! Nanku apha!’ Ze ningayi ke, ningabalandeli nokubalandela;" 
Luke17:24 kuba kwanjengokuba umbane usithi menye ucanda isibhakabhaka, woba njalo ngomhla wakhe uNyana woLuntu." 
Luke17:25 Kodwa kuqala uNyana woLuntu umelwe kukuva ubunzima obukhulu, alahlwe sesi sizukulwana." 
Luke17:26 Njengoko kwakunjalo ngemihla kaNowa, koba kwanjalo ngemihla yakhe uNyana woLuntu." 
Luke17:27 Babesidla, besela, bezeka, besendisa, kwada kwangumhla wokungena kukaNowa enqanaweni; wafika unogumbe, wabatshabalalisa bonke." 
Luke17:28 Kwaba kwanjalo nangemihla kaLothe. Babesidla, besela, bethenga, bethengisa, betyala, besakha;" 
Luke17:29 kodwa ngemini awaphuma ngayo uLothe eSodom, kwawa umlilo nesalfure ezulwini, batshatyalaliswa bonke." 
Luke17:30 Kuya kuba njalo kanye ngemini yokubonakala kwakhe uNyana woLuntu. 
Luke17:31 “Ngaloo mhla makangathi ophezu kwendlu ehle aye kuzithatha iimpahla zakhe ezisendlwini. Kwangokunjalo nosemasimini makangabuyeli kokushiyekileyo. 
Luke17:32 Khumbulani ngomka-Lothe! 
Luke17:33 Umntu ofuna ukusindisa ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo; nothe wabulahla, uya kubulondoloza." 
Luke17:34 Inene ngobo busuku kothi abantu bebabini belele ndawonye, omnye athathwe, omnye ashiywe." 
Luke17:35 Abafazi ababini bothi besila ndawonye, omnye athathwe, omnye ashiywe. [" 
Luke17:36 Amadoda amabini othi esentsimini, enye ithathwe, enye ishiywe.]”" 
Luke17:37 Ke abafundi baphendula bathi kuYesu: “Phi na, Nkosi?” Yaza ke yathi kubo: “Apho sikhoyo isidumbu kulapho aya kuhlanganisana khona amaxhalanga.”" 
Luke18:1 UYesu wabenzela umzekeliso ukubakhuthaza ukuba bahlale bethandaza bengatyhafi," 
Luke18:2 wathi: “Kwidolophu ethile kwakukho umgwebi owayengamoyiki uThixo, engahloneli mntu." 
Luke18:3 Ke kuloo dolophu kwakukho mhlolokazi uthile ubemana esiza kuye athi: ‘Ndikhulule kummangaleli wam.’ 
Luke18:4 Kwaba mzuzu engavumi, kodwa kamva waqiqa esithi: ‘Nakuba ndingamoyiki uThixo, ndingahloneli namntu," 
Luke18:5 noko, ngenxa yokuba lo mhlolokazi endikhathaza, ndomgwebela ndimkhulule, hleze ndide ndikruquke nguye.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Yaqhuba ke iNkosi yathi: “Kuveni okuthethwa ngulo mgwebi ungenabulungisa. 
Luke18:7 Ngaba yena uThixo akayi kubaphindezelela na abanyulwa bakhe abakhala kuye imini nobusuku? Akayi kukhawuleza na ukubanceda? 
Luke18:8 Ngenene, uya kubaphindezelela kamsinya. Kodwa ke, akufika yena *uNyana woLuntu, ngaba wolufumana na ukholo ehlabathini apha?”" 
Luke18:9 Ke kaloku uYesu uthethe lo mzekeliso kwabathile, ababekholose ngokuzicingela ukuba bangamalungisa, bebadelile abanye:" 
Luke18:10 “Amadoda amabini enyuka aya *endlwini kaThixo, esiya kuthandaza. Enye *yayingumFarasi, enye ingumqokeleli-rhafu." 
Luke18:11 “Ke yena umFarasi wayemi ethandaza esithi: ‘Thixo, ndiyabulela kuba ndingènjengabanye abantu, abaphangi, izikhohlakali, abakrexezi, ndingènjengaye nalo mqokeleli-rhafu." 
Luke18:12 Ndizila ukutya kabini ngeveki. Ndinikela ngesishumi sako konke endikuzuzayo.’ 
Luke18:13 “Ke yena umqokeleli-rhafu wayemi qelele, engathandi nokuwaphakamisela ezulwini amehlo akhe. Wayemana eziphothula izandla, esithi: ‘Thixo, yiba netarhu kum, mna moni.’" 
Luke18:14 Inene, wagoduka umqokeleli-rhafu lowo elilungisa kuThixo kunomFarasi lowo; kuba kaloku wonke umntu oziphakamisayo uya kuthotywa, nozithobayo uya kuphakanyiswa.”" 
Luke18:15 Abantu babesiza neentsana zabo kuYesu ukuze azibeke izandla. Beyibonile loo nto, abafundi babakhalimela." 
Luke18:16 Ke yena uYesu wazibizela kuye iintsana, esithi: “Bayekeni abantwana beze kum, ningabanqandi, kuba ábalawulwa nguThixo ngabanjengabo." 
Luke18:17 Ndithi kuni, inene, othe akakuthobela njengomntwana ukulawulwa nguThixo, soze abuve ubuncwane bolo lawulo.”" 
Luke18:18 Umphathi othile wabuza kuYesu esithi: “Mfundisi olungileyo, ndingenza ntoni na ukuze ndibudle ilifa ubomi obungunaphakade?”" 
Luke18:19 UYesu wathi kuye: “Kutheni usithi ndilungile nje? Akukho mntu ulungileyo. Mnye kuphela olungileyo: nguThixo. 
Luke18:20 Uyayazi imithetho ethi uze ungakrexezi; uze ungabulali; uze ungebi; uze ungangqini ubuxoki; beka uyihlo nonyoko.” 
Luke18:21 Ke yena wathi: “Zonke ezo zinto ndazigcina kwasebuncinaneni bam.” 
Luke18:22 Ekuvile oko uYesu, wathi kuye: “Kusekho into enye oyisweleyo: zithengise zonke izinto onazo, wabele amahlwempu imali leyo; woba nobutyebi ezulwini; uze kum, ube ngumlandeli wam.”" 
Luke18:23 Ezivile ezo ndawo, wadana, kuba wayesisinhanha." 
Luke18:24 UYesu, ekubona ukudana kwakhe, wathi: “Hayi ubunzima bokuba izityebi zikuxhamle ukulawulwa nguThixo." 
Luke18:25 Kungâlula ukuba inkamela iphumele entunjeni yenaliti, kunokuba isityebi sixhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo.”" 
Luke18:26 Abo bevayo ke bathi: “Ngubani ke onokusindiswa?” 
Luke18:27 Waza uYesu wathi: “Oko aba umntu akunakwenzeka, kunokwenziwa nguThixo.”" 
Luke18:28 Ke uPetros wathi: “Khangela, thina sishiye zonke izinto sakulandela.”" 
Luke18:29 Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, akukho namnye ushiye indlu, nokuba ngumfazi, nokuba ngabantakwabo, nokuba ngabazali, nokuba ngabantwana, ngenxa yokufuna ukulawulwa nguThixo," 
Luke18:30 ongayi kuthi ngoku ngalo eli xesha amkele ngokuphinda-phindiweyo, aze kwiphakade elizayo amkele ubomi obungunaphakade.”" 
Luke18:31 Ke uYesu wabathatha abafundi abalishumi elinambini, wathi kubo: “Ngoku ke siyemka, siya eJerusalem. Ke zonke izinto abazibhalayo *abashumayeli ngaye *uNyana woLuntu, ziya kuzaliseka." 
Luke18:32 UNyana woLuntu uya kunikelwa kwabasemzini, kudlalwe ngaye, aphathwe kakubi, atshicelwe." 
Luke18:33 Baya kumkatsa, bambulale; aze athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke.”" 
Luke18:34 Ke bona abafundi abaqondanga nento le kwezi zinto. Intsingiselo yala mazwi yayifihlakele kubo, bengazazi ezi zinto azithethayo." 
Luke18:35 Kwathi, ekusondeleni kukaYesu eJeriko, kwabakho mfama ithile, ihleli ngasendleleni ingqiba." 
Luke18:36 Yakuva kudlula isihlwele, yabuza ukuba ngaba yintoni na le." 
Luke18:37 Bayixelela bathi: “Kudlula uYesu waseNazarete.” 
Luke18:38 Yaza yabhomboloza isithi: “Yesu, Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba!”" 
Luke18:39 Abo babehamba ngaphambili bayikhalimela ukuba ithi tu, kodwa kwaba kukhona yona ikhwazayo ngakumbi, isithi: “Nyana kaDavide, ndenzele inceba!”" 
Luke18:40 Wema uYesu, wathi imfama leyo mayiziswe kuye. Yakusondela ke wayibuza esithi:" 
Luke18:41 “Ufuna ukuba ndikwenzele ntoni na?” Yathi imfama kuye: “Nkosi yam, ndicela ukuba ndibuye ndibone.”" 
Luke18:42 Wathi kuyo uYesu: “Kulungile ke, bona! Ukholo lwakho lukuphilisile.”" 
Luke18:43 Yabuya yabona kwangoko, yamlandela uYesu, ibulela uThixo. Bonke abantu, bakukubona oko, bamdumisa uThixo." 
Luke19:1 UYesu wangena eJeriko, egqitha khona." 
Luke19:2 Ke kaloku kwakukho ndoda ibizwa ngokuba nguZakeyi, eyayiyintloko yabaqokeleli-rhafu, isisityebi." 
Luke19:3 Yayifuna ukubona uYesu, kodwa ngenxa yokusithwa yindimbane ayaba nako, kuba yayimfutshane ngesithomo." 
Luke19:4 Yabaleka ke, yaya ngaphambili, yakhwela emthini womthombe ukuze imbone, kuba wayeza kudlula apho." 
Luke19:5 Akufika kuloo ndawo, wakhangela phezulu uYesu, wathi kuyo: “Zakeyi, khawuleza uhle, kuba namhlanje ndimelwe kukuba lundwendwe lwakho.”" 
Luke19:6 Wakhawuleza ke wehla uZakeyi, waza wamkela uYesu ngovuyo." 
Luke19:7 Bakuyibona loo nto, bakhalaza bonke, besithi: “Uye kungena endlwini yomntu *ongumoni.”" 
Luke19:8 Waphakama uZakeyi, wathi kuyo iNkosi: “Khangela, isiqingatha sempahla yam, Nkosi, ndisinika amahlwempu. Kanti nokuba ndidle nto kabani na ngobuqhetseba, ndimbuyisela kane.”" 
Luke19:9 Ke uYesu wathi kuye: “Namhlanje lufikile usindiso kule ndlu, kuba noZakeyi lo ungunyana ka-Abraham." 
Luke19:10 Kaloku yena *uNyana woLuntu wezela ukufuna kwanokusindisa abantu abalahlekileyo.”
