Luke19:11 UYesu wabenzela umzekeliso abo babemva ethetha ezi zinto. Wayeselekufuphi neJerusalem; baye bona besiba ulawulo lukaThixo loba seluzinzile ngelo xesha. 
Luke19:12 Ke wathi: “Inkosana ethile yahambela kwilizwe elikude, isiya kuthatha amagunya okulawula, iza kubuya ibuye." 
Luke19:13 Izibizile ke izicaka zayo ezilishumi, yazinika imali engangekhulu leerandi sisinye, yathi kuzo: ‘Rhwebani, ndide ndibuye.’" 
Luke19:14 Ke bona abemi belizwe laloo nkosana babeyithiyile, baza bathuma izigidimi emva kwayo, besithi: ‘Asifuni ukuba lo abe ngukumkani wethu.’" 
Luke19:15 “Yakuba ke ibekiwe yangukumkani inkosana le, ibuyile, yaza yathi mazibizelwe kuyo ezo zicaka yayizinike imali leyo, ukuze ive kuzo ngazinye ukuba zingenise ntoni na ngokurhweba." 
Luke19:16 Seza ke esokuqala, sathi: ‘Nkosi, ikhulu lakho lizele ishumi lamakhulu.’" 
Luke19:17 Yathi kuso: ‘Hee ke, sicakandini esilungileyo! Ngenxa yokuba ubuthembekile kokuncinane, ndikunika igunya kwiidolophu ezilishumi.’" 
Luke19:18 Seza nesesibini, sathi: ‘Nkosi, ikhulu lakho lenze isihlanu samakhulu.’" 
Luke19:19 Yathi nakweso: ‘Wena ndikunika igunya kwiidolophu ezintlanu.’ 
Luke19:20 “Seza nesinye, sathi: ‘Nkosi, nali ikhulu lakho. Bendilithandele ngelaphu," 
Luke19:21 kuba bendikoyika, ngokuba ungumntu ongqabalala; uthatha ongakubekanga, uvune ongakuhlwayelanga.’" 
Luke19:22 Yathi kuso: ‘Ndiza kukugweba ngokuphuma emlonyeni wakho, sicakandini esikhohlakeleyo. Ubusazi nje ukuba ndingumntu ongqabalala, othatha angakubekanga, avune angakuhlwayelanga;" 
Luke19:23 kutheni ke imali le yam ungayigcinisanga ebhankini, ze ke mna ekufikeni kwam ndiyifumane inenzala?’" 
Luke19:24 “Yathi kwababemi ngakhona: ‘Mhlutheni ikhulu elo, nilinike lowo uneshumi lamakhulu.’" 
Luke19:25 Ke bathi kuyo: ‘Nkosi, uneshumi lamakhulu!’" 
Luke19:26 Yathi: ‘Inene, wonke umntu onolutho uya kunikwa; ongenanto ke, uya kuhluthwa kwanaloo nto anayo." 
Luke19:27 Ke zona ezo ntshaba zam zingafunanga ukuba ndibe ngukumkani wazo, ziziseni apha, nizibulale apha phambi kwam.’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Akuba ezithethile ezi zinto, uYesu wabandulela, wenyuka esiya eJerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Kwathi, akusondela eBhetefage naseBhetani, engasentabeni ekuthiwa yeyemiNquma, wathuma ababini kubafundi bakhe," 
Luke19:30 esithi kubo: “Hambani niye kule dolophana ikhangelene nathi. Nothi ningena nje kuyo, nifumane inkonyana yedonki ibotshelelwe, ekungazange kukhwele mntu kuyo. Yikhululeni, niyizise apha." 
Luke19:31 Ukuba ubani uthe kuni: ‘Niyikhululela ntoni loo donki?’ ze nithi: ‘Iyafunwa yiNkosi.’ ” 
Luke19:32 Basuka ke baya abo babethunyiwe, bafika kunjengoko wayetshilo uYesu." 
Luke19:33 Bakuyikhulula inkonyana, abaniniyo bathi kubo: “Niyikhululela ntoni loo nkonyana?”" 
Luke19:34 Bathi ke bona: “Iyafunwa yiNkosi.” 
Luke19:35 Bayisa ke kuYesu, bandlala iingubo zabo phezu kwayo inkonyana yedonki leyo, bamkhwelisa kuyo uYesu." 
Luke19:36 Ehamba njalo, bamana bezandlala iingubo zabo endleleni." 
Luke19:37 Ke kaloku akusondela ethambekeni leNtaba yemiNquma, yathi yonke inkitha yabafundi yavuya, yadumisa uThixo imemelela, imdumisa ngayo yonke imimangaliso eyayibonayo," 
Luke19:38 isithi: “Makabongwe lo Kumkani uzayo egameni leNkosi! Uxolo ezulwini; udumo kweliphezulu!” 
Luke19:39 Abathile *kubaFarasi esihlweleni apho bathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, bakhalimele abafundi bakho.”" 
Luke19:40 Waphendula wathi kubo: “Inene, kungáthi nje kukhe kwathi cwaka aba, kunkqangaze namatye la.”" 
Luke19:41 Akusondela uYesu, esibona isixeko, wasililela" 
Luke19:42 esithi: “Akwaba nawe, Jerusalem, ubuzazi namhlanje izinto ezikuzisela uxolo! Kodwa ngoku zifihlakele kuwe!" 
Luke19:43 Kuya kufika imihla eziya kuthi iintshaba zakho zakhe udonga lokuzikhusela ekukuhlaseleni kwazo, zikungqinge, zikuxine macala onke." 
Luke19:44 Ziya kukudiliza, zibatshabalalise abakuwe, zingashiyi nalinye ilitye phezu kwelitye, ngenxa yokuba ungalazanga ixesha lokuvelelwa kwakho nguThixo.”" 
Luke19:45 UYesu wangena *endlwini kaThixo, waza wabakhupha abo babethengisa khona," 
Luke19:46 esithi kubo: “*EziBhalweni uThixo uthi: ‘Indlu yam yindlu yokuthandaza.’ Ke nina niyenzé umqolomba wezihange.” 
Luke19:47 Imihla ngemihla wayefundisa endlwini kaThixo apho. Ke ababingeleli abaziintloko, nabachazi-mthetho, kwaneenkokheli zabantu, babefuna ukumbulala;" 
Luke19:48 kodwa ababanga nakufumana nto banokuyenza, kuba bonke abantu babenamathele kuye, bemphulaphula." 
Luke20:1 Kwathi ngenye imini, uYesu efundisa abantu *endlwini kaThixo, eshumayela iindaba ezimnandi, kwafika kuye ababingeleli abaziintloko, nabachazi-mthetho, namadoda amakhulu." 
Luke20:2 Bona bathetha naye besithi: “Khawutsho: ezi zinto uzenza ngagunya lini? Ingubani kakade okunike elo gunya?” 
Luke20:3 Waphendula ke wathi kubo: “Nam ndiza kunibuza umbuzo ube mnye; ze nindiphendule ke. 
Luke20:4 Ngaba ubhaptizo lukaYohane lwaluvela ezulwini, okanye lwaluvela ebantwini?”" 
Luke20:5 Baxoxa bodwa besithi: “Ukuba sithe: ‘Lwaluvela ezulwini,’ wothi: ‘Kwakutheni ke phofu ukuze ningakholwa?’" 
Luke20:6 Ukuba sithe: ‘Lwavela ebantwini,’ bonke abantu bosixuluba ngamatye, kuba babemvuma uYohane ukuba *ungumshumayeli.”" 
Luke20:7 Baphendula ke ngokuthi àbazi ukuba lwaluvela phi na. 
Luke20:8 Waza wathi kubo: “Nam ke andinixeleli ukuba ndizenza ngagunya lini na ezi zinto.” 
Luke20:9 Ke uYesu wabenzela umzekeliso abantu, wathi: “Umntu othile watyala isidiliya, waqeshisa ngaso kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe ixesha elide." 
Luke20:10 Ngexesha lokuvuthwa kweziqhamo wathuma isicaka kwabo balimi, ukuze bamnike eziqhameni zesidiliya eso. Basuka bona abalimi basibetha eso sicaka, semka singaphathanga nto." 
Luke20:11 Wabuya wathuma esinye isicaka kubo. Basibetha ke naso, badlala ngaso, naso semka singaphathanga nto." 
Luke20:12 Wabuya wathuma nesesithathu. Bathi naso basingxwelerha, basigxotha." 
Luke20:13 Wathi umnini-sidiliya: ‘Ndiya kuyithini na le nto? Mandithume unyana wam endimthandayo. Mhlawumbi bomhlonela yena.’ 
Luke20:14 Kodwa bakumbona abalimi, bathi omnye komnye: ‘Yindlalifa le. Masiyibulale, ilifa libe lelethu.’" 
Luke20:15 Bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwesidiliya ke unyana lowo, bambulala. “Uya kuthini ke ngoko umnini-sidiliya?" 
Luke20:16 Wofika ababulale abo balimi, asinikele kubambi eso sidiliya.” Bakukuva oko, bathi: “Makungabi njalo!”" 
Luke20:17 Waza wabakhangela wathi: “Ithetha ntoni ke phofu le ndawo *eziBhalweni ithi: “ ‘Ilitye abâlideláyo abakhi lilo elaba lelona libalulekileyo lesiseko’? 
Luke20:18 “Bonke abathe bawa phezu kweli litye botyumka; ke bona elithe labawela bocoleka.” 
Luke20:19 Baza ke abachazi-mthetho nababingeleli abaziintloko bafuna ukumbamba kwangelo lixa, kodwa babesoyika abantu, kuba babesazi ukuba uwuthethe esingise kubo lo mzekeliso." 
Luke20:20 Bamcupha ke, bathumela iintlola ezizenza amalungisa, ukuze bambambise ngamazwi, ze ke bamnikele kwirhuluneli, yona iphetheyo inawo onke amagunya." 
Luke20:21 Iintlola ezi zambuza uYesu zisithi: “Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba wena uthetha ufundise okuyinyaniso, kuba akunamkhethe, koko uyifundisa ngenyaniso indlela kaThixo." 
Luke20:22 Ngaba ke kuvumelekile na ukurhafa *kuKhesare?” 
Luke20:23 Eliqondile iyelenqe lazo, wathi kuzo:" 
Luke20:24 “Ndiboniseni imali. Ke, ngokabani na lo mfanekiso neli gama?” Zaphendula zathi: “NgokaKhesare.”" 
Luke20:25 Wathi yena kuzo: “Ke, nikani uKhesare okufanele uKhesare, ninike uThixo okufanele uThixo.”" 
Luke20:26 Zakhohlwa ukumbambisa ngamazwi phambi kwabantu, zaza zathi cwaka, zimangalisiwe yimpendulo yakhe." 
Luke20:27 Kweza abathile *bakubaSadusi kuYesu (bona abo bathi akukho luvuko lwabafileyo), bambuza ke" 
Luke20:28 besithi: “Mfundisi, uMosis wasibhalela umthetho esithi: ‘Ukuba ubani uthe wafa, eshiya umfazi engekabi nabantwana, makathi umntakwabo amngene umfazi lowo, baze bamzalele abantwana umfi.’" 
Luke20:29 Ke kaloku kwakukho oonyana bomntu omnye abasixhenxe, yaza inkulu yazeka umfazi, yasweleka ingekabi nabantwana." 
Luke20:30 Wathi ke owesibini wamngena, naye wasweleka engekabi nabantwana." 
Luke20:31 Wenjenjalo nowesithathu. Bada baba naye bosixhenxe, kodwa abashiya mntwana." 
Luke20:32 Emva kwabo bonke wasweleka naye umfazi. 
Luke20:33 Ke ngoko eluvukweni lwabafileyo uya kuba ngumfazi wawuphi na kubo? Kuba kaloku bosixhenxe babemthathile.” 
Luke20:34 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo: “Abantu beli phakade bayazeka, besendiswa;" 
Luke20:35 kodwa bona abo bafanelwe kukuvuka ekufeni, baphile kwiphakade elizayo, àbazeki, àbendiswa." 
Luke20:36 Bona abasenakufa, kuba bafana nezithunywa zezulu. Bona bangoonyana bakaThixo, kuba kaloku bavukile kwabafileyo." 
Luke20:37 Ke yona into yokuba abafileyo bayavuka, noMosis uyayikhankanya kwisiqendu esithetha ngetyholo elivuthayo encwadini yakhe, apho abiza iNkosi ngokuthi inguThixo ka-Abraham, uThixo kaIsake, uThixo kaYakobi." 
Luke20:38 AkaThixo wabafileyo ke; unguThixo wabaphilayo, kuba kuye bonke bayaphila.”" 
Luke20:39 Baphendula ke abathile bakubachazi-mthetho, bathi: “Ngxatsho ke, Mfundisi; uthethe kakuhle!”" 
Luke20:40 Babengasenabuganga ke bakumbuza nento le. 
Luke20:41 Ke uYesu wathi kubo: “Batsho ngani ke ukuthi: ‘*UKrestu ngunyana kaDavide’? 
Luke20:42 Kanti noDavide ngokwakhe kwiNcwadi yeeNdumiso uthi: “ ‘Yathi iNkosi eNkosini yam: Hlala ngakum kweli wonga," 
Luke20:43 lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho.’ 
Luke20:44 “Ukuba uDavide ngokwakhe uthi uKrestu yiNkosi, angathini ke ukuba ngunyana wakhe?”" 
Luke20:45 Ke kaloku, besiva bonke abantu, uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe:" 
Luke20:46 “Balumkeleni abachazi-mthetho, abathanda ukuhamba ngezambatho ezide, bethanda ukuba kukhahlelwe kubo emabaleni embutho, befuna izihlalo eziphambili *ezindlwini zesikhungo, neendawo zamawonga ezidlweni." 
Luke20:47 Abo bayiphangayo imizi yabahlolokazi, baze bazenzise batsho ngemilembelele yemithandazo, ngabo abaya kufumana esona sohlwayo sikhulu.”" 
Luke21:1 Ewaphakamisile amehlo akhe, uYesu ubone izityebi zigalela iminikelo yazo kwisikhongozeli-mali." 
Luke21:2 Ke wabona mhlolokazi uthile ulihlwempu efaka iimalana ezimbini; 
Luke21:3 waza wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, lo mhlolokazi ulihlwempu unikele ngaphezu kwabo bonke," 
Luke21:4 kuba bonke aba banikele kuThixo bethatha ebutyebini babo, kanti yena, eswele nje, unikele ngako konke abenokuphila ngako.”" 
Luke21:5 Ke kaloku, xa abathile babethetha *ngendlu kaThixo, bencoma ukuhonjiswa kwayo ngamatye amahle nangezinto ezinexabiso, uYesu wathi:" 
Luke21:6 “Niyazibona zonke ezi zinto? Kuya kufika imihla ekungayi kusala litye phezu kwelitye lingàdilizwa.” 
Luke21:7 Bambuza ke uYesu besithi: “Mfundisi, ziya kubakho nini na ezi zinto? Uya kuba yintoni na umqondiso wokuzalisekiswa kwazo?”" 
Luke21:8 Wathi ke yena: “Lumkani ningalahlekiswa, kuba baninzi abaya kuza egameni lam; besithi banguye uKrestu, besithi ixesha lisondele. Ke nina ze ningabalandeli." 
Luke21:9 Xa nithe neva ngeemfazwe neziphithi-phithi, ze ningoyiki, kuba ezo zinto zimelwe kukubakho kuqala. Sona ke isiphelo asiyi kubakho kwangoko.”" 
Luke21:10 Waqhuba wathi kubo: “Uhlanga luya kuvukelana nohlanga, nokumkani avukelane nokumkani." 
Luke21:11 Kuya kubakho iinyikima zomhlaba ezinkulu, kwiindawo ngeendawo kubekho indlala nendyikityha yokufa. Kuya kubakho izinto ezoyikekayo, kwanemiqondiso emikhulu evela ezulwini." 
Luke21:12 “Ngaphambi kokuba zonke ezi zinto zenzeke, baya kunibamba, banitshutshise beninikela *ezindlwini zesikhungo nasezintolongweni, nisiwe phambi kookumkani neerhuluneli ngenxa yegama lam." 
Luke21:13 Oko ke kuya kuba lithuba lenu lokungqina. 
Luke21:14 Zimiseleni ukungayicingi kwangaphambili indlela eniya kuziphendulela ngayo," 
Luke21:15 kuba mna ndiya kuninika amazwi obulumko abangayi kuba nako ukubuphikisa nokumelana nabo bonke abachasene nani. 
Luke21:16 Ke kaloku niya kunikelwa nangabazali, nangabantakwenu, nazizizalwane, nazizihlobo, kubekho nababulawayo kuni." 
Luke21:17 Niya kuthiywa ngabantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam. 
Luke21:18 Ke akuyi kutshabalala nonwele olu lwentloko yenu. 
Luke21:19 Nothi ke ngokunyamezela kwenu nibuzuze ubomi benu.” 
Luke21:20 “Xa nithe nayibona iJerusalem irhawulwe yimikhosi, yazini ukuba kusondele ukutshabalala kwayo." 
Luke21:21 Ngelo xesha mabathi abakwelakwaJuda babalekele ezintabeni, bathi abo bangaphakathi kwayo iJerusalem baphume bemke. Ke abo basemaphandleni mabangangeni eJerusalem." 
Luke21:22 Yoba yimihla yempindezelo leyo, ukuze kuzaliseke konke okubhalwe *eziBhalweni." 
Luke21:23 Hayi ke abanzima nabanyisayo ngaloo mihla! Kuya kubakho imbandezelo enkulu elizweni, ingqumbo kaThixo ibe phezu kwaba bantu." 
Luke21:24 Baya kubulawa ngekrele, bathinjwe, basiwe kuzo zonke iintlanga. IJerusalem iya kutshatyalaliswa ziintlanga de liphele ixesha lazo.”" 
Luke21:25 “Kuya kubakho imiqondiso elangeni nasenyangeni nasezinkwenkwezini; emhlabeni kubekho iintlanga ezicinezelekileyo, zididekile kukugquma kolwandle namaza." 
Luke21:26 Abantu boba besifa luloyiko, bexhalabele izinto ezilifikelayo ihlabathi, kuba konke okunamandla esibhakabhakeni kodunga-dungeka." 
Luke21:27 Baya kumbona ke *uNyana woLuntu esiza ngelifu, enamandla nobuqaqawuli obukhulu." 
Luke21:28 Ke kaloku zakuqala ukubakho ezi zinto, yimani nkqo, niphakamise iintloko zenu, kuba isondele inkululeko yenu.”" 
Luke21:29 Wabenzela umzekeliso uYesu, esithi: “Khangelani umkhiwane nayo yonke imithi." 
Luke21:30 Xa seyivelisa amagqabi, nithi nakukubona oko, nazi ukuba ihlobo lithwasile." 
Luke21:31 Kwangokunjalo nani, xa nithe nazibona ezi zinto zisenzeka, yazini ukuba ulawulo lukaThixo lusemnyango." 
Luke21:32 “Ndithi kuni, inene, asiyi kudlula esi sizukulwana zingadanga zenzeke zonke ezi zinto." 
Luke21:33 Liya kudlula izulu nehlabathi; ke wona amazwi am akasayi kuze adlule.” 
Luke21:34 “Zilumkeleni ke, hleze iintliziyo zenu zenziwe buthuntu buburhovu, nakukunxila, nangamaxhala obu bomi, ize loo mini inifikele ngebhaqo;" 
Luke21:35 kuba iya kubafikela ngokomgibe bonke abahleliyo phezu kwehlabathi lonke. 
Luke21:36 Ke ngoko phaphamani maxa onke, nikhunga, ukuze nibe namandla okuziphepha zonke ezi zinto ziza kwenzeka, nize nibe nokuma phambi *koNyana woLuntu.”" 
Luke21:37 Ke kaloku emini uYesu ebefundisa *endlwini kaThixo, athi ngokuhlwa aye kulala eNtabeni yemiNquma." 
Luke21:38 Kwakusasa bonke abantu babesiza kumphulaphula endlwini kaThixo. 
Luke22:1 Ke kaloku lalisondele itheko lezonka ezingenagwele, ekuthiwa *yiPasika." 
Luke22:2 Ke ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho babefuna indlela efihlakeleyo yokumbulala uYesu, kuba babesoyika abantu." 
Luke22:3 Wangena ke uSathana kuJudas ekuthiwa nguSikariyoti, owayengomnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini." 
Luke22:4 Wesuka waya kubhunga nababingeleli abaziintloko nabagcini *bendlu kaThixo, wacebisana nabo ngeyona nto anokuyenza ukuze babe nokumbamba uYesu." 
Luke22:5 Bavuya ke bona, bagqiba kwelokuba bamnike imali," 
Luke22:6 waza wavuma, waba soloko ezungula ukufumana ithuba lokumbambisa kungekho sihlwele." 
Luke22:7 Wafika ke loo mhla wesidlo sezonka ezingenagwele ekwakumele ukuxhelwa ngawo ixhwane *lePasika. 
Luke22:8 UYesu ke wathuma uPetros noYohane, esithi: “Hambani niye kusilungiselela iPasika.”" 
Luke22:9 Baza bathi kuye: “Ufuna ukuba siyilungiselele phi na?” 
Luke22:10 Wathi kubo: “Khangelani, nakungena esixekweni, nodibana nomfo ophethe ingqayi yamanzi. Ze nimlandele, niye kuloo ndlu angena kuyo;" 
Luke22:11 nize nithi kumnini-mzi: ‘Úthi uMfundisi: Liphi na igumbi leendwendwe apho ndingayidlela khona iPasika nabafundi bam?’ 
Luke22:12 Yena wonibonisa igumbi elikhulu eliphezulu, elinempahla yalo. Lungisani apho ke.”" 
Luke22:13 Bemka, bafika kunjengoko ebetshilo kubo, baza bayilungiselela iPasika." 
Luke22:14 Lakufika ixesha, uYesu uye kuhlala etafileni enabathunywa bakhe;" 
Luke22:15 waza wathi kubo: “Bendilangazelela kakhulu ukuyitya kunye nani le Pasika, ndingekabuva ubunzima." 
Luke22:16 Inene, andiyi kuba sayidla konke, de ibe izalisekile kulawulo olutsha lukaThixo.”" 
Luke22:17 UYesu ke wathatha indebe, wabulela, waza wathi: “Yithatheni, nabelane ngayo." 
Luke22:18 Inene, andisayi kusela kwincindi yomdiliya lude luthwase ulawulo olutsha lukaThixo.”" 
Luke22:19 Wathatha isonka ke, wabulela, wasiqhekeza, wabanika esithi: “Ngumzimba wam lo [onikelwa ngenxa yenu. Oku kwenzeleni ukundikhumbula.”" 
Luke22:20 Bakugqiba ukutya wayithatha kwangokunjalo nendebe, wathi: “Le ndebe ingumnqophiso omtsha osungulwa kukuphalala kwegazi lam.]" 
Luke22:21 “Kodwa, niyabona, lowo undingcatshayo ukunye nam apha etafileni." 
Luke22:22 Okunene yena uNyana woLuntu uyemka njengoko amiselweyo nguThixo; kodwa hayi ilishwa laloo mntu uNyana woLuntu angcatshwa nguye!” 
Luke22:23 Baza ke bona babuzana bodwa ukuba ngaba ngubani na kubo oza kuyenza le nto. 
Luke22:24 Ke kaloku kwabakho ukubangisana phakathi kwabafundi ngokuba nguwuphi na kubo ekunokuthiwa ngoyena mkhulu. 
Luke22:25 UYesu wathi kubo: “Ookumkani beentlanga balawula ngegqudu, kanti ke kwabona kuthiwa ngoothandabantu." 
Luke22:26 Ke nina ze ningabi njalo; omkhulu kuni makabe njengomncinci, nokhokelayo afane nokhonzayo." 
Luke22:27 Nguwuphi na kakade omkhulu: ngulowo uhleli etafileni, nokuba ngulowo uzisa ukutya etafileni? Asingulowo uhleli etafileni na? Ke mna phakathi kwenu ndinjengesicaka." 
Luke22:28 “Nina nahlala nihleli nam ekulingweni kwam. 
Luke22:29 Kwanjengokuba uBawo endinike igunya lokulawula, nam ndininika elo gunya," 
Luke22:30 ukuze nitye, nisele, etafileni yam kwikomkhulu lam, nihlale ezikhundleni zokulawula, nigweba izindlu ezilishumi elinambini zakwaSirayeli.”" 
Luke22:31 UYesu wathi: “Uyabona, wena Simon, uSathana ebenibanga efuna ukunihlungula okwengqolowa," 
Luke22:32 kodwa mna ndikuthandazele ukuba ukholo lwakho lungapheli. Nawe ke, xa uthe waguquka, uze uwomeleze amakholwa.”" 
Luke22:33 UPetros ke wathi kuye: “Nkosi, ndixolèlè nokuya kunye nawe entolongweni nokuba kusekufeni.”" 
Luke22:34 UYesu wathi: “Inene, Petros, kothi namhlanje ingekakhali inkuku, ube wena sewukhanyele kathathu ukuba uyandazi.”" 
Luke22:35 Ke uYesu wathi kubo: “Ngôkúyâ ndandinithume ningenasipaji, nangxowa yamphako, nazihlangu, nakha naswela nto na?” Bathi ke bona: “Nento le.”" 
Luke22:36 Waza wathi kubo: “Ke ngoku lowo unesipaji makasithathe, enjenjalo nonengxowa yomphako, aze nalowo ungenakrele athengise ingubo yakhe alithenge." 
Luke22:37 Inene, kuya kwenzeka kum oko kubhaliweyo *eziBhalweni kwathiwa: ‘Wabalelwa kwizaphula-mthetho,’ kuba oko kubhaliweyo ngam akunakungenzeki.”" 
Luke22:38 Ke bona bathi: “Nkosi, nanga amakrele amabini.” Waza wathi kubo: “Kwanele.”" 
Luke22:39 UYesu waphuma waza ngokwesiqhelo sakhe waya eNtabeni yemiNquma. Bamlandela ke abafundi bakhe. 
Luke22:40 Akufika apho, uYesu wathi kubo: “Thandazani ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni.”" 
Luke22:41 Wasuka kubo, wathi qelele, waguqa ngamadolo, wathandaza" 
Luke22:42 esithi: “Bawo, ukuba uyavuma, yisuse kum le ntlungu. Noko ke, makungabi kokuthandwa ndim, makube kokuthandwa nguwe okwenzekayo.” [" 
Luke22:43 Ke kwabonakala isithunywa kuye, sivela ezulwini, simomeleza." 
Luke22:44 Edandathekile kakhulu uYesu, kwaba kukhona athandaza ngenyameko, kwada ukubila kwakhe kwangathi ngamathontsi egazi esiwa emhlabeni.]" 
Luke22:45 UYesu ke waphakama ekuthandazeni, waya kubafundi bakhe, wafika belele, bedakumbile;" 
Luke22:46 waza wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nilale? Vukani, nithandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni.”" 
Luke22:47 UYesu esathandaza, kwathi gqi indimbane, ikhokelwa nguJudas, ongomnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini. Yena wasondela kuYesu ukuba amange." 
Luke22:48 Waza uYesu wathi kuye: “Judas, umngcatsha ngokumanga na *uNyana woLuntu?”" 
Luke22:49 Abo babemngqongile uYesu, bakukubona okuza kwenzeka, bathi kuye: “Nkosi, sibaxabele na ngekrele?”" 
Luke22:50 Omnye kubo waxabela isicaka sombingeleli omkhulu, wasinqumla indlebe yokunene." 
Luke22:51 Waza ke uYesu wathi: “Yekani; kwanele!” Wayichukumisa indlebe yesicaka eso, yaphila." 
Luke22:52 Ke uYesu wathi kumadoda amakhulu nababingeleli abaziintloko, nabagcini *bendlu kaThixo, ababeze kumbamba: “Nindiphathele amakrele neentonga, ngathi nize esihangeni?" 
Luke22:53 Bendinani imihla ngemihla endlwini kaThixo, anandibamba. Eli lithuba lenu, kuba kulawula igunya lobumnyama ngoku.”" 
Luke22:54 Bembambile uYesu, bamqhuba bamsa endlwini yombingeleli omkhulu. UPetros wayelandela ekude." 
Luke22:55 Kwakubaswe umlilo eyadini, kusothiwa, noPetros ke waya kotha kunye nabo." 
Luke22:56 Isicakazana esithile simbonile uPetros ehleli ngasemlilweni, samqwalasela, sathi: “Naló ebekunye naye!”" 
Luke22:57 Wakhanyela ke yena esithi: “Ntokazindini, andimazi loo mntu!”" 
Luke22:58 Kwakuba mzuzwana, wabonwa ngomnye owathi: “Nawe ungowabo.” Waza wathi uPetros: “He mfondini, andinguye!”" 
Luke22:59 Malunga neyure emva koko omnye watsho eqinisekile wathi: “Inene, nalo ikwanguwabo, kuba ukwangowaseGalili.”" 
Luke22:60 Wathi uPetros: “Mfondini, andazani tu nale nto uyithethayo!” Kwathi kwangoko, esathetha, yakhala inkuku." 
Luke22:61 Yajika iNkosi, yakhangela kuPetros. Walikhumbula ke uPetros ilizwi leNkosi elithi: “Namhlanje ingekakhali inkuku, wondikhanyela kathathu.”" 
Luke22:62 Waphuma phandle uPetros, watsho esikrakra." 
Luke22:63 Amadoda awayembambile uYesu, ayemenza intlekisa, emntlitha," 
Luke22:64 emgquma amehlo ambuze esithi: “Xela okubethileyo!” 
Luke22:65 Babethetha nezinye izinto ezininzi bemnyelisa. 
Luke22:66 Kwakusa yahlanganisana intlanganiso yamadoda amakhulu, nababingeleli abaziintloko, nabachazi-mthetho, uYesu bamsa entlanganisweni *yeBhunga labo," 
Luke22:67 bathi: “Ukuba wena unguye *uKrestu sixelele.” Wathi yena kubo: “Ukuba ndithe ndanixelela aniyi kukholwa. 
Luke22:68 Nokuba ke ndithe ndanibuza aniyi kundiphendula. 
Luke22:69 Ukususela ngoku *uNyana woLuntu uya kuhlala ewongeni kwaThixo uSomandla.” 
Luke22:70 Bathi bona: “Ùnguye na uNyana kaThixo?” Wathi kubo: “Kutsho nina ngokwenu.” 
Luke22:71 Bathi ke bona: “Sisabufunelani na obunye ubungqina? Kaloku sizivele ngokwethu amazwi akhe.” 
Luke23:1 Loo mpi yonke yamsa kuPilato uYesu; 
Luke23:2 yammangalela isithi: “Lo simfumene elahlekisa uhlanga, engavumi ukuba sirhafe *kuKhesare, esithi yena unguye *uKrestu uKumkani.”" 
Luke23:3 UPilato ke wambuza esithi: “Unguye na uKumkani wamaJuda?” Waphendula yena wathi: “Nawe utsho.” 
Luke23:4 UPilato wathi kubabingeleli abaziintloko nakwisihlwele: “Andifumani tyala kulo mntu.” 
Luke23:5 Kwaba kukhona bazingisayo besithi: “Údungadunga abantu, efundisa kulo lonke elakwaJuda, ukususela kwelaseGalili, kude kube lapha.”" 
Luke23:6 Akuva kukhankanywa elaseGalili, uPilato wabuza ukuba uYesu ngowalapho na;" 
Luke23:7 waza wathi, akuqonda ukuba ungowommandla ophethwe nguHerode, wamthumela kuHerode, owayeseJerusalem naye ngelo xesha." 
Luke23:8 UHerode akumbona uYesu, wavuya kunene; kwakukade efuna ukumbona, kuba wayeve kuthethwa lukhulu ngaye. Wayenqwenela nokubona umqondiso usenziwa nguYesu." 
Luke23:9 UHerode ke wabuza imibuzo emininzi, kodwa uYesu wathi tu." 
Luke23:10 Baphakama ababingeleli abaziintloko nabachazi-mthetho, bamtyhola ngolunya uYesu." 
Luke23:11 UHerode nempi yakhe bamenza into engento uYesu, behlekisa ngaye, bemthe wambu ngengubo eqaqambileyo, waza uHerode wambuyisela kuPilato." 
Luke23:12 Ngaloo mini baba zizihlobo uPilato noHerode, kuba babefudula bejongene ngezikhondo zamehlo." 
Luke23:13 Ke kaloku uPilato wababizela ndawonye ababingeleli abaziintloko nabaphathi bamaJuda, nabantu," 
Luke23:14 wathi kubo: “Nizise lo mntu kum nisithi udungadunga abantu. Ke ndimncinile phambi kwenu, ndaza andafumana tyala kuye kwezo zinto nimmangalela ngazo." 
Luke23:15 NoHerode akafumananga tyala kuye, kuba naku embuyisela kum. Niyabona, akukho nto ayenzileyo ingabangela ukuba afe." 
Luke23:16 Ndothi ke ngoko ndimbethe, ndimkhulule.” [" 
Luke23:17 Ke kaloku ngetheko *lePasika wayedla ngokubakhululela umbanjwa abe mnye.] 
Luke23:18 Bankqangaza ke bonke besithi: “Mbulale lo, usikhululele uBharabha!”" 
Luke23:19 UBharabha lo wayephoswe entolongweni ngenxa yesiphithi-phithi esithile esabakho esixekweni apho, kwanangokubulala." 
Luke23:20 Waphinda ngoko uPilato wathetha nabo, efuna ukumkhulula uYesu." 
Luke23:21 Kodwa bona bankqangaza besithi: “Mbethelele! Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!” 
Luke23:22 UPilato wathi kubo okwesithathu: “Ngoba enze bubi buni na? Andifumani tyala lingabangela ukuba afe. Ndothi ngoko ndimbethe, ndimkhulule.”" 
Luke23:23 Bamxina ke uPilato, bekhwaza ngamandla, becela ukuba uYesu abethelelwe emnqamlezweni. Kwema ngabo ke." 
Luke23:24 Wasuka uPilato wagweba ngelithi masenziwe isicelo sabo. 
Luke23:25 Wabakhululela lowo babemcela, owayethe ngenxa yesiphithi-phithi nokubulala waphoswa entolongweni. Ke yena uYesu wanikelwa ukuba kwenziwe kuye ngokwesicelo sabo." 
Luke23:26 Kwemkiwa ke noYesu, aza amajoni athi xhakamfu Simon uthile waseKirene, owayevela emaphandleni, awubeka phezu kwakhe umnqamlezo, ukuba awuthwale emva koYesu." 
Luke23:27 Wayelandelwa yinto eninzi yabantu, kukho nabafazi ababesenza isijwili, bemlilela." 
Luke23:28 Ejikile ke uYesu, wabakhangela, wathi: “Zintombi zaseJerusalem, sanukundililela mna; koko zilileleni nina nabantwana benu;" 
Luke23:29 kuba, niyabona, iyeza imihla ekuya kuthiwa ngayo: ‘Banoyolo abangazalanga, abangancancisanga mntwana.’" 
Luke23:30 Ngelo xesha baya kuthi ezintabeni: ‘Siweleni, nisifihle!’ ezindulini bathi: ‘Sigqumeleleni!’" 
Luke23:31 Xa utsha kangaka umthi oluhlaza, kobeka phi ke kowomileyo?”" 
Luke23:32 Amadoda amabini, awayezizihange, ayeqhutywa esiya kubulawa kunye noYesu." 
Luke23:33 Bakufika kuloo ndawo kuthiwa luKhakhayi, bambethelela emnqamlezweni khona apho uYesu, bezibethelela kwanezihange ezo, esinye ngasekunene, nesinye ngasekhohlo." 
Luke23:34 UYesu wathi: “Bawo, baxolele, kuba abayazi into abayenzayo.” Baza benza *amaqashiso, besabelana ngeengubo zakhe." 
Luke23:35 Abantu babebonela, abaphathi bamaJuda bemgculela, besithi: “Wabasindisa abanye; makazisindise ke naye, ukuba unguye *uKrestu, umnyulwa kaThixo.”" 
Luke23:36 Ayemphoxa ke namajoni, esiza asondeze iwayini emuncu kuye," 
Luke23:37 esithi: “Ukuba wena unguye uKumkani wamaJuda, zisindise.”" 
Luke23:38 Kwakubhalwe nombhalo wetyala lakhe phezulu emnqamlezweni, kwathiwa: “Lo nguKumkani wamaJuda.”" 
Luke23:39 Esinye isihange kwezo zazixhonywe kunye noYesu, sasimnyelisa, sisithi: “Akunguye na uKrestu? Zisindise ke, nathi usisindise.”" 
Luke23:40 Sasikhalimela esinye, sisithi: “Akumoyiki na wena uThixo, ukwawiselwe esi sigwebo nje?" 
Luke23:41 Esi sigwebo okunene sisifanele thina, kuba sivuzwa ngezenzo zethu; kodwa yena lo akenzanga nto imbi.”" 
Luke23:42 Saza sathi kuYesu: “Uzundikhumbule, Yesu, xa uthe weza kulawula.”" 
Luke23:43 UYesu wathi kuso: “Ndithi kuwe, inene, kwanamhlanje uya kuba nam emyezweni wakwaThixo.”" 
Luke23:44 Ke kaloku kwakumalunga nentsimbi yeshumi elinambini emini, laza lasuka latshona emini ilanga, kwaba mnyama phezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, kwada kwayintsimbi yesithathu emva kwemini." 
Luke23:45 Ikhuselo legumbi eliyingcwele *yendlu kaThixo lakrazuka kubini. 
Luke23:46 Wadanduluka ke uYesu ngezwi elikhulu, wathi: “Bawo, ndiyawunikela ezandleni zakho umoya wam!” Akuba etshilo, waphuma umphefumlo." 
Luke23:47 Ke umphathi-butho wamajoni, akukubona okuhlileyo, wamncoma uThixo, esithi: “Inene, lo mntu ebelilungisa.”" 
Luke23:48 Sakuba isihlwele esasihlangene kuloo mbono sikubonile okwenzekileyo, sagoduka sibambelele ezidleleni." 
Luke23:49 Ke bonke abazana noYesu, kwanabafazi ababemlandela bevela kwelaseGalili, babemele kude, bezikhangele ezi zinto." 
Luke23:50 Ke kwakukho indoda egama linguJosefu, eyayililungu leBhunga, iyindoda elungileyo elilungisa." 
Luke23:51 Yona yayingavumelananga necebo labo kwanesenzo sabo. Le ndoda yaseArimati, idolophu yamaJuda, yayilulindele ulawulo lukaThixo." 
Luke23:52 Yona ke yaya kuPilato, yawucela umzimba kaYesu;" 
Luke23:53 yaza yawuthula, yawusongela ngengubo yelinen, yawubeka engcwabeni elixholwe eliweni, ebekungekangcwatywa bani kulo." 
Luke23:54 KwakungoLwesihlanu, *uMhla wokuPhumla sewusondela." 
Luke23:55 Abo bafazi bàbelandela uYesu, bephuma eGalili, bâlandela uJosefu, balibona ingcwaba nomzimba kaYesu ubekwa kulo;" 
Luke23:56 baza babuya, balungisa iziqholo nezithambiso. Baphumla ke ngoMhla wokuPhumla ngokomthetho." 
Luke24:1 Kwakusekusasa ngeCawe ukunduluka kwâbo bafazi besiya engcwabeni, bephethe iziqholo ababezilungisile." 
Luke24:2 Balifumana ilitye liqengqiwe, lisusiwe engcwabeni." 
Luke24:3 Bakuba bengenile, abawufumananga umzimba weNkosi uYesu." 
Luke24:4 Kwathi, besakhohliwe yile nto, kwathi gqi amadoda amabini ngakubo, enezambatho ezibengezelayo." 
Luke24:5 Basuka boyika abafazi, baqondela phantsi, aza athi loo madoda: “Yini na ukuba ophilayo nimfune kwabafileyo? [" 
Luke24:6 Akakho apha, uvukile.] Khumbulani awakuthetha kuni esekwelaseGalili," 
Luke24:7 esithi: ‘*UNyana woLuntu umelwe kukunikelwa ezandleni zaboni, abethelelwe emnqamlezweni, athi ngomhla wesithathu abuye avuke.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Bawakhumbula ke amazwi akhe. 
Luke24:9 Bebuyile engcwabeni abafazi abo bazixela zonke ezo zinto kubafundi abalishumi elinanye nakubo bonke abanye. 
Luke24:10 YayinguMariya waseMagadala, noYohana, noMariya unina kaYakobi, nabanye abafazi ababenabo, abazixeláyo ezi zinto *kubathunywa." 
Luke24:11 Kubafundi oku kuthethwa ngaba bafazi kwaba ngathi kukulavuza, baza abakholwa. [" 
Luke24:12 Kodwa yena uPetros usuke wabaleka, waya engcwabeni, wathi akukhangela, wabona ingubo yelinen iyodwa, waza wagoduka emangalisiwe koko kwenzekileyo.]" 
Luke24:13 Kwangaloo mini kwasuka abafundi ababini baya e-Emawusi, idolophana emalunga neekhilomitha ezilishumi elinambini ukusuka eJerusalem." 
Luke24:14 Babethetha ngako konke okwakuthe kwenzeka. 
Luke24:15 Kwathi besathetha bebuzana, uYesu ngenkqu wasondela wahamba nabo," 
Luke24:16 kodwa bembona nje, kwasitheliswa kubo ukuba bamnakane." 
Luke24:17 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Zizinto zini na ezi nihamba nincokola ngazo?” Bema ke bematshekile; 
Luke24:18 waza waphendula omnye, lo ugama linguKleyopa, wathi kuye: “Nguwe kuphela na kwababekho eJerusalem ongazaziyo izinto ezenzeke khona kwezi ntsuku?”" 
Luke24:19 Wathi kubo: “Zinto zini na?” Bathi bona kuye: “Ezo zingoYesu waseNazarete, *owayengumshumayeli onamandla amakhulu ekwenzeni imiqondiso nasekuthetheni, engqinelwa nguThixo nangabo bonke abantu." 
Luke24:20 Ababingeleli abaziintloko nabaphathi bethu bamnikela ukuba agwetyelwe ukufa, waza wabethelelwa emnqamlezweni." 
Luke24:21 Ke thina besithembe ukuba nguye owokhulula uSirayeli. Kunjalo nje namhlanje lusuku lwesithathu zenzekile ezo zinto. 
Luke24:22 Kanti abafazi abathile beqela lethu, abathe baya engcwabeni kwakusasa, basothusile," 
Luke24:23 kuba bengawufumani umzimba wakhe, babuye besithi babone umbono wezithunywa ezithi uyaphila." 
Luke24:24 Basuka nabanye bethu, baya engcwabeni, bafika kunjengoko babetshilo abafazi. Ke yena abambonanga.”" 
Luke24:25 Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Ninje na kanti ukungaqondi! Nithatha kade kangaka na ukukholwa kuko konke abâkuthetháyo *abashumayeli! 
Luke24:26 *UKrestu ebengamelwe na kukuthi abuve obu bunzima, aze anyuselwe ewongeni?”" 
Luke24:27 Wabachazela kuzo zonke *iziBhalo iindawo ezithetha ngaye, eqalela kwiincwadi zikaMosis, waya kutsho kuzo zonke ezabashumayeli bamandulo." 
Luke24:28 Basondela ke kuloo dolophana babesiya kuyo, wanga uYesu uyagqitha;" 
Luke24:29 baza bona bamcela besithi: “Hlala nathi, kuba kuyahlwa, nemini seyimkile.” Wangena ke ukuba ahlale nabo." 
Luke24:30 Wathi, esetafileni kunye nabo, wathatha isonka, wabulela, wasiqhekeza, wabanika." 
Luke24:31 Aqabuka amehlo abo, bamazi. Wathi shwaka yena kubo." 
Luke24:32 Baza bathi omnye komnye: “Iintliziyo zethu bezingavuthi na luvuyo xa ebethetha nathi endleleni esityhilela iziBhalo?” 
Luke24:33 Besuka kwangelo lixa, babuyela eJerusalem, babafumana abafundi abalishumi elinanye behlanganisene ndawonye kunye nâbo babenabo," 
Luke24:34 besithi: “Inene, iNkosi ivukile! Ibonakele kuSimon.”" 
Luke24:35 Bakubalisa ke okwenzeke endleleni, nokutyhileka kweNkosi kubo xa yayiqhekeza isonka." 
Luke24:36 Ke kaloku, besazithetha ezi zinto, uYesu ngenkqu wema phakathi kwabo, [wathi kubo: “Uxolo malube nani.”]" 
Luke24:37 Basuka bankwantya, baba babona into engengomntu ncam." 
Luke24:38 Wathi kubo: “Yini na ukuba nothuke? Kutheni na ukuba nibe nentandabuzo? 
Luke24:39 Khangelani izandla zam, niqonde ukuba ndim kanye. Ndiphatheni niqondisise ukuba ndingumntu, ndinenyama namathambo, njengoko nindibona ndinjalo.” [" 
Luke24:40 Etshilo wababonisa izandla neenyawo zakhe.] 
Luke24:41 Ke kaloku, bâthi bengekakholwa, bemangalisiwe bevuya, wathi kubo: “Ninanto ityiwayo na apha?”" 
Luke24:42 Bamnika intwana yentlanzi eyojiweyo," 
Luke24:43 wayithatha, wayitya bejongile." 
Luke24:44 UYesu ke wathi kubo: “Zizo ezi izinto endazithethayo kuni ndisenani, ndisithi zimelwe kukuzaliseka zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo ngam *emthethweni kaMosis, nasezincwadini *zabashumayeli, nasezindumisweni.”" 
Luke24:45 Waza ke wazikhanyisela iingqondo zabo, ukuze baziqonde *iziBhalo;" 
Luke24:46 wathi kubo: “Kubhalwe kwathiwa *uKrestu umelwe kukuthi eve ubunzima, abuye avuke kwabafileyo ngomhla wesithathu." 
Luke24:47 Kukwabhalwe kusithiwa zothi egameni lakhe zivakaliswe kuzo zonke iintlanga iindaba zenguquko noxolelo lwezono, kuqalelwa eJerusalem." 
Luke24:48 Nina ke ningamangqina ezi zinto. 
Luke24:49 Niyabona, mna ndilinika nina idinga likaBawo. Ze nihlale ke eJerusalem nide nixhotyiswe ngamandla avela phezulu.”" 
Luke24:50 UYesu ke waphuma nabafundi bakhe, wabasa ngaseBhetani; waza waphakamisa izandla zakhe, wabasikelela." 
Luke24:51 Kwathi esabasikelela, wahlukana nabo, [wanyuswa wasiwa ezulwini]." 
Luke24:52 Ke bona [bakuba bequbudile,] babuyela eJerusalem benovuyo olukhulu;" 
Luke24:53 baza basoloko bekho *endlwini kaThixo, bembonga uThixo." 
John1:1 Ekuqaleni, kungekadalwa, wayeselekho uLizwi. ULizwi lo wayekunye noThixo, naye ngokwakhe enguThixo." 
John1:2 Yena wayekunye noThixo kwasekuqalekeni. 
John1:3 Izinto zonke zadalwa ngaye; ngaphandle kwakhe akubangakho nto idaliweyo. Indalo yonke 
John1:4 yaba nobomi ngaye, baza obo bomi baba lukhanyiso eluntwini." 
John1:5 Olu khanyiso lukhanya ebumnyameni; kwaye ubumnyama abuzange bukoyise ukukhanya kwalo. 
John1:6 UThixo wathuma mntu uthile, ogama linguYohane." 
John1:7 Yena weza kungqina, engqinela ukukhanya, ukuze bonke bakholwe ngenxa yobungqina bakhe." 
John1:8 Yena uYohane ngokwakhe wayengelulo ukhanyiso, koko weza kungqina ngalo." 
John1:9 Lowo ulukhanyiso lwenene olukhanyisela wonke umntu, wayesiza ehlabathini." 
John1:10 Wafika ke yena ehlabathini; kanti, nangona ihlabathi labakho ngaye nje, alimqondanga." 
John1:11 Weza kwelakowabo, aza amawabo akamamkela." 
John1:12 Kodwa bonke abâmamkeláyo, bezinikele kuye ngokupheleleyo, wabanika igunya lokuba ngabantwana bakaThixo." 
John1:13 Ababanga ngabantwana bakaThixo ngokuzalwa bengabomlibo othile, okanye ngokuzalwa ngendlela yemvelo; nguThixo ngokwakhe obazeleyo." 
John1:14 ULizwi ke waba ngumntu, waza wahlala phakathi kwethu. Sabubukela ubungangamsha bakhe awabunikwa nguYise, njengoko ekukuphela koNyana wakhe; ubungangamsha ke obuphuphuma ububele nenyaniso." 
John1:15 UYohane wangqina ngoLizwi; wavakalisa esithi: “Lo ngulowo bendithetha ngaye xa bendisithi: ‘Lowo uza emva kwam mkhulu kunam, kuba wayeselekho ndingekabikho mna.’ ”" 
John1:16 Ngokuphuphuma kobubele bukaLizwi, thina sonke saphiwa iintsikelelo ezingenasiphelo." 
John1:17 Nakuba uThixo wasinika umthetho ngoMosis, ubabalo nenyaniso wasinika ngoYesu Krestu." 
John1:18 Akukho namnye umntu owakha wambona uThixo. Abantu bamazi uThixo ngokumaziswa nguNyana okukuphela kwakhe, yena okwanguThixo, ohlala ehleli esenyongweni kuYise." 
John1:19 Nabu ke ubungqina bukaYohane, oko amaJuda aseJerusalem athumela ababingeleli *nabaLevi kuye, okokuba ambuze athi: “Ungubani na?”" 
John1:20 Watsho ngokuphandle, engafihlisi, wathi: “Mna andinguye *uKrestu.”" 
John1:21 Bambuza besithi: “Ungubani ke? Ngaba unguEliya?” Yena wathi: “Hayi andinguye.” Bona bathi: “Ngaba unguye laa Mshumayeli?” Waphendula wathi: “Hayi, andinguye.”" 
John1:22 Ke ngoko bathi kuye: “Sixelele okokuba ungubani na, ukuze sibe nokubaphendula abo basithumileyo. Ngaba uthini na wena ngawe ngokwakho?”" 
John1:23 Waphendula uYohane, ecaphula kumazwi *omshumayeli uIsaya, esithi: “Mna ndililizwi lodandulukayo entlango, lisithi: ‘Yilungiseleleni indlela iNkosi.’ ”" 
John1:24 Kwakukho nababethunywe *ngabaFarasi. 
John1:25 Bona bambuza uYohane besithi: “Ungáthini ke ukubhaptiza, ungenguye uKrestu, okanye uEliya, okanye laa Mshumayeli?”" 
John1:26 Wabaphendula uYohane wathi: “Mna ndinibhaptiza ngamanzi. Kambe ke phakathi kwenu kumi eningamaziyo. 
John1:27 Yena uza emva kwam, kodwa mna andifanele kukhulula nomtya lo wezihlangu zakhe.”" 
John1:28 Oku kwênzeka eBhetani, ngaphesheya kweJordan, apho uYohane wayebhaptiza khona." 
John1:29 Ngengomso uYohane wabona uYesu esiza kuye, wathi: “Nâlo ixhwane likaThixo lokungxengxezela isono sehlabathi." 
John1:30 Nguye lo bendixela yena xa bendisithi: ‘Emva kwam kuza umntu omkhulu kunam, kuba wayekho ndingekabikho mna.’" 
John1:31 Nam ngokwam bendingamazi; koko ndize kubhaptiza ngamanzi ngenjongo yokuba ndimazise kubantu bakwaSirayeli.” 
John1:32 UYohane wangqina esithi: “Ndibone uMoya oyiNgcwele esihla enjengehobe, evela ezulwini, waza wahlala phezu kwakhe." 
John1:33 Ke nam bendingamazi, kodwa lowo wandithumayo ukuba ndibhaptize ngamanzi, nguye owathi kum: ‘Lowo ùbone uMoya esihla phezu kwakhe, ahlale kuye, nguye obhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele.’" 
John1:34 Ke mna, ndikubonile nje oku, ndiyangqina okokuba lo nguye uNyana kaThixo.”" 
John1:35 Ngengomso uYohane wayelapho kwakhona, enababini kubafundi bakhe." 
John1:36 Waza wabona uYesu edlula apho, wathi: “Nâlo ixhwane likaThixo lokungxengxezelela isono.”" 
John1:37 Abafundi abo bamva esitsho, baza bamlandela uYesu." 
John1:38 Akubheka uYesu, wabona ukuba bayamlandela, waza wathi kubo “Ngaba nifuna ntoni na?” Baza bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, uhlala phi na?”" 
John1:39 Wathi kubo: “Yizani, nibone.” Bahamba kunye naye ke, bayibona indawo awayehlala kuyo, baza bahlala naye loo mini. Ixesha lalimalunga nentsimbi yesine emva kwemini." 
John1:40 YayinguAndreya, umntakwabo-Simon Petros, omnye wâbo bafundi babini beva ngoYohane, baza bamlandela uYesu." 
John1:41 Kwangoko uAndreya wabona umntakwabo uSimon, wathi kuye: “Simfumene uMesiya.” (Oko kukuthi “*uKrestu.”)" 
John1:42 Wamsa kuYesu ke; waza uYesu wamjonga, wathi: “Wena unguSimon, unyana kaYohane. Igama lakho loba *nguKefas.” (Oko kukuthi “Lwalwa.”)" 
John1:43 Ngengomso uYesu wabona ukuba makaye eGalili; waza wadibana noFilipu, wathi kuye: “Ndilandele.”" 
John1:44 Ke uFilipu wayengowaseBhetesayida, idolophu yakuloAndreya noPetros." 
John1:45 UFilipu wadibana noNataniyeli, wathi kuye: “Simbonile lowo uMosis wabhala ngaye *emthethweni, ekwâbhalwa ngaye *nangabashumayeli. NguYesu, unyana kaJosefu waseNazarete.”" 
John1:46 UNataniyeli wathi kuye: “Uthini! Kungákho nto ilungileyo inokuphuma eNazarete?” UFilipu wathi kuye: “Yiza, uzibonele.”" 
John1:47 UYesu akumbona uNataniyeli esiza kuye, wathi ngaye: “Ngenene nanko umSirayeli ekungekho nkohliso kuye.”" 
John1:48 UNataniyeli wathi kuye: “Ùndazela phi na?” UYesu wamphendula wathi: “Wena ndakubona usephantsi komkhiwane, engekakubizi uFilipu.”" 
John1:49 UNataniyeli wamphendula wathi: “Mfundisi, inene unguNyana kaThixo; unguKumkani wakwaSirayeli.”" 
John1:50 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ùkholwa ngokuba ndithe kuwe ndikuboné uphantsi komkhiwane? Uya kubona izinto ezingaphezulu lee kunezi.” 
John1:51 Wahambisa wathi kuye: “Ndithi kuni, inene, niya kulibona izulu livulekile, nezithunywa zikaThixo zinyuka zisihla phezu kwakhe *uNyana woLuntu.”" 
John2:1 Kwathi ngomhla wesithathu kwabakho umtshato eKana kwelaseGalili, ekho nonina kaYesu." 
John2:2 UYesu nabafundi bakhe babemenyiwe nabo kuloo mtshato. 
John2:3 Yakuphela iwayini, unina kaYesu wathi kuye: “Baphelelwe yiwayini.”" 
John2:4 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Mama, khawuyeke. Ixesha lam alikafiki.”" 
John2:5 Waza unina wathi kwizicaka: “Kwenzeni konke anixelelayo.” 
John2:6 Apho ke kwakukho imiphanda yelitye emithandathu eyayisetyenziswa ngamaJuda kwisiko lawo lokuhlambulula. Umphanda ngamnye wawumkhulu kangangokuba wawungena iilitha ezimalunga namashumi alithoba ukuya kwikhulu. 
John2:7 UYesu ke wathi kwizicaka: “Zalisani le miphanda ngamanzi.” Izicaka zayizalisa," 
John2:8 wathi kuzo: “Yikhani ngoku, nise kwinjoli.” Zenjenjalo ke," 
John2:9 yaza injoli yawangcamla amanzi ajikwe aba yiwayini, koko ingazi apho ivela khona le wayini. Yayizizicaka kuphela ezazisazi, kuba ayekhiwe zizo amanzi. Injoli ke yambiza umyeni," 
John2:10 yathi kuye: “Idla ngokukhutshwa kuqala iwayini elungileyo, kuthi zakuba zisele zanela iindwendwe, kukhutshwe enganeno. Kodwa wena uyigcine kwada kwangoku eyona wayini ilungileyo.”" 
John2:11 Lo mqondiso wakhe wokuqala uYesu wawenza eKana kwelaseGalili, ebonakalisa ubungangamsha bakhe; baza abafundi bakhe bakholwa kuye." 
John2:12 Emva koko uYesu, nonina, nabantakwabo, nabafundi bakhe, baya eKapernahum, bahlala khona iintsukwana." 
John2:13 Yayiselisondele *iPasika yamaJuda, waza uYesu waya kuyo eJerusalem." 
John2:14 *Endlwini kaThixo wafika kukho abathengisi beenkomo, neegusha, namahobe; kukho nabatshintshi-mali behleli ezitafileni zabo." 
John2:15 Wenza isabhokhwe ngentambo, wabakhupha bonke endlwini kaThixo, ezikhupha nezo gusha nezo nkomo. Wayichitha imali yabatshintshi, wabhukuqa nezo tafile zabo." 
John2:16 Waza wathi kwabathengisa amahobe: “Zikhupheni apha ezi zinto. Indlu kaBawo sanukuyenza indawo yokuthengisela.” 
John2:17 Bakhumbula ke abafundi bakhe okokuba *iziBhalo zithi: “Ukuzondelela indlu yakho, Thixo, kundongamele.”" 
John2:18 Zambuza ke iinkokheli zamaJuda zisithi: “Ùngenza mqondiso mni na wokusibonisa ukuba unalo igunya lokwenza ezi zinto?” 
John2:19 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Yidilizeni le ndlu. Mna ndoyakha kwakhona ngeentsuku ezintathu.” 
John2:20 Aza athi amaJuda: “Ukwakhiwa kwale ndlu kwaba yiminyaka emashumi mane anesithandathu. Ngaba wena ungayivusa na ngeentsuku ezintathu?” 
John2:21 Yona indlu uYesu awayethetha ngayo yayingumzimba wakhe. 
John2:22 Kwathi akuvuka kwabafileyo, bakhumbula abafundi bakhe okokuba wayekuthethile oku, baza bakholwa ziziBhalo nangamazwi awawathethayo uYesu." 
John2:23 Kwathi, xa uYesu wayeseJerusalem kwitheko *lePasika, abantu abaninzi bakholwa kuye bakubona imimangaliso ayenzayo." 
John2:24 Kodwa uYesu yena ebengathembelanga kubo, kuba ebazi bonke abantu." 
John2:25 Kwakungekho mfuneko yakuba kubekho bani umxelelayo ngomntu, kuba yena ezazi iintliziyo zabantu." 
John3:1 Kwakukho inkokheli yamaJuda, egama linguNikodimo. Yona yayiyeyehlelo *labaFarasi." 
John3:2 Ngabusuku buthile lo Nikodimo weza kuYesu, wathi: “Mfundisi, siyazi ukuba ungumfundisi ovela kuThixo, kuba akukho bani unako ukuyenza le miqondiso uyenzayo wena, ukuba uThixo akanaye.”" 
John3:3 UYesu waphendula wathi kuye: “Ndithi kuwe, inene, akukho namnye unokuxhamla ukulawulwa nguThixo, engathanga azalwe ngokutsha.”" 
John3:4 UNikodimo wathi kuye: “Angáthini na ukuzalwa umntu oselemdala? Kaloku akangekhe aphindele esizalweni sikanina, aze azalwe kwakhona.”" 
John3:5 Waphendula uYesu, wathi: “Ndithi kuwe, inene, ukuba umntu akathanga azalwe ngamanzi nanguMoya kaThixo, akanakulawulwa nguThixo." 
John3:6 Okuzalwa yinyama negazi kuyinyama negazi; okuzalwa nguMoya kunguMoya. 
John3:7 Sukumangaliswa kukuba ndithe kuwe: ‘Nimelwe kukuzalwa ngokutsha.’ 
John3:8 Umoya uphephezela apho uthanda khona, ùsive isandi sawo, kodwa ùbe ungawazi apho úvela khona nalapho úya khona. Bakwanjalo ke bonke abazelwe nguMoya kaThixo.”" 
John3:9 Waphendula uNikodimo esithi: “Ingenzeka njani le nto?” 
John3:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ungumfundisi omkhulu nje wakwaSirayeli, ungathini ukungazazi ezi zinto?" 
John3:11 Ndithi kuwe, inene, sithetha esikwaziyo, singqine esikubonileyo, kanti noko nisuka ningabamkeli ubungqina bethu." 
John3:12 Ukuba ndinixelele izinto zasehlabathini naza anakholwa, nothini ke ukukholwa ndakunixelela izinto zasezulwini?" 
John3:13 Akukho namnye wakha wenyuka waya ezulwini, ngaphandle kwalowo wehlayo evela ezulwini, *uNyana woLuntu." 
John3:14 “Njengokuba uMosis wayiphakamisayo inyoka entlango, umelwe kukuphakanyiswa kwangokunjalo naye uNyana woLuntu," 
John3:15 ukuze bonke abakholwayo kuye babe nobomi obungonaphakade. 
John3:16 Kaloku uThixo ihlabathi ulithande kangangokuba ude wancama uNyana okuphela kwakhe, ukuze wonke umntu ozinikele kuye ngokupheleleyo angatshabalali, koko abe nobona bomi bungenasiphelo." 
John3:17 Kuba kaloku uThixo akamthumanga uNyana wakhe ehlabathini ukuze aligwebe, koko wamthuma ukuze abe nguMsindisi walo." 
John3:18 “Lowo uzinikelayo kuNyana kaThixo akagwetywa; kodwa lowo ungazinikeliyo selegwetyiwe, kuba engakholwa kuNyana kaThixo okuphela kwakhe." 
John3:19 Imbangi yesi sigwebo nantsi: Ukukhanya kufikile ehlabathini, baza abantu bathanda ubumnyama ngaphezu kokukhanya, kuba izenzo zabo zikhohlakele." 
John3:20 Kakade wonke umenzi wenkohlakalo ukuthiyile ukukhanya. Akasondeli nokusondela ekukhanyeni, hleze izenzo zakhe zivele." 
John3:21 Ke lowo ungowenyaniso uyeza ekukhanyeni, ukuze abonakale ngezenzo zakhe ukuba umthobele uThixo.”" 
John3:22 Emva koko uYesu nabafundi bakhe baya kummandla wakwaJuda; waza uYesu waba nexesha ekunye nabo apho, ebhaptiza." 
John3:23 UYohane naye wayebhaptiza e-Enon, kufuphi neSalem, kuba amanzi ebemaninzi apho. Abantu babesiya kuye, ababhaptize." 
John3:24 Ngelo xesha wayengekafakwa entolongweni. 
John3:25 Abafundi bakaYohane bâphikisana nomJuda othile malunga nokuhlanjululwa. 
John3:26 Baya kuYohane ke, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, laa mntu wayekunye nawe phesheya kweJordan, lowa umngqineleyo, úyabhaptiza, kwaye baya kuye bonke abantu.”" 
John3:27 Waphendula uYohane wathi: “Lonke ilungelo analo umntu ulinikwa nguThixo. 
John3:28 Nani ngokwenu ningandingqinela okokuba ndathi: ‘Andinguye mna *uKrestu, koko ndingothunywe ngaphambi kwakhe.’" 
John3:29 Kaloku umtshakazi ngowomyeni. Ke yena umkhaphi womyeni ulindela ukufika komyeni, aze avuye kunene akuliva izwi lakhe. Ngokukwanjalo luphelele ngoku uvuyo lwam." 
John3:30 Makabaluleke yena, ndinciphe mna.”" 
John3:31 “Lowo uvela phezulu unewonga kunabantu bonke. Lowo uvela ehlabathini ungowasehlabathini, kwaye uthetha okwehlabathi. Lowo uvela ezulwini unewonga kunabantu bonke." 
John3:32 Yena ungqina ngako oko akubonileyo nakuvileyo, kanti noko akukho bani ubamkelayo ubungqina bakhe." 
John3:33 Othe wabamkela ubungqina bakhe uqinisekisa okokuba uThixo uyinyaniso. 
John3:34 Kaloku ethunyiwe nje nguThixo, uthetha amazwi kaThixo, kuba uThixo umnika uMoya wakhe ngokungenamlinganiselo." 
John3:35 UYise uyamthanda uNyana; zonke izinto uzinikele esandleni sakhe. 
John3:36 Othe wakholwa kuNyana, unobomi obungonaphakade. Othe akamthobela uNyana, akayi kubona bomi; ingqumbo kaThixo ihlala ihleli phezu kwakhe.”" 
John4:1 Naxa uYesu ngokwakhe engazange abhaptize namnye, ingabafundi bakhe ababebhaptiza, *abaFarasi beva ukuba uYesu ugqithisile kuYohane ukufumana abafundi ababhaptize." 
John4:2  
John4:3 Ngenxa yoko uYesu wemka kwelakwaJuda, wabuyela kwelaseGalili." 
John4:4 Kwakufuneka acande kwelamaSamariya. 
John4:5 Wafika kwidolophu yaseSamariya ekuthiwa yiSikare, kufuphi nendawo awathi uYakobi wayinika uJosefu unyana wakhe." 
John4:6 Lalilapho iqula likaYakobi, waza wathi uYesu, ediniwe luhambo, wahlala phantsi ngasequleni apho. Kwakusemini emaqanda." 
John4:7 Kwafika umSamariyakazi, eze kukha amanzi, uYesu wathi kuye: “Khawundiphe amanzi, ndisele.”" 
John4:8 Abafundi bakhe babengekho, beye kuthenga ukutya edolophini." 
John4:9 Waphendula ke umSamariyakazi wathi kuye: “Ungathini na wena ungumJuda nje, ukuwacela kum amanzi, ndingumSamariya nje mna?” Kaloku amaJuda akanabudlelane namaSamariya." 
John4:10 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Ukuba ubusazi isipho uThixo afuna ukukupha sona, ùmazi ukuba ngubani na lo ucela amanzi kuwe, ngewucele kuye wena, aze yena akuphe amanzi aphilileyo.”" 
John4:11 Umfazi lowo wathi kuye: “Nkosi, akunanto yakukha, nequla linzulu; ungawafumana phi ke amanzi aphilileyo?" 
John4:12 Ngaba wena umkhulu na kunokhokho wethu uYakobi, owasinika eli qula, awayesela kulo ngokwakhe kwakunye noonyana bakhe nempahla yakhe?”" 
John4:13 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Bonke abasela kula manzi baya kubuya banxanwe. 
John4:14 Ke yena othe wawasela amanzi endiya kumpha wona mna, soze anxanwe naphakade. Amanzi endiya kumnika wona, aya kuba ngumthombo ompompoza kuye, emnika obona bomi bungenasiphelo.”" 
John4:15 Umfazi wathi kuye: “Nkosi, nam ndiphe loo manzi ukuze ndingabi saphinda ndinxanwe, ndingezi nokuza kukha manzi apha.”" 
John4:16 Wathi kuye: “Hamba uye kubiza indoda yakho, nize apha.”" 
John4:17 Waphendula umfazi wathi: “Andinandoda.” UYesu wathi kuye: “Ùnyanisile ukuthi akunandoda," 
John4:18 kuba ubunamadoda amahlanu, nale unayo ngoku asiyoyakho.”" 
John4:19 Umfazi lowo ke wathi kuye: “Nkosi, ndiyabona okokuba wena *ungumshumayeli." 
John4:20 Ookhokho bethu, thina maSamariya, babenqula uThixo kule ntaba. Ke nina maJuda nithi iseJerusalem indawo apho abantu bamelwe kukumnqula khona uThixo.”" 
John4:21 UYesu wathi kuye: “Ndiyakuxelela, liyeza ixesha ekothi ngalo ningabi samnqula uBawo kule ntaba okanye eJerusalem." 
John4:22 Nina maSamariya ninqula eningakwaziyo. Thina maJuda sinqula esikwaziyo, kuba kakade kukwaJuda apho usindiso luphuma khona." 
John4:23 Kodwa kuza ixesha, kwaye selikho, abaya kuthi ngalo abanquli benene bamnqule ngoMoya benyanisile uBawo, kuba uBawo ufuna abantu abamkhonza ngolo hlobo." 
John4:24 UThixo unguMoya; abo ke bamnqulayo kufuneka bamnqule ngoMoya benyanisekile.” 
John4:25 Loo mfazi wathi kuye: “Ndiyazi ukuba *uMesiya, ekuthiwa *nguKrestu, uyeza. Wothi ke akufika asixelele konke.”" 
John4:26 UYesu wathi kuye: “Nguye kanye lo uthetha nawe.” 
John4:27 Kwathi ngelo xesha bafika abafundi bakaYesu, bamangaliswa kukuba ethetha nomntu obhinqileyo. Noko akubangakho namnye owathi: “Ufuna ntoni na kuye?” okanye owathi: “Kutheni na ukuba uthethe naye?”" 
John4:28 Umfazi lowo ke wayishiya ingqayi yakhe, waya edolophini, wathi ebantwini:" 
John4:29 “Yizani nibone; nanku umntu ondixelele zonke izinto endakha ndazenza. Akangebi *nguKrestu na?” 
John4:30 Baphuma ke edolophini, baya kuYesu." 
John4:31 Ngeli thuba abafundi bakaYesu babembongoza besithi: “Mfundisi, nantsi into etyiwayo!”" 
John4:32 Kodwa yena wathi kubo: “Mna ndinokutya eningakwaziyo nina.” 
John4:33 Baza abafundi babuzana besithi: “Ngaba kukho mntu umzisele ukutya na?” 
John4:34 UYesu wathi kubo: “Ukwenza ukuthanda kwalowo undithumileyo kukutya kwam, ndide ndiwufeze umsebenzi wakhe." 
John4:35 “Anitsho na ukuthi: ‘Kusele iinyanga ezine, kuvunwe’? Niyabona, ndithi kuni, inene, wakhangeleni kakuhle amasimi; nophawula ukuba akulungele ukuvunwa." 
John4:36 Umvuni seleza kwamkela umvuzo wakhe, evuna isivuno esingabantu abamkela ubomi obungonaphakade. Ngako oko ohlwayelayo uvuya kunye nalowo uvunayo." 
John4:37 Kungoko liyinyaniso iqhalo elithi: ‘Kuhlwayela lo, kuvune lowa.’" 
John4:38 Ndinithume ukuvuna oko ningabulalekanga kuko. Kwabulaleka abanye, naza nina natya kwimveliso yabo.”" 
John4:39 Into eninzi yamaSamariya aloo dolophu yakholwa kuYesu, yakuva intetho yaloo mfazi ethi: “Undixelele zonke izinto endakha ndazenza.”" 
John4:40 Athe ke amaSamariya akufika kuYesu, ambongoza ukuba ahlale nawo; waza wahlala khona apho iintsuku zambini." 
John4:41 Baba baninzi ngakumbi abo bâkholwáyo ngenxa yamazwi kaYesu," 
John4:42 baza bathi kumfazi lowo: “Asisakholwa ngenxa yokuthetha kwakho. Thina sikholwa kuba sizivele ngokwethu, saqonda ukuba ngenene lo nguye uMsindisi wehlabathi.”" 
John4:43 Emva kweentsuku ezimbini uYesu wemka apho, waya eGalili." 
John4:44 UYesu ngokwakhe wayetshilo ukuthi *umshumayeli akenzelwa mbeko kowabo," 
John4:45 kodwa akufika eGalili abantu balapho bamamkela. Babezibonile zonke izinto awazenzáyo kwitheko *lePasika eJerusalem, kuba nabo babeyile kweso sidlo." 
John4:46 Waphinda uYesu wahambela eKana kwelaseGalili, apho wawaguqulayo amanzi aba yiwayini. Kwakukho igosa elithile lakomkhulu apho elaligulelwa ngunyana walo eKapernahum." 
John4:47 Lakuva ukuba uYesu ufikile eGalili, evela kwelakwaJuda, laya kuye, lambongoza okokuba ehle aye eKapernahum, aphilise unyana walo owayegulela ukufa." 
John4:48 UYesu wathi kulo: “Nina aningekhe nikholwe ukuba anithanga nabona imiqondiso nemimangaliso!” 
John4:49 Igosa lakomkhulu ke lathi kuye: “Nkosi, nceda uze engekabhubhi umntwana wam.”" 
John4:50 UYesu wathi kulo: “Goduka; unyana wakho uphilile.” Indoda leyo yakholwa ngamazwi kaYesu, yahamba." 
John4:51 Kwathi isesendleleni yahlangatyezwa zizicaka zayo, zathi: “Unyana wakho uphilile!”" 
John4:52 Yabuza ke ukuba uqale nini na ukuchacha, zaza zathi: “Uchache izolo ngentsimbi yokuqala emva kwemini kuloo mkhuhlane.”" 
John4:53 Wakhumbula ke uyise ukuba kwakungêlo xesha kanye uYesu awatsho ngalo kuye ukuthi: “Unyana wakho uphilile.” Lakholwa ke igosa lakomkhulu, yakholwa nendlu yalo yonke." 
John4:54 Lo mqondiso wawenzayo uYesu wawungowesibini emva kokufika kwakhe eGalili evela kwelakwaJuda. 
John5:1 Kwathi emva koko kwabakho itheko lamaJuda, waza uYesu waya eJerusalem." 
John5:2 EJerusalem kukho ichibi leegusha elibizwa ngokuba yiBhetesda ngesiHebhere. Ngakulo kukho iivaranda ezintlanu. 
John5:3 Kuzo kwakulele into eninzi yezigulane – iimfama, neziqhwala, nabafe amacala. [Zazilinde ukuzanya-zanyiswa kwamanzi," 
John5:4 kuba ngamaxesha athile sasisithi isithunywa seNkosi singene echibini apho, siwazama-zamise amanzi. Sasisithi ke isigulana esingene kuqala echibini emva kokuzanya-zanyiswa kwamanzi, siphile nakusiphi na isifo esasinaso.]" 
John5:5 Ke kwakukho ndoda ithile apho, eyayiminyaka imashumi mathathu anesibhozo igula." 
John5:6 Kwathi uYesu akuyibona ilele apho, esazi nokuba selinexesha elide igula, wathi kuyo: “Uyafuna na ukuphila?”" 
John5:7 Saphendula isigulane sathi: “Nkosi, andinamntu wakundifaka echibini akuba amanzi egxobhekile. Ndithi ndisazama ukungena, ndisuke ndiphangelwe ngomnye.”" 
John5:8 UYesu wathi kuso: “Phakama! Thatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe.”" 
John5:9 Kwathi kwangoko waphila loo mntu, waluthatha ukhuko lwakhe, wahamba-hamba. Oku kwênzeka *ngoMhla wokuPhumla," 
John5:10 aza amaJuda athi kulowo waphiliswayo: “KungoMhla wokuPhumla namhlanje; akuvumelekanga ukuba uthwale ukhuko lwakho.” 
John5:11 Waphendula wathi: “Ondiphilisileyo uthe kum: ‘Thatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe.’ ”" 
John5:12 Ambuza athi: “Ngubani na lowo uthe kuwe: ‘Thatha ukhuko lwakho, uhambe’?”" 
John5:13 Kodwa lowo waphiliswayo wayengamazi okokuba ungubani owamphilisayo, kuba kwakukho abantu abaninzi apho, noYesu wayeselemkile." 
John5:14 Kwathi emva koko uYesu waphinda wadibana naye *endlwini kaThixo, wathi: “Khangela, uphilile ngoku. Yahlukana nesono, hleze uhlelwe yinto embi kunale.”" 
John5:15 Wahamba ke umntu lowo, waya kuwaxelela amaJuda ukuba nguYesu owamphilisayo." 
John5:16 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke amaJuda amchasa uYesu, kuba esenza ezi zinto ngoMhla wokuPhumla." 
John5:17 Wawaphendula ke uYesu wathi: “UBawo uyasebenza kude kube ngoku; nam ke ndiyasebenza.” 
John5:18 Oku kwabangela okokuba amaJuda afune ngakumbi ukumbulala uYesu. Wayengachithanga uMhla wawo wokuPhumla kuphela, kodwa wayezilinganise nokuzilinganisa noThixo ngokuthi uThixo unguYise." 
John5:19 Ke ngoko uYesu waziphendulela kumaJuda, wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, ayikho into ayenza ngegunya lakhe uNyana; kuphela wenza oko akubona kusenziwa nguYise. Oko akwenzayo uYise, naye uNyana uyakwenza;" 
John5:20 kuba uYise uyamthanda uNyana, embonisa zonke izinto azenzayo. Kwaye uya kumbonisa nezenzo ezikhulu kunezi, nitsho nimangaliswe;" 
John5:21 kuba kwanjengoko uYise abavusayo abafileyo, abadlise ubomi, ngokunjalo noNyana ubadlisa ubomi abo athandayo ukubadlisa." 
John5:22 Kananjalo uYise akagwebi namnye. Lonke igunya lokugweba ulinika uNyana," 
John5:23 ukuze bonke bamhlonele uNyana njengoko bamhlonelayo uYise. Lowo ke ungamhlonelanga uNyana, akamhloneli noYise owamthumayo." 
John5:24 “Ndithi kuni, inene, lowo uwevayo amazwi am, abe ekholwa kulowo undithumileyo, unobomi obungunaphakade. Yena akayi kugwetywa nokugwetywa, kuba selephumile ekufeni wangena ebomini." 
John5:25 Ndithi kuni, inene, kuza ixesha, kwaye selifikile, lokuba abasemangcwabeni balive ilizwi loNyana kaThixo, bathi abalivileyo badle ubomi." 
John5:26 UYise, umthombo odlisa ubomi, ukunike noNyana ukudlisa ubomi." 
John5:27 Kananjalo umnike negunya lokugweba, kuba yena *enguNyana woLuntu." 
John5:28 Musani ukumangaliswa kuko oku, kuba ixesha liyeza abaya kuthi ngalo bonke abasemangcwabeni balive ilizwi lakhe," 
John5:29 baphume emangcwabeni, bathi abo benze ubulungisa bavukele ebomini, bathi abo benze inkohlakalo bavukele ekugwetyweni.”" 
John5:30 “Mna ngokwam andinakwenza nto. Ndigweba njengoko ndiyalelweyo, kwaye ukugweba kwam kufanelekile, kuba andinanjongo yakwenza ntando yam, koko ndenza ukuthanda kwalowo undithumileyo." 
John5:31 “Ukuba bendizingqinela ngokwam, ubungqina bam ngebuthandabuzeka." 
John5:32 Kodwa ndinomnye ongqina ngam, kwaye ndiyazi ukuba ubungqina bakhe abuthandabuzeki." 
John5:33 Senathumela kuYohane; ninabo ke ubungqina bakhe mayela nenyaniso. 
John5:34 Anditsho kuba mna ndixhomekeke ekungqinelweni ngumntu, koko nditsho ukuze nina nisindiswe." 
John5:35 UYohane wayesisibane esikhanyisayo, naza nina navuyiswa okwethutyana kukukhanyiselwa nguye." 
John5:36 Kodwa ndinabo ubungqina obungaphezulu kobo bukaYohane, kuba imisebenzi andithumileyo uBawo ukuba ndiyifeze, ezi zinto kanye ndizenzayo, ziyandingqinela ukuba ndithunywe nguBawo." 
John5:37 NoBawo ngokwakhe, yena lowo undithumileyo, ungqinile ngam, nangona nina ningazange nilive ilizwi lakhe, ningazange nimbone nokumbona." 
John5:38 Ilizwi lakhe alibanga nandawo yakuhlala kuni, kuba anikholwa kulowo amthumileyo." 
John5:39 Niyaziphengulula *iziBhalo, nizicingela okokuba ninobomi obungonaphakade ngokuzifunda; kanti zona zingqina ngam," 
John5:40 kodwa nina anifuni ukuza kum ukuze nibe nabo obo bomi. 
John5:41 “Mna andinanze kunconywa ngabantu; 
John5:42 kodwa nina niyakufuna, kuba kaloku ukumthanda uThixo akukho kuni." 
John5:43 Mna ndize ndigunyaziswe nguBawo, kodwa nina anindamkelanga. Ukuba ubani uthe weza ngelilelakhe igunya niya kumamkela!" 
John5:44 Beninokuthini kakade ukukholwa njengokuba nisemva kokuncomana nje, ningakukhathalelanga ukunconywa ngulowo unguThixo yedwa?" 
John5:45 Kodwa ke ze ningabi niya kumangalelwa ndim kuBawo. Ummangaleli wenu nguMosis, lowo nithembele kuye." 
John5:46 Kaloku ukuba benikwamkela okubhalwe nguMosis, ngenindamkela nam, kuba uMosis wabhala ngam." 
John5:47 Ke ukuba anikwamkeli oko wakubhalayo uMosis, beningathini kakade ukuwamkela amazwi am?”" 
John6:1 Kwathi emva koko uYesu waya ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili, olo lukwabizwa ngokuba luLwandle lwaseTibheriya." 
John6:2 Wayelandelwe sisihlwele esikhulu, kuba abantu babeyibonile imiqondiso awayenzayo ngokuphilisa abagulayo." 
John6:3 UYesu wenyuka endulini, waza wahlala phantsi nabafundi bakhe." 
John6:4 Lalisondela itheko lamaJuda ekuthiwa yiPasika. 
John6:5 Kwathi uYesu akukhangela, wabona isihlwele esikhulu sisiza kuye, waza wathi kuFilipu: “Ngaba sinokusithenga phi na isonka esaneleyo sokutyisa le ndimbane?”" 
John6:6 Esitsho nje, wayevavanya uFilipu, kuba yena wayekwazi oko aza kukwenza." 
John6:7 Waphendula uFilipu, wathi: “Ngathi nesonka samakhulu amabini eerandi asingekhe sanele okokuba wonke okhoyo afumane iqhekezana.”" 
John6:8 Omnye wabafundi bakaYesu, uAndreya, umntakwabo-Simon Petros, wathi kuye:" 
John6:9 “Kukho inkwenkwana apha enezonka ezihlanu zerhasi, neentlanzi ezimbini; kodwa kuyintoni na oko kule nginginya yabantu?”" 
John6:10 Waza uYesu wathi: “Bahlaliseni phantsi abantu.” Kwakukho ibala elikhulu elinengca apho, baza bahlala phantsi. Inani lamadoda lalikumawaka amahlanu." 
John6:11 Wazithatha ke uYesu ezo zonka, wabulela kuThixo, wababela abantu ababehleli phantsi. Wenjenjalo nakwiintlanzi, baza batya banela." 
John6:12 Bakuhlutha abantu, uYesu wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Qokelelani okuseleyo. Makungabikho nentwana emoshakalayo.”" 
John6:13 Bawaqokelela ke amaqhekeza aseleyo ezo zonka zihlanu zerhasi, kwazala iingobozi ezilishumi elinambini." 
John6:14 Bakuwubona abantu lo mqondiso uYesu awenzileyo, bathi: “Ngenene, kuthe kanti nguye lo *umshumayeli obekade elindelwe!”" 
John6:15 Waqonda uYesu okokuba bazimisele ukuza kumthatha bamenze ukumkani, waza wemka, waya entabeni eyedwa." 
John6:16 Kwathi kwakuhlwa abafundi bakaYesu behla baya elwandle," 
John6:17 bakhwela isikhitshana, baluwela ulwandle, besiya eKapernahum. Nangona kwakusebusuku uYesu wayengekho kubo." 
John6:18 Amanzi olwandle ayesilwa, kuba kwakuvuthuza umoya." 
John6:19 Kwathi, bakuba begqibe iikhilomitha ezintlanu okanye ezintandathu bebheqa isikhitshana, babona nanko uYesu ehamba phezu kwamanzi olwandle, esondela. Boyika ke," 
John6:20 kodwa uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndim; sanukoyika.” 
John6:21 Bamamkela ke esikhitshaneni, kwathi kwangoko isikhitshana safika kuloo ndawo babesiya kuyo." 
John6:22 Ngengomso indimbane yabantu yayisekho ngaphesheya koLwandle lwaseGalili. Abantu aba babebone isikhitshana sasinye kuphela, baye babesazi okokuba uYesu wayengakhwelanga nabafundi bakhe, kuba bona babehambe bebodwa." 
John6:23 Kodwa ezinye izikhitshana, ezazivela eTibheriya, zafika ngakuloo ndawo isihlwele sasityela kuyo isonka emva kokuba iNkosi yayibulele." 
John6:24 Yakubona ke indimbane okokuba uYesu akakho apho, bengekho nabafundi bakhe, yakhwela kwezo zikhitshana, yaya kumfuna eKapernahum." 
John6:25 Abo bantu bamfumana uYesu ngaphesheya kolwandle, bathi kuye: “Mfundisi, ngaba ufike nini na apha?”" 
John6:26 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, anizanga kundifuna kuba nibone imiqondiso endiyenzayo; nindifuna kuba nitye esaa sonka nahlutha." 
John6:27 Sanukusebenzela ukutya okuphelayo; sebenzelani ukutya okungapheliyo, okusisondlo sobona bomi bungenasiphelo. Oko kutya niya kukunikwa nguye uNyana woLuntu, kuba uYise, uThixo, wamgunyazisela oko.”" 
John6:28 Ke ngoko bathi kuye: “Misebenzi mini uThixo afuna siyenze?” 
John6:29 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo: “Umsebenzi uThixo afuna niwenze ngulo wokuba nizinikele nikholwe kulowo uThixo amthumileyo.”" 
John6:30 Ke bona bathi kuye: “Wena ngaba wenza mqondiso mni na, ukuze sibone sikholwe kuwe? Yintoni oyenzayo?" 
John6:31 Oobawo bâtya *imana entlango, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo ukuthi: ‘Wabanika batya isonka esivela ezulwini.’”" 
John6:32 Wathi ke uYesu kubo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, asinguye uMosis owaninika isonka esivela ezulwini; nguBawo oninika esona sonka sisiso esivela ezulwini." 
John6:33 Isonka esivela kuThixo ngulowo wehlayo evela ezulwini, eze kulinika ubomi ihlabathi.”" 
John6:34 Baza bathi kuye: “Nkosi, uzungadinwa nanini na ukusipha eso sonka.”" 
John6:35 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Ndim isonka sobomi. Ozayo kum akasoze alambe, nokholwayo kum akasoze anxanwe." 
John6:36 “Ke nina, njengoko senditshilo, nindibonile nokundibona, naza noko anakholwa." 
John6:37 Bonke endibanikwe nguBawo, baya kuza kum. Ke lowo uzayo kum andingekhe ndingamamkeli," 
John6:38 kuba ndehla ezulwini ndingezanga kwenza eyam intando, koko ndize kwenza intando yalowo wandithumayo." 
John6:39 Intando yalowo wandithumayo kukuthi kungalahleki namnye kwabo andinika bona, koko ndibavuse ekufeni bonke ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:40 Okufunwa nguBawo kukuba wonke ombonayo uNyana akholwe kuye, abe nobomi obungapheliyo; ndaye ndiya kumvusa ekufeni ngomhla wokugqibela.”" 
John6:41 Aza amaJuda ambombozela, kuba uYesu ethe nguye isonka esehla sivela ezulwini," 
John6:42 athi: “Lo mfo akanguye na uYesu, unyana kaJosefu? Sibazi nje ke abazali bakhe, angathini ngoku ukuthi wehla ezulwini?”" 
John6:43 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Sanukundikrokrela. 
John6:44 Akukho namnye unokuza kum engathanga uBawo owandithumayo amtsalele kum; kwaye lowo ndiya kumvusa ekufeni ngomhla wokugqibela. 
John6:45 *Abashumayeli bâbhala bathi: ‘Bonke baya kuba ngabafundisiweyo nguThixo.’ Bonke ke abathe bamphulaphula uBawo, baza bafunda kuye, bayeza kum." 
John6:46 Xa nditshoyo ke andithethi ukuthi kukho bani wakha wambona uBawo. Akukho namnye wakha wambona uBawo, ngaphandle kwalowo uvela kuThixo." 
John6:47 “Ndithi kuni, inene, lowo ukholwayo unabo ubomi obungapheliyo." 
John6:48 Ndim isonka sobomi. 
John6:49 Ooyihlo batya *imana entlango, kodwa bafa." 
John6:50 Ke sona isonka esihla ezulwini, seso athi ubani akusitya, angafi." 
John6:51 Ndim isonka esinobomi, esihlileyo sivela ezulwini. Ukuba ubani uthe wasitya esi sonka, wophila ngonaphakade. Isonka endiya kumnika sona ngumzimba wam, endiwunikelayo ukuze ihlabathi liphile.”" 
John6:52 AmaJuda ke aphikisana ngamandla, esithi: “Angathini lo mfo ukusityisa umzimba wakhe?”" 
John6:53 Waza uYesu wathi kuwo: “Ndithi kuni, inene, ukuba anithanga niwutye umzimba wakhe *uNyana woLuntu, nilisele negazi lakhe, aninabo ubomi." 
John6:54 Lowo uwutyayo umzimba wam, alisele negazi lam, unobomi obungonaphakade, ndaye ndiya kumvusa ekufeni ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John6:55 Umzimba wam kokona kutya, negazi lam sesona siselo." 
John6:56 Lowo uwutyayo umzimba wam, alisele negazi lam, yena uhlala kum, nam ndihlala kuye." 
John6:57 UBawo uSobomi wandithuma, ndaza ndangonobomi ngaye. Ngokukwanjalo othe wawutya umzimba wam uya kuba nobomi ngam." 
John6:58 Siso ke eso isonka esehla sivela ezulwini; sibe singafani nesiya ooyihlo bâsityayo, baza bafa noko. Osityayo esi sonka wodla ubomi ngonaphakade.”" 
John6:59 Ezi zinto uYesu wazithetha xa wayefundisa eKapernahum *endlwini yesikhungo. 
John6:60 Bathi bakuziva, abaninzi kubafundi bakhe bathi: “Iyaxakanisa le ntetho. Ngubani onokuyinyamezela le nto?”" 
John6:61 UYesu wayesazi ukuba abafundi bakhe bayakrokra, waza wathi kubo: “Iyanikhubekisa le ndawo?" 
John6:62 Ngaba nothini na nakumbona *uNyana woLuntu enyukela apho wayevela khona? 
John6:63 NguMoya onika ubomi; ke wona amandla omntu akancedi lutho ekunikeni ubomi. Amazwi endiwathethileyo kuni ngakaMoya, anika ubomi." 
John6:64 Kanti ke noko basekho kuni abangakholwayo.” Kaloku uYesu wayebazi kwangaphambili abo bangakholwayo, emazi kwanalowo wayeza kumngcatsha." 
John6:65 Waza ke wathi: “Kungoko nditshilo kuni ukuthi akukho namnye unokuza kum engakunikwanga nguBawo ukwenjenjalo.” 
John6:66 Ukususela ngoko into eninzi yabafundi bakaYesu yarhoxa, ayaba sahamba naye." 
John6:67 Wathi ke uYesu kwabo bafundi bakhe balishumi elinambini: “Nithini na nina? Ngaba nani nifuna ukumka?” 
John6:68 Waza waphendula uSimon Petros wathi: “Nkosi, singaya kubani, inguwe nje onamazwi angawobomi obungapheliyo?" 
John6:69 Thina siyakholwa sisazi okokuba nguwe onguYedwa kaThixo.” 
John6:70 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Beninganyulwanga ndim na, nina balishumi elinambini? Kanti omnye kuni aba ungumtyholi.”" 
John6:71 Wayethetha uJudas, unyana kaSimon Sikariyoti, kuba nangona wayengomnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, wayeza kungcatsha uYesu." 
John7:1 Emva koko uYesu wehla enyuka neGalili. Wayengathandi ukuya kwelakwaJuda, kuba amaJuda ayefuna ukumbulala." 
John7:2 Lalisondele itheko lamaJuda ekuthiwa litheko lamaphempe," 
John7:3 baza bathi kuye abantakwabo: “Khawumke apha, uye kwelakwaJuda, ukuze nabo abafundi bakho abalapho bazibone izinto ozenzayo." 
John7:4 Kaloku umntu ofuna okokuba into ayenzayo yaziwe, akayenzi ngasese. Ukuba uyazenza ezi zinto, zenze zibonwe lihlabathi lonke.”" 
John7:5 Babesitsho abantakwabo-Yesu kuba nkqu bona babengakholwa kuye. 
John7:6 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Nina ningaya nanini na, kodwa elam ithuba lokuya alikafiki." 
John7:7 Abantu beli hlabathi bandithiyile mna, kuba ndisoloko ndiyihlaba imikhwa yabo emibi, kodwa nina bayanithanda." 
John7:8 Ningaya nina ethekweni apho, kodwa mna andiyi, kuba ayikabi lothuba lifanelekileyo eli kum.”" 
John7:9 Akuba etshilo wasala eGalili. 
John7:10 Bakuba bemkile abantakwabo-Yesu ukuya ethekweni apho, naye waya khona, phofu wahamba ngokuzimela." 
John7:11 AmaJuda ayemfuna apho ethekweni, emana ebuzisa ngaye." 
John7:12 Kwakugqugulwa ngaye, kukho abathi: “Yindoda leya;” kukho nabathi: “Hayi bo, uyabalahlekisa abantu.”" 
John7:13 Noko akuzange kubekho bani uthetha ngaye ekuhleni, kuba babesoyika amaJuda." 
John7:14 Kwathi itheko selishushu, uYesu waya *endlwini kaThixo, wafundisa." 
John7:15 Amangaliswa amaJuda, athi: “Ngaba lo mntu uluthathe phi lonke olu lwazi, engafundanga nje?”" 
John7:16 Waza uYesu wawaphendula wathi: “Le mfundiso ndiyifundisayo asiyoyam, koko ivela kulowo undithumileyo." 
John7:17 Lowo uyenzayo intando kaThixo, uya kuqonda ukuba andithethi okukokwam, koko ndifundisa okuphuma kuThixo." 
John7:18 Othetha okukokwakhe uzifunela olwakhe udumo; ke yena ofuna udumo lwalowo umthumileyo unyanisekile, akukho nkohliso kuye." 
John7:19 Akaniwiselanga umthetho na uMosis? Kanti akukho namnye kuni uwuthobeleyo. Kungani na ukuba nifune ukundibulala?” 
John7:20 Abantu baphendula bathi: “Uphambene! Ngubani ofuna ukukubulala?” 
John7:21 Waphendula uYesu, wathi kubo: “Ndenze into yanye *ngoMhla woPhumlo, naza namangaliswa nonke." 
John7:22 Khaniphawule le ndawo ngolwaluko lwesiJuda: Ulwaluko lwaqalwa ngamanyange, waza noMosis wawisa umthetho wokuba lubekho. Ngoko niyalùsa nangoMhla wokuPhumla." 
John7:23 Ukuba ke umntwana oyinkwenkwe niyamalùsa ngoMhla woPhumlo, ngenxa yokuba nifuna ukugcina umthetho kaMosis, kutheni ke ukuba nikhathazeke kuba ndithe ndaphilisa umntu?" 
John7:24 Sanukugweba ngokwembonakalo; gwebani ngobulungisa.” 
John7:25 Abanye abantu baseJerusalem babesithi: “Ngaba asinguye na lo bafuna ukumbulala? 
John7:26 Kanti nanko ethetha ekuhleni, kungekho bani ubhekisa nento le kuye! Ngaba iinkokheli ziqondile okokuba ngokwenyani lo *nguKrestu?" 
John7:27 Angathini na lo ukuba nguKrestu simazi nje apho avela khona? UKrestu akufika akuyi kubakho bani waziyo apho avela khona.” 
John7:28 Watsho ngelivakalayo uYesu, efundisa *endlwini kaThixo, wathi: “Niba niyandazi, nisazi nalapho ndivela khona! Mna andizizelanga ngokwam. Ndithunywe ngulowo uyinyaniso. Ke nina animazi," 
John7:29 kodwa mna ndiyamazi, kuba ndivela kuye, ndithunywe nguye.”" 
John7:30 Babefuna ukumbamba, kodwa akubangakho bani umchukumisayo, kuba lalingekafiki ixesha." 
John7:31 Kodwa abantu abaninzi bâkholwa kuye, besithi: “Xa athe wafika uKrestu, ngaba ebenokwenza imiqondiso engaphezulu na kunale yenziwe ngulo?”" 
John7:32 *AbaFarasi babeva abantu bethetha ngasese ngoYesu, baza bona nababingeleli abaziintloko bathuma abagadi bendlu kaThixo ukuba bambambe." 
John7:33 Waza uYesu wathi: “Ndisaza kuba nani ithutyana, ndize ndimke, ndiye kulowo undithumileyo." 
John7:34 Niya kundifuna ke, ningandifumani, kuba nina aninako ukuya apho ndiya khona.”" 
John7:35 Aza amaJuda abuzana esithi: “Ngaba bethu uza kuya phi, ze ke singabi nako ukumfumana? Ngaba uzimisele ukuya kumaJuda athe saa kwelamaGrike, aze afundise amaGrike?" 
John7:36 Ngaba uthetha ukuthini xa athi: ‘Niya kundifuna ningandifumani, kuba nina aninako ukuya apho ndiya khona’?”" 
John7:37 Ngosuku lokugqibela, olo ke lulolona lubalulekileyo lwetheko, wema uYesu, wathetha ngelivakalayo esithi: “Onxaniweyo makeze kum asele." 
John7:38 *IziBhalo zithi kuya kugqabhuka imisinga yamanzi aphilisayo embilinini walowo ukholwayo kum.” 
John7:39 UYesu wayithetha le nto esingisele kuMoya ababeya kumamkela abo babekholwa kuye. Kaloku uMoya wayengekafiki, kuba ubungangamsha bukaYesu babungekabonakali." 
John7:40 Bakumva uYesu esitsho, abantu abathile esihlweleni bathi: “Ngenene lo mntu nguye lowa *Mshumayeli.”" 
John7:41 Abanye bathi: “Lo mntu *nguKrestu.” Kodwa bambi bathi: “Angathini uKrestu ukuvela eGalili? 
John7:42 *IziBhalo zithi uKrestu woba ngowendlu kaDavide, azalelwe eBhetelehem, idolophu awayehlala kuyo uDavide.”" 
John7:43 Kwabakho impikiswano ke esihlweleni ngenxa yakhe. 
John7:44 Abanye babefuna ukumbamba, kodwa akubangakho bani umchukumisayo." 
John7:45 Abagadi *bendlu kaThixo babuyela kubabingeleli abaziintloko *nabaFarasi, baza bona bathi kubo: “Kutheni ningezanga naye nje?”" 
John7:46 Baphendula abagadi abo bathi: “Akukho namnye umntu owakha wathetha njengalo.” 
John7:47 Baza bathi abaFarasi: “Ngaba unilahlekisile na nani? 
John7:48 Kwiinkokheli zethu nakubaFarasi ngaba kukho mntu wakha wakholwa kuye? 
John7:49 Baqalekisiwe abantu abangawaziyo *umthetho kaMosis.” 
John7:50 KubaFarasi abo kwakukho noNikodimo lowo wayekhe wadlana iindlebe noYesu, waza ke yena wathi kubo:" 
John7:51 “Umthetho wethu awuvumi okokuba umntu agwetywe lingathanga laxoxwa ityala lakhe, kwacaca oko akwenzileyo.”" 
John7:52 Baza bathi kuye: “Ngaba nawe lo ungowaseGalili na? Khawuphengulule *iziBhalo ubone, kuba akukho *mshumayeli uvela eGalili.” [" 
John7:53 Baza bagoduka ke bonke.] 
John8:1 UYesu yena waya eNtabeni yemiNquma. 
John8:2 Lakuphuma ilanga ngosuku olulandelayo, wabuyela *endlwini kaThixo. Isihlwele samngqonga, waza wahlala phantsi, wabafundisa abantu." 
John8:3 Abachazi-mthetho *nabaFarasi beza nomfazi owayebanjwe ekrexeza, bammisa phambi kwabantu;" 
John8:4 baza bathi kuYesu: “Mfundisi, lo mfazi ubanjwe ekrexeza." 
John8:5 Emthethweni wethu uMosis uthi umfazi onjalo makagityiselwe ngamatye abulawe. Ke wena ngaba uthi makathiweni?” 
John8:6 Besitsho nje, babemthiyisela, befuna athethe into abanokummangalela ngayo. Kodwa uYesu wathoba, wabhala ngomnwe emhlabeni." 
John8:7 Besamile njalo bembuza, waphakama, wathi kubo: “Ongenasono kuni makube nguye ogibisela ilitye lokuqala.”" 
John8:8 Waphinda wathoba uYesu, wabhala emhlabeni." 
John8:9 Bekuvile oko, bemka bonke ngabanye ngabanye, baqalela kwabadala. Kwasala uYesu nomfazi lowo, esemi apho." 
John8:10 Waphakama uYesu, wathi kuye: “Baphi na abamangaleli bakho? Akukho namnye na oshiyekileyo?”" 
John8:11 Waphendula wathi: “Namnye, Nkosi.” Wathi uYesu: “Nam ke andikugwebi. Hamba, ungàbuye wone.”]" 
John8:12 UYesu waphinda wabhekisa ebantwini wathi: “Ndim ukhanyiso lwehlabathi. Lowo undilandelayo soze ahambe ebumnyameni; woba nokhanyiselo olunika ubomi.” 
John8:13 Baza *abaFarasi bathi kuye: “Wena uzingqinela ngokwakho. Ngenxa yoko ubungqina bakho abamkeleki.” 
John8:14 Waphendula uYesu wathi kubo: “Nangona indim ozingqinelayo, buyinyaniso ubungqina bam, kuba ndiyazi apho ndivela khona nalapho ndiya khona; nina aniyazi imvelaphi yam; nalapho ndiya khona anazi." 
John8:15 Nina nigweba ngokwabantu. Mna akukho namnye endimgwebayo. 
John8:16 Kodwa ke, ukuba ndithe ndagweba, isigwebo sam sithembekile; kuba andindedwa, ndikunye noBawo ondithumileyo." 
John8:17 Nasemthethweni wenu kubhalwe kwathiwa ubungqina bamagqina amabini banele. 
John8:18 Mna ndizingqinela ngokwam, abe kwanoBawo owandithumayo endingqinela.”" 
John8:19 Baza bathi kuye: “Uphi loo Yihlo?” Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Kwankqu mna lo anindazi, noBawo ningamazi. Ukuba ke benindazi mna, noBawo ngenimazi.”" 
John8:20 Konke oku kwathethwa nguYesu efundisa *endlwini kaThixo, ekwigumbi leminikelo; kodwa akubangakho namnye umbambayo, kuba lalingekafiki ixesha." 
John8:21 Waphinda uYesu wathi kubo: “Ndiyemka mna; ke nina niya kundifuna; yaye niya kufela ezonweni zenu. Apho ndiya khona mna, aninakuya nina.”" 
John8:22 Ke ngoko athi amaJuda: “Ngaba bethu úza kuzibulala, esithi nje apho aya khona thina asinakuya?”" 
John8:23 Waza wathi kuwo: “Nina ningabalapha phantsi; mna ndivela phezulu. Nina ningabeli hlabathi; mna andinguye oweli hlabathi. 
John8:24 Kungoko nditshoyo ukuthi niya kufela ezonweni zenu. Ukuba anithanga nakholwa okokuba ndinguye endinguye, niya kufela ezonweni zenu.”" 
John8:25 Ambuza ke esithi: “Ungubani wena?” Wathi kuwo uYesu: “Ndingulowo ndandithe ndinguye kwasekuqalekeni. 
John8:26 Ndinezinto ezininzi endingázithethayo ngani, ndinigwebe nokunigweba ngenxa yazo. Kaloku lowo undithumileyo uyinyaniso; ke mna ihlabathi ndilixelele kuphela oko ndikuvileyo ngaye.”" 
John8:27 AmaJuda akazange aqonde okokuba uYesu uthetha nawo ngoYise," 
John8:28 waza wathi kuwo uYesu: “Xa nithe namphakamisa *uNyana woLuntu, noqonda ke ukuba ndinguye endinguye. Noqonda ke okokuba mna andenzi nto ngagunya lam, koko ndithetha kuphela oko ndikufundiswe nguBawo." 
John8:29 Lowo undithumileyo unam; akandishiyanga ndodwa, kuba ndisoloko ndisenza oko kukholekileyo kuye.”" 
John8:30 Bakumva ethetha ezi zinto, abantu abaninzi ithemba labo balibeka kuYesu." 
John8:31 Ke ngoko uYesu wathi kumaJuda abeke ithemba kuye: “Ukuba nithe nazingisa ukuhlala nisenza oko ndinifundisileyo, niya kuba ngabafundi bam benene." 
John8:32 Niya kuyiqonda ke inyaniso; yaye inyaniso iya kunenza nikhululeke.” 
John8:33 Aphendula amaJuda athi kuye: “Thina siyinzala ka-Abraham; zange sibe ngamakhoboka nanini na. Uthetha ukuthini ke xa uthi siya kukhululeka?” 
John8:34 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, bonke abenza isono bangamakhoboka esono." 
John8:35 Ikhoboka alinalungelo lisisigxina emzini; onelungelo elinjalo emzini ngunyana. 
John8:36 Ukuba ke uNyana uthe wanenza nakhululeka, noba ngabakhululekileyo mpela." 
John8:37 Ndiyazi ukuba niyinzala ka-Abraham. Nakuba kunjalo nizimisele ukundibulala, kuba alingeni kuni ilizwi lam." 
John8:38 Mna ndithetha endikubonileyo kowam uBawo; ke nina nenza enikuvileyo kowenu uyihlo.” 
John8:39 Amphendula athi: “Ubawo nguAbraham.” Wathi kuwo uYesu: “Ukuba beningabo abantwana baka-Abraham, ngenimfuza ngezenzo." 
John8:40 Kanti naku nina nifuna ukundibulala, mna mntu unixelela inyaniso endiyive kuThixo. UAbraham akazange enze nto injalo." 
John8:41 Nina nenza okwenziwa nguyihlo.” Aza athi kuye: “Thina asiyomigqakhwe. Owethu uBawo mnye; nguThixo.” 
John8:42 Wathi kuwo uYesu: “Ukuba uThixo ebenguyihlo ngenene, ngenindithanda; kuba ndilapha nje, ndivela kuThixo. Kaloku andizizelanga ngagunya lam; ndithunywe nguye." 
John8:43 Kutheni ningayiqondi nje intetho yam? Kungenxa yokuba ningakwazi ukulibamba ilizwi lam. 
John8:44 Nina ningaboyihlo umtyholi, kwaye nithanda ukwenza intando yakhe. Yena wayesisibulala-mntu kwasekuqalekeni. Nenyaniso akayihoyanga, kuba akananyani. Usekhaya xa athetha ubuxoki, kuba yena ulixoki, usobuxoki kanye." 
John8:45 Kodwa mna ndinixelela inyaniso; kungoko ningakholwayo kum. 
John8:46 Akukho namnye kuni ungandibeka tyala, athi ndonile. Ndithetha inyaniso nje, ngani ukuba ningakholwa?" 
John8:47 OngokaThixo uyaweva amazwi kaThixo. Ke ngoko nina aniweva amazwi kaThixo, kuba aningabo abakaThixo.”" 
John8:48 AmaJuda amphendula uYesu, athi kuye: “Asinyanisanga na ke xa sithi ungumSamariya, yaye unendimoni?”" 
John8:49 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Andinandimoni mna. Ndihlonela uBawo, kodwa nina anindihloneli." 
John8:50 Mna andizifuneli wonga; ukho ondifunelayo; yena uyandilamlela. 
John8:51 Ndithi kuni, inene, ukuba umntu uthe wawagcina amazwi am, soze afe naphakade.”" 
John8:52 Aza athi kuye amaJuda: “Hayi ke, kucacile ngoku ukuba unendimoni. UAbraham wafa, *nabashumayeli bafa, ube usithi wena, ukuba umntu uthe wagcina amazwi akho, soze afe naphakade." 
John8:53 Ngaba wena umkhulu na kunobawo uAbraham, yena wafayo? Kwangokunjalo nabo abashumayeli àbasekho. Uzenza bani kakade wena?”" 
John8:54 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ukuba bendiziwonga ngokwam, elo wonga ngelingento yanto; kodwa ke nguBawo ondiwongayo, lowo kanye nina nithi nguThixo wenu." 
John8:55 Nangona nitshoyo, anizange namazi; kodwa mna ndiyamazi. Ukuba mna bendinokuthi andimazi, bendiya kuba ndilixoki njengani. Kodwa ndiyamazi, ndaye ndiyawagcina amazwi akhe." 
John8:56 Uyihlo uAbraham wagcoba, kuba wayeza kubona le mihla yobukho bam; wayibona ke, wavuya.”" 
John8:57 Aza amaJuda athi kuye: “Ungekabi naminyaka imashumi mahlanu nje, ungathini ukuba sewumbonile uAbraham?”" 
John8:58 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Ndithi kuni, inene, engekabikho uAbraham, besendikho kade mna.”" 
John8:59 Achola amatye ke amaJuda, ukuze amgibisele ngawo uYesu; kodwa yena uYesu wasuka wee shwaka, wemka *endlwini kaThixo." 
John9:1 UYesu wathi ehamba ngendlela wabona umntu owayezelwe eyimfama. 
John9:2 Bambuza ke abafundi bakhe besithi: “Mfundisi, uphi undonakele ukuze azalwe eyimfama nje? Ngaba nguye, okanye ngabazali bakhe?”" 
John9:3 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Eyimfama nje, akonanga yena, kungonanga nabazali bakhe. Uzelwe eyimfama ukuze amandla okusebenza kukaThixo abonakaliswe ngaye." 
John9:4 Simelwe kukuyenza kusesemini imisebenzi esiyinikwe ngulowo undithumileyo. Ubusuku buyeza, apho kungayi kubakho bani unako ukusebenza." 
John9:5 Okweli thuba ndisesehlabathini ndilukhanyiso lwehlabathi.” 
John9:6 Akuba etshilo, uYesu watshicela emhlabeni, wenza udaka, wawaqaba ngalo amehlo emfama leyo;" 
John9:7 waza wathi kuyo: “Hamba uye kuhlamba kwichityana laseSilowa.” (Oko kukuthi “thunyiwe”.) Yahamba ke imfama, yaya kuhlamba, yabuya ibona."
