John9:8 Abamelwane nabanye abantu ababeqhele ukumbona loo mntu engqiba, bathi: “Lo mfo asinguye na lowa ebehlala engqiba?”" 
John9:9 Abanye babesithi nguye, abanye besithi asinguye kodwa ufana naye. Waza umfo lowo wathi: “Ndinguye.”" 
John9:10 Bambuza ke, bathi: “Avulwe yintoni amehlo akho?”" 
John9:11 Wathi yena: “Laa mntu kuthiwa nguYesu, wenza udaka, waqaba ngalo amehlo am, wathi mandiye eSilowa, ndihlambe. Ndiyile ke, ndahlamba, aza avuleka amehlo am.”" 
John9:12 Baza bathi: “Uphi loo mntu ngoku?” Ke yena wathi: “Andazi.” 
John9:13 Bamthatha ke loo mfo owayeyimfama, bamsa *kubaFarasi;" 
John9:14 kuba *kwakunguMhla wokuPhumla loo mini uYesu wenza udaka ngayo, wavula amehlo akhe." 
John9:15 Ke ngoko abaFarasi bambuza lo mfo okokuba uphiliswe njani ebumfameni bakhe, waza wathi kubo: “Undiqabe amehlo ngodaka, ndahlamba, aza avuleka amehlo am.”" 
John9:16 Baza abaFarasi abathile bathi: “Loo mntu akanakuba ngowakwaThixo, kuba akawuhloneli uMhla woPhumlo.” Kodwa abanye babesithi: “Ukuba ebengumoni ebenokuthini ukwenza imiqondiso elolu hlobo?” Kwabakho impikiswano ke phakathi kwabo." 
John9:17 Ke ngoko abaFarasi baphinda bathi kuloo mntu wayeyimfama: “Wena uthini ngaye, inguwe nje ovulwe amehlo?” Waza wathi: “*Ungumshumayeli.”" 
John9:18 AmaJuda wona ayengakholwa ukuba wayeyimfama waza wabuya wabona, aza abiza abazali bakhe," 
John9:19 abuza esithi: “Ngunyana wenu lo? Ngaba wazalwa eyimfama? Ebona nje ngoku kutheni?” 
John9:20 Abazali bakhe baphendula bathi: “Ewe, ngunyana wethu lo. Wavela eyimfama;" 
John9:21 kodwa asazi ukuba kwenzeke ntoni ebona nje ngoku; nalowo uwavulileyo amehlo akhe asimazi. Buzani kuye; selemdala, unako ukuziphendulela.”" 
John9:22 Abazali bakhe batsho kuba besoyika amaJuda, kuba wona ayeselevumelene ngokuthi ovumayo ukuba uYesu unguye *uKrestu, uya kusikwa *endlwini yesikhungo." 
John9:23 Kungoko ke abazali bakhe batshoyo ukuthi: “Buzani kuye; selemdala.” 
John9:24 Ke ngoko amaJuda aphinda ambuza loo mntu wayezelwe eyimfama, athi kuye: “Sikufungisa uThixo ukuba uthethe inyaniso. Thina siyazi okokuba lo mntu ngumoni.”" 
John9:25 Waphendula wathi: “Ukuba ungumoni, nokuba akanguye, andazi. Ndazi nto-nye kuphela; bendiyimfama, ngoku ke ndiyabona.”" 
John9:26 Aza athi kuye: “Ukwenze ntoni kanye ukukuvula amehlo?” 
John9:27 Wawaphendula wathi: “Sendinixelele nje, naza anaphulaphula; kutheni ukuba nifune ukuva kwakhona? Ngaba nani nifuna ukuba ngabafundi bakhe?”" 
John9:28 Aza amaJuda amthuka, atsho nokuthi: “Nguwe ongumfundi walaa mfo; thina singabafundi bakaMosis." 
John9:29 Siyazi okokuba uMosis wathetha egunyaziswa nguThixo; kodwa yena lo mfo asimazi, singazi nalapho avela khona.”" 
John9:30 Waphendula wathi: “Simanga! Nina nithi animazi apho avela khona, kanti nguye owavulileyo amehlo am." 
John9:31 Kuyaqondakala okokuba uThixo akabeva aboni; kuphela uva abo bamhloneleyo ngokwenza oko akuthandayo. 
John9:32 Okoko ladalwayo ihlabathi akuzange kuviwe ngomntu owakha wavula amehlo omntu ozelwe eyimfama. 
John9:33 Ukuba lo mntu ebengaveli kuThixo nge-engenako mpela ukwenza into enje.” 
John9:34 Amphendula athi: “Singathini ukufundiswa nguwe, ntondini eyazalelwa esonweni!” Waza ke wasikwa *endlwini yesikhungo." 
John9:35 UYesu weva okokuba umntu lowo usikiwe. Akumfumana wathi kuye: “Uyakholwa na kuye *uNyana woLuntu?” 
John9:36 Waphendula yena wathi: “Ndixelele ukuba ngongubani lowo, Nkosi, ukuze nam ndikholwe kuye.”" 
John9:37 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Sewumbonile; ngulo uthethayo nawe ngoku.” 
John9:38 Waza wathi: “Ndiyakholwa, Nkosi.” Watsho waguqa phambi koYesu." 
John9:39 Waza wathi uYesu: “Mna ndize kweli hlabathi ukuze abantu bacaluleke: ukuze iimfama zibone, bathi ababonayo babe ziimfama.”" 
John9:40 *AbaFarasi abathile ababelapho kunye naye, bamva eyithetha le nto, baza bambuza besithi: “Nathi uthi siziimfama?”" 
John9:41 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Ukuba benizizo iimfama ngeningenatyala, kodwa ngenxa yokuba nisithi niyabona, nihlala ninalo ityala.”" 
John10:1 “Inene, lowo ungangeniyo ngesango esibayeni seegusha, kodwa usuka angene ngandawo yimbi, ulisela nesihange." 
John10:2 Ke lowo ungena ngesango, ngumalusi wazo iigusha." 
John10:3 Umgcini-sango uyamvulela lowo. Iigusha zakhe ziyaliva izwi lakhe. Uzibiza ngamagama azo, azikhokelele phandle." 
John10:4 Akuba ezikhuphile esibayeni iigusha zakhe, uhamba phambi kwazo, zize zimlandele, kuba ziyalazi izwi lakhe." 
John10:5 Omnye umntu azingekhe zimlandele. Zosuka zimbaleke, kuba azilazi izwi lowasemzini.”" 
John10:6 UYesu wabenzela lo mzekeliso, kodwa bona babengayiqondi into awayeyithetha kubo." 
John10:7 Wabuya wathetha nabo uYesu, wathi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, ndim isango lesibaya seegusha." 
John10:8 Iigusha zange zibaphulaphule bonke abathe bafika ngaphambi kwam, kuba babengamasela nezihange." 
John10:9 Ndim isango; othe wangena ngam wosindiswa. Wongena ephuma, atye anele." 
John10:10 Isela lizele kuphela ukuba libe, lixhele, litshabalalise. Mna ndizele ukuba abantu babe nobomi, obona bupheleleyo." 
John10:11 “Mna ndingumalusi olungileyo. Umalusi olungileyo ubuncamela iigusha zakhe ubomi bakhe. 
John10:12 Kodwa umqeshwa, ongenguye umninizo, owalusa nje kwagusha, uthi akubona ingcuka isiza, abaleke, azishiye; ifike ke ingcuka, izibambe iigusha, izichitha-chithe." 
John10:13 Umqeshwa lo ke ubaleka kuba engumntu nje oqeshiweyo engazikhathalele iigusha. 
John10:14 Ndim umalusi olungileyo. Njengokuba uBawo endazi mna, nam ndimazi uBawo, ngokukwanjalo ndiyazazi iigusha zam, nazo ziyandazi, ndaye nobomi bam ndibuncamela iigusha zam." 
John10:15  
John10:16 Ndinazo nezinye iigusha ezingezizo ezesi sibaya. Nazo kufuneke ndize nazo. Ziya kuliva ilizwi lam, umhlambi ube mnye, nomalusi abe mnye." 
John10:17 “UBawo uyandithanda, ngenxa yokuba ndibuncama ubomi bam. Ke ndobuya ndibufumane." 
John10:18 Akukho bani ubuhluthayo kum ubomi bam; ndibuncama ngokwam. Ndinelungelo lokubuncama; ndikwanalo nelokubuya ndibufumane. Yiyo ke leyo into endiyiyalelweyo nguBawo ukuba ndiyenze.” 
John10:19 Nala ke amazwi âbanga okokuba amaJuda angavani. 
John10:20 Into eninzi yawo yayisithi: “Unendimoni! Uyageza! Ningáthini ukumphulaphula?” 
John10:21 Kodwa amanye ayesithi: “Umntu onendimoni akanakuthetha ngolu hlobo. Ibinokuthini indimoni ukuba nako ukuvula amehlo eemfama?” 
John10:22 Kwakusebusika ukufika kwexesha letheko lokukhumbula ukuhlaziywa *kwendlu kaThixo eJerusalem. 
John10:23 UYesu wayehamba-hamba endlwini kaThixo evarandeni ekuthiwa yekaSolomon. 
John10:24 Amrhawula amaJuda, athi kuye: “Phum' egusheni! Ukuba unguye *uKrestu, yitsho ngokuphandle.”" 
John10:25 Wawaphendula uYesu wathi: “Sendinixelele, kodwa anakholwa noko. Imisebenzi endiyenzileyo ngegunya endilinikwe nguBawo, iyandingqinela." 
John10:26 Ningàkholwa nje kum kungenxa yokuba ningezizo iigusha zam. 
John10:27 Ezam iigusha ziyaliva izwi lam. Ibe ke ndiyazazi; zona ziyandilandela. 
John10:28 Ndizinika ubomi obungenasiphelo. Azisoze zitshabalale, kwaye akukho bani unokuzihlutha kum." 
John10:29 Kaloku uBawo ondinike zona unamandla; noko ke akukho bani unokuhlutha nto kuye. 
John10:30 Ke mna noBawo sibanye.” 
John10:31 Aphinda amaJuda achola amatye, efuna ukumgibisela ngawo ambulale uYesu." 
John10:32 Wathi ke kuwo uYesu: “Ngamandla andinike wona uBawo, ndenzé izinto ezininzi ezilungileyo, nindibona. Ngaba kungenxa yasiphi na isenzo senifuna ukundigibisela ngamatye nje?”" 
John10:33 Aphendula amaJuda athi: “Asifuni kukugibisela ngamatye ngenxa yanto ilungileyo uyenzileyo; kungenxa yokuba unyelisa uThixo. Ungáthini, ungumntu nje, ukusuka uzenze uThixo?”" 
John10:34 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Kowenu umthetho kukhankanywa la mazwi kaThixo athi: ‘Mna ndithe ningoothixo.’ 
John10:35 Aninakuyijika le ntetho *yeziBhalo. Kaloku uThixo yena uthi bangoothixo abo athetha nabo. 
John10:36 Ningáthini ke ukuthi mna ndithetha into emanyumnyezi ngoThixo, xa ndithi ndinguNyana kaThixo, mna ndamiselwayo nguBawo, ndathunyelwa ehlabathini nguye?" 
John10:37 Ukuba andiwenzi umsebenzi endithunywe wona nguBawo, sanukundamkela;" 
John10:38 kodwa ukuba ndiyawenza, bamkeleni ubungqina bezenzo zam, nokuba ananeliseki ndim. Ke ngoko noqonda nazi okokuba uBawo ukum, nam ndikuye.”" 
John10:39 AmaJuda azama kwakhona ukumbamba uYesu, kodwa wawaphepha," 
John10:40 wabuya wemka waya phesheya kweJordan, apho wayebhaptiza khona kuqala uYohane, wahlala khona." 
John10:41 Kweza abantu abaninzi kuye, bathi: “UYohane okunene akazange enze namnye umqondiso, kodwa konke awakuthethayo ngalo mntu kuyinyaniso.”" 
John10:42 Abantu abaninzi ke balapho bazinikela kuye. 
John11:1 Kwakukho mntu uthile ugulayo, uLazaro. WayengowaseBhetani kuloMariya noMarta oodade wabo." 
John11:2 UMariya lo ngulowa wayithambisayo iNkosi ngamafutha aqholiweyo, waza wazisula ngeenwele zakhe iinyawo zayo. Lo Lazaro wayegula wayengumnakwabo." 
John11:3 Ke ngoko oodade wabo aba bathumela kuYesu, besithi: “Nkosi, umhlobo wakho uyagula.”" 
John11:4 Akuyiva loo nto, wathi uYesu: “Oku kugula akuyi kuphelela ekufeni, koko kuya kubonakalisa amandla kaThixo, aze uNyana kaThixo abe nodumo.”" 
John11:5 Ngoko ke, nangona uYesu wayebathanda ooMarta noMariya noLazaro," 
John11:6 wahlala iintsuku zambini kuloo ndawo weva ekuyo ngokugula kukaLazaro. 
John11:7 Emva koko wathi kubafundi bakhe: “Masiphinde siye kwelakwaJuda.” 
John11:8 Ke ngoko bathi kuye abafundi: “Mfundisi, ebesand' ukufuna ukukugibisela ngamatye nje amaJuda, ungáthini ukubuya uye khona?”" 
John11:9 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Ilanga liyavela, litshone, anditsho? Ke ukuba umntu uhamba emini, akakhubeki; kuba ukhanyiselwa lukhanyiso lweli hlabathi." 
John11:10 Kodwa ukuba uhamba ebusuku, uyakhubeka; kuba akukho kukhanya kumkhanyiselayo.”" 
John11:11 Akuba etshilo, waqokela wathi: “Umhlobo wethu uLazaro ulele; ndisaya kumvusa.”" 
John11:12 Baza bathi kuye abafundi: “Nkosi, ukuba ulele, uya kuvuka.”" 
John11:13 Kanti ke uYesu wayethetha okokuba uLazaro uswelekile, kodwa bona babeba uthetha ukuthi ulele ubuthongo." 
John11:14 Ke ngoko wabaxelela ngokuphandle, wathi: “ULazaro ufile;" 
John11:15 kodwa ngenxa yenu ndiyavuya ngokungabikho kwam khona, ukuze nikholwe. Ngoko ke, masiye kuye.”" 
John11:16 Ke ngoko uTomas, uWele, wathi kwabanye abafundi: “Masiye nathi, size sife kunye naye.”" 
John11:17 Kwathi akufika uYesu, wafumana ukuba uLazaro seleneentsuku ezine engcwatyiwe." 
John11:18 IBhetani yayikufuphi neJerusalem, umgama onganeno kweekhilomitha ezintathu," 
John11:19 kwaza kwafika amaJuda amaninzi, eze kukhuza ooMarta noMariya ngokusweleka komnakwabo." 
John11:20 Akuva uMarta okokuba uYesu uyeza, wamhlangabeza, kodwa yena uMariya wasala endlwini." 
John11:21 Waza wathi uMarta kuYesu: “Nkosi, ukuba ubukho, ngengabhubhanga umnakwethu." 
John11:22 Kodwa nangoku ndiyazi ukuba uThixo wokunika nantoni na oyicelayo kuye.” 
John11:23 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Umnakwenu uya kubuya avuke.” 
John11:24 Wathi kuye uMarta: “Ndiyazi okokuba uya kubuya avuke xa kuvuswa bonke abafileyo ngomhla wokugqibela.” 
John11:25 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Ndim uvuko; ndim ubomi. Lowo ukholwayo kum wodla ubomi nokuba ebefile. 
John11:26 Wonke odla ubomi ekholwa kum, soze afe naphakade. Ke wena ngaba uyakholwa koku?”" 
John11:27 Waza wathi kuye: “Ewe, Nkosi. Sendoyisekile; ndiyavuma okokuba wena unguye *uKrestu, uNyana kaThixo, lowo umelwe kukuza ehlabathini.”" 
John11:28 Akuba etshilo uMarta, wemka waya kubizela bucala udade wabo uMariya, wathi kuye: “Umfundisi ukho; uyakubiza.”" 
John11:29 Akukuva oko uMariya, wakhawuleza waphuma, wahlangabeza uYesu." 
John11:30 UYesu ke wayengekangeni edolophini, kodwa wayesekuloo ndawo wayedibene kuyo noMarta." 
John11:31 Ke amaJuda lawo awayekunye noMariya endlwini, eze kukhuza, athi akubona ephakama kamsinya, aphuma amlandela. Ayeba uya kulila engcwabeni." 
John11:32 UMariya waya kulaa ndawo wayekuyo uYesu, wafika waziphosa ezinyaweni zakhe, wathi kuye: “Nkosi, ukuba ubukho, ngengabhubhanga umnakwethu.”" 
John11:33 Wathi uYesu akumbona elila, namaJuda abeze naye elila, wachukumiseka entliziyweni, wakhathazeka kakhulu," 
John11:34 wathi: “Nimngcwabe phi?” Bathi: “Nkosi, yiza sikubonise.”" 
John11:35 Zehla iinyembezi kuYesu. 
John11:36 Ke ngoko amaJuda athi: “Khanikhangele ukumthanda kwakhe!” 
John11:37 Ke amanye kuwo athi: “Wawavula nje amehlo emfama, ngaba ebengenako ukwenza ukuba noLazaro angabhubhi?”" 
John11:38 Esachukumiseke njalo entliziyweni uYesu, waya engcwabeni. Ingcwaba eli lalingumqolomba, livalwe ngelitye." 
John11:39 Waza wathi uYesu: “Lisuseni ilitye.” Wathi uMarta, udade bomfi: “Nkosi, selenevumba, kuba seleneentsuku ezine eswelekile.”" 
John11:40 UYesu wathi kuye: “Bendingatshongo na kuwe okokuba uya kuwabona amandla kaThixo ukuba uyakholwa?” 
John11:41 Balisusa ke ilitye, waza uYesu wakhangela phezulu, wathi: “Bawo, ndiyabulela kuba undiva." 
John11:42 Mna ke bendisazi ukuba uhlala undiva, kambe ke nditsho ngenxa yale ndimbane yabantu ixhontelene apha, khon' ukuze ikholwe ukuba ndithunywe nguwe.”" 
John11:43 Akuba etshilo wadanduluka wathi: “Lazaro, phuma engcwabeni!”" 
John11:44 Waphuma umfi, izandla neenyawo zithandelwe ngamalaphu elinen, ubuso bujikelwe ngeqhiya. Wathi kubo uYesu: “Mkhululeni, nimyeke ahambe.”" 
John11:45 Into eninzi yaloo maJuda awayeze kukhuza uMariya, ithe yakukubona oko uYesu akwenzileyo, yakholwa kuye." 
John11:46 Kodwa athile kuwo abuyela *kubaFarasi, abaxelela oko uYesu akwenzileyo." 
John11:47 Ke ngoko abaFarasi nababingeleli abaziintloko babiza intlanganiso *yeBhunga, bathi: “Makuthiweni na? Nanku lo mntu esenza imiqondiso emininzi." 
John11:48 Ukuba sithe samyeka waqhuba ngolu hlobo, bonke baya kukholwa kuye, aze eze amaRoma, ayidilize *indlu kaThixo, alutshabalalise uhlanga lwethu.”" 
John11:49 Omnye wabo, uKayafa, owayengumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo nyaka, wathi: “Anikayiqondi mpela le nto!" 
John11:50 Aniqondi na okokuba kunilungele ukuba umntu omnye afele abantu, kunokuba kutshatyalaliswe uhlanga lonke?”" 
John11:51 Oku akakuthethanga kuphuma kuye. Watsho kuba wayengumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo nyaka, ebhengeza okokuba uYesu wayeza kulufela uhlanga," 
John11:52 engafeli lona kuphela, koko efela bonke abantwana bakaThixo abathe saa, ebahlanganisela ndawonye." 
John11:53 Kwathi ke ukususela ngaloo mini iinkokheli zamaJuda zabhunga ukumbulala uYesu. 
John11:54 Ke ngoko uYesu akabanga sahamba ekuhleni kwelakwaJuda, kodwa wemka waya ngasentlango, kwidolophu ekuthiwa yeyakwaEfrayim, wahlala khona apho enabafundi bakhe." 
John11:55 Itheko lamaJuda ekuthiwa *yiPasika, lalisondele; baza ke baba baninzi abaphuma kuloo mimandla, besiya eJerusalem ngaphambi kwePasika, ukuze bazihlambulule." 
John11:56 Babemfuna uYesu; baza bathi bakuhlangana endlwini kaThixo, bamana bebuzana besithi: “Nithini na? Makube akezi ePasikeni?”" 
John11:57 Ababingeleli abaziintloko nabaFarasi babeyalele okokuba ukuba kukho bani waziyo apho uYesu akhoyo, kufuneka axele, ukuze bambambe." 
John12:1 Ngosuku lwesithandathu phambi *kwePasika uYesu waya eBhetani, apho wayehlala khona uLazaro, lowo uYesu wayemvuse ekufeni." 
John12:2 Walungiselelwa isidlo ke uYesu, waza uMarta wabaphakela, uLazaro engomnye wababehleli etafileni kunye noYesu." 
John12:3 UMariya wathatha amafutha angangxengwanga esiqholo esiyinadusi, abunzima bungaphezulwana kwamakhulu amathathu eegram, axabiso likhulu, wathambisa ngawo iinyawo zikaYesu, wazisula ngeenwele zakhe. Yatsho indlu yazala livumba elimnandi lesiqholo eso." 
John12:4 Ke ngoko omnye wabafundi bakaYesu, uJudas Sikariyoti, lowo wayeza kumngcatsha, wathi:" 
John12:5 “Kutheni esi siqholo singàthengiswa ngamakhulu amathathu eerandi nje, ize loo mali inikwe amahlwempu?”" 
John12:6 Esitsho nje, kwakungekuko okokuba ebewakhathalele amahlwempu, koko wayesitsho kuba wayelisela. Ingxowa yabo yemali yayiphathwa nguye, emana ukucuntsula kuyo." 
John12:7 Kodwa uYesu wathi: “Myeke; sukumkhathaza. Esi siqholo ebesigcinele ukulungiselela ukungcwatywa kwam. 
John12:8 Amahlwempu aya kuhlala ekho, kodwa aniyi kuhlala ninam mna.”" 
John12:9 Yeva ke indimbane yamaJuda okokuba uYesu useBhetani, yaya khona, ingayi kubona uYesu kuphela, koko isiya kubona noLazaro, lowo uYesu wamvusayo ekufeni." 
John12:10 Babhunga ke ababingeleli abaziintloko okokuba bambulale noLazaro," 
John12:11 kuba ngenxa yakhe amaJuda amaninzi ayeguquka akholwe kuYesu. 
John12:12 Ngengomso indimbane yabantu ababeze kwitheko *lePasika, yeva okokuba uYesu uyeza eJerusalem," 
John12:13 yaxhuzula amasebe emithi yamasundu, yamhlangabeza, yakhwaza isithi: “Camagu! Makabongwe lowo uzayo egameni leNkosi, uKumkani wakwaSirayeli!”" 
John12:14 UYesu wafumana idonki eselula, wakhwela kuyo, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo ukuthi:" 
John12:15 “Sukoyika, sixeko saseZiyon. Khangela, uKumkani wakho uza kuwe ekhwele idonki, ithole lento ebotshwayo.”" 
John12:16 Abafundi bakhe abazange bayiqonde le nto kuqala, kodwa kwathi akuba uYesu evukile ekufeni, bakhumbula okokuba iziBhalo ziyakuxela oku, bakhumbula nokokuba bamenzele oku kanye." 
John12:17 Abantu ababekho oko uYesu wambizayo uLazaro ukuba aphume engcwabeni, emvusa ekufeni, babebabalisela abanye ngaloo nto." 
John12:18 Ke ngoko indimbane yaya kumhlangabeza uYesu, kuba yayivile ngokwenza kwakhe loo mqondiso." 
John12:19 Baza *abaFarasi bathethana besithi: “Khangelani, yeyele ngomkhono! Nanko elandelwa lilizwe lonke!”" 
John12:20 Kwakukho namaGrike phakathi kwabo bantu babeye kunqula eJerusalem ngexesha lomsitho *wePasika. 
John12:21 Ke wona aya kuFilipu, lowo waseBhetesayida eGalili, acela esithi: “Nkosi, sifuna ukubona uYesu.”" 
John12:22 UFilipu waya kuxelela uAndreya, baza bahamba bobabini baya kuxelela uYesu." 
John12:23 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Lifikile ngoku ixesha lokuba ubungangamsha bakhe *uNyana woLuntu bubonakale. 
John12:24 Inene, ukuba ukhozo lwengqolowa aluthanga lufakwe emhlabeni lufe, lohlala lungabi nto; kodwa ukuba luthe lwafa, luvelisa isiqhamo ngakumbi." 
John12:25 Lowo ubukokosayo ubomi bakhe, wolahlekelwa bubo; kanti lowo ubuncamayo kweli hlabathi, wohlala enabo kude kube kwelizayo." 
John12:26 Lowo usisicaka sam makandilandele, abe kunye nam apho ndikhoyo. Osisicaka sam ke uya kunikwa imbeko nguBawo.”" 
John12:27 “Intliziyo yam ikhathazekile ngoku. Ndingathini kodwa? Kuthi mandithi: ‘Bawo, ndisindise, ulidlulise kum eli xesha’? Hayi, mandingatsho, kuba kwakungenxa yoku ukuba ndifikelele kweli xesha." 
John12:28 Ke ngoko ndithi: ‘Bawo, zibonakalise into oyiyo wena.’ ” Kwavakala ilizwi, liphuma ezulwini, lisithi: “Ndizibonakalisile, ndibe ndisaya kuphinda ndizibonakalise.”" 
John12:29 Isihlwele sabantu ababemi apho sathi liyaduduma, abanye besithi isithunywa sezulu sithethe naye." 
John12:30 Kodwa uYesu wathi kubo: “Eli lizwi alivakalanga ngenxa yam, koko livakale ngenxa yenu." 
John12:31 Lithwasile ngoku ixesha lokugwetywa kweli hlabathi; umphathi weli hlabathi uza kukhiqwa ngoku. 
John12:32 Mna ke, ndakuba ndithe ndaphakanyiswa ndemka emhlabeni, ndiya kubatsalela kum bonke.”" 
John12:33 Esitsho nje, wayebaqondisa ngendlela aza kufa ngayo." 
John12:34 Isihlwele ke saphendula sathi: “*IziBhalo zithi *uKrestu uya kuhlala nathi kude kube nîni. Ungathini ke wena ukuthi *uNyana woLuntu umelwe kukuphakanyiswa emke? Kakade ngubani yena lo Nyana woLuntu?” 
John12:35 Waza uYesu wathi kubo: “Aliselide ixesha ninalo ukhanyiso. Ke ngoko hambani ekukhanyeni, nisenalo nje ukhanyiso, hleze ubumnyama buniqubule, kuba lowo uhamba ebumnyameni akayiqondi indlela ahamba ngayo." 
John12:36 Hlalani nithembele kulo ukhanyiso ngoku nisenalo, ukuze nibe ngabantu bokukhanya.” Akuba etshilo uYesu wazimela wemka." 
John12:37 Nangona uYesu wayenze imiqondiso engako phambi kwabo, abakholwanga kuye." 
John12:38 Le nto yênzeka izalisekisa oko kwathethwayo *ngumshumayeli uIsaya esithi: “Nkosi, ngubani na okholiweyo ludaba lwethu? Amandla eNkosi ngaba atyhileke kubani na?”" 
John12:39 Abakholwanga ke, njengoko atshoyo nakwenye indawo uIsaya ukuthi:" 
John12:40 “UThixo ubamfamekisile, ubaqaqadekisile, hleze babone ngamehlo, baqonde ngengqondo: ‘Baze babuyele kum,’ utsho uThixo, ‘ndize ndibaphilise.’ ”" 
John12:41 UIsaya watsho kuba wabubona ubungangamsha bukaYesu, waza wathetha ngaye." 
John12:42 Noko ke into eninzi yeenkokheli zamaJuda yakholwa kuYesu, kodwa ngenxa *yabaFarasi aba bantu abazange bathethe ngaloo nto, hleze basikwe *endlwini yesikhungo." 
John12:43 Babexabise kakhulu ukunconywa ngabantu ngaphezu kokunconywa nguThixo. 
John12:44 Watsho ngelivakalayo uYesu, wathi: “Lowo ukholwayo kum, akakholwa kum nje kodwa, koko ukholwa nakulowo undithumileyo." 
John12:45 Lowo undibonayo mna, ubona nalowo undithumileyo." 
John12:46 Mna ndilukhanyiso; ndize ehlabathini ukuze bonke abakholwayo kum bangahlali ebumnyameni. 
John12:47 Lowo uwevayo amazwi am, aze angawagcini, akagwetywa ndim. Andizanga kuligweba ihlabathi; ndize kulisindisa." 
John12:48 Ukho omgwebayo lowo ungandifuniyo, ongawamkeliyo amazwi am. Ilizwi endilithethileyo lilo eliya kumgweba ngomhla wokugqibela." 
John12:49 Kaloku mna andithethanga nto ivela kum; nguBawo ngokwakhe, yena ondithumileyo, ondiyalele okokuba mandithini, ndithethe ntoni na." 
John12:50 Ndiyazi ke okokuba lo myalelo wakhe ububomi obungonaphakade. Ke ngoko into endiyithethayo kuphela yileyo uBawo andiyalele ukuba mandiyithethe.” 
John13:1 Laliselisondele itheko *lePasika. UYesu ke wayesazi okokuba lifikile ixesha lokuba anduluke kweli hlabathi, aye kuYise. Wayesoloko ebathanda abo bangabakhe kweli hlabathi, wabathanda kwada kwaba sekugqibeleni." 
John13:2 Ngokuhlwa uYesu nabafundi bakhe babesetafileni besitya. Umtyholi wayeselekufakile entliziyweni kaJudas, unyana kaSimon Sikariyoti, okokuba angcatshe uYesu. UYesu wayesazi ukuba uYise uzinikele ezandleni zakhe zonke izinto; esazi okokuba yena uvela kuThixo, kwaye uya kuThixo." 
John13:3  
John13:4 Waza ke uYesu waphakama etafileni, wakhulula isambatho sakhe sangaphezulu, wabhinqa itawuli," 
John13:5 wagalela amanzi ekomini, wahlamba iinyawo zabafundi bakhe, ezisula ngetawuli awayeyibhinqile." 
John13:6 Akufika kuSimon Petros, yena wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, uza kuhlamba nezam iinyawo?”" 
John13:7 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Okwangoku akukayazi into endiyenzayo, kodwa uza kube uyiqonde.”" 
John13:8 Wathi kuye uPetros: “Nokuba sekutheni, ngekhe zihlanjwe nguwe iinyawo zam.” UYesu wamphendula wathi: “Ukuba andithanga ndikuhlambe, awunabudlelane nam.”" 
John13:9 Waza uSimon Petros wathi kuye: “Nkosi, xa kunjalo, sukundihlamba iinyawo zodwa, selundihlamba izandla nentloko.”" 
John13:10 UYesu wathi kuye: “Oselehlambe umzimba, uswele kuphela okokuba ahlanjwe iinyawo, ukuze ahlambuluke wonke. Nani ke nihlambulukile, kodwa aninjalo nonke.”" 
John13:11 UYesu wayeselemazi lowo uza kumngcatsha, kungoko watshoyo ukuthi abahlambulukanga bonke." 
John13:12 Akuba uYesu ezihlambile iinyawo zabo, ephinde wasinxiba isambatho sakhe sangaphezulu, waya kuhlala phantsi, wathi kubo: “Ngaba niyayiqonda na into endiyenzileyo?" 
John13:13 Nindibiza ngokuthi: ‘Mfundisi,’ okanye: ‘Nkosi’. Niyakholisa ukutsho, kuba kunjalo." 
John13:14 Ke ngoko, ukuba mna endiyiNkosi noMfundisi wenu, ndithe ndahlamba iinyawo zenu, nani ke nimelwe kukuhlambana iinyawo." 
John13:15 Ndinenzele umzekelo, ukuze nani nenze njengoko mna ndinibonisileyo." 
John13:16 Ndithi kuni, inene, akukho sicaka singaphezu kwenkosi yaso, kungekho nothunyiweyo ongaphezulu kwalowo umthumileyo." 
John13:17 Nivile ke. Hayi uyolo lwenu xa nithe nawulandela lo mzekelo. 
John13:18 “Andibhekisi kuni nonke. Ndiyabazi abo ndibanyulileyo, kodwa imelwe kukuzaliseka le ndawo eziBhalweni ithi: ‘Lowo utyayo kunye nam undivukele.’" 
John13:19 Ndinixelele kungekenzeki, ukuze kuthi, kwakuba kwenzekile, nikholwe okokuba ndinguye endinguye." 
John13:20 Inene, lowo umamkelayo endimthumileyo, wamkela mna; ke owamkela mna, wamkela lowo undithumileyo.”" 
John13:21 Akuba uYesu etshilo, wakhathazeka kakhulu, waza wabaqononondisa esithi: “Ndithi kuni, inene, omnye kuni apha uza kundingcatsha.”" 
John13:22 Baza bajongana abafundi bakhe, bengazi mpela okokuba ngubani na lowo athetha ngaye." 
John13:23 Ke omnye umfundi kaYesu, lowo wayethandwa nguye, wayehleli ecaleni kwakhe," 
John13:24 waza uSimon Petros wanqwala kuye ukuba abuze ukuba ngaba uYesu uthetha bani na. 
John13:25 Lowo mfundi ke wagobela ngakuYesu, wathi: “Ngaba ngubani lowo, Nkosi?”" 
John13:26 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ngulowo ndiya kuthi ndakuba ndisithe nkxu isonka, ndimnike.” Waza wathatha iqhekeza lesonka, walithi nkxu, walinika uJudas, unyana kaSimon Sikariyoti." 
John13:27 Kwathi kwangoko akulamkela elo qhekeza lesonka uJudas, wangenwa nguSathana. Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Khawulezisa uyenze into oyenzayo.”" 
John13:28 Kwakungekho namnye kwabo basetafileni owakuqondayo oko uYesu wayekuthetha. 
John13:29 Ekubeni yayigcinwa nguJudas ingxowa yabo yemali, abanye kubafundi babesithi uYesu umthuma ukuba aye kuthenga ezo zinto ziyimfuneko kwitheko *lePasika, okanye mhlawumbi uthi makaye kupha amahlwempu amalizo." 
John13:30 Elamkele ke uJudas elo qhekeza lesonka, waphuma kwangoko. Ke kaloku kwakusebusuku." 
John13:31 Akuba emkile uJudas, uYesu wathi: “Ngoku ke uza kunikwa ubungangamsha *uNyana woLuntu; uThixo uza kubonakalisa amandla akhe ngaye." 
John13:32 Xa ke uThixo abonakalisa amandla akhe ngaye, wothi amnike ubungangamsha uNyana woLuntu, kwaye oko uza kukwenza kwangoku." 
John13:33 Bantwana bam, liphelile ixesha lam phakathi kwenu. Niya kundifuna, kodwa oko ndakuthethayo kumaJuda ndikuthetha nakuni ngoku, ndisithi: ‘Apho mna ndiya khona, aninakuya nina.’" 
John13:34 Ndiniwisela umthetho omtsha, ndithi: Thandanani! Njengoko ndinithandileyo mna, nani thandanani kanye ngolo hlobo." 
John13:35 Ukuba niyathandana, bonke baya kuqonda okokuba ningabafundi bam.”" 
John13:36 USimon Petros wabuza kuYesu wathi: “Uza kuya phi na, Nkosi?” Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Apho ndiya khona akukabi nakuya okwangoku, kodwa wobe ulandele.”" 
John13:37 Wathi kuye uPetros: “Nkosi, kungani na ukuba ndingabi nakuya ngoku? Ndilindele nokufa ngenxa yakho!”" 
John13:38 Wamphendula uYesu wathi: “Ngaba ukulindele ngenene ukufa ngenxa yam? Ndithi kuwe, inene, wobe sewundikhanyele kathathu ukukhala kwenkuku.”" 
John14:1 “Musani ukukhathazeka; kholosani ngoThixo, nikholose nangam." 
John14:2 Ikho indawo kowethu. Ukuba bekungenjalo ngendingàtsho ukuthi ndiya kunilungiselela indawo. 
John14:3 Ndakuba ndimkile ke ndaya kunilungiselela indawo, ndiya kuza kuniphuthuma, nize nani nibe lapho ndikhoyo mna." 
John14:4 Ngoko ke niyayazi indlela eya apho ndiya khona.” 
John14:5 Waza wathi uTomas: “Nkosi, singàzi nokwazi nje apho uya khona, singáthini ukuyazi indlela eya khona?”" 
John14:6 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ndim indlela, ndim inyaniso, ndim ubomi. Akukho namnye unokuya kuBawo engayi ngam." 
John14:7 Nindazi nje mna, niyamazi noBawo. Ngoku ke niyamazi, nimbonile nokumbona.”" 
John14:8 UFilipu wabhekisa kuYesu, wathi: “Nkosi, khawusibonise uYihlo; kosanelisa.”" 
John14:9 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Kunini na ndikunye nani, Filipu; ngaba akukandazi? Lowo ubone mna, ubone uBawo. Utsho ngani wena ukuthi mandinibonise uBawo?" 
John14:10 Ngaba akukholwa na okokuba mna ndikuye uBawo, abe noBawo ekum? Endikuthethileyo kuni ke andikuthethi kuphuma kum. Oko ndikwenzayo kwenziwa nguBawo ohleli kum." 
John14:11 Kholwani kwendikuthethayo xa ndithi ndikuye uBawo, ekum noBawo. Ukuba anikholwa kuba ndisitsho, kholwani ngenxa yezinto endizenzayo." 
John14:12 Inene, okholwayo kum uya kuzenza izinto endizenzayo, ade enze nezinkulu kunezi, kuba ndiya kuBawo." 
John14:13 Ke ngoko nayiphi na into eniyicela kum ndiya kuyenza, ukuze uYise abonakalise amandla akhe ngoNyana." 
John14:14 Nantoni na eniyicela ngegama lam ndiya kuyenza.” 
John14:15 “Ukuba niyandithanda noyigcina imiyalelo yam. 
John14:16 Wothi ke uBawo, ndakumcela, aninike omnye uMmeli, ukuze ahlale nani ngonaphakade." 
John14:17 Lo Mmeli nguMoya wenyaniso, lowo ihlabathi lingenako ukumamkela, kuba lingenako ukumbona, lingamazi nokumazi. Nina ke niyamazi, kuba uhleli nani, eya kuba ngaphakathi kuni." 
John14:18 “Ndiyabuya; andiyi kunishiya niziinkedama. 
John14:19 Selisondele ixesha lokuba ihlabathi lingabi sandibona. Kodwa nina niya kundibona, kuba mna ndiyaphila, naye nani niya kuphila." 
John14:20 Ngaloo mini niya kuqonda okokuba ndikuBawo, nani nikum, nam ndikuni." 
John14:21 “Lowo uyamkelayo imiyalelo yam ayigcine, nguye ondithandayo. Lowo ke undithandayo mna, uya kuthandwa nguBawo. Nam ndiya kumthanda, ndizibonakalise kuye.”" 
John14:22 Waza uJudas, lowo ungenguye uSikariyoti, wathi kuye: “Nkosi, kutheni na le nto uza kuzibonakalisa kuthi, ungazibonakalisi kulo ihlabathi?”" 
John14:23 Waphendula uYesu wathi kuye: “Lowo undithandayo uyawagcina amazwi am. Wothi uBawo amthande, size siye kuye, sihlale kunye naye." 
John14:24 Lowo ungandithandiyo akakwenzi endikuthethayo. Kanti la mazwi eniwave ngam akamazwi am, koko ngakaBawo ondithumileyo." 
John14:25 “Ndinixelele oku ndisekunye nani. 
John14:26 Ke uMmeli uMoya oyiNgcwele, lowo uBawo aya kumthuma egameni lam, uya kunifundisa zonke izinto, anikhumbuze ngako konke endithe ndanixelela kona." 
John14:27 “Ndinishiya noxolo olulolwam, olungafani nakancinane nolweli hlabathi. Ze ningakhathazeki, ningoyiki." 
John14:28 Senditshilo kuni ukuthi ndiyemka, kodwa ndiya kuphinda ndibuyele kuni. Ukuba benindithanda ngenavuyayo nakuva ukuba ndiya kuBawo, kuba yena mkhulu kunam." 
John14:29 Isizathu sokuba ndinixelele ezi zinto ngoku, zingekenzeki, kukuze zakwenzeka nikholwe." 
John14:30 Andisenakuthetha zinto zininzi nani, kuba selesiza umphathi weli hlabathi. Akanagunya kum," 
John14:31 kodwa ukuze ihlabathi liqonde ukuba ndiyamthanda uBawo, yaye ndisenza njengoko uBawo andiyaleleyo, ndithi kuni: ‘Phakamani, simke apha.’ ”" 
John15:1 “Mna ndingumdiliya wenene; umlimi wawo nguBawo. 
John15:2 Onke amasebe akum angavelisi siqhamo uyawasusa; onke avelisa isiqhamo uyawathena, ukuze avelise isiqhamo ngakumbi." 
John15:3 Nina ke senihlambulukile yimfundiso endinifundise yona. 
John15:4 Hlalani nimanyene nam, njengokuba nam ndihleli ndimanyene nani. Kaloku isebe alinako ukuvelisa isiqhamo ngokwalo lingahlalanga limanyene nomdiliya. Ngokukwanjalo ke nani aninakuvelisa siqhamo ningahlalanga nimanyene nam." 
John15:5 “Ndim umdiliya; nina ningamasebe. Ohlala emanyene nam, ndibe mna ndihleli ndimanyene naye, uya kuvelisa iziqhamo ezininzi. Kaloku aninakwenza nento le nahlukene nam." 
John15:6 Ongahlali emanyene nam uyalahlwa, afane nesebe elilahliweyo laza loma. Amasebe anjalo ayaqokelelwa, aphoswe emlilweni atshe." 
John15:7 Xa nihleli nimanyene nam, nisoloko nisenza ngokwamazwi am, nocela nantoni na ke eniyifunayo, niyifumane." 
John15:8 Udumo lukaBawo luyatshatshela xa nivelisa iziqhamo ezininzi, nisenjenjalo kuba ningabafundi bam." 
John15:9 Mna ndiyanithanda nina kwanjengoko uBawo andithandayo mna. Hlalani ke nikholose ngokuthandwa ndim. 
John15:10 Xa niyigcina imiyalelo yam, noba nihlala nikholose ngokuthandwa ndim. Xelisani mna endiyilulameleyo imiyalelo kaBawo, ndihlala ndikholose ngokuthandwa nguye." 
John15:11 “Ezi zinto ndizithethe kuni ukuze nibe novuyo enilunikwe ndim, luze uvuyo lwenu lugqibelele." 
John15:12 Umyalelo endiniyala ngawo ngowokuba nithandane njengoko mna ndanithandayo. 
John15:13 Olona thando lukhulu umntu anokuzithanda ngalo izihlobo zakhe kukuba ubomi bakhe abuncamele zona. 
John15:14 Nizizihlobo zam ke nina, ukuba niyayenza imiyalelo yam." 
John15:15 Andisatsho kuni ukuthi nizizicaka, kuba isicaka asikwazi okwenziwa yinkosi yaso. Ndinibiza ngokuthi nizizihlobo, kuba ndinixelele konke endikuvileyo kuBawo." 
John15:16 Asinini enanyula mna, ndim owaninyulayo nina. Ndanimisela okokuba niqhubele phambili, nivelise iziqhamo ezihlala zikho. Ke ngoko uBawo uya kuninika konke enithi nikucele egameni lam." 
John15:17 Ndiniwisela lo mthetho ke: ‘Thandanani!’ ” 
John15:18 “Ukuba ihlabathi lithe lanithiya, ze nikhumbule okokuba lathiya mna kuqala." 
John15:19 Ukuba beningabehlabathi, ihlabathi ngelinithanda okwabalo. Kodwa aningabo abehlabathi, kuba mna ndaninyula kulo ihlabathi. Kungoko linithiyileyo ihlabathi." 
John15:20 Likhumbuleni ilizwi endalithethayo kuni, ndisithi: ‘Akukho sicaka sikhulu kunenkosi yaso.’ Banditshutshisile mna; ke ngoko bonitshutshisa nani. Abayamkelanga imfundiso yam; neyenu ke abayi kuyamkela." 
John15:21 Ezi zinto zonke baya kuzenza kuni ngenxa yam, kuba abamazi lowo undithumileyo." 
John15:22 Ukuba bendingathethanga nabo, ngebengabanga natyala; kodwa ngoku abanandawo bangalandula ngayo malunga nesono sabo," 
John15:23 kuba ondithiyileyo mna uthiye kwanoBawo. 
John15:24 Ukuba babengandibonanga ndisenza imisebenzi engazange yenziwa mntu, ngebengabanga natyala; kodwa bayibonile imisebenzi yam, kanti noko bandithiyile mna, bamthiyile naye uBawo." 
John15:25 Noko, bekumelwe kukuba njalo, ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi elibhaliweyo emthethweni wabo elithi: ‘Bandithiya kungekho sizathu mpela.’" 
John15:26 “Ndakuba ndifikile kuBawo, ndonithumela uMmeli onguMoya wenyaniso ovela kuBawo. Xa athe wafika yena, wongqina ngam." 
John15:27 Nani ke niya kungqina ngam, kuba beninam kwasekuqaleni." 
John16:1 “Ndinixelele ezi zinto ukuze ningahlehli elukholweni. 
John16:2 Niya kusikwa *ezindlwini zesikhungo; ewe, kuya kufika ixesha lokuba bonke abanibulalayo bacinge ukuba bakhonza uThixo ngokwenjenjalo." 
John16:3 Ezo zinto baya kuzenza kuni, kuba bengamazanga uBawo, bengandazanga nam." 
John16:4 Ndinixelela ezi zinto ukuze kuthi, lakufika ixesha lokuba ezi zinto bazenze, nikhumbule okokuba ndandinixelele.” “Ekuqaleni andinixelelanga ezi zinto, kuba bendikunye nani." 
John16:5 Kodwa ngoku ndiyemka, ndiya kulowo undithumileyo. Akukho namnye kuni undibuzayo ukuba ndiya phi na," 
John16:6 kuba iintliziyo zenu zizaliswe bubuhlungu kukundiva ndinixelela ezi zinto. 
John16:7 Kodwa ndinixelela inyaniso; kunilungele ukuba ndimke. Ukuba andithanga ndemka, akayi kuza kuni uMmeli; kodwa ukuba ndithe ndemka, ndiya kumthumela kuni." 
John16:8 Uya kuthi ke akufika ababonise abantu beli hlabathi into esiyiyo isono sabo, into obuyiyo ubulungisa babo, nento okuyiyo ukugwetywa:" 
John16:9 isono esi kukuba bengakholwa kum; 
John16:10 ubulungisa obu kukuba ndisiya kuBawo, nize ningabi sandibona;" 
John16:11 umgwebo lo kukuba selegwetyiwe umphathi weli hlabathi. 
John16:12 “Ziseninzi izinto endinokuzithetha nani, kodwa zinganixaka okwangoku." 
John16:13 Xa ke athe wafika yena uMoya wenyaniso, uya kunikhokelela kuyo yonke inyaniso. Akayi kuthetha ngegunya elilelakhe, koko uya kuthetha izinto azivileyo, anichazele izinto ezizayo." 
John16:14 Yena uya kundenzela iwonga, kuba izinto anichazela zona ziya kuba zezivela kum." 
John16:15 Isizathu sokuba nditsho ukuthi izinto anichazela zona ziya kuba zezivela kum kukuba zonke izinto ezizezikaBawo zikwazezam.” 
John16:16 “Kwakufutshanenje anisayi kuba sandibona, kuthi kwakufutshane emva koko niphinde nindibone.”" 
John16:17 Ke ngoko abanye kubafundi bathi omnye komnye: “Ngaba uthetha ukuthini xa athi kuthi kwakufutshanenje asisayi kuba sambona, kuthi kwakufutshane emva koko siphinde simbone, ekwathi kwayena uyemka esiya kuYise?”" 
John16:18 Babuzana ke besithi: “Ngaba uthetha ukuthini na xa athi ‘kwakufutshanenje’? Asiyiqondi into ayithethayo.” 
John16:19 UYesu wayesazi okokuba bafuna ukumbuza, waza wathi kubo: “Niyabuzana na ngale nto yokuba ndithe kwakufutshane anisayi kuba sandibona, kuthi kwakufutshane emva koko niphinde nindibone?" 
John16:20 Ndithi kuni, inene, niya kulila nenze isijwili, kodwa ihlabathi lona liya kuvuya. Niya kuxhalaba, kodwa ukuxhalaba kwenu kojika kube luvuyo." 
John16:21 Umfazi uba sezintlungwini lakufika ixesha lokuba azale. Kodwa akuba emzele umntwana akabi sazikhumbula ezo ntlungu, kuphela nje uba novuyo kuba kuzelwe umntu ehlabathini." 
John16:22 Ngokukwanjalo nani nixhalabile ngoku, kodwa ndophinda ndinibone, nize ke nivuye ngovuyo ekungekho bani unako ukuluhlutha kuni." 
John16:23 “Ngaloo mini aniyi kuba sandibuza nto. Ndithi kuni, inene, zonke izinto enithe nazicela kuBawo ngegama lam, woninika." 
John16:24 Kude kube ngoku anikaceli nto ngegama lam. Celani ke; niya kuphiwa, luze uvuyo lwenu lugqibelele.”" 
John16:25 “Ezi zinto ndizithethe kuni ngezafobe, kodwa liyeza ixesha endingayi kuba santsonkotha ngalo; ndiya kuthetha nani ngokucacileyo ngoBawo." 
John16:26 Yakufika loo mini, niya kucela ngegama lam. Kungoko ndingatsho ukuthi iya kuba ndim onicelelayo kuBawo." 
John16:27 Kaloku uBawo ngokwakhe uyanithanda, kuba nithe nandithanda mna, nakholwa ukuba ndivela kuThixo." 
John16:28 Ndaphuma kuBawo, ndeza ehlabathini. Ngoku ke ndiyemka ehlabathini; ndiya kuBawo.”" 
John16:29 Baza bathi kuye abafundi bakhe: “Uyabona, ngoku uthetha ngokuphandle ungasantsonkothi ngezafobe." 
John16:30 Ngoku ke siyaqonda ukuba wena uyazazi zonke izinto. Akusafuneki nganto ukuba ugocagocwe. Ke siyakholwa kukuba wena uvela kuThixo.” 
John16:31 Wabaphendula uYesu wathi: “Niyakholwa na ngoku? 
John16:32 Niyabona, kuza ixesha, kwaye selifikile, lokuba nichithakale nonke, elowo agoduke, ndize ndisale ndedwa. Noko ke andindedwa, kuba uBawo unam." 
John16:33 Ndinixelele ezi zinto ukuze nibe noxolo, kuba nimanyene nam. Ehlabathini niya kubandezeleka; kodwa musani ukuxhalaba, kuba mna ndiloyisile ihlabathi.”" 
John17:1 Akuba etshilo uYesu, wakhangela phezulu, wathi: “Bawo, lifikile ngoku ixesha. Mnike iwonga uNyana wakho, aze abubonakalise ubungangamsha bakho." 
John17:2 Kaloku umnike igunya eluntwini, ukuze bonke abo umnike bona, abe nako ukubanika obona bomi bungenasiphelo." 
John17:3 Nabu ke obona bomi: kukwazana nawe, wena Thixo unguye, ingabi wumbi; bazane naye lowo uthunywe nguwe, uYesu Krestu." 
John17:4 Ndibubonakalisile ubungangamsha bakho ehlabathini; ndiwufezile umsebenzi ondithume wona. 
John17:5 Ndiwonge ke ngoku kunye nawe, Bawo, ngelo wonga ndandinalo ndikunye nawe ihlabathi lingekadalwa nokudalwa." 
John17:6 “Ndikwazisile kwabo wandinika bona ubahlula kwabehlabathi. Babengabakho, wabanika mna. Ilizwi lakho libangene." 
John17:7 Ke ngoku bayaqonda ukuba yonke into endinayo, ivela kuwe." 
John17:8 Ndilugqithisile udaba obundithume lona kubo. Baqonde kakuhle bakholwa ukuba ndivela kuwe, bavuma ukuba ndithunywe nguwe." 
John17:9 “Ndithandazela bona ke; andithandazeli abo behlabathi. Kuphela ndithandazela abo undinike bona, kuba bengabakho." 
John17:10 Bonke abangabam, bangabakho; yaye bonke abangabakho, bakwangabam. Nditsho ndaduma ke ngenxa yabo." 
John17:11 Njengoko ndisiza kuwe sendinjengongasekhoyo ehlabathini. Kambe ke bona basesehlabathini. Bakhusele, Bawo ongcwele, ngegunya legama lakho, elo wandinika lona, ukuze bahlale bebanye njengokuba mna nawe sibanye." 
John17:12 Oko bendikunye nabo, bendibakhusela ngegunya legama lakho, elo wandinika lona. Ndabakhusela, akwaduka namnye kubo, ngaphandle komduka lowo, owazalisekisa okuxelwe *kwiziBhalo." 
John17:13 Njengokuba sendiza kumka, ndize kuwe, ezi zinto ndizithetha ndisesehlabathini, ukuze baphuphume luvuyo lwam." 
John17:14 Ilizwi lakho ndiligqithisele kubo. Ke lona ihlabathi libathiyile, kuba bengengabo abehlabathi, njengokuba nam ndingengowalo ihlabathi." 
John17:15 Anditsho ukuba ubasuse ehlabathini, koko ndicela ukuba ubakhusele kongendawo." 
John17:16 Nanjengokuba mna ndingenguye owehlabathi, nabo abangabo abehlabathi." 
John17:17 Benze babe ngabakho ngayo inyaniso. Lilizwi lakho inyaniso. 
John17:18 Ndibathume ehlabathini njengokuba nam wandithumayo ehlabathini. 
John17:19 Ndizinikela kuwe ngenxa yabo, ukuze nabo babe ngabakho ngenene." 
John17:20 “Andithandazeli bona bodwa, koko ndithandazela nâbo baya kundivuma ngenxa yelizwi abaliva ngabo." 
John17:21 Nceda benze bonke babe banye. Bawo, mabamanyane nathi, njengokuba wena unto-nye nam, nam ndinto-nye nawe. Mababe yimbumba yamanyama, ukuze likholwe ihlabathi ukuba ndithunywe nguwe." 
John17:22 Ndibanikile nabo iwonga owandinika lona, ukuze nabo babe nto-nye, njengokuba nathi sinto-nye." 
John17:23 Mandihlale kubo, njengokuba wena uhleli kum, ukuze babe nto-nye ngokupheleleyo, lize ihlabathi liqonde ukuba ndithunywe nguwe, lazi ukuba bona ubathanda njengokuba undithanda mna." 
John17:24 “Bawo, njengoko ubanike mna nje, ndithanda ukuba babe lapho ndikhoyo, babubone ubungangamsha ondinike bona, kuba wandithanda lingekadalwa nokudalwa ihlabathi." 
John17:25 Bawo olilungisa, ihlabathi alikwazi. Mna ndiyakwazi, yaye naba bayaqonda ukuba ndithunywe nguwe." 
John17:26 Ndibazisile ngawe, ndaye ndisaya kwenjenjalo, ukuze uthando ondithanda ngalo mna lumile kubo, nam ndihlale ndimanyene nabo.”" 
John18:1 Emva kwalo mthandazo uYesu wawelela ngaphesheya komlanjana iKedron, ehamba nabafundi bakhe. Kwakukho igadi kuloo ndawo; uYesu wangena kuyo kunye nabafundi bakhe." 
John18:2 UJudas, umngcatshi wakhe, naye wayeyazi loo ndawo, kuba uYesu nabafundi bakhe babedla ngokuhlangana kuyo." 
John18:3 Ke ngoko uJudas waya kuloo ndawo, ehamba neqela lamajoni nabagadi bendlu kaThixo, bephethe izibane, nezikhuni ezivuthayo, nezikhali, bethunywe ngababingeleli abaziintloko nabaFarasi." 
John18:4 UYesu ekwazi konke okwakuza kumhlela, wabakhawulela, wathi: “Nifuna bani?”" 
John18:5 Baphendula bathi: “UYesu waseNazarete.” Wathi ke kubo: “Ndinguye.” UJudas umngcatshi wayemi kunye nabo. 
John18:6 Akuba uYesu ethe: “Ndinguye,” babuya umva, bawa phantsi." 
John18:7 Wababuza kwakhona uYesu esithi: “Nifuna bani?” Bona bathi: “UYesu waseNazarete.” 
John18:8 Wathi uYesu: “Nditshilo ukuba ndinguye. Ke ukuba nifuna mna, bayekeni bazihambele aba.”" 
John18:9 Esitsho nje wayesenzela ukuba lizaliseke ilizwi awalithethayo kuYise esithi: “Bawo, akudukanga namnye kwabo wandinika bona.”" 
John18:10 Kuthe ke ngoko uSimon Petros enekrele walirhola, waxabela isicaka sombingeleli omkhulu, wasisusa indlebe yasekunene. Igama lesicaka eso lalinguMalko." 
John18:11 Wathi ke uYesu kuPetros: “Faka ikrele lakho esingxotyeni salo. Le ntlungu ndiyibekelwe nguBawo. Ndiya kuthini ke ukungayamkeli!” 
John18:12 Ke ngoko elo qela lamajoni, linomphathi walo, kwakunye nabagadi *bendlu kaThixo ababethunywe ngamaJuda, bambamba uYesu, bambopha izandla." 
John18:13 Kuqala bamsa kuAnas, kuba wayenguyise womka-Kayafa, owayengumbingeleli omkhulu ngaloo nyaka." 
John18:14 Ngulo Kayafa ke lo owacebisa amaJuda ngelithi kulungile ukuba umntu omnye afele abantu bonke. 
John18:15 UYesu walandelwa nguSimon Petros kwanomnye umfundi. Lo mfundi ke walandela uYesu wangena eyadini yomzi wombingeleli omkhulu, kuba wayeqhelene nomninimzi lowo." 
John18:16 UPetros yena wasala ngaphandle kwesango. Waphuma ke lo mfundi wayeqheliwe apho, wathi ethethe nesicakazana esigcina isango, wamngenisa uPetros." 
John18:17 Sathi ke kuPetros isicakazana eso: “Akunguye na umfundi walo mntu?” Wathi uPetros: “Hayi; andinguye.” 
John18:18 Kwakubanda; ke ngoko izicaka nabagadi *bendlu kaThixo babebase imbawula, beyingqongile, besotha. UPetros waya wema kunye nabo, wotha." 
John18:19 Umbingeleli omkhulu wabuza uYesu ngabafundi bakhe nangeemfundiso zakhe. 
John18:20 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ndithethe phandle ehlabathini. Bendihlala ndifundisa ezindlwini zesikhungo nasendlwini kaThixo apho kuhlangana khona onke amaJuda. Akukho nto ndiyithethe emfihlakalweni. 
John18:21 Usandibuza ntoni ke? Buza kwabo bantu bandivileyo. Bayazazi izinto endazithethayo.” 
John18:22 Akugqibanje ukutsho, omnye wabagadi bendlu kaThixo owayekufuphi naye, wambetha ngempama, esithi: “Yindlela yokuphendula umbingeleli omkhulu le?”" 
John18:23 Wamphendula uYesu wathi: “Ukuba ndithethe ngendlela engeyiyo, cacisa ke. Kodwa ukuba ndithethe kakuhle, undibethela ntoni?”" 
John18:24 UAnas ke wamthumela uYesu esabotshiwe kuKayafa umbingeleli omkhulu. 
John18:25 UPetros wayesemi apho esotha, bambuza abanye besithi: “Akunguye na umfundi walaa mntu?” Wakhanyela kodwa uPetros, esithi: “Hayi, andinguye.”" 
John18:26 Isicaka esithile sombingeleli omkhulu, esizalana nalaa ndoda eyasuswa indlebe ngekrele nguPetros, sathi: “Akunguye na lo bendimbone egadini kunye naye laa mntu?”" 
John18:27 Wakhanyela kwakhona uPetros. Kwangoko yakhala inkuku. 
John18:28 UYesu kwemkiwa naye kwakusasa kwaKayafa, wasiwa emzini werhuluneli. AmaJuda akangenanga khona wona, hleze ngokwesiko lawo azingcolise, angabi nalo ilungelo lokutya *iPasika." 
John18:29 Waphuma ke uPilato, waya kuwo, wathi: “Nimmangalela ngantoni lo mntu?”" 
John18:30 Aphendula athi: “Ngesingamzisanga kuwe ukuba ebengenguye umenzi wobubi.” 
John18:31 Wathi kuwo uPilato: “Mthatheni nina, nimgwebe ngokwenu, ngokwemithetho yenu.” Amphendula athi amaJuda: “Thina asivumelekanga ukubulala umntu.”" 
John18:32 Ekufuna nje oku amaJuda ayezalisekisa ilizwi likaYesu awalithethayo esalatha indlela aza kufa ngayo. 
John18:33 Ebuyele ngaphakathi komzi wakhe, uPilato wabiza uYesu, wathi kuye: “Ungukumkani wamaJuda na wena?”" 
John18:34 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Lo mbuzo uvela kuwe, okanye kukho bantu bambi bathe bakuxelela nto ngam?”" 
John18:35 Wathi uPilato: “Uba ndingumJuda nam? Sisizwe sakowenu nababingeleli abaziintloko abakuzise kum. Yintoni le uyenzileyo?” 
John18:36 Wathi ke yena uYesu: “Asibobeli hlabathi ubukhosi bam. Xa bekunjalo amaphakathi am ebeya kundilwela, ukuze ndingabanjwa ngamaJuda, kodwa ke asibobalapha ubukhosi bam.”" 
John18:37 UPilato wathi kuye: “Ke, ungukumkani?” Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Liphuma kuwe eli lithi ndingukumkani. Mna ndithi ndizalelwe ukungqinela inyaniso; ndizele loo nto kanye ehlabathini. Nabani na ongowenyaniso uyaliva ilizwi lam.”" 
John18:38 Wathi kuye uPilato: “Yintoni yona inyaniso?” Emva kokuba etshilo waphuma uPilato, waya kumaJuda, wathi kuwo: “Mna andifumani tyala kuye konke." 
John18:39 Kodwa ngokwesiko lenu ndidla ngokunikhululela umbanjwa abe mnye *ngePasika. Ngaba ke nifuna ndinikhululele ukumkani wamaJuda?” 
John18:40 Bamphendula bekhwaza besithi: “Hayi, asimfuni lo mntu; sifuna uBharabha.” UBharabha lo ke wayesisihange." 
John19:1 Waza uPilato wayalela ukuba uYesu makakatswe. 
John19:2 Amajoni oluka isithsaba sameva, amfaka sona entloko, amambathisa ngengubo ebomvu," 
John19:3 amana esithi kuye: “Aa! Kumkani wamaJuda!” Aza ambetha. 
John19:4 Waphinda uPilato waphuma, wathi kumaJuda: “Niyabona, ndimzisa kuni, ukuze niqonde ukuba andifumani tyala kuye konke.”" 
John19:5 Waphuma ke uYesu, ethwele isithsaba sameva, ambethe ingubo ebomvu. UPilato wathi kumaJuda: “Nanko ke!”" 
John19:6 Bakumbona ababingeleli abaziintloko nabagadi *bendlu kaThixo badanduluka besithi: “Bethelela emnqamlezweni! Bethelela emnqamlezweni!” Waza wathi kubo uPilato: “Mthatheni ngokwenu, nimbethelele emnqamlezweni, kuba mna andifumani tyala kuye.”" 
John19:7 Amphendula amaJuda athi: “Thina sinomthetho; yaye umelwe kukuba afe ngokwalo mthetho, kuba ezenza uNyana kaThixo.”" 
John19:8 Akuyiva loo nto uPilato, wothuka ngakumbi," 
John19:9 waphinda wangena ngaphakathi, wathi kuYesu: “Uvela phi wena?” Kodwa uYesu akamphendulanga." 
John19:10 UPilato wathi kuye: “Akufuni kundiphendula? Uyaqonda na ukuba ndinegunya lokukukhulula, ndinako nokukubethelela emnqamlezweni?”" 
John19:11 Waphendula uYesu wathi: “Ngewungenagunya kum mpela ukuba ubungalinikwanga nguThixo. Ngoko ke oyena unetyala ngulowo undizise kuwe.” 
John19:12 UPilato kwaba kukhona afuna ukumkhulula, kodwa amaJuda adanduluka esithi: “Ukuba uyamkhulula lo mntu, uya kuba akukho *ngakuKhesare. Kaloku umntu ozenza ukumkani, uchasa uKhesare.”" 
John19:13 Akuyiva le nto, uPilato wamkhuphela ngaphandle uYesu, waya kuchopha esihlalweni sokugweba, endaweni ekuthiwa nguMgangatho waMatye, ngesiHebhere kuthiwa yiGabhata." 
John19:14 Ke kaloku kwakusemini enkulu ngomhla owandulela *iPasika, waza uPilato wathi kumaJuda: “Nanko ke ukumkani wenu.”" 
John19:15 Ankqangaza athi: “Msuse! Msuse! Mbethelele emnqamlezweni!” Wathi kuwo uPilato: “Nifuna ndimbethelele emnqamlezweni ukumkani wenu?” Ababingeleli abaziintloko bathi: “Mnye qha ukumkani wethu: nguKhesare.” 
John19:16 Waza ke uPilato wabavumela ukuba uYesu abethelelwe emnqamlezweni. Kwemkiwa naye uYesu," 
John19:17 ehamba ethwele umnqamlezo wakhe ukuya kuloo ndawo kuthiwa yeyoKhakhayi, ekuthiwa ngesiHebhere yiGolgota." 
John19:18 Apho bambethelela emnqamlezweni, ephahlwe ngabanye ababini, bebethelelwe nabo, uYesu ephakathi." 
John19:19 UPilato wabhala nesaziso, esaxhonywa emnqamlezweni. Kwakubhalwe kwathiwa: “UYesu waseNazarete, uKumkani wamaJuda.”" 
John19:20 AmaJuda amaninzi asifunda eso saziso, kuba loo ndawo uYesu wayebethelelwe kuyo emnqamlezweni yayikufuphi nesixeko. Isaziso eso sasibhalwe ngesiHebhere, nangesiLatini, nangesiGrike." 
John19:21 Ke ngoko ababingeleli abaziintloko bamaJuda bathi kuPilato: “Sukubhala uthi: ‘UKumkani wamaJuda;’ yithi kanye: ‘Lo mntu uthe: NdinguKumkani wamaJuda.’ ” 
John19:22 Waphendula uPilato wathi: “Endikubhalileyo ndikubhalile.” 
John19:23 Akuba amajoni embethelele emnqamlezweni uYesu, azithatha iimpahla zakhe, abelana ngazo emané. Asithatha sona isambatho sakhe esasingenamthungo, salukiwe nje sisonke ukususela phezulu." 
John19:24 Ke ngoko athetha-thethana esithi: “Masingasikrazuli; *masiqashise ngaso ukuba siya kuba sesikabani.” Ukwenjenje oku ayezalisekisa loo ndawo *eziBhalweni ithi: “Babelana ngeempahla zam; baqashisa ngesambatho sam.” Enza loo nto kanye amajoni. 
John19:25 Apho ngasemnqamlezweni kaYesu kwakumi unina, nodade bonina, noMariya umka-Kleyopa, kunye noMariya waseMagadala." 
John19:26 UYesu akumbona unina emi kunye naloo mfundi uYesu wayemthanda, wathi kunina: “Mama, nanko unyana wakho.”" 
John19:27 Waza wathi kuloo mfundi: “Nanko unyoko.” Ukususela ngelo xesha loo mfundi wamthathela emzini wakhe unina kaYesu. 
John19:28 UYesu wayesazi ngoku okokuba konke kugqityiwe ukuba kuzalisekiswe okuxelwe *eziBhalweni, waza wathi: “Ndinxaniwe.”" 
John19:29 Kwakukho isitya sizele yiwayini emuncu apho, baza bathi nkxu imfunxa kuloo wayini, bayibeka engcongolweni ekuthiwa yihisopu, bayisondeza emlonyeni kaYesu." 
John19:30 Akuba eyimfimfithile iwayini uYesu wathi: “Kugqityiwe.” Wee qubudu intloko, waphuma umphefumlo." 
John19:31 Kwakungokuhlwa okwandulela *iPasika. AmaJuda ayengathandi ukuba kubekho imizimba esaxhonywe eminqamlezweni *ngoMhla wokuPhumla, ngakumbi ngalo wePasika. Amcela ke uPilato ukuba yaphulwe imilenze yâbo babebethelelwe, baze bothulwe nasemnqamlezweni." 
John19:32 Aya ke amajoni, afika ayaphula imilenze yowokuqala, aza ayaphula neyowesibini owayebethelelwe kunye noYesu." 
John19:33 Kodwa akufika kuYesu, afumana ukuba selefile; akabi sayaphula ke eyakhe imilenze." 
John19:34 Suka lamhlaba ngomkhonto ephangweni elinye ijoni, kwaza kwampompoza igazi namanzi." 
John19:35 Oku kuyangqinwa ngomnye wâbo bakubonileyo, yaye ubungqina bakhe buyinyaniso. Uyazazi ukuba unyanisile, efuna ukuba nani nikholwe." 
John19:36 Zisenzeka nje ezi zinto, zazizalisekisa okuxelwe *ziziBhalo zisithi: “Akuyi kwaphulwa nalinye ithambo lakhe.”" 
John19:37 Kwakhona enye indawo yeziBhalo ithi: “Baya kujonga kulowo bamhlabileyo.” 
John19:38 Ke kaloku emva koko uJosefu waseArimati wacela imvume kuPilato ukuba awuthathele kuye umzimba kaYesu. UJosefu lo wayengumlandeli ofihlakeleyo kaYesu ngenxa yokoyika amaJuda. UPilato wamvumela, waza ke uJosefu waya kuwuthula umzimba kaYesu." 
John19:39 UJosefu wayekhatshwa nguNikodimo, lowo wayekhe waya kuYesu ngobusuku. UNikodimo wayephethe umxube wentlaka yokuqhola nencindi yekhala engaphezu kweekhilogram ezingamashumi amathathu." 
John19:40 Bawuthatha ke umzimba kaYesu, bawuthandela ngamalaphu elinen, bawuqhola njengokuba kwakusenziwa ngokwesiko lamaJuda." 
John19:41 Kwakukho isitiya kuloo ndawo wayebethelelwe emnqamlezweni kuyo uYesu, kukho nengcwaba elitsha, kungekangcwatywa mntu kulo." 
John19:42 UYesu ke bamngcwaba kweli ngcwaba lilelona likufutshane, kuba *uMhla wokuPhumla wawuselusondele." 
John20:1 Phambi komsobomvu ngeCawe uMariya waseMagadala waya engcwabeni, wafika ilitye lokuvala ingcwaba lisusiwe." 
John20:2 Wabaleka, waya kuSimon Petros nalaa mfundi wayethandwa nguYesu, wathi kubo: “Bayithathile iNkosi engcwabeni. Asazi apho bayibeke khona.”" 
John20:3 Banduluka ke uPetros nomnye umfundi lowo, baya kufika engcwabeni." 
John20:4 Babebaleka kunye, kodwa omnye umfundi lo wamshiya ngamendu uPetros, wafika kuqala engcwabeni." 
John20:5 Wathoba nje, wawabona amalaphu elinen, engakhange angene." 
John20:6 Wagaleleka noPetros, wangena engcwabeni. Wawabona amalaphu ephantsi." 
John20:7 Ilaphu uYesu awayebotshwe ngalo intloko, walibona lilodwa, lisongiwe." 
John20:8 Wangena ke naloo mfundi obefike kuqala engcwabeni. Akukhangela wakholwa. 
John20:9 Kaloku babengaliqondi ilizwi *leziBhalo elithi umelwe kukuba avuke ekufeni. 
John20:10 Baza ke bagoduka abafundi. 
John20:11 UMariya wayemi ngasengcwabeni elila. Esalila njalo wathoba, wakhangela engcwabeni," 
John20:12 wabona izithunywa zezulu ezibini zambethe ezimhlophe, zihleli apho bekukho umzimba kaYesu, esinye sihleli ngasentloko, esinye singasezinyaweni." 
John20:13 Zathi ke kuye: “Ulilela ntoni?” Wathi kuzo: “Ithathiwe iNkosi yam. Andazi nokuba ibekwe phi na.” 
John20:14 Esatsho, waguquka, wabona uYesu emi; akaqonda noko ukuba nguYesu." 
John20:15 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Ulilela ntoni, wethu? Ufuna bani?” Ecinga ukuba ngumgcini-sitiya, wathi kuye: “Ndixelele, mnumzana, apho umbeke khona, ukuba umsusile, ze ndiye kumthatha.”" 
John20:16 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Mariya!” Waguqukela kuye, wathi kuye ngesiHebhere: “Rabhoni,” oko kukuthi: “Mfundisi.”" 
John20:17 Waza wathi uYesu: “Sukundibamba, kuba andikenyuki ndiye kuBawo. Hamba uye kuxelela abahlobo bam ukuba sendinyuka, ndisiya kuBawo okwanguYihlo, uThixo wam okwanguThixo wenu.”" 
John20:18 Ke ngoko uMariya waseMagadala waya kubaxelela abafundi ukuba uyibonile iNkosi, waza wabaxelela nomyalezo wayo." 
John20:19 Ngokuhlwa ngaloo mini yeCawe abafundi babehlangene, bezivalile iingcango kuba besoyika amaJuda. Wafika uYesu, wema phakathi kwabo, wathi: “Uxolo malube nani.”" 
John20:20 Etshilo wababonisa izandla zakhe nephango lakhe. Baza bafikelwa luvuyo abafundi bakuyibona iNkosi. 
John20:21 Waphinda wathi kubo uYesu: “Uxolo malube nani. Njengokuba uBawo endithumile mna, nani ndiyanithuma.”" 
John20:22 Akuba etshilo ke wabaphefumlela, wathi: “Yamkelani uMoya oyiNgcwele." 
John20:23 Bonke abantu enibaxolelayo izono zabo baya kuxolelwa; kanti bonke eningabaxoleliyo abayi kuxolelwa.” 
John20:24 UTomas, omnye wabafundi abalishumi elinambini, lo kuthiwa nguWele, wayengekho phakathi kwabafundi ukufika kukaYesu kubo." 
John20:25 Ke ngoko abanye abafundi bathi kuye: “Siyibonile iNkosi!” Kodwa yena wathi kubo: “Ndingekawaboni nje amanxeba ezikhonkwane ezandleni zayo, ndifake umnwe emanxebeni ayo, nesandla sam ndisifake ephangweni layo, andisoze ndikholwe.”" 
John20:26 NgeCawe elandelayo, behlangene kwakhona endlwini abafundi bakaYesu, ekho noTomas, wafika uYesu, iingcango zivaliwe, wathi: “Uxolo malube nani.”" 
John20:27 Waza wathi kuTomas: “Faka apha umnwe wakho, uzibone izandla zam. Solule isandla sakho, usifake ephangweni lam. Yeka ukungakholwa oku! Kholwa!”" 
John20:28 Waphendula uTomas wathi kuye: “Nkosi yam! Thixo wam!” 
John20:29 Wathi kuye uYesu: “Uyakholwa ngoku, kuba undibonile? Hayi uyolo lwâbo bakholwa bengandibonanga!”" 
John20:30 Mininzi neminye imiqondiso awayenzayo uYesu beyibona abafundi bakhe, engabhalwanga kule ncwadi." 
John20:31 Ezi ke izinto zibhalelwe ukuze nikholwe ukuba uYesu unguye *uKrestu, uNyana kaThixo; nokuze nithi nikholwa, nibe nobomi ngenxa yegunya legama lakhe." 
John21:1 Emva koko uYesu waphinda wazibonakalisa kubafundi bakhe ngakuLwandle lwaseTibheriya. Kwahamba ngolu hlobo ukuzibonakalisa kwakhe: 
John21:2 USimon Petros, noTomas ekuthiwa nguWele, noNataniyeli waseKana eGalili, kunye noonyana bakaZebhedi, nabanye abafundi ababini, babendawonye." 
John21:3 Waza wathi kubo uSimon Petros: “Ndisaya kuloba.” Baza bathi kuye: “Nathi sohamba nawe.” Baya ke bekhwele isikhitshana, kodwa àbabamba nto ngobo busuku." 
John21:4 Ukuthi chapha komsobomvu nako kumi uYesu elunxwemeni. Phofu abafundi babengaqondi ukuba nguYesu. 
John21:5 Wathi ke ngoko uYesu kubo: “Anibambanga ntlanzi, bafana?” Bamphendula bathi: “Hayi.”" 
John21:6 Waza wathi kubo: “Phosani umnatha ngasekunene kwesikhitshana. Nobambisa ke.” Bawuphosa, baza ngenxa yobuninzi beentlanzi ababi nako ukuwutsala umnatha." 
John21:7 Ke ngoko loo mfundi obethandwa nguYesu wathi kuPetros: “YiNkosi!” USimon Petros, akuva ukuba yiNkosi le, wazithi wambu ngengubo, kuba wayetyedile, watsho waziphosa emanzini." 
John21:8 Ke bona abanye abafundi baya elunxwemeni ngesikhitshana, bawurhuqa umnatha, uzele ziintlanzi. Kwakumalunga neemitha ezilikhulu ukuya elunxwemeni." 
John21:9 Bakuhla esikhitshaneni, babona umlilo wamalahle, kukho intlanzi kuwo kwanesonka." 
John21:10 Wathi kubo uYesu: “Khanize neentlanzi kwezi nisand' ukuzibamba.” 
John21:11 USimon Petros wakhwela esikhitshaneni, wawurhuqela elunxwemeni umnatha, uzele ziintlanzi ezinkulu, zilikhulu elinamashumi amahlanu anantathu zizonke. Nangona zazininzi kangako umnatha awuqhaqhekanga." 
John21:12 Waza wathi kubo uYesu: “Yizani kutya.” Akubangakho namnye kubafundi ube nabuganga bakuthi: “Ungubani wena?” Kaloku babesazi ukuba yiNkosi. 
John21:13 Wasondela uYesu, wasithatha isonka, wabanika; wathatha nentlanzi, wabanika." 
John21:14 Oku kuzibonakalisa kukaYesu kubafundi bakhe kwakukokwesithathu emva kokuvuka kwakhe ekufeni. 
John21:15 Emva kokuba betyile, uYesu wathi kuSimon Petros: “Simon, nyana kaYohane, uyandithanda na ngaphezu kwaba?” Wathi kuye: “Ewe, Nkosi, uyazi ukuba ndiyakuthanda.” Wathi kuye uYesu: “Yondla amatakane am.”" 
John21:16 Aphinde athi kuye okwesibini uYesu: “Simon, nyana kaYohane, uyandithanda na?” Wathi kuye: “Ewe, Nkosi, uyazi ukuba ndiyakuthanda.” Wathi kuye uYesu: “Yalusa iigusha zam.”" 
John21:17 Wathi kuye okwesithathu uYesu: “Simon, nyana kaYohane, uyandithanda na?” Wev' intw' embi uPetros ebuzwa okwesithathunje nguYesu esithi: “Uyandithanda na?” Waza wathi kuYesu: “Nkosi, izinto zonke uyazazi; uyazi ukuba ndiyakuthanda.” Wathi kuye uYesu: “Yondla iigusha zam." 
John21:18 Ndithi kuwe, inene, oko ubusemtsha ubuzibhinqisa, uye apho uthanda ukuya khona, kodwa xa sewaluphele uya kuziphakamisa izandla zakho, ubhinqiswe ngomnye, akuse apho ungathandi kuya khona.”" 
John21:19 Esitsho nje uYesu, wayesalatha indlela uPetros awayeza kufa ngayo ukudumisa uThixo. Wandula ukuthi: “Ndilandèle, wena.”" 
John21:20 Wakhangela ngasemva uPetros, wabona laa mfundi wayethandwa nguYesu elandela, lowa wayehleli ecaleni kukaYesu esidlweni, waza wabuza kuYesu ukuba ngubani na owayeza kumngcatsha." 
John21:21 Wathi ke kuYesu uPetros akumbona lo mfundi: “Nkosi, kuya kuthekani ngalo?”" 
John21:22 Waza wathi kuye uYesu: “Ukuba ndifuna abekho ndide ndibuye, inamsebenzi mni loo nto kuwe? Ndilandèle, wena.”" 
John21:23 Yathetheka ke le ntetho phakathi kwabalandeli bakaYesu, kusithiwa loo mfundi akayi kufa. Kodwa uYesu wayengatshongo kuye ukuba akayi kufa; wayethe: “Ukuba ndifuna abekho ndide ndibuye, inamsebenzi mni na loo nto kuwe?”" 
John21:24 Nguye ke lo mfundi ozingqinayo ezi zinto, wazibhala nokuzibhala. Siyazi ke ukuba ubungqina bakhe buyinyaniso." 
John21:25 Zininzi nezinye izinto awazenzayo uYesu. Ukuba bezinokubhalwa zonke ngazinye, ndithelekelela okokuba ihlabathi liphela belingenakuziqulatha iincwadi ebeziya kubhalwa." 
Acts1:1 Kwincwadi yam yokuqala, Tiyofilo, ndabhala ndibalisa ngazo zonke izinto uYesu awasungula ngazo ukwenza nokufundisa," 
Acts1:2 kude kuye kuthi gaa ngaloo mhla wanyuselwa ngawo ezulwini nguThixo. Ngaphambi kokuba anyuswe uYesu, wathi ngoMoya oyiNgcwele wawayala loo madoda awawanyulayo ukuba abe *ngabathunywa." 
Acts1:3 Emva kokubandezelwa nokufa kwakhe wazibonakalisa kuloo madoda ngeziganeko ezininzi ukuba uvukile. Kwithuba leentsuku ezingamashumi amane abathunywa babemana bembona, ethetha nabo ebaxelela ngezolawulo lukaThixo." 
Acts1:4 Esitya kunye nabo wabayala wathi: “Ze ningemki eJerusalem. Hlalani nilinde isipho esathenjiswa nguBawo, esiya ndanixelela ngaso." 
Acts1:5 Kaloku uYohane yena wayebabhaptiza ngamanzi abantu; ke nina, kungekudala, uThixo uza kunibhaptiza ngoMoya oyiNgcwele.”" 
Acts1:6 Xa babendawonye, abathunywa bambuza uYesu besithi: “Nkosi, ngaba uza kulubuyisela kwangoku na ulawulo kumaSirayeli?”" 
Acts1:7 UYesu uphendule wathi: “Asiyondawo yenu ukuwazi amathuba namaxesha uBawo agqiba yedwa ngawo. 
Acts1:8 Nina niya kunikwa amandla, akufika kuni uMoya oyiNgcwele, nindingqinele ebantwini baseJerusalem, nabakulo lonke elakwaJuda, nabaseSamariya, kude kuse naseziphelweni zomhlaba.”" 
Acts1:9 Akuba etshilo uYesu, wanyuselwa ezulwini, bejongile abafundi bakhe. Lamsitha ilifu, ababa sambona." 
Acts1:10 Besakhangele ukumka kwakhe, bondele esibhakabhakeni apho, nango amadoda amabini, ambethe ezimhlophe, emi ngakubo," 
Acts1:11 abuza athi: “Madoda, maGalili, nimele ntoni apha nikhangele phezulu nje? UYesu lo nimbone enyuselwa ezulwini, uya kubuya kwangolu hlobo nimbone esimka ngalo.”" 
Acts1:12 Baza babuyela eJerusalem, bevela entabeni ekuthiwa yeyeMinquma, ekufuphi neJerusalem umgama omalunga nekhilomitha enye." 
Acts1:13 Bakungena esixekweni, banyukela egumbini eliphezulu, apho babehlala khona. YayinguPetros, noYohane, noYakobi, noAndreya; uFilipu noTomas; uBhartolomeyu noMatewu; uYakobi unyana ka-Alifeyu, noSimon iTsha-ntliziyo, kwakunye noJudas unyana kaYakobi." 
Acts1:14 Bonke aba babezingisa ukuthandaza ngamxhelo mnye, kukho namanina, ekho noMariya unina kaYesu nabantakwabo-Yesu." 
Acts1:15 Ngaloo mihla xa babehlangene ndawonye abakholwayo bemalunga nekhulu elinamashumi amabini bebonke, waphakama uPetros, wathi:" 
Acts1:16 “Madoda, mawethu, bekufanelekile ukuba kuzaliseke okwathethwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, esebenzisa uDavide ukuxela okuya kwenzeka kuJudas, lowo wabakhokelela kuYesu abo bambambayo." 
Acts1:17 UJudas lo ebengomnye wethu, enenxaxheba kulo msebenzi sikuwo.” (" 
Acts1:18 Kaloku le ndoda yathenga umhlaba ngaloo mali yayifumana ngenkohlakalo. Yawa ngesisu, sagqabhuka, zaphalala izibilini kuloo ndawo." 
Acts1:19 Le ntlekele yaduma kulo lonke elaseJerusalem; baza bayithiya igama loo ndawo, bathi yiAkeldama ngolwini lwabo, igama elithetha umhlaba wegazi.)" 
Acts1:20 “Kuba kaloku kwiNcwadi yeeNdumiso kubhalwe kwathiwa: “ ‘Mawube linxiwa umzi wakhe; makungahlali nabani kuwo.’ “Kwakhona kuthiwa: “ ‘Masithathwe ngomnye isikhundla sakhe.’ 
Acts1:21 “Ngoko ke, makubekho enye indoda ethatha indawo yakhe. Kufuneka ibe ngumntu obesoloko ekunye nathi ngalo lonke elaa xesha iNkosi yayijikeleza phakathi kwethu; umntu owayekho ukususela kanye ngelaa xesha uYohane wayebhaptiza, kude kuze kuthi gaa ngomhla wonyuko. Nguloo mntu ke onokungqina kunye nathi ngokuvuka kweNkosi yethu.”" 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Baza baphakamisa amagama amadoda amabini: uJosefu owayesaziwa ngokuba nguBharsabha, obizwa nangokuba nguYusto, kwakunye noMatiya." 
Acts1:24 Bathandaza ke benjenje: “Nkosi, wena uzaziyo iingcinga zeentliziyo zabantu bonke, sahlulele phakathi kwala madoda mabini, usibonise eyona uyinyulele" 
Acts1:25 kwisikhundla sokukukhonza *ingumthunywa, eso satyeshelwa nguJudas ukuze aye kuloo ndawo imfaneleyo.”" 
Acts1:26 Abhalwa ke la magama omabini, kwenziwa *amaqashiso, kwaphumelela elikaMatiya; waza wabalelwa ekubeni ngumthunywa kunye nabanye abalishumi elinanye." 
Acts2:1 Ekufikeni komhla *wePentekoste babehlangene ndawonye bonke. 
Acts2:2 Ngesaquphe beva isandi esingathi kukuza komoya omkhulu, uvuthuza esibhakabhakeni. Sayizalisa indlu ababehleli kuyo isandi eso." 
Acts2:3 Kwabonakala amadangatye angathi ziilwimi, laza lalelo idangatye lahlala kumntu ngamnye kubo." 
Acts2:4 Bazaliswa ke bonke nguMoya oyiNgcwele, baza bathetha ngalwimi zimbi, njengoko uMoya wabaphayo." 
Acts2:5 EJerusalem apho kwakukho amaJuda, abantu ababenenzondelelo ngezinto zikaThixo, bevela kuzo zonke izizwe zehlabathi." 
Acts2:6 Bakukuva oko kwakusenzeka, kwahlanganisana indimbane yabantu, bonke bemangalisiwe kukuva abalandeli bakaYesu bethetha iilwimi zabo." 
Acts2:7 Bethe khumnqa, bathi: “Okunene aba bantu ngamaGalili bonke!" 
Acts2:8 Ke, kutheni le nto sonke ngabanye sibeva bethetha nathi ngolwimi lweenkobe?" 
Acts2:9 Thina singamaParti, namaMedi, namaElam, nabaseMesopotami, nabakwaJuda, nabaseKapadoki; singabasePonto naseAsiya," 
Acts2:10 eFrigi nasePamfili, naseJiputa nabemimandla yaseLibhiya engaseKirene, nabahambi abavela eRoma." 
Acts2:11 SingamaJuda nabangeni buJudeni, amaKrete nama-Arabhu. Siyabeva beyithetha ngeelwimi zethu imisebenzi yamandla kaThixo.”" 
Acts2:11 SingamaJuda nabangeni buJudeni, amaKrete nama-Arabhu. Siyabeva beyithetha ngeelwimi zethu imisebenzi yamandla kaThixo.”" 
Acts2:12 Bethe nqa ke bexakiwe, babuzana bathi: “Awu! Ngaba ithetha ntoni le nto?”" 
Acts2:13 Abanye baphoxisa ngabo, bathi: “À, suka! Banxilile!”" 
Acts2:14 Waphakama uPetros, wabhekisa ebantwini, ethetha egameni labafundi abalishumi elinambini, wathi: “Mawethu, maJuda, nani nonke bemi baseJerusalem, phulaphulani nibeke iindlebe, nantsi indawo emaniyiqonde:" 
Acts2:15 La madoda akanxilanga njengoko niba kunjalo nina, kuba kusekusasa ngentlazane," 
Acts2:16 koko le nto yenzekayo yileya yaxelwa *ngumshumayeli uJoweli esithi: 
Acts2:17 “ ‘Yiyo le into endiya kuyenza ngemihla yokugqibela;’ utsho uThixo: ‘Ndiya kugalela uMoya wam kulo lonke uluntu, oonyana neentombi zenu zishumayele, abafana babone imibono, amaxhego aphuphe amaphupha." 
Acts2:18 Ewe, nezicaka nezicakazana zam ndiya kuzigalela ngoMoya wam ngaloo mihla, zize zishumayele." 
Acts2:19 Ndiya kwenza imiqondiso esibhakabhakeni phezulu, nezimanga emhlabeni phantsi. Kuya kubakho igazi nomlilo nentshinyela yomsi." 
Acts2:20 Ilanga liya kujika libe bubumnyama, inyanga ibe bomvu njengegazi, phambi kokufika kwaloo mhla mkhulu udumileyo weNkosi." 
Acts2:21 Kananjalo nabani na othe wabiza igama leNkosi uya kusindiswa.’ 
Acts2:22 “MaSirayeli, phulaphulani la mazwi: UYesu waseNazarete yindoda eyâlathwa nguThixo, yaza yabonakaliswa ngemisebenzi yamandla nemimangaliso nangemiqondiso awayenzayo uThixo ngayo. Nani ngokwenu niyayazi loo nto, kuba yenzeka phakathi kwenu apha." 
Acts2:23 Lo Yesu ke, wanikelwa kuni ngokuthanda nangokwazi kukaThixo, nambulala ngokumnikela ukuba abethelelwe emnqamlezweni ngabantu abangawukhathalelanga umthetho wethu." 
Acts2:24 UThixo ke yena wamvusa, wamkhulula kwiintlungu zokufa, kuba ukufa kwakungenawo amandla okumbophelela." 
Acts2:25 Kaloku uDavide uthi ngaye: “ ‘Ndasoloko ndiyibona iNkosi iphambi kwam ngamaxesha onke. Yintonga yam yasekhosi iNkosi, ngoko andiyi kuchukunyiswa nto." 
Acts2:26 Kungoko yagcobayo intliziyo yam, ndathetha ndinemivuyo. Ngaphezu koko ndiya kuhlala ndinethemba lokuba andiyi kufa," 
Acts2:27 kuba akuyi kuwuyeka kwelabafileyo umphefumlo wam, ungayi kusiyeka sibole isicaka sakho esikholekileyo." 
Acts2:28 Undazisile iindlela zobomi; ndaye ndiya kuzala luvuyo ngenxa yobukho bakho.’ 
Acts2:29 “Mawethu, mandithethe ngokucacileyo kuni ngokhokho wethu uDavide. Yena wafa, waza wangcwatywa; yaye nengcwaba lakhe lilapha unanamhlanje." 
Acts2:30 Njengokuba *wayengumshumayeli, wayesazi isithembiso sokuba uThixo wafunga ukuba omnye kubazukulwana bakhe uya kuba ngukumkani njengaye." 
Acts2:31 Walubona ke kwangaphambili uvuko lukaKrestu, wathetha ngalo, exela ukuba akayi kuyekwa kwelabafileyo, futhi engayi kubola." 
Acts2:32 UThixo ke wamvusa ekufeni lo Yesu; saye ke thina sonke singamangqina aloo nto. 
Acts2:33 Njengoko anyuselwe ewongeni kuThixo, wamkele uMoya oyiNgcwele, lowo wathenjiswayo nguYise. Le nto ke niyibonayo niyivayo ngoku kukugalelwa kwaloo Moya kuthi." 
Acts2:34 Kaloku uDavide akanyukelanga ezulwini yena ngokwakhe, koko uthi: “ ‘INkosi yathi eNkosini yam: Hlala ngakum kweli wonga" 
Acts2:35 lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho.’ 
Acts2:36 “Ngenxa yoko qinisekani, mzi kaSirayeli, ukuba lo Yesu enambethelela emnqamlezweni, uThixo ummisele wayiNkosi *ekwanguKrestu.”" 
Acts2:37 Yabahlabanisela kakhulu intetho kaPetros abantu, bakuba beyivile; baza bathi kuPetros *nabathunywa ababenaye: “Kufuneka senze ntoni, mawethu?”" 
Acts2:38 Wathi uPetros kubo: “Guqukani ezonweni zenu nonke ngabanye, nibhaptizwe egameni likaYesu Krestu, ukuze nixolelwe izono zenu, nize namkele isipho soMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Acts2:39 Kuba isithembiso esenziwa nguThixo senzelwa nina nabantwana benu, kwanâbo bakude, bebonke abo iNkosi uThixo wethu ibabizayo.”" 
Acts2:40 Wathetha wophela ke uPetros ebaluleka esithi: “Zahlukaniseni naba bantu bakhohlakeleyo, khon' ukuze ningehlelwa sisohlwayo sabo.”" 
Acts2:41 Abantu abaninzi balwamkela olu daba, baza babhaptizwa. Baba ngamawaka amathathu abantu abongezelelwayo enanini labo." 
Acts2:42 Babehlangana rhoqo, bedlelana ngokuphulaphula iimfundiso zabathunywa, nangokuqhekeza isonka, nangokuthandaza." 
Acts2:43 Imiqondiso nemimangaliso emininzi awayenza *ngabathunywa uThixo yatsho yabakhohla abantu. 
Acts2:44 Bonke abakholwayo bahlala bebambene, bedlelana ngezinto abanazo omnye nomnye." 
Acts2:45 Babethengisa ngempahla yabo, babelane ngemali leyo ngokweentswelo zomntu ngamnye." 
Acts2:46 Imihla ngemihla babehlangana rhoqo *endlwini kaThixo, babuye batye kunye emakhaya bechwayitile bebelezelana," 
Acts2:47 bembonga uThixo, bamkelekile kubantu bonke. Mihla le uThixo wayelongeza inani labo ngabo basindiswayo." 
Acts3:1 Ngamhla uthile uPetros noYohane baya *endlwini kaThixo ngexesha lomthandazo, ngentsimbi yesithathu emva kwemini." 
Acts3:2 Apho esangweni lendlu kaThixo ekwakusithiwa liSango eLihle, kwakukho indoda eyayisisiqhwala kwasekuzalweni kwayo. Yayidla ngokusiwa khona yonke imihla ukuze icele amalizo kwabangenayo." 
Acts3:3 Yakubona uPetros noYohane bengena, yacela ukuba bayilize." 
Acts3:4 Bayijonga, waza uPetros wathi: “Khangela apha!”" 
Acts3:5 Yajonga kubo ke ilindele into abaza kuyinika yona. 
Acts3:6 Uthe uPetros: “Imali andinayo, kodwa ndiza kukunika into endinayo – egameni likaYesu Krestu waseNazarete, ndithi kuwe: ‘Phakama, uhambe.’ ”" 
Acts3:7 Akuba etshilo, wayibamba ngesandla sokunene, wayiphakamisa. Ngoko nangoko iinyawo namaqatha ayo omelela." 
Acts3:8 Yatsho umtsi, yema ngeenyawo, yahamba-hamba. Yaza yangena nabo endlwini kaThixo, ihamba itsiba-tsiba, ibulela uThixo." 
Acts3:9 Bonke abantu ababelapho bayibona ihamba ibulela uThixo. 
Acts3:10 Baqonda ukuba ngulaa mngqibi wayedla ngokuhlala eSangweni eLihle lendlu kaThixo, bonke bathi manga yinto eyenzeke kuye." 
Acts3:11 Njengoko le ndoda yathi nca kuPetros noYohane, basuka abantu beza begxalathelana kubo bemangalisiwe evarandeni ekuthiwa yekaSolomon." 
Acts3:12 Akubabona abantu, uPetros wabhekisa kubo wathi: “MaSirayeli, kungani ukuba inimangalise le nto? Khona kutheni ukuba nisijonge ngathi wenziwe ngamandla ethu nangokwethu ukukholeka kuThixo ukuba ahambe lo mntu?" 
Acts3:13 UThixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, kaYakobi, uThixo woobawo bethu, ngesi senzo usinike iwonga isicaka sakhe uYesu. Nina namnikela namkhanyela phambi koPilato, nangona yena wayefuna ukumkhulula." 
Acts3:14 Namkhanyela umnyulwa olilungisa! Endaweni yakhe nacela uPilato ukuba anikhululele isihange. 
Acts3:15 Nayibulala imbangi yobomi; ke yena uThixo wayivusa ekufeni. Yeyona nto singqina yona ke leyo. 
Acts3:16 Kukuvuma nokuzinikela kwigama likaYesu okuyomelezileyo le ndoda niyibonayo, niyaziyo. Ligunya legama lakhe elimenze waphila njengokuba nimbona elapha phambi kwenu nje lo mntu." 
Acts3:17 “Ndiyazi ke, mawethu, ukuba nina neenkokheli zenu le nto niyenze kuYesu ngokungazi." 
Acts3:18 Loo nto ngoko uThixo wayazisayo ngabo bonke *abashumayeli, yokuba umelwe kukubandezeleka, uyizalisekisile." 
Acts3:19 Guqukani ke ngoko, nibuyele kuThixo, ukuze zicinywe izono zenu;" 
Acts3:20 nize nifumane amathuba okuhlaziyeka komoya evela eNkosini, nokuze imthumele uYesu onguKrestu oselenikwe nina." 
Acts3:21 Yena uya kuhlala ezulwini kude kufike ixesha lokuhlaziywa kwezinto zonke, njengoko uThixo wâzisáyo mandulo ngabashumayeli bakhe abanyuliweyo." 
Acts3:22 Kaloku uMosis wathi: ‘INkosi uThixo wenu iya kunithumela umshumayeli ophuma kwalapha kumawenu njengam. Maze nimphulaphule kuyo yonke into anixelela yona. 
Acts3:23 Nabani na ke ongamphulaphuliyo lo mshumayeli uya kusikwa ebantwini bakaThixo atshatyalaliswe.’ 
Acts3:24 Abashumayeli bonke ukususela kuSamweli nabo bamlandeláyo, bayixela le mihla sikuyo." 
Acts3:25 Nisisizukulwana sabashumayeli, ninenxaxheba kumnqophiso owenziwa nguThixo nooyihlo-mkhulu, xa wathi kuAbraham: ‘Ngesinqe sakho ndiya kubasikelela bonke abantu bomhlaba.’" 
Acts3:26 UThixo ke esimisele isiCaka sakhe wasithumela kuni kuqala, ukuze anenzele inceba niguquke kwinkohlakalo yenu.”" 
Acts4:1 Kwathi uPetros noYohane besathetha nabo abantu, kwafika ababingeleli nentloko yabalindi *bendlu kaThixo kunye *nabaSadusi." 
Acts4:2 Babekhathazekile kuba aba *bathunywa babefundisa abantu ngokuvuka kukaYesu ekufeni, nto leyo yayiqinisekisa ukuba abafileyo baya kuvuka." 
Acts4:3 Bababamba ke, babafaka entolongweni, ukuba balinde khona kude kube ngengomso, njengoko imini yayiselisangene." 
Acts4:4 Uninzi lwâbo bayivayo imfundiso leyo lwakholwa, laza ke landa inani labo laya kumawaka amahlanu." 
Acts4:5 Ngomhla olandelayo iinkokheli zamaJuda, nabadala, nabachazi-mthetho, bahlangana eJerusalem." 
Acts4:6 YayingooAnas umbingeleli omkhulu, noKayafa, noYohane, noAlesandire, kwanabanye bendlu yombingeleli omkhulu, ababelapho." 
Acts4:7 Babamisa phambi kwabo abathunywa, bababuza bathi: “Niyenze kanjani le nto? Gunya lini eli ninalo? Ligama likabani eli nisebenze ngalo?”" 
Acts4:8 UPetros, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wabaphendula wathi: “Ziphathamandla nani badala," 
Acts4:9 xa namhlanje nisixoxisa ngesenzo esihle sokuphiliswa komntu osisiqhwala," 
Acts4:10 nina ninamaSirayeli ewonke yazini le nto ke: Lo mntu umi apha phambi kwenu ephile qete, uphile ngenxa yegunya legama likaYesu Krestu waseNazarete. Lowo nina nambethelela emnqamlezweni; wamvusa ke yena uThixo." 
Acts4:11 Lo Yesu ngulowo zithi *iziBhalo xa zithetha ngaye: “ ‘Ilitye enalidelayo nina bakhi laba lelona litye lesiseko.’ 
Acts4:12 “Usindiso lufumaneka ngaye kuphela, kuba akukho wumbi emhlabeni ogama uThixo alinike uluntu, esingasindiswa ngalo.”" 
Acts4:13 Amalungu *eBhunga amangaliswa kukubona ukungafihlisi kukaPetros noYohane, eqonda ukuba bangabantu nje abaqhelekileyo abangenamfundo. Baphawula nokuba babengamahlakani kaYesu." 
Acts4:14 Kodwa babengenandlela yokuphikisana nabo, kuba indoda le yayiphilisiwe yayimi apho kunye noPetros noYohane." 
Acts4:15 Babakhuphela ngaphandle kwendlu leyo yeBhunga, basala bona bexoxa bodwa." 
Acts4:16 Babuzana besithi: “Singawathini la madoda? Wonke ubani apha eJerusalem uyazi ukuba lo mqondiso ungaqhelekanga wenziwe ngawo, sibe ke thina singenako ukuyiphika le nto." 
Acts4:17 Ukuze ke inganwenwi le nto phakathi kwabantu, masibalumkise bangaze bathethe nakubani ngegama likaYesu.”" 
Acts4:18 Babangenisa kwakhona, baza babayala ukuba ze bangaphindi bathethe okanye bafundise ngegama likaYesu." 
Acts4:19 UPetros noYohane bona baphendula bathi: “Zahluleleni nina ngokwenu ukuba kulunge kuphi na phambi koThixo; kukho ukwenza intando yenu, kukho nokwenza intando kaThixo." 
Acts4:20 Thina asinakuyeka ukuthetha ngento esiyibone sayiva ngokwethu.” 
Acts4:21 IBhunga labatyityimbisela umnwe, laza labakhulula. Alibanga nakroba lakubohlwaya, ngenxa yokoyika abantu, kuba babedumisa uThixo ngesi senzo." 
Acts4:22 Kaloku le ndoda yaphiliswa ngalo mmangaliso yayingaphezu kwamashumi amane eminyaka ubudala. 
Acts4:23 Bakuba bekhululwe uPetros noYohane babuyela kubahlobo babo, bababalisela okwathethwa kubo ngababingeleli abaziintloko bekunye nabadala." 
Acts4:24 Bevile ke, bonke bathandaza ngamxhelo mnye, besithi: “Nkosi, Mdali wezulu nomhlaba nolwandle nazo zonke izinto ezilapho," 
Acts4:25 uDavide, isicaka sakho, ukhokho wethu, eqhutywa nguMoya oyiNgcwele wathi: “ ‘Kungani na iintlanga zisenza imbudumbudu nje? Kungani na ukuba abantu benze amayelenqe azé nje?" 
Acts4:26 Iikumkani neziphathamandla zelizwe zahlangana, zavukela iNkosi *noKrestu wayo!’" 
Acts4:27 “Kuba ngenene uHerode noPilato bahlangana kwesi sixeko kunye neentlanga, namaSirayeli, ngaye uYesu isiCaka sakho osinyulileyo, uMthanjiswa wakho." 
Acts4:28 Bahlangana ukuze bakwenze konke owawuselukumisele ngegunya nentando yakho ukuba kuya kwenzeka. 
Acts4:29 Kalokunje, Nkosi, zigqale izoyikiso zabo; thina zicaka zakho usenze siluthethe udaba lwakho ngesibindi." 
Acts4:30 Philisa ngesandla sakho, unike amandla okuba imimangaliso nemiqondiso yenzeke ngegunya legama lesiCaka sakho osinyulileyo uYesu.”" 
Acts4:31 Bakuba begqibile ukuthandaza, indawo ababehlangene kuyo yazanya-zanyiswa. Bonke bazaliswa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, baza baluthetha udaba lukaThixo benobuganga." 
Acts4:32 Ewonke amakholwa ayevana entliziyo-nye. Akukho bani wayekubanga oko anako, kuba babesabelana ngezinto zonke abanazo." 
Acts4:33 *Abathunywa babezingisa ukungqina ngovuko lweNkosi uYesu, waza uThixo wabasikelela xa bebonke." 
Acts4:34 Kwakungekho bani usweleyo phakathi kwabo. Ababenemihlaba nezindlu babethengisa ngazo, baze imali leyo bayifumeneyo" 
Acts4:35 beze nayo, bayinike abathunywa, ize yabelwe ulowo nalowo ngokweentswelo zakhe." 
Acts4:36 UJosefu, *umLevi onkaba iseSipro, owathiywa ngabathunywa bathi nguBarnabha, uMthuthuzeli," 
Acts4:37 wathengisa umhlaba wakhe, waza wayizisa imali leyo kubathunywa." 
Acts5:1 Ke kaloku kwakukho nendoda egama linguHananiya, umfazi wayo yena enguSafira. Bathengisa umhlaba wabo," 
Acts5:2 baza inxalenye yemali leyo bayifumeneyo bayigcina, eseleyo ke bayizisa *kubathunywa." 
Acts5:3 UPetros wabuza wathi: “Hananiya, kutheni ukuba umyeke uSathana alawule intliziyo yakho, akwenze uxokise uMoya oyiNgcwele ngokugcina inxalenye yemali oyifumeneyo ngomhlaba wakho?" 
Acts5:4 Umhlaba wakho ubungowakho phambi kokuba uwuthengise, nemali yawo ibiyeyakho emveni kokuba uwuthengisile. Kungani ke ukuba ufike kwisigqibo sokwenza into enje? Awuxokisanga mntu, uxokise uThixo.”" 
Acts5:5 Akuweva loo mazwi uHananiya wawa phantsi, wafa; baza bonke abayivayo loo nto bankwantya luloyiko." 
Acts5:6 Bafika abafana, bawuthatha bawuthandela umzimba wakhe, baya kumngcwaba." 
Acts5:7 Emva kweeyure ezintathu, yafika inkosikazi kaHananiya ingekayiva loo nto ihlileyo." 
Acts5:8 Wabhekisa kuyo uPetros esithi: “Khawutsho, ingaba le yimali epheleleyo eniyizuze ngokuthengisa umhlaba wenu nomyeni wakho?” Yaphendula yathi: “Ewe, iphelele.”" 
Acts5:9 Wayibuza wathi uPetros: “Kungani ukuba wena nendoda yakho nidibane ngokuvavanya uMoya weNkosi? Uyabona ke, abafana abavela kungcwaba indoda yakho nâbo emnyango, nawe lo baza kukuthatha bemke nawe.”" 
Acts5:10 Ngoko nangoko uSafira wawa ezinyaweni zakhe, wafa. Bangena abafana, bambona ukuba ufile, bamthatha baya kumngcwaba ecaleni komyeni wakhe." 
Acts5:11 Xa lilonke ibandla nabo bonke abayivayo le nto bazaliswa kukunkwantya. 
Acts5:12 *Abathunywa benza imiqondiso nemimangaliso emininzi ebantwini. Bonke abakholwayo babehlangana eVarandeni kaSolomon. 
Acts5:13 Abangakholwayo babengazibandakanyi nabo, nakuba kwakuthethwa kakuhle ngabo." 
Acts5:14 Kuyo yonke loo nto kwabakho ihlokondiba lamadoda namakhosikazi azinikelayo eNkosini, laza longezeka inani labo." 
Acts5:15 Baza abagulayo basiwa ezitalatweni, balaliswa ezibhedini nasemakhukweni, ukuze kuthi xa agqithayo uPetros isithunzi sakhe siwe phezu kwabanye." 
Acts5:16 Izihlwele zabantu zazisiza, zivela kwiidolophu ezimelene neJerusalem, zizisa abagulayo nâbo babeneendimoni, baze baphile bonke." 
Acts5:17 Umbingeleli omkhulu nabalingane bakhe, abo beqela *labaSadusi, babamonela *abathunywa," 
Acts5:18 baza bababamba babafaka entolongweni. 
Acts5:19 Kwangobo busuku isithunywa seNkosi sawavula amasango entolongo, sabakhokelela phandle abathunywa, sathi kubo:" 
Acts5:20 “Hambani niye *endlwini kaThixo, nibafundise yonke into abantu ngale ntlalo intsha.”" 
Acts5:21 Bevile ke abathunywa, bathi kwasekuseni bangena endlwini kaThixo, bafundisa. Umbingeleli omkhulu nabalingane bakhe nabo bonke abadala bamaJuda, babiza intlanganiso epheleleyo *yeBhunga, baza bathumela entolongweni ukuba abathunywa beziswe phambi kwabo." 
Acts5:22 Zifikile izigidimi azibafumananga abathunywa entolongweni; zabuya ke zeza kuxela entlanganisweni, zathi:" 
Acts5:23 “Intolongo siyifumene ivalwe ngokuqinileyo, nabalindi bewagcinile amasango, kodwa sakuwavula amasango, asifumananga mntu ngaphakathi.”" 
Acts5:24 Kwathi intloko yabalindi bendlu kaThixo nababingeleli abaziintloko bakuyiva le nto, baxakwa ukuba ngaba kuhle ntoni na kubathunywa." 
Acts5:25 Kwafika ndoda ithile eyathi kubo: “Khangelani, amadoda ebeniwafake entolongweni nangaya efundisa abantu endlwini kaThixo!”"
