Acts5:26 Yasuka ke intloko yabalindi yahamba nabaphantsi kwayo, babaphuthuma abathunywa. Babaphatha kakuhle abathunywa, kuba besoyika hleze baxulutywe ngamatye ngabantu." 
Acts5:27 Babazisa phambi kweBhunga abathunywa, waza umbingeleli omkhulu wabamangalela esithi:" 
Acts5:28 “Saninika imiyalelo engqongqo yokuba ningaphindi nifundise egameni lale ndoda; kodwa khanikhangele into eniyenzileyo! Imfundiso yenu niyisarhaze kule Jerusalem iphela; ngoku nifuna ukuxhoma ukufa kwayo phezu kwethu.” 
Acts5:29 OoPetros baphendula bathi: “Asinakwenza nto yimbi; sifanele ukuthobela uThixo endaweni yabantu! 
Acts5:30 UThixo woobawo bethu wamvusa uYesu ekufeni, ekubeni nina nambulalayo ngokumxhoma emnqamlezweni." 
Acts5:31 UThixo wammisela ewongeni, wayiNkokheli noMsindisi wokunika amaSirayeli ithuba lokuguquka, aze axolelwe izono zawo." 
Acts5:32 Thina noMoya oyiNgcwele osisipho sikaThixo kwabo bamthobelayo, singamangqina azo ezi zinto.”" 
Acts5:33 Akuweva la mazwi amalungu eBhunga avutha ngumsindo kangangokuba afuna ukuba babulawe abathunywa. 
Acts5:34 Kodwa omnye wabo, *owayengumFarasi ogama linguGamaliyeli, owayengumchazi-mthetho ohloniphekileyo kubantu bonke, waphakama wayalela ukuba abathunywa khe bakhutshelwe phandle." 
Acts5:35 Wabhekisa eBhungeni esithi: “MaSirayeli, yilumkeleni into eniyenzayo kula madoda." 
Acts5:36 Ngaphambi koku kukhe kwavela uTuda ezenza uthile obalulekileyo, waza walandelwa ngamadoda akwisithuba samakhulu amane. Kodwa wafa, abalandeli bakhe bathi saa, waza naloo mbutho wakhe wafa." 
Acts5:37 Emva koko kwavela uJuda umGalili, ngexesha lobalo, naye walandelwa ngabantu abaninzi, kodwa naye wafa, nabalandeli bakhe basarhaka." 
Acts5:38 Ngokunjalo nakwesi isihlandlo musani ukuthatha manyathelo ngakula madoda. Wayekeni, kuba ukuba lo msebenzi wawo yinto nje yabantu uza kuphelela esithubeni;" 
Acts5:39 ukanti ukuba yinto evela kuThixo, aninako ukuwutshabalalisa. Endaweni yaloo nto ningazibhaqa nisilwa noThixo.” IBhunga lalandela icebo likaGamaliyeli." 
Acts5:40 Baza ke bababiza abathunywa, babayala ukuba bangaze baphinde bathethe ngegama likaYesu. Emva koko ke bakatswa abathunywa, baza bakhululwa." 
Acts5:41 Abathunywa balishiya iBhunga elo benemincili, kuba uThixo ebafumanise befanelekile ukuba bahlazeke ngenxa yegama likaYesu." 
Acts5:42 Bazingisa ke imihla yonke, endlwini kaThixo nasemakhayeni, ukufundisa nokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi ezingoYesu onguKrestu." 
Acts6:1 Kwathi kwakubon' ukuba liyanda inani labalandeli bakaYesu, kwavela ukungevisisani phakathi kwamaJuda athetha isiGrike kwanamaJuda athetha olweenkobe. AmaJuda athetha isiGrike akhalazela ukuba abahlolokazi bawo àbamkeliswa kakuhle kwimali yenkxaso yemihla ngemihla." 
Acts6:2 *Abathunywa abalishumi elinambini balihlanganisa ibandla lilonke, bathi kulo: “Asinto intle kuthi ukuba sikuyekelele ukushumayela ilizwi likaThixo ngenxa yokuzixakekisa ngomsebenzi wokwabela abasweleyo." 
Acts6:3 Ngoko ke, mawethu, khethani amadoda abe sixhenxe phakathi kwenu, awaziwa ngokuzaliswa nguMoya oyiNgcwele nangobulumko; thina ke siwamisele kulo msebenzi." 
Acts6:4 Ngalinye ke, thina siya kuzinikela ngokupheleleyo kumsebenzi wokushumayela nasemithandazweni.”" 
Acts6:5 Isiphakamiso sabathunywa samkeleka kubo bonke; baza ke banyula aba: uStefano, indoda ezele lukholo nanguMoya oyiNgcwele, noFilipu, noProkuro, noNikano, noTimon, noParmena, kwakunye noNikolawo waseAntiyokwe owayengumngeni-buJudeni." 
Acts6:5 Isiphakamiso sabathunywa samkeleka kubo bonke; baza ke banyula aba: uStefano, indoda ezele lukholo nanguMoya oyiNgcwele, noFilipu, noProkuro, noNikano, noTimon, noParmena, kwakunye noNikolawo waseAntiyokwe owayengumngeni-buJudeni." 
Acts6:6 Aba ke banikelwa kubathunywa, baza bona babamisela ngokubathandazela nokubabeka izandla." 
Acts6:7 Laya lisanda ke ilizwi likaThixo, laza ke nenani labalandeli bakaYesu lakhula kakhulu eJerusalem, kwabakho neqela lababingeleli elazinikelayo eNkosini." 
Acts6:8 UStefano, indoda eyayisikelelwe nguThixo, izele ngamandla, wênza imiqondiso nemimangaliso phakathi kwabantu." 
Acts6:9 Aza amadoda athile amchasa. Wona ayedla ngokuhlangana *endlwini yesikhungo ekuthiwa yeyamakhoboka akhululekileyo. AyengamaJuda avela eKirene naseAlesandriya. Wona namaJuda aseKiliki nawaseAsiya axambulisana noStefano. 
Acts6:10 Kodwa uMoya wamnika ubulumko uStefano, ngokokude bangabi nako ukuphikisana naye." 
Acts6:11 Baza ke bafunza amadoda athile, khon' ukuze athi: “Thina simve ethetha kakubi ngoMosis nangoThixo.”" 
Acts6:12 Ngale ndlela bamenza wavukelwa ngabantu, nangabadala, nangabachazi-mthetho. Bamqubula uStefano, bamthatha bamsa entlanganisweni *yeBhunga." 
Acts6:13 Bezisa namanye amadoda athetha ubuxoki ngaye, athi: “Le ndoda isoloko ithetha ngokuchaseneyo *nendlu kaThixo *nangomthetho kaMosis." 
Acts6:14 Kuba samva esithi lo Yesu waseNazarete uya kuyitshabalalisa indlu kaThixo, awatshintshe namasiko esawafumana kuMosis.”" 
Acts6:15 Bonke abo babehleli entlanganisweni bamthi ntsho ngamehlo uStefano, baza babubona ubuso bakhe bunjengobesithunywa sezulu." 
Acts7:1 Umbingeleli omkhulu wabhekisa kuStefano wathi: “Khanyela watyholwa!” 
Acts7:2 Waza uStefano wathetha nentlanganiso wenjenje: “Mawethu nani bobawo, khanindiphulaphule. UThixo, eyona ngangalala, wabonakala kukhokho wethu uAbraham ngexesha awayehlala eMesopotami, ngaphambi kokuba aye kuhlala eHaran," 
Acts7:3 wathi kuye: ‘Suka, umke apha, uzishiye izizalwana zakho, kunye nelizwe lakowenu, uye kumhlaba endiya kukubonisa wona.’" 
Acts7:4 Waza ke ngoko wawushiya umhlaba wamaKaledi, waya kuhlala eHaran. Emveni kokufa kukayise, uThixo wathi uAbraham makafudukele kweli lizwe nikulo nani ngoku." 
Acts7:5 Ngelo xesha uThixo akamnikanga nendawana le uAbraham kulo mhlaba, ukuba ayime: hayi, nditsho nomhlathana lo womhlaba! Kodwa kananjalo uThixo wamthembisa uAbraham ukuba uya kumnika loo mhlaba, awume yena nezizukulwana zakhe emva kwakhe. Ukusenza kwakhe uThixo esi sithembiso uAbraham wayengekazali mntwana." 
Acts7:6 UThixo wathetha ngolu hlobo kuye: ‘Isizukulwana sakho siya kufuduka, siye kuhlala elizweni lasemzini, apho siya kuba ngamakhoboka, sibandezeleke iminyaka engamakhulu amane." 
Acts7:7 Kodwa mna ndiya kubagweba abo bantu siphantsi kwabo; kuze kuthi emva kwelo thuba, babuye kwelo lizwe, beze kundikhonza kule ndawo.’" 
Acts7:8 Waza uThixo wamnika ulwaluko uAbraham ukutywina loo mnqophiso. UAbraham ke wamolùsa uIsake ngosuku lwesibhozo ezelwe, waza ngokukwanjalo uIsake wamolùsa uYakobi, noYakobi wenza kwaloo nto kookhokho abalishumi elinambini." 
Acts7:9 “Oobawo bammonela uJosefu, bamthengisa waba likhoboka eJiputa. Kodwa uThixo waba naye," 
Acts7:10 wamweza kuzo zonke iinkxwaleko awaba kuzo. Akusiwa phambi kokumkani waseJiputa, uThixo wamenza wathandeka uJosefu, wampha nobulumko. Ukumkani wammisela uJosefu wayirhuluneli yelaseJiputa nekomkhulu lakhe." 
Acts7:11 Kwabakho indlala enkulu kulo lonke elaseJiputa nelaseKanana, ababi nakufumana nokutya oku ookhokho, ikati ilele eziko." 
Acts7:12 Akuva uYakobi ukuba eJiputa kukho ukudla, wabathumela okokuqala oonyana bakhe; ngookhokho kuthi ke abo." 
Acts7:13 Kutyelelo lwabo lwesibini uJosefu wazazisa kubantakwabo, waza wamxelela ukumkani ngamawabo lawo." 
Acts7:14 UJosefu wamema uyise uYakobi ukuba aye kuhlala eJiputa nomzi wakhe wonke. Babengamashumi asixhenxe anesihlanu bebonke. 
Acts7:15 Wehla ke uYakobi, waya eJiputa, apho yena nookhokho bethu bafela khona." 
Acts7:16 Imizimba yabo yasiwa eShekem, apho yangcwatywa kwingcwaba elathengwa nguAbraham koonyana bakaHamori." 
Acts7:17 “Ekusondeleni kwexesha lokuba uThixo asizalisekise isithembiso awasenza kuAbraham, abantu bakuthi ababeseJiputa babesebande kakhulu." 
Acts7:18 Ekuhambeni kwethuba kwavela kumkani wumbi, owayengamazi uJosefu, wangumlawuli weJiputa." 
Acts7:19 Wabenzela ubutshijolo abantu bakowethu, wabakhohlakalela ookhokho bethu, ebanyanzela ukuba babalahle abantwana babo, ukuze babe sesichengeni sokufa." 
Acts7:20 Wazalwa ngeli xesha ke uMosis engumntwana omhle kakhulu. Wakhuliselwa ekhayeni lakhe iinyanga ezintathu; 
Acts7:21 waza wathi naye akulahlwa, wacholwa yintombi yokumkani waseJiputa, yazikhulisela yena." 
Acts7:22 Wabufunda bonke ubulumko bamaJiputa, waza waba yingcaphephe ekuthetheni nasekwenzeni." 
Acts7:23 “Akuba neminyaka engamashumi amane uMosis, watyelela amawabo amaSirayeli." 
Acts7:24 Wabona uwabo edlakathiswa ngumJiputa, waza wamnceda, waphindezela ngokumbulala umJiputa lowo." 
Acts7:25 Wayecinga ukuba amawabo oqonda ukuba uThixo ufuna ukusebenzisa yena ekuwakhululeni, kodwa akazange aqonde." 
Acts7:26 Ngenye imini wagagana namaSirayeli amabini esilwa, waza wazama ukuwohlula, esithi kuwo: ‘Khangelani, madoda, niyazalana; kungani ukuba nilwe ke?’" 
Acts7:27 Kodwa lo wayevuyelela omnye, watyhalela uMosis bucala, wabuza wathi: ‘Ngubani okwenze induna nomgwebi phezu kwethu?" 
Acts7:28 Nam ufuna ukundibulala njengalaa mJiputa umbuleleyo izolo?’ 
Acts7:29 Akuyiva le ntetho uMosis, wabaleka, waya kuhlala kumhlaba waseMidiyan. Apho wazala oonyana ababini." 
Acts7:30 “Emva kwamashumi amane eminyaka, kwabonakala isithunywa seNkosi kuMosis sisemalangatyeni etyholo elivuthayo entlango ngakwintaba yeSinayi." 
Acts7:31 Lo mbono wammangalisa uMosis, wasondela etyholweni apho ukuba aliqwalasele. Suka weva ilizwi leNkosi lisithi:" 
Acts7:32 ‘Mna ndinguThixo wookhokho bakho, uThixo ka-Abraham, kaIsake, noYakobi.’ UMosis wankwantya kukoyika, akabi saba nako ukulikhangela." 
Acts7:33 INkosi yathi kuye: ‘Khulula iimbadada ezo, kuba indawo le umi kuyo ingcwele." 
Acts7:34 Ndiyibonile ingcinezelo nentlupheko yabantu bam eJiputa; ndisivile isikhalo sabo; ke ngoku ndize kubahlangula. Yiza ke, ndikuthume eJiputa.’" 
Acts7:35 “Lo ngulaa Mosis ambukulayo amaSirayeli esithi: ‘Ngubani okwenze induna nomgwebi phezu kwethu?’ Kanti ke lo Mosis unguyena mntu uThixo amthume ukuba abe ngumlawuli nomsindisi, esebenzisa isithunywa sezulu eso uMosis wasibona etyholweni elivuthayo." 
Acts7:36 Wabakhokela ke abantu ukuphuma eJiputa, wenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, eJiputa nakuLwandle oluBomvu, kananjalo nasentlango, iminyaka emashumi mane." 
Acts7:37 Nguloo Mosis wathi kumaSirayeli: ‘UThixo uya kunithumela *umshumayeli ophuma kwalapha kumawenu njengam.’ 
Acts7:38 Nguye lowa wayekunye nebandla likaSirayeli entlango. Wayekhona apho nookhokho bethu, ekwakunye nesithunywa sezulu esasithetha naye entabeni yeSinayi. Wamkela kuThixo imiyalelo ephilileyo ukuba ayidlulisele kuthi." 
Acts7:39 “Kananjalo ookhokho bethu bala ukumthobela, bambukula, besithi kubhetele baphindele kwaseJiputa." 
Acts7:40 Kungoko bathi kuAron: ‘Senzele *oothixo bokusikhokela, kuba asiyazi into emngeneyo laa Mosis wasikhupha eJiputa.’" 
Acts7:41 Kungeli thuba ke apho baziqingqela umfanekiso wethole, baza balenzela umbingelelo, benza netheko lokuzivuyisa ngenxa yaloo nto yayenziwe zizandla zabo." 
Acts7:42 Ngenxa yaloo nto uThixo wabafulathela, wabayeka ukuba banqule iinkwenkwezi zezulu, njengoko kubhaliweyo encwadini *yabashumayeli kwathiwa: “ ‘MaSirayeli, yayingendim enanimxhelela, nimenzela amadini, iminyaka emashumi mane entlango." 
Acts7:43 *Yayisisibingelo *sesithixo *uMoleki enanisiphethe, nomfanekiso wenkwenkwezi yesithixo *uRefani. Zizithixo enazenzayo, khon' ukuze nizinqule. Ngoku ke ndiya kunigxothela ngaphaya kweBhabheli.’" 
Acts7:44 “Ookhokho bethu bona babenaso entlango *isibingelelo esingqina ubukho bukaThixo. Sasakhiwe ngokomfanekiselo lowo uThixo wawubonisa uMosis. 
Acts7:45 Emva koko ookhokho bethu abasamkelayo isibingelelo kooyise, bahamba naso, kwada kwaza kuthi gaa ngexesha likaYoshuwa, xeshikweni bawuthathayo umhlaba wezizwe abazigxothelwa nguThixo. Sahlala ke isibingelelo eso kwada kwayimihla kaDavide." 
Acts7:46 Yena wathandeka kuThixo, waza wacela ukuba uThixo amvumele akhele inzala kaYakobi indlu yokunqula." 
Acts7:47 Kodwa yona indlu leyo yakhiwa nguSolomon. 
Acts7:48 “Phofu yena uThixo uPhezukonke akahlali zindlwini zakhiwe ngabantu; njengoko atshoyo umshumayeli: 
Acts7:49 “ ‘Izulu likomkhulu lam,’ itsho iNkosi: ‘Umhlaba wona ngamathânga am. Ndluni eningaze nindakhele yona? Iphi yona indawo endingaphumla kuyo?" 
Acts7:50 Ezi zinto azenziwanga ndim zonke na?’ 
Acts7:51 “Bantundini baneenkani, abantliziyo ziqaqadekileyo, hayi ubuthulu benu emyalelweni kaThixo! Nifuz' ooyihlo! Nani nasoloko nimgiba uMoya oyiNgcwele!" 
Acts7:52 Nguwuphi umshumayeli abangamtshutshisanga ooyihlo? Bazibulala izigidimi zikaThixo, ezathi kwangaphambili zakuvakalisa ukuza kwalowo uliLungisa. Kungokunje nimngcatshile namgebenga." 
Acts7:53 Umthetho kaThixo owaziswa zizithunywa zezulu, wamkelwa nini kanye – kodwa anikawuthobeli unangoku!”" 
Acts7:54 Athi amalungu *eBhunga akuziva ezi zinto zithethwa nguStefano, acaphuka kangangokuba ade abe ngathi osuka amthi qwenge-qwenge." 
Acts7:55 Kodwa uStefano yena ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wakhangela ezulwini, waza wabubona ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo, noYesu emi ewongeni ngakuThixo." 
Acts7:56 Waqhuba wathi: “Khawukhangele! Amazulu ndiwabona evulekile, *noNyana woLuntu emile ngasekunene kukaThixo!”" 
Acts7:57 Kwesi sithuba basuka bazivingca iindlebe zabo, bahlahlamba kwathi nkxwe, baza basuka indulumbane phezu kwakhe." 
Acts7:58 Bamkhuphela ngaphandle kwedolophu, bamxuluba ngamatye. Abamangaleli bakaStefano bazigcinisa iimpahla zabo kumfana ogama linguSawule." 
Acts7:59 Bemxuluba njalo ngamatye, uStefano yena wakhala eNkosini esithi: “Nkosi Yesu, wamkele umoya wam!”" 
Acts7:60 Waguqa ngamadolo, wadanduluka wathi: “Nkosi, musa ukubabeka tyala ngesi sono!” Akukhov' ukutsho, wafa ke." 
Acts8:1 Naye uSawule wabuthakazelela obu bugebenga. Kwangaloo mhla kwaqaleka intshutshiso enkulu ebandleni laseJerusalem. Ngaphandle *kwabathunywa, basarhazeka bonke abakholwayo, kuwo onke amaphondo elakwaJuda naseSamariya." 
Acts8:2 Amadoda athile anenzondelelo amngcwaba uStefano enesingqala esikhulu. 
Acts8:3 Kwangelo lixa uSawule yena wazama ukulitshabalalisa ibandla, engena kwiminyango ngeminyango, ebarhuqa abakholwayo, amadoda kwanabafazi, ebavalela entolongweni." 
Acts8:4 Abakholwayo ababethe saa, bahamba bezishumayela iindaba ezimnandi kulo lonke." 
Acts8:5 UFilipu yena waya kwidolophana yaseSamariya, wamshumayela uKrestu kubantu ababelapho," 
Acts8:6 baza bamphulaphula ngomdla omkhulu bemxhelo mnye. Bathi bemphulaphula, baba beyibona nemiqondiso awayeyenza." 
Acts8:7 Iindimoni zazikhutshwa ebantwini, zisitsho ngesikhalo esikhulu. Abafe umzimba neziqhwala babephiliswa." 
Acts8:8 Ezi zinto zatsho abantu baloo dolophu banovuyo olukhulu. 
Acts8:9 Kuloo dolophu kwakukho indoda egama linguSimon, owayesenethuba elide esenza izimanga phakathi kwamaSamariya ngemilingo yakhe. Wayezenza uthile obalulekileyo." 
Acts8:10 Zaye iindidi zonke zabantu kuloo dolophu zimhlonela. Babesithi unamandla obuthixo, bembiza ngokuthi nguMandla-makhulu." 
Acts8:11 Babemhlonele kuba wayesebamangalise ixesha elide ngemilingo yakhe. 
Acts8:12 Kodwa bathi bakukholwa yintshumayelo kaFilipu yeendaba ezimnandi ezingolawulo lukaThixo oluthwasileyo negama likaYesu Krestu, kwabhaptizwa amadoda kwanamakhosikazi." 
Acts8:13 NoSimon wakholwa, waza akuba ebhaptiziwe akahlukana noFilipu, ekhwankqiswa yimimangaliso nemiqondiso awayeyenza uFilipu." 
Acts8:14 Bathi bakuva *abathunywa eJerusalem ukuba abantu baseSamariya balamkele ilizwi likaThixo, bathumela uPetros noYohane khona." 
Acts8:15 Bakufika khona babathandazela abakholwayo ukuba bamkele uMoya oyiNgcwele," 
Acts8:16 kuba wayengekabafikeli uMoya oyiNgcwele; nto nje babebhaptizelwe egameni leNkosi uYesu. 
Acts8:17 Aba bantu bamamkela uMoya oyiNgcwele, bakuba ooPetros noYohane bebabeke izandla." 
Acts8:18 USimon akubona ukuba bamkele uMoya oyiNgcwele, bakubekwa izandla ngabathunywa, wafuna ukubanika imali ooPetros noYohane," 
Acts8:19 esithi: “Nam ndipheni la mandla; khon' ukuze nabani na endimbeke izandla afumane uMoya oyiNgcwele.” 
Acts8:20 Waphendula wathi uPetros: “Hamb' uye kufa kunye naloo mali yakho, kuba ucinga ukuba isipho sesisa sikaThixo singathengwa ngemali!" 
Acts8:21 Akunanxaxheba kulo msebenzi wethu, kuba iingcinga zakho azilunganga phambi koThixo." 
Acts8:22 Guquka kule nkohlakalo yakho, uthandaze ukuba uThixo akuxolele ngale nto inje," 
Acts8:23 kuba ndiyabona ukuba unekratshi elilizothe, waye ulikhoboka lokungcola.”" 
Acts8:24 Uthe ke uSimon kooPetros noYohane: “Ndincedeni, zinkosi, nindithandazele eNkosini ukuze zingandihleli zonke ezi zinto nizithethileyo.”" 
Acts8:25 Emveni kokuba benike ubungqina beluthetha udaba lweNkosi kwabo bantu, uPetros noYohane bagoduka, baya eJerusalem. Endleleni yabo egodukayo bazishumayela iindaba ezimnandi kwiilali ezininzi zaseSamariya." 
Acts8:26 Ke kaloku kwathetha isithunywa seNkosi noFilipu, sathi: “Zilungiselele uhle ngendlela esentlango esuka eJerusalem iye eGaza.”" 
Acts8:27 Waxhabasha ke waya uFilipu. Endleleni apho wadibana nendoda elithenwa. Lo mfo wayengunondyebo wokumkanikazi uKhandase waseTopiya. Wayegoduka ngenqwelo, evela kunqula uThixo eJerusalem. Enqwelweni apho wayehamba efunda incwadi *yomshumayeli uIsaya." 
Acts8:28  
Acts8:29 Wathi uMoya oyiNgcwele kuFilipu: “Yiya kulaa nqwelo, uhambe nayo.”" 
Acts8:30 UFilipu wakhawuleza waya kuyo, waza wamva unondyebo lowo efunda encwadini yomshumayeli uIsaya, wambuza wathi: “Uyayilandela na le nto uyifundayo?”" 
Acts8:31 Waphendula wathi: “Ndingathini ukuyilandela kungekho bani undichazelayo?” Watsho wacela uFilipu ukuba akhwele enqwelweni ahambe naye. 
Acts8:32 Nasi isicatshulwa seziBhalo awayesifunda: “Wafana negusha eya kuxhelwa, wafana netakane elithe cwaka lichetywa, naye wathula wathi tu." 
Acts8:33 Ekuthotyweni kwakhe akabanga namhlanguli; akukho bani uya kuchaza ngesizukulwana sakhe, kuba ubomi bakhe emhlabeni bunqanyulwe.”" 
Acts8:34 Unondyebo wabuza kuFilipu wathi: “Khawundixelele, uthetha ngabani apha umshumayeli? Ngaba uthetha yena siqu, okanye uthetha ngomnye umntu?”" 
Acts8:35 UFilipu wamchazela, eqalela kanye kule ndawo eziBhalweni, wamtyhilela iindaba ezimnandi ezingoYesu." 
Acts8:36 Ekuhambeni kwabo bada bafika ndaweni ithile inamanzi, laza lathi ithenwa: “Nanga amanzi, kungani ukuba ndingàbhaptizwa?” [" 
Acts8:37 Waphendula wathi uFilipu: “Ungábhaptizwa ukuba uyakholwa ngentliziyo yakho yonke.” Lathi ke lona: “Ndiyakholwa ukuba uYesu Krestu nguNyana kaThixo.”] 
Acts8:38 UmTopiya lowo wathi makumiswe, waza yena noFilipu bangena emanzini, uFilipu wambhaptiza." 
Acts8:39 Bakuphuma emanzini apho, uMoya weNkosi wamthatha wemka naye uFilipu. UmTopiya lowo akabanga sambona uFilipu, kodwa wayihamba indlela yakhe leyo ezele luvuyo." 
Acts8:40 UFilipu wazifumana eseAshdode, waza wazihamba zonke ezo dolophu eshumayela iindaba ezimnandi, wada waya kufika eKhesariya." 
Acts9:1 Ngalo lonke eli thuba uSawule yena wayefutha izisongelo zokwenzakalisa abalandeli beNkosi. Waya kumbingeleli omkhulu, wacela ukuba amnike iincwadi zeziqinisekiso," 
Acts9:2 ukuze aye *ezindlwini zesikhungo zamaJuda eDamasko, abe nako ukuthi xa ebafumana abalandeli bale Ndlela yeNkosi, abakhonkxe, amadoda kunye nabafazi, eze nabo eJerusalem." 
Acts9:3 Endleleni yakhe eya eDamasko, xa asondelayo apho edolophini, ngequbuliso wabona ukukhanya esibhakabhakeni, okwasuka kwambanekela ngeenxa zonke." 
Acts9:4 Watsho wawa phantsi, waza weva ilizwi limbiza lisithi kuye: “Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshiselani na?”" 
Acts9:5 Yena wabuza wathi: “Wena ungubani, Nkosi?” Ilizwi elo laphendula lathi: “Mna ndinguYesu, lowo umtshutshisayo wena." 
Acts9:6 Phakama, uhambe ungene apha edolophini; uya kuyixelelwa khona into omawuyenze.”" 
Acts9:7 Ngeli xesha amadoda awayehamba noSawule ayemile, ethe cwaka, eliva lona ilizwi elo lalithetha, kodwa engaboni mntu." 
Acts9:8 USawule waphakama, wakhangela ngamehlo, kodwa akabi nako ukubona nento le. Ngoko ke abo babehamba naye bamrhola ngesandla, bangena naye eDamasko." 
Acts9:9 Waba ntsuku-ntathu eyimfama, engatyi, engaseli." 
Acts9:10 EDamasko apho kwakukho umlandeli kaYesu ogama linguHananiya. INkosi yathetha naye embonweni, yambiza yathi: “Hananiya!” Yena wasabela wathi: “Ndilapha, Nkosi.”" 
Acts9:11 Yathi iNkosi kuye: “Khawuleza, uye esitalatweni ekuthiwa sesithe ngqo, uze ufune indlu kaJuda, apho kuyo ukhangele indoda yaseTarso egama linguSawule. Iyathandaza khona," 
Acts9:12 futhi embonweni wayo ibone indoda egama linguHananiya, ingena ibeka izandla phezu kwayo, ukuze iphinde ibe nokubona.”" 
Acts9:13 Waphendula wathi uHananiya: “Nkosi, baninzi abantu abandixeleleyo ngale ndoda, nangezinto ezilumezayo ezenzileyo ebantwini bakho eJerusalem." 
Acts9:14 Nangoku ilapha eDamasko nje, inamagunya ewathathe kubabingeleli abaziintloko, ukuze ikhonkxe bonke abakunqulayo.”" 
Acts9:15 Yaza yathi iNkosi kuye: “Hamba uye kuyo, kuba mna ndiyikhethile ukuba indisebenzele, yazise igama lam kwiintlanga nakookumkani nakulo usapho lukaSirayeli." 
Acts9:16 Ndaye mna ngokwam ndiya kuyibonisa ubunzima efanele ukubuva ngenxa yam.” 
Acts9:17 Wahamba ke uHananiya, wangena endlwini leyo ebeyixelelwe, wambeka izandla uSawule, esithi: “Sawule, mfondini, iNkosi indithumile, uYesu ngokwakhe, lo umbonileyo endleleni, xa ubusiza apha. Indithumele ukuze wena uphinde ufumane ukubona, uzaliswe nanguMoya oyiNgcwele.”" 
Acts9:18 Ngoko nangoko kwaba ngathi amehlo kaSawule ongulwe, waza waphinda wanako ukubona. Wathi akuvuka wabhaptizwa." 
Acts9:19 Emveni kokuba etyile, wabuya wangumqabaqaba. USawule wahlala iintsukwana nabalandeli bakaYesu eDamasko." 
Acts9:20 Zisukanje waya *ezindlwini zesikhungo zamaJuda, wafika washumayela ngoYesu, esithi unguNyana kaThixo." 
Acts9:21 Bonke ababemva, babemangaliswa, bebuza besithi: “Ngaba le ndoda asiyiyo na leya yayibatshutshisa eJerusalem bonke abathetha ngeli gama? Kanene, andithi nangoku ilapha nje, izele ukuze ibambe abantu, ibase kubabingeleli abaziintloko?”" 
Acts9:22 Kodwa intshumayelo kaSawule yaya ikhula emandleni, neengxoxo zakhe ezibonisa ukuba uYesu *unguKrestu, zabetha asikwa imilomo amaJuda aseDamasko." 
Acts9:23 Kwakuba kudlule iintsuku ezininzi amaJuda ahlanganisana, afutha amacebo okumbulala uSawule;" 
Acts9:24 kodwa eli yelenqe waliva uSawule. Imini nobusuku babemlinda emasangweni edolophu, khon' ukuze bambulale." 
Acts9:25 Ngabusuku buthile abalandeli bakaYesu bamthatha uSawule, bamthoba ngengobozi eludongeni." 
Acts9:26 USawule waya eJerusalem, wazama ukuzibandakanya nabalandeli bakaYesu. Kodwa bonke babemoyika, bengakholwa ukuba naye ungumlandeli kaYesu." 
Acts9:27 Wada wancedwa nguBharnabha owamthathayo, wamsa *kubathunywa, wabachazela indlela awabonana ngayo neNkosi, nento eyathethwayo yiNkosi kuye. Wababalisela nangokulishumayela kukaSawule ngesibindi igama likaYesu eDamasko." 
Acts9:28 Waza ke uSawule wahlala apho eJerusalem, ejikeleza elishumayela ngesibindi igama leNkosi." 
Acts9:29 Ngokunjalo wathetha, waxoxa nawo namaJuda athetha isiGrike, kodwa asuka afuna ukumbulala." 
Acts9:30 Athi amakholwa akuyiqonda le nto, amthatha uSawule, amsa eKhesariya, aza amthumela eTarso." 
Acts9:31 Ke kaloku ibandla kulo lonke elakwaJuda naseGalili naseSamariya lazola, kungekho ntshutshiso. Laba nenkqubela, lakhula nangamanani, limhlonela uThixo, likhuthazwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Acts9:32 Njengoko uPetros wayeyihamba yonke loo ngingqi, ngathuba lithile watyelela abantu bakaThixo eLida." 
Acts9:33 Apho wahlangana nendoda egama linguEneya. Yayife icala, futhi ineminyaka esibhozo yalalayo." 
Acts9:34 Wathi uPetros kuyo: “Eneya, uYesu Krestu uyakuphilisa. Phakama, wendlule umandlalo wakho.” Ngakonje ukuba atsho, wavuka uEneya." 
Acts9:35 Bathi bakumbona, bonke abantu ababehlala eLida nakwintili yaseSharon bazinikela eNkosini." 
Acts9:36 EJopa kwakukho umlandeli kaYesu ogama linguTabhita, oko kukuthi uBhadikazi. Lonke ixesha lakhe wayelichithela ekwenzeni okulungileyo, enezinwe, ebanceda abahlelelekileyo." 
Acts9:37 Ngeli xesha wagula, wasweleka. Bawuhlamba umzimba wakhe, bawubeka egumbini elikumgangatho ophezulu." 
Acts9:38 Njengoko iJopa yayingekude eLida, beva abalandeli bakaYesu ukuba uPetros useLida, baza bathumela amadoda amabini nomyalezo wokuba uPetros makancede afike ngokukhawuleza." 
Acts9:39 Akalibazisanga uPetros; wahamba nawo kwangoko. Akufika khona, wasiwa egumbini elo liphezulu, waphahlwa libubu labahlolokazi ababelila, bembonisa iingubo kwaneempahla awayezenza uBhadikazi esaphilile." 
Acts9:40 UPetros wabakhuphela phandle bonke, waza waguqa wathandaza. Wathi kamva waguqukela kuso isidumbu, wathi: “Tabhita, vuka!” Wajonga, waza akubona uPetros, wavuka." 
Acts9:41 Wasondela kuye uPetros, wamncedisa, waphakama. Wawabiza ke uPetros amakholwa kunye nabahlolokazi abo, wamnikela kubo ephilile." 
Acts9:42 Ezi ndaba zafikelela kuyo yonke iJopa, baza abantu abaninzi bazinikela eNkosini." 
Acts9:43 UPetros waba neentsuku ezininzi ehleli apho eJopa kunye nendoda egama linguSimon, umsuki weemfele." 
Acts10:1 EKhesariya kwakukho umphathi-butho wamajoni aseRoma ogama linguKorneli. Umkhosi wakhe kwakusithiwa ngowaseItali. 
Acts10:2 Yena nosapho lwakhe babengabantu abamnqulayo bemhlonela uThixo. Wayengumntu onezinwe, ewanceda amaJuda ahlelelekileyo, ethandaza rhoqo kuThixo." 
Acts10:3 Ngenye injika-langa kwisithuba sentsimbi yesithathu, waba nombono, wasibona ngokucacileyo isithunywa sikaThixo singena sisithi kuye: “Korneli!”" 
Acts10:4 Wasiqwalasela enoloyiko, wathi: “Yintoni, Nkosi?” Saphendula sathi: “UThixo uyamkele imithandazo nemisebenzi yakho yesisa; akazange wakulibala." 
Acts10:5 Ngoku ke thuma amadoda eJopa, kumntu othile ogama linguSimon Petros," 
Acts10:6 olundwendwe lukaSimon umsuki weemfele, ondlu ingaselwandle.”" 
Acts10:7 Sakumka isithunywa eso, uKorneli wabiza izicaka zakhe ezibini, kunye nejoni elalimhlonela uThixo, elalingumlindi wakhe." 
Acts10:8 Wabachazela konke okwakumhlele, waza wabathuma eJopa." 
Acts10:9 Ngomhla olandelayo, xa babesendleleni, besondela eJopa, uPetros uthe emini emaqanda waya kuthandaza phezu kwendlu kwindawo esabuvaranda." 
Acts10:10 Wasuka walamba, wafuna into etyiwayo, kwathi besamlungiselela ukutya wabona umbono." 
Acts10:11 Wabona izulu livulekile, kusihla into engathi lilaphu elikhulu libanjwe ngamasondo omane, lisiza emhlabeni." 
Acts10:12 Kulo kwakukho zonke iintlobo zezidalwa ezingatyiwayo ezizitho zine, ezirhubuluzayo, nezibhabhayo." 
Acts10:13 Weva ilizwi lisithi kuye: “Vuka, xhela utye, Petros.”" 
Acts10:14 Waphendula wathi: “Nkosi, ngunotshe lowo! Mna andizange ndiyitye into engatyiwayo.”" 
Acts10:15 Laphinda ilizwi elo lavakala kuye lisithi: “Musa ukuthi ayityiwa into athi uThixo iyatyiwa.” 
Acts10:16 Le nto yenzeka kwada kwakathathu, laza ke ilaphu elo lanyuselwa ezulwini." 
Acts10:17 Ngoku asamangalisiweyo yena uPetros ukuba ngaba yintoni na intsingiselo yalo mbono, wona amadoda athunywe nguKorneli ayesede awufumana umkhondo wendlu kaSimon, selemi esangweni." 
Acts10:18 Abuzisa ukuba ngaba akukho mhambi ugama linguSimon Petros na apho. 
Acts10:19 UPetros yena wayesajika-jikana nalo mbono ukuva kwakhe uMoya oyiNgcwele esithi: “Phulaphula, nango amadoda amathathu ekufuna." 
Acts10:20 Phakama uye kuwo la madoda, ungathandabuzi, uhambe nawo, kuba athunywe ndim.”" 
Acts10:21 Waya kuwo uPetros, wafika wathi: “Ndim lo nimfunayo. Ngaba nindifuna ngani?”" 
Acts10:22 Wona aphendula athi: “Sithunywa yiNkosi yethu uKorneli, oyindoda elungileyo emhlonelayo uThixo, ehlonitshwayo nangamaJuda. Uxelelwe sisithunywa sikaThixo ukuba makakubize uye endlwini yakhe, ukuze eve loo nto uya kumxelela yona.”" 
Acts10:23 Wangena nabo endlwini uPetros, baza balalisa apho ngaloo mini. Ngosuku olulandelayo wahamba nawo la madoda kunye namanye amakholwa aseJopa." 
Acts10:24 Ngengomso wagaleleka eKhesariya, apho wafika elindelwe nguKorneli nezizalwana nezihlobo zakhe ezisenyongweni." 
Acts10:25 Xa angenayo uPetros, uKorneli wazikhahlela phambi kwakhe," 
Acts10:26 kodwa uPetros wamphakamisa wathi: “Hayi, ndingumntu nje nam; musa ukwenjenjalo.”" 
Acts10:27 UPetros wayethetha noKorneli ekungeneni kwakhe endlwini, apho wafika kubuthelene abantu abaninzi." 
Acts10:28 Uthe kubo uPetros: “Nina ngokwenu nazi kakuhle ukuba umJuda akavumelekile ngokwenkolo yakowabo ukuba andwendwele nokuba abe nento yokwenza neentlanga. Selendibonisile ke kodwa uThixo ukuba mandingathathi bani njengongahlambulukanga. 
Acts10:29 Yiyo loo nto uthe wakundibiza andala. Khawundixelele ke, undibizele ntoni?”" 
Acts10:30 Uthe ukuphendula uKorneli: “Ngoku kusemva kweentsuku ezine oko ndandithandaza endlwini yam, malunga neli lixa ngentsimbi yesithathu emva kwemini, kwathi gqi umfo onxibe ezibengezelayo, wema phambi kwam," 
Acts10:31 wathi kum: ‘Korneli, uThixo uyamkele imithandazo yakho, wayikhumbula nemisebenzi yakho yesisa." 
Acts10:32 Ngoko ke thuma umntu eJopa, aye kubiza umntu ogama linguSimon Petros. Ulundwendwe lukaSimon umsuki weemfele, ondlu ingaselwandle.’" 
Acts10:33 Ndithumele kwangoko kuwe, nawe ke ulungisile ukuza. Thina sonke sihlangene apha ngenjongo yokudibana noThixo, silindele ukuphulaphula yonke into iNkosi ekuyalele ukuba usixelele yona.”" 
Acts10:34 UPetros wathetha wenjenje: “Ngenene ndiyaqonda ngoku ukuba uThixo akamkhethi wabuso bamntu. 
Acts10:35 Nabani na, nokuba ngowaluphi na uhlanga, ukuba uyamhlonela uThixo, esenza okulungileyo, wamkelekile kuye." 
Acts10:36 Niyalwazi udaba awaluthumela kumaSirayeli, evakalisa iindaba ezimnandi zoxolo ngoYesu Krestu, oyiNkosi yabantu bonke." 
Acts10:37 Niyasazi isiganeko esenzekayo kulo lonke elakwaJuda, ukuqalela eGalili, emva kokushumayela kukaYohane ngobhaptizo." 
Acts10:38 Nivile ngoYesu waseNazarete owathanjiswa nguThixo ngoMoya oyiNgcwele waba namandla. Wayehamba kulo lonke, esenza okulungileyo, ebaphilisa bonke ababephantsi kwamandla omtyholi, kuba uThixo wayenaye." 
Acts10:39 Thina singamangqina ako konke awakwenzayo eJerusalem nakwelamaJuda. Bambulala ngokumbethelela emnqamlezweni," 
Acts10:40 waza uThixo wamvusa ekufeni ngosuku lwesithathu. 
Acts10:41 Akazange wabonakala kubantu bonke, koko wabonakala kuthi mangqina awawakhetha kwangaphambili uThixo, thina sasisitya sisela kunye naye emveni kokuba uThixo emvusile ekufeni." 
Acts10:42 Wasigunyazisa ukuba sishumayele ebantwini, singqine ukuba ungulowo uThixo amnyulele ukuba ngumgwebi wabahleliyo nabafileyo." 
Acts10:43 Bâthetha ngaye bonke *abashumayeli besithi wonke umntu ozinikelayo kuye uxolelwa izono zakhe ngamandla egama lakhe.” 
Acts10:44 Esathethanje uPetros, wehla uMoya oyiNgcwele phezu kwabo bonke abo babephulaphule." 
Acts10:45 AmaJuda akholwayo, lawo ayesuke noPetros eJopa, amangaliswa kukuba uThixo ezinike isipho soMoya oyiNgcwele neentlanga," 
Acts10:46 kuba baziva zithetha ngalwimi zimbi, zidumisa uThixo. UPetros wathetha wathi:" 
Acts10:47 “Aba bantu bamkele uMoya oyiNgcwele njengoko samamkelayo nathi. Ngenene ke akukho namnye umntu ongalayo ukuba aba bantu babhaptizwe ngamanzi.” 
Acts10:48 UPetros ke ngoko wathi mababhaptizwe egameni likaYesu Krestu. Ke yena bamcela ukuba akhe ahlale nabo iintsukwana. 
Acts11:1 *Abathunywa namakholwa akulo lonke elakwaJuda, eva ukuba iintlanga nazo zilamkele ilizwi likaThixo." 
Acts11:2 Akubuyela eJerusalem uPetros, amaJuda angamakholwa amgxeka esithi:" 
Acts11:3 “Wena ubulundwendwe lwabantu abangolukiyo ngokwesiko likaMosis, usitya nokutya nabo.”" 
Acts11:4 Ke yena uPetros wabanika inkcazelo ezeleyo, esusela ekuqaleni kwento eyehlayo. Wathi:" 
Acts11:5 “Ndathi ndiseJopa, ndithandaza ndabona umbono. Ndabona kusihla into engathi lilaphu elikhulu, lithotywa ngamasondo omane ezulwini, yaza kuthi ngxingxilili ngakum." 
Acts11:6 Ndaqwalasela ngaphakathi kuyo, ndabona izilo nezilwanyana, iinyoka neentaka zasendle." 
Acts11:7 Ndeva ilizwi lisithi kum: ‘Vuka, xhela utye, Petros.’" 
Acts11:8 Kodwa mna ndithe: ‘Nkosi, unotshe! Andizanga ndikufake kowam umlomo ukutya okungatyiwayo.’" 
Acts11:9 Kwakho lathi ilizwi elo: ‘Musa ukuthi ayityiwa nayiphi na into uThixo athi iyatyiwa.’ 
Acts11:10 Le nto yenzeka kwada kwakathathu, kwathi ekugqibeleni labuyiselwa kwasezulwini elo laphu." 
Acts11:11 Ngaloo mzuzu kanye, nako kufika kuloo mzi ndandihlala kuwo, amadoda amathathu awayethunywe kum, evela eKhesariya." 
Acts11:12 UMoya oyiNgcwele wathi mandihambe nawo loo madoda, ndingathingazi. Naloo makholwa mathandathu aseJopa aya kunye nam eKhesariya, safikela kwaKorneli sisonke." 
Acts11:13 UKorneli wasixelela ngombono wakhe, apho isithunywa sezulu safika sathi kuye makathumele umntu eJopa, aye kubiza umfo ogama linguSimon Petros," 
Acts11:14 sisithi nguye oya kubazisa indlela abaya kusindiswa ngayo yena nosapho lwakhe. 
Acts11:15 Ndithe ke ndakushumayela wehla kwangoko uMoya oyiNgcwele phezu kwabo, njengoko wehlayo nakuthi kuqala." 
Acts11:16 Ndatsho ndacinga ngamazwi âthethwa yiNkosi xa yayisithi: ‘UYohane wayebabhaptiza ngamanzi abantu; ke nina niza kubhaptizwa ngoMoya oyiNgcwele.’ 
Acts11:17 Kucace gcaa ukuba uThixo ezaa ntlanga uzinike kanye esiya sipho wasinika sona thina siyamkeleyo iNkosi uYesu Krestu. Bendingubani na ke mna ukuba ndingáde ndime phambi kwentando kaThixo?” 
Acts11:18 Yabanelisa le ngxelo, baza bamdumisa uThixo, ngokuba kuthe kanti neentlanga ezi uThixo uyazinika ithuba lokuguquka, ukuze zidle ubomi." 
Acts11:19 Abakholwayo basarhazwa yintshutshiso yethuba lokufa kukaStefano. Abanye baphaphatheka, baya kutsho eFenike, eSipro, naseAntiyokwe. Babeluvakalisa udaba lweNkosi kumaJuda kuphela." 
Acts11:20 Kodwa abanye bamakholwa, amadoda aphuma eSipro naseKirene, aya eAntiyokwe, aluvakalisa udaba nakwiintlanga ezintetho isisiGrike, ezishumayeza iindaba ezimnandi ezingeNkosi uYesu." 
Acts11:21 Amandla eNkosi ayewafukamele loo madoda, laza iqela elikhulu labantu lazinikela eNkosini." 
Acts11:22 Le nto yenzekileyo ngabo yaya kuvakala nakwibandla laseJerusalem, laza lathumela uBharnabha eAntiyokwe." 
Acts11:23 Akuba efikile khona, wabubona ububele bukaThixo ebantwini; waza wavuya wabalúleka bonke ukuba bathembeke, banyaniseke eNkosini ngeentliziyo zabo zonke." 
Acts11:24 UBharnabha wayeyindoda elungileyo, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele nalukholo. Abantu abaninzi bazinikela eNkosini," 
Acts11:25 waza ke ngoko uBharnabha waya kukhangela uSawule eTarso. 
Acts11:26 Akumfumana, waya naye eAntiyokwe. Yaba ngunyaka wonke aba babini behlala phakathi kwebandla elo, baza baqeqesha iqela elikhulu. Kwakulapha eAntiyokwe apho abalandeli bakaYesu baqala ukubizwa ngokuba ngamaKrestu." 
Acts11:27 Ngelo xesha kwesuka *abashumayeli abathile eJerusalem baya eAntiyokwe. 
Acts11:28 Omnye wabo ogama linguAgabho, ezele nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wayixela kwangaphambili indlala eyayiza kubakho kuwo wonke umhlaba. Yona ke yafika ngexesha *likaKhesare Klawudiyo." 
Acts11:29 AmaKrestu agqiba ekubeni ulowo nalowo kuwo makaqwebele inkxaso yamakholwa akwelakwaJuda kangangoko anako. 
Acts11:30 Le nto ke bayenza, baza ke imali leyo bayithumela kubadala bebandla ngoBharnabha noSawule." 
Acts12:1 Ngeli thuba naye ukumkani uHerode wabatshutshisa abathile balo ibandla. 
Acts12:2 Wambulala ngekrele uYakobi umntakwabo-Yohane. 
Acts12:3 Uthe akuqonda ukuba esi senzo siwakholisile amaJuda, waqhubela phambili ngokuvalela uPetros. Le nto yenzeka ngexesha *leSidlo seZonka ezingenaGwele." 
Acts12:4 Akuba ebanjiwe uPetros, wavalelwa entolongweni. Wanikelwa ukuba alindwe ngamajoni angamaqela amane angamane. UHerode wayezimisele ukumsa ematyaleni emva *kwePasika." 
Acts12:5 Waza ke uPetros wagcinwa entolongweni apho, kodwa amaKrestu wona azingisa ukumthandazela kuThixo, lo gama avalelweyo." 
Acts12:6 Ke kaloku uPetros wayelele phakathi kwabalindi ababini, ebotshelelwe kubo ngamatyathanga, kukho nabagadi abalinde isango lentolongo, ngobusuku obuphambi komhla awayeza kusiwa ngawo ematyaleni nguHerode." 
Acts12:7 Ngebhaqo kwabonakala isithunywa seNkosi simi bhuxe apho egumbini lentolongo, kwatsho kwasemini kukukhanya. Samshukumisa uPetros, samvusa sisithi: “Khawuleza, vuka!” Ukubanje sitsho, athi xibilili amatyathanga ezandleni." 
Acts12:8 Saqhuba sathi: “Bhinqa, unxibe iimbadada zakho.” Wenjenjalo ke uPetros, saza saphinda isithunywa eso sathi: “Yambatha, undilandele.”" 
Acts12:9 Wasilandela ke uPetros, baphuma entolongweni. Wayengekaqondi ukuba iyinene le nto yenziwa sisithunywa seNkosi; wayeba uyaphupha." 
Acts12:10 Babagqitha abalindi bokuqala nabesibini, baza ekugqibeleni bafika kwisango lentsimbi elivulela edolophini. Lavuleka ngokwalo isango, baphuma ke. Bathi besehla ngesitalato sesuka see shwaka isithunywa eso." 
Acts12:11 Akuqabuka ebuthongweni uPetros wathi: “Ngoku ndiyazi ukuba ngenene le nto yinyaniso! INkosi isithumele isithunywa sayo, sandihlangula egunyeni likaHerode, nakuzo zonke izinto amaJuda ebenqwenela ukuzenza kum.”" 
Acts12:12 Akuyiqonda le nto yenzekileyo uPetros waya emzini kaMariya, unina kaYohane Marko. Kwakukho abantu abaninzi apho, bethandaza." 
Acts12:12 Akuyiqonda le nto yenzekileyo uPetros waya emzini kaMariya, unina kaYohane Marko. Kwakukho abantu abaninzi apho, bethandaza." 
Acts12:13 Wankqonkqoza emnyango, kwaza kwaya intombazana egama linguRoda," 
Acts12:14 eyathi yakuliva ilizwi likaPetros, yasuka yajika ngenxa yovuyo ingamvulelanga, yaya kuxela ukuba nguPetros lo unkqonkqozayo." 
Acts12:15 “Unantoni na? Uyageza!” bamphikisa batsho abo babesendlwini. Kodwa yena wema ekubeni le nto iyinyaniso. Bathi ke bona: “Hayi ke, fan' ukuba sisithunywa sakhe.”" 
Acts12:16 UPetros yena waphikelela enkqonkqoza, bada ngelikade bamvulela, bamangaliswa kakhulu bakuqonda ukuba kuthe kanti nguPetros ngenkqu lo." 
Acts12:17 Wawangawangisa ngesandla ukuba bathi cwaka, waza ke wabachazela indlela emkhuphe ngayo iNkosi entolongweni. Wabayaleza ukuba baye kuxela le nto kuYakobi nakwamanye amakholwa, waza yena wemka waya kwenye indawo." 
Acts12:18 Ngengomso yaba sisiphithi-phithi kubalindi bentolongo besithi: “Yaz' ukuba uphi na uPetros?” 
Acts12:19 UHerode wathi mabamfune, kodwa abazange bamfumane. Ngoko ke abalindi bancinwa, waza uHerode wagunyazisa ukuba babulawe. Emva kwesi singaneko ke, uHerode wemka kwaJuda, waya kuhlala eKhesariya okwexeshana." 
Acts12:20 UHerode wayengavisisani mpela nabantu baseTire nabaseSidon. Kwakuba njalo bavumelana ngokuthumela igqiza labameli. Lona laqala lavana noBlasto, induna yasebhotwe, laza langena ngaye ukudala imvisiswano. Babecela uxolo kuba ilizwe labo lalixhomekeke kummandla kaHerode ekufumaneni ukudla." 
Acts12:21 Ngosuku olumisiweyo uHerode wavatha ezobukumkani, waza wahlala esihlalweni sakhe apho ebhotwe, wathetha nabantu." 
Acts12:22 “Asimntu, nguThixo lowo uthethayo,” bamemeza batsho abantu." 
Acts12:23 Ngakonje ukuba batsho abantu, isithunywa seNkosi sambetha ngesifo uHerode, ngokuba engamnikanga mbeko uThixo. Wadliwa ziimpethu, wada wafa." 
Acts12:24 Laqhubela phambili ilizwi likaThixo ukunwenwa. 
Acts12:25 UBharnabha noSawule bawugqiba umsebenzi wabo, baza babuya eJerusalem, behamba noYohane Marko." 
Acts12:25 UBharnabha noSawule bawugqiba umsebenzi wabo, baza babuya eJerusalem, behamba noYohane Marko." 
Acts13:1 Ke kaloku ebandleni laseAntiyokwe kwakukho abashumayeli nabefundisi: uBharnabha, uSimon ekwakusithiwa nguMnyamana, uLukiyo waseKirene, uManayen owayekhuliswe noHerode irhuluneli, kunye noSawule." 
Acts13:2 Ekuyikhonzeni kwabo iNkosi, bezila ukutya, uMoya oyiNgcwele wathi kubo: “Ndikhetheleni uBharnabha noSawule, ukuze benze umsebenzi endibabizele wona.”" 
Acts13:3 Ngoko ke bazila ukutya bathandaza, bababeka izandla, baza babandulula." 
Acts13:4 Bakuba bethunywe nguMoya oyiNgcwele, uBharnabha noSawule behla baya eSeluki, baza ukusuka apho bahamba ngolwandle ukuya eSipro." 
Acts13:5 Bathi bakufika eSalamisi, balishumayela khona ilizwi likaThixo ezindlwini zesikhungo zamaJuda. Babehamba noYohane Marko, khon' ukuze abancedise emsebenzini." 
Acts13:5 Bathi bakufika eSalamisi, balishumayela khona ilizwi likaThixo ezindlwini zesikhungo zamaJuda. Babehamba noYohane Marko, khon' ukuze abancedise emsebenzini." 
Acts13:6 Basijikeleza ke isiqithi eso, bada bafika ePafo. Apho badibana nomfo onemilingo ogama linguBhar-yesu, umJuda owayezenza *umshumayeli." 
Acts13:7 Wayeliphakathi lerhuluneli yesiqithi eso, uSergiyo Pawulos, owayeyindoda enengqondo ekrele-krele. Irhuluneli leyo yababiza ooBharnabha noSawule, ifuna ukuphulaphula ilizwi likaThixo." 
Acts13:8 Kodwa lo mfo unemilingo, owayebizwa ngokuba nguElima ngesiGrike, wachasana nabo, nerhuluneli leyo wafuna ukuyiwexula elukholweni." 
Acts13:9 Waza ke ngoko uSawule, ogama limbi linguPawulos, ezaliswe nguMoya oyiNgcwele, wamjonga lo mfo," 
Acts13:10 wathi: “Nyanandini kamtyholi, lutshabandini lobulungisa, uzele ngamaqhinga nobuqhetseba, usoloko uzama ukugqwetha inyaniso yeNkosi ngobuxoki!" 
Acts13:11 Khona ngoku iNkosi iza kukubetha, ube yimfama, futhi kuya kuba mzuzu ungakuboni ukukhanya.” Ngoko nangoko aba nkungu amehlo kaElima, wabuva ubumnyama buwavala, wajikeleza ke empampatha, efuna umntu ongamrhuqayo." 
Acts13:12 Ke kaloku yona irhuluneli yakuyibona loo nto, yazinikela, imangalisiwe yimfundiso emayela neNkosi." 
Acts13:13 UPawulos nababemphahlile bemka ePafo, bahamba ngenqanawe, baya kufika ePerga yasePamfili. Apha ke wahlukana nabo uYohane Marko, wabuyela eJerusalem." 
Acts13:13 UPawulos nababemphahlile bemka ePafo, bahamba ngenqanawe, baya kufika ePerga yasePamfili. Apha ke wahlukana nabo uYohane Marko, wabuyela eJerusalem." 
Acts13:14 Abanye bona banduluka ePerga, babheka eAntiyokwe yasePisidi. Bathi apho *ngoMhla wokuPhumla baya *kwindlu yesikhungo, bafika bahlala phantsi." 
Acts13:15 Kwathi zakuba zifundiwe izicatshulwa encwadini *yomthetho kaMosis *nezabashumayeli, amagosa endlu yesikhungo athumela ebacela esithi: “Mawethu, khanisiphe kowenu umphako welizwi, ukwenzela ukukhuthaza abantu.”" 
Acts13:16 Waphakama uPawulos, wawangawangisa ngesandla, ukuba kuthi cwaka, waza wenjenje ukuthetha: “Mawethu, maSirayeli, nani nina zintlanga zimhlonelayo uThixo, khanibeke iindlebe!" 
Acts13:17 UThixo lo unqulwa ngamaSirayeli nguye owanyula ookhokho bethu, wawenza amaSirayeli asisizwe esikhulu ngexesha ayengabaphambukeli kwelaseJiputa. Nguye owawakhupha ngamandla angummangaliso amaSirayeli eJiputa." 
Acts13:18 Wawanyamezela iminyaka emashumi mane entlango. 
Acts13:19 Ikwanguye owazitshabalalisayo izizwe ezisixhenxe eKanana, waza loo mhlaba wawunika abantu bakhe amaSirayeli." 
Acts13:20 Yonke loo nto yathatha isithuba esingangeminyaka engamakhulu amane anamashumi amahlanu. “Emva koko wabanika iinkokheli, zabalawula kwada kwalixesha lomshumayeli uSamweli." 
Acts13:21 Bakufuna ukumkani, wabanika uSawule unyana kaKishe, wesizwe sakwaBhenjamin, waza wabalawula iminyaka engamashumi amane." 
Acts13:22 Akumsusa uSawule, uThixo wamisela uDavide wangukumkani. Nanga amazwi athethwa nguThixo ngoDavide: ‘Ndiphawule ukuba uDavide, unyana kaJese, ngulo mntu kanye ndimfunayo, umfo oya kwenza oko sukuba ndifuna kwenziwe.’" 
Acts13:23 NguYesu lo mzukulwana kaDavide wenziwe uMsindisi wamaSirayeli nguThixo njengoko wathembisayo. 
Acts13:24 Ngaphambi kokufika kukaYesu, uYohane wawashumayeza onke amaSirayeli, esithi makaziguqule iindlela zawo aze abhaptizwe." 
Acts13:25 Ekuwusongeni kwakhe uYohane umsebenzi wakhe, wathi ebantwini: ‘Nithi ndingubani? Andinguye lowo nicinga ukuba ndigunye. Khangelani yena uza emva kwam, ndaye mna andikufanele nokukhulula iimbadada ezi ezinyaweni zakhe.’" 
Acts13:26 “Mawethu, nzala ka-Abraham, nani nonke zintlanga zimhlonelayo uThixo, olu daba losindiso lwathunyelwa kuthi." 
Acts13:27 Kaloku abantu baseJerusalem, bekunye neenkokheli zabo, babengamazi, bengawaqondi namazwi abashumayeli bamandulo afundwayo ngayo yonke iMihla yokuPhumla. Kodwa bâwazalisekisa amazwi abo bashumayeli ngokumgweba uYesu." 
Acts13:28 Nangona babengasifumani isizathu sokuba agwetyelwe ukufa, bacela uPilato ukuba ambulale." 
Acts13:29 Emveni kokuzenza zonke izinto ezithethwa *ziziBhalo ngaye, bamothula emnqamlezweni, bamngcwaba." 
Acts13:30 Kodwa uThixo yena wamvusa ekufeni," 
Acts13:31 waza kwithuba leentsuku ezininzi wabonwa ngâbo wayejikeleza nabo ukusuka eGalili baye eJerusalem. Ngoku bangamangqina akhe kumaSirayeli. 
Acts13:32 Thina silapha nje, sizise iindaba ezimnandi kuni. Loo nto uThixo wayithembisa ookhokho bethu," 
Acts13:33 uyenzele thina bayinzala yabo, ngokumvusa uYesu. Kunjengoko kubhaliweyo eNdumisweni yesibini, kwathiwa: “ ‘Ungunyana wam wena; namhlanje ndikuzele.’" 
Acts13:34 “UThixo wamvusa ekufeni. Ke ngoko akasayi kuze abole. Le nto uyithethe ngala mazwi athi: “ ‘Ndiya kuninika iintsikelelo ezizodwa eziqinisekileyo, endazithembisa uDavide.’" 
Acts13:35 “Kwakhona uthi kwenye indawo: “ ‘Akuyi kusiyeka isicaka sakho esithembekileyo sibole.’ 
Acts13:36 “Kuba kaloku ngexesha lakhe uDavide wayifeza injongo kaThixo, waza wafa emva koko, wangcwatywa ngakookhokho bakhe, wabola." 
Acts13:37 Kodwa uYesu, evusiwe nje nguThixo, khange abole." 
Acts13:38 Yazini niqiniseke xa ninonke, mawethu, ukuba kungoYesu ukushunyayelwa kodaba lokuxolelwa kwezono. Ngokunjalo qondani ukuba wonke umntu ozinikelayo kuye uyakhululwa kuzo zonke izono, obungenako ukumkhulula kuzo *umthetho kaMosis." 
Acts13:39  
Acts13:40 Lumkani ke ngoko, hleze ihle kuni into eyathethwa ngabashumayeli, besithi:" 
Acts13:41 “ ‘Khangelani, nina bagxeki, nimangaliswe nife; kuba umsebenzi endiwenza ngemihla yenu yinto eningayi kukholwa yiyo nokuba ubani uthe wanichazela.’”" 
Acts13:42 Xa bayishiyayo intlanganiso ooPawulos noBharnabha, abantu babamema ukuba ze beze kwakhona ngoMhla wokuPhumla olandelayo, ukuze baphinde babafundise." 
Acts13:43 Emveni kokuphuma kwentlanganiso, uPawulos noBharnabha balandelwa sisihlwele samaJuda neentlanga eziguqukele ebuJudeni, baza basikhuthaza ukuba sibambelele ngenyameko kuThixo onesisa." 
Acts13:43 Emveni kokuphuma kwentlanganiso, uPawulos noBharnabha balandelwa sisihlwele samaJuda neentlanga eziguqukele ebuJudeni, baza basikhuthaza ukuba sibambelele ngenyameko kuThixo onesisa." 
Acts13:44 NgoMhla woPhumlo olandelayo phantse wonke umntu osedolophini weza kuphulaphula ilizwi leNkosi. 
Acts13:45 Akuyibona le nkitha yabantu, amaJuda azala ngumona, amphikisa amnyelisa uPawulos." 
Acts13:46 Kodwa bona ooPawulos noBharnabha bawaxelela phandle amaJuda bathi: “Kakade bekufuneka lishunyayezwe nina kuqala ilizwi likaThixo; koko ngenxa yokuba nilibukula, niziqonda ukuba anibulungelanga ubomi obungonaphakade, siza kuniyeka, siye ezintlangeni." 
Acts13:47 Thina kaloku sanikwa lo myalelo yiNkosi: “ ‘Ndikumisele ukuba ube sisibane sokukhanyisela iintlanga, ube yindlela yokusindiswa kwalo lonke elimiweyo.’”" 
Acts13:48 Zavuya iintlanga zakukuva oku, zayidumisa iNkosi ngenxa yodaba lwayo. Abo ke babenyulelwe ukungena ebomini obungonaphakade, baguquka bangamakholwa." 
Acts13:49 Ilizwi leNkosi lanwenwa kuwo wonke loo mmandla. 
Acts13:50 Kodwa amaJuda adala uchuku, enza *abathunywa bavukelwa ngamadoda aloo dolophu aphambili kwanangabafazi abakumgangatho ophezulu entlalweni, ababemhlonela uThixo. Babatshutshisa babagxotha kuloo mmandla." 
Acts13:51 Abathunywa bavuthulula uthuli ezinyaweni, bekhalala, bemka baya eIkoniyo." 
Acts13:52 Basala abalandeli bakaYesu eAntiyokwe bezele luvuyo nanguMoya oyiNgcwele. 
Acts14:1 NaseIkoniyo yaba sesezolo: uPawulos noBharnabha baya *endlwini yesikhungo baza bathetha kangangokuba iqela elikhulu lamaJuda neentlanga lazinikela. 
Acts14:2 Kodwa amaJuda angakholwayo azixhokonxa iintlanga, azifaka umoya ombi ngakumakholwa." 
Acts14:3 *Abathunywa bahlala apho ixesha elide. Bathetha ngesibindi ngeNkosi, iNkosi ibanika amandla okwenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, ingqina inyaniso yodaba lwabo ngesisa sayo." 
Acts14:4 Inkoliso yabantu edolophini apho yathi qheke kubini: abanye baba ngakumaJuda, abanye baba ngakubathunywa." 
Acts14:5 Zaza iintlanga namaJuda ndawonye neenkokheli zazimisela ukubaphatha kakubi abathunywa, zibaxulube ngamatye." 
Acts14:6 Bathe bakuyiqonda le nto abathunywa, basaba baya eLikawoni, kwiidolophu zaseListra naseDerbhe nemimandla ejikelezileyo." 
Acts14:7 Baza bazishumayela khona iindaba ezimnandi. 
Acts14:8 Apho eListra kwakukho indoda eyazalwa isisiqhwala, ingazange yaba nako ukuhamba." 
Acts14:9 Yawaphulaphula ngomdla amazwi kaPawulos. UPawulos wayithi ntshoo ngamehlo, waqonda ukuba inokholo olungayiphilisayo," 
Acts14:10 wadanduluka wathi: “Suk' ume ngeenyawo.” Indoda leyo yatsiba yema, yahamba-hamba." 
Acts14:11 Zithe izihlwele zakuyibona le nto yenziwe nguPawulos, zakhwaza ngesiLikawoni zisithi: “Oothixo beze kuthi befana nabantu!”" 
Acts14:12 UBharnabha bamthiya bathi *nguZeyus, uPawulos bathi *nguHermes ngenxa yokuba yena wayesisithethi." 
Acts14:13 Ke kaloku kwakukho indlu yokunqulela uZeyus ngaphandle nje kwedolophu. Waza umbingeleli kaZeyus weza neenkunzi zeenkomo neentyatyambo esangweni ledolophu. Yena nesihlwele eso babefuna ukwenzela *abathunywa idini. 
Acts14:14 Bathe abathunywa ooBharnabha noPawulos bakuyiva le nto iqhubekayo, bazikrazula iimpahla zabo, babaleka baya kuso isihlwele, bekhwaza besithi:" 
Acts14:15 “Madoda, yintoni le niyenzayo? Nathi singabantu; sifana nani! Size apha ukuze sivakalise iindaba ezimnandi, ukuze niguquke nijike kwezi zinto ziphuthileyo, nize kuThixo, owenza izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nezinto ezilapho kuzo." 
Acts14:16 Mandulo uThixo wabayeka abantu, benza ukuthanda kwabo;" 
Acts14:17 kodwa wasoloko ezibonakalisa ubukho bakhe ngezinto ezintle azenzayo. Usipha imvula nezilimo ngamaxesha afanelekileyo; usipha nokudla, iintliziyo zethu azizalise ngovuyo.”" 
Acts14:18 Naxa sebethethe kangako abathunywa, phantse bangabi nako ukusijika isihlwele ekubeni sibenzele idini." 
Acts14:19 Kwafika iqela lamaJuda evela eAntiyokwe yasePisidi naseIkoniyo. Ekubeni ezifake umoya ombi izihlwele, ukuba zithathe icala lawo, bamxuluba ngamatye uPawulos, bamrhuqela ngaphandle kwedolophu, beba ufile." 
Acts14:20 Kodwa akungqongwa ngamakholwa, wavuka, wabuyela kwasedolophini. Ngengomso wemka kunye noBharnabha, baya eDerbhe." 
Acts14:21 UPawulos noBharnabha bazishumayela iindaba ezimnandi naseDerbhe, bafumana inkitha eyaba ngabalandeli bakaYesu. Baza ke babuyela eListra, baya eIkoniyo ukusuka apho, baya naseAntiyokwe yasePisidi." 
Acts14:22 Bawomeleza amakholwa, bewakhuthaza ukuba ahlale ehleli elukholweni enyanisekile, besithi ukufundisa: “Simelwe kukuthwala ubunzima thina singene phantsi kolawulo lukaThixo.”" 
Acts14:23 Kwibandla ngalinye batyumba abadala, babanikela ngemithandazo nangozilo-kutya eNkosini ababethembele kuyo." 
Acts14:24 Emveni kokutyhutyha ummandla wasePisidi, bafika ePamfili." 
Acts14:25 Bashumayela udaba ePerga, baza badlulela eAtaliya." 
Acts14:26 Basuka apho ngesikhephe babuyela eAntiyokwe yaseSiriya, apho babenikelwe elugcinweni naselubabalweni lukaThixo ukuya kwenza kwabo lo msebenzi bawufezileyo ngoku." 
Acts14:27 Bakufika eAntiyokwe, balihlanganisela ndawonye ibandla, babalisa ngezinto uThixo awazenza ngabo, bexela nokuba nabaziintlanga uThixo ubavulele indlela yokukholwa." 
Acts14:28 Bahlala ke apho kunye namakholwa ithuba elide. 
Acts15:1 Amadoda athile asuka eJerusalem, aya eAntiyokwe afundisa amakholwa esithi akanako ukusindiswa ngaphandle kokuba olùswe *ngokomthetho kaMosis." 
Acts15:2 UPawulos noBharnabha baba nengxoxo eshushu nabo ngalo mbandela, kwaza kwagqitywa ukuba uPawulos noBharnabha kunye nabanye baseAntiyokwe baye eJerusalem, bayokuva le ngxaki *kubathunywa nakubadala." 
Acts15:3 Ke kaloku lakuba libandulule ibandla, bacanda kwelaseFenike nelaseSamariya, behamba bebalisa ngokuguquka kweentlanga; iindaba ke ezo ezawavuyisa kakhulu amakholwa." 
Acts15:4 Befikile ke eJerusalem, bamkelwa libandla, abathunywa, nabadala, baza ke benza ingxelo kubo ngendlela awayebasebenzise ngayo uThixo." 
Acts15:5 Kodwa amakholwa athile awayekade engaweqela *labaFarasi, athi wona amakholwa aphuma ezintlangeni makoluswe awuthobele umthetho kaMosis." 
Acts15:6 Abathunywa nabadala benza intlanganiso, baphicotha lo mbandela." 
Acts15:7 Emva kwengxoxo ende, waphakama uPetros, wathi: “Mawethu, niyazi ukuba kwixesha elidlulileyo uThixo wandonyula phakathi kwenu ukuba iintlanga zizive ngam iindaba ezimnandi, zize ziguquke." 
Acts15:8 UThixo ozaziyo iintliziyo zabantu, wabonakalisa ukuzamkela iintlanga ngokuzinika uMoya oyiNgcwele njengoko wasinikayo nathi." 
Acts15:9 Akabonakalisanga mahluko phakathi kwazo nathi; nazo wazihlambulula iintliziyo zakuba zizinikele kuye. 
Acts15:10 Ngoku ke nimlingela ntoni uThixo ngokuthwalisa amakholwa umthwalo abangazange babe nako ukuwuthwala ookhokho bethu, nathi ngokwethu esingenako ukuwuthwala?" 
Acts15:11 Hayi bo! Sikholwa kukuba thina sisindiswa ngesisa seNkosi uYesu kwanjengazo.” 
Acts15:12 Kwakuthe cwaka ngexesha uBharnabha noPawulos besenza ingxelo ngemimangaliso nemiqondiso ayenzileyo uThixo ngabo phakathi kweentlanga. 
Acts15:13 Emva kwentetho yabo kwathetha uYakobi, wathi: “Ndiphulaphuleni, mawethu!" 
Acts15:14 USimon unichazele indlela uThixo abonakalise ngayo ukuzikhathalela kwakhe iintlanga ngokukhetha phakathi kwazo abantu abangabakhe. 
Acts15:15 Amazwi *abashumayeli ayavumelana nesi senzo, kuba zithi *iziBhalo:" 
Acts15:16 “ ‘Emva koku ndiya kubuya,’ itsho iNkosi, ‘ndiwuvuse umzi kaDavide ongamanxiwa, ndiwulungise apho wonakele khona, ume kakuhle." 
Acts15:17 Bothi ke bayifune iNkosi bonke abantu, zonke izizwe endizibizileyo zaba zezam,’ itsho iNkosi, yona ikwenzileyo oku." 
Acts15:18 “Kakade ke iyaziwa le nto. 
Acts15:19 Ke ngoko mna ndithi masingazixhamli iintlanga eziguqukayo," 
Acts15:20 koko masizibhalele incwadi sizixelele ukuba mazingatyi naluphi na uhlobo lokutya okungahlambulukanga ngenxa yokubingelelwa kwizithixo, zizigcine nyulu ekurheletyeni, zingatyi nasiphi na isilo esikrwitshiweyo, nanyama inegazi." 
Acts15:21 Sekukudala kakade ufundwa umthetho kaMosis, kushunyayelwa amazwi akhe ngayo yonke *iMihla yokuPhumla *ezindlwini zesikhungo kwiidolophu ngeedolophu.”" 
Acts15:22 *Abathunywa nabadala, kunye nebandla lonke, bafika kwisigqibo sokuba kukhethwe amadoda phakathi kwabo, athunywe eAntiyokwe kunye noPawulos noBharnabha. Banyulwa ke ooJudas ogama limbi linguBharsabha kunye noSilas, ingamadoda awayebekwe kakhulu ngamakholwa." 
Acts15:23 Banikwa incwadi ukuba bahambe nayo. Ke yona yayibhalwe ngolu hlobo: “Thina bathunywa sikunye nabadala siyanibulisa njengamawethu xa ninonke, nina zizwe zaseAntiyokwe eSiriya naseKiliki." 
Acts15:24 Sivile ukuba kubekho madoda athile aphuma apha kuthi aza kunixhamla, eniphazamisa ngento esingawathumanga yona, ayithethileyo kuni." 
Acts15:25 Sihlangene ke, savumelana sonke ukuba sinyule izigidimi sizithume kuni, zihambe kunye nabahlobo bethu abaziintanda, uBharnabha noPawulos," 
Acts15:26 amadoda ancame ubomi bawo ngenxa yokukhonza uKrestu. 
Acts15:27 Ke ngoko sinithumela uJudas noSilas abaya kunichazela ngokwabo ezi zinto kanye sizibhalileyo. 
Acts15:28 Thina samkele isigqibo soMoya oyiNgcwele sokuba singanithwalisi bunzima bumbi ngaphandle kwale migaqo ibalulekileyo: 
Acts15:29 Musani ukuyitya into ebingelelwe kwizithixo, nenyama enegazi, nesilo esikrwitshiweyo; nizigcine nyulu ekurheletyeni. Niya kuba niyakholisa xa nizilumlayo kwezo zinto. Salani kakuhle.”" 
Acts15:30 Izigidimi ezo zandululwa, zasinga eAntiyokwe, apho zafika zawahlanganisa amakholwa, zawanika incwadi leyo." 
Acts15:31 Bathi abantu bakuyifunda incwadi leyo, bavuya kakhulu ziindaba zayo zenkuthazo." 
Acts15:32 UJudas noSilas, ababengabashumayeli ngokwabo, bathetha ixesha elide namakholwa, bewakhuthaza, bewomeleza." 
Acts15:33 Emva kwexesha belapho bakhululwa ngoxolo ngamakholwa, baza bagoduka. [" 
Acts15:34 Kodwa uSilas yena wabona ukuba makasale khona.] 
Acts15:35 UPawulos noBharnabha bona bakhe banexesha belapho eAntiyokwe. Bekunye nabanye balifundisa, balishumayela, ilizwi leNkosi." 
Acts15:36 Ekuhambeni kwexesha wathi uPawulos kuBharnabha: “Makhe sityelele amakholwa kuzo zonke iidolophu apho sasikhe salishumayela khona ilizwi leNkosi, siqonde ukuba aphila njani na.”" 
Acts15:37 UBharnabha wafuna ukuba kuhanjwe noYohane Marko," 
Acts15:37 UBharnabha wafuna ukuba kuhanjwe noYohane Marko," 
Acts15:38 kodwa uPawulos yena akathandanga ukuba bahambe naye, kuba ngokuya babehambe naye kuqala wajika esithubeni, wabashiya ePamfili." 
Acts15:39 Baxambulisana ke ngale ndawo, bada bagqibela ngokwahlukana. UBharnabha wahamba noMarko, basinga eSipro ngesikhephe." 
Acts15:39 Baxambulisana ke ngale ndawo, bada bagqibela ngokwahlukana. UBharnabha wahamba noMarko, basinga eSipro ngesikhephe." 
Acts15:40 Waza yena uPawulos wakhetha ukuhamba noSilas. Ke amakholwa abanikela ezibeleni zikaThixo, bemka." 
Acts15:41 UPawulos watyhutyha imimandla yaseSiriya naseKiliki, ewomeleza amabandla." 
Acts16:1 UPawulos waya eDerbhe naseListra. Apho kwakukho ikholwa eligama linguTimoti, onina wayekwalikholwa, engumJudakazi, uyise yena engumGrike." 
Acts16:2 Onke amakholwa aseListra naseIkoniyo ayemazi ngesimilo esihle uTimoti. 
Acts16:3 UPawulos wafuna ukuhamba noTimoti, ngoko ke wamolùsa kuqala, kuba onke amaJuda aloo mmandla ayesazi ukuba uyise wayengolukanga." 
Acts16:4 Ekuzityhutyheni kwabo ezo dolophu, amakholwa bawazisa ngesigqibo *sabathunywa nabadala eJerusalem." 
Acts16:5 Aza ke amabandla omelezeka elukholweni, anda nangamanani imihla ngemihla." 
Acts16:6 Xa babekwingingqi yaseFrigi naseGalati, uMoya oyiNgcwele wabalela ukuba balishumayele ilizwi eAsiya." 
Acts16:7 Bakufika emdeni waseMisi, bazama ukungena eBhitini, kodwa nakhona uMoya kaYesu akabavumelanga." 
Acts16:8 Ngoko ke bacanda eMisi, behla baya eTrowa." 
Acts16:9 Xa babelapho ke, ebusuku uPawulos wabona umbono. Indoda yaseMakedoni yayimile imcenga isithi: “Yiza apha eMakedoni, uzokusinceda.”" 
Acts16:10 Ngokukhawuleza emva kwalo mbono kaPawulos, salungiselela ukuya eMakedoni, kuba saqonda ukuba uThixo usibizela ukuba siye kuzishumayela iindaba ezimnandi kubantu balapho." 
Acts16:11 Semka ngesikhephe eTrowa, sahamba ngqo sacanda sijonge eSamotraki, saza ngengomso sangena eNapoli." 
Acts16:12 Sakusuka apho, saya kutsho eFilipi, idolophu yokuqala kwisithili saseMakedoni, eyayilithânga laseRoma. Sakhe sahlala iintsukwana apho kuloo dolophu." 
Acts16:13 *NgoMhla wokuPhumla saphuma edolophini, saya ngasemlanjeni, apho sasiba koba kukho indawo athandazela kuyo amaJuda. Sahlala phantsi, sancokola namakhosikazi awayebuthe apho." 
Acts16:14 Enye yawo eyayisiphulaphule nguLidiya waseTiyatire, owayengumthengisi weempahla ezimsobo zexabiso. Wayeyintokazi eyayimhlonela uThixo, yaza ke iNkosi yayibaza ingqondo ukuba izigqale izinto ezazithethwa nguPawulos." 
Acts16:15 Yabhaptizwa kunye nosapho lwayo. Yaza ke yasimema isithi: “Ukuba nithi ndilikholwa ngenene eNkosini, khanizokuhlala kwam.” Yasithundeza ke ukuba siye." 
Acts16:16 Ngamhla uthile xa sasisiya kwindawo yokuthandaza, sahlangana nentombi eyayilikhoboka. Yayinamafufunyana. Yayibenzela imali eninzi ke abanikaziyo ngokuchazela abantu izinto eziza kubehlela." 
Acts16:17 Yasilandela sinoPawulos, ikhwaza isithi: “La madoda angabakhonzi bakaThixo uPhezukonke. Anishumayeza indlela eningásindiswa ngayo.”" 
Acts16:18 Yaqhuba iintsuku ezininzi iyenza le nto, yada yamthukuthezela uPawulos, wajika wathi kuloo moya: “Ngengunya legama likaYesu Krestu ndithi: ‘Phuma kule ntombi.’ ” Aphuma kwangoko amafufunyana." 
Acts16:19 Bakuphawula abanikaziyo ukuba ayisekho indlela yokwenza imali ngale ntombi, babagxavula ooPawulos noSilas, babarhuqela kwinkundla yamatyala eyayisebaleni lembutho." 
Acts16:20 Babamangalela kwabasemagunyeni, besithi: “La madoda angamaJuda, yaye adala isidubedube apha edolophini yethu." 
Acts16:21 Afundisa imikhwa enxamnye nomthetho wethu. Thina singamaRoma, asinakuyamkela loo mikhwa.”" 
Acts16:22 Nesihlwele sangenelela ekubahlaseleni. Zaza iziphathamandla zathi mazikrazulwe izambatho zikaPawulos noSilas, babethwe nokubethwa." 
Acts16:23 Bakuba bebethwe kanobom, bavalelwa entolongweni. Wayalelwa nojela ukuba abatshixele abagcine ngokunqabileyo." 
Acts16:24 Ewufumene umyalelo lowo, ujela wabatshixela kwelingaphakathi igumbi, wabakhonkxa iinyawo ngezikhuni." 
Acts16:25 Phakathi kobusuku uPawulos noSilas bathandaza bacula bedumisa uThixo, namanye amabanjwa ebeva." 
Acts16:26 Ngesaquphe kwabakho inyikima eyashukumisa izisekelo zentolongo. Zatsho zavuleka zonke iingcango, namatyathanga akhululeka kumabanjwa." 
Acts16:27 Evukile ujela, wabona iingcango zentolongo zivulekile, wacinga ukuba abalekile amabanjwa onke; waza warhola ikrele lakhe, eza kuzibulala." 
Acts16:28 Kuthe kusenjalo wamemeza uPawulos esithi: “Mus' ukuzenzakalisa, kuba sisaphelele!”" 
Acts16:29 Ujela lowo wathi makuziwe nesibane, waza engcangcazela enjalo wangena wawa ezinyaweni zikaPawulos noSilas." 
Acts16:30 Wabakhuphela phandle, wabuza wathi: “Bahlekazi, ndingenza ntoni ukuze ndisinde?” Bona baphendula bathi:" 
Acts16:31 “Zinikele eNkosini uYesu; uya kusindiswa wena nosapho lwakho.” 
Acts16:32 Bamchazela ke yena nabo bonke ababesendlwini yakhe ngodaba lweNkosi. 
Acts16:33 Ngaloo yure kanye yobusuku ujela wabathatha, wahlamba amanxeba abo; waza wabhaptizwa kunye nosapho lwakhe kwangoko." 
Acts16:34 Waya nabo endlwini yakhe ooPawulos noSilas, wabapha ukutya. Yena nosapho lwakhe bazaliswa luvuyo ngenxa yokuba bezinikele kuThixo." 
Acts16:35 Ngentsasa elandelayo abasemagunyeni bathumela amagosa abo, besithi: “Wakhululeni loo madoda.”" 
Acts16:36 Ujela ke wamxelela uPawulos ukuba iziphathamandla zithumele umyalelo wokuba yena noSilas bangákhululwa. Ngoko ke bakhululekile bangáhamba ngoxolo. 
Acts16:37 Kodwa waphendula uPawulos wathi kumagosa lawo: “Hayi kaloku, sikatswe esidlangalaleni, nakuba singakhange sibekwe tyala, ibe futhi singabemi abangamaRoma! Ngaphezu koko sivalelwe entolongweni. Bangathini ke ngoku ukusikhulula bucala? Hayi bo! Ayinakwenzeka loo nto! Abasemagunyeni mabeze kusikhulula ngokwabo.”" 
Acts16:38 Amagosa lawo aya kuwaxela la mazwi kwiziphathamandla, ezathi zakuva ukuba uPawulos noSilas ngabemi abangamaRoma, zoyika kakhulu." 
Acts16:39 Ngoko ke zaya kubo, zacela uxolo, zabacenga ukuba bahambe, zabakhupha ke bemka." 
Acts16:40 UPawulos noSilas bayishiya ke intolongo leyo, baya kwaLidiya. Apho ke bahlangana namakholwa, baza bathi, bakuba bewakhuthazile, bemka." 
Acts17:1 Bahamba ke, badlula eAmfipoli naseApoloniya, bada baya kufika eTesalonika, apho yayikho *indlu yesikhungo yamaJuda." 
Acts17:2 Njengoko ebeqhele ukwenjenjalo, uPawulos waya endlwini yesikhungo leyo. Apho wayexoxa nabantu *ngeziBhalo imiGqibelo emithathu," 
Acts17:3 ezichaza iziBhalo, ecacisa kwangazo ukuba ubemelwe kukuva ubunzima *uKrestu, abuye avuke ekufeni. “Lo Yesu ndimvakalisayo nguKrestu,” wayesitsho uPawulos." 
Acts17:4 Abanye abantu boyisakala, bazimanya noPawulos noSilas. Enjenjalo namaGrike aliqela awayemhlonela uThixo, kwakunye namakhosikazi amaninzi aphambili entlalweni." 
Acts17:5 Kodwa akhathazeka amaJuda, aqokelela amatshijolo ezitalatweni, yaligquba elenza intswahla nesiphithi-phithi edolophini. Lawuhlasela umzi kaJason, liba balapho ooPawulos noSilas, liza kubasa ematyaleni." 
Acts17:6 Kodwa lakungabafumani, larhuqa uJason kunye namanye amakholwa, libasa kubaphathi-dolophu, likhwaza lisithi: “La madoda luqhushululu konke apho ahamba khona; ngoku eze nakule idolophu," 
Acts17:7 yaye uJason uwagcine phaya endlwini yakhe. Ewonke angabaphuli-mthetho *kaKhesare, kuba athi kukho nkosi yimbi inguKrestu Yesu.”" 
Acts17:8 Ngaloo mazwi basitsho isihlwele nabaphathi-dolophu bakhathazeka. 
Acts17:9 Abaphathi-dolophu babahlawulisa imali yesibambiso ooJason nabanye abo ngaphambi kokubakhulula bahambe. 
Acts17:10 Kuthe nje kusandul' ukuhlwa, amakholwa abathumela eBheriya ooPawulos noSilas. Bafika apho, baya *kwindlu yesikhungo yamaJuda." 
Acts17:11 Abantu balapho bona babeneengqondo eziphangaleleyo kunabantu baseTesalonika. Baluphulaphula ngomdla bona udaba, bazifunda mihla le *neziBhalo, befuna ukuqonda ukuba uPawulos unyanisile na." 
Acts17:12 Kwaguquka abantu abaninzi, amadoda kunye namakhosikazi amaGrike akumgangatho ophezulu entlalweni." 
Acts17:13 Kodwa akuva amaJuda aseTesalonika ukuba uPawulos ulishumayela naseBheriya ilizwi likaThixo, aya apho, afika afaka umoya woqhushululu ebantwini." 
Acts17:14 Amakholwa amsa ngaselwandle uPawulos kwangoko. Basala bona ooSilas noTimoti eBheriya. 
Acts17:15 La madoda âhamba noPawulos, ada aya kutsho eAtene. Abuyela eBheriya nomyalelo kaPawulos wokuba ooSilas noTimoti mabakhawuleze baye kuye." 
Acts17:16 Kwathi xa uPawulos wayesalinde uSilas noTimoti eAtene, wafumana umnqa kukubona indlela ezazizininzi ngayo izithixo kuloo dolophu." 
Acts17:17 Waxoxa endlwini yesikhungo namaJuda kunye neentlanga ezazihlonela uThixo. Ngokukwanjalo wayexoxa nabantu ababegqitha-gqitha ebaleni lembutho. 
Acts17:18 Nabathile abaziintanda-bulumko zeqela *lamaEpikure *namaStoyike babencokola naye. Bambi babesithi: “Ngaba lifuna ukuthini eli pholopholo?” abanye besithi: “Ngathi ngunozakuzaku *woothixo basemzini.” Babesitsho ke kuba uPawulos wayeshumayela ngoYesu nangovuko lwabafileyo. 
Acts17:19 Baza ke bamthatha uPawulos, baya naye entlanganisweni, endaweni ekwakusithiwa yiAriyopago, bathi kuye: “Khawutsho! Sifuna ukuyazi le mfundiso intsha uthetha ngayo." 
Acts17:20 Ezinye zezinto esikuva uthetha ngazo ziyasimangalisa, ngoko ke sifuna ukuyazi intsingiselo yazo.”" 
Acts17:21 Kaloku abantu baseAtene nabatyeleli bakhona kwakungekho nto babeyixabise ngaphezu kokuncokola okanye ukuphulaphula iingcamango ezintsha. 
Acts17:22 UPawulos waphakama wema entlanganisweni apho eAriyopago, wathi: “Bantu baseAtene, ndiyaphawula ukuba ningabantu abaluthanda ngokuncamisayo unqulo." 
Acts17:23 Kuthe xa bendihamba-hamba ndibuka iindawo zenu zonqulo, ndabona neqonga lamadini elibhaliweyo kwathiwa: ‘Kongaziwayo uThixo.’ Ngoko ke lowo nina nimnqula ningamazi, mna ndivakalisa yena kuni." 
Acts17:24 UThixo lo udale ihlabathi nezinto ezikulo, uyiNkosi yezulu nomhlaba. Ngoko ke akahlali zindlwini zenziwe ngabantu," 
Acts17:25 engaswele nto ngokokude abantu bazidube ngokumenzela nto. Kuba kaloku nguye ngokwakhe onika ubomi nomphefumlo, nazo zonke iimfuneko zoluntu lonke." 
Acts17:26 Zonke iintlanga zabantu wazidala zaphuma mlibeni mnye, wazenza ukuba ziwume wonke umhlaba. Yena ngokwakhe kwangaphambili wazimisela amaxesha obomi, kunye nemida yokuhlala kwazo." 
Acts17:27 Oku wakwenza ukuze zihlale zimzingela, hleze zimphuthaphuthe de zimfumane; nangona yena uThixo engekude kuthi sonke," 
Acts17:28 kuba kungaye sikho nje, sisuka-suka, siphilile. Kunjengoko zitshoyo ezinye zeembongi zenu ukuthi: ‘Nathi siyinzala yakhe.’" 
Acts17:29 Singabantwana bakhe nje ke, masingacingi ukuba imo kaThixo ifana nento eqingqwe ngegolide, ngesiliva, okanye ngelitye, ngobugcisa bomntu." 
Acts17:30 UThixo wayewayeke ngabom loo maxesha apho abantu babengazi. Kungokunje uyalela abantu bonke, ezindaweni zonke, ukuba baguquke ezindleleni zabo ezimbi." 
Acts17:31 Kaloku uwumisele umhla apho aya kuligweba ihlabathi lonke liphela ngobulungisa, ngeNdoda ayimiseleyo. Le nto uyingqine kubantu bonke ngokuyivusa loo Ndoda ekufeni.”" 
Acts17:32 Bathi bakumva uPawulos ethetha ngovuko lwabafileyo, bahlekisa ngaye. Bambi bathi: “Sisafuna ukuyiva kwakhona le ntetho yakho.”" 
Acts17:33 Waza ke uPawulos wemka apho entlanganisweni. 
Acts17:34 Kambe abanye bazinikela, baza bamlandela. Phakathi kwabo kwakukho uDiyonisi, ilungu leAriyopago, nomfazi ogama linguDamari, kunye nabanye." 
Acts18:1 Emva koko uPawulos wemka eAtene, wabheka eKorinte." 
Acts18:2 Apho wadibana nomJuda ogama linguAkwila, owazalelwa ePonto, ekunye noPrisila umkakhe. Wayesand' ukufika apho, evela eItali, ekubeni *uKhesare Klawudiyo wawagxothayo amaJuda awayeseRoma. Ebandwendwele uPawulos," 
Acts18:3 wahlala kunye nabo, wasebenza kunye nabo, kuba kaloku wayephila ngokwenza iintente njengabo." 
Acts18:4 Yonke imiGqibelo wayedla ngokubamba iingxoxo *endlwini yesikhungo, ezama ukuwanelisa amaJuda kwanamaGrike." 
Acts18:5 Bakufika ooSilas noTimoti, bevela eMakedoni, uPawulos akabanga senza nto yimbi ingekuko ukushumayela iindaba ezimnandi, ewacacisela amaJuda ukuba uYesu unguye uKrestu." 
Acts18:6 Kuthe akumchasa emngcikiva, wavuthulula iimpahla zakhe, ekhalala, esithi: “Ukuba nithe natshabalala, lityala lenu. Mna andinatyala kuloo nto. Ukususela ngoku ndiya ezintlangeni.”" 
Acts18:7 Wabashiya ke waya kuhlala emzini kaTitiyo Yusto intlanga eyayimnqula uThixo. Umzi wakhe wawumelene nendlu yesikhungo. 
Acts18:8 UKrispo, igosa lendlu yesikhungo, wazinikela eNkosini kunye nentsapho yakhe. Kwabhaptizwa nenkitha yabantu eKorinte eyalivayo ilizwi yazinikela eNkosini." 
Acts18:9 Ngabusuku buthile uPawulos waba nombono apho, yathi iNkosi kuye: “Sukoyika, zingisa ukuthetha ungancami," 
Acts18:10 kuba mna ndinawe. Akukho mntu uya kukuchukumisa, kuba baninzi abantu bam kule dolophu.”" 
Acts18:11 UPawulos wahlala apho ke unyaka onesiqingatha, ebafundisa ilizwi likaThixo abantu." 
Acts18:12 Kwathi akuba uGaliyo eyirhuluneli emele amaRoma kwisithili saseAkaya, amaJuda adibana ngoPawulos, amthatha amsa enkundleni, afika athi:" 
Acts18:13 “Le ndoda izama ukuwexula abantu ukuba bakhonze uThixo ngendlela ephambeneyo nomthetho.” 
Acts18:14 Kwathi xa aza kuphendula uPawulos, uGaliyo wabhekisa kumaJuda wathi: “Ukuba ngaba lo mbandela ubuyimpazamo ethile, okanye ityala elibi, bendingade ndiyinyamezele le nto, maJuda." 
Acts18:15 Kodwa ke ngenxa yokuba lo mbandela uphathelele kumazwi, namagama, nomthetho wenu, ziboneleni nina ukuba ningawulungisa njani na. Mna andinakugweba izinto ezinjalo.”" 
Acts18:16 Waza ke wabakhupha apho enkundleni. 
Acts18:17 Bahlasela uSosteno igosa lendlu yesikhungo, bambethela apho phambi kwenkundla. Kodwa yena uGaliyo zange azikhathaze ngaloo nto." 
Acts18:18 UPawulos wahlala apho eKorinte ixesha elide, waza ke wanduluka apho ngesikhephe enoPrisila noAkwila, basinga eSiriya. Wathi xa aseKenkreya wacheba intloko yakhe, kuba wayenze isifungo." 
Acts18:19 Bakufika e-Efese, uPawulos wabashiya ooPrisila noAkwila, waya endlwini yesikhungo, waxoxa khona namaJuda." 
Acts18:20 Babemcela ukuba ahlale nabo ixesha elide, kodwa akavuma." 
Acts18:21 Wasuka wathi xa ahambayo: “Ukuba ngaba kuyintando kaThixo ukuba ndibuye, ndobuya ndibuye.” Waza ke wemka e-Efese." 
Acts18:22 Akufika eKhesariya, wadlula waya kubulisa ibandla, waza ke waya eAntiyokwe." 
Acts18:23 Emva kwethuba elapho wemka, watyhutyha imimandla yaseGalati neyaseFrigi, ehamba ewomeleza onke amakholwa." 
Acts18:24 E-Efese kwafika umJuda, ogama linguApolo, owazalelwa eAlesandriya. Wayeliciko lokuthetha, futhi ezazi ngokucokisekileyo *iziBhalo." 
Acts18:25 Wayeqeqeshiwe ngeNdlela yeNkosi, ngokunjalo wayethetha ngokutshiseka ezifundisa iinyaniso ezingoYesu ngentembeko. Nangona kunjalo wayesazi ubhaptizo lukaYohane kuphela." 
Acts18:26 Wayethetha ngesibindi *endlwini yesikhungo. Bathi ke bakumva ooPrisila noAkwila, bammemela emzini wabo, bamcacisela kakuhle ngokuzeleyo iNdlela yeNkosi." 
Acts18:27 UApolo wagqiba ukuba aye kwelaseAkaya, aza amakholwa ase-Efese amkhuthaza amphathisa neleta emazisayo kumakholwa alapho. Akufika khona waba luncedo olukhulu kwabo babethe ngesisa sikaThixo baguquka," 
Acts18:28 kuba ngenxa yobuciko bakhe wayewoyisa amaJuda ezingxoxweni. Kaloku wayecaphula eziBhalweni, ebonisa ukuba uYesu *unguKrestu." 
Acts19:1 Ngexesha uApolo wayeseKorinte, uPawulos yena wacanda phakathi kuloo mimandla, waya kufika e-Efese. Apho wafumana iqela labalandeli bakaYohane," 
Acts19:2 wababuza wathi: “Namamkela na uMoya oyiNgcwele ukuzinikela kwenu?” Baphendula bathi: “Asizange sive nokuva ukuba kukho uMoya oyiNgcwele.” 
Acts19:3 UPawulos wababuza wathi: “Phofu lubhaptizo luni enabhaptizwa ngalo?” Bona bathi: “Lubhaptizo lukaYohane.” 
Acts19:4 UPawulos wabachazela wathi: “Ubhaptizo lukaYohane lona lwalusalatha inguquko. Yena wayebaxelela abantu ukuba bazinikele kulowo wayesiza emva kwakhe; nguYesu ke lowo.” 
Acts19:5 Bakuyiva le ntetho, babhaptizwa egameni leNkosi uYesu." 
Acts19:6 UPawulos wababeka izandla, batsho bamamkela uMoya oyiNgcwele, baza bathetha iilwimi, belithetha ilizwi likaThixo." 
Acts19:7 Babengamadoda amalunga neshumi elinambini. 
Acts19:8 Ngesithuba seenyanga ezintathu uPawulos wayesiya *endlwini yesikhungo yamaJuda, ethetha, exoxa nabo abantu ngesibindi, ezama ukuboyisela ekulawulweni nguThixo." 
Acts19:9 Kodwa abanye babo baba neenkani, abavuma ukuzinikela, basuka bayingcikiva iNdlela yeNkosi esidlangalaleni. Ngoko ke uPawulos wabashiya, wathatha abalandeli bakaYesu, waza wafundisa imihla ngemihla esikolweni sikaTirano." 
Acts19:10 Le nto ke wayiqhuba isithuba seminyaka emibini, bada bonke abantu ababehlala kwelo phondo laseAsiya, amaJuda kwanamaGrike, baliva ilizwi leNkosi." 
Acts19:11 Amandla kaThixo âbonakala ngezinto ezingaqhelekanga ezazisenziwa nguPawulos. 
Acts19:12 Neetshefu ezi kwaneefaskoti ezichukumise umzimba kaPawulos zazibaphilisa abagulayo, kude kuphume neendimoni." 
Acts19:13 AmaJuda athile awayejikeleza ekhupha iindimoni, nawo akhe azama ukusebenzisa igama leNkosi uYesu. Ayesithi kwiindimoni: “Ndikuyala ngegama likaYesu, lo ushunyayelwa nguPawulos.”" 
Acts19:14 Aba babesenza le nto yayingoonyana abasixhenxe bombingeleli oyintloko womJuda owayenguSkeva igama. 
Acts19:15 Kodwa indimoni yathi kubo: “Ndiyamazi uYesu, noPawulos ndiyamazi; nina ke ningoobani?”" 
Acts19:16 Ke kaloku indoda leyo yayinendimoni yabahlasela yabongamela, ibadlakazelisa kangangokuba baphuma apho kuloo ndlu bagqotsa bengxwelerhekile, neempahla zabo zivukuvuku." 
Acts19:17 Onke amaJuda neentlanga ezazihlala apho e-Efese zasiva esi siganeko, zaza zoyika kakhulu; laza igama leNkosi uYesu lanikwa imbeko ladunyiswa." 
Acts19:18 Amakholwa amaninzi azinikezela, ezivuma ezixela esidlangalaleni izinto azenzileyo." 
Acts19:19 Uninzi lwâbo babesenza imilingo lwaziqokelela lwazitshisela esidlangalaleni iincwadi zalo. Bawabala bawadibanisa amaxabiso ezo ncwadi, bazifumana zikwisithuba samashumi amahlanu amawaka eerandi." 
Acts19:20 Ngamandla eNkosi ilizwi leNkosi lanwenwezela, lakhula, laya lisomelela ngokomelela ngale ndlela." 
Acts19:21 Emva koko uPawulos wazimisela ukucanda kwelaseMakedoni nelaseAkaya, aze agqithele eJerusalem. “Ndakuba ndiyile khona, kufuneka ndiyibone neRoma,” wakha watsho." 
Acts19:22 Ke kaloku wathumela eMakedoni uTimoti noErasto abancedisi bakhe, lo gama athe yena wolula ukuhlala kwiphondo laseAsiya." 
Acts19:23 Kungeli xesha ke apho kwavumbuluka udushe e-Efese ngenxa yeNdlela yeNkosi. 
Acts19:24 UDemetriyo umfo owayebumba imifanekiso yendlu yesithixokazi *uArtemis ngesiliva, wayewenzela ingeniso enkulu ngolu shishino amagcisa aqeshwe nguye." 
Acts19:25 Wenza imbizo ke ekwabakho kuyo abaqeshwa kwakunye nabanye ababesenza umsebenzi okwanjengowakhe, wathi kubo: “Madoda, niyazi ukuba impumelelo yethu ixhomekeke kolu shishino." 
Acts19:26 Niyabona nizivela ngokwenu into eyenziwa yile nkewu uPawulos. Uthi *oothixo abenziwe ngabantu àbangabo konke, yaye uphumelele ekuboyiseni abantu abaninzi jikelele kule Efese, phantse wawugqiba ummandla waseAsiya uphela." 
Acts19:27 Ilapha ke ingozi, kule ndawo yokuba ushishino olu lwethu lufumane igama elibi. Kanti asikokuphela kwaloo nto, ikwakho nale ndawo yokuba nendlu yesithixokazi uArtemis ayiyi kwazelwa nto, ukanti nesidima sesithixokazi saseAsiya – nditsho esinqulwa lihlabathi liphela – siya kuphanza.”" 
Acts19:28 Iwaphulaphule la mazwi indimbane leyo, yakhathazeka kakhulu, yadanduluka yathi: “Mkhulu uArtemis wamaEfese!”" 
Acts19:29 Le ntshukumo yatyhutyha yonke idolophu. Bahlasela uGayo noAristarko baseMakedoni ababehamba kunye noPawulos, babaqweqwedisela kwiqonga lemidlalo." 
Acts19:30 UPawulos wafuna ukungena phakathi kwesihlwele eso, ukuze athethe naso, kodwa amakholwa akamvumelanga." 
Acts19:31 Abathile kumagosa ephondo laseAsiya, ababenobuhlobo noPawulos, nabo bamthumela umyalezo, bemcebisa ukuba angayi phaya eqongeni lemidlalo." 
Acts19:32 Kwangeli xesha ke intlanganiso xa iyonke yayisisiphithi-phithi nje. Kaloku abanye babekhwaza bethetha le, bambi bekhwaza bethetha leya; kuba kaloku uninzi lwaluhamba nje nezihlwele, lungazi nokuba indibano le yeyantoni na." 
Acts19:33 Abanye abantu bamchazela ngale nto yenzekayo uAlesandire, kuba amaJuda ayegqatse yena phambili. UAlesandire wawangawangisa ngesandla ukuba kuthi cwaka, efuna ukulamla." 
Acts19:34 Kodwa bathi bakumqonda ukuba ungumJuda, batsho ngazwinye, besenza intswahla, bekhwaza, bephinda-phinda besithi: “Mkhulu uArtemis wamaEfese!” Kwada kwaphela iiyure ezimbini besenza loo nto." 
Acts19:35 Kwathi ngelikade unobhala wedolophu wada wanako ukusithomalalisa isihlwele. Wathi: “MaEfese, wonke ubani uyazi ukuba le dolophu yase-Efese ngumgcini wendlu yesikhulukazi uArtemis, nowomfanekiso oqingqiweyo owavela ezulwini." 
Acts19:36 Akukho bani unako ukuziphikisa ezi zinto. Ngoko ke zolani, ningenzi nto ngokungakhathali." 
Acts19:37 La madoda nize nawo apha, nangona angebanga zinto zingcwele zendlu yonqulo okanye anyelise isithixokazi sethu." 
Acts19:38 Ukuba uDemetriyo nezicaka zakhe banesityholo ngakubani, ikho imihla eyaziwayo yenkundla, neziphathamandla zikhona; bangamangalelana khona." 
Acts19:39 Kodwa ukuba kukho enye into, inokulungiswa yintlanganiso esemthethweni yabemi." 
Acts19:40 Kaloku ngenxa yale nto yehle namhlanje, sisengozini yokutyholwa ngokwenza ingxushungxushu. Asinandlela yakuziphendulela ngolu dushe, singenaso nesizathu esibambekayo.”" 
Acts19:41 Akuba etshilo, wayichitha intlanganiso." 
Acts20:1 Lwakuba ludambile udushe olo, uPawulos wawahlanganisa amakholwa, wawanika amazwi enkuthazo nawokwahlukana. Waza wasuka apho wasinga kwelaseMakedoni." 
Acts20:2 Watyhutyha loo mimandla, ehamba ethetha amazwi enkuthazo ebantwini. Wafika nakwelamaGrike," 
Acts20:3 apho wahlala iinyanga ezintathu. Wathi xa alungiselela ukuya eSiriya, wabhaqa ukuba amaJuda amenzela iyelenqe, waza wabona ukuba makaphindele emva, acande kwelaseMakedoni." 
Acts20:4 Nâba abâmkhapháyo: uSopatro unyana kaPiro waseBheriya, uAristarko noSekundo baseTesalonika, uGayo waseDerbhe noTimoti, kwanoTikiko noTrofimo baseAsiya." 
Acts20:5 Basandulela baya kusilinda eTrowa. 
Acts20:6 Emva *kweSidlo seZonka ezingenaGwele sanduluka eFilipi ngesikhephe, saza emva kweentsuku ezintlanu sadibana nabo eTrowa, apho sachitha iveki khona." 
Acts20:7 Ngokuhlwa koMgqibelo sahlanganisana kwisidlo sobudlelwana. UPawulos wathetha nabo abantu, wolula kwada kwaphakathi kobusuku, kuba kaloku wayeza kuhamba ngomhla olandelayo." 
Acts20:8 Intlanganiso leyo yayisegumbini eliphezulu apho kwakukho izibane ezininzi. 
Acts20:9 Umfana ogama linguYutiko wayehleli efestileni, wada wozela walala, kuba uPawulos engayeki ukuthetha. Wothuleka apho kumngangatho wesithathu, waya kuwa emhlabeni, bamchola apho efile." 
Acts20:10 UPawulos wehla waya kuye, wafika waziphosa phezu kwakhe, wamgona, wathi: “Sanukothuka, kuba akafanga, uhleli!”" 
Acts20:11 Waza ke uPawulos wenyuka waya egumbini eliphezulu, wafika wathatha isonka watya. UPawulos wathetha nabo kwada kwaphuma ilanga, waza ke wemka." 
Acts20:12 Umfana lowo bagoduka naye ephilile, nabo bethuthuzelekile." 
Acts20:13 Thina sahlabela mgama, sihamba ngenqanawa, saya kutsho eAso, apho sasiza kuthatha uPawulos khona, kuba lo yayingumyalelo wakhe, njengoko yena wayehamba emhlabeni." 
Acts20:14 Wathi akudibana nathi eAso, sahamba naye saya kufika eMitilene." 
Acts20:15 Sasuka apho, saya kudlula malunga neKiyo ngosuku olulandelayo. Kwakhona ngemini elandelayo safika eSamo, saza ngengomso saya kufika eMileto." 
Acts20:16 UPawulos wayegqibe ukuba angagqithi e-Efese, ukuze angachithi xesha kwiphondo laseAsiya. Wayengxamele ukuba usuku *lwePentekoste lumfikele eseJerusalem xa kunokwenzeka." 
Acts20:17 Sathi xa siseMileto, uPawulos wathumela e-Efese, ukuba abadala bebandla baye kuye." 
Acts20:18 Bakufika wathi kubo: “Nina ngokwenu niyayazi kakuhle indlela endahlala nani ngayo, ukusuka kwimini yokuqala endathi ndafika ngayo kweli phondo laseAsiya." 
Acts20:19 Njengesicaka seNkosi, umsebenzi wam ndawenza ngentobeko ndisezinyembezini, nakumaxesha anzima ândifikeláyo ngenxa yamayelenqe amaJuda." 
Acts20:20 Niyazi ukuba andinifihlelanga nto ebinokuba luncedo kuni, xa bendishumayela ndinifundisa esidlangalaleni nasemakhayeni enu." 
Acts20:21 KumaJuda nasezintlangeni ndazingisa ukubalumkisa abantu ukuba baguqukele kuThixo beyivuma iNkosi yethu uYesu. 
Acts20:22 Ngoku ke ngokuthundezwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele ndiya eJerusalem, ndingayazi into eya kundihlela khona." 
Acts20:23 Ndazi nto-nye, le yokuba kuzo zonke iidolophu uMoya oyiNgcwele undilumkisile ukuba ndilindelwe yintolongo neenkxwaleko." 
Acts20:24 Kodwa kum ukuphila akubalulekanga ngaphezu kokuba ndilufeze ubizo lwam, ndiwugqibe umsebenzi endawunikwa yiNkosi wokuvakalisa iindaba ezimnandi zesisa sikaThixo." 
Acts20:25 “Ndijikelezile phakathi kwenu, ndivakalisa ngolawulo lukaThixo kuni. Ibe ngoku ndazi kakuhle ukuba akukho bani kuni uya kuphinda andibone."
