Acts20:26 Ngokunjalo ndingqina ndiqinisekile ngayo le mini ukuba xa kuthe kwakho umntu olahlekayo apha kuni, ndimsulwa mna," 
Acts20:27 kuba andizange ndifihle nto – ndalivakalisa njengoko linjalo icebo likaThixo kuni. 
Acts20:28 Zilumkeleni nina ngokwenu, niwulumkele nawo umhlambi athe uMoya oyiNgcwele wanibeka phezu kwawo. Yibani ngabelúsi bebandla likaThixo, athe walizuza ngegazi lowakhe uNyana." 
Acts20:29 Kuba ndiyazi ukuba ndakumka, kuya kuvela kwalapha kuni iingcuka eziqwengayo, ezingayi kuba nanceba ngomhlambi lo." 
Acts20:30 Kwalapha kuni kuya kubakho amadoda agqwetha inyaniso, enenjongo yokuwalahlekisa amakholwa." 
Acts20:31 Lumkani ngoko, nikhumbule ukuba imini nobusuku ndaniluleka nonke ngabanye, ndisezinyembezini, ithuba leminyaka emithathu." 
Acts20:32 “Ngoko ke ndiyambongoza uThixo ukuba makanikhusele. Uya kunakha ngodaba lwesisa sakhe, olunamandla okunenza nilixhamle ilifa kunye nabo bonke abantu bakhe." 
Acts20:33 Andizange ndinqwenele mali nampahla yamntu. 
Acts20:34 Kaloku nazi mhlophe ukuba ndasebenza ngezi zandla zam, ndizixhasa kuzo zonke iintswelo zam kwanezamahlakani am." 
Acts20:35 Ndinibonisile ngeendlela zonke ukuba sifanele ukusebenza nzima, ukuze sincede nabo bahluphekileyo, siwakhumbula amazwi eNkosi athi: ‘Kuluyolo ukupha ngaphezu kokuphiwa.’ ”" 
Acts20:36 Akuwagqiba la mazwi uPawulos, waguqa nabo bonke, wathandaza." 
Acts20:37 Bathi besithi ndlela-ntle kuye, baye bengenakuzibamba bengqukruleka. Babemgona ngokwesiko labo." 
Acts20:38 Babehlatyaniselwe ngokukodwa ngamazwi awawathetháyo esithi abayi kuphinda bambone. Baza ke bamkhapha, baya naye enqanaweni." 
Acts21:1 Sakwahlukana nabo, sangena enqanaweni, sahamba ngqo sada saya kufika eKos. Ngengomso sagaleleka eRodo, sasuka saya kutsho ePatara." 
Acts21:2 Safumana inqanawa apho eyayisiya eFenike, saza sangena kuyo, sahamba ngayo." 
Acts21:3 Sayithi ntlaa, sayishiya ngasekhohlo iSipro, sijonge eSiriya. Sehla enqanaweni eTire. Kaloku kwakulapho yayiza kothulwa khona umthwalo." 
Acts21:4 Safika kukho amakholwa apho, saya kuhlala nawo iveki yonke. Ngokutyhilelwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele athi uPawulos makangayi eJerusalem." 
Acts21:5 Kodwa lakufika ixesha lokumka, sayihamba indlela yethu. Basikhapha sada sangaphandle kwedolophu, bekunye nabafazi kwanabantwana babo. Saguqa elunxwemeni apho, sathandaza." 
Acts21:6 Sahlukana ke, thina sangena enqanaweni, bona bagoduka." 
Acts21:7 Ukusuka kwethu eTire, sahamba sada saya kufika eTolimayi. Apho sadibana namakholwa, sahlala nawo imini yonke." 
Acts21:8 Kwakusa salishiya elo, saya kungena eKhesariya. Apho safikela emzini womvakalisi weendaba ezimnandi uFilipu, omnye walaa madoda asixhenxe awanyulwa eJerusalem." 
Acts21:9 Wayeneentombi ezine ezingendanga ezaziluvakalisa udaba lweNkosi. 
Acts21:10 Kuthe sekuntsuku silapho, kwafika umvakalisi-daba onguAgabho, evela kwaJuda." 
Acts21:11 Ufike wathatha ibhanti kaPawulos, wazibopha ngayo iinyawo nezandla, wathi: “Uthi uMoya oyiNgcwele: ‘Umnini wale bhanti uya kubotshwa enjiwenje ngamaJuda eJerusalem, yaye aya kumnikela ezintlangeni.’ ”" 
Acts21:12 Sakuyiva le nto, samcenga uPawulos, sikunye namakholwa alapho, ukuba angayi eJerusalem." 
Acts21:13 Kodwa wathi ukuphendula: “Nenza ntoni, nifuna ukundityhafisa nje ngezi nyembezi zenu? Andilungelanga kubotshwa kuphela eJerusalem; kwanokufa oku ndikulungele ngenxa yeNkosi uYesu.”" 
Acts21:14 Sancama ke, kuba singabanga nakumoyisa, sathi: “Makwenzeke ukuthanda kweNkosi.”" 
Acts21:15 Emva kwexesha silapho salungiselela ukuya eJerusalem. 
Acts21:16 Abanye babalandeli bakaYesu baseKhesariya bahamba nathi, basisa endlwini yendoda egama linguMnaso, esathi sahlala nayo. Loo ndoda yayingumfo waseSipro, ilikholwa elaguquka kwimihla yangaphambili." 
Acts21:17 Ekufikeni kwethu eJerusalem, amakholwa asamkela ngezandla ezishushu." 
Acts21:18 Ngengomso sahamba noPawulos, saya kubona uYakobi. Nabo bonke abadala bebandla babekhona." 
Acts21:19 Ebabulisile uPawulos, wabanika ingxelo epheleleyo ngezinto zonke uThixo awayezenzile ngaye phakathi kweentlanga." 
Acts21:20 Bathi bakuziva, bamdumisa uThixo xa bebonke. Baza bacebisa bathi kuPawulos: “Mfondini, nawe uyazibonela ngokwakho ukuba apha kukho amawaka-waka amaJuda aguqukileyo angamakholwa, kodwa asabambelele *emthethweni kaMosis." 
Acts21:21 Evile ke ngawe ukuba wena ufundisa onke amaJuda ahlala kumazwe eentlanga, ukuba awulahle umthetho kaMosis. Futhi kuthiwa wena uthi makangabolùsi abantwana bawo, bangawalandeli namasiko esiJuda." 
Acts21:22 Kunjalonje aza kuva ukuba ufikile. Uthi kungenziwa ntoni? 
Acts21:23 Phulaphula ke, sikucebise! Apha kukho amadoda amane azibophe ngesifungo." 
Acts21:24 Ngoko ke wena zibandakanye nawo, ungene *ekuhlanjululweni, uze uwahlawulele iindleko zawo, abe nako ukuzicheba iintloko zawo. Ngale ndlela ke wonke umntu uya kuqonda ukuba bubuxoki yonke le nto bayivileyo ngawe – ndaweni yaloo nto wena ngokwakho usawugcinile umthetho kaMosis." 
Acts21:25 Kodwa zona iintlanga ezingamakholwa sasizibhalele ileta ngokwesigqibo sethu, sibayala ukuba bangakutyi ukutya kwedini, nanyama inegazi, nasilwanyana sikrwitshiweyo, futhi bazikhwebule ekurheletyeni.”" 
Acts21:26 Ke kaloku uPawulos wahlangana nawo loo madoda, waza ngengomso walenza kunye nawo isiko lokuhlanjululwa. Waza ke waya endlwini kaThixo ukuya kwenza amalungiselelo alo mcimbi, ngokukodwa malunga nomnikelo owawuya kufuneka ekupheleni kwexesha lentlambululo." 
Acts21:27 Xa zaziza kuphela iintsuku ezisixhenxe *zentlambululo, amaJuda athile ephondo laseAsiya ambona uPawulos *esendlwini kaThixo. Avusa uqhushululu ebantwini, ambamba uPawulos," 
Acts21:28 akhwaza esithi: “MaSirayeli, yizani! Nantsi le ndoda ihamba ithetha kakubi ngamaSirayeli, *ngomthetho kaMosis, nangendlu kaThixo, kumntu wonke. Ngoku ize kungcolisa le ndawo ingcwele ngokungenisa iintlanga kuyo.”" 
Acts21:29 Babesitsho kuba babekhe bambona kaloku uTrofimo wase-Efese edolophini apho, ekunye noPawulos; ngoku ke babeba uPawulos umzise endlwini kaThixo." 
Acts21:30 Yaba ludushe ke kuyo yonke idolophu; basuka indulumbane bonke abantu, bambamba uPawulos, bamqweqwedisela ngaphandle kwendlu kaThixo. Kwangoko bazivala iingcango." 
Acts21:31 Babeza kumbulala uPawulos ukuba kwakungafikanga lizwi kwingqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi wamaRoma, liyixelela ngodushe oluseJerusalem." 
Acts21:32 Kwangoko ingqwayi-ngqwayi yesuka kunye namagosa ayo, neqela lamajoni, yasukela apho kolo dushe. Bakuyibona isiza namajoni, bayeka ukumbetha uPawulos abantu." 
Acts21:33 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yaya kuPawulos, yambamba, yayalela nokuba akhonkxwe ngamatyathanga amabini. Yaza ke yabuza isithi: “Ngubani lo mntu? Wenze ntoni?”" 
Acts21:34 Loo ndimbane yaphendula, abanye bethetha le, abanye bethetha leya. Kwakuphithizela kangangokuba ingqwayi-ngqwayi ayizange ikuqonde ncam okwakwenzekile, yaza ke yayalela ukuba uPawulos asiwe enqabeni yamajoni." 
Acts21:35 Baya kufika naye ezitepsini, kwanyanzeleka ukuba amthwale apho amajoni, ngenxa yesiphithi-phithi sabantu." 
Acts21:36 Bonke babemlandela bekhwaza besithi: “Bulala!” 
Acts21:37 Xa babeza kungena enqabeni, wathi uPawulos kwingqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi: “Ndingákhe ndithethe nawe?” Ingqwayi-ngqwayi ithe: “Kanti uyasazi isiGrike?" 
Acts21:38 Kuthe kanti akunguye laa mJiputa wakha wadala uqhushululu apha, wakhokelela endle amawaka amane abarhubuluzi bexhobile?”" 
Acts21:39 Uphendule wathi uPawulos: “Mna ndingumJuda; ndazalelwa eTarso kwelaseKiliki. Ndingummi wedolophu ebalulekileyo. Ndivumele ndikhe ndibhekise ilizwi kwaba bantu.” 
Acts21:40 Yamvumela ingqwayi-ngqwayi, waza ke uPawulos emi ezitepsini wawangawangisa ngesandla ukuba bathi cwaka abantu, wadanduluka ngesiHebhere esithi:" 
Acts22:1 “Mawethu, nani bobawo, khanindiphulaphule xa ndiziphendulelayo.”" 
Acts22:2 Bathi bakumva ukuba uthetha ngesiHebhere, bathi cwaka. Waza waqhuba wathi uPawulos:" 
Acts22:3 “Mna ndingumJuda, ndazalelwa eTarso kwelaseKiliki, kodwa ndakhulela apha eJerusalem, ndingumfundi kaGamaliyeli. Ndafumana ingqeqesho ecokisekileyo kumthetho wookhokho bethu; futhi ndandizinikele kuThixo, ndinjengokuba ninjalo nani namhlanje." 
Acts22:4 Ndandibatshutshis' ukufa abantu abalandela le Ndlela. Ndandiwabamba amadoda kwanabafazi, ndibafake entolongweni." 
Acts22:5 Umbingeleli omkhulu *neBhunga xa lilonke bangangqina ukuba ndithetha inyaniso xa nditshoyo. Ndandithatha iincwadi kubo, zibhalelwe amaJuda aseDamasko, ndize mna ndihambe ndiye kubamba abantu, ndibabuyise bekhonkxiwe, ndibazise eJerusalem, ukuze bohlwaywe.”" 
Acts22:6 “Ndathi xa ndandihamba ndisondela eDamasko, emini emaqanda, ndabona ukukhanya okuqaqambileyo esibhakabhakeni kundibengezelela ngeenxa zonke." 
Acts22:7 Ndawa emhlabeni, ndaza ndeva ilizwi lisithi: ‘Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshisela ntoni na?’" 
Acts22:8 Ndabuza ndathi: ‘Ungubani wena, Nkosi?’ Laphendula lathi: ‘NdinguYesu waseNazarete, lo umtshutshisayo.’" 
Acts22:9 Amadoda endandihamba nawo akubona okunene ukukhanya, kodwa akazange ayive into ethethwa ngulowo wayethetha nam." 
Acts22:10 Ndabuza ndathi: ‘Ndingenza ntoni, Nkosi?’ Yaza yathi iNkosi kum: ‘Vuka, uye eDamasko; woyixelelwa khona apho into yonke akumisele ukuba uyenze uThixo.’" 
Acts22:11 Ukubengezela kokukhanya oko ndakubonayo kwanditsho ndayimfama, baza abo babendiphahlile bandibamba ngesandla, bandikhokelela eDamasko." 
Acts22:12 “Apho ke kwakukho indoda ethile egama linguHananiya. Yayiyindoda ewuzondeleleyo iwuthobele *umthetho, ihlonelwa kakhulu ngawo onke amaJuda aseDamasko." 
Acts22:13 Yeza yafika yema ecaleni kwam, yathi: ‘Sawule, mfondini, buya ubone.’ Kanye ngaloo mzuzu avuleka amehlo am, ndaza ndabona." 
Acts22:14 Wathi: ‘UThixo wookhokho bethu ukukhethele ukuba ukwazi ukuthanda kwakhe, ukuze usibone isiCaka sakhe esililungisa, uve ilizwi lakhe lithetha nawe," 
Acts22:15 kuba uya kuba lingqina lakhe, wazise bonke abantu izinto ozibonileyo nozivileyo." 
Acts22:16 Ngoku ke usalindele ntoni? Vuka, ubhaptizwe, zixolelwe izono zakho ngokubiza igama lakhe.’ ”" 
Acts22:17 “Ndaphindela kwaseJerusalem, apho ndathi *ndisendlwini kaThixo ndithandaza, ndaba nombono." 
Acts22:18 Ndabona iNkosi isithi kum: ‘Khawuleza umke eJerusalem, kuba abantu balapha abayi kubamkela ubungqina bakho ngam.’" 
Acts22:19 Ndathi ke mna: ‘Nkosi, bazi kakuhle ukuba ndandifika ndibabambe abo bazinikele kuwe, ndibabethele apho *ezindlwini zesikhungo." 
Acts22:20 Kanti nangamhla kwakubulawa uStefano, ingqina lakho, nam ndandikho. Ndandihambisana nokugwintwa kwakhe, neempahla zababemgebenga zigcinwe ndim lo.’" 
Acts22:21 Yathi kum iNkosi: ‘Hamba, kuba ndiza kukuthuma kude kweleentlanga.’ ”" 
Acts22:22 Babemphulaphule abantu uPawulos, kwada kwaza kutsho kule ndawo; basuka ke batsho ngentswahla besithi: “Msuse! Bulala loo nto!”" 
Acts22:23 Kwakuthe nzwii yingxolo, bejiwuzisa iimpahla zabo, kuqhuma uthuli." 
Acts22:24 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yomkhosi wamajoni amaRoma yathi uPawulos makangeniswe enqabeni yawo, akatswe, kuncinwe unobangela wento amxhibe ngayo amaJuda, ukuze angxole kangaka." 
Acts22:25 Kuthe sebembophelele, beza kumkatsa, uPawulos wabhekisa kumphathi-butho owayemi apho, wathi: “Khawutsho, kusemthethweni ukuba ungámbetha ummi ongumRoma engakhanga afunyanwe enetyala?”" 
Acts22:26 Umphathi-butho akuyiva le nto, waya kwingqwayi-ngqwayi, wathi: “Uza kuthini ke? Lo mfo ngummi ongumRoma.”" 
Acts22:27 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi ke yaya kuPawulos, yathi: “Khawutsho: ungummi ongumRoma wena?” Wavuma uPawulos." 
Acts22:28 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yaqhuba isithi: “Ndahlawula imali eninzi ukuze ndibe ngummi ongumRoma.” UPawulos wathi ukuphendula: “Kodwa ke mna ndinguye ngokuzalwa.” 
Acts22:29 Kwangoko loo madoda ayeza kumncina uPawulos arhoxa, ingqwayi-ngqwayi yoyika yakuqonda ukuba uPawulos wayengummi ongumRoma, imkhonkxe ngamatyathanga nje." 
Acts22:30 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yafuna ukuqiniseka ngetyala awayemmangalela ngalo amaJuda uPawulos. Ithe ke ngengomso makakhululwe amatyathanga uPawulos, kubizwe ababingeleli abaziintloko kunye *neBhunga xa lilonke. Yaza ke yeza kummisa phambi kwentlanganiso uPawulos." 
Acts23:1 UPawulos wawajonga ntsho amalungu eBhunga, wathi: “Mawethu, kude kuze kuba yile mininje andinasazela nganto ngobomi bam bonke phambi koThixo.”" 
Acts23:2 Akutsho, umbingeleli omkhulu uHananiya wayalela ukuba uPawulos ampakazwe emlonyeni ngabo babekufuphi naye." 
Acts23:3 Waphendula uPawulos wathi: “UThixo uya kukubetha, ludongandini luvetiweyo; uchophele ukundigweba ngokomthetho, kodwa kwawena uyawaphula umthetho, uthi mandibethwe!”" 
Acts23:4 Amadoda awayekufuphi noPawulos athi kuye: “Ngumbingeleli omkhulu kaThixo lo umthukayo!” 
Acts23:5 UPawulos wathi: “Hayi, mawethu, bendingamazi ukuba ungumbingeleli omkhulu. Kaloku *iziBhalo zithi: ‘Ungàthethi kakubi ngomlawuli wabantu bakho.’”" 
Acts23:6 Akuqonda uPawulos ukuba kweli qela kukho *abaSadusi kwakunye *nabaFarasi, wabhekisa eBhungeni apho, wathi: “Mawethu, mna ndingumFarasi ongunyana womFarasi. Ndisematyaleni nje kungenxa yokuba ndinethemba lokuba abafileyo baya kuvuka.”" 
Acts23:7 Akutsho abaFarasi nabaSadusi baxabana bodwa, baza bahlukana kubini." 
Acts23:8 Kaloku bona abaSadusi bathi abantu abayi kuvuka ekufeni, bakwathi akukho zithunywa zezulu, akukho namimoya, kodwa abaFarasi bona bayakholelewa kwezi zinto zontathu." 
Acts23:9 Kwathi ke kwakuba njalo, kwaxokozela, abanye babachazi-mthetho beqela labaFarasi baphakama bekhalaza besithi: “Thina asifumani nto ingalunganga kule ndoda! Mhlawumbi ngenene umoya othile okanye isithunywa sezulu sithethile nayo.”" 
Acts23:10 Ingxoxo leyo yakhula kangangokuba ingqwayi-ngqwayi yaba sexhaleni lokuba uPawulos bosuka bamthi qwenge-qwenge. Ngoko ke yayalela ukuba amajoni amthathe uPawulos apho entlanganisweni, aye naye enqabeni yomkhosi." 
Acts23:11 Ngobo busuku iNkosi yema ngakuPawulos, yathi: “Qina! Njengokuba undingqine apha eJerusalem nje, kufuneka wenze kwaloo nto naseRoma.”" 
Acts23:12 Ngentsasa elandelayo amaJuda adibana enza iyelenqe. Azibopha ngesifungo sokuba angatyi angaseli engambulalanga uPawulos. 
Acts23:13 Ayengaphezu kwamashumi amane kweli yelenqe. 
Acts23:14 Aza ke aya kubabingeleli abaziintloko nakubadala athi: “Sizibophe ngesifungo, saye sizimisele ukuba singafaki nto phantsi kwempumlo singekambulali uPawulos." 
Acts23:15 Nina ke *neBhunga thumelani kumphathi-mkhosi wamaRoma ukuba azise uPawulos kuni, nenze ngathi nisafuna ukuncina inyaniso ngaye. Thina ke soba sesilungile, simhlasele simbulale engekafiki kuni.”" 
Acts23:16 Kodwa weva ngeli yelenqe unyana wodade boPawulos, waza ke waya kungena enqabeni yamajoni, wamxelela ngalo uPawulos." 
Acts23:17 UPawulos ubize umphathi-butho, wathi kuye: “Yisa lo mfana kwingqwayi-ngqwayi. Kukho into afuna ukuyixelela yona.”" 
Acts23:18 Umphathi-butho wamthatha wamsa kwingqwayi-ngqwayi, wafika wathi: “Ndibizwe ngumbanjwa uPawulos, wathi mandize nalo mfana kuwe, kuba kukho into aza kukuxelela yona.”" 
Acts23:19 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi imbambe ngesandla umfana lowo, yamtsalela bucala, yambuza isithi: “Uze kundixelela ntoni?”" 
Acts23:20 Uthe umfana: “Iziphathamandla zamaJuda zivumelene ukuba zikucele ngomso, ukhe uthumele uPawulos eBhungeni, zisenza ngathi kukho indawo ebalulekileyo elifuna ukuyiqonda kuye iBhunga." 
Acts23:21 Kodwa uze ungavumi ukuyiva loo nto, ngoba kukho amadoda angaphezu kwamashumi amane alalele uPawulos endleleni. Afungile ukuba akayi kutya, engayi kusela, ade ambulale. Nangoku selelungile, elindele ukuba uvume.”" 
Acts23:22 Ithe ingqwayi-ngqwayi: “Uzungayithethi mntwini into yokuba undixelele ngeli yelenqe.” Yaza yamndulula umfana lowo. 
Acts23:23 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi ithe yabiza abaphathi-mabutho bayo ababini, yathi kubo: “Lungiselelani ukuya eKhesariya ngokuhlwanje ngentsimbi yethoba. Ze nihambe namakhulu amabini amajoni kunye namashumi asixhenxe amajoni akhwele amahashe, kwakunye namakhulu amabini amajoni aphatha iintshuntshe." 
Acts23:24 Nithathe namahashe okukhwela, uPawulos nimse kuFelekis irhuluneli engenzakalanga.”" 
Acts23:25 Ingqwayi-ngqwayi yabhala ileta, yenjenje:" 
Acts23:26 “UKlawudiyo Lisiya ubulisa ohloniphekileyo uFelekis irhuluneli. 
Acts23:27 Le ndoda âyibamba amaJuda eza kuyibulala. Ndivile ukuba ingummi ongumRoma, ndaya kuyihlangula ngamajoni." 
Acts23:28 Ndithe ke ngokufuna ukuqonda isityholo abayibeka sona, ndayisa *eBhungeni lawo." 
Acts23:29 Apho ke kuye kwacaca ukuba ayenzanga tyala lokuba ingagwetyelwa ukufa, nokuba mayivalelwe entolongweni. Isityholo ebekwa sona siphathelele kwimpikiswano ngomthetho wabo." 
Acts23:30 Ndithe ke ndakuva ukuba kukho amaJuda azungula ukuyibulala, ndagqiba ukuba ndiyithumele kuwe. Abamangali nabo ndibaxelele ukuba beze kuyimangalela kuwe.”" 
Acts23:31 Amajoni enza njengoko ayeyalelwe. Amthatha uPawulos kwangobo busuku, aya kufika naye eAntipatri." 
Acts23:32 Ngengomso ahamba ngeenyawo abuyela eJerusalem, aza awamahashe ahamba naye." 
Acts23:33 Aya kufika naye eKhesariya, ayinika irhuluneli ileta leyo, amnikezela kuyo noPawulos." 
Acts23:34 Iyifundile ileta irhuluneli, yambuza uPawulos ukuba wayengowaliphi na iphondo. Yakuva ukuba wayengowaseKiliki" 
Acts23:35 yathi: “Ityala lakho liya kuthethwa kwakufika abamangali.” Yathi uPawulos makagcinwe ebhotwe likaHerode. 
Acts24:1 Emva kweentsuku ezintlanu umbingeleli omkhulu uHananiya waya eKhesariya, ekunye nabadala abathile noTertulo igqwetha. Bavela phambi kwerhuluneli bemmangalela uPawulos." 
Acts24:2 Weziswa uPawulos, waza uTertulo wammangalela wenjenje: “Felekis, mhlekazi ohloniphekileyo, ukulawula kwakho ngobulumko kuze nethuba elide loxolo. Nezinye izinto eziyimfuneko zenkqubela siyazibona zisenzeka kweli lizwe lethu." 
Acts24:3 Ngamaxesha onke siyazamkela ezi zinto, futhi sinongazenzisiyo umbulelo kuwe." 
Acts24:4 Andifuni ukulidla ixesha lakho, ngoko ke ndicela ukuba usiphulaphule ngobulali esi simangalo." 
Acts24:5 Lo mfo simfumene engumdodobalisi oyingozi. Uhamba ephemba udushe phakathi kwamaJuda kulo lonke elimiweyo; futhi uyinkokheli yegqiza lamaNazarete. 
Acts24:6 Samfumana ezama ukunyelisa *indlu kaThixo, saza sambamba. [Sasifuna ukumgweba ngokomthetho wethu," 
Acts24:7 kodwa kwafika umphathi-mkhosi uLisiya wamhlutha kakubi. 
Acts24:8 ULisiya wayalela ukuba aze kumangalelwa kuwe.] Nawe ngokwakho ekumvavanyeni kwakho uya kuziqonda uziva ngaye ezi zinto simmangalela ngazo.” 
Acts24:9 NamaJuda asingqina esi simangalo ukuba siyinyaniso. 
Acts24:10 Irhuluneli yanqwala kuPawulos ukuba athethe, waza wathi: “Ndiyazi ukuba uneminyaka emininzi ugweba kwesi sizwe; yiyo loo nto ndivuyayo kuba ndiziphendulela phambi kwakho." 
Acts24:11 Nawe unokuyiqonda into yokuba azingaphezu kweshumi elinambini iintsuku ndayayo eJerusalem ndiye kunqula. 
Acts24:12 AmaJuda akandifumananga ndixoxa namntu *endlwini kaThixo, engandifumananga ndiphembelela dushe bantwini *ezindlwini zesikhungo, okanye naphi na apho edolophini." 
Acts24:13 Futhi akanabo ubungqina obuphathekayo malunga nezi zinto andityhola ngazo ngoku. 
Acts24:14 Le yona into ndiyayivuma: Ndikhonza uThixo wookhokho bethu ngokulandela iNdlela le athi wona ayikho mgaqweni. Ndikholwa zizo zonke izinto ezibhaliweyo encwadini *yomthetho kaMosis nasezincwadini *zabashumayeli. 
Acts24:15 Ndibambelele ethembeni elinye nabo abamangali, eli lokuba bonke abantu, abalungileyo nabangalunganga, baya kuvuka ekufeni." 
Acts24:16 Ndibe ke ndizama kangangoko ndinako ukuba ndihlale ndingenasazela nganto phambi koThixo naphambi kwabantu. 
Acts24:17 “Ndakha ndangabikho iminyaka emininzi eJerusalem, ndaza emva koko ndaya khona ndisisela abantu bakowethu imali, futhi ndisiya kwenza amadini." 
Acts24:18 Ndandisendlwini kaThixo apho ke, ukundifikela kwawo amaJuda ekubeni sendigqibe ukwenza *intlambululo. Ndandingekho esiphithi-phithini, futhi kungekho naqhushululu olo." 
Acts24:19 Ayekhona amaJuda athile ephondo laseAsiya; ebefanele ukuba alapha phambi kwakho andimangalele ngokwawo, xa enendawo ngakum." 
Acts24:20 Okanye khawutsho kula madoda axele ukuba andifumana ndinatyala lini na ngokuya ndandimi phambi kweBhunga. 
Acts24:21 Into inye endakhala ngayo naphambi kwawo, ndathi: ‘Ndigwetywa nje namhlanje, kungenxa yokukholelwa ukuba abafileyo baya kuvuka.’ ”" 
Acts24:22 Waza ke uFelekis owayeyazi kakuhle iNdlela le, walimisa ityala, wathi: “Ndiya kuligweba ityala lakho akufika umphathi-mkhosi uLisiya.”" 
Acts24:23 Wayalela umphathi-butho owayegada uPawulos ukuba amgcine, kodwa angabi ngqongqo, azivumele izihlobo zakhe zimlungiselele." 
Acts24:24 Kwakudlula iintsuku uFelekis wafika noDrusila umkakhe, umJudakazi. Wambiza uPawulos, waza wamphulaphula ethetha ngokholo kuKrestu Yesu." 
Acts24:25 Kodwa wahambisa uPawulos echaza ngokuziphatha kakuhle, ukuzeyisa, nangomhla womgwebo, uFelekis watsho woyika wathi: “Ungakhe umke ngoku; ndiya kuphinda ndikubize xa ndinethuba.”" 
Acts24:26 Wayenethemba lokuba mhlawumbi angahle anyotywe nguPawulos; kungesi sizathu ke wayesoloko emana ukumbiza ancokole naye. 
Acts24:27 Emva kweminyaka emibini uPorkiyo Festo waba yirhuluneli endaweni kaFelekis. Ngenxa yokuba uFelekis wayefuna ukuzenza mhle kumaJuda, wamshiya entolongweni apho uPawulos." 
Acts25:1 Akuba ntsuku-ntathu efikile kwelo phondo uFesto, wesuka eKhesariya, wahambela eJerusalem." 
Acts25:2 Ababingeleli abaziintloko nabakhokeli bamaJuda, bezisa izityholo kuye ngoPawulos. Bamcenga uFesto" 
Acts25:3 ukuba ancede amse eJerusalem uPawulos, kuba babefuna ukumlalela endleleni, bamgwinte." 
Acts25:4 Wathi uFesto kubo: “UPawulos uselugcinweni entolongweni eKhesariya. Ndibe nam ngokwam ndiza kuya khona kwakamsinyane. 
Acts25:5 Iinkokheli zenu ze zihambe nam ukuya eKhesariya, ziye kummangalela khona, ukuba ngaba kukho ityala alenzileyo.”" 
Acts25:6 Akuba echithe malunga nesibhozo ukuya eshumini leentsuku phakathi kwabo uFesto, wabuyela eKhesariya. Ngengomso xa wayechophele amatyala, uthe makabizwe uPawulos." 
Acts25:7 Akufika ke uPawulos, amaJuda awayevela eJerusalem athi emngqongile ambeka izityholo ezinzima, kodwa zazingenabunyaniso xa zizonke." 
Acts25:8 UPawulos yena waziphendulela wathi: “Akukho nanye into endiyenzileyo echasene nomthetho wamaJuda, okanye *indlu kaThixo, okanye *uKhesare.”" 
Acts25:9 Ezama ukuzenza mhle kumaJuda, uFesto wathi kuPawulos: “Ungathanda ukuya eJerusalem ukuze ndilichophele khona ityala lakho ngezi zityholo?”" 
Acts25:10 Waphendula uPawulos wathi: “Apha ndimi enkundleni kaKhesare, kanye apho limelwe kukuthethwa khona ityala lam. Akukho nto ndiwone ngayo amaJuda, njengoko nawe ngokwakho uqonda." 
Acts25:11 Ke ukuba umthetho ndiwaphule ndona kangangokuba ndimelwe kukugwetyelwa ukufa, andinqweneli kuyibaleka nayo loo ndawo. Kodwa ke ukuba azinabunyaniso izityholo endibekwa zona, akukho bani unokundinikezela kumaJuda. Ndibhenela kuKhesare.”" 
Acts25:12 UFesto ukhe wadlana indlebe namaphakathi akhe, wandul' ukuthi kuPawulos: “Ubhenela kuKhesare; kulungile ke, uza kuya kuKhesare.”" 
Acts25:13 Ekuhambeni kwexesha ukumkani uAgripa nowakwakhe uBhernike baya eKhesariya, beye kuvuyisana noFesto ngokufika kwakhe." 
Acts25:14 Emva kweentsuku bekhona uFesto wachazela ukumkani ngemeko kaPawulos, esithi: “Apha kukho indoda eyashiywa ingumbanjwa nguFelekis." 
Acts25:15 Ndithe xa bendiseJerusalem, ababingeleli abaziintloko bamaJuda nabadala bazisa kum izityholo ngale ndoda ukuba ndiyigwebe." 
Acts25:16 Kodwa ndabaxelela ukuba inkqubo yamaRoma ayivumi ukuba umntu agwetywe engakhange ajongane nabamangaleli bakhe aziphendulele. 
Acts25:17 Bathe ke bakuza apha andachitha xesha, ndathi ngengomso ndalichophela ityala elo, ndathi mayibizwe le ndoda." 
Acts25:18 Abamangali bavela bamtyhola, kodwa kungengazo iindawo ezimbi endandiba bomtyhola ngazo." 
Acts25:19 Kuphela nje yaba yimpikiswano ngonqulo lwabo, nangendoda ethile eyafayo, egama linguYesu, athi yena uPawulos ihleli." 
Acts25:20 Ndithe ngenxa yokungabi nabungqina buphathekayo ngeli tyala, ndaqonda kuPawulos ukuba akangethandi na ukuba eli tyala liye kuthethwa eJerusalem." 
Acts25:21 Kodwa ke uPawulos usuke wabhenela *kuKhesare. Ubone ukuba makahlale engumbanjwa lide ityala lakhe libe nokuviwa nguMhlekazi ngokwakhe. Ke ndathi makagcinwe de ndimthumele kuKhesare.” 
Acts25:22 Wathi uAgripa: “Nam ndingathanda ukukhe ndiyive le ndoda.” “Uza kuyiva ngomso oku,” utshilo uFesto." 
Acts25:23 Ngengomso uAgripa noBhernike bangena bewongekile apho enkundleni, benabaphathi-mkhosi namadoda aphambili apho edolophini. UFesto wathi makubizwe uPawulos, waza ke wangeniswa." 
Acts25:24 UFesto wathetha wathi: “Kumkani Agripa, nani nonke nina nikhoyo apha, le ndoda niyibona apha ikhalazelwa ngawo onke amaJuda, apha naseJerusalem. Athi ayisafanelanga kudla bomi." 
Acts25:25 Kodwa mna andifumananga nto ingáyenza igwetyelwe ukufa. Nangenxa yokuba yona ngokwayo ibhenele kuKhesare, nam ke ndigqiba ukuba ndiyithumele kuye." 
Acts25:26 Kodwa andikabi nayo inkcazelo ezeleyo endingayenzela uKhesare ngayo. Kungoko ke ndiyizise apha phambi kwenu, ngakumbi wena, kumkani Agripa, ukuze sithi emva kokulivavanya eli tyala layo, ndikwazi ukubhala ngalo." 
Acts25:27 Kuba kum ayiqondakali into yokuba ndithumele umbanjwa zingacacanga izityholo abekwa zona.” 
Acts26:1 UAgripa wathi kuPawulos: “Uvumelekile ukuzithethelela.” UPawulos ke waphakamisa isandla, wenjenje ukuziphendulela:" 
Acts26:2 “Kumkani Agripa, ndinenyhweba ukuba ndibe ndiza kuziphendulela phambi kwakho namhlanje, kuzo zonke ezi ndawo ndityholwa ngazo ngamaJuda;" 
Acts26:3 nangakumbi kuba wena unolwazi ngamasiko amaJuda nezinye iinkcukacha zobuJuda. Uze undiphulaphule ngenyameko ke. 
Acts26:4 “Iyaziwa ngawo onke amaJuda indlela endandiziphethe ngayo kwandiselula. Ayayazi kwakudala indlela endandihlala ngayo kummandla wakowethu naseJerusalem. 
Acts26:5 Kudala kakade esazi, ukuba angathanda ukuyingqina loo nto, ukuba mna kwasekuqaleni ndaba lilungu lelona qela lingqongqo kunqulo lwakowethu, iqela *labaFarasi." 
Acts26:6 Kungokunje naku ndimi apha, ndize ematyaleni ngenxa yethemba endinalo kwidinga uThixo âlenza nookhokho bethu;" 
Acts26:7 kanye elo dinga zililangazelelayo xa zizonke ezi zizwe zakowethu zilishumi elinambini, njengoko zimnqula uThixo imini nobusuku. Kungenxa yeli themba ke, mhlekazi, endimangalela nje amaJuda." 
Acts26:8 Kungani na ningakholwa nje, maJuda, ukuba uThixo uyabavusa abafileyo?" 
Acts26:9 “Mna lo ndandiba yinto efanelekileyo ukwenza nayiphi na into, ndilichasa igama likaYesu waseNazarete." 
Acts26:10 Ndandisenza loo nto kanye eJerusalem. Ndandigunyaziswa ngababingeleli abaziintloko ukuba ndivalele entolongweni abantu bakaThixo abaninzi. Kwakusithi xa begwetyelwa ukufa, nam ndihambisane neso sigqibo." 
Acts26:11 Amaxesha ngamaxesha ndandisiya *ezindlwini zesikhungo, ndifike ndibohlwaye, ndisenzela ukuba bahlukane nokholo lwabo. Ngangengcwangu endandinayo ngakubo ndandide ndiye kubatshutshisa nakwezikude iidolophu.”" 
Acts26:12 “Kwakungale njongo ke kanye ukuze ndiye eDamasko, ndinamagunya endawafumana kubabingeleli abaziintloko." 
Acts26:13 Endleleni apho, emini emaqanda, mhlekazi, ndabona ukukhanya okubengezela ngaphezu kokukhanya kwelanga, kuvela esibhakabhakeni, kundibengezelela ngeenxa zonke, naloo madoda ndandihamba nawo." 
Acts26:14 Xa sisonke sawa phantsi, ndaza ndeva ilizwi lithetha nam ngesiHebhere, lisithi: ‘Sawule, Sawule, unditshutshisela ntoni? Uyazenzakalisa ngezi nkani zakho!’" 
Acts26:15 ‘Ungubani, Nkosi?’ ndabuza ndatsho. Yathi iNkosi: ‘Mna ndinguYesu, lo umtshutshisayo." 
Acts26:16 Vuka ume ngeenyawo. Ndibonakala kuwe ngesi sizathu sokuba ndikumisele ube sisicaka sam, ungqine kwabanye abantu ngokundibona kwakho namhlanje, nangezinto endisaza kukubonisa zona." 
Acts26:17 Ndikuhlangula kumaSirayeli nasezintlangeni; phofu ndikuthuma kwakuzo," 
Acts26:18 ukuba uvule amehlo azo, uziguqule ziphume ebumnyameni, zize ekukhanyeni, ziphume egunyeni likaSathana, zize kuThixo, ukuze zithi ngenxa yokuzinikela kum zixolelwe izono zazo, futhi zizuze indawo phakathi kwabantu bakaThixo abanyuliweyo.’ ”" 
Acts26:19 “Ngoko ke, kumkani Agripa, ndawuthobela umbono lowo wawuvela ezulwini." 
Acts26:20 Ndaqala eDamasko ndaya eJerusalem, nakuwo wonke umhlaba wakwaJuda, nakweleentlanga, ndashumayela ukuba baguquke, beze kuThixo, benze izinto ezibonakalisayo ukuba baguqukile." 
Acts26:21 Sesi sizathu ke esabangela ukuba amaJuda andihlasele endlwini kaThixo, efuna ukundibulala." 
Acts26:22 Kodwa kude kwayile mini uThixo endinceda; nangoku ndimi apha ndingqina kubo bonke, abaphakamileyo nabaphantsi ngokufanayo. Le nto ndiyithethayo ikwayiloo nto bayithethayo *abashumayeli bamandulo kwakunye noMosis," 
Acts26:23 le yokuba uKrestu umelwe kukuva ubunzima, aze abe ngowokuqala ukuvuka kwabafileyo, avakalise ukuvela komsobomvu wosindiso kumaJuda nasezintlangeni.”" 
Acts26:24 Wathi uPawulos esazithethelela njalo, uFesto wakhwaza wathi: “Uphambene, Pawulos! Imfundo eninzi iyakuphambanisa!”" 
Acts26:25 UPawulos waphendula wathi: “Andiphambananga, mhlekazi Festo; la mazwi ndiwathethayo ayinyaniso, futhi ngawengqondo." 
Acts26:26 Mhlekazi Agripa, ndingathetha phandle nawe, kuba wena uyazazi ezi zinto. Ndiqinisekile ukuba waziqaphela xa zizonke, kuba le nto ayizange ifihlakale ukwenzeka kwayo." 
Acts26:27 Kumkani Agripa, uyakholwa ludaba *lwabashumayeli bamandulo? Kambe ndiyazi ukuba uyakholwa!”" 
Acts26:28 Wathi uAgripa kuPawulos: “Kwangoku sowufuna ukundenza umKrestu nam?” 
Acts26:29 UPawulos waphendula wathi: “Nokuba kukwangoku, nokuba kukade, ngumthandazo wam ukuba ingabi nguwe wedwa, kodwa ibe ngabo bonke abandiphulaphuleyo namhlanje, babe njengam; kodwa ke noko bona bangakhonkxwa.”" 
Acts26:30 Waza ke ukumkani, irhuluneli, noBhernike, nabo bonke ababelapho, baphakama," 
Acts26:31 baza xa bemkayo wathi omnye komnye: “Le ndoda ayenzanga nto engade ibulawe okanye ifakwe entolongweni ngenxa yayo.” 
Acts26:32 Wathi uAgripa kuFesto: “Le ndoda ngeyikhululwa ukuba ibingabhenelanga *kuKhesare.” 
Acts27:1 Kwakuba kugqityiwe ukuba sisiwe ngenqanawa eItali, uPawulos ekunye namanye amabanjwa banikelwa kuJuliyo, owayengumphathi-butho lomkhosi ekuthiwa libutho *likaKhesare." 
Acts27:2 Sangena enqanaweni eyayivela eAdramita, iza kunduluka iye kwizikhululo-nqanawe zephondo laseAsiya, sahamba ngayo. Wayekunye nathi uAristarko waseTesalonika, ekummandla waseMakedoni." 
Acts27:3 Sagaleleka eSidon ngemini elandelayo. UJuliyo wamphatha ngobubele uPawulos, wamvumela ukuba aye kubona abalingane bakhe, khon' ukuze bamtende." 
Acts27:4 Sanduluka apho, sathi kuba umoya wawusityhala uvela ngaphambili, sahamba ngecala langasempuma yeSipro, elalingenamoya." 
Acts27:5 Sacanda kulwandle olungaseKiliki nasePamfili, saya kungena eMira kummandla waseLikiya." 
Acts27:6 Apho umphathi-butho wafumana inqanawa eyayiza kuya eItali, ivela eAlesandriya, sangena kuyo." 
Acts27:7 Sahamba iintsuku icotha inqanawa, sada emva kokuhamba nzima kakhulu, saya kufika ngakwidolophu iKinido. Umoya awusivumelanga ukuba sihambe ngqo ngaloo ndlela, saza ke sehla ngecala elingenamoya elikumzantsi weKrete, saya kudlula ngaseSalimone." 
Acts27:8 Salugudla unxweme, sihamba nzima, saya kungena kwindawo ekuthiwa ngamaChweba aMahle, eyayingekude kwidolophu iLaseya." 
Acts27:9 Sahlala ixesha elide apho, kwada kwacaca ukuba koba yingozi ukuqhubela phambili ihambo yethu, kuba kwakusekudlule nomhla wamaJuda wozilo ekwindla. Ke ngoko uPawulos wenza esi silumkiso:" 
Acts27:10 “Madoda, ndibona ukuba luza kuba nengozi uhambo lwethu ukusuka apha. Umthwalo uza konakala kakhulu, nenqanawa yaphuke, kufe nabantu.”" 
Acts27:11 Kodwa umphathi-butho zange ayihoye le ntetho kaPawulos, wasuka weva into ethethwa ngumphathi woomatiloshe, nomnini-nqanawa." 
Acts27:12 Isikhululo-nqanawa eso sasingàkulungele ukuba kungáchithwa ubusika kuso, lwaye uninzi lwamadoda lufuna ukuba kungenwe elwandle, kulingwe ukuya kufika eFenike, ukuba kwakunokwenzeka. Esi sikhululo-nqanawa saseKrete, siziwa ngumoya wasemzantsi-ntshona kunye novela emntla-ntshona, kwakunokuhlalwa kuso ebusika." 
Acts27:13 Kwavela umoyana ngasezantsi, aza amadoda acinga ukuba angalilinga iqhinga lawo. Bayitsalela enqanaweni iankile, baza ke bayiqhuba inqanawa begudle unxweme lwaseKrete." 
Acts27:14 Kodwa kwakamsinyane kwabakho umoyakazi ekuthiwa nguMntla-mpuma, uvela ngasesiqithini apho." 
Acts27:15 Wayintlitha inqanawa; kwathi kuba yayingenakuqhutywa ijonge ngqo emoyeni inqanawa, asabi salinga, sasuka sayiyeka yadudulwa ngumoya." 
Acts27:16 Safumana indawo esithileyo ukudlula kwethu emazantsi esiqithana iKhawuda. Salitsalela enqanaweni apho iphenyana kunzima. 
Acts27:17 Oomatiloshe balibophelela, baza bayiqamangela ngentsontela inqanawa. Babesoyika ukuba bangaxinga enyeleni yonxweme xa bedlula ngaseLibhiya. Bayithoba ke iseyile ukuze inqanawa ityhalwe ngumoya." 
Acts27:18 Lwavuthuza njalo uqhwithela, baza ngengomso baqala bawulahlela elwandle umthwalo." 
Acts27:19 Kwathi ngolwesithathu usuku bazilahla ngezandla zabo iimpahla zenqanawa. 
Acts27:20 Yaba ziintsuku ezininzi singenakulibona ilanga neenkwenkwezi, yaye uqhwithela lona lusitsho ukuvuthuza. Ekugqibeleni sancama ukuba singásinda." 
Acts27:21 Emva kwexesha elide amadoda lawo engatyi, waphakama uPawulos wathi: “Madoda, ukuba nanindivile asemka eKrete, ngesiwuphephile wonke lo monakalo nale lahleko ingaka." 
Acts27:22 Kodwa ke qinani, ndiyanibongoza! Kuba akukho bani uza kuphulukana nobomi bakhe; yinqanawa yodwa eza konakala." 
Acts27:23 Kuba phezolo isithunywa sikaThixo, lo ndingowakhe ndimnqulayo, sifike kum," 
Acts27:24 sathi: ‘Sukoyika, Pawulos! Uza kuma phambi *koKhesare. UThixo ngokulunga kwakhe uza kubasindisa bonke aba uhamba nabo.’" 
Acts27:25 Ngoko ke, madoda, qinani; kuba ndimthembile uThixo ukuba uya kwenza njengoko andixeleleyo." 
Acts27:26 Kodwa ke siya kududulwa siye kuphoswa kunxweme lwesiqithi esithile.” 
Acts27:27 Yayibubusuku beshumi elinesine sidudulwa luqhwithela kuLwandle lweAdriya. Kwathi malunga phakathi kobusuku, oomatiloshe bakrokrela ukuba asikude emhlabeni." 
Acts27:28 Baphosa intambo ebotshelelwe intsimbi emanzini, belinganisa ubunzulu bamanzi, baza bafumana ingamashumi amathathu anantandathu eemitha ubunzulu. Baphinda emva koko, baza bafumana amashumi amabini anesixhenxe eemitha." 
Acts27:29 Bathi ngenxa yokuba besoyika ukuba isuke inqanawa yethu iphoseke ematyeni, bazithoba zane iiankile esinqeni senqanawa, sebelangazelela ukuba kuse." 
Acts27:30 Oomatiloshe bazama ukuzímela, bathobela iphenyane emanzini, bezenza ngathi ba-ankila umphambili wenqanawa." 
Acts27:31 Kodwa wathi uPawulos kumphathi-butho: “Ukuba oomatiloshe abahlali apha enqanaweni, aninakusinda.”" 
Acts27:32 Asuka ke amajoni azinqumla iintsontela ezazibambe iphenyane, laza lona lawa emanzini." 
Acts27:33 Ekuseni uPawulos wabacenga ukuba batye, esithi: “Ngoku lishumi elinesine leentsuku nilindile, ningasafaki nento le etyiwayo emlonyeni." 
Acts27:34 Ndiyanibongoza, yityani. Niya kuncedwa kukutya kule ngozi. Anisayi kulahlekelwa nalunwele olu.”" 
Acts27:35 Akuba etshilo uPawulos, wathatha isonka, wabulela kuThixo, watya phambi kwabo." 
Acts27:36 Bomelezeka ke, baza bathatha ukutya, batya bonke." 
Acts27:37 Sasingamakhulu amabini anamashumi asixhenxe anesithandathu sisonke. 
Acts27:38 Bakuba betyile, bawuphungula umthwalo wenqanawa ngokuphosa ingqolowa elwandle." 
Acts27:39 Kwakuba kusile oomatiloshe babona unxweme abangalunakananga kakuhle, kodwa baqaphela indawo enentlabathi, baza bazimisela ukuya kuyimisa khona inqanawa xa benako." 
Acts27:40 Ngoko ke bazinqumla iiankile, zasala elwandle, kwangelo xesha linye bazikhulula neentsontela ezazibambe amaphini okugwedla. Bayiphakamisa iseyile ekumphambili wenqanawa, ukuze umoya uyiqhubele phambili elunxwemeni inqanawa." 
Acts27:41 Kodwa inqanawa yasuka yabaleka yaya kungena endulini yesanti ephantsi kwamanzi; umphambili wenqanawa wagxumekeka apho waxinga awashukuma, isinqe senqanawa sona santlithwa saziingceba ngamaza alwayo." 
Acts27:42 Amajoni wona aceba ukuwabulala amabanjwa, ukuze angadadi azimele." 
Acts27:43 Kodwa umphathi wawo, efuna ukusindisa uPawulos, wawanqanda. Endaweni yaloo nto wathi amadoda akwaziyo ukudada makangene emanzini, adadele elunxwemeni;" 
Acts27:44 baze abaseleyo balandele, bedada ngamaplanga, nangezinye izinto ababenokuzifumana. Xa sisonke ke sasinda ngaloo ndlela, saya kufika elunxwemeni singenawo nomkrwelo." 
Acts28:1 Ekubeni sisindile safika apho esiqithini, safumana ukuba igama laso yiMalta." 
Acts28:2 Abantu balapho basenzela ububele. Yana imvula, kwaza kwabanda kakhulu. Ke kaloku abantu balapho basibasela umlilo, bebonisa ukusamkela kwabo." 
Acts28:3 UPawulos waqokelela ibathwana leenkuni, kwathi xa abasayo kwaphuma inyoka apho emlilweni, isiva ubushushu, yaza yamluma esandleni." 
Acts28:4 Abantu balapho bathi bakuyibona inyoka ijinga esandleni sikaPawulos bathi omnye komnye: “Lo mntu kucaca ukuba usisigebenga; nakuba esindile nje elwandle, akanakusinda kwimpindezelo kaThixo.”" 
Acts28:5 Wasuka yena uPawulos wayivuthulula yawa emlilweni apho inyoka leyo, yena akenzakala konke." 
Acts28:6 Bona babelindele ukuba adumbe, okanye asuke afe. Kodwa emva kokulinda ithuba elide bengaboni nto ingaqhelekanga kuye, baziguqula iingcinga zabo, bathi unguthixo." 
Acts28:7 Mganyana nje ukusuka apho kwakukho amasimi kaPubliyo inkosi yeso siqithi. Wasamkela ngobubele, saza saziindwendwe zakhe iintsuku ezintathu." 
Acts28:8 Uyise kaPubliyo wayelele enomkhuhlane nesisu segazi. Waza uPawulos waya kuye, wamthandazela, wambeka izandla, waphila." 
Acts28:9 Akuba emphilisile, kwatsho kweziswa bonke abantu abagulayo beso siqithi, baphiliswa nabo." 
Acts28:10 Basinika izipho ezininzi, baza xa sihambayo basiphathisa izinto ezaziyimfuneko eluhambeni." 
Acts28:11 Emva kweenyanga ezintathu sanduluka apho ngenqanawa eyayichithe ubusika esiqithini apho, isuka eAlesandriya. Igama layo kwakusithiwa yiDiyoskuri." 
Acts28:12 Saya kufika edolophini yaseSirakuse, saza sahlala khona iintsuku ezintathu." 
Acts28:13 Ukusuka apho sahamba saya kufika edolophini yaseRegiyo. Ngengomso kwabhudla umoya wangasezantsi, saza emva kweentsuku ezimbini saya kufika kwidolophu yasePutoli." 
Acts28:14 Apho ke safumana amakholwa, aza asicela ukuba sichithe iveki apho kuwo. Emva koko ke saya kufika eRoma." 
Acts28:15 Amakholwa aseRoma eva ukuba siyeza, aza amanye asihlangabeza eApiyaforo, amanye ke adibana nathi eTritabherne. Akuwabona uPawulos, wambulela uThixo, waza wakhuthazeka." 
Acts28:16 Sakufika eRoma, wavunyelwa ukuba azihlalele endlwini yakhe uPawulos, kubekho ijoni elimgadileyo." 
Acts28:17 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu, uPawulos wawabizela entlanganisweni amaJuda aziintloko alapho. Akuba ehlanganisene, wathi: “Mawethu, nakuba ndingabonanga nganto nje abantu bakowethu, ndingawatyeshelanga namasiko ookhokho, ndabanjwa kambe eJerusalem, ndaza ndanikelwa kumaRoma." 
Acts28:18 Andincina, aza afuna ukundikhulula, akungafumani tyala ndingabulawa ngenxa yalo." 
Acts28:19 Kodwa amaJuda aluchasa olu luvo, ndaza ke ndanyanzeleka ukuba ndibhenele *kuKhesare, nangona ndandingenasimangalo ndingasenzayo ngakubantu bakowethu." 
Acts28:20 Yiyo le nto ndinibizele ukukhe ndinibone, ndithethe nani. Eneneni ndibanjiwe nje, kungenxa yalowo ulithemba lamaSirayeli.”" 
Acts28:21 Athe ke ukumphendula amaJuda: “Asikhange sifumane zileta ngawe zivela kwaJuda; akukhange kubekho namaJuda eza neendaba ngawe; kungakhange kubekho nanto imbi ithethwe ngawe. 
Acts28:22 Kodwa ke singathanda ukuziva izimvo zakho, kuba siyazi ukuba kuyo yonke indawo liyachaswa eli qela uhambisana nalo.”" 
Acts28:23 Bavumelana ngosuku noPawulos, kwaza ngaloo mini bafika bebaninzi apho wayehlala khona uPawulos. Waqala kwakusasa kwada kwahlwa ecacisa, ebachazela ngokuthwasa kolawulo lukaThixo. Wazama ukuboyisela kuYesu ngokucaphula *kumthetho kaMosis nakwiincwadi *zabashumayeli bamandulo." 
Acts28:24 Abanye babo boyisakala ngamazwi akhe, abanye àbakholwa noko." 
Acts28:25 Bemka ke bephikisana bodwa, akuba uPawulos ethe kubo: “Wathetha kakuhle kambe uMoya oyiNgcwele ngomshumayeli uIsaya kooyihlo-mkhulu," 
Acts28:26 xa wathi: “ ‘Yiya uthi kwaba bantu: Nàkuphulaphula niphulaphule, ningaqondi noko; nàkujonga nijonge, ningaboni nto." 
Acts28:27 Kuba ingqiqo yaba bantu ibuthuntu, bazivingcile iindlebe zabo, bawavala namehlo abo. Kungenjalo bebeya kubona, beve ngeendlebe zabo, baqonde ngeengqondo zabo, baze babuyele kum, ndize ndibaphilise;’ utsho uThixo.”" 
Acts28:28 UPawulos wenjenje ukuyiphetha intetho yakhe: “Ngoko ke yazini ukuba udaba lukaThixo olungosindiso lusiwa ezintlangeni. Ziya kuluva zona.” [ 
Acts28:29 Emva kokuba uPawulos etshilo, emka amaJuda, ehamba exambulisana odwa.]" 
Acts28:30 Yaba mibini iminyaka uPawulos ehlala endlwini ayiqeshileyo, ezamkela ngobubele zonke iindwendwe zakhe." 
Acts28:31 Wayeshumayela ngokuthwasa kolawulo lukaThixo, efundisa iindaba ezingeNkosi uYesu Krestu, ethetha ngesibindi, engathintelwa nto." 
Romans1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos, umkhonzi kaYesu *Krestu, *umthunywa owabizwayo, wamiselwa ukuvakalisa iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo." 
Romans1:2 Ezi ndaba uThixo wathembisa ngazo kwangaphambili *ngabashumayeli bakhe *eziBhalweni eziNgcwele. 
Romans1:3 Ezi ndaba ke zibhekiselele kuNyana wakhe, owazalwa engowomlibo kaDavide ngokobuntu," 
Romans1:4 waza ngamandla oMoya oyiNgcwele wabonakaliswa ngesiganeko sokuvuka kwabafileyo ukuba unguNyana kaThixo. Lo Nyana kaThixo nguYesu iNkosi yethu; 
Romans1:5 endathi ngaye ndenzelwa isisa sokuba ngumthunywa ngenxa yakhe, ukuze ndikhokelele izizwe zonke ekukholweni nasekumthobeleni;" 
Romans1:6 eniphakathi kwazo nani, nina babiziweyo bakaYesu Krestu." 
Romans1:7 Kuni nonke, bathandwa bakaThixo abaseRoma, nina nibiziweyo naba ngabakaThixo, ndithi: Makube lubabalo noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
Romans1:8 Kuqala ke, ndiyambulela uThixo wam ngoYesu Krestu ngenxa yenu nonke, kuba ukholo lwenu ludumile kulo lonke ihlabathi." 
Romans1:9 Kaloku uThixo endimkhonzayo ngomxhelo wam ngokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi zoNyana wakhe, uyandingqinela ukuba ndihlala ndinikhumbula." 
Romans1:10 Ndiyakhunga emithandazweni yam, ukuba uThixo angáde ngokwentando yakhe andiphumelelise ukunihambela." 
Romans1:11 Kaloku ndilangazelela ukunibona, ukuze ndinabele siphiwo sithile kwezoMoya, ukuze nomelezeke." 
Romans1:12 Ndithetha ukuthi nina kunye nam sivuseleleke: nina ngokholo lwam, nam ke ngokholo lwenu." 
Romans1:13 Ngoko ke, mawethu, ndifuna ukuba niyiqonde into yokuba kudala ndazimisela ukunihambela, kodwa ndaba soloko ndithintelwa kwada kwanamhla. Bendifuna ziqhamo zithile zeendaba ezimnandi naphakathi kwenu, kwanjengaphakathi kwezinye iintlanga." 
Romans1:14 Kaloku ndimelwe kukushumayela kubo bonke: kwabaphucukileyo nakwabangaphucukanga, kwizilumko nakwabangaziyo." 
Romans1:15 Ngenxa yoko ke ndingxamele ukuzishumayela iindaba ezimnandi nakuni baseRoma. 
Romans1:16 Andinazintloni ngazo iindaba ezimnandi zikaKrestu. Zingamandla kaThixo okusindisa bonke abakholwayo, umJuda kuqala, kwanowolunye uhlanga ngokunjalo." 
Romans1:17 Ngezi ndaba zimnandi kaloku kutyhilwa indlela uThixo asenza amalungisa ngayo: kungokholo qha, njengoko zitshoyo neziBhalo ukuthi: “Ngokholo lwakhe olilungisa uya kudla ubomi.”" 
Romans1:18 Ingqumbo kaThixo ibonakala ivela ezulwini. Yona ichasene naso sonke isono nokungalungisi kwabantu abayithintelayo inyaniso ngokona. 
Romans1:19 Unobangela wale ngqumbo kukuba oko kunokwaziwa ngoThixo kucacile kubo, kuba uThixo wakubonakalisa kubo ngokwakhe." 
Romans1:20 Kaloku imo engabonwayo kaThixo – ndithetha amandla akhe angapheliyo kwanobuThixo bakhe – ibonakala kakuhle kwasekudalweni kwehlabathi. Kaloku iqondakala ngezinto azenzileyo uThixo. Ngenxa yoko abantu abanasiphephelo mpela. 
Romans1:21 Bayamazi uThixo, kodwa abamdumisi ngokumfaneleyo, abambuleli nokumbulela. Basuke baba ngabacinga izinto ezingento, yaza ingqiqo yabo yamfiliba." 
Romans1:22 Bazicingela ukuba bazizilumko, ukanti baziziyatha." 
Romans1:23 Bashiye ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo ongafiyo, baya kukhonza umfanekiso womntu ofayo, noweentaka, nowezilo ezizitho zine, nowezilo ezirhubuluzayo." 
Romans1:24 Kungoko athe uThixo, ngenxa yeminqweno yeentliziyo zabo, wabanikela kwiintlondi zabo, ukuba bahlazisane ngemizimba yabo." 
Romans1:25 Aba bantu ke bagqwethe inyaniso kaThixo ngobuxoki. Bahlonela isidalwa, basikhonze, baze bamlibale uMdali, yena ongowokubongwa ngonaphakade. *Amen." 
Romans1:26 Ngenxa yoko ke, uThixo ubanikele ezinkanukweni ezilihlazo. Ewe, nditsho namabhinqa la abo ayalalana ngokuchasene nendalo yemizimba yawo." 
Romans1:27 Kwangokunjalo namadoda akuyekile ukulala namabhinqa, aza atshiswa kukukhanukana. Amadoda enza amanyala kwamanye amadoda, aze ke afumane isohlwayo esiwafaneleyo, esiyimbuyekezo yokulahleka kwawo." 
Romans1:28 Ekubeni ke bengakukhathalelanga ukuhlala bemazi uThixo, yena wabayekela kwezo ngcinga zabo zingcolileyo, baza benza izinto ezingafanelekanga." 
Romans1:29 Bagqithisile ukukhohlakala nokona, ukubawa nokwenza ububi. Bazele ngumona nobugebenga, luchuku nenkohliso nentiyo. Bayahleba," 
Romans1:30 bayangcikivana, bamthiyile uThixo, bathanda ukulwa, banekratshi, bayaqhayisa, benza ububi, ababathobeli abazali." 
Romans1:31 Abanangqondo, abathembeki, abanabubele, abananceba." 
Romans1:32 Bayawazi ummiselo kaThixo wokuba abo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo bafanelwe kukufa; kodwa abaneli nje kukuzenza ezi zinto, koko basuka babakhuthaze nabo bazenzayo." 
Romans2:1 Nakuwe ke mntundini ugwebayo, nokuba ungubani, amatyholo aphelile. Ewe, ngokugweba omnye, uzigweba ngokwakho. Kaloku wena ugwebayo, wenza kwaezo zinto ugweba omnye ngazo." 
Romans2:2 Siyazi ke ukuba uThixo ubagweba ngokufanelekileyo abo benza izinto ezingalunganga. 
Romans2:3 Wena kanye, mntundini ubagwebayo abo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo, wenza kwaezo zinto. Uba ke wena uThixo akayi kukugweba na?" 
Romans2:4 Okanye ubudelile ububele bakhe obukhulu, nokunyamezela kwakhe, nokuza kade komsindo wakhe? Akwazi na ukuba bububele bukaThixo obukusa enguqukweni?" 
Romans2:5 Ngenxa yokuba unentliziyo elukhuni, ungaguquki, uzibizela ingqumbo ngemini yengqumbo. Ngaloo mini iya kucaca indlela agweba ngayo uThixo." 
Romans2:6 Ngaloo mini uThixo uya kuvuza elowo nalowo ngokwemisebenzi yakhe. 
Romans2:7 UThixo ubavuza ngobomi obungonaphakade abo banomonde ekwenzeni imisebenzi emihle, belangazelela isidima newonga nokungafi." 
Romans2:8 Kanti ke uza ngomsindo nengqumbo kwabo banenkani, bayityeshelayo inyaniso ngokungalungisi." 
Romans2:9 Kuya kubakho imbandezelo nobunzima kubantu bonke abenza okubi, kumJuda kuqala kwanakowolunye uhlanga ngokunjalo." 
Romans2:10 Kuya kubakho isidima newonga noxolo kubantu bonke abenza okulungileyo, kumJuda kuqala kwanakowolunye uhlanga ngokunjalo." 
Romans2:11 Kaloku uThixo akanamkhethe. 
Romans2:12 Bonke abonileyo bengekho phantsi *komthetho kaMosis, baya kutshabalala bengaphandle kwawo; nabo bonke abonileyo bephantsi komthetho kaMosis, baya kugwetywa ngawo." 
Romans2:13 Kaloku abantu abalungileyo ngokukaThixo asingabo abo bawuva nje umthetho bangayenzi into oyithethayo. Ngabo bayenzayo into eyalelwa ngumthetho abangamalungisa. 
Romans2:14 Abantu abangengomaJuda àbanawo umthetho kaMosis; kodwa xa bathe ngokwemvelo bahamba ngokomthetho, bangumthetho ngokwabo, nangona bengenawo umthetho kaMosis." 
Romans2:15 Ukuziphatha kwabo kubonakalisa ukuba ngemvelo bayakwazi okusemthethweni. Nezazela zabo ziyakungqina oku, kuba ngamanye amaxa ziyabagweba, zize ngawambi zibagwebele." 
Romans2:16 Ngokweendaba ezimnandi endizishumayelayo kuya kuba njalo mhla uThixo aya kuzigweba ngoYesu Krestu nezinto abazifihlayo abantu. 
Romans2:17 Uyabona wena unegama lobuJuda, wayame *ngomthetho kaMosis; uqhayisa ngoThixo;" 
Romans2:18 uyayazi intando kaThixo; ukhonjiswe okulungileyo ngumthetho. 
Romans2:19 Kananjalo wena ukholose ngokuthi ungumkhokeli weemfama, ulukhanyiso lwâbo basebumnyameni," 
Romans2:20 umkhokeli weziyatha, umfundisi weentsana, kuba unawo umthetho ofumbethe ulwazi nenyaniso." 
Romans2:21 Ndithi wena ke umfundisayo omnye, akuzifundisi ngani wena? Wena uthi makungebiwa, ubelani?" 
Romans2:22 Wena uthi makungakrexezwa, ukrexezelani? Wena ukruqukileyo zizithixo, ubelani ezindlwini zonqulo?" 
Romans2:23 Wena ke uziqhayisayo ngokuba unomthetho, umhlaziselani uThixo ngokuwaphula umthetho?" 
Romans2:24 “Kuba igama likaThixo linyeliswa ngenxa yenu phakathi kweentlanga,” njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo." 
Romans2:25 Ulwaluko luyanceda okunene ukuba uyawugcina umthetho kaMosis. Kodwa ukuba uyawaphula umthetho, ulwaluko lusuka lufane nokungaluki." 
Romans2:26 Ukuba umntu ongalukanga uyayigcina imimiselo yomthetho, uThixo uya kuthi ukungaluki kwakhe kukwaluka." 
Romans2:27 Nina maJuda, nangona nalukileyo, ninawo umthetho eziBhalweni, nibe noko ningawenzi, niya kugwetywa ziintlanga ezithe zingalukanga nje zawugcina umthetho." 
Romans2:28 UmJuda asingomJuda ngokwangaphandle, nolwaluko asilulo olo lwangaphandle enyameni." 
Romans2:29 UmJuda ngulowo ungumJuda ngokwangaphakathi, nolwaluko lolwentliziyo ngoMoya kaThixo, kungabi ngammiselo nje. Umntu onjalo ke ukholekile kuThixo, nangona angànconywayo ngabantu." 
Romans3:1 Ungcono ngani na ke umJuda? Lunceda ntoni ke lona ulwaluko lwakhe? 
Romans3:2 Lulunge kakhulu, ngeendlela zonke. Okokuqala uThixo ugcinise udaba lwakhe kuwo amaJuda." 
Romans3:3 Kuya kuthini ke ukuba athile kuwo akakholwanga? Ngaba uThixo uya kuthi ngokungathembeki kwawo angathembeki naye? 
Romans3:4 Nakanye! UThixo yena uhlala enyanisekile, nangona bangade bonke abantu babe ngamaxoki, njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Umelwe kukubonakala ngamazwi akho ukuba uthembekile, woyise ekuthethweni kwetyala lakho.”" 
Romans3:5 Xa ukungalungisi kwethu kucacisa ukulungisa kukaThixo, siya kuthini ke? Ngaba sinokuthi akalungisi uThixo xa abonakalisa umsindo wakhe, ngabula thina bantu?" 
Romans3:6 Nakanye! Ukuba ebengelolungisa uThixo, ebengaligweba njani ihlabathi?" 
Romans3:7 Ukuba ke ngokuxoka kwam inyaniso kaThixo idandalaza ngakumbi ukuze sicace isidima sakhe, ndisagwetyelwani na ke ngokomoni?" 
Romans3:8 Yini na ke ukuba singabi sesisithi: “Masenze okubi, ukuze kuvele okulungileyo”? Kakade abathile bandinyelisa besithi nditsho! Abo batshoyo baya kugwetywa ngokubafaneleyo!" 
Romans3:9 Ke, ngaba thina maJuda silungile na kunabanye? Hayi, nakanye! Kaloku sendiwatyholile amaJuda kwanabezinye iintlanga ndisithi basesonweni bebonke," 
Romans3:10 njengoko iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Akukho namnye ulilungisa; 
Romans3:11 akukho mntu uqondayo; akukho umfunayo uThixo! 
Romans3:12 Bonke bamfulathele; akukho yabo xa bebonke. Akukho wenza okulungileyo; hayi namnye! 
Romans3:13 Yinto ebolileyo intetho yabo; ngeelwimi zabo bahlala bekhohlisa. Amazwi emilebe yabo abubuhlungu benyoka; 
Romans3:14 umlomo wabo uzele zizishwabulo ezikrakra. 
Romans3:15 Bakungxamele ukuphalaza igazi; 
Romans3:16 yimbuqe nosizi emkhondweni wabo; 
Romans3:17 yona indlela yoxolo abayazanga; 
Romans3:18 ewe, abamoyiki konke uThixo.”" 
Romans3:19 Siyazi ke ukuba konke okuthethwa ngumthetho, kuwiselwa abaphantsi komthetho; ukuze bonke basikwe umlomo, nehlabathi lonke lifumaneke linetyala kuThixo." 
Romans3:20 Kaloku akukho mntu uya kuba lilungisa kuThixo ngakugcina kwakhe umthetho; into eyenziwa ngumthetho kukwazisa abantu ngesono. 
Romans3:21 Ngoku ke indlela uThixo abalungisa ngayo abantu ibonakalisiwe, ingeyiyo eyomthetho. Kambe ke iyangqinelwa *ngumthetho kaMosis *nangabashumayeli bamandulo." 
Romans3:22 Yona kukukholwa nokuzinikela kuYesu Krestu. UThixo ubenza amalungisa bonke abakholwayo kuYesu, kuba akanamkhethe." 
Romans3:23 Kaloku bonke bonile; bayalabalaba kubuqaqawuli ababulungiselelwe nguThixo. 
Romans3:24 Kanti ke uThixo uyabababala abantu; ubenzela isisa: nangona bengafanelanga ubagwebela ngaye uYesu Krestu obakhululayo. 
Romans3:25 UThixo wammisela uYesu ukuba abe lidini lokungxengxezela izono zabakholwayo. Ukufa kwakhe yindlela uThixo abenza ngayo amalungisa abantu. Kumaxesha adlulileyo uThixo wazibamba akabagweba aboni; 
Romans3:26 kodwa ke namhlanje akasayenzi loo nto – ngoku walatha indlela abenza ngayo amalungisa. Ngale ndlela ke uThixo utyhila ubulungisa bakhe, emenza abe lilungisa wonke okholwayo kuYesu." 
Romans3:27 Kukho nto singaziqhayisa ngayo ke? Hayi, ayikho. Ngasizathu sini na? Kuba sigcina umthetho kaMosis? Hayi, ngenxa yokuba sikholwa." 
Romans3:28 Kuba kaloku sigqibe kwelithi uThixo wenza abantu babe ngamalungisa ngokholo, kungengakuthobela kwabo umthetho." 
Romans3:29 Kanene uThixo ungowamaJuda odwa na? Akanguye na owezizwe nazo? Ewe, ngowazo nazo." 
Romans3:30 Kaloku uThixo mnye kuphela; ugwebela amaJuda ngokukholwa kwawo, nezizwe azigwebele ngokukholwa kwazo ngokunjalo." 
Romans3:31 Ngaba ke siyawutshitshisa umthetho kaMosis ngokukholwa? Nakanye! Siyawuxhasa. 
Romans4:1 Sithini na ke ngobawo uAbraham esiyinzala yakhe? 
Romans4:2 Ukuba ebenziwe ilungisa ngenxa yokufezekisa kwakhe umthetho, ebengaqhayisayo; kodwa ngoku akanandlela yakuqhayisa phambi koThixo." 
Romans4:3 Zithini kanene *iziBhalo? Zithi: “UAbraham wakholwa kuThixo, waza ngenxa yoko wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa nguThixo.”" 
Romans4:4 Kaloku umntu osebenzayo wamkela umvuzo oyimfanelo yakhe, ungesiso isipho." 
Romans4:5 Ke umntu ongathembelanga misebenzini yakhe, koko okholwa kuThixo ogwebela umoni, uba lilungisa phambi koThixo." 
Romans4:6 Unoyolo ke umntu othe waba lilungisa phambi koThixo, engakusebenzelanga oko. Lolu yolo ke uDavide aluncomayo xa athi:" 
Romans4:7 “Hayi uyolo lwabaluxolelweyo ukreqo lwabo nguThixo, abazono zabo zingcwatyiweyo." 
Romans4:8 Unoyolo lowo ithe iNkosi ayazibalela kuye izono zakhe.” 
Romans4:9 Ngaba olu yolo lolwamaJuda kuphela? Hayi, lukwalolwazo neentlanga, kuba iziBhalo zithi: “UAbraham wakholwa kuThixo, waza ngenxa yoko wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa nguThixo.”" 
Romans4:10 Waba lilungisa nini? Kwakungaphambi kokwaluka kwakhe okanye emva kwako? Kwakungaphambi kokwaluka kwakhe. 
Romans4:11 Kaloku wathi engekaluki uAbraham, ekholwa kodwa, wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa nguThixo; waza waluka emva koko. Olu lwaluko ke lwaba luphawu olusisiqinisekiso sobulungisa bakhe. Ngale ndlela ke uAbraham nguyise wabo bonke abathe bakholwa kuThixo, baza benziwa amalungisa nguye nangona bangalukanga." 
Romans4:12 Ukwanguyise wabalukileyo abanganelanga kwaluka nje, kodwa abathe ngokukholwa kuThixo bahamba ekhondweni lika-Abraham, owakholwa engekaluki." 
Romans4:13 UThixo wathembisa uAbraham nenzala yakhe ukuba ihlabathi baya kulima. Esi sithembiso asenziwanga ngakuba ethe wathobela umthetho kaMosis, kodwa wathenjiswa ngenxa yokuba wakholwa, waza wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa nguThixo." 
Romans4:14 Kaloku ukuba ilifa lifunyanwa kuphela ngâbo bawuthobelayo umthetho, ukukholwa koba kwenziwe into engento, nesithembiso eso singaba sitshitshisiwe." 
Romans4:15 Ingqumbo kaThixo kaloku ibangwa kukwaphulwa komthetho wakhe; kodwa apho ungekhoyo umthetho akukho kwaphulwa kwamthetho. 
Romans4:16 Ngoko ke ilifa lifunyanwa ngokukholwa, oko kukuthi ngesisa. Ngale ndlela isithembiso simiselwe yonke inzala ka-Abraham. Le nzala ke asingabo nje abo bawugcinayo umthetho, kodwa ikwangâbo bakholwayo njengaye. Kaloku uAbraham ngubawo wethu sonke," 
Romans4:17 njengokuba zisitsho *iziBhalo ukuthi: “Ndikwenze uyise wezizwe ezininzi.” KuThixo ke uAbraham ngubawo wethu sonke; lo Thixo uAbraham athe wakholwa kuye; lo Thixo unika abafileyo ubomi; lo Thixo uthetha ngelizwi zitsho izinto ezingekabikho zibekho. 
Romans4:18 UAbraham wakholwa, wathemba, naxa ithemba lalingekho. Wakholwa okokuba woba “nguyise wezizwe ezininzi,” njengoko iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Iya kuba ngako ke inzala yakho ukuba ninzi kwayo.”" 
Romans4:19 Wayemayela nekhulu leminyaka ezelwe, kodwa akatyhafanga elukholweni akucinga ngokwaluphala kwakhe nangobudlolo bukaSara." 
Romans4:20 Hayi, akasithandabuzanga isithembiso sikaThixo ngokungakholwa; waya esomelela elukholweni, embonga uThixo," 
Romans4:21 eqinisekile ukuba uThixo unako ukukwenza oko akuthembisileyo. 
Romans4:22 Kungoko “wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa nguThixo.” 
Romans4:23 La mazwi athi “wabalelwa ekubeni lilungisa” akabhekisi kuye yedwa. 
Romans4:24 Hayi, abhekisa nakuthi, thina sasiza kuba ngamalungisa, thina sikholwayo kuThixo owamvusayo uYesu iNkosi yethu kwabafileyo," 
Romans4:25 yena owanikelwa ekufeni ngenxa yezono zethu, waza wabuya wavuswa, ukuze thina sibe ngamalungisa." 
Romans5:1 Njengoko sikholwa, sígwetyelwe nguThixo, sinoxolo naye ngenxa yeNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu." 
Romans5:2 Kaloku sibe nako ukungena ngoKrestu ngokukholwa kolu babalo sikulo. Siyaqhayisa ke sithembe ukuba nenxaxheba ebuqaqawulini bukaThixo. 
Romans5:3 Ngaphezu koko, siqhayisa nangeembandezelo ezi, sisazi nje ukuba iimbandezelo zisiqhelisa ukunyamezela." 
Romans5:4 Ke ukunyamezela kubonisa ukuba sicikidekile. Ukucikideka ke kudala ithemba. 
Romans5:5 Ithemba ke lona alidanisi, kuba uthando lukaThixo luthululelwe ezintliziyweni zethu ngoMoya oyiNgcwele esamnikwayo." 
Romans5:6 Kuba kaloku oko besisengama-athalala, uKrestu uthe ngexesha elimiswe nguThixo, wabafela abangamhloneliyo uThixo." 
Romans5:7 Inqabile into yokuba umntu afele omnye, naxa mhlawumbi anokubhaqeka umntu onesibindi sokufela umntu olungileyo." 
Romans5:8 Ke yena uThixo ukuqondakalisile ukusithanda kwakhe ngokuthi uKrestu asifele sisengaboni! 
Romans5:9 Sigwetyelwe nje ngenxa yegazi lakhe, kokukhona siya kusindiswa ngaye kuyo ingqumbo kaThixo." 
Romans5:10 Kaloku besikade siziintshaba noThixo, saxolelaniswa naye ngokufa koNyana wakhe. Kobeka phi ke ukusindiswa kwethu ngokudla kwakhe ubomi!" 
Romans5:11 Ngaphezu koko ke, sineqhayiya novuyo ngaye uThixo, ngenxa yeNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, esithe ngayo saxolelaniswa noThixo." 
Romans5:12 Njengoko isono sangena ehlabathini ngenxa yomntu omnye, ukufa kwangena ngaso isono. Ngokunjalo ke nokufa kwalutyhutyha lonke uluntu, kuba bonke abantu bôna." 
Romans5:13 Isono ke sabakho ehlabathini ungekabikho *umthetho kaMosis. Ke, apho kungekho mthetho, isono sokwaphula umthetho asinakubalelwa mntwini." 
Romans5:14 Ke ukufa kwakutshatshele ukususela kuAdam kwada kwaya kuthi gaa kuMosis, nakwabo basono singafani nesika-Adam. Lo Adam ke wayengumfuziselo waloo Mntu wayeza kufika." 
Romans5:15 Kodwa isono sika-Adam asinakulinganiswa nesisa sikaThixo. Kaloku naxa kwafa abantu abaninzi nje ngenxa yesono salowo mnye unguAdam, lona ubabalo lukaThixo esalufumana ngaloo mntu mnye unguKrestu, lwaphuphumela kubantu abaninzi ngakumbi." 
Romans5:16 Kanti ke isiqhamo sesipho sikaThixo asinakulinganiswa nesiphumo sesono saloo mntu. Kaloku isiphumo sesono saloo mntu saba kukugwetywa, kodwa isiqhamo sesisa sikaThixo esabakho ngenxa yezono ezininzi, saba kukukhululwa kwabantu." 
Romans5:17 Ukuba ukufa kwakutshatshele ngenxa yesono saloo mntu, abo balwamkelayo ubabalo oluphuphumayo kwanesipho sokwenziwa amalungisa, baya kudla ubomi ngokugqithisileyo ngaloo mntu mnye unguYesu Krestu." 
Romans5:18 Ngako ke, njengokuba kwathi ngasono sinye, bonke abantu bagwetywa, ngokunjalo kuya kuthi nangesenzo esinye esilungileyo, bonke abantu bagwetyelwe, badle ubomi." 
Romans5:19 Kuba njengokuba kwathi, ngokungeva kwalowo mnye unguAdam, abaninzi bafumaneka bengaboni, ngokunjalo kuya kuthi nangokuthobela kwalowo mnye unguKrestu, abaninzi benziwe amalungisa." 
Romans5:20 Ke kaloku wakungena umthetho kaMosis, isono sanda. Kodwa apho kwânda khona ukona, lwaphuphuma ngakumbi ubabalo asibabala ngalo uThixo." 
Romans5:21 Njengokuba ke isono salawula ngokufa, ngokunjalo nobabalo lulawula ngokwenziwa kwethu amalungisa nguThixo. Lonu lusikhokelela ebomini obungonaphakade ngenxa kaYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu." 
Romans6:1 Síthini na ke ngoko? Síhlale sihleli esonweni ukuze ubabalo lwande? 
Romans6:2 Nakanye! Thina kaloku safa kuso isono. Singathini ke ukuba siqhubele phambili sisona? 
Romans6:3 Anazi na ukuba thina sonke sibhaptiziweyo samanywa noKrestu Yesu, sabhaptizelwa ekufeni kwakhe?" 
Romans6:4 Ngokunjalo ngokubhaptizwa sangcwatywa kunye noKrestu. Njengokuba ke uKrestu wavuswayo kwabafileyo ngamandla obungangamsha bukaYise, nathi ngokunjalo masiphile ubomi obutsha." 
Romans6:5 Kaloku xa simanywe naye ekufeni kwakhe, simanywe naye nasekuvukeni kwakhe ekufeni." 
Romans6:6 Siyazi ke ukuba isimo sethu esidala sabethelelwa emnqamlezweni noKrestu, khon' ukuze igunya lesono liphuthiswe nasemizimbeni yethu, size singabi salawulwa sisono." 
Romans6:7 Kaloku umntu ofileyo ukhululekile esonweni. 
Romans6:8 Ukuba ke safa kunye noKrestu, siyakholwa ukuba sodla ubomi kwakunye naye." 
Romans6:9 Siyazi ke ukuba uKrestu evusiwe nje kwabafileyo, akayi kuba safa – ukufa akusayi kuba nagunya kuye." 
Romans6:10 Kuba wafa kwakanye, efela isono; kodwa ngoku udla ubomi, ephilela uThixo." 
Romans6:11 Ngokunjalo nani zibaleleni ekubeni ningabafileyo okunene kuso isono, niphilela uThixo ngobomi enibudlayo, nimanywe noKrestu Yesu, iNkosi yethu." 
Romans6:12 Ngoko ke isono masingayilawuli imizimba yenu efayo. Sanukuzivumela iinkanuko zemizimba yenu. 
Romans6:13 Kananjalo imizimba yenu musani ukuyinikela esonweni, nize none ngamalungu ayo; koko zinikeleni nina ziqu kuThixo, ningabaphila bevuke ekufeni nje. Ngenxa yoko ke wanikeleni kuThixo amalungu emizimba yenu, ukuze nenze okulungileyo ngawo." 
Romans6:14 Isono masinganilawuli, kuba anikho phantsi komthetho, niphantsi kobabalo lwesisa sikaThixo." 
Romans6:15 Síthini na ke ngoko? Sóne na, kuba singekho phantsi kwawo umthetho, siphantsi kobabalo? Nakanye!" 
Romans6:16 Kakade niyazi ukuba lowo nizinikela kuye ukuba anilawule, ngokwenyani niyamkhonza, nimthobele. Abalawulwa sisono ke baba sisisulu sokufa, kodwa abamthobeleyo uThixo ubenza amalungisa." 
Romans6:17 Ke kaloku, makubulelwe kuThixo, kuba nanifudula nilawulwa sisono, kodwa ngoku niyithobela ngokupheleleyo imfundiso eniyifundisiweyo." 
Romans6:18 Nakhululwa ke kuso isono, naba phantsi kobulungisa." 
Romans6:19 Ngenxa yobuthathaka bemvelo yenu mandingantsonkothi. Njengoko nanizinikele ngokupheleleyo ukuba nenze ukungcola nokwaphula umthetho, nize nichasane nomthetho; ngokunjalo ke nangoku zinikeleni ngokupheleleyo ukuze nenze okulungileyo, khon' ukuze nahluke." 
Romans6:20 Okuya nanilawulwa sisono naningekho phantsi kobulungisa. 
Romans6:21 Ke, benizuza ntoni ngaloo nto? Andithi izinto enanizizuza zezi nineentloni ngazo ngoku, ezi zikhokelela ekufeni?" 
Romans6:22 Ngoku ke, nikhululwe nje esonweni, naba ngabakaThixo, ninaso isiqhamo esibubungcwele. Le nto ke ikhokelela ebomini obungunaphakade." 
Romans6:23 Isono sinomvuzo: samkelisa ukufa; ke sona isipho asibabala ngaso uThixo ngokumanywa kwethu noKrestu Yesu iNkosi yethu, bubomi obungonaphakade." 
Romans7:1 Mawethu, ndithetha nabantu abawaziyo umthetho welakowethu; niyazi ukuba umntu uphantsi kwegunya lomthetho kuphela ngeli xesha adla ubomi ngalo." 
Romans7:2 Kaloku umfazi owendileyo ubotshelelwe ngumthetho endodeni yakhe, eli lixa idla ubomi; kodwa ukuba ithe yafa indoda, ukhululekile kuwo umthetho ombophelela endodeni yakhe." 
Romans7:3 Ngoko ke, ukuba umfazi uthe waba ngowenye indoda isaphila indoda yakhe, kothiwa ungumkrexezi. Kodwa ke ukuba ithe yafa indoda yakhe, woba ukhululekile emthethweni, aze angabi ngumkrexezi ukuba uthe waba ngowenye indoda." 
Romans7:4 Kukwanjalo ke nakuni, mawethu. Ngokumanywa nomzimba kaKrestu nani nafa ngokubhekiselele kumthetho kaMosis, ukuze nibe ngabomnye, ongulo Krestu ke owavuswa kwabafileyo. Le nto ke ibanga ukuba sibe nokumsebenzela uThixo." 
Romans7:5 Kaloku ngokuya sasisidla ubomi, ngokweyethu intando, iinkanuko ezimbi ezivuselelwa ngumthetho zazilawula emizimbeni yethu, sisebenzela ukufa." 
Romans7:6 Ke, ekubeni safayo nje ngokubhekiselele kwezo zinto zazisilawula, sikhululekile ngoku emthethweni. Ngenxa yoko asisakhonzi ngendlela endala yomthetho obhaliweyo, kodwa sikhonza ngendlela entsha yoMoya." 
Romans7:7 Ndithini ke xa nditshoyo? Ngaba ndithi umthetho usisono? Nakanye! Kodwa ke ngendingasazanga isono ukuba ubungekho umthetho. Kaloku nenkanuko ngendingayazanga ukuba umthetho ubungatshongo ukuthi: “Uze unganqweneli...” 
Romans7:8 Isono ke sizuze ikroba ngawo lo mthetho, sandivusela yonke inkanuko. Kaloku xa kungekho mthetho, isono sifile." 
Romans7:9 Mna ke bendifudula ndiphila ungekho umthetho. Uthe ke wakufika umthetho, savuka isono," 
Romans7:10 ndafa ke mna; waza umthetho owawumiselwe ukuzisa ubomi, wafumaneka inguwona undisa ekufeni." 
Romans7:11 Kuba kaloku isono sizuze ikroba ngawo lo mthetho, sandilukuhla, sandibulala ngawo." 
Romans7:12 Okunene umthetho ungcwele; nomyalelo ungcwele, unobulungisa, ulungile." 
Romans7:13 Umthetho ulungile nje, ungaba kukufa kum? Nakanye! Sisono esaba kukufa kum. Sona sisebenzise into elungileyo ukundizisela ukufa, saza ke sacaca into esiyiyo, khon' ukuze ngomthetho isono sibonakale sisisono ngakumbi nangakumbi." 
Romans7:14 Siyazi ke ukuba umthetho ngowoMoya kaThixo, kodwa mna ndiyinyama negazi; ndiphantsi kwegunya lesono." 
Romans7:15 Into endiyenzayo yinkohla kum, kuba kaloku into endithanda ukuyenza andiyenzi, ukanti ndiyayenza endiyithiyileyo." 
Romans7:16 Xa ke ndisenza into endiyithiyileyo, kucacile ukuba ndiyavuma ukuthi umthetho ulungile." 
Romans7:17 Ngoko ke ayisendim owenza loo nto ndingayithandiyo, koko sisono esihleli kum esenza loo nto." 
Romans7:18 Ndiyazi ukuba akuhlali nto ilungileyo kum – nditsho kwisimo sam esonakeleyo – kuba kaloku umnqweno wokwenza into elungileyo ukho kum, kodwa ukwenza andinako." 
Romans7:19 Into elungileyo endithanda ukuyenza, andiyenzi; kodwa into embi endingathandi kuyenza, ndiyayenza." 
Romans7:20 Ukuba ke ndenza loo nto ndingayithandiyo, ayisendim oyenzayo, koko sisono esi sihleli kum esiyenzayo loo nto." 
Romans7:21 Kambe ke ndibhaqa le nto apha kum: Kuthi xa ndifuna ukwenza into elungileyo, ndisuke ndonganyelwe kukwenza ububi." 
Romans7:22 Ndiyawulangazelela umthetho kaThixo ngentliziyo," 
Romans7:23 kodwa ndibhaqa nto yimbi kwalapha kum echasene nomthetho endiwaziyo entliziyweni yam, nto leyo indithimbela esonweni esihleli kum." 
Romans7:24 Hayi usizana endilulo! Ngubani na oya kundihlangula kulo mzimba usisisulu sokufa? 
Romans7:25 Ndiyambulela uThixo ngoYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu! Nantsi ke imeko endikuyo: Ngokuphathelele kwendikwaziyo entliziyweni yam, okunene ndikhonza uThixo; kodwa ngokwesimo sam esonakeleyo, ndikhonza isono." 
Romans8:1 Ngoko ke àbagwetywa abo bamanywe noKrestu Yesu. 
Romans8:2 Kaloku ngokumanywa kwam noKrestu Yesu, uMoya umniki-bomi undikhulule ekulawulweni sisono nakukufa." 
Romans8:3 Ke wona umthetho wawungenako ukusikhulula, ngenxa yokonakala kwesimo sethu. Kodwa yena uThixo wamthumela uNyana wakhe, ekwisimo esifana nesimo sethu esonakeleyo, waza wasigweba isono emntwini wenyama negazi." 
Romans8:4 Le nto uThixo uyenzele ukuze injongo yomthetho izalisekiswe kuthi, thina singaphiliyo ngokwesimo esonakeleyo, koko siphila ngokoMoya." 
Romans8:5 Abo besimo esonakeleyo banyamekela izinto zeso simo; ibe ke abo boMoya banyamekela izinto zoMoya. 
Romans8:6 Ke ukunyamekela izinto zesimo esonakeleyo kusa ekufeni, kanti ke ukunyamekela ezoMoya kusa ebomini naseluxolweni." 
Romans8:7 Abo banyamekela izinto zesimo esonakeleyo baziintshaba zikaThixo, kuba kaloku abawuthobeli umthetho wakhe. Kakade abanako ukuyenza loo nto." 
Romans8:8 Ábenjenjalo ke àbanako ukumkholisa uThixo konke-konke. 
Romans8:9 Ke nina aningabo abaphila ngokwesimo esonakeleyo, ningabo bakhokelwa nguMoya, ukuba kambe uMoya kaThixo uhleli kuni. Ke umntu ongenaye uMoya kaKrestu akangokaKrestu." 
Romans8:10 Ukuba uKrestu ukho kuni, nangona umzimba ufile ngenxa yesono, uMoya yena uninika ubomi. Kaloku nenziwe amalungisa." 
Romans8:11 Ukuba ke uMoya kaThixo owamvusayo uYesu ekufeni ukho kuni, neyenu imizimba uThixo uya kuyinika ubomi ngoMoya wakhe okhoyo kuni." 
Romans8:12 Ngoko ke, mawethu, masingakholisi isimo sethu esonakeleyo." 
Romans8:13 Kuba xa niphila ngokweso simo, niya ekufeni; kodwa ukuba niyazitshitshisa ngamandla oMoya izenzo ezibi zomzimba, niya kudla ubomi." 
Romans8:14 Kaloku abo bakhokelwa nguMoya kaThixo, bangoonyana bakaThixo." 
Romans8:15 UMoya enimamkeleyo akanenzi amakhoboka, wona aphakuzelayo. Kaloku namkele uMoya onenza oonyana abathi: “Tata!” kuThixo." 
Romans8:16 UMoya ngokwakhe ungqinelana nathi ukuthi singabantwana bakaThixo. 
Romans8:17 Ukuba ke singabantwana bakaThixo, sikwaziindlalifa zikaThixo. Ewe, siziindlalifa kunye noKrestu, kuba kaloku siva ubunzima kunye naye, siphinde siwongwe kwakunye naye." 
Romans8:18 Ndigqiba kwelithi ezi ntlungu zangoku azinakufaniswa nobuncwane esiza kubuxhamla; 
Romans8:19 kuba indalo iphela ilangazelela ukuba uThixo ade abaveze oonyana bakhe. 
Romans8:20 Kaloku indalo yathotyelwa kwimeko ephuthileyo, kungengakuthanda kwayo, kodwa kungokuthanda kwalowo wayithobayo. Phofu likho ithemba lokuba" 
Romans8:21 nendalo ngokwayo iya kude ikhululwe kwiimbophelelo zokonakala, ize nayo isiwe enkululekweni nasebuqaqawulini babantwana bakaThixo." 
Romans8:22 Kuba kaloku siyazi ukuba kude kube ngokunje yonke indalo iyancwina inenimba. 
Romans8:23 Asiyiyo yodwa ke: nathi thina siphiwe uMoya osisiqinisekiso sokukhululwa kwethu nguThixo, siyancwina, silindele ukubekwa ewongeni lokuba ngoonyana bakaThixo. Yinkululeko yethu ke leyo." 
Romans8:24 Okunene naxa sisindisiwe nje, sisesethembeni. Ukuba ke siyayibona into esithembe ukuyifumana, asilothemba elo. Kaloku akukho mntu uthemba ukufumana into aseleyifumene." 
Romans8:25 Kodwa ke into esingayiboniyo, esithembe ukuyifumana, siyilindela ngomonde." 
Romans8:26 Ngokukwanjalo noMoya uyasixhasa ekusweleni kwethu amandla, kuba kaloku asiyazi eyona ndlela singathandaza ngayo. Kodwa ke kweso singqala sethu sikhohliwe uMoya ngokwakhe uyasithethelela." 
Romans8:27 Ke uThixo oziphengululayo iintliziyo uyazazi iingcamango zoMoya, kuba kaloku uMoya uthethelela abantu bakaThixo ngokwentando kaThixo." 
Romans8:28 Siyazi ke ukuba kuyo yonke imeko uThixo ubenzela okulungileyo abo bamthandayo, ababizwe ngokwenjongo yakhe." 
Romans8:29 Kaloku abo wayeselebazi kwangaphambili, wabamisela ukuba babe ngumfanekiso woNyana wakhe, ukuze uNyana wakhe abe ngowamazibulo kusapho olukhulu." 
Romans8:30 Abo ke uThixo wabamiselayo kwangaphambili, wababiza kananjalo. Abo wababizayo, wabenza amalungisa. Abo wabenza amalungisa, wabanika iwonga." 
Romans8:31 Masithini na ke ngezi zinto? Ukuba uThixo ungakuthi ngubani onokusichasa? 
Romans8:32 Yena kaloku akambandezanga owakhe uNyana, koko usuke wamnikela ngenxa yethu sonke. Angathini ke ukungasibabali asiphe zonke ezinye izinto?" 
Romans8:33 Ngubani na oya kubamangalela abanyulwa bakaThixo, inguThixo nje obagwebelayo?" 
Romans8:34 Ngubani onokubagweba, ethe wafa nje uKrestu, wathi ngaphezu koko wabuya wavuka, waza waya kuhlala ewongeni kwaThixo, apho asithethelela khona?" 
Romans8:35 Ngubani ke onokusahlukanisa nothando lukaKrestu? Yimbandezelo na? Yinkxwaleko na? Yintshushiso na? Yindlala na? Bubuzé na? Yingozi na? Likrele na? 
Romans8:36 Kunjengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Ngenxa yakho sisesichengeni sokubulawa; yiyo loo nto sesifana neegusha eziya kuxhelwa nje.” 
Romans8:37 Kanti ke, kwezi zinto zonke sisuka soyise sitshatshele ngalowo wasithandayo." 
Romans8:38 Kaloku ndiqinisekile kukuba asikuko nakufa, nabomi, nazithunywa zezulu, nazilawuli, nanto zikhoyo, nanto zizayo, naziphathamandla," 
Romans8:39 nanto ziphezulu, nanto zingaphantsi, nditsho nasiphi na isidalwa, esiya kuba nako ukusahlula nothando lukaThixo olukuye uKrestu Yesu, iNkosi yethu." 
Romans9:1 Mna ndingokaKrestu; ndithetha inyaniso, andixoki. Kwanesazela sam, silawulwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele, siyandingqinela ukuba andixoki." 
Romans9:2 Ndiselusizini olukhulu, ndaye ndinentlungu engapheliyo entliziyweni yam" 
Romans9:3 ngenxa yamawethu amaSirayeli. Ewe, bendingade ndinqwenele ukuba mna ngokwam ndibe ngoqalekisiweyo nguThixo esikhundleni sawo, ndide ndahlukaniswe noKrestu." 
Romans9:4 AmaSirayeli la kaloku uThixo wawenza oonyana bakhe, wabubonakalisa kuwo nobuqaqawuli bakhe. Wenza iminqophiso nawo, wawanika umthetho neyona ndlela yonqulo, wawenzela kwanezithembiso." 
Romans9:5 Ayinzala *yamanyange, kwaye kuwo kwavela uKrestu ngokobuntu, yena owongamela konke, ongulo Thixo omakadunyiswe ngonaphakade. *Amen." 
Romans9:6 Le nto ke ayithethi kuthi ilizwi likaThixo lona ngokwalo litshitshile. Asingabo bonke kaloku abaphuma kuSirayeli abangamaSirayeli ncam. 
Romans9:7 Kananjalo asingabo bonke abazelwe nguAbraham abayinzala yakhe ncakasana. Kaloku uThixo wathi kuAbraham: “Inzala yakho ncam iya kuphuma kunyana wakho uIsake.” 
Romans9:8 Loo nto ithetha ukuthi asingabo bonke abantwana abazeleyo uAbraham abangabantwana bakaThixo. Hayi, ngabantwana besithembiso kuphela ababalelwa ekubeni bayinzala ncam." 
Romans9:9 Kaloku isithembiso sênziwa nguThixo ngala mazwi athi: “Ngexesha elifanelekileyo ndiya kukuvelela, waye ke uSara uya kuzala unyana.”" 
Romans9:10 Ukuqhubela phambili mandithi: Uyise wamawele kaRabheka wayemnye, inguIsake ubawo wethu." 
Romans9:11 Kwathi abantwana bengekazalwa, bengekenzi nto, nokuba yelungileyo, nokuba yembi, uThixo wathi kuRabheka: “Omdala uya kuba ngumkhonzi womncinci.” Kaloku unyulo lukaThixo lusekelwe kubizo lwakhe, kungekuko nakuyiphi na into eyenziwa ngumntu;" 
Romans9:12  
Romans9:13 njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Ndamthanda uYakobi, ndamthiya yena uEsawu.”" 
Romans9:14 Síthini ke ngoko? Ngaba sinokuthi uThixo akanabulungisa? Nakanye! 
Romans9:15 Kaloku wathi kuMosis: “Ndiya kuba nenceba kulowo ndinenceba kuye, ndibe netarhu kulowo ndinetarhu kuye.”" 
Romans9:16 Ke ukunyulwa komntu akuxhomekekanga ekuzithandeleni komntu, okanye ekwenzeni kwakhe, koko kuxhomekeke kwinceba kaThixo." 
Romans9:17 Kaloku iziBhalo zithi kukumkani waseJiputa: “Ndakuphakamisa ukuze ndiwabonakalise ngawe amandla am, ize negama lam lidume, linwenwe kulo lonke ihlabathi.”" 
Romans9:18 Ngoko ke uThixo unenceba kulowo athanda ukumenzela inceba, aze ayenze lukhuni intliziyo yalowo athanda ukuyenza lukhuni." 
Romans9:19 Omnye kuni usenokuthi kum: “Ukuba ke kunjalo angathini na uThixo ukumsola umntu; kungekho bani nje unokumelana nentando kaThixo?” 
Romans9:20 Mntundini, kuxa ungubani wena ukuba ungade uphendulane noThixo? Into ebunjiweyo ingátsho njani kumbumbi wayo ukuthi: “Yini na ukuba undenjenje ukundibumba?”" 
Romans9:21 Akanalo kakade umbumbi ilungelo lokuthi ngamdongwe mnye enze ingqayi exabisekileyo kwanengaxabisekanga? 
Romans9:22 Kukwanjalo ke nangokubhekiselele kwizinto ezenziwe nguThixo. Kaloku wayefuna ukubonakalisa ingqumbo yakhe nokwazisa ubungangamsha bakhe. Ngoko ke wabanyamezela ngomonde abo wayebaqumbele, ababemelwe kukutshatyalaliswa." 
Romans9:23 Wayefuna nokubonakalisa ubuhle besihomo nesithozela sakhe kwabo abenzela inceba, abo abenza bafanele ukuthiwa jize ngewonga." 
Romans9:24 Síthí ke abo uThixo wababizayo, singemaJuda kuphela, sikwakunye nabezinye iintlanga ngokunjalo." 
Romans9:25 Uthetha kwaloo nto kwiNcwadi kaHosiya, xa athi: “Abangengobantu bam ndiya kuthi bangabantu bam; nohlanga ebendingaluthandi ndiya kuthi luyintanda kum." 
Romans9:26 Ewe, nakuloo ndawo kanye kwakusithiwa kubo: ‘Aningobantu bam nina;’ khona apho kanye kuya kuthiwa kubo: ‘Ningoonyana bakaThixo ophilayo.’”" 
Romans9:27 Ke noIsaya udanduluka athi malunga namaSirayeli: “Nangona inani loonyana bakaSirayeli lingangentlabathi yaselwandle, bambalwa kodwa kubo abaya kusindiswa," 
Romans9:28 kuba iNkosi iya kusiwisa kamsinya isigwebo sayo ehlabathini.” 
Romans9:29 Kukwanjengokuba uIsaya wayetshilo ngaphambili ukuthi: “Ukuba iNkosi uSomandla ibingasishiyelanga hlumela, ngesisuke saba njengeSodom, safana neGomora.”" 
Romans9:30 Síthini ke ngoko? Síthi izizwe ezazingenzi migudu yakuba ngamalungisa kuThixo, zakufumana nazo ukuba ngamalungisa, zisenziwa amalungisa ngokholo." 
Romans9:31 Kodwa wona amaSirayeli, nangona ayesenza imigudu yokuba ngamalungisa ngokugcina umthetho, akaphumelelanga." 
Romans9:32 Ngani na? Ngenxa yokuba imigudu yawo ingasekelwanga lukholweni, kodwa isekelwe ekuzenzeleni ngokwawo. Akhubeka “elityeni elikhubekisayo,”" 
Romans9:33 eli *iziBhalo zitshoyo ngalo ukuthi: “Uyabona, ndibeka *eZiyon ilitye elikhubekisayo, ulwalwa olusisikhubekiso; lowo ukholwayo kuye akayi kudaniswa.”" 
Romans10:1 Mawethu, ndilangazelela ngayo yonke intliziyo yam ukuba amaSirayeli, abantu bakowethu, asindiswe, ndaye ndihlala ndimbongoza uThixo ngenxa yawo." 
Romans10:2 Ndingawangqinela ukuba anenzondelelo ngezinto zikaThixo, kodwa engenalo ulwazi olululo." 
Romans10:3 Akayazanga indlela uThixo abalungisa ngayo abantu, aza afuna ukuba ngamalungisa ngeyawo indlela. Ngokwenjenjalo ke akayithobelanga indlela uThixo abenza ngayo amalungisa abantu." 
Romans10:4 Kaloku umthetho ufikelele esiphelweni ngoKrestu, khon' ukuze wonke umntu abe lilungisa kuba ekholwa." 
Romans10:5 Malunga nokuba lilungisa phambi koThixo ngokuthobela umthetho, uMosis ubhale esithi: “Umntu owugcinayo umthetho, wophila ngawo.”" 
Romans10:6 Kodwa malunga nokwenziwa ilungisa ngokholo kuthiwa: “Musa ukuthi entliziyweni yakho: Ngubani na oya kunyuka aye ezulwini?” (oko kukuthi ahlise uKrestu). 
Romans10:7 “Okanye musa ukuthi: Ngubani na oya kuhla aye enzonzobileni?” (oko kukuthi ukuya kunyusa uKrestu kwabafileyo). 
Romans10:8 Ngaba ke kukuthini oko? Kukuthi: “Ilizwi likaThixo likufuphi kuwe, lisemlonyeni wakho nasentliziyweni yakho.” Ilizwi lokholo esilivakalisayo nali:" 
Romans10:9 Ukuba uthe wavuma ngomlomo ukuba uYesu yiNkosi, wakholwa nangentliziyo ukuba uThixo wamvusa kwabafileyo, wosindiswa." 
Romans10:10 Kaloku umntu ukholwa ngentliziyo, aze abe lilungisa phambi koThixo; uvuma ngomlomo, aze asindiswe." 
Romans10:11 IziBhalo kaloku zithi: “Lowo ukholwayo kuye akayi kudaniswa.” 
Romans10:12 Ke ngoko akukho mahluko phakathi komJuda nowolunye uhlanga, kuba le Nkosi inye ikwayinkosi yabo bonke. Kaloku ibasikelela ngesisa ngendyebo yayo bonke abo bazibika kuyo," 
Romans10:13 kuba: “Lowo uzibika ebiza igama leNkosi wosindiswa.” 
Romans10:14 Bangazibika njani kulowo bangàkholwayo kuye; bengakholwa njani bengevanga? Bangeva njani kungekho mntu ushumayelayo; 
Romans10:15 bengashumayela njani bengathunywanga? Kaloku iziBhalo zithi: “Ngumbono omhle ukubukela izigidimi zisihla zinyuka zihambisa iindaba ezimnandi!” 
Romans10:16 Kodwa asingabo bonke abazamkeleyo iindaba ezimnandi, njengoko atshoyo noIsaya ukuthi: “Nkosi, ngubani na othe wakholwa ludaba lwethu?”" 
Romans10:17 Ngoko ke ukholo luvuswa ngokuvakaliswa kodaba; ke lona udaba luvakalisa uKrestu. 
Romans10:18 Ngaba awevanga na kodwa amaSirayeli? Ewe, avile. Kaloku iziBhalo zithi: “Ukuhlokoma kwelizwi labo kuvakala kuwo wonke umhlaba; namazwi abo afikelela eziphelweni zehlabathi.”" 
Romans10:19 Ngaba kodwa wona amaSirayeli ayengaqondi? Ukuphendula mandiqale ngoMosis othi: “Mna ndiya kunenza nikhweletele uhlanga olungento; ndiya kunixhokonxa ngohlanga olungenangqondo.” 
Romans10:20 Ade atsho nokutsho uIsaya ukuthi: “Ndifunyenwe ngâbo babengandifuni, ndabonakala kwâbo babengabuzisi ngam.”" 
Romans10:21 Kanti ngokubhekiselele kumaSirayeli uthi: “Imini yonke bendicengana nabantu abangevayo, abandiphikisayo.”" 
Romans11:1 Ngaba uThixo ubalahlile na abantu bakhe amaSirayeli? Nakanye! Nam ngokwam ndingumSirayeli, ndiyinzala ka-Abraham, ndingowendlu kaBhenjamin." 
Romans11:2 UThixo akabalahlanga abantu bakhe awabanyula mhlamnene. Kaloku niyayazi *eziBhalweni indawo apho uEliya awamangalela khona kuThixo amaSirayeli, esithi:" 
Romans11:3 “Nkosi, amaSirayeli ababulele *abashumayeli bakho, namaqonga akho amadini awadilizile. Ndim ndodwa oseleyo, kwaye nam afuna ukundibulala.”" 
Romans11:4 Limphendula njani ke ilizwi likaThixo? Lithi: “Ndizishiyele amadoda angamawaka asixhenxe angamnqulanga *uBhali.” 
Romans11:5 Kanti nangoku ke kukwanjalo. Lisekho iqaqobana elichongwe nguThixo ngokwesisa sakhe. 
Romans11:6 Lona lachongwa nguThixo ngokwesisa sakhe, elibabala, engalinyuli ngenxa yezenzo zalo. Kaloku ukuba uThixo wayenyula abantu ngokwezenzo zabo, isisa sakhe asingebi saba sisisa." 
Romans11:7 Kúthiweni ke ngoko? Makuthiwe amaSirayeli akayifumananga into awayeyizondelele. Kodwa iqaqobana elichongwe nguThixo layifumana, aza ke wona amanye aqaqadekiswa," 
Romans11:8 njengoko iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “UThixo ubenze badengeka, baza àbabona ngamehlo, àbeva ngeendlebe; ibe ke unangoku basenjalo.”" 
Romans11:9 UDavide naye uthi: “Mababanjwe, bavingcelwe kumatheko abo; mabakhubeke, beve impindezelo." 
Romans11:10 Mabamfanyekiswe, bangaboni, babandezeleke maxa onke.”" 
Romans11:11 Ngaba isiwo samaSirayeli sawazisela intshabalalo? Nakanye! Kwathi ngesi siwo sawo usindiso lwazifikela iintlanga, khon' ukuze ziwavusele ikhwele." 
Romans11:12 Esi siphoso samaSirayeli saluphathela intaphane yeentsikelelo uluntu; ngoko ke ukoyisakala kwawo kwaba yinzuzo enkulu ezintlangeni. Zobeka phi na ke ukusikeleleka iintlanga akuba amaSirayeli ezinikele ngokupheleleyo kuThixo!
