Romans11:13 Ngoku mandithethe nani, zintlanga. Okunene ekubeni mna ndingulowo *uthunywe kuzo iintlanga, ndizimisele ukuwenza ubalasele umsebenzi wam," 
Romans11:14 ndide ndivusele amawethu ikhwele, ndiyisindise inxalenye yawo." 
Romans11:15 Kaloku xa ukulahlwa kwawo kuxolelanise ihlabathi noThixo, koba njani ukwamkelwa kwawo? Kofana novuko lwabafileyo!" 
Romans11:16 Ukuba isonka sokuqala sentlama singcwalisiwe ngokwenziwa umnikelo, kwangokunjalo zingcwele zonke ezinye ezenziwe ngaloo ntlama. Ukuba iingcambu zomthi zingcwele, kwangokunjalo namasebe angcwele." 
Romans11:17 Inxalenye yamasebe omnquma yaqhuzulwa kwamiliselwa amasebe omnquma wasendle esiqwini sawo. Nina ke, zintlanga, ningaloo masebe omnquma wasendle. Nanikwa inxaxheba kwincindi yeengcambu eziphilileyo zomnquma." 
Romans11:18 Musa ke ukuziphakamisa kunamanye amasebe. Kakade ke wena ungaqhayisa ngantoni? Asinguwe kaloku othwele iingcambu, ziingcambu ezithwele wena!" 
Romans11:19 Kodwa wena uya kuthi: “Aqhuzulwa amasebe, ukuze kumiliselwe mna.”" 
Romans11:20 Unyanisile, aqhuzulwa ngenxa yokuba engakholwa, ke wena umi apho umiliselwe khona ngenxa yokuba ukholwa. Musa ke ukuba nekratshi, koko yoyika." 
Romans11:21 Engawasindisanga nje kaloku uThixo amasebe omthi endalo, angákusindisa njani wena?" 
Romans11:22 Khawukhangele ke ububele nobungqongqo bukaThixo! Okunene úngqongqo kwabo bonayo, kodwa kuwe únobubele, ukuba ùthe wahlala kobu bubele. Kodwa kungenjalo wogawulwa nawe ngokwakho!" 
Romans11:23 Nawo ke amaSirayeli, ukuba ayahlukana nalo eli phike lawo lokungakholwa, omiliselwa kwakhona. Kaloku uThixo unako ukubuya awamilisele." 
Romans11:24 Nina zintlanga nikhiwe kumnquma wasendle, naza nathi ngokunxamnye nemvelo namiliselwa kumnquma otyaliweyo. NgamaSirayeli kaloku amasebe omnquma otyaliweyo. Ngenxa yaloo nto ke kulula kuThixo ukuwamilisela kwakuloo mnquma." 
Romans11:25 Mawethu, andithandi ukuba ningayazi le mfihlakalo, hleze nizicingele ukuba niziingqondi, le yokuba inxalenye yamaSirayeli yoqaqadeka lide inani elizeleyo leentlanga liphelele." 
Romans11:26 Kwakuba kunjalo ke xa ewonke uSirayeli uya kusindiswa, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo ukuthi: “Uya kuvela *eZiyon uMsindisi, akuphelise kwindlu kaYakobi ukungahloneli-Thixo;" 
Romans11:27 nguwo lo ke umnqophiso wam nabo, mhla ndothi ndizicime izono zabo.”" 
Romans11:28 Ngokuzichasa iindaba ezimnandi amaSirayeli aziintshaba zikaThixo, nto leyo inincedayo ke nina zintlanga. Kodwa ke ngokonyulo lukaThixo aziintanda zakhe ngenxa *yamanyange." 
Romans11:29 Kaloku uThixo akalujiki ubizo lwakhe, engazisoli nangezibabalo zakhe." 
Romans11:30 Nina ke zintlanga benifudula ningamthobeli uThixo, kodwa ngoku nenzelwe inceba ngenxa yokungamthobeli kwamaSirayeli." 
Romans11:31 Kwangokunjalo namaSirayeli akamthobeli ngoku uThixo, ngenxa yenceba eniyenzelweyo nina, ukuze kamva enzelwe inceba nawo." 
Romans11:32 Kaloku uThixo wabaquka bonke abantu ekungamthobelini, ukuze abenzele inceba xa bebonke." 
Romans11:33 Hayi ke bethu ubukhulu bobuhandiba bukaThixo, nobunzulu bobulumko nokwazi kwakhe! Asikuko nokuba aziphengululeki izigqibo zakhe, azilandeki iindlela zakhe!" 
Romans11:34 Kanene: “Ngubani na owakha wayazi ingqiqo yeNkosi, ingubani na owakha waba ngumcebisi wayo?" 
Romans11:35 Ngubani khona owakha wayiboleka nto, waza wabuyekezwa ngayo?”" 
Romans11:36 Kaloku zonke izinto ziphuma kuyo iNkosi, zikho ngayo, zikholo yona. Mayidunyiswe ke iNkosi kude kube ngunaphakade! *Amen." 
Romans12:1 Ndiyanikhuthaza ngoko, mawethu, ngenxa yenceba kaThixo, ukuba nizinikele nina ziqu nibe lidini eliphilayo, elingcwele, elikholekileyo kuThixo. Leyo ke yindlela yenu efanelekileyo yokukhonza uThixo ngengqiqo." 
Romans12:2 Musani ke ukuthatha isimilo sabantu beli phakade, kodwa iingqondo zenu maziguquke zihlaziyeke, nize niyivume intando kaThixo, yona ilungileyo, ikholekileyo, igqibeleleyo." 
Romans12:3 Ngalo ubabalo endababalwa ngalo ndithi kuni nonke: Musani ukuzicingela ngaphezu koko umntu amelwe kukuzicingela ngako. Ndaweni yaloo nto yibani neengcinga ezithobekileyo. Elowo nalowo makazikhuthaze ngokokholo aluphiwe nguThixo. 
Romans12:4 Kaloku, kwanjengokuba sinamalungu amaninzi mzimbeni mnye, abe ke onke amalungu la engenamsebenzi mnye," 
Romans12:5 ngokunjalo thina aba, sibaninzi nje, simzimba mnye ngokumanywa noKrestu. Sonke ke ngabanye singamalungu omnye elomnye." 
Romans12:6 Masizisebenzise ke iziphiwo ezahlukeneyo esababalwa ngazo nguThixo. Ukuba sinesiphiwo sokuvakalisa ilizwi elivela kuThixo, masilivakalise ngokokholo esinalo." 
Romans12:7 Ukuba sinesiphiwo sokukhonza abanye, masizingise ekukhonzeni. Ukuba sinesiphiwo sokufundisa, masifundise kangangoko sinako." 
Romans12:8 Ukuba sinesiphiwo sokukhuthaza, masiqine ekukhuthazeni. Ongumabi makazabe izipho ngesisa. Owongameleyo makongamele ngenzondelelo. Owenza inceba makayenze echwayitile." 
Romans12:9 Uthando malungabi naluhanahaniso. Yithiyeni inkohlakalo; bambelelani kokulungileyo. 
Romans12:10 Thandanani ngokwabazalanayo. Shiyiselanani ngokwenzelana imbeko. 
Romans12:11 Zondelelani ningatyhafi. Yibani nefuthe loMoya. Yikhonzeni iNkosi. 
Romans12:12 Vuyani, ninethemba nje, ninyamezele ezimbandezelweni zenu, nithandaze ningayeki." 
Romans12:13 Ziboneleleni iintswelo zamakholwa, nizikhathaze ngokubuka iindwendwe." 
Romans12:14 Basikeleleni abanitshutshisayo; sikelelani, ningaqalekisi." 
Romans12:15 Vuyani nabavuyayo, nilile nabalilayo." 
Romans12:16 Yibani moya mnye. Musani ukusukela amawonga; yaneliswani kukuzithoba. Musani ukuzicingela ukuba niziingqondi. 
Romans12:17 Musani ukubuyekeza ububi ngobubi. Zimiseleni ukwenza okulungileyo phambi kwabantu bonke. 
Romans12:18 Yenzani unako-nako ukuhlalisana ngoxolo nabantu bonke. 
Romans12:19 Zihlobo, musani ukuziphindezela ngokwenu. Impindezelo yiyekeleni ingqumbo kaThixo, njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Impindezelo yeyam, kuya kubuyekeza mna, itsho iNkosi.”" 
Romans12:20 Kaloku iziBhalo zikwatsho nokuthi: “Ukuba utshaba lwakho lulambile, luphe into etyiwayo; ukuba lunxaniwe, luphe into eselwayo; kuba ngokwenjenjalo ke, woba uluvisa udano, khon' ukuze luguquke.”" 
Romans12:21 Musa ukoyiswa bububi; boyise ububi ngokulungisa. 
Romans13:1 Wonke umntu makathobele abasemagunyeni, kuba akukho gunya lingaveli kuThixo. Amagunya akhoyo amiselwe nguThixo." 
Romans13:2 Ngoko ke, ochasene namagunya uphikisa ummiselo kaThixo; yaye ke wonke umntu owenza loo nto uzibizela ukugwetywa." 
Romans13:3 Kaloku abaphathi aba aboyikeki kubantu abalungisayo, boyikeka kwabonayo. Ukuba ufuna ukungamoyiki osemagunyeni, yenza okulungileyo, yaye ke uya kukuncoma." 
Romans13:4 Kaloku abasemagunyeni zizicaka zikaThixo, khon' ukuze kulungelwe kwawena. Kodwa, ukuba uthe wenza into embi yoyika, kuba abasemagunyeni banikwe igunya lokohlwaya. Kaloku bazizicaka zikaThixo; bayaphindezela, bamohlwaye lowo wonayo." 
Romans13:5 Ngoko ke bathobeleni abasemagunyeni, ingengakuba nisoyika isohlwayo kuphela, kodwa nangenxa yokuhlonela uThixo." 
Romans13:6 Nirhafa nje kaloku, kungenxa yokuba abasemagunyeni bangamagosa kaThixo, ngakumbi xa besenza umsebenzi wabo." 
Romans13:7 Ngoko ke bonke banikeni okubafaneleyo – irhafu kofanelwe yirhafu, umrhumo kofanelwe ngumrhumo, ukuhlonitshwa kofanelwe kukuhlonitshwa, imbeko kofanelwe yimbeko." 
Romans13:8 Musani ukuba natyala lanto mntwini, lingelilo elokuthandana. Kaloku omthandayo omnye uwuthobele ngokupheleleyo umthetho." 
Romans13:9 Imiyalelo ethi: “Uze ungakrexezi, uze ungabulali, uze ungebi, uze ungangqini buxoki, uze unganqweneli,” nokuba nguwuphi umyalelo ongomnye, ushwankathelwa ngelithi: “Uze umthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.”" 
Romans13:10 Olu thando ke alunakuze lone mntu. Ngoko ke ukuthanda kukuwuthobela ngokupheleleyo umthetho. 
Romans13:11 Masenjenjalo ke, sisazi nje ukuba eli selilixesha lokuba sivuke ebuthongweni. Kaloku usindiso lukufuphi kuthi ngoku kunasekuqaleni kwethu ukukholwa." 
Romans13:12 Ubusuku buhambile, sekuza kusa. Masahlukane ke ngoko nemisebenzi yobumnyama, sixhobe ngezikrweqe zokukhanya." 
Romans13:13 Masiziphathe ngokundileka njengabahamba emini, singabi sezindywaleni nasekunxileni, ekuhenyuzeni nasekurheletyeni, singabi namona nazinkani." 
Romans13:14 INkosi uYesu Krestu mayibe sisikrweqe senu, ningasilungiseleli isimo senu esonakeleyo ukuze nanelise iinkanuko zaso." 
Romans14:1 Lowo ke uswele amandla elukholweni, mamkeleni, kodwa kungabi nganjongo yakuphikisana nezimvo zakhe." 
Romans14:2 Omnye ukholo lwakhe lumvumela ukuba atye nakuphi na ukutya, kodwa yena okholo lubuthathaka utya imifuno kuphela." 
Romans14:3 Lowo utya konke makangamdeli ozila ukutya okuthile, nalowo uzila ukutya okuthile makangamgwebi otya konke, kuba uThixo umamkele." 
Romans14:4 Yini na wena ukuba usigwebe isicaka somnye? Kaloku siya kugwetywa yinkosi yaso. Kanti notyayo akayi konakalelwa nto, kuba iNkosi inako ukumgcina." 
Romans14:5 Omnye okunene uthi umhla othile ubalulekile kunomnye umhla, wumbi ke uthi imihla iyafana. Elowo ke makaqiniseke kweyakhe ingqiqo." 
Romans14:6 Lowo ke ugcina umhla othile, uwugcinela iNkosi. Lowo utya nakuphi na ukutya, esitya nje, uzinikela eNkosini, kuba ubulela uThixo. Nalowo ungatyi konke ukutya, engatyi nje, uzinikela eNkosini, kuba naye ubulela uThixo." 
Romans14:7 Akukho namnye kuthi uziphilelayo, kananjalo akukho namnye uzifelayo." 
Romans14:8 Kaloku nokuba sidla ubomi, siphilela iNkosi, nokuba siyafa, sifela iNkosi. Ngoko ke nokuba sidla ubomi, nokuba siyafa, singabeNkosi." 
Romans14:9 Kuba kaloku uKrestu wafa, wabuya wadla ubomi, ngenjongo yokuba abe yiNkosi yabafileyo nabaphilayo." 
Romans14:10 Wena ke, yini ukuba umgwebe uwenu? Ke wena, yini na ukuba umdele uwenu? Kaloku sonke siya kuma enkundleni kaThixo," 
Romans14:11 kuba *iziBhalo zithi: “Ndingophilayo nje, itsho iNkosi, aya kugoba kum onke amadolo, zimdumise uThixo zonke iilwimi.”" 
Romans14:12 Ngoko ke sonke ngabanye siya kunika ingxelo phambi koThixo. 
Romans14:13 Masingabi sagwebana ke – ndaweni yaloo nto masizimisele ukungenzi nanye into enokumkhubekisa imwise esonweni umwethu. 
Romans14:14 Ndimanywe neNkosi uYesu nje, ndazi ngokuqinisekileyo ukuba akukho nanye into engàtyiwayo ngokunokwayo. Kodwa kulowo uthi into ayityiwa, ayityiwa ke." 
Romans14:15 Ukuba uyamhlungisa umwenu ngento osukuba uyitya, inkqubo yakho ayiseyiyo eyothando. Musa ukuthi ngenxa yokutya okutyayo umtshabalalise lowo uKrestu wamfelayo." 
Romans14:16 Inkululeko eninayo ekuzikhetheleni ukutya mayingabangi kungcikivana. 
Romans14:17 Kaloku ukukholisa uThixo akungakutya nakusela; kodwa kukwenza ubulungisa, sinoxolo novuyo, silawulwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Romans14:18 Owenjenjalo ke ukhonza uKrestu, ukholekile kuThixo, waye usulungekile emehlweni abantu." 
Romans14:19 Ngoku ke masizondelele izinto zoxolo nezokwakhana. 
Romans14:20 Musa ukuthi ngenxa yokutya uwuchithe umsebenzi kaThixo. Okunene konke ukutya kunyulu, kodwa kuba yinto embi kulowo uthi ngenxa yokutya abe sisikhubekiso komnye." 
Romans14:21 Kulungile ukuba ungatyi nyama, ungaseli tywala, ungenzi nantoni na engámkhubekisayo umwenu." 
Romans14:22 Unaluvo luthile na ngale ndawo yokutya? Hlala unalo ke phambi koThixo! Uyavuya lowo ungenasazela ngento ayityayo! 
Romans14:23 Kodwa ke lowo uthandabuzayo xa atyayo, selegwetyiwe, kuba akatyi ekholwa. Yonke ke into ayenzayo umntu engaqinisekanga ukuba iyamkholisa uThixo isisono." 
Romans15:1 Thina ke sinokholo olomeleleyo simelwe kukuthwalisana ubunzima nabo balukholo lubuthathaka. Masingazikholisi thina ziqu," 
Romans15:2 koko masithi sonke ngabanye sikholise abamelwane bethu ezintweni ezilungileyo ezinokulukhulisa ukholo lwabo. 
Romans15:3 Kaloku naye uKrestu akazikholisanga, njengoko nazo *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Izingcikivo zabakungcikivayo zathwalwa ndim.”" 
Romans15:4 Kaloku zonke izinto eziseziBhalweni zabhalelwa ukusifundisa, khon' ukuze sihlale sihleli sinethemba ngonyamezelo nenkuthazo esizifumana kuzo iziBhalo." 
Romans15:5 Wanga ke uThixo, osinika unyamezelo nenkuthazo, anganenza nibe moya mnye ngokwentando kaKrestu Yesu," 
Romans15:6 ukuze nithi, ngamxhelo mnye, nimdumise ngazwi-nye uThixo, uYise weNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
Romans15:7 Yamkelanani ke, njengokuba naye uKrestu wasamkelayo, ukuze adunyiswe uThixo." 
Romans15:8 Ke kaloku ndithi, uKrestu waba ngumkhonzi wamaJuda, ukubonisa ukuba uThixo unyanisekile, uyazizalisekisa izithembiso awazenzayo *kumanyange." 
Romans15:9 Ngokunjalo uKrestu wayenza le nto ukuze neentlanga zimdumise uThixo ngenxa yenceba yakhe, njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Ngenxa yoko ndiya kukudumisa phakathi kweentlanga, ndiliculele indumiso igama lakho.”" 
Romans15:10 Kananjalo zithi: “Yibani nemihlali ndawonye nabantu bakhe, nina zintlanga.”" 
Romans15:11 Kananjalo: “Yidumiseni iNkosi, nonke nina zintlanga; yibongeni, nonke nina zizwe.”" 
Romans15:12 Kananjalo noIsaya uthi: “Liya kubakho iHlumelo likaJese. Uya kuvela oya kulawula iintlanga. Ziya kuthembela kuye izizwe.” 
Romans15:13 Wanga ke uThixo, umthombo wethemba, angáthi ngokukholwa kwenu anivuyise kakhulu, aniphe uxolo, ukuze ithemba lenu liye lisanda ngokwanda ngamandla oMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Romans15:14 Mawethu, ndiqinisekile ukuba ningabantu abalungileyo, abanolwazi olunzulu, abanako nokucebisana." 
Romans15:15 Kodwa ke, mawethu, kwezinye iindawo ndinibhalele ndithetha ngokuphandle, ndinikhumbuza kwakhona ngeendawo ezithile. Ndithethe ngokuphandle ngenxa yobabalo uThixo awandibabala ngalo," 
Romans15:16 ubabalo ke lokuba ngumkhonzi kaKrestu Yesu olungiselela iintlanga. Ngokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo ndisebenza okombingeleli, ukuze iintlanga zibe nokuba lidini elamkelekileyo kuThixo, lingcwaliswe nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Romans15:17 Ekubeni ndimkhonza ngolu hlobo uThixo, ndimanywe noKrestu Yesu, ndifanele ukuba neqhayiya." 
Romans15:18 Ke mna andinabuganga bakuthetha nto ngazinto angazisebenzanga ngam uKrestu. UKrestu wasebenza ngam ukuze iintlanga zimlulamele, esebenza ngamazwi am nangezenzo zam," 
Romans15:19 esebenza ngamandla emiqondiso nemimangaliso, nangamandla oMoya. Ndithe ke ndaqala eJerusalem, ndajikeleza ndaya kutsho nakwelaseIliriko, ndizivakalisa kuyo yonke indawo iindaba ezimnandi zikaKrestu." 
Romans15:20 Ndihlala ndizimisele ukushumayela iindaba ezimnandi apho kungekaviwa nto khona ngoKrestu, ukuze ndingakhi phezu kwesiseko somnye," 
Romans15:21 kodwa kube njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Abo bangaxelelwanga nto ngaye, baya kubona; nabo bengevanga nto, baya kuqonda.”" 
Romans15:22 Ngenxa yoko bendisoloko ndixakekile, andabi nako ukunihambela." 
Romans15:23 Ngoku ke, ekubeni ndingasenandawo emandiyihambele kule mimandla, nasekubeni ndineminyaka emininzi ndilangazelela ukunihambela," 
Romans15:24 ndothi ke xa ndihambela eSpeyini, ndinityelele nani, kuba ndinethemba lokunibona xa ndigqitha apho. Emva kokuba ke sendikhe ndaba lundwendwe phakathi kwenu okwexeshana, ndinethemba lokuba nondixhasa ukuya eSpeyini." 
Romans15:25 Kodwa okwangoku ndisaya eJerusalem, ukuya kulungiselela abantu bakaThixo." 
Romans15:26 Kaloku kwakholeka kwabaseMakedoni nabaseAkaya ukuba babancede abantu bakaThixo baseJerusalem abasweleyo. 
Romans15:27 Benjenjalo kuba babemelwe kakade kukwenjenjalo. Kaloku ekubeni amakholwa angamaJuda ethe anikela ngezinto ezizezoMoya kwiintlanga, kufanelekile ukuba namakholwa aziintlanga anikele kumaJuda ngezinto zokuxhasa ubomi." 
Romans15:28 Ndakuba ke ndiwugqibile lo msebenzi, ndiyinikele kuwo loo mali, ndothi xa ndiya eSpeyini, ndinityelele." 
Romans15:29 Xa ndinityelelayo ke, ndiqinisekile ukuba ndoniphathela zonke iintsikelelo asisikelela ngazo uKrestu." 
Romans15:30 Ke kaloku, mawethu, ndiyanibongoza ngenxa yeNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu nangenxa yokusithanda kwakhe uMoya, ukuba nindithandazele kuThixo, njengokuba nam ndizithandazela." 
Romans15:31 Ndithandazela ukuba ndihlangulwe kwabangamphulaphuliyo uThixo abakwelakwaJuda. Ndithandazela nokuba kwamkeleke ukubalungiselela kwam abantu bakaThixo abaseJerusalem," 
Romans15:32 khon' ukuze ndinihambele ngovuyo ngemvume kaThixo, sichwayitisane." 
Romans15:33 Ke kaloku uThixo, imbangi yoxolo, makabe nani nonke. *Amen." 
Romans16:1 Ke kaloku ndimyaleza kuni udade uFibhi, oligosakazi kwibandla eliseKenkreya." 
Romans16:2 Mamkeleni egameni leNkosi njengokuba nifanele ukwenjenjalo ningabantu bakaThixo nje. Mncedeni emicimbini asukuba efuna uncedo lwenu kuyo, kuba naye ngokwakhe wanceda abantu abaninzi, endingomnye wabo nam lo." 
Romans16:3 Imibuliso kuPriska noAkwila, abasebenzela uKrestu Yesu njengam." 
Romans16:4 Kaloku bona bâbubeka esichengeni ubomi babo ngenxa yam, nto leyo ke ekungabuleli mna ndedwa kubo ngayo, koko kubulela nawo onke amabandla asezintlangeni." 
Romans16:5 Libuliseni kwanebandla elihlanganela endlwini yabo. Ndibuliseleni kuEpeneto, umhlobo wam othandekayo, owaba ngowokuqala ukukholwa kuKrestu eAsiya;" 
Romans16:6 nindibulisele nakuMariya owabulaleka kakhulu ngenxa yenu. 
Romans16:7 Imibuliso kuAndroniko noJuniya, amawethu awayebanjwe kunye nam. Bona baxatyisiwe kakhulu *ngabathunywa bakaKrestu, kwaye bâkholwa kuKrestu ngaphambi kwam." 
Romans16:8 Ndibuliseleni kuAmpliyato, umhlobo wam othandekayo eNkosini." 
Romans16:9 Imibuliso ku-Urbhano, osebenzela uKrestu kunye nam, nakuStaki, umhlobo wam othandekayo." 
Romans16:10 Ndibuliseleni nakuApele ovavanyiweyo waza wafumaneka ethembekile kuKrestu. Imibuliso kwabakwa-Aristobhulo. 
Romans16:11 Ndibuliseleni kuHerodiyo umwethu. Imibuliso kwabakwaNarkiso abakholwayo eNkosini. 
Romans16:12 Imibuliso kuTrifena noTrifosa abayisebenzele kangaka iNkosi. Ndibuliseleni kuPersi othandekayo, obulaleke gqitha emsebenzini weNkosi." 
Romans16:13 Imibuliso kuRufo umnyulwa weNkosi, nakunina, onjengomama kum." 
Romans16:14 Imibuliso kuAsinkrito, uFilego, uHerma, uPatrobha, uHerme, namawethu akunye nabo." 
Romans16:15 Imibuliso kuFilologo noJuliya, uNere nodade wabo, no-Olimpa, nabo bonke abantu bakaThixo abakunye nabo." 
Romans16:16 Bulisanani ngokwamakholwa. Ayanibulisa onke amabandla kaKrestu. 
Romans16:17 Ke kaloku, mawethu, ndiyaniyala: balumkeleni abaxabanisayo nabakhubekisayo, besenza okuchaseneyo nemfundiso enayifundiswayo nina. Zikhwebuleni kubo." 
Romans16:18 Abantu abanjalo àbakhonzi yona iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu. Hayi, basebenzela izisu zabo. Ngamazwi abo amnandi bayakhohlisa, balukuhle iintliziyo zabantu abanyulu." 
Romans16:19 Bonke bavile ngokumlulamela kwenu uKrestu; into ke leyo endivuyisayo ngani. Ndinga ke ningaba zizilumko okunene kokulungileyo; kodwa ningabi zizo kokubi. 
Romans16:20 Ke uThixo, imbangi yoxolo, uya kumnyhasha kamsinya uSathana phantsi kweenyawo zenu. Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani." 
Romans16:21 Uyanibulisa uTimoti osebenza nam, noLukiyo, noJason, noSosipatro, amawethu." 
Romans16:22 Nam Tertiyo osandla siyibhalileyo le ncwadi, ndiyanibulisa ndingoweNkosi nje." 
Romans16:23 Uyanibulisa uGayo endilundwendwe lwakhe, yena lihlanganela endlwini yakhe lonke ibandla. Uyanibulisa uErasto unondyebo wedolophu, noKwarto umwethu. [" 
Romans16:24 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani nonke. *Amen.] 
Romans16:25 Masimdumise uThixo, yena onako ukunizinzisa elukholweni ngokweendaba ezimnandi endizivakalisayo, ndishumayela uYesu Krestu. Ezi ndaba zityhila imfihlakalo eyayikade ifihliwe mandulo." 
Romans16:26 Ngoku ke ibonakalisiwe. Yile mfihlakalo ke yayixelwa zizibhalo *zabashumayeli. Babesenjenjalo ngokuyalelwa nguThixo ohlala ehleli. Lo myalelo uThixo uwenze ukuze kubekho abakholiweyo nabamthobelayo kuzo zonke iintlanga. 
Romans16:27 Ke uThixo uSobulumko makadunyiswe kude kube ngunaphakade ngenxa kaYesu Krestu. *Amen. 
1Corinthians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos ndibizwe *ndangumthunywa kaYesu Krestu ngokuthanda kukaThixo. Ndibhala ndikunye noSosteno uwethu. 
1Corinthians1:2 Ndibhalela ibandla likaThixo eliseKorinte, abakhethwe ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu, bebizelwe ukuba yimilowo yakwaThixo ndawonye nabo bonke abalinqulayo ezindaweni zonke igama leNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, oyiNkosi yabo kwaneyethu." 
1Corinthians1:3 Kuni ke ndithi: Makube sisisa, kube luxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndihlala ndimbulela ngani uThixo wam ngenxa yesisa anibabale ngaso ngokunimanya noYesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians1:5 Kaloku, nimanyene noKrestu nje, ninendyebo ngezinto zonke, ekuthetheni nasekwazini ngokupheleleyo." 
1Corinthians1:6 Kaloku iindaba ezingoKrestu zithe zamila kuni," 
1Corinthians1:7 kangangokuba aniphoswanga nasinye isipho esivela kuThixo ngeli xesha nikulindeleyo ukubonakala kweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu. 
1Corinthians1:8 INkosi uYesu Krestu iya kunomeleza kude kube sekupheleni, ningabi nabala ngeMini yayo." 
1Corinthians1:9 Uthembekile uThixo, yena wanibizayo ukuba nibe nobudlelane noNyana wakhe uYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu." 
1Corinthians1:10 Egameni leNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu ndiyanibongoza, mawethu, ukuba nivane, nithethe nto-nye, kungabikho zimbambano phakathi kwenu. Manyanani nibe luqilima, nimxhelo mnye, ninazimvo zinye." 
1Corinthians1:11 Kuba kaloku, mawethu, ndixelelwe ngani ngabakuloKlowe ukuba kukho ukungavisisani phakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Ndithetha le nto yokuba kuthiwa omnye kuni uthi: “Mna ndingokaPawulos;” omnye athi: “Mna ndingoka-Apolo;” omnye athi: “Mna ndingokaPetros;” omnye ke athi: “Mna ndingokaKrestu.” 
1Corinthians1:13 Ngaba wahluka-hlukene na uKrestu? Ngaba nguPawulos na owabethelelwa ngenxa yenu? Ngaba nabhaptizwa egameni likaPawulos na? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndiyambulela uThixo kuba ndingabhaptizanga namnye kuni ngaphandle kukaKrispo noGayo," 
1Corinthians1:15 ukuze kungabikho mntu uthi ndabhaptiza egameni lam. 
1Corinthians1:16 Gxebe, ndabhaptiza noStefano nendlu yakhe. Ngaphandle kwabo ke, andikhumbuli ukuba ndabhaptiza wumbi." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kakade uKrestu akandithumanga kubhaptiza; wandithuma ukushumayela iindaba ezimnandi, kungabi ngabuciko bakuthetha, ukuze umnqamlezo kaKrestu ungalanjathiswa." 
1Corinthians1:18 Kaloku udaba lokufa kukaKrestu emnqamlezweni okunene lububudenge kwabatshabalalayo, kodwa kuthi, thina basindiswayo, lungamandla kaThixo." 
1Corinthians1:19 Kaloku *iziBhalo zitsho ukuthi: “Ndiya kububhangisa ubulumko bezilumko; ukuhlakanipha kweengqondi ndikuphuthise.” 
1Corinthians1:20 Xa kunjalo ke ziphi na izilumko, ziphi na iingqondi, ephi na wona amaciko eli hlabathi? Kaloku uThixo ubonakalisile ukuba ubulumko beli hlabathi bubudenge." 
1Corinthians1:21 UThixo ngobulumko bakhe ubone okokuba ihlabathi malingabi nako ukumazi ngobalo ubulumko. Hayi, kwakholeka kuThixo ukuba abo bakholwayo abasindise “ngobudenge” belizwi esilishumayelayo." 
1Corinthians1:22 AmaJuda afuna umqondiso; amaGrike wona afuna ubulumko; 
1Corinthians1:23 ke thina sivakalisa uKrestu ebethelelwe emnqamlezweni; into ke leyo esisikhubekiso kumaJuda nebubudenge kumaGrike. 
1Corinthians1:24 Ke kwabo babiziweyo, amaJuda kwanamaGrike, sivakalisa uKrestu ongamandla nobulumko bukaThixo." 
1Corinthians1:25 Kaloku into kaThixo ebubudenge, inobulumko kuneyabantu; nento kaThixo engathi ayinamandla, yomelele kuneyabantu." 
1Corinthians1:26 Mawethu, yikhumbuleni into enaniyiyo ukubizwa kwenu nguThixo. Babembalwa kuni abazizilumko ngokomgangatho wabantu, bembalwa abanamandla, bembalwa abangabantwana begazi." 
1Corinthians1:27 Kodwa uThixo usuke wanyula izinto ezibonakala ngathi zibubudenge ebantwini, ukuze ngokwenjenjalo adanise izilumko. Ngokunjalo ke uThixo unyule nezinto ezibonakala ngathi azinamandla ngokwabantu, ukuze ngokwenjenjalo adanise abanamandla." 
1Corinthians1:28 Ewe, uThixo unyule izinto ezibonakala zidelekile ebantwini, ngathi azinto yanto, azikho nokubakho, ezinyulela ukuze aphuthise ngazo izinto ezibonakala ngathi zibalulekile ebantwini." 
1Corinthians1:29 Xa kunjalo ke akukho namnye unokuqhayisa. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kaloku uThixo unimanye noKrestu Yesu osityhilela bonke ubulumko bukaThixo. Ngaye uThixo usenza amalungisa, asenze imilowo yakwakhe, asinike inkululeko." 
1Corinthians1:31 Ngoko ke, njengoko iziBhalo zitshoyo: “Oqhayisayo makaqhayise ngeNkosi.”" 
1Corinthians2:1 Mawethu, ngokuya bendinihambele ukuze ndinazise iindaba zikaThixo ebezingaziwa mntu, andizanga ngabuciko bakuthetha nalwazi." 
1Corinthians2:2 Kaloku ndagqiba kwelokuba ndingazi nto phakathi kwenu, ingenguye uYesu Krestu, naye ke ebethelelwe emnqamlezweni." 
1Corinthians2:3 Ndathi ke, ndakufika kuni, ndaba ngobuthathaka, ndinoloyiko, ndigubha kakhulu." 
1Corinthians2:4 Ukuthetha kwam nokuvakalisa kwam uKrestu akubanga ngabuciko. Hayi, kube kukubonakalisa amandla oMoya kaThixo." 
1Corinthians2:5 Ngoko ke ukholo lwenu malungaxhomekeki bucikweni bamntu, kodwa malusekelwe ngamandla kaThixo." 
1Corinthians2:6 Kambe ke into endiyithethayo ibubulumko kwabo bavuthiweyo. Kodwa ke obo abububo ubulumko beli phakade, bungebubo nobabaphathi balo ababhangayo." 
1Corinthians2:7 Ndixela ubulumko bukaThixo obungaziwa mntu, awathi uThixo kwangaphambi kokudalwa kwehlabathi wabumisela ukuze sibe nodumo ngenxa yabo." 
1Corinthians2:8 Akubangakho namnye ke wabaphathi beli hlabathi ubazileyo obo bulumko, kuba, ukuba babebazile, ngebengayibethelelanga emnqamlezweni iNkosi enobungangamsha." 
1Corinthians2:9 Kodwa ke kunjengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo ukuthi: “Izinto ezingabonwanga liso, nezingaviwanga ndlebe, nezingathanga qatha ntliziyweni yamntu, zezi kanye uThixo wazilungiselela abo bamthandayo.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 UThixo wazityhila kuthi ke ezi ndaba ngoMoya wakhe; kuba uMoya uphengulula zonke izinto, nobunzulu bobume bukaThixo." 
1Corinthians2:11 Kanene yintoni na emntwini ebaziyo ubume bomntu, ingenguwo umoya womntu ongaphakathi kwakhe? Ngokunjalo nobume bukaThixo akukho namnye ubaziyo, ingenguye uMoya kaThixo." 
1Corinthians2:12 Ke thina asamkelanga moya simnikwe ngabantu; samkele uMoya esimnikwe nguThixo, ukuze sizazi izinto uThixo asibabale ngazo." 
1Corinthians2:13 Ezi zinto ke sizithethayo asizithethi ngabuciko sibunikwe ngumntu, kodwa sizithetha ngobulumko esibunikwe nguMoya oyiNgcwele. Sicacisa izinto ezizezoMoya ngamazwi esiwanikwa nguMoya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Ke umntu ongenaye uMoya akazamkeli izinto zoMoya kaThixo, kuba zibubudenge kuye. Kaloku akanakuziqonda, kuba ukuxabiseka kwazo kuqondwa kuphela ngulowo ukhokelwa nguMoya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Ke umntu okhokelwa nguMoya okunene uyakwazi ukuzicalula zonke izinto, kodwa yena ngokwakhe akanakuphengululwa ngabangakhokelwa nguMoya." 
1Corinthians2:16 Kunjengoko zitshoyo iziBhalo ukuthi: “Ngubani na ozaziyo iingcamango zeNkosi; ingubani na onako ukuyicebisa?” Kaloku thina sicinga nto-nye noKrestu. 
1Corinthians3:1 Nam ke, mawethu, bendingenako ukuthetha nani ngendlela endithetha ngayo nabo banaye uMoya, kodwa kwakufuneka ndithethe nani ngendlela endithetha ngayo nabo baselula, baseziintsana kwihambo yobuKrestu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndaniseza ubisi, andanipha kutya kuqinileyo, kuba naningekakufaneli. Kanti ke unangoku anikakufaneli," 
1Corinthians3:3 kuba nisaziphethe ngokwesimo esidala. Kaloku xa ninomona, neenkani, nixabana, niziphatha ngokwesimo esidala, nilinganisa abantu." 
1Corinthians3:4 Kakade anilinganisi bantu xa omnye athi: “Mna ndingokaPawulos,” wumbi athi: “Mna ndingoka-Apolo”?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Xa ndingubani mna Pawulos, engubani yena uApolo? Sizizicaka nje zikaThixo kuphela, ezinincedayo ukuba nikholwe. Umntu ngamnye kuthi wenza umsebenzi awunikwe yiNkosi." 
1Corinthians3:6 Mna ndatyala, uApolo yena wankcenkceshela, kodwa ke nguThixo okhulisayo." 
1Corinthians3:7 Ngoko ke lowo utyalayo akabalwa, nalowo unkcenkceshelayo akabalwa; obalulekileyo nguThixo, yena ukhulisayo." 
1Corinthians3:8 Lowo utyalayo ke uyafana nalowo unkcenkceshelayo, kodwa elowo kubo uya kwamkela umvuzo ngangokubulaleka kwakhe." 
1Corinthians3:9 Thina singabancedisanayo emsebenzini kaThixo; intsimi kaThixo ke nini. Ngenye indlela nisisakhiwo sikaThixo. 
1Corinthians3:10 Ngesisa endisenzelwe nguThixo ndasibeka isiseko ngokwegcisa lomakhi. Omnye ke wakha phezu kwaso. Elowo ke makayigqale indlela akha ngayo phezu kwesi siseko. 
1Corinthians3:11 Kaloku akukho bani unokubeka siseko simbi ngaphandle kweso sabekwa nguThixo, eso ke singuYesu onguKrestu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Kunokwakhiwa ngezinto ezahluka-hlukeneyo phezu kwesi siseko. Kunokwakhiwa ngegolide, ngesiliva, nangamatye anqabileyo; kunokwakhiwa ngamaplanga, ngengca, nangeendiza." 
1Corinthians3:13 Umsebenzi womntu ngamnye uya kucaca ngemini yomgwebo, kuba ngaloo mini umlilo uya kuwubonakalisa umsebenzi womntu ngamnye, uphicothe ubunjani bawo." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ukuba into akhe ngayo umntu phezu kwesi siseko ayitshanga, uya kwamkela umvuzo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ke ukuba ithe yatsha, umntu lowo wolahlekelwa ngumvuzo; ke yena ngokwakhe wosindiswa, kodwa ke ange ucande emlilweni." 
1Corinthians3:16 Anazi na ukuba nina niyindlu kaThixo? Anazi na ukuba uMoya kaThixo uhlala ngaphakathi kwenu? 
1Corinthians3:17 Ukuba umntu uyayonakalisa indlu kaThixo, uThixo uya kumohlwaya, kuba indlu kaThixo ingcwele – nina ke niyiloo ndlu." 
1Corinthians3:18 Makungabikho namnye uzikhohlisayo. Ukuba ubani kuni uba usisilumko kweli hlabathi, makabe “sisidenge” ukuze abe sisilumko ngenene." 
1Corinthians3:19 Kaloku ubulumko beli hlabathi bubudenge kuThixo. Kaloku *iziBhalo zitsho ukuthi: “UThixo uyazibambisa izilumko kubuqhetseba bazo;” 
1Corinthians3:20 ziphinde zithi: “INkosi iyazazi ukuba zingamampunge iingcamango zezilumko.” 
1Corinthians3:21 Ngoko ke makungabikho namnye uqhayisa ngezinto ezenziwa ngabantu. Kaloku izinto zonke zezenu: 
1Corinthians3:22 nokuba nguPawulos, nokuba nguApolo, nokuba nguPetros, nokuba lihlabathi, nokuba bubomi, nokuba kukufa, nokuba zizinto ezikhoyo, nokuba zeziza kubakho; zonke ezo zinto zezenu." 
1Corinthians3:23 Kodwa ke nina ningabakaKrestu, uKrestu yena ngokaThixo." 
1Corinthians4:1 Makenjenje ke umntu ukucinga ngathi, athi sizizicaka zikaKrestu, singamagosa eendaba zikaThixo ebezingaziwa." 
1Corinthians4:2 Into elindelekileyo ke kumagosa kukuba ahlale ethembekile. 
1Corinthians4:3 Ke mna andikunanze nganto ukuziphendulela kuni okanye enkundleni eyeyabantu. Ewe, nam andiziphicothi ngokwam." 
1Corinthians4:4 Akukho nto ndinasazela ngayo, kodwa loo nto ayithethi kuthi ndimsulwa. Kaloku umgwebi wam yiNkosi." 
1Corinthians4:5 Ngoko ke musani ukugweba mntu ngaphambi kwexesha lokufika kweNkosi. Yona iya kuzityhila izinto zobumnyama ezifihliweyo, ekufikeni kwayo, iziveze ekuhleni iingcinga zabantu. Wothi ke elowo nalowo awongwe nguThixo ngokumfaneleyo." 
1Corinthians4:6 Ezi zinto, mawethu, ndizilinganisela ngam noApolo ngenxa yenu, ukuze nifunde kuthi apha, nize ke, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo, ningabi nakratshi. Ke musani ukuqhayisa ngothile nize nimdele omnye." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kambe ngubani othe wena ubalulekile kunabanye; iyintoni yona onayo ongayiphiwanga nguThixo? Phofu ke, ukuba uphiwe, uqhayiselani ngokungathi akuphiwanga?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Ngathi senide nadikwa njê; ngathi senizizityebi njê; ngathi senide naziinkosi njê, ndingekabi yiyo nam! Akwaba beniziinkosi nyhani-nyhani, ukuze nam ndibuxhamle ubukhosi obo benu!" 
1Corinthians4:9 Kuba kum ngathi uThixo thina *bathunywa bakhe usinika eyona ndawo iphantsi, ngathi singabamiselwe ukufa, senziwe umboniso oyintlekisa ehlabathini, kwizithunywa zezulu nasebantwini." 
1Corinthians4:10 Andithi thina siziziyatha kaloku ngenxa kaKrestu, nibe ke nina niziingqondi ngokumanywa noKrestu, ngabula nina! Andithi thina siswele amandla; ke nina nomelele! Kaloku nibekekile nina, sibe ke thina sidelekile!" 
1Corinthians4:11 Kude kube ngôkunje siyalamba, siyanxanwa, siyadlakazela, siyadlakathiswa, siyabhadula," 
1Corinthians4:12 siyabulaleka sisebenza nzima sizixhasa. Sakuthukwa, siyasikelela; sakutshutshiswa, siyanyamezela;" 
1Corinthians4:13 sakunyeliswa, siyacenga. Kude kube ngoku siphethwe okwenkunkuma yehlabathi, umququ wezinto zonke." 
1Corinthians4:14 Ezi zinto andizibhaleli kuba nenyele; hayi, ndizibhalela ukuniluleka. Kaloku ningabantwana bam endibathandayo." 
1Corinthians4:15 Nokuba ningade nibe namawaka-waka abafundisi abanifundisa ngoKrestu, mnye yena uyihlo kodwa. Ndim ke lowo, kuba namanywa noKrestu ngokuziva ngam iindaba ezimnandi; ndafana nonizeleyo ke." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndiyanibongoza ke, xelisani mna." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ngenxa yoko ndinithumela uTimoti ongunyana wam endimthandayo, othembekileyo ekuyikhonzeni iNkosi. Yena uya kunikhumbuza ngeemfundiso zam ngoKrestu, ezi ndizifundisayo ezindaweni zonke kuwo onke amabandla." 
1Corinthians4:18 Abanye benu basuke bakhukhumala ngokungathi andisayi kuze ndize apho. 
1Corinthians4:19 Ndiya kunihambela kamsinya, emandleni eNkosi, ukuze ndinganeli nje kuva kucikoza kwâbo bazidlayo, kodwa ndiwubone nomsebenzi wabo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kaloku ulawulo lukaThixo alungabuciko, lungamandla kaMoya." 
1Corinthians4:21 Nikhetha ntoni ke? Ngaba nifuna ndize kuni ndiphethe uswazi, okanye nifuna ndize ndinothando nobubele?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Ndiva kusithiwa kukho umbulo phakathi kwenu. Lowo ke ngumbulo onganyamezelekiyo naphakathi kweentlanga. Ndithetha lo wokuba umntu ahlalisane nomfazi kayise. 
1Corinthians5:2 Ningathini ke ukuzidla? Benimelwe kukwenyela, nimsuse phakathi kwenu lowo wenze loo ntlondi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Mna ke, ndingekho nje okunene ngesiqu (kodwa ndikho ngomoya) sendide ndagqiba ngokungathi ndikho, malunga noyenzileyo loo nto." 
1Corinthians5:4 Ndigqibe kwelithi xa nihlangene egameni leNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, nam ndikho ngomoya, amandla eNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu esixhasa," 
1Corinthians5:5 makanikelwe onjalo kuSathana, ukuze umzimba wakhe utshatyalaliswe, ngenjongo yokuba umoya wakhe ube nokusindiswa ngomhla womgwebo." 
1Corinthians5:6 Hayi ukunyanyeka kweqhayiya lenu! Anisazi kakade isaci esithi: “Igwele elincinane libilisa intlama iphela”? 
1Corinthians5:7 Likhupheni ngoko liphele tu igwele elidala elonakalisayo, ukuze nibe yintlama entsha. Kaloku niyintlama engenagwele, kuba *iPasika yethu seyilungisiwe, ethe nje uKrestu, ixhwane lethu lePasika, wenziwa idini." 
1Corinthians5:8 Ngoko ke itheko lethu masingalityi ngasonka sinegwele elidala, elikukona nobubi, kodwa masilitye ngesonka esingenagwele, isonka sobunyulu nenyaniso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Kwincwadi endanibhalela yona ndathi ze ningadibaniselani nabarheletyi. 
1Corinthians5:10 Ke bendingaxeli abarheletyi beli hlabathi, ababawayo, izigebenga, nabakhonza izithixo. Ukuze ningadibaniselani nabo, bekuya kufuneka ningabikho emhlabeni!" 
1Corinthians5:11 Hayi, bendixela ukuba ningadibaniselani nosukuba ebizwa ngokuba likholwa, ukanti uyarheletya, okanye uyabawa, ukhonza izithixo, okanye uyanyelisa, linxila, okanye limenemene. Ewe, ze ningatyi nokutya oku nonjalo." 
1Corinthians5:12 Asingomsebenzi wam ukubagweba abangengabo abebandla. Bagwetywa nguThixo bona. Kodwa ngumsebenzi wenu ukubagweba abebandla lenu, njengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ukuthi: “Ze nimsuse phakathi kwenu lowo ukhohlakeleyo.”" 
1Corinthians6:1 Xa kukho umntu phakathi kwenu onento afuna ukumangalela omnye ngayo, angathini ukusuka aye kummangalela enkundleni, ukuze ityala lakhe lithethwe ngabangengomakholwa? Kutheni le nto angalisi kumakholwa nje ityala lakhe?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anazi na ukuba amakholwa aya kuligweba ihlabathi? Ukuba ke ihlabathi liya kugwetywa nini, ningathini ke ukuxakwa kukuthetha nawona mancinci amatyala?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Thina siya kugweba nkqu nezithunywa zezulu, singathini ukuxakwa kukugweba izinto zobu bomi?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Ningathini ke ukusuka niye ematyaleni ngezinto zobu bomi, ukuze amatyala enu athethwe ngabantu abangento ebandleni?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Niyazihlazisa ke khona! Ngaba akukho nasinye na isilumko phakathi kwenu esinokuwalamla amakholwa? 
1Corinthians6:6 Phofu ke lingathini ikholwa ukusuka limangalelane nekholwa enkundleni yabangakholwayo? 
1Corinthians6:7 Iyimposiso enkulu kambe kwainto yokuba nibe nemicimbi enimangalelana ngayo. Ngekungcono ukuba benivuma ukuba noniwe; ngekungcono ukuba benivuma ukuba niqhathwe. 
1Corinthians6:8 Kodwa, nina nisuka none okanye nibaqhathe abanye, nangona bengamawenu!" 
1Corinthians6:9 Anazi na ukuba abakhohlakeleyo abayi kubuxhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo? Musani ukulahlekiswa: abarheletyi, nabakhonza izithixo, nabakrexezayo, nabafebayo, nabangamadoda alalanayo," 
1Corinthians6:10 nabangamasela, nababawayo, nabangamanxila, nabathukayo, nabazizikrelemnqa, abanakubuxhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo." 
1Corinthians6:11 Kanti abanye kuni babenjalo kanye, kodwa nahlanjwa, nenziwa imilowo, naba ngamalungisa phambi koThixo ngenxa yegama leNkosi uYesu nangoMoya kaThixo wethu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ubani unokuthi: “Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum.” Ewe, kunjalo, kodwa azikulungelanga zonke. Nam bendinokuthi: “Zonke izinto zivumelekile kum;” kodwa ngekhe ndinikezele ukuze ndilawulwe nayiyiphi na into." 
1Corinthians6:13 Omnye unokuthi: “Ukutya kokwesisu, nesisu sesokutya.” Ewe, kunjalo, kodwa uThixo wokutshabalalisa kokubini. Ke wona umzimba asingowokurheletya, ngoweNkosi; nayo iNkosi yeyomzimba." 
1Corinthians6:14 UThixo ke owayivusayo kwabafileyo iNkosi, uya kusivusa nathi ngamandla akhe." 
1Corinthians6:15 Anazi na ukuba imizimba yenu ngamalungu omzimba kaKrestu? Ngaba ndinokuthi ke ndiwathathe amalungu kaKrestu ndiwenze amalungu esifebe? Unotshe! 
1Corinthians6:16 Ngaba anazi na ukuba ozimanya nesifebe umzimba mnye naso? Kaloku *iziBhalo zithi: “Abo babini boba mzimba mnye.” 
1Corinthians6:17 Ke ozimanye neNkosi umoya mnye nayo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Kucezeleni ukurheletya. Ezinye izono umntu anokuzenza aziwungcolisi umzimba, kodwa yena umrheletyi wona umzimba wakhe." 
1Corinthians6:19 Anazi na ukuba imizimba yenu yindlu kaMoya oyiNgcwele, ahlala kuyo, evela kuThixo? Kaloku aningobenu;" 
1Corinthians6:20 ningabakaThixo owanithenga ngexabiso elikhulu. Mdumiseni ke uThixo ngemizimba yenu. 
1Corinthians7:1 Ngoku ke mandiphendule umbuzo wenu. Kulungile ukuba indoda ingabi nanto yakwenza nomntu obhinqileyo," 
1Corinthians7:2 kodwa ukuphepha ukurheletya elowo makabe nowakhe umfazi, aze elowo umfazi abe neyakhe indoda." 
1Corinthians7:3 Indoda mayimkholise umfazi wayo; nomfazi makenjenjalo endodeni yakhe. 
1Corinthians7:4 Umfazi akanagunya kowakhe umzimba; yindoda enalo. Kwangokunjalo ke nendoda ayinagunya kowayo umzimba; ngumfazi onalo. 
1Corinthians7:5 Musani ukwala ukuhlangana, ngaphandle kokuba nivumelene ukungahlangani okomzuzwana, nisenzela ukuba nibe nethuba lokuthandaza. Emva koko ke ze nibuye nihlangane, hleze uSathana anihende ngenxa yokungabi nako kwenu ukuzibamba." 
1Corinthians7:6 Xa nditshoyo ke ndiyanicebisa, andiwisi mthetho," 
1Corinthians7:7 kuba ndinga bonke abantu bangaba njengam lo. Kodwa ke elowo unesakhe isiphiwo ababalwe ngaso nguThixo. Omnye uba nesipho esithile, wumbi abe nesinye." 
1Corinthians7:8 Ke kwabangatshatanga nabahlolokazi ndithi kubalungele ukuba bahlale njengam. 
1Corinthians7:9 Kodwa ke, ukuba abanakuzibamba, mabatshate, kuba kulungile ukutshata kunokutshiseka." 
1Corinthians7:10 Ke kwabatshatileyo ndinomyalelo, ongenguwo owam, ongoweNkosi. Lo myalelo ke ngowokuba umfazi otshatileyo makangahlukani nendoda yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:11 Kambe ke ukuba uthe wahlukana nayo, makahlale angatshati, okanye makaxolelaniswe nendoda yakhe. Indoda ke yona mayingamali umkayo." 
1Corinthians7:12 Ngokubhekiselele kwabanye asinamyalelo siwunikwe yiNkosi. Kodwa mna ndithi kubo, ukuba kukho kholwa lithile linomfazi ongelokholwa, aze umfazi lowo athande ukuhlala nalo, malingahlukani naye." 
1Corinthians7:13 Nomfazi onendoda engelokholwa, ize yona ithande ukuhlala naye, makangahlukani nayo." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kaloku indoda leyo ingelokholwa uThixo unebango kuyo ngenxa yomfazi wayo, nomfazi lowo ungelokholwa uThixo unebango kuye ngenxa yendoda yakhe. Ukuba bekungenjalo abantwana babo ngebenetyheneba, kanti ke abanalo, kuba uThixo unebango kubo." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kodwa ke ukuba lowo ungelokholwa uyahlukana nalowo ukholwayo, makayekwe. Xa kunjalo indoda leyo ikholwayo nokuba ngumfazi akabotshelelwanga. Kaloku uThixo wasibizela ukuhlala ngoxolo." 
1Corinthians7:16 Kanene wazi ngani na, wena mfazi, ukuba akuyi kuyisindisa indoda yakho? Wena ndoda, wazi ngani na ukuba akuyi kumsindisa umfazi wakho?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Elowo makahlale ekwimeko ayiphiwe yiNkosi, imeko awabizwa nguThixo ekuyo. Nantso ke into endiyifundisayo kuwo onke amabandla." 
1Corinthians7:18 Ukuba ubani uthe wabizwa engowalukileyo *ngokomthetho kaMosis, makangazenzi ongalukanga. Ukuba ubani uthe wabizwa engalukanga, makangaluki." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ukwaluka oku akunto, nokungaluki oku akunto, eyona nto kukugcina imiyalelo kaThixo." 
1Corinthians7:20 Elowo makahlale ekwimeko abizwe ekuyo nguThixo. 
1Corinthians7:21 Wâbizwa ulikhoboka na? Mayingakukhathazi le nto, kodwa ukuba unokukhululeka, khululeka." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kaloku lowo wabizwa yiNkosi elikhoboka, ngumkhululwa weNkosi. Ngokunjalo nalowo wabizwa yiNkosi engokhululekileyo, likhoboka likaKrestu." 
1Corinthians7:23 UThixo wanithenga ngexabiso elikhulu; musani ke ukuba ngamakhoboka abantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Mawethu, elowo makahlale ekuloo meko wabizwa ekuyo." 
1Corinthians7:25 Ngokubhekiselele ezintombini asinamyalelo sawunikwayo yiNkosi. Kodwa njengamntu owenzelwe inceba yiNkosi ndaza ndathembeka, ndibona ngolu hlobo:" 
1Corinthians7:26 Ngenxa yeengxaki ezikhoyo kule mihla, ndibona ukuba kulungile ukuba umntu ahlale njengoko anjalo." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ukuba unomfazi, musa ukufuna ukwahlukana naye; ukuba awunaye, musa ukuba samfuna umfazi." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kodwa ke ukuba uyatshata akonanga; kanti nokuba intombi iyenda, ayonanga. Kodwa ke abatshatileyo baya kuhlala befikelwa ziingxaki, kanti bendingathandi ukuba kube njalo." 
1Corinthians7:29 Ndithetha ukuthi ke, mawethu, ixesha liyemka. Ke ngoko abanabafazi mababe njengabangenabo;" 
1Corinthians7:30 abalilayo mababe njengabangaliliyo; abavuyayo mababe njengabangavuyiyo; abathengayo mababe njengabangenanto; 
1Corinthians7:31 abasebenza ngezinto zeli hlabathi, mababe njengabangasebenziyo ngazo. Kaloku eli hlabathi aliyi kuhlala liyiloo nto liyiyo ngoku." 
1Corinthians7:32 Ndithanda ukuba ningabi naxhala. Ongazekanga ukhuthalele izinto zeNkosi, kuba ezimisele ukuyikholisa iNkosi." 
1Corinthians7:33 Ozekileyo yena ukhuthalele izinto zehlabathi, kuba ezimisele ukukholisa umkakhe," 
1Corinthians7:34 abe nengqondo ebetha-bethanayo. Umfazi ongenandoda nentombi bakhuthalele izinto zeNkosi, bezimisele ukuzinikela ngomzimba nangomoya. Owendileyo ke ukhuthalele izinto zehlabathi, kuba ezimisele ukukholisa indoda yakhe." 
1Corinthians7:35 Le nto ndiyithetha ngeenjongo zokuba nilungelwe, ndingajonge kunirhintyela. Ndiyithethela ukuze niyikhonze kakuhle iNkosi ningaphazanyiswa." 
1Corinthians7:36 Malunga nabathembiseneyo ke, ukuba umfana unexhala lokuba wode ayihlazise intombi, eziva etshiseka, eqonda ukuba kuyimfuneko ukuba batshate, mabatshate ke njengoko afunayo, kuba akukho sono kuloo nto." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kambe ke ozimiseleyo entliziyweni yakhe, engòyiswa kukutshiseka, enamandla okuzeyisa, kananjalo esenzile isigqibo entliziyweni yakhe sokuba angàtshati, uyalungisa ukwenjenjalo." 
1Corinthians7:38 Ngoko ke otshatayo uyalungisa, kodwa lowo ungatshatiyo ulungisa ngokukodwa." 
1Corinthians7:39 Umfazi ubotshiwe ngumthetho ngalo lonke ixesha isaphilayo indoda yakhe; ke ukuba indoda yakhe ibhubhile, ukhululekile; angatshata nendoda ayithandayo, kodwa ibe yekholwe eNkosini." 
1Corinthians7:40 Noko ke uya konwaba ngakumbi ukuba uthe wahlala enjengoko anjalo. Kokwam ukubona ke oko, kanti nam ndiba ndinaye uMoya kaThixo." 
1Corinthians8:1 Ke ngoku malunga nokutyiwa kwenyama yedini elenzelwa *izithixo: Kakade sonke “sinolwazi,” njengoko kusitshiwo, kodwa olu “lwazi” lungenza ukuba umntu akhukhumale, kanti uthando lona luyakha." 
1Corinthians8:2 Umntu oba unolwazi, okunene akakabi nalo ulwazi olululo." 
1Corinthians8:3 Ke umntu omthandayo uThixo, uThixo unobudlelane naye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Hee, mandithethe ke ngokumalunga nokutyiwa kwenyama yedini elenzelwa izithixo. Ewe, siyazi ukuba akukho nto isisithixo ehlabathini; siyazi nokuba mnye kuphela uThixo, akukho wumbi." 
1Corinthians8:5 Kambe bakho ekuthiwa bangoothixo nokuba basezulwini okanye basehlabathini. Ewe, baninzi ababizwa ngokuthi “thixo” okanye ngokuthi “nkosi.” Nokuba kunjalo ke," 
1Corinthians8:6 kuthi mnye uThixo. Yena nguThixo uYise owadala izinto zonke, esikholo yena thina. Inye kuthi neNkosi. Yona nguYesu Krestu, ezabakho ngaye zonke izinto, esikho ngaye nathi." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kodwa oku akwaziwa ngabantu bonke. Abanye nangoku basenesazela ngezithixo. Bona ke, xa batya inyama yedini, bayitya ilidini, sithi ke isazela sabo esibuthathaka sibadle." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kodwa asinako ukumkholisa uThixo ngento esiyityayo okanye esingayityiyo. Akukho nto iya kusilungela ngakuba singatyanga, kungekho nto iya kusonakalela ngakuba sityile." 
1Corinthians8:9 Nakuba kunjalo ke lumkani, hleze ilungelo lenu lokutya nayiphi na inyama libe sisikhubekiso kwabo bangekakhululeki ezithetheni." 
1Corinthians8:10 Kaloku xa athe wakubona umntu ongekakhululeki ezithetheni wena “unolwazi” usitya inyama endlwini yezithixo, akayi kusuka aye kuyitya naye, kodwa yena ayitye ilidini elenzelwe izithixo?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Ngaloo ndlela ke umwenu ongekakhululeki ncam, owafelwa nguKrestu, wotshabalala ngenxa “yolwazi” lwakho olo." 
1Corinthians8:12 Kanti xa nisenjenjalo ukona amawenu ngokuwakhubekisa, nona uKrestu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ngenxa yale nto ke ndithi: Ukuba ukutya kuyamkhubekisa umwethu, andisayi kutya nyama naphakade, ukuze ndingamkhubekisi umwethu." 
1Corinthians9:1 Andibi kanene ndikhululekile? Ndiba niyaqonda ukuba ndithunyiwe, *ndingumthunywa. Andibi kanene ndambona uYesu iNkosi yethu? Andibi kanene nina nisisiqhamo somsebenzi endiwenzela iNkosi?" 
1Corinthians9:2 Ndiqinisekile nokuba abanye bathi andingomthunywa, ndinguye kuni. Kaloku ukumanyana kwenu neNkosi ngumqondiso wokuba ndithunywe yiyo." 
1Corinthians9:3 Ke ukuziphendulela kwabo bandigxekayo ndenjenje: 
1Corinthians9:4 Ngaba andinalo mna ilungelo lokuba nditye ndisele? 
1Corinthians9:5 Ngaba andinalo mna ilungelo njengabanye abathunywa, abantakwabeNkosi, noPetros, lokuba ndibe nenkosikazi engumKrestu, ndijikeleze nayo?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Okanye makube kuphela ndim noBharnabha ekufuneka sitye ukubila kwethu? 
1Corinthians9:7 Lakha lakho phi ijoni elizihlawulela ngokwalo iindleko zalo emkhosini? Mlimi wuphi olima ajike angasityi isivuno? Nguwuphi umalusi ongazityiyo izapholo? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ngaba ilungelo lam lokuba ngumthunywa lixhomekeke kule mizekeliso iqhelekileyo kuphela, okanye ngaba *nomthetho kaMosis uthetha kwaloo nto nawo?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Ewe, kaloku umthetho uthi: “Musa ukuyifaka isicheme inkabi ibhula.” Ke ngaba ziinkabi zeenkomo zodwa na ezi axela zona uThixo?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ngaba asiqukwa na nathi? Ngokuphandle âbhalelwa thina la mazwi. Kaloku umlimi ulima ngethemba, nalowo ubhulayo ubhula ngethemba lokuba nesabelo." 
1Corinthians9:11 Sahlwayela imbewu kaMoya phakathi kwenu. Nimangaliswa yintoni ke sakulindela inkxaso kuni? 
1Corinthians9:12 Ukuba abanye banelungelo lokulindela iziqhamo ezinjalo kuni, alingaphezulu na ke elethu ilungelo? Ke thina asenzanga nto ngeli lungelo. Koko sisuke sanyamezela nayiphi na imeko endaweni yokuba sibe yimiqobo ethintela ukuhanjiswa kweendaba ezimnandi ezingoKrestu." 
1Corinthians9:13 Anazi na ukuba abo basebenza *endlwini kaThixo baphila kwayiyo, baze abo benza amadini eqongeni lamadini bafumane isabelo kuloo madini?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Ngokunjalo ke iNkosi iyalele ukuba abo bashumayela iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo baphile zizo. 
1Corinthians9:15 Kodwa ke mna andikawabangi la malungelo, futhi ke nokubhala oku andizami kubanga wona. Hayi, ndixolele ukufa endaweni yokwenjenjalo! Akukho namnye uza kulijika ilungelo lam lokuqhayisa, alenze amazwi alambathayo." 
1Corinthians9:16 Nokuba ndiyashumayela, andinalungelo lakuqhayisa ngaloo nto. Kaloku ndithunywe ukushumayela. Ngoko ke kungayinto embi gqitha xa ndingazishumayeli iindaba ezimnandi." 
1Corinthians9:17 Ukuba bendisebenza ndingathunywanga, bendingade ndilindele umvuzo. Kodwa ke ngoku ndisebenza kuba ndinyanzelekile. Ngoko ke ndifezekisa into elindelekileyo ukuba ndiyenze." 
1Corinthians9:18 Uyintoni ke umvuzo wam? Lilungelo lokuba ndizishumayele iindaba ezimnandi ndingahlawulisi, ndingawabangi amalungelo am ngokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ndikhululekile; kodwa naxa kunjalo ndizenza isicaka sabantu bonke, ukuze ndizuze babe baninzi kangangoko kunokwenzeka." 
1Corinthians9:20 Xa ndisebenza namaJuda, ndiziphatha njengawo, ukuze ndiwazuze. Nangona mna ngokwam ndingekho phantsi komthetho kaMosis, ndiziphatha ngathi ndiphantsi kwawo xa ndisebenza nâbo baphantsi kwawo, ukuze ndibazuze." 
1Corinthians9:21 Kwangaloo ndlela, xa ndiphakathi kweentlanga ezingekho phantsi komthetho kaMosis, ndiziphatha njengazo. Le nto ke ayithethi kuthi andiwuthobeli umthetho kaThixo, kuba eneneni ndiphantsi komthetho kaKrestu." 
1Corinthians9:22 Xa ndiphakathi kwabantu abasephantsi kwesithethe ndiba njengabo, ukuze ndibazuze. Ngoko ke ndiba zizinto zonke kubantu bonke, ukuze ndiyisindise inxalenye yabo xa kunokwenzeka." 
1Corinthians9:23 Le nto xa iyonke ndiyenza ngenxa yeendaba ezimnandi, khon' ukuze ndibe nenxaxheba kwiintsikelelo ezifumaneka ngenxa yazo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Nani niyazi ukuba kukhuphiswano lweembaleki baba baninzi abazigqatsayo, kodwa mnye kuphela kubo ozuza imbasa. Nani ke balekelani ukuze nifumane imbasa." 
1Corinthians9:25 Nabani na ozigqatsayo kukhuphiswano uba phantsi kwengqeqesho engqongqo. Le nto uyayinyamezela khon' ukuze afumane isithsaba esibunayo. Kodwa thina siyenza siza kuzuza isithsaba esingagugiyo. 
1Corinthians9:26 Yiloo nto endenza ndithi ngqo, ndisukele ukuya kufika entanjeni. Ikwayiloo nto endenza ndifane nembethi-manqindi engachithi xesha ngokubetha umoya." 
1Corinthians9:27 Ndiwuphatha gadalala umzimba wam, ndiwuqhelisa, ukuze uhlale ulawuleka; hleze ndithi ndakuba ndibashumayezile abanye, mna ngokwam ndingamkeleki." 
1Corinthians10:1 Kaloku, mawethu, yikhumbuleni into eyabehlelayo ookhokho bethu ababekhokelwa nguMosis. Xa bebonke babekhuselwe lilifu, baza basinda baluwela uLwandle oluBomvu." 
1Corinthians10:2 Ukungena kwabo kwelo lifu nokuwela kwabo ulwandle kwaba bubungqina bokuba bangabalandeli bakaMosis. 
1Corinthians10:3 Bonke batya ukutya koMoya," 
1Corinthians10:4 baza basela isiselo soMoya. Babesela kwelo liwa likaThixo lalisoloko likho. Lona ke iliwa elo lalatha uKrestu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Kodwa ke nangoko uThixo akaneliswanga luninzi lwabo, ngenxa yaloo nto ke izidumbu zabo zathi saa entlango." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ngoku ke zonke ezi zinto ziyimizekelo kuthi ukuze singanqweneli izinto ezimbi njengabo," 
1Corinthians10:7 futhi singanquli izithixo njengoko yênzayo inxalenye yabo. Kaloku *iziBhalo zithi: “Abantu bahlala phantsi batya basela, baza baphakama badlala.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Masingarheletyi njengokuba babesenjenjalo abanye babo, kwaza ngamini-nye kwafa amawaka angamashumi amabini anesithathu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Masingamlingi uKrestu njengokuba babesenjenjalo abanye babo, baza babulawa ziinyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Musani ukukrokra njengoko babesenjenjalo abanye babo, waza uThixo wabatshabalalisa." 
1Corinthians10:11 Zonke ezi zinto zabahlelayo ziyimizekelo. Zabhalelwa ukuba zibe sisilumkiso kuthi, thina sidla ubomi kumaxesha okugqibela." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nabani na ozicingela ukuba umile makalumke angawi. 
1Corinthians10:13 Nasiphi na isilingo esikuhlelayo siyinto eqhelekileyo emntwini. Yena ke uThixo, ngokuba ethembekile, akayi kukuyekela ulingwe ngokungaphezu kwamandla akho. Hayi, wosuka akuvulele ikroba lokuphuncula, ukuze ube nako ukunyamezela." 
1Corinthians10:14 Nani ke, zihlobo zam, kucezeleni ukunqula izithixo." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndithetha nani njengabantu bengqiqo, ngoko ke yicaluleni ngokwenu le nto ndiyithethayo kuni." 
1Corinthians10:16 Xa sidumisa uThixo ngokuthatha indebe engumqondiso weentsikelelo zakhe, ngaba loo nto ayithethi kuthi sinenxaxheba kwigazi likaKrestu? Khona xa siqhekeza isonka, ngaba loo nto ayithethi kuthi sinenxaxheba kumzimba kaKrestu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Kuba kaloku sinye qha isonka; nathi nangona sibaninzi nje, simzimba mnye, kuba sonke sabelana ngeso sonka sinye." 
1Corinthians10:18 Khanikhe nicinge ngenkqubo yamaJuda. Abo balityayo idini baba nodlelwano noThixo, lo lenzelwa yena eqongeni lamadini." 
1Corinthians10:19 Ngaba ke ndithetha ukuthini? Ngaba ndithi makube kukho nto siyiyo isithixo? Okanye makube ndithi idini elenzelwa sona liba yinto enexabiso? 
1Corinthians10:20 Hayi, anditsho. Ndithi amadini enziwa ziintlanga akenzelwa Thixo, enzelwa iindimoni. Yaye andifuni nibe nanxaxheba neendimoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Aninako ukusela indebe yeNkosi, niphinde nisele eyeendimoni, ningenakuthatha nxaxheba esithebeni seNkosi, ze niphinde nibe nenxaxheba nakweseendimoni." 
1Corinthians10:22 Makube sifuna iNkosi ikhwelete? Sinamandla thina kunayo kakade? 
1Corinthians10:23 “Sivumelekile ukwenza nayiphi na into,” kukho abatshoyo. Ewe kunjalo kambe, kodwa azilunganga zonke izinto. Ewe: “Sivumelekile ukwenza nayiphi na into,” kodwa izinto azakhi zonke." 
1Corinthians10:24 Makungabikho bani ufuna ukulungelwa yedwa; elowo makakhathalele nokwabanye. 
1Corinthians10:25 Ningatya nantoni na eniyithenge esilarheni, ningazidubanga ngakuziphengulula sazela ngemibuzo," 
1Corinthians10:26 kuba, njengoko zitshoyo iziBhalo: “Ihlabathi leleNkosi nako konke okukulo.”" 
1Corinthians10:27 Ukuba nimenywa ngumntu ongelokholwa, nize isimemo eso nisamkele, yityani into ebekwe phambi kwenu, ningazidubi ngokuphengulula isazela ngemibuzo." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kodwa ukuba kukho onithele thsuphe ukuba nitya ukutya kwedini, musani ukukutya ke oko kutya, ngenxa yalowo unixeleleyo, nangenxa yesazela." 
1Corinthians10:29 Anditsho esenu, ndixela esakhe. “Ke, ingathini inkululeko endinayo yokuzikhethela into emandiyenze ukulawulwa sisazela somnye umntu?” Ubani angabuza atsho," 
1Corinthians10:30 aqhube ngelithi: “Ukuba ndiyambulela uThixo ngesabelo sam esidlweni, ndisagxekelwani ngokutya endimbulela ngako uThixo?”" 
1Corinthians10:31 Nokuba ke nenza ntoni na, nokuba niyatya, nokuba niyasela, yenzelani udumo lukaThixo." 
1Corinthians10:32 Ziphatheni ngohlobo lokuba ningaphazamisi bani, nokuba ngumJuda, nokuba ngumGrike, nokuba ngowebandla likaThixo." 
1Corinthians10:33 Xelisani mna, mna ndizama ukwanelisa wonke ubani ngento endiyenzayo. Andenzeli kulungelwa kwam phofu, koko ukulungelwa komntu wonke, ukuze bonke basindiswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Hambani ekhondweni lam, njengoko mna ndihamba ekhondweni likaKrestu." 
1Corinthians11:2 Ndiyanincoma ngokusoloko nindikhumbula, nizigcina nezithethe endininike zona." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kambe ke ndifuna nicacelwe kukuba njengoko uKrestu ongamele indoda nganye, yindoda eyongamele umkayo, nanjengoko uKrestu onganyelwe nguThixo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Ngoko ke indoda ethandazayo okanye eshumayelayo enkonzweni ithwele into entloko, iyamhlaza uKrestu." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kwaye nawuphi na umfazi othandazayo okanye oshumayelayo enkonzweni, engathwele nto entloko, uyayihlaza indoda yakhe; loo mfazi akahluke nganto kumfazi onenkqayi!" 
1Corinthians11:6 Ukuba akathwali nto, makasuke agugule intloko kube kanye. Njengoko kulihlazo ukuba umntu obhinqileyo achetywe okanye abe nenkqayi, umfazi ke makathwale." 
1Corinthians11:7 Akukho mfuneko yokuba ithwale indoda, kuba ibonakalisa umfanekiso nesidima sikaThixo. Umfazi ke liqhayiya lendoda yakhe." 
1Corinthians11:8 Kaloku asiyondoda eyathathwa emfazini, ngumfazi owathathwa endodeni ukudalwa kwakhe." 
1Corinthians11:9 Asiyondoda eyadalwa ngenxa yomfazi, ngumfazi owadalwa ngenxa yendoda." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngoko ke, ngenxa yokuhlonela imilowo yakwaThixo umfazi makathwale." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kanti ke akukho namnye ungaxhomekekanga komnye kwabo badlelana noKrestu; indoda ixhomekeke emfazini, nomfazi endodeni." 
1Corinthians11:12 Nanjengokuba kaloku umfazi wathathwa endodeni, ngokunjalo ke nendoda izalwa ngumfazi, yaye ke bobabini bavela kuThixo owadala zonke izinto." 
1Corinthians11:13 Zahluleleni ngokwenu ke! Kufanelekile na ukuba umntu obhinqileyo athandaze enkonzweni engathwele nto entloko? 
1Corinthians11:14 Indalo ngokwayo yalatha ukuba zilihlazo endodeni iinwele ezinde; 
1Corinthians11:15 kodwa zilibhongo lomntu obhinqileyo. Kaloku wazinikwa iinwele ezinde ukuze zimgqume. 
1Corinthians11:16 Kodwa ke ukuba kukho ofuna ukuwuphika lo mbandela, ndingasuka ndithi, mna kwanalo ibandla likaThixo, akukho siko limbi sinalo thina enkonzweni." 
1Corinthians11:17 Nantsi indawo endingenakunincoma ngayo: ezintlanganisweni zenu anihlanganeli kwakhana, koko nisuka none." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ndawo yokuqala, ndivile ukuba kwezi nkonzo zenu nahluka-hlukene, ibe ke ndiyaqonda ukuba loo nto ngahle ibe injalo." 
1Corinthians11:19 (Kambe yona iyantlukwano ilindelekile, ukuze kucace abo basendleleni nabo banxaxhayo.)" 
1Corinthians11:20 Ukuhlangana kwenu enkonzweni anihlanganeli kwenza umthendeleko weNkosi 
1Corinthians11:21 kuba omnye uzityela yedwa, baze abanye basale belambile ngeli lixa abanye benxila." 
1Corinthians11:22 Aninamakhaya apho ningatya nisele khona? Mhlawumbi ngaba nilidelile ibandla likaThixo, nihlaza abo basweleyo nje? Nilindele ukuba ndithini ngale nto? Ngaba nilindele ukuba ndinincome? Nakanye!" 
1Corinthians11:23 Kaloku le mfundiso ndaninika yona, mna ndayamkela kuyo iNkosi: Le yokuba iNkosi uYesu ngobusuku eyanikelwa ngabo yathatha isonka," 
1Corinthians11:24 yabulela yasiqhekeza, yathi: “Ngumzimba wam lo; thathani. Ze nenjenje ke ukundikhumbula.”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Kwangokunjalo yayithatha nayo indebe emva kokuba kutyiwe, yathi: “Le ndebe ingumnqophiso omtsha osungulwa ngokuphalala kwegazi lam. Ngamaxesha onke niyisela mayinikhumbuze ngam.”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Kuba kaloku ngamaxesha onke nisitya esi sonka, niyisela le ndebe, nivakalisa ukufa kweNkosi, ide ibuye." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ngoko ke lowo usityayo esi sonka, ayisele indebe yeNkosi, engafanelekanga, woba netyala ngomzimba negazi leNkosi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Makazicikide ke ngoko ngokwakhe umntu, aze ke asitye isonka eso, ayisele nendebe leyo;" 
1Corinthians11:29 kuba lowo utyayo asele, uzityela aziselele umgwebo ukuba akawuphicothi ngokufanelekileyo umzimba weNkosi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Lo ngunobangela wokuba babe baninzi phakathi kwenu ababuthathaka nabayimilwelwe, ngokunjalo nasebefile." 
1Corinthians11:31 Ukuba besizicikida ngeba asigwetywa; 
1Corinthians11:32 kodwa ke sisohlwaywa nje, siyaqeqeshwa yiNkosi, ukuze singagwetywa kunye nehlabathi." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ngoko ke, mawethu, xa nihlangana esidlweni seNkosi lindanani." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ukuba kukho olambileyo, makaqale atye ekhaya, ukuze ukuhlangana kwenu kunganizeli nokugwetywa. Eminye imicimbi ndoyiphonononga ndakuba ndifikile apho." 
1Corinthians12:1 Malunga nezipho zoMoya oyiNgcwele kukho izinto endifuna ukunicacisela zona, mawethu." 
1Corinthians12:2 Niyazi ukuba ngokuya nanisengabahedeni nanilawulwa niphuphuthekiswa zizithixo ezizizidenge. 
1Corinthians12:3 Ngoko ke yiqondeni into yokuba akukho bani ukhokelwa nguMoya kaThixo unokuthi: “Uqalekisiwe uYesu,” futhi kungekho bani unokuvuma ukuba: “UYesu uyiNkosi,” engakhokelwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kukho iintlobo ngeentlobo zeziphiwo, kodwa zivela kuMoya omnye." 
1Corinthians12:5 Kukho iintlobo ngeentlobo zemisebenzi, kodwa kusetyenzelwa iNkosi enye." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kukho iintlobo-ntlobo zeziphiwo zamandla okusebenza, kodwa xa zizonke zivela kuThixo, ikwanguye nozabela ulowo nalowo." 
1Corinthians12:7 Kuthi sonke ngabanye uMoya uzibonakalisa ngendlela ethile, enenjongo yokuba sakhane." 
1Corinthians12:8 Umntu othile uMoya umnika ubulumko, aze omnye amnike ukwazi." 
1Corinthians12:9 Kwalo Moya mnye omnye umnika inzondelelo, aze omnye amnike amandla okuphilisa." 
1Corinthians12:10 Omnye umntu uMoya umnika amandla okwenza imiqondiso, aze omnye amnike amandla okushumayela, wumbi amnike ubuchule bokucalula oomoya. Omnye umnika isiphiwo sokuthetha iilwimi, aze omnye amnike isiphiwo sokutolika." 
1Corinthians12:11 Kodwa ngulo Moya mnye owenza yonke le nto; umntu ngamnye umnika isipho esahlukileyo ngokubona kwakhe. 
1Corinthians12:12 UKrestu unjengomzimba, wona unamalungu amaninzi, kodwa ube wona umnye." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ngokunjalo nathi sonke, nokuba singamaJuda okanye amaGrike, nokuba singamakhoboka okanye singabakhululekileyo, sabhaptizelwa mzimbeni mnye, nguMoya omnye; futhi sasezwa kwaloo Moya mnye." 
1Corinthians12:14 Kaloku umzimba lo awulolungu linye, ungamalungu amaninzi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Nokuba unyawo belungáthi: “Kaloku mna andisosandla, ngoko ke andingowomzimba,” loo nto ibingayi kulwenza unyawo lungabi lolungu lomzimba." 
1Corinthians12:16 Nokuba indlebe ibingasuka ithi: “Ngenxa yokuba mna ndingelilo iliso, ngoko ke andingowawo umzimba,” loo nto ibingayi kuyenza ingabi lilo ilungu lomzimba indlebe." 
1Corinthians12:17 Ukuba ke wonke umzimba ubuliliso ngesisiva njani? Khona ukuba ubuyindlebe wonke, ngesijoja njani?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kodwa ke uThixo udale amalungu ahlukeneyo emzimbeni ngokuthanda kwakhe. 
1Corinthians12:19 Ukuba amalungu onke ebelilungu elinye qha, ibingàyi kuba ngumzimba loo nto." 
1Corinthians12:20 Kambe ke inje le nto: nakuba amalungu emaninzi nje, umzimba wona mnye." 
1Corinthians12:21 Ngoko ke iliso alinakuthi esandleni: “Andikufuni nganto;” ingenakutsho nentloko ezinyaweni ukuthi: “Andinifuni nganto.” 
1Corinthians12:22 Kusuka kuthi awona malungu angathi abuthathaka, ibe ngawona kanye singenakwenza nto engekho;" 
1Corinthians12:23 aze wona loo malungu angawona adelekileyo, ibe ngawo kanye esiwambathisa ngokunonelela; aze amalungu ahlonitshwayo ibe ngawona acoselelwayo ukunakekelwa," 
1Corinthians12:24 nto leyo ingeyomfuneko kumalungu afanelekileyo. UThixo umzimba uwakhe ngohlobo lokuba amalungu adelekileyo ibe ngawona ahlonitshwayo. 
1Corinthians12:25 Ngoko ke akukho kubukulana emzimbeni – asuka amalungu onke ilelo linyamekele elinye. 
1Corinthians12:26 Xa sukuba elinye lisifa, onke amanye amalungu avelana nalo; kuthi lakunikwa imbeko, onke amanye avuyisane nalo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Ningumzimba kaKrestu ke xa ninonke nina; elowo kuni lilungu laloo mzimba. 
1Corinthians12:28 UThixo ebandleni lakhe unocwangco: Kuqala *ngabathunywa, kulandele *abashumayeli, kuze abefundisi; emva kwabo ibe ngabenza imiqondiso, ibe ngabanegunya lokuphilisa, abancedisi, abakhokeli, nabathetha iilwimi." 
1Corinthians12:29 Àbangobathunywa bonke aba, bengengobashumayeli bonke, bengengabo nabefundisi bonke. Asingabo bonke abanegunya lemiqondiso," 
1Corinthians12:30 ingengabo bonke nabanegunya lokuphilisa, bengathethi zilwimi bonke, bengatoliki bonke." 
1Corinthians12:31 Ke kaloku langazelelani ezona zipho zibalaseleyo. Ngaphezu koko, nantsi ke eyona ndlela izigqwesa zonke:" 
1Corinthians13:1 Ewe kambe, ndingade ndibe liciko lokuthetha iilwimi zabantu, ndide ndithethe nezezithunywa zezulu – kodwa ndingenalo uthando, intetho yam isuka ibe yingxolo nje, efana neyentsimbi ehlokomayo, necangci elikhenkcezayo." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ndingade ndibe naso nesiphiwo sokushumayela ngefuthe, ndinalo lonke ulwazi, ndizazi nezinto ezingàziwa mntu, ndinalo nokholo olugungqisa iintaba, kodwa ndingenalo uthando, andinto konke!" 
1Corinthians13:3 Ewe, nokuba ndinganikisa ngempahla yam yonke, ndide nam ngokwam ndizinikele ukuba nditshiswe, kodwa ke ndingenalo uthando, akuncedi nto konke-konke." 
1Corinthians13:4 Uthando lunomonde, lunobubele. Uthando alunamona, alugwagwisi, lungakhukhumali." 
1Corinthians13:5 Uthando alugezi, alufuni okukokwalo, alunachuku, alunanzondo." 
1Corinthians13:6 Uthando aluvuyiswa bububi, luvuyiswa yinyaniso." 
1Corinthians13:7 Uthando aluncami; lukholwa zizinto zonke, luthemba izinto zonke, lunyamezela izinto zonke." 
1Corinthians13:8 Uthando alupheli. Zikho zona iintshumayelo ezinefuthe, kodwa ziyatshitsha. Zikho neziphiwo zokuthetha iilwimi, kodwa nazo ziyabhanga. Kukwakho nokwazi, kodwa kuyadlula nako." 
1Corinthians13:9 Kaloku ezi ziphiwo sinazo zokwazi nokushumayela azigqibelelanga. 
1Corinthians13:10 Kodwa ke xa kuthe kwafika oko kugqibeleleyo okungagqibelelanga kuya kuphuthiswa konke. 
1Corinthians13:11 Xeshikweni bendingumntwana, bendithetha njengomntwana, ndicinga njengomntwana, ndinezimvo zobuntwana; njengoko ke ndimdala, ndahlukene ngoku neendlela zobuntwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Into esiyibonayo ngoku yimbonakalo nje eluzizi ngokungathi sikhangele esipilini; kanti ke ngoko siya kubona ngokucacileyo. Ukwazi kwam ngoku akugqibelelanga, kanti ke ndokwazi kakuhle ngoko, kufane nokundazi kwakhe uThixo ukwazi kwam." 
1Corinthians13:13 Ngalinye ke, zintathu izinto eziya kuhlala zihleli: lukholo, nethemba, nothando. Engaphezu kwazo zonke ke luthando." 
1Corinthians14:1 Ngoko ke langazelelani uthando, ningaziyeki phofu nezinye izipho zoMoya, ingakumbi isiphiwo sokushumayela." 
1Corinthians14:2 Yena othetha ngeelwimi, uthetha noThixo, akabhekisi mntwini, kuba akukho bani uyiqondayo le nto ayithethayo. Kaloku ngamandla kaMoya oyiNgcwele uthetha izinto ezibanqabeleyo abantu." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kodwa yena oshumayelayo uthetha nabantu; uyabakha, uyabakhuthaza ebathuthuzela." 
1Corinthians14:4 Lowo uthetha ngeelwimi, uzakha yena siqu; kodwa yena oshumayelayo wakha ibandla liphela." 
1Corinthians14:5 Bendingathandayo ukuba nithethe iilwimi xa ninonke, kodwa eyona nto ingaphezulu kukuba nibe nesiphiwo sokushumayela nonke. Lowo ushumayelayo ungaphezulu kwalowo uthetha ngeelwimi, ngaphandle kokuba lowo uthetha ngeelwimi uyatolikelwa, ukuze kwakheke ibandla liphela." 
1Corinthians14:6 Mawethu, kunganinceda ntoni ukuba ndithi xa ndifikile apho kuni ndithethe ngeelwimi? Nento le – ngaphandle kokuba ndiniphathele isityhilelo esivela kuThixo, ulwazi oluthile, okanye udaba olunefuthe likaMoya, kungenjalo imfundiso." 
1Corinthians14:7 Nasengomeni izinto ezinjengoomaxilongo noozikatala zikhala ngokwahlukeneyo. Okanye xa kungenjalo ngubani ongayilandelayo ingoma ukuba azikhali ngokucacileyo? 
1Corinthians14:8 Khona, ukuba ngaba umkhalisi-sigodlo akasikhalisanga ngokucacileyo, ngubani owoyixhobela imfazwe?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Kwangaloo ndlela ke, loqondakala njani udaba eniluthethayo ngeelwimi xa ngaba alucacanga? Nakanjani na olu daba luya kuphephetheka nomoya!" 
1Corinthians14:10 Nakuba kukho iilwimi ngeelwimi apha emhlabeni, akukho nalunye olungenantsingiselo." 
1Corinthians14:11 Ukuba ke andilwazi ulwimi oluthethwayo, lowo uluthethayo uya kuba yintlanga kum, nam ndibe yintlanga kuye." 
1Corinthians14:12 Njengokuba nikulangazelela nje ukuba nazo iziphiwo zoMoya, zamani ukubalasela kwezo zilakhayo ibandla." 
1Corinthians14:13 Umntu othetha ngeelwimi makathandazele ukufumana isiphiwo sokuzicacisa. 
1Corinthians14:14 Kuba xa ndithandaza ngeelwimi umoya wam uhamba nam, kodwa yona ingqiqo ayithathi nxaxheba." 
1Corinthians14:15 Mandithini ke? Mandithandaze ndawonye nomoya wam, kodwa ndithandaze ngengqiqo; mandimemelele ngomoya, futhi ndimemelele ngengqiqo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Ukuba udumisa uThixo usemoyeni, ke yena umntu nje okunye nawe, angatsho njani ukuthi: “*Amen,” kuloo mbulelo wakho? Akanandlela yakuthatha nxaxheba, kuba kaloku akeva." 
1Corinthians14:17 Nangona wona umthandazo wakho uvakala kuThixo, awuloncedo komnye umntu." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndiyambulela uThixo kuba mna iilwimi ndizithetha ngaphezu kwenu nonke. 
1Corinthians14:19 Kodwa enkonzweni ndikhetha ukuthetha nokuba ngambalwa amazwi aqondakalayo, ukuze abanye bafunde, kunokuba ndenze umlembelele wento engaviwayo ndithetha iilwimi." 
1Corinthians14:20 Izimvo zenu mazingabi zezobuntwana, mawethu. Yibani ngabantwana kambe kwizinto eziphathelele ebubini, kodwa iingcinga zenu zona mazivuthwe." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kaloku *eziBhalweni kuthiwa: “ ‘Ndiya kuthetha kwaba bantu ngabantu abantetho yimbi,’ itsho iNkosi. ‘Ndiya kuthetha ngeelwimi zasemzini, kunjalo nje abayi kundiva.’ ”" 
1Corinthians14:22 Ngoko ke isiphiwo sokuthetha iilwimi sikholo ukuba sibe ngumqondiso kwabangakholwayo, ingekuko kwabakholwayo. Ke sona isiphiwo sokushumayela singumqondiso kwabakholwayo, ingekuko kwabangakholwayo." 
1Corinthians14:23 Xa lihlangene ke ibandla, waza ulowo nalowo wasuka wathetha iilwimi, kwaza kwathi kusenjalo kwafika abanye abangayiqondiyo le nto okanye abangengomakholwa, abayi kuthi niphambene?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kodwa ukuba niyashumayela nonke, kuze kufike umntu nje ozihambelayo okanye umntu ongelokholwa, loo mntu uya kuziva echukumiseka ngenxa yelizwi alivayo. Onke amazwi awevayo aya kumgweba," 
1Corinthians14:25 ziphengululwe iingcinga zakhe ezifihlakeleyo, agobe amadolo amnqule uThixo, evuma ukuba ngenene uThixo ukho phakathi kwenu." 
1Corinthians14:26 Lilonke ke, mawethu, ndithi: Ukuba nihlangene ngeenjongo zokunqula, yiphanani inxaxheba; omnye makathathe iculo, omnye imfundiso, wumbi avakalise isityhilelo esivela kuThixo, aze omnye ashumayele ngeelwimi, ngokunjalo ke omnye makatolike loo nto ithethwayo. Yonke into eniyenzayo mayilakhe ibandla." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ukuba nithetha ngeelwimi mababe babini okanye bangagqithi esithathwini abathethayo; nalapho ke makuthethe abe mnye ngexesha, aze ke omnye abatolikele." 
1Corinthians14:28 Kodwa ke, ukuba akukho bani ungatolikayo, lowo ubethanda ukuthetha ngeelwimi ebhekisa ebandleni makaseyeka, azithethele noThixo ngaphakathi." 
1Corinthians14:29 Ababini nabathathu bangashumayela, abanye ke bona betyise loo nto ithethwayo." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kodwa ukuba omnye kwabahleli phantsi uziva enodaba angaluthethayo, lo umileyo makahlale phantsi." 
1Corinthians14:31 Kaloku kungcono ninikane izithuba xa nishumayelayo, ukuze xa lilonke ibandla lifumane imfundiso nenkuthazo." 
1Corinthians14:32 Lowo ushumayelayo makazibambe, hleze ifuthe analo liyone intshumayelo," 
1Corinthians14:33 kuba uThixo lo ngowenzolo, akangowombhodamo. Njengakuwo onke amabandla abantu bakaThixo," 
1Corinthians14:34 amakhosikazi makazole ezintlanganisweni. Akuvumelekanga ukuba ashumayele. Ngoko ke makalulamele umyalelo womthetho. 
1Corinthians14:35 Ukuba kukho into afuna ukuyiqonda makayibuze kubayeni bawo emakhaya. Kaloku ilihlazo into yokuba inkosikazi ithethe entlanganisweni yebandla. 
1Corinthians14:36 Ngaba ke ilizwi likaThixo laqala kuni? Okanye ngaba nini kuphela abantu elifikeleleyo kubo ilizwi likaThixo? 
1Corinthians14:37 Nabani na ozicingela ukuba ungumshumayeli okanye unesiphiwo soMoya, makaqonde ukuba le nto ndiyibhalayo inomnwe weNkosi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ukuba akayamkeli le mfundiso, naye akamkelwa nguThixo." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ngoko ke, mawethu, kulangazeleleni ukushumayela, kodwa ningakuthinteli ukuthetha ngeelwimi." 
1Corinthians14:40 Yonke into mayenziwe ngolungelelwano nangocwangco. 
1Corinthians15:1 Ngoku ke, mawethu, ndithanda ukunikhumbuza ngeendaba ezimnandi zikaThixo endanishumayeza zona; ezo nazamkelayo, enimi nithe zinzi kuzo." 
1Corinthians15:2 Ludaba lukaThixo ke olo, enosindiswa ngalo ukuba nibambelele ngokuthe nkqi kulo ngale ndlela ndinishumayeza ngayo – ngele kokuba ke nafumana nakholwa lilize nje." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ndawo yokuqala ndazigqithisela kuni ezona ndawo ndazamkelayo, ezi zokuba uKrestu wafela izono zethu, ngokutsho *kweziBhalo," 
1Corinthians15:4 nokuba wangcwatywa, nokuba wavuka ekufeni ngomhla wesithathu, ngokweziBhalo;" 
1Corinthians15:5 waza wabonakala kuPetros, wabonwa nangabo bonke abathunywa abalishumi elinambini." 
1Corinthians15:6 Emva koko ubonakele ngaxesha-nye nakubalandeli bakhe abangaphezu kwamakhulu amahlanu, abasekhoyo nangoku abaninzi babo, nakuba babhubhayo nje abanye." 
1Corinthians15:7 Uphindile wabonwa nanguYakobi, wabonwa *nangabathunywa xa bebonke." 
1Corinthians15:8 Ke ekugqibeleni, ngokungathi mna ndizelwe emva kwexesha, wabonwa nandim." 
1Corinthians15:9 Ke kuba mna ndingoyena uphantsi kubo bonke abathunywa, akufanele nokuba kuthiwe ndingumthunywa, kuba ndalitshutshisa ibandla likaThixo." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kodwa ngesisa sikaThixo ndiyile nto ndiyiyo, yaye nesisa andibabala ngaso uThixo andidlalanga ngaso. Ndisuke ndasebenza ukudlula bonke abathunywa, phofu ingendim, koko inguThixo osebenza ngam ngesisa sakhe." 
1Corinthians15:11 Ngoko ke nokuba ndim, nokuba ngabo, sishumayela udaba olunye; ke nina nalwamkela." 
1Corinthians15:12 Njengokuba thina sishumayela ukuba uKrestu wavuka nje ekufeni, batsho njani ke abanye benu ukuba abafileyo abavuki ekufeni?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Ukuba alukho uvuko lwabafileyo, noKrestu ke akazange avuke ekufeni." 
1Corinthians15:14 Ukuba ke uKrestu akavukanga ekufeni, ukushumayela kwethu ngamampunge, nokholo lwenu luphuthile." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ngaphezu koko ke nathi ngaba singamangqina amxokayo uThixo, kuba sathi umvusile uKrestu, nangona angamvusanga, ukuba kambe ngaba kuyinene ukuba abafileyo abavuki." 
1Corinthians15:16 Kuba, ukuba ngaba abafileyo abavuki, noKrestu ke akazange avuke ekufeni." 
1Corinthians15:17 Ukuba ke uKrestu akavuswanga ekufeni, ukholo lwenu ke luyalambatha – nisahleli ezonweni zenu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Loo nto ingathetha ukuthi loo makholwa afa emanyene neNkosi, akukho nto yawo, atshabalele." 
1Corinthians15:19 Ukuba ithemba lethu kuKrestu liphelela kobu bomi qha, singabona bantu balusizi kulo lonke ihlabathi." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kambe ke nantsi eyona nyaniso: evukile nje uKrestu ekufeni, ubahlahlele indlela abafileyo." 
1Corinthians15:21 Njengoko ukufa kweza ngomntu, ngokukwanjalo novuko lwabafileyo luza kwangomntu." 
1Corinthians15:22 Njengoko abantu bâthi ngokumanywa kwabo noAdam bafa bonke, ngokunjalo nangokumanywa kwabo noKrestu baya kuvuka bonke." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kodwa ke elowo nalowo kolwakhe uluhlu: uKrestu yena ngowokuqala kubo bonke; emva koko ke abakhe baya kuvuka ngethuba lokubuya kwakhe. 
1Corinthians15:24 Kwandule ke kufike isiphelo, apho uKrestu aya kunikezela lonke ulawulo kuThixo uYise, akuba ezibhangisile zonke iindidi zezithunywa zezulu: iziphathamandla, oomagunya, kwanamandla." 
1Corinthians15:25 UKrestu kaloku umelwe kukulawula lo gama uThixo amoyisela zonke iintshaba. 
1Corinthians15:26 Olokugqibela ke utshaba oluya kubhangiswa kukufa," 
1Corinthians15:27 kuba, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo: “UThixo umoyisele zonke iintshaba.” Kucacile ke ukuba uThixo yena akabalwa xa kusithiwa “umoyisele zonke,” inguye nje kaloku omoyisele zonke iintshaba uKrestu." 
1Corinthians15:28 Xa ke zonke izinto sezilawulwa nguKrestu, uya kwandula ke yena uNyana ukungena ekulawulweni ngulowo umoyisela zonke izinto; yena ke uThixo abe ngolawula konke." 
1Corinthians15:29 Kwakho kukho abo babhaptizwa endaweni yabafi. Bathemba ukuzuza ntoni ke ngaloo nto? Ukuba ke banyanisile xa bathi akukho luvuko lwabafileyo, bebhaptizwa nje endaweni yabafi, kutheni?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Khona kutheni le nto thina sizibeka emngciphekweni maxa onke? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ndihleli ndisemngciphekweni wokufa mihla le, mawethu! Ngenene le nto ndiyithetha ndiqhayisa ngani ngenxa yebhongo endinalo ngokumanywa kwam noYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu." 
1Corinthians15:32 Ukuba apha e-Efese bendisilwa namarhamncwa ngamandla obuntu nje kuphela ibingandinceda ntoni loo nto? Kodwa ke ukuba akukho kuvuka kwabafileyo “masisesisitya sisela, kuba ngomso siya kufa,” ngabula saci." 
1Corinthians15:33 Musani ukuphazama: “Incoko embi iyasonakalisa isimilo esihle.” 
1Corinthians15:34 Buyelani engqondweni nahlukane nezono. Abazani noThixo abanye benu. Loo nto ndiyithetha ukuze nidane. 
1Corinthians15:35 Mhlawumbi omnye uya kubuza athi: “Bavuka kanjani na abafileyo? Bavuka benomzimba onjani na?” 
1Corinthians15:36 Siyathandini, akwazi ukuba imbewu oyityalileyo ayintshuli ingakhange ife kuqala?" 
1Corinthians15:37 Le nto uyityalayo ayisiso isithombo, kodwa yimbewu nje, nokuba yeyengqolowa okanye olunye uhlobo." 
1Corinthians15:38 Imbewu nganye uThixo uyinika isimo esiyifaneleyo ngokuthanda kwakhe. 
1Corinthians15:39 Inyama yezinto eziphilayo ayifani; ikho eyabantu, ikho neyezilwanyana, neyeentaka ikhona, kanti ikwakho neyeentlanzi. Xa iyonke ke ayifani." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ukumila nesithomo sezidalwa ezisezulwini kwahlukile. Ezasezulwini zinobuhle nesidima esisodwa, kanti nezasemhlabeni zinobuhle nesidima esahlukileyo." 
1Corinthians15:41 Ilanga linobuqaqawuli balo lodwa, nenyanga inobuqaqawuli obubodwa, kanti neenkwenkwezi zinobuqaqawuli obahlukileyo, kuba inkwenkwezi iyahluka kwenye ngokuqaqamba." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kukwanjalo ke nakuvuko lwabafileyo. Njengokuba umzimba ungcwatywa unako ukonakala, uvuka ungasenakonakala." 
1Corinthians15:43 Ungcwatywa uthobekile, uvuka unobuqaqawuli; ungcwatywa ubuthathaka, uvuka unamandla." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kungcwatywa umzimba ongowemvelo, kuvuka umzimba ongowoMoya. Njengokuba ukho nje umzimba ongowemvelo, kucacile ukuba ukho nomzimba ongowoMoya." 
1Corinthians15:45 Kuba *iziBhalo zithi umntu wokuqala, uAdam, waba ngumntu odla ubomi, yena ke owokugqibela uAdam waba nguMoya odlisa ubomi." 
1Corinthians15:46 Akuqali okoMoya, kodwa kuqala okwemvelo, kuze kulandele ke okoMoya." 
1Corinthians15:47 Owokuqala umntu wenziwa ngothuli lomhlaba, ungowomhlaba; yena owesibini uMntu waphuma ezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:48 Abasemhlabeni abantu bafana naloo mntu wenziwa ngomhlaba; kanti ke abasezulwini abantu bafana naloo Mntu wavela ezulwini. 
1Corinthians15:49 Njengokuba sifuze loo mntu wenziwa ngomhlaba, ngokunjalo siya kumfuza naloo Mntu weza ephuma ezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:50 Xa nditshoyo ke, mawethu, ndithi into eyenziwe ngenyama negazi ayinakubudla ilifa ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo, kwaneyonakalayo ayinakungonakali." 
1Corinthians15:51 Mandinazise le nto benikade ningayazi: Asiyi kufa sonke; kodwa ngesiquphe," 
1Corinthians15:52 ngephanyazo, siya kwenziwa kumila kumbi sonke, xa kukhala ixilongo lokugqibela. Kuba liya kuvakala ixilongo; abafileyo baya kuvuswa sebenemo engasenakufa, senziwe kumila kumbi sonke." 
1Corinthians15:53 Kuba le mo sikuyo yonakalayo, imelwe kukwambatha imo engonakaliyo; le mvelo ifayo, yambathe ukungafi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Xa ke le mo yonakalayo seyambethe ukungonakali, naxa le mvelo ifayo seyambethe ukungafi, iya kuzalisekiswa ke le ndawo yeziBhalo ithi: “Ukufa kubhangisiwe; ukufa kufincelelwe eloyisweni.”" 
1Corinthians15:55 “Kufa luphi na uloyiso lwakho? Kufa luphi na ulwamvila lwakho?” 
1Corinthians15:56 Ulwamvila lokufa sisono; amandla esono ngumthetho. 
1Corinthians15:57 Makubulelwe ke kuThixo osinika uloyiso ngayo iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu! 
1Corinthians15:58 Ngoko ke, mawethu athandekayo, yomelelani ningathandabuzi. Yisebenzeleni ngenkuthalo iNkosi ngalo lonke ixesha, kuba kakade ukubulaleka kwenu ngenxa yeNkosi akunakulambatha." 
1Corinthians16:1 Ngokunxulumene nomnikelo wokunceda amakholwa akwaJuda, yenzani ngale ndlela ndandiwayalele ngayo amabandla aseGalati." 
1Corinthians16:2 NgeCawe nganye umntu ngamnye makaqokelele isixa esithile semali, ngokwengeniso ayizuzileyo, asibeke bucala, ukwenzela ukuba ningaqali ukuqokelela ndakuba ndifikile." 
1Corinthians16:3 Ndakufika ndothuma amadoda eniwakhethileyo nina ngokwenu, ayise imali leyo eJerusalem, ndiwaphathise nencwadi yokuwazisa." 
1Corinthians16:4 Ukuba kuyimfuneko ukuba nam ndiye aya kuselehamba nam. 
1Corinthians16:5 Emveni kokuba ndigqithile eMakedoni, ndiya kuza kufika nalapho eKorinte. Kaloku ndiza kucanda kwelaseMakedoni." 
1Corinthians16:6 Kungenzeka ndihlale ixeshana; mhlawumbi ndingabuchithela apho kuni ubusika. Kofuneka nindixhase ke ukudlula apho kuni, noba ndiya phi na." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ukuba iNkosi iyavuma, bendingàthandi kudlula nje, bendingathanda ukukhe ndibe nethutyana ndihleli nani." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ndizimisele ukukhe ndihlale apha e-Efese ide idlule *iPentekoste. 
1Corinthians16:9 Apha kukho ithuba elihle elivulelekileyo lokusebenza, kodwa ke nenkcaso ikwankulu kangako." 
1Corinthians16:10 Ukuba kwenzekile uTimoti wagqitha ngapho, ze nincede nimamkele, atsho azive esekhaya. Kaloku naye usisicaka seNkosi njengam." 
1Corinthians16:11 Musani ukumdela, koko mncedeni ukuze alufeze uhambo lwakhe ngoxolo, eze apha kum. Nam ndimlindele apha kunye namakholwa." 
1Corinthians16:12 Uwethu uApolo ndandimkhuthazile ukuba anihambele kunye namanye amakholwa, kodwa ke akakafuni kuza ngoku. Phofu ke uya kuza akulifumana ithuba." 
1Corinthians16:13 Phaphani, nime zinzi elukholweni! Khaliphani, nomelele!" 
1Corinthians16:14 Wonke umsebenzi wenzeni ngothando. 
1Corinthians16:15 Umzi wakwaStefano niyawazi ukuba ngowamaKrestu okuqala ukuguquka kweli laseAkaya, yaye bazinikele ekukhonzeni abantu bakaThixo. Ndiyanibongoza ke, mawethu,"
