1Corinthians16:16 ukuba nibalulamele abantu abanjengabo. Ndixela nabani na osebenza abulaleke njengabo. 
1Corinthians16:17 Ukufika kukaStefano noFortunato noAkayiko, kuyandonwabisa; kaloku basivalile isikhewu sokungabikho kwenu," 
1Corinthians16:18 bandixolisa njengoko nani benixolisile. Kufuneka athathelwe ingqalelo amadoda anjengala. 
1Corinthians16:19 Ayabulisa amabandla ephondo laseAsiya. UAkwila noPrisila, kwakunye nebandla elingenela emzini wabo, bayabulisa ngokwabantu beNkosi." 
1Corinthians16:20 Ayabulisa onke amakholwa. Nani bulisanani kakuhle ngokwamakholwa. 
1Corinthians16:21 Ndiwubhala ngesam isandla lo mbuliso: Ndiyanibulisa mna Pawulos. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nabani na ongayithandiyo iNkosi uqalekisiwe! “Marana tha” – O, Nkosi, yid' ufike!" 
1Corinthians16:23 INkosi uYesu mayibe nobubele kuni. 
1Corinthians16:24 Ndinithanda xa ninonke ebudlelaneni bukaKrestu Yesu. 
2Corinthians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos – *endingumthunywa kaKrestu Yesu, ngokuthanda kukaThixo – kunye noTimoti uwethu. Sibhalela ibandla likaThixo eliseKorinte, nemilowo yakhe yonke kwelaseAkaya, sisithi:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Wanga uThixo uBawo wethu, kunye neNkosi uYesu, anganenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
2Corinthians1:3 Makabongwe uThixo, uyise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, uBawo uSozinceba, uThixo umthombo wentuthuzelo." 
2Corinthians1:4 Yena uyasithuthuzela ezimbandezelweni zethu zonke, ukuze nathi sikwazi ukubathuthuzela abanye kwangaloo ntuthuzelo ivela kuye." 
2Corinthians1:5 Njengoko ziphuphumela kuthi iimbandezelo zikaKrestu, ngokunjalo ke, kwangaye uKrestu, iphuphumela kuni nentuthuzelo yethu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Xa sukuba thina sisiva ubunzima, loo nto ibangela ukuba nikhuthale, nto leyo iphelela elusindisweni. Naxa sukuba thina sithuthuzelwa, siyancedwa ukuze sikwazi ukunithuthuzela, khon' ukuze nizithwale ngomonde iimbandezelo ezifana nezethu." 
2Corinthians1:7 Ithemba lethu ngani aligungqi, kuba siyazi ukuba njengoko nidlelana nathi nje ngeembandezelo, nikwadlelana nathi nangothuthuzelo esilufumana kuThixo." 
2Corinthians1:8 Mawethu, sifuna niziqonde into eziyiyo iinzima esazifumana kwiphondo laseAsiya. Sasithwele ubunzima apho, sada saphants' ukulilahla ithemba lokuphila." 
2Corinthians1:9 Sasesilibona lijinga phezu kwethu ithunzi lokufa. Loo nto yasifundisa ukuthembela kuThixo ovusa abafileyo, singazithembi thina." 
2Corinthians1:10 Wasikhulula kwezo ngxingongo zokufa, yaye usasikhulula nangoku. Ewe, aligungqi ithemba lethu lokuba usaza kusikhulula nangomso," 
2Corinthians1:11 njengoko nani nisixhasa ngokusithandazela. Ngoko ke ngenxa yobuninzi babantu abasithandazelayo, boba baninzi nabambulelayo uThixo ngenxa yesisa sakhe kuthi." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ibhongo lethu linye ngani: lelokuba asinasazela nganto ngokuziphatha kwethu phakathi kwabantu behlabathi, ingakumbi ke phakathi kwenu. Besinyanisekile, singahanahanisi. Besingenamaqhinga, koko besilawulwa sisisa sikaThixo." 
2Corinthians1:13 Sinibhalela ezo zinto ninokuzifunda niziqonde. Kwaye ke ngumnqweno wam ukuba ezi zinto niziqonda nganxanye 
2Corinthians1:14 nide niziqonde ngokupheleleyo. Kaloku noba nebhongo ngathi kwanjengoko nathi siya kuba nebhongo ngani ngeMini yeNkosi uYesu. 
2Corinthians1:15 Kangangokuba ndandiqinisekile ngalo mbandela ndazimisela ukuba ndinityelele, ukuze nina nibe sethamsanqeni lokuba ndinihambele kabini." 
2Corinthians1:16 Kaloku ndandizimisele ukuba ndinityelele kabini, xa ndiyayo naxa ndibuyayo eMakedoni, nize ke nina nindisize kuhambo lwam oluya kwelakwaJuda." 
2Corinthians1:17 Ngaba ke ndafana ndasijika nje esi sicwangciso? Ngaba xa ndicwangcisayo ndenza nje ngokuzithandela, ndilungele ukuthi ewe okanye hayi ngokuthanda kwam?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Njengokuba uThixo enyanisekile, umlomo wam kuni wawungenguye uewe nohayi ombaxa." 
2Corinthians1:19 UNyana kaThixo, uYesu Krestu lo washunyayelwa kuni nguSilas noTimoti nam, akathi ewe-hayi, hayi-ewe, ngaxesha-nye. Endaweni yaloo nto unguewe kaThixo." 
2Corinthians1:20 Unguewe kaThixo kuzo zonke izithembiso zakhe. Yiyo ke loo nto simdumisa uThixo sisithi “*Amen” ngaye uYesu Krestu. 
2Corinthians1:21 NguThixo osizimasileyo thina nani ngokusimanya noKrestu. Ewe, nguThixo ngokwakhe osiphawuleyo wasithambisa ngoMoya oyiNgcwele ohleli kuthi osisiqinisekiso sezinto ezizayo." 
2Corinthians1:22  
2Corinthians1:23 UThixo uyandingqinela ukuba isizathu sokuba ndingezi eKorinte yayikukwazelelela nina. 
2Corinthians1:24 Andifuni ukunintlokothisa elukholweni. Ndiyasebenzisana nani ukuze nonwabe, lube ke phofu nokholo lwenu aluhexi." 
2Corinthians2:1 Ndandizimisele ke ukuba andiyi kuphinda ndize kuni, ndize kunenza lusizi." 
2Corinthians2:2 Kuba ndingónwatyiswa ngubani, xa ndikhathaza nina? Kaloku akukho wumbi ngaphandle kwenu!" 
2Corinthians2:3 Into ke eyandibangela ukuba ndinibhalele laa leta kukuba ndandingathandi ukuviswa intliziyo ebuhlungu kwangabo bantu bamelwe kukundonwabisa. Kaloku ndiqinisekile kukuba nani niyonwaba xa ninonke ukuba mna ndonwabile. 
2Corinthians2:4 Ndanibhalela ndinexhala, ndibuhlungu, ndisezinyembezini, phofu ndingajonge ukunivisa ntw' imbi, koko ndandifuna niyiqonde kakuhle indlela endinithanda ngayo." 
2Corinthians2:5 Ukuba ke kukho bani ukhathaze omnye, loo mntu akakhathazanga mna ndedwa, ngenye indlela unikhathazile nani." 
2Corinthians2:6 Isohlwayo uninzi lwenu eluvumelene ngaso sikwanele ukona kwakhe. 
2Corinthians2:7 Ngoku ke kufuneka nimxolele, nimkhuthaze, ningamyeki ade atyhafe yintlungu akuyo, aze ancame." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ndiyanibongoza, loo mntu mboniseni ukuba nimthanda ngenene." 
2Corinthians2:9 Ndanibhalela laa leta kanye ngenxa yesi sizathu: ndandifuna ukunivavanya, ndiqonde ukuba niza kusithobela na isiyalo sam." 
2Corinthians2:10 Xa sukuba nixolela umntu ngokona kwakhe, nam ndiyamxolela. Kuba mna xa ndixolela – apho sukuba kukho ndawo ndixolela umntu ngayo – ndenjenjalo ngenxa yenu egameni likaKrestu." 
2Corinthians2:11 Masingavumi ukuqhathwa nguSathana. Siwazi kakuhle kaloku amaqhinga akhe. 
2Corinthians2:12 Ndakuba ndiseTrowa ngodaba lokuhambisa iindaba ezimnandi ezingoKrestu, ndafika apho iNkosi indenzele ithuba elihle lokusebenza." 
2Corinthians2:13 Kodwa andizange ndonwabe emphefumlweni ngenxa yokungamfumani apho uTito uwethu. Ndasuka ke ndacela indlela kubantu balapho, ndemka ndaya eMakedoni." 
2Corinthians2:14 Kodwa, makabongwe uThixo! Kuba simanywe noKrestu nje, yena usoloko esikhokela kumngcelele woloyiso lwakhe. UThixo usebenzisa thina, ukuze kunwenwe ukumazi uKrestu, kugqibe yonke indawo, njengevumba elimnandi." 
2Corinthians2:15 Sinjengesiqhumiso thina esinevumba elimnandi, uKrestu asiqhumisela uThixo, ukuze sinwenwe phakathi kwabasindiswayo nâbo baya kwantshabalalo." 
2Corinthians2:16 Iphunga laso liyabarhaxa abaya kwantshabalalo; silivumba elimnandi elidlisa ubomi kwabo basindiswayo. Ke, ngaba ngubani owufaneleyo lo msebenzi unje?" 
2Corinthians2:17 Thina okungenani asihambi sijikeleza sithengisa ngodaba lukaThixo njengoko besenza abaninzi. Thina bamanywe noKrestu sivakalisa udaba sinyanisekile okwezigidimi zikaThixo. 
2Corinthians3:1 Ngaba ndiyawazincoma? Ngaba nam ndikwanjengabantu abathile, ndifuna iincwadi zokuzazisa ezivela okanye eziya kuni?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Hayi bo! Incwadi yam nini, ibhalwe ezintliziyweni zethu, futhi iyaziwa ifundwa ngumntu wonke." 
2Corinthians3:3 Ngokucacileyo niyincwadi kaKrestu evele ngokusebenza kwam kuni. Ayibhalwanga ngeinki, koko ibhalwe ngoMoya kaThixo ophilayo; ayikrolwanga kumacwecwe elitye, koko ibhalwe kumacwecwe entliziyo." 
2Corinthians3:4 Le nto ndiyithetha kuba ndithembele ngokupheleleyo kuThixo ngenxa kaKrestu. 
2Corinthians3:5 Le nto ayithethi kuthi ndinako ukuwenza ngokwam lo msebenzi. Amandla endinawo avela kuThixo. 
2Corinthians3:6 Ikwanguye ondenze ndaba nako ukukhonza phantsi komnqophiso omtsha, ongaxhomekekanga kumthetho obhaliweyo, koko uxhomekeke kuMoya. Wona umthetho obhaliweyo uyabulala, kodwa yena uMoya uyaphilisa." 
2Corinthians3:7 Umthetho wakrolwa kumacwecwe elitye, baza ubuqaqawuli bukaThixo babonakala ukunikezelwa kwawo. Nangona ukukhanya okwakusebusweni bukaMosis kwakukokwexeshana, kwakuqaqambe kangangokuba amaSirayeli angabi nako ukumjonga. Ukuba umthetho lo wezisa ukufa wasungulwa ngobuqaqawuli obungako," 
2Corinthians3:8 kubeka phi ke ukuqaqamba kwale meko intsha isungulwa nguMoya! 
2Corinthians3:9 Ukuba ulungiselelo olubagwebayo abantu lwaluqaqambile, ngaba lubeka phi ke ukuqaqamba ulungiselelo olubenza msulwa abantu!" 
2Corinthians3:10 Ngenene isihomo ebesikho kumnqophiso omdala sitshitshisiwe ngenxa yokuba ngoku sifikile isihomo esindilekileyo kunaso. 
2Corinthians3:11 Kaloku, ukuba nento yexeshana le yaba nesithozela, ibeka phi ke yona into ehlala ihleli!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Ngenxa yokuba ke sinethemba elinje sithetha ngesibindi. 
2Corinthians3:13 Thina asifani noMosis. Yena wayefaka isigqubuthelo ebusweni, ukuze amaSirayeli angakuboni ukubengezela oko kude kuphele." 
2Corinthians3:14 Ngenene ingqiqo yawo yayibuthuntu; phofu ke eso sigqubuthelo sisekho kwingqiqo yawo unanamhlanje xa kufundwa iincwadi zomnqophiso omdala. Esi sigqubuthelo siyasuka akuba umntu emanyene noKrestu. 
2Corinthians3:15 Unanamhlanje, nanini na umthetho kaMosis ufundwa, esi sigqubuthelo sihlala sihleli kwingqiqo yamaSirayeli." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kanti ke nanini na ebuyela eNkosini, siyasuka isigqubuthelo." 
2Corinthians3:17 INkosi le ke nguMoya. Apho ke ukhona uMoya weNkosi kubakho inkululeko. 
2Corinthians3:18 Ke kaloku thina sonke, sinobuso obutyhiliweyo, ubuqaqawuli beNkosi sibubona ngokungathi kusesibukweni. Ngoko ke siyaguqulwa sifane nayo ncam, sinesidima esiya sikhula. Yonke ke le nto ivela eNkosini ekwanguMoya." 
2Corinthians4:1 Ngoko ke uThixo ngenceba yakhe usinike ubizo lokumsebenzela; yiyo loo nto ke singethi mandla. 
2Corinthians4:2 Ngapha koko sisuka siyilahle imikhwa elihlazo, sibutyeshele ubuqhetseba, nelizwi likaThixo singaligqwethi. Koko sisuka siziyaleze ngokuthetha inyaniso, singafihlisi, kumntu wonke onesazela. Senjenjalo ke phambi koThixo." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kaloku ukuba iindaba ezimnandi esizishumayelayo azicacanga, koba azicacanga kuphela kwabo baya kwantshabalalo." 
2Corinthians4:4 Bona àbakholwa kaloku, kuba ingqiqo yabo yenziwe mfiliba sisigqubuthelo abasifakwe ngulo uzenza uthixo weli phakade. Silisithile kaloku esi sigqubuthelo ilitha lokukhanya kweendaba ezimnandi ezivakalisa isidima sikaKrestu, ongumceph' ucandiwe noThixo." 
2Corinthians4:5 Kakade asishumayeli thina ziqu; sishumayela ukuba uKrestu yiNkosi; thina ke sizizicaka zenu ngenxa yakhe. 
2Corinthians4:6 UThixo owathi: “Makuvele ukukhanya ebumnyameni,” usekwanguye okhanyisela iingqondo zethu, etyhila ukwaziwa kobume bakhe obubonakala kuKrestu siqu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kambe ke obu butyebi sibuphethe ngezitya zodongwe, ukuze kucace ukuba amandla ancamisayo ngakaThixo, akangowethu." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ke, sithi sisezimbandezelweni zingasixini noko; sithingaze maxa wambi, kodwa singancami;" 
2Corinthians4:9 singqingwe ziintshaba, kodwa asize singabi namhlobo; sintlithwa kanobom, singafi noko." 
2Corinthians4:10 Lonke ixesha sisoloko sithwele ukufa kukaYesu, ukuze ubomi bakhe bubonakale kuthi ziqu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ewe, ngalo lonke ixesha sisoloko sisesichengeni sokufa ngenxa kaYesu, khon' ukuze ukudla kwakhe ubomi kubonakale ngathi bantu bafayo." 
2Corinthians4:12 Ngoko ke, kuthi kusebenza ukufa, kodwa kuni kusebenza ubomi." 
2Corinthians4:13 *IziBhalo zithi: “Ndathetha kuba ndandithembele kuThixo.” Nathi ke kwangaloo ndlela, sithetha kuba sithembele kuThixo." 
2Corinthians4:14 Kaloku siyazi ukuba uThixo owayivusayo iNkosi uYesu ekufeni, nathi uya kusivusa kunye noYesu, asise apho akhoyo, kunye nani." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ewe, zilungiselelwe nina zonke ezi zinto, ukuze kuthi njengoko bebaninzi abenzelwa isisa, ngokunjalo nemibulelo ibe mininzi, kudunyiswa uThixo." 
2Corinthians4:16 Kungenxa yale nto ke singethi mandla nje. Kaloku imo yethu entsha isuka ihlaziyeke ngokuhlaziyeka, nokuba imo yethu endala yona iya isonakala ngokonakala." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ewe, ezi mbandezelo zexeshana, zincinane zinjalo, zisilungiselela iwonga laphakade, elingenakulinganiswa nazo." 
2Corinthians4:18 Ngoko ke asilangazeleli zinto zibonwayo, silangazelela ezingabonwayo. Kaloku ezibonwayo izinto zezexeshana nje, kanti ezingabonakaliyo ziya kuhlala zihleli." 
2Corinthians5:1 Siyazi kaloku ukuba xa ithe yachithwa le ndlu yalapha emhlabeni, sinesakhiwo asilungiselele sona uThixo, esisezulwini, esiya kuhlala sihleli." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kule meko siyancwina, silangazelela ukungena kweso sakhiwo sethu sisezulwini." 
2Corinthians5:3 Ukuba singene kuso ke, asinakuyidinga indawo yokuhlala." 
2Corinthians5:4 Okwangoku sisekule ndlu yasemhlabeni siyancwina, siziva sicinezelekile. Asikuko ke nokuba asisayifuni le ndlu yethu yasemhlabeni, koko kukuba silangazelela ukungena kweso sakhiwo sethu sisezulwini, ukuze oko kufayo kuginywe bubomi." 
2Corinthians5:5 NguThixo ngokwakhe osilungiselela le nguqulelo; nguye osinike uMoya oyiNgcwele osisiqinisekiso sazo zonke izinto asilungiselele zona. 
2Corinthians5:6 Ngoko ke sihlala sinethemba. Kaloku siyazi ukuba xa sisekulo mzimba, sikude nelo khaya liseNkosini." 
2Corinthians5:7 Kuba siphila ngokukholwa, kungekuko ngezinto esizibonayo." 
2Corinthians5:8 Asithandabuzi, ngoko ke sinolangazelelo lokuwushiya lo mzimba, siye kuhlala neNkosi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ngaphezu kwezinto zonke ke ibhongo lethu kukuba sithi noba sikweli ikhaya, okanye sikwelo sililangazelelayo, sihlale samkelekile kuyo." 
2Corinthians5:10 Kuba sonke kufuneka sivele phambi koKrestu, asivavanye. Umntu ngamnye uya kufumana loo nto imfaneleyo, nokuba yentle, nokuba yembi, ngokwendlela ebeziphethe ngayo kulo mzimba." 
2Corinthians5:11 Ngenxa yokuba siyithobela iNkosi, sizama ukuzuza abantu. UThixo uyasiqonda ngokupheleleyo, ibe ke nani ndiyathemba ukuba nathi nisiqonda ngokupheleleyo." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngale ndlela ke asizami kuzithandekisa kuni, nto nje sinenzela indlela yokuba nikwazi ukuba neqhayiya ngathi, ukuze nikwazi ukubaphendula abo baqhayisa ngembonakalo endaweni yokuqhayisa ngesimilo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ukuba asibhadlanga, kungenxa kaThixo. Kanti ukuba sibhadlile, kungenxa yenu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Kaloku uthando lukaKrestu lusongamele. Ngoko ke sigqiba kwelithi xa kwafa umntu omnye, efela abantu bonke, lonke uluntu lunenxaxheba koko kufa kwakhe." 
2Corinthians5:15 Wafela abantu bonke, ukuze abo basaphilayo bangabi saziphilela, kodwa baphilele yena wafayo wavuka ngenxa yabo." 
2Corinthians5:16 Ngoko ke asisagwebi mntu ngomgangatho wehlabathi. Noba singade sibe sakha samthatha ngolo hlobo uKrestu, asisayenzi loo nto ngoku." 
2Corinthians5:17 Akuba umntu emanywe noKrestu uba yindalo entsha – isimo esidala yinto yezolo, sekuqaleke isimo esitsha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Wonke lo msebenzi wenziwa nguThixo. Nguye othe ngoYesu Krestu wasixolelanisa naye ngokwakhe, wasinika umsebenzi wokuxolelanisa." 
2Corinthians5:19 Kaloku ngoKrestu uThixo wayelixolelanisa naye ngokwakhe ihlabathi, engasababeki tyala abantu ngezono zabo, waza wasiphathisa umsebenzi woxolelaniso." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ngoko ke sizizigidimi zikaKrestu ngokungathi uThixo unibongoza ngathi. Ngenxa kaKrestu siyanicenga, yibani noxolo noThixo!" 
2Corinthians5:21 Nangona wayengenasono uKrestu, kodwa ngenxa yethu, uThixo wamenza wanenxaxheba kwisono sethu, ukuze thina sithi ngokumanywa naye sibe nenxaxheba ebulungiseni bukaThixo." 
2Corinthians6:1 Ngoko ke njengabo basebenzisana noThixo siyanibongoza ukuba ningathi kanti ubabalo lukaThixo nilwamkelele ilize. 
2Corinthians6:2 Kaloku uthi uThixo: “Ndasabela ngomhla okholekileyo, ndakunceda ngomhla wokusindiswa kwakho.” Khangela ke, nguwo lo umhla okholekileyo, yiyo le imini yokusindiswa!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Ukuze umsebenzi wethu ungabekwa bala, siyaziphepha izinto ezinokukhubekisa nabani na." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ewe, kuyo yonke imicimbi siyazicacisa ukuba sizizicaka zikaThixo, ngokunyamezela sisezinkathazweni – sisezimbandezelweni nasebunzimeni asityhafi:" 
2Corinthians6:5 noba siyabethwa, nditsho sesifakwa ezintolongweni, noba siphakathi kwezidubedube, nditsho sesisetyenziswa ngaphezu kwamandla ethu, naxa singalali okanye singatyi." 
2Corinthians6:6 Siyazicacisa ukuba sizizicaka zikaThixo ngobunyulu, ngamava, ngokuza kade komsindo, nangobubele; ngamandla kaMoya oyiNgcwele, nangothando olungazenzisiyo;" 
2Corinthians6:7 ngokushumayela inyaniso, nangamandla kaThixo. Isikrweqe sethu bubulungisa; ngaso siyahlasela, sihlanganise futhi." 
2Corinthians6:8 Singabanesidima, singabalihlazo; siyathukwa, siyanconywa futhi. Siphathwa njengamaxoki, nakuba sithetha inyaniso;" 
2Corinthians6:9 ngathi asaziwa, ukanti saziwa ngabo bonke; ngathi sifile, kanti siphilile. Nangona sisohlwaywa, asibulawa noko;" 
2Corinthians6:10 nangona sineenzingo, sihlala sichwayitile. Ngathi singamahlwempu, ukanti abaninzi batyeba ngathi; ngathi singabasweleyo, kanti siphuphuma izinto zonke." 
2Corinthians6:11 Zihlobo zaseKorinte, sithethe ngokucacileyo nani, sizityand' igila kuni." 
2Corinthians6:12 Ngakwelethu icala asinifihlelanga nto, koko nini abasahleli eqokobheni." 
2Corinthians6:13 Ngoku ke ndithetha njengoyise kubantwana: Nani linganisani mna, nizityand' igila kum!" 
2Corinthians6:14 Musani ukuzilinganisa nizifanise nabantu abangakholwayo, kuba àyenziwa loo nto. Ingádibana njani into elungileyo nengalunganga? Kungahlala njani ukukhanya ndawonye nobumnyama?" 
2Corinthians6:15 Unabudlelane buni uKrestu nomtyholi? Linabudlelane buni ikholwa nomntu ongakholwayo? 
2Corinthians6:16 Inabudlelane buni na indlu kaThixo nezithixo zeentlanga? Kaloku thina siyindlu kaThixo ophilayo! Kutsho uThixo ngokwakhe ukuthi: “Ndiya kulenza kubantu bam ikhaya lam, ndihlale phakathi kwabo, ndibe nguThixo wabo, babe ngabantu bam ke bona.”" 
2Corinthians6:17 Ngokunjalo iNkosi ithi: “ ‘Phumani phakathi kwabo, nahlukane nabo. Musani ukuyichukumisa into engcolileyo. Mna ndiya kunamkela." 
2Corinthians6:18 Ndoba nguyihlo, nina nibe ngoonyana neentombi zam,’ itsho iNkosi uSomandla.”" 
2Corinthians7:1 Xa ke kanti, mawethu, izithembiso ezinje zenzelwa thina, masizenze sibe nyulu emzimbeni nasemphefumlweni, sibe ngcwele ngokuhlala simoyika uThixo." 
2Corinthians7:2 Nize nihlale nindikhumbula. Andonanga mntu, ndingenzakalisanga bani kuni, akukho nabani ndamqhathayo." 
2Corinthians7:3 Anditsho kuba ndifuna kunibeka bala nganto. Senditshilo kakade ukuthi nina nisenyongweni kum – mna nani sofa kunye. 
2Corinthians7:4 Ndinithembe gqitha, yaye ndinebhongo ngani, kangangokuba kubo bonke ubunzima endinabo ndisuka ndizive ndisomelezeka, ndiphuphuma luvuyo." 
2Corinthians7:5 Andizange ndaba nakuphumla konke-konke, naxa sendifikile eMakedoni. Kwakuziingxabano apho, ngapha nangapha; ndabe ke mna ndinxunguphele." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kodwa, uThixo obomelezayo abadakumbileyo, wandivuselela ngokufika kukaTito." 
2Corinthians7:7 Akubanga kukufika kwakhe nje kodwa, koko nengxelo yakhe ngokumphatha kakuhle kwenu nimkhuthaza, nayo yandivuselela. Wandixelela nokuba anisanqweni ngako ukundibona, nokuba nilusizi, nifuna nokundilwela. Ndonwabe ngakumbi ke ngaloo nto." 
2Corinthians7:8 Xa ndinixelela inyaniso, nokokuba laa ncwadi ndanibhalela yona yanenza buhlungu, andisevi kakubi mna yiloo nto ngoku. Kaloku ndiphawule ukuba naba buhlungu yiyo, nokuba kokwexeshana nje." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kodwa ndiyavuya ngoku – phofu ingekuko kuba ndanivisa ubuhlungu, koko ikukuba intlungu yenu yanibangela inguquko. Intlungu yenu ibe yinto esuke yasetyenziswa nguThixo; ngoko ke andinenzakalisanga." 
2Corinthians7:10 Kaloku ithi intlungu yakusetyenziswa nguThixo, izise inguquko esa ekusindisweni; akukho kuzisola ke ngoko. Kodwa intlungu yasehlabathini yona ibanga ukufa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Khanibone into anenzele yona uThixo ngentlungu yenu: nitsho nanenyameko, nafuna nokuzihlamba ibala lesityholo, nakhathazeka, nanomothuko, nalangazelela nokundibona, natshiseka, nakuqonda nokohlwaya isono. Nibonakalise ngeendlela zonke ukuba aninabala kulo mbandela." 
2Corinthians7:12 Naxa ke ndayibhalayo incwadi leyo kwakungengakuba ndandiyibhala ngenxa kabani owonileyo okanye ubani owoniweyo. Injongo yam ekuyibhaleni yayikukuba ndinibonise mhlophe phambi koThixo indlela enizikhathaza ngayo ngam. 
2Corinthians7:13 Indivuselele kanobom ke loo nto. Andivuselelekanga nje kuphela, koko ndivuyiswa nangakumbi yindlela enanimphethe ngayo uTito xa ninonke, nimenza onwabe." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ndakha ndamqhayisela ngani, nani ke anindiphoxanga. Bendisoloko ndithetha inyaniso kuni ngawo onke amaxesha, ngokunjalo ke nokuqhayisa kwam kuTito akubanga bubuxoki." 
2Corinthians7:15 Naye uya enithanda ngakumbi, ebangwa ziinkumbulo zokumthobela kwenu, nimphethe kakuhle ngembeko noloyiko." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndonwabe kwaphela kuba ndinebhongo lokuba ndinganithemba ngokupheleleyo. 
2Corinthians8:1 Ndithanda ukunazisa, mawethu, ngendlela esisebenze ngayo isisa sikaThixo kumabandla aseMakedoni." 
2Corinthians8:2 Balingeke ngokugqithisileyo, iinkathazo zibavela ngapha nangapha; kodwa naxa kunjalo, babenochulumacho olukwangako, baza banikela ngezandla ezingenamkhinkqi, nangona bona ngokwabo beswele." 
2Corinthians8:3 Ndiyaniqinisekisa ukuba banikele kangangoko babenako. Enyanisweni banikele nangaphezu kokuba benako, ngokuqhutywa ziintliziyo zabo." 
2Corinthians8:4 Bandincekelele bendicenga, befuna ukuba nenxaxheba kwilungelo lokupha abantu bakaThixo bakwaJuda." 
2Corinthians8:5 Banikele nangaphezu kokuba bendilindele mna! Baqale ngokunikela iziqu zabo eNkosini; baza ngokuvuma kukaThixo bazinikela bona ngokwabo nakum. 
2Corinthians8:6 Ngoko ke ndimcelile uTito, yena wawuqalayo lo msebenzi, ukuba awuqhube anincedise nide nilifeze eli phulo lomsebenzi wothando." 
2Corinthians8:7 Niphuphuma izinto zonke: ukholo, ukuthetha, nolwazi, ngolangazelelo eninalo lokunceda, kwanothando enisithanda ngalo. Ngoko ke ndingavuya xa ninokubonakalisa izinwe zenu kweli phulo lothando." 
2Corinthians8:8 Andinibekeli mthetho; nto nje ngokunikhuthaza ngomzekelo wabanye abantu, ndizama ukulola olwenu uthando." 
2Corinthians8:9 Kaloku niyasazi isisa seNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu; nangona wayesisityebi, kodwa wazenza ihlwempu ngenxa yenu, ukuze nina nibe zizityebi ngobuhlwempu bakhe." 
2Corinthians8:10 Nalu uluvo lwam kulo mcimbi: kubhetele ukuba niyigqibe ngoku loo nto nayiqala kunyaka ophelileyo. Anibanga ngabokuqala nje ekwenzeni kuphela, kodwa naba ngabokuqala nasekuboniseni ulangazelelo lokwenza." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ngoko ke ndithi: Phambili, nide niwufeze umsebenzi! Njengokuba nazimisela kwasekusungulweni kwawo, zimiseleni nide niwugqibe, ninikele kangangoko ninako." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ukuba ninolangazelelo, uThixo uyawamkela umnikelo wenu. Kaloku uThixo ufuna umntu aphe ngokobungakanani bezinto anazo, ingebubo obezinto angenazo." 
2Corinthians8:13 Andizami kuphungulela kuni umthwalo weengxaki zabanye, ngokunithwalisa umthwalo wabo. Kodwa njengoko nina nimi kakuhle ngoku, kulungile ukuba nibancede abo basweleyo, khon' ukuze xa nani nisweleyo banincede nabo. Ngale ndlela ke noba niphathana ngokufanayo," 
2Corinthians8:14  
2Corinthians8:15 njengoko *neziBhalo zisitsho ukuthi: “Lowo ubuthe kakhulu akagqithisanga, nalowo ubuthe kancinci wanele.”" 
2Corinthians8:16 Ndiyambulela uThixo ngokwenza uTito abe nomdla kuni njengam. 
2Corinthians8:17 Akanelanga kusamkela nje isicelo sam, koko usuke wabonakalisa umdla ngangokude agqibe ngokwakhe ukuba uyeza kuni." 
2Corinthians8:18 Uza kukhatshwa ngomnye umwethu oxatyiswe kakhulu ngamabandla ngenxa yokuzishumayela kwakhe iindaba ezimnandi. 
2Corinthians8:19 Ngaphezu koko wanyulwa, wamiselwa ngamabandla ukuba ajikeleze kunye nam kweli phulo lothando sidumisa ngalo iNkosi nesiwubonakalisa ngalo umdla wethu wokunceda." 
2Corinthians8:20 Ndizamela ukuba kungabikho gxeke ngendlela endiwuphethe ngayo lo mcimbi weli phulo lingaka. 
2Corinthians8:21 Injongo yam kukuba ndingathembeki kuThixo kuphela, koko ndithenjwe nangabantu." 
2Corinthians8:22 Yiyo ke le nto ndimthuma kuni kunye nabanye. Yena ubesekuvavanyweni amaxesha ngamaxesha, ndamfumana enomdla ekuncediseni. Nanjengoko ekholisekile nini, usuke wanomdla ngakumbi ngoku." 
2Corinthians8:23 UTito yena ngumlingane endisebenza naye ekuncediseni nina. Amanye ke amakholwa ahamba naye, amele amabandla, eludumo kuKrestu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Bamkeleni ke ngezandla ezishushu, nibabelezele, ukuze onke amabandla aqonde ukuba bendingathethi nje xa bendiqhayisa ngani." 
2Corinthians9:1 Akukho mfuneko yokuba ndinibhalele mayela nombandela wephulo lokunceda abantu bakaThixo abakwaJuda. 
2Corinthians9:2 Ngangokuwazi kwam umdla eninawo sendide ndaqhayisa nokuqhayisa ngani kubantu baseMakedoni, ndisithi nina ma-Akaya naniseniwulungele kwakunyaka ophelileyo lo mbandela. Umdla wenu ke uvuselele abantu abaninzi." 
2Corinthians9:3 Ndithumela loo makholwa kuni ngoku, khon' ukuze kungabi ngathi ndandithetha nje xa ndandiqhayisa ngani mayela nalo mcimbi. Njengokuba sendiqhayisile nje ke, bekungakuhle ukuba bafike senilungile." 
2Corinthians9:4 Nanjengokuba ndinithemba kangaka nje, ndingadana kakhulu, nani nihlazeke kakubi, ukuba kunokufika abantu baseMakedoni apho, behamba nam, ningekalungi." 
2Corinthians9:5 Kungoko ke ndithe la makholwa makabe ehamba kuqala, ukuza kukhangela ukuba senisilungisile na isipho enathembisa ngaso, khon' ukuze ke mna ndifike sesilungile, singumnikelo wenu wesisa, ingekuko kuba ninyanzelwa." 
2Corinthians9:6 Nize nikhumbule ukuba ohlwayela kancinane uvuna kancinane, ohlwayela kakhulu avune isivuno esikhulu." 
2Corinthians9:7 Elowo ke makanikele kangangoko agqibe ngako, engenasikrokro, engaziva enyanzelekile, kuba uThixo uthanda umntu opha ngobubele." 
2Corinthians9:8 Kaloku unako uThixo ukunipha nangaphezu kweemfuneko zenu, ukuze nisoloko nanele kwiimeko zonke, nibe nako ukuhlangabezana nayo yonke imisebenzi emihle," 
2Corinthians9:9 njengoko zitshoyo *neziBhalo ukuthi: “Uwapha ngesisa amahlwempu; ububele belungisa buhlala buhleli.” 
2Corinthians9:10 Ke uThixo obonelela umhlwayeli ngembewu nangesonka, uya kunibonelela nani ngembewu eniyisweleyo, ayikhulise inivelisele isivuno esihle ngokobubele benu." 
2Corinthians9:11 Nohlala nanele ukuze nikwazi ukusoloko ninezinwe, khon' ukuze uThixo abulelwe ngabantu abaninzi ngenxa yezipho zenu abazifumana kuthi." 
2Corinthians9:12 Le nkonzo niyenzayo kaloku ayanele nje kukuhlangabezana neentswelo zabantu bakaThixo, koko ibanga ukuphuphuma kwemibulelo ebhekiswa kuThixo." 
2Corinthians9:13 Abaninzi ke baya kumdumisa uThixo ngenxa yokucaca kwentembeko yenu, xa bebona ukumthobela kwenu nokunyaniseka kwenu kwiindaba ezimnandi zikaKrestu, nangobubele benu, kuba nisabelana nabo bonke abanye." 
2Corinthians9:14 Bonithandazela ke benga banganibona ngenxa yesisa esikhulu anenzele sona uThixo. 
2Corinthians9:15 Makabulelwe uThixo ngesipho sakhe esingaka. 
2Corinthians10:1 Ndim, mna Pawulos ngenkqu, onibongozayo, nakuba kusithiwa ndinobulali ndithantamisa xa ndilapho phakathi kwenu, kodwa ndithi ndakuba ndisithele ndibe nesibindi nobuganga ngakuni. Ndiyanicenga ke, ngenxa yokuthantamisa nobubele bukaKrestu:" 
2Corinthians10:2 musani ukundinyanzela ukuba ndibe nesibindi nobuganga ndakuba ndifikile apho kuni; kuba ke ndiyaqonda ukuba ndinganabo ubuganga kwabo bandityhola ngokuthi ndiqhutywa lifuthe labantu beli hlabathi. 
2Corinthians10:3 Kuyinene kona ukuba sihleli apha ehlabathini; kodwa ke asilwi ngokwehlabathi. 
2Corinthians10:4 Kaloku izixhobo esilwa ngazo ayizizo ezehlabathi, koko zizikrweqe ezomeleleyo zikaThixo. Ngazo ke sidiliza iinqaba. Ewe, sichitha iingxoxo ezilahlekisayo;" 
2Corinthians10:5 sidiliza ngazo yonke imiqobo yamabhongo achasa ukuba abantu bamazi uThixo; sithimba zonke iingcamango, sizenze zithobele uKrestu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Xa nani ke seniyibonakalisile ngokupheleleyo neyenu intobeko, soba nako ke ukulungela ukohlwaya yonke inkcaso." 
2Corinthians10:7 Izinto zijongeni njengokuba zinjalo. Ngaba ukho na apho phakathi kwenu ozimisele ukuba ungokaKrestu yena? Lowo ke makazikise ukucinga, kuba nathi singabakaKrestu kwanjengaye." 
2Corinthians10:8 Kuba andinazintloni, nokuba lingade libe lithe kratya iqhayiya lam ngegunya esalinikwa yiNkosi. Ligunya lokunakha, asililo elokunidiliza." 
2Corinthians10:9 Iileta zam sanukuzithatha ngokungathi ndizama ukunigrogrisa ngazo. 
2Corinthians10:10 Kaloku abanye bathi: “Unesibindi nobuganga xa ebhala, kodwa asakufika yena buqu, ulitatasholo, nokuthetha kwakhe kuphuthile.”" 
2Corinthians10:11 Abo batshoyo mabaqonde le ndawo: ukufika kwam apho ndiya kwenza kwangale ndlela ndithetha ngayo xa ningekhoyo. 
2Corinthians10:12 Ngenene, thina asingeze sazilinganisa nabo baziphakamisayo. Bazizityhakala! Bazilinganisa nabo ngokwabo, besebenzisa imigangatho abayimise kwangokwabo!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Okwethu ke ukuqhayisa kuphantsi kwemida ethile. Akudluli kwimida yokusebenza esiyimiselwe nguThixo, ebandakanya nokusebenza kwethu phakathi kwenu." 
2Corinthians10:14 Njengoko ke nani nikwakuloo mida, andiyitsibanga ke ngokuza kuni ndiniphathele iindaba ezimnandi ezingoKrestu." 
2Corinthians10:15 Ngoko ke andiqhayisi ngomsebenzi owenziwe ngabanye ngaphaya kwemida endiyimiselwe nguThixo. Ndaweni yaloo nto, ndinethemba lokuba lwakukhula ukholo lwenu, ndiya kuba nako ukwenza umsebenzi ongaphezulu phakathi kwenu, ndisoloko ndikwimida endiyimiselwe nguThixo." 
2Corinthians10:16 Kamva ke ndoba nako ukuzishumayela iindaba ezimnandi kumazwe angaphaya kwenu, ukuze ndingaqhayisi ngomsebenzi osewenziwe kwimida yomnye umntu." 
2Corinthians10:17 Kodwa ke, njengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo: “Nabani na othanda ukuqhayisa, makaqhayise ngento eyenziwe yiNkosi.”" 
2Corinthians10:18 Kaloku umntu owamkelekileyo ngulowo unconywa yiNkosi, ingenguye ozincoma ngokwakhe." 
2Corinthians11:1 Bendinga ningakhe nindinyamezele kancinane kobu budenge bam; ngenene ndinyamezeleni! 
2Corinthians11:2 Ndinekhwele ngani kanye ngale ndlela uThixo anekhwele ngayo ngani; ninjengentombi enyulu endiyendisela esokeni elinye qha, elinguKrestu." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kambe ndinoloyiko hleze iingqondo zenu ziwexuleke, nikutyeshele ukuzondelela uKrestu, kanye ngalaa ndlela uEfa walukuhlwa ngayo bubuqhetseba benyoka." 
2Corinthians11:4 Kaloku nithakazelela nabani na oza kuni anishumayeze uKrestu ongomnye, ongenguye lo ndamshumayelayo; nize ninyamazele nabani na oza nomoya ongenguye lo namnikwayo. Namkela neendaba ezinxamnye neendaba ezimnandi enazifumana kuthi." 
2Corinthians11:5 Akukho nto ndisilela ngayo kwabo bathunywa benu baxabisekileyo! 
2Corinthians11:6 Kungenzeka ukuba andilociko ekuthetheni, kodwa ke ndinalo lona ulwazi. Iye yacaca le nto kuni amaxesha ngamaxesha naphantsi kweemeko ngeemeko." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ngokuya ndandinishumayeza iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo zange ndinihlawulise nento le; ndazithoba mna ukuze nizimaseke nina. Ngaba ndona ngokwenjenjalo? 
2Corinthians11:8 Ngokuya ndandisebenza phakathi kwenu ndandibonelelwa ngamanye amabandla. Ngenye indlela ndandiwaqhatha ukuze ndincede nina. 
2Corinthians11:9 Ngelo xesha ndandinani andizange ndinikhathaze ngakufuna nto kuni xa ndandiswele imali. Amakholwa awayevela eMakedoni andiphathela yonke into endandiyiswele. Njengakwixesha elidlulileyo, koba njalo nakwelizayo: andisoze ndibe ngumthwalo kuni!" 
2Corinthians11:10 Ndithetha ndingokaKrestu nje, eli qhayiya ndinalo lokuba ndingengomthwalo kuni aliyi kunqandwa bani kulo lonke elaseAkaya." 
2Corinthians11:11 Ndiyithethiswa yintoni ke le nto? Ngaba kungenxa yokuba ndinganithandi? UThixo uyazi ukuba ndiyanithanda! 
2Corinthians11:12 Ndiya kuqhubela phambili ndisenza le nto ndiyenzayo, ukuze ndibavalele abo bathunywa babo bangabi nandlela yakuqhayisa, besithi benza kwalo msebenzi ndiwenzayo." 
2Corinthians11:13 Loo madoda ayingobathunywa – angoosinga-bathunywa; azithethelela ngobuqhetseba, azenze akhangeleke ngathi angabathunywa bakaKrestu ngenene." 
2Corinthians11:14 Ayimangalisi loo nto, kuba noSathana ngokwakhe uzenza akhangeleke ngathi sisithunywa sokukhanya." 
2Corinthians11:15 Ngoko ke yinto elula ukuba izicaka zakhe zizenze zikhangeleke njengezicaka zikaThixo. Kodwa ke baya kuvuna loo nto bayihlwayeleyo. 
2Corinthians11:16 Kwakhona ndithi makungabikho bani uba ndisisidenge. Kodwa ukuba nithi ndisisidenge, ze nindinyamezele ke njengesidenge, oku kokuba ndifumane ithutyana lokuqhayisa." 
2Corinthians11:17 Ngenene le nto ndiyithethayo ngoku andiyithunywanga yiNkosi. Kulo mbandela wokuqhayisa ndithetha njengesidenge mpela. 
2Corinthians11:18 Kodwa ke ngenxa yokuba bebaninzi kangaka nje abaqhayisa ngamabakala eli hlabathi, nam ndiya kwenjenjalo." 
2Corinthians11:19 Nakuba nina nilumke kangaka nje niyakuthakazelela kodwa ukunyamezela izidenge! 
2Corinthians11:20 Ninyamezela nabani na onivuyelelayo, okanye onixhaphazayo, okanye ozanyiselelayo, okanye onijongele phantsi, okanye oniqhwabayo." 
2Corinthians11:21 Ndineentloni ukuyivuma loo nto; kambe mna ndaba ligwala! Kodwa ke ukuba kukho bani onobuganga bokuqhayisa – ndivakala njengesidenge – nam ndiya kuba nobuganga obukwanjalo. 
2Corinthians11:22 Ngaba bangamaHebhere na? Nam ndinguye. BangamaSirayeli? Nam ndinguye. Ngaba bayinzala ka-Abraham na? Nam ndiyiyo. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bazizicaka zikaKrestu na? – Ndivakala njengegeza – Nam ndisiso, nangaphezulu! Ndisebenze nzima ngokungaphezulu, ndivalelwe kaninzi entolongweni, ndikatswe kaninzi, ndilikrobe kaninzi ingcwaba." 
2Corinthians11:24 Kukahlanu ndikatswa imivumbo engamashumi amathathu anethoba ngamaJuda. 
2Corinthians11:25 Ndikatswe izihlandlo ezithathu ngamaRoma, futhi ndakha ndaxulutywa ngamatye. Kukathathu ndiqhekekelwa yinqanawa elwandle; ndakha ndachitha ubusuku nemini enzonzobileni yamanzi." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ndaba soloko ndiseluhambeni; ndibe sezingozini emilanjeni, iingozi kwizihange, iingozi kumawethu, iingozi kwabasemzini, iingozi ezidolophini, iingozi emaphandleni, iingozi elwandle, iingozi nakwabanga bazizihlobo." 
2Corinthians11:27 Ndaba soloko ndisebenza nzima, ndibulaleka; ndaba soloko ndingalali; ndilamba, ndinxanwa; ndaba soloko ndiswele ukutya okwaneleyo, indawo yokuhlala, nempahla yokunxiba." 
2Corinthians11:28 Ndingasazibaluli ke ezinye izinto, ndinoxanduva endisoloko ndinalo mihla le: ixhala lokuzondelela inkqubela kuwo onke amabandla." 
2Corinthians11:29 Xa kukho obuthathaka, nam ndiba buthathaka; ukuba kukho owe esonweni, ndiyakhathazeka." 
2Corinthians11:30 Xa kuyimfuneko ukuba ndiqhayise, ndiya kuqhayisa ngezo zinto zibonakalisa ubuthathaka bam." 
2Corinthians11:31 UThixo uYise weNkosi uYesu – malidunyiswe igama lakhe njalo-njalo – uyazi ukuba andixoki. 
2Corinthians11:32 Xa ndandiseDamasko irhuluneli ephantsi kokumkani uAreta yabeka abalindi emasangweni edolophu ukuze bandibambe. 
2Corinthians11:33 Kodwa ndathotywa ngebhaskiti kwikroba elaliseludongeni, ndasinda ke." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ndiya kuqhayisa ke khona, nakuba loo nto ingancedi nje. Ndiza kubalisa ngemibono nangezityhilelo zeNkosi." 
2Corinthians12:2 Kukho mfo uthile womKrestu owathi kwiminyaka elishumi elinane eyadlulayo, wathwetyulelwa phezulu ezulwini. (Andazi phofu nokokuba yehla ngenene le nto, nokuba yayingumbono nje; kwazi uThixo kuphela.)" 
2Corinthians12:3 Ndiyaphinda ndithi loo mfo wathwetyulelwa ezulwini. (Ndiphinde ndithi kwakhona nokokuba yehla ngenene le nto, nokuba yayingumbono nje, andazi; kwazi uThixo kuphela.) Wathwetyulelwa apho akhoyo uThixo. Apho ke weva amazwi angathethekiyo, ekungavumelekanga nokuba athethwe mntu." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Nguloo mfo ke lo ndiza kuqhayisa ngaye. Mna andizi kuzingca nganto ngaphandle nje kwezo zibonakalisa ubuthathaka bam. 
2Corinthians12:6 Phofu ukuba bendingafunayo ukuqhayisa bendingayi kuba ndisisidenge, kuba bendiya kuba ndithetha inyaniso. Kodwa ke andizi kuqhayisa, kuba andifuni kubekho mntu undicingela ngaphezu kwaloo nto ndiyiyo ekwenzeni nasekuthetheni." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ngoko ke, ukuze ndingakhukhumali likratshi ngenxa yezi zityhilelo zimangalisayo, ndabethwa ngesifo esaba sisithunywa sikaSathana ukuze sindintlithe ndingazingci ngokugqithisileyo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ndayithandaza kathathu iNkosi, ndiyicela ukuba isisuse kum." 
2Corinthians12:9 Kodwa yandiphendula yathi: “Ubabalo lwam lukwanele, kuba amandla am acaca xa ubuthathaka.” Ngoko ke ndikhetha ukuqhayisa ngezinto ezibonakalisa ubuthathaka bam, ukuze ndikuve ukongama kwamandla kaKrestu phezu kwam." 
2Corinthians12:10 Ndanelisekile ke ngoko nokuba ndibuthathaka, nokuba ndiyagxekwa, nokuba nditsala nzima, nditshutshiswa, ndithwala iimbandezelo ngenxa kaKrestu. Kuba xa ndibuthathaka, kuxa kanye ndinamandla." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndenze ubudenge ngokuqhayisa, kodwa nini abandibangele obo budenge. Bendifanele ukuba ndinconywe nini; kuba, nokuba andinto na, andikho nganeno kodwa kwabo singa-bathunywa benu!" 
2Corinthians12:12 Nizibone ngawenu amehlo iimpawu *zomthunywa ngemiqondiso yamandla nemimangaliso endathi rhoqo ukuyenza phakathi kwenu. 
2Corinthians12:13 Ngaba kukho nto iyenye na ndanenzela yona kakubi nina kunamanye amabandla, ngaphandle nje kokuba ndingabanga ngumthwalo kuni? Ndiyaxolisa ke ngelo xanasi!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Ngoku sesesithathu isihlandlo ndikulungele ukuza kunibona; ndaye ndingazi kuba ngumthwalo konke kuni. Ndixabise nina kunemali yenu. Andibi kanene ngabazali abondla abantwana, ayingobantwana abondla abazali!" 
2Corinthians12:15 Kungamnandi kakhulu kum ukuba mna ndinokudleka, ewe, ndichithe konke endinako ngenxa yenu. Ndinithanda kangaka nje mna, ngaba nina nindithanda kancinane?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Ewe, nokuba bendingengomthwalo kuni, nisenokutsho ukuthi ndaninyusha ngobuqhetseba bam." 
2Corinthians12:17 Njani? Yiyiphi kumadoda endawathuma kuni, endathi maze inixhaphaze?" 
2Corinthians12:18 UTito ndamthundeza ukuze anihambele, ekhatshwa ngulaa mwethu ndandimthume kuni. Ningatsho ukuthi uTito waninyusha? Ningathini kaloku nisazi kakuhle nje ukuba yena nam sineenjongo ezinye, siqhuba ngenkqubo enye?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Kungenzeka kambe ukuba ngalo lonke eli xesha niba ndiyazithethelela kuni. Hayi, ndithetha phambi koThixo, ndingokaKrestu, yaye nenjongo yam ikukuba nakheke, zihlobo zam ezithandekayo." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ndinoloyiko lokuba ndifike apho ningeyiyo into endinqwenela ukufika niyiyo, nam ndingeyiyo leyo nindinqwenelela ukuba ndibe yiyo. Ndinoloyiko hleze ndifike kukho iingxabano nomona, imisindo nolunya, izinyeliso neentlebendwane, amayelenqe neziphithi-phithi." 
2Corinthians12:21 Ndinexhala lokuba ndakuthi ndakufika apho andiphoxe uThixo wam, ndilile phambi kwenu ngenxa yabo bonileyo baza àbaguquka ekungcoleni abakwenza ngombulo nokurheletya." 
2Corinthians13:1 Eli liza kuba lixesha lesithathu ndinityelela. “Nasiphi na isityholo kufuneka simiswe ngamangqina amabini okanye amathathu,” njengoko zisitsho *iziBhalo." 
2Corinthians13:2 Ndibhekisa kwabo babonile ngaphambili, kunye nawuphi na ongomnye. Ndandikhe ndatsho kambe kutyelelo lwam lwesibini, kodwa ndiyaphinda nangoku ndingekhoyo ukuthi: xa ndiphinda ukuza apho, akukho bani uya kusinda ekohlwayweni." 
2Corinthians13:3 Nithi nifuna ukuqinisekiswa ukuba uKrestu uyathetha ngam. Nimazi engelobhetye-bhetye, kodwa enamandla phakathi kwenu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Kuba nakuba wabulawa emnqamlezweni enenxaxheba kubuthathaka bethu, udla ubomi ngamandla kaThixo. Ngoko ke ndibuthathaka kuba ndimanywe naye, kodwa ndiyakudla ubomi naye ngamandla kaThixo. Iya kucaca ke loo nto kuni." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zivavanyeni niziqonde ukuba ningamakholwa ngenene na. Khanizicikide. Ngokuqinisekileyo niyaqonda ukuba uYesu Krestu ukho kuni – ngaphandle kokuba ngaba noyisakele. 
2Corinthians13:6 Ndiyathemba ukuba niya kuqonda ukuba ndiphumelele mna. 
2Corinthians13:7 Ndithandaza kuThixo ukuba ningoni tu – kungekuko ukubonakalisa impumelelo yam, kodwa kukuze nenze oko kulungileyo, nangona mna ndinga ngathi ndoyisiwe." 
2Corinthians13:8 Kaloku mna andiyenzi into ephikisana nenyaniso, kuba ndingakuyo inyaniso." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ndiyavuya mna xa ndibuthathaka nibe ke nina nomelele. Ngoko ke ndithandazela ukuba ningabi nampazamo. 
2Corinthians13:10 Yiyo le nto ndibhala ngoku ndingekezi apho kuni. Ndenzela ukuba ze ndithi ndakufika apho ndinganiphathi gadalala, ndisebenzisa igunya endalinikwa yiNkosi – igunya lokunakha, ingelilo elokuniwisa." 
2Corinthians13:11 Ekugqibeleni ke, mawethu, ndithi salani kakuhle. Zamelani ukuba ningabi nampazamo; zigqaleni iziyalo; visisanani, nihlale ngoxolo. Ngoko ke uThixo wothando noxolo uya kuba nani." 
2Corinthians13:12 Bulisanani ngokwamakholwa. Bonke abantu bakaThixo bayanibulisa. 
2Corinthians13:13 Ubabalo lweNkosi uYesu Krestu, nothando lukaThixo, nobudlelane boMoya oyiNgcwele, maluhlale nani nonke." 
Galatians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos ndabizwayo ndaba *ngumthunywa, ndingabizwanga mntu, okanye ndimiselwe mntu; koko ndibizwe nguYesu Krestu noThixo uYise, owamvusayo uYesu ekufeni." 
Galatians1:2 Mna namawethu onke akunye nam siyanibulisa, mabandla aseGalati, sithi:" 
Galatians1:3 Wanga uThixo wethu neNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu anganenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
Galatians1:4 UKrestu wancama ubomi bakhe ngenxa yezono zethu, ukuze asihlangule egunyeni leli hlabathi longendawo, ethobela ukuthanda kukaYise uThixo wethu." 
Galatians1:5 Makadunyiswe uThixo ngonaphakade! *Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Ndinithele nqa ukuba nithi ngexeshana nje elingephi nibe senindlandlatheka emva kwezinye iindaba ezingathi zimnandi, nimfulathele lowo wanibizayo ngesisa sikaKrestu." 
Galatians1:7 Eneneni akukho ndaba zimbi zimnandi zizezinye, koko nditsho nje kuba kukho abantu abaniphazamisayo, bezama ukuzigqwetha iindaba ezimnandi ezingoKrestu." 
Galatians1:8 Kodwa ukuba kukho umntu, nokuba ndim, nokuba sisithunywa sezulu, oshumayela iindaba ezinxamnye nezo ndanishumayeza zona: uqalekisiwe lowo." 
Galatians1:9 Besenditshilo, nangoku ndiyaphinda, ndithi: Ukuba kukho bani onishumayeza iindaba ezingathi zimnandi eziphikisana nezo senizamkele, loo mntu makaqalekiswe!" 
Galatians1:10 Ngaba ndivakala ngathi ndifuna abantu babe ngakwicala lam na? Hayi, nguThixo kuphela endifuna abe ngakum. Niba ngaba ndizicengezela ebantwini? Ukuba bendizicengezela ebantwini, ngendingesiso isicaka sikaKrestu." 
Galatians1:11 Mandiyithethe ngokuphandle, mawethu, into yokuba ezi ndaba ndizishumayelayo aziyonto nje equlunqwe ngumntu." 
Galatians1:12 Nam andizinikwanga mntu, futhi ndingazifundiswanga mntu; ndazityhilelwa nguYesu Krestu." 
Galatians1:13 Ndiyacinga ukuba senivile ngobomi bam ngokuya ndandingekaguquki ekulandeleni izithethe zonqulo lwamaJuda. Okuya ndandilitshutshisa ngokungenanceba ibandla likaThixo, ndifunzele ukulitshabalalisa." 
Galatians1:14 Kwezonqulo ndandigalawele kuneentanga zam ezininzi. Ndandibalasele ngenzondelelo kwizithethe zamanyange. 
Galatians1:15 Kodwa uThixo wandinyula ndingekazalwa, wandibiza ngenxa yesisa sakhe ukuba ndimsebenzele. Kuthe ke kwakukholeka kuThixo" 
Galatians1:16 ukumbonakalisa uNyana wakhe kum, ukuze ndishumayele iindaba zakhe ezintlangeni, andabi sabuza nto mntwini," 
Galatians1:17 andabi saya nokuya naseJerusalem *kubathunywa abadala kunam emsebenzini, koko ndasuka ndaya ngqo kwelama-Arabhu. Emva koko ke ndabuyela eDamasko." 
Galatians1:18 EJerusalem ndaya emva kweminyaka emithathu, ndinomnqweno wokwazana noPetros; ndahlala naye ke iiveki zambini." 
Galatians1:19 Akukho mthunywa wumbi ndambonayo ngaphandle kukaYakobi umntakwabeNkosi. 
Galatians1:20 Ndithetha inyaniso; andixoki; uThixo uyazi! 
Galatians1:21 Emva kwexesha ndaya kwimimandla yaseSiriya naseKiliki. 
Galatians1:22 Ngelo xesha ke amabandla kaKrestu akwaJuda ayengekandiboni. 
Galatians1:23 Babeseva nje ngembali, kusithiwa: “Laa mfo wayekade esitshutshisa, ngoku ushumayela iindaba zokholo, ezi kanye wayezitshabalalisa.”" 
Galatians1:24 Kambe ke babemdumisa uThixo ngenxa yam. 
Galatians2:1 Emva kweminyaka elishumi elinesine ndabuyela eJerusalem noBharnabha, ndikhatshwa nguTito." 
Galatians2:2 Ndaya kuba ndityhilelwe nguThixo ukuba mandiye. Saba nentlanganiso yabucala kunye neenkokheli, ndaza ndazichazela iindaba endizishumayela ezintlangeni. Ndandingafuni ukuba umsebenzi esendiwenzile nalowo ndandisawenza ube lilize." 
Galatians2:3 Nakuba wayengumGrike, uTito owayenam zange anyanzelwe ukuba aluke," 
Galatians2:4 nangona amadoda athile azenza amakholwa angenelela, aza afuna ukuba makalùswe. Aba bantu bangena ngokunyebelezela, befuna ukuhlola le nkululeko sinayo kubudlelane bethu noKrestu, befuna ukusenza amakhoboka." 
Galatians2:5 Kambe asizange sibaqhelisele nakancinane, khon' ukuze sinigcinele inyaniso yeendaba ezimnandi ingenabala." 
Galatians2:6 Kodwa ke abo baziinkokheli ezaziwayo – nditsho kuba into abayiyo ayenzi mahluko kum, kaloku uThixo yena akasebenzi ngembonakalo – ndithi ke ezo nkokheli zange zifumane sikhwa kum." 
Galatians2:7 Ndaweni yaloo nto zayamkela into yokuba uThixo undiphathise uxanduva lokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi ezintlangeni, kwanjengokuba noPetros ephathiswe uxanduva lokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:8 Kaloku amandla kaThixo andenza *ndangumthunywa ezintlangeni, kanye ngale ndlela uPetros wenziwa ngayo wangumthunywa kumaJuda." 
Galatians2:9 UYakobi noPetros noYohane ababesaziwa njengezona ntsika, bayivuma into yokuba uThixo undibizele kulo msebenzi, ngoko ke basibamba isandla sinoBharnabha. Savumelana ke ukuba sisebenzisane; thina sisebenze phakathi kweentlanga, bona ke phakathi kwamaJuda." 
Galatians2:10 Into abayiyalezayo kukuba sibakhumbule abo bahlelelekileyo phakathi kwabo, nto leyo ke endandisenza yona kakade." 
Galatians2:11 Xa wayeseAntiyokwe uPetros ndamgqogqa iindlebe, ndimxelela ngempazamo yakhe eyayidandalazile mpela." 
Galatians2:12 Wayedla ngokutya kunye namakholwa aziintlanga, ngaphambi kokuba kufike apho iqela lamadoda awayevela kuYakobi. Kodwa kuthe kwakuba kufike la madoda warhoxa uPetros, wazilumla ekutyeni namawethu aziintlanga, ngenxa yokoyika ukugxekwa ngâbo babesithi makwalukwe." 
Galatians2:13 Namanye amakholwa amaJuda abonakalisa kwaobo bubhetyebhetye bufana nobukaPetros, kangangokuba noBharnabha wawexuleka bobo bubhetyebhetye." 
Galatians2:14 Ndithe ke ndakukuphawula ukungabi nanyaniso kokuziphatha kwabo ngendlela engangqinelaniyo nenyaniso yeendaba ezimnandi, ndathi kuPetros phambi kwabo bonke: “Nakuba wena ungumJuda, ubusoloko uziphethe njengeentlanga kodwa; ungathini ke ngoku ukujika uzinyanzele iintlanga ukuba ziziphathe njengamaJuda?”" 
Galatians2:15 Ewe kambe, singawo amaJuda emveli, asizizo iintlanga ezingaboni, ngabula nina." 
Galatians2:16 Kodwa siyazi ukuba umntu akenziwa abe lilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokuba esenza okufunwa *ngumthetho kaMosis; kuphela kungokuzinikela kuYesu Krestu. Ke nathi samvuma uKrestu uYesu ukuze uThixo asenze amalungisa ngenxa yokuzinikela kwethu kuye, ingekuba senza okufunwa ngumthetho. Kaloku akukho bani wenziwa ilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokubambelela kwakhe emthethweni." 
Galatians2:17 Ukuba ke thina sizamela ukwenziwa amalungisa nguThixo ngokumanywa noKrestu, sisafumaneka sisenza isono, ngaba loo nto ithetha ukuthi uKrestu uhambisana nesono? Nakanye!" 
Galatians2:18 Ukuba ndiyaphinda ndiyivuse imikhwa endahlukanáyo nayo ndiyazicacisa ukuba ndim isaphulamthetho. 
Galatians2:19 Kaloku ndafa kuwo umthetho – ndibulawa kwangawo amabango omthetho – ukuze ndiphilele uThixo. Ndibethelelwe emnqamlezweni kunye noKrestu," 
Galatians2:20 ngoko ke ayisendim ophilayo, nguKrestu ophilayo kum. Ubomi ke endibudlayo ngoku ndimanywe noNyana kaThixo, ndibudla ngokholo kulowo wandithandayo, wabuncama obakhe ubomi ngenxa yam." 
Galatians2:21 Andifekethi ngesisa sikaThixo; kuba, ukuba umntu ebenokuba lilungisa phambi koThixo ngenxa yokugcina umthetho, loo nto ibiya kuthetha ukuba wafumana wafa uKrestu." 
Galatians3:1 MaGalatindini, nitheni, aninangqondo? Nibulewe phi ninje nje nje? Nina aba kanye nanisenzelwa inkcazelo ecacileyo ngokufa kukaYesu emnqamlezweni!" 
Galatians3:2 Khanindiphe nje le ndawo: Ngaba uMoya kaThixo namamkela ngenxa yokuba nenze okufunwa ngumthetho, okanye kwakungenxa yokuba naziva nazamkela iindaba ezimnandi?" 
Galatians3:3 Ningathini ukungabi nangqondo kangaka! Njengokuba naqala ngamandla oMoya kaThixo nje, ngaba ngoku senifuna ukugqibezela ngawenu amandla?" 
Galatians3:4 Ngaba izigigaba ezinjengezi naba nazo zafumana zabakho? Ngenene azizange zifane zehle nje! 
Galatians3:5 Kanene, ngaba uThixo waninika uMoya waza wenza nemiqondiso phakathi kwenu, ngenxa yokuba nina nanithobela umthetho? Okanye ezo zinto wazenza ngenxa yokuba nina nazivayo nazamkela iindaba ezimnandi?" 
Galatians3:6 Kunjengoko *iziBhalo zitshoyo ngoAbraham ukuthi yena wakholwa kuThixo, waza ke uThixo wamenza ilungisa ngenxa yokukholwa kwakhe." 
Galatians3:7 Nize niqaphele ke ukuba ngâbo bakholwayo abayinzala ka-Abraham ngenene. 
Galatians3:8 IziBhalo zona kwangaphambili zakuphawula ukuba uThixo wozenza amalungisa iintlanga ngokukholwa. Zazivakalisa iindaba ezimnandi kuAbraham zisithi: “Ngawe uya kuzithamsanqelisa zonke iintlanga uThixo.” 
Galatians3:9 Wakholwa ke uAbraham, waza uThixo wamthamsanqelisa. Ngokunjalo ke bonke abakholwayo banenxaxheba kwintsikelelo ka-Abraham." 
Galatians3:10 Kanti ke abo bakholose ngokuthobela umthetho baqalekisiwe. Kaloku iziBhalo zithi: “Uqalekisiwe nguThixo lowo ungakuzondeleliyo ukuzithobela zonke iindawo ezisencwadini yomthetho!” 
Galatians3:11 Kuyaqondakala ke ukuba akukho mntu ugwetyelwa nguThixo ngenxa yomthetho; kuba zithi iziBhalo: “Uya kudla ubomi lowo wenziwe ilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokukholwa.” 
Galatians3:12 Kambe ke wona umthetho awuthethi nto ngokholo. Koko, njengoko neziBhalo zisitsho: “Lowo uzalisekisa zonke iindawo zomthetho wophila ngawo.”" 
Galatians3:13 Kodwa ke uKrestu wasikhulula ekuqalekisweni okuza ngomthetho, ngokuthi yena aqalekiswe endaweni yethu. Kaloku zithi iziBhalo: “Uqalekisiwe nguThixo nabani na obulawa ngokuxhonywa emthini!”" 
Galatians3:14 Yonke le nto yayijonge ekubeni intsikelelo eyathenjiswa uAbraham nguThixo ize igqithiselwe kwiintlanga nguKrestu, khon' ukuze thina simamkele ngokholo uMoya owathenjiswa nguThixo." 
Galatians3:15 Mawethu, makhe ndininike umzekelo oqhelekileyo. Xa kukho umnqophiso ogqityiweyo akukho bani unokuwujika okanye awongeze." 
Galatians3:16 Ngoku ke uThixo wênza izithembiso kuAbraham nakumzukulwana wakhe. *IziBhalo azitsho kuAbraham ukuthi “kwinzala yakho,” ngokungathi zithetha ngabantu abaninzi, kodwa zithi “kumzukulwana wakho,” zithetha ngomntu omnye qha, onguKrestu." 
Galatians3:17 Xa nditshoyo ke ndithi umnqophiso ogqitywe nguThixo awunakujikwa ngumthetho ofike emva kwamakhulu amane anamashumi amathathu eminyaka ukho umnqophiso, ungenako nokusitshitshisa isithembiso sikaThixo." 
Galatians3:18 Kaloku, ukuba ngaba ilifa lixhomekeke emthethweni, loo nto ithetha ukuba alizuzwa ngokwesithembiso, ibe ke kodwa uAbraham walinikwa nguThixo ngesithembiso." 
Galatians3:19 Yaye iyintoni ke injongo yomthetho? Wona wahlonyelelwa ukuze ucacise isigqitho, lo gama angekafiki umzukulwana ka-Abraham esasenzelwe yena isithembiso. Umthetho wanikelwa zizithunywa, kukho unozakuzaku." 
Galatians3:20 Kodwa ke unozakuzaku akafuneki nganto xa umntu emnye qha; kambe ke yena uThixo mnye. 
Galatians3:21 Ngaba ke le nto ithetha ukuba umthetho uchasene nezithembiso zikaThixo? Hayi khona, soze! Kaloku ukuba wawumiselwe umthetho onako ukubadlisa ubomi abantu, ngewawubenze bangamalungisa kuThixo." 
Galatians3:22 Kodwa ke *iziBhalo ngokwazo zithi ihlabathi liphela lilawulwa sisono. Ngale ndlela ke isithembiso sifumaneka ngokholo kuYesu Krestu, futhi ke sizuzwa ngâbo bakholwayo bodwa." 
Galatians3:23 Ngokuya lwalungekafiki ukholo sasingamabanjwa omthetho, silindiswe ukutyhileka kokholo." 
Galatians3:24 Ngoko ke umthetho wawusigcine lo gama angekafiki uKrestu, ukuze sigwetyelwe ngokukholwa kuThixo." 
Galatians3:25 Xa selifikile ke ixesha lokholo, akusekho mfuneko yakuba sigcinwe ngumthetho." 
Galatians3:26 Lukholo ke olunenze nangoonyana bakaThixo ngokumanywa noYesu Krestu. 
Galatians3:27 Nonke nina babhaptiziweyo nimanywe noKrestu; ngoko ke nambethe uKrestu. 
Galatians3:28 KuKrestu akusekho mJuda nantlanga, akusekho khoboka namntu ukhululekileyo, ndoda nabhinqa. Ninonke ningumntu omnye ngokumanywa noYesu Krestu." 
Galatians3:29 Ukuba ke ningabakaKrestu ningabazukulwana baka-Abraham. Ngoko ke niziindlalifa ngokwesithembiso. 
Galatians4:1 Lo mcimbi makhe ndiwubeke ngolu hlobo: Unyana oyindlamafa uphathwa njengesicaka lo gama aselula, nakuba zonke izinto zizezakhe." 
Galatians4:2 Uyagcinwa alungiselelwe yonke imicimbi yakhe kude kufike ixesha elimiswe nguyise. 
Galatians4:3 Nathi ke ngokuya besingekakhuli besiphantsi kwezithethe zabantu. 
Galatians4:4 Kodwa ke lithe lakuzaliseka ixesha, uThixo wamthumela uNyana wakhe. Weza ngokuzalwa ngumntu obhinqileyo, wazalelwa phantsi *komthetho kaMosis," 
Galatians4:5 ukuze ahlangule abo baphantsi komthetho, size thina sibe ngoonyana bakaThixo." 
Galatians4:6 Ukubonakalisa ukuba ningoonyana bakhe, uThixo unambese ngoMoya woNyana wakhe. Lowo ke ngulo Moya nidanduluka ngaye nithi: “Tata.”" 
Galatians4:7 Ngoko ke anisezizo izicaka, koko ningoonyana. Ukuba ke ngoko ningoonyana bakhe, uThixo uya kunenza iindlamafa." 
Galatians4:8 Mandulo, ngokuya naningamazi uThixo, nanibopheleleke kwizinto ezingenguye uThixo." 
Galatians4:9 Kodwa ngoku nimaziyo uThixo – gxebe, ngoku naziwayo nguThixo – kutheni ukuba niphindele kwezo zithethe zingento, ziphuthileyo? Ngani ukuba niphinde nizikhobokise ngazo?" 
Galatians4:10 Ngoku senihlonipha iintsuku, neenyanga, namaxesha, neminyaka ethile!" 
Galatians4:11 Ndisuka ndibe nexhala, hleze kuthi kanti ndifané ndabulaleka ngani." 
Galatians4:12 Ndiyanibongoza, mawethu, yibani njengam; kaloku nam ndikwanjengani. Zange nindone nganto." 
Galatians4:13 Niyazi ukuba ndandingenampilo ukuqala kwam ukushumayela iindaba ezimnandi apha kuni; kaloku ndandigula. 
Galatians4:14 Kodwa zange nindicekise okanye nindibukule, nangona ndandikwimeko enkenenkene kangako. Koko nandamkela ngendlela enaniya kusamkela ngayo isithunywa sikaThixo; nandamkela ngendlela enaniya kumamkela ngayo uYesu Krestu." 
Galatians4:15 Naninemincili kangaka nje! Konakele phi ngoku? Nam ngokwam ndiyangqina ndithi: Ukuba kwakunokwenzeka, ngenanikrolonqe nawenu amehlo nawanika mna." 
Galatians4:16 Ngaba kukuthetha kwam inyaniso oku kundenze ndalutshaba kuni? 
Galatians4:17 Aba bantu ndithetha ngabo bangathi banikhathalele, kanti ke iinjongo zabo azintle konke. Kuphela into abayifunayo kukunahlukanisa nam, khon' ukuze nibe ngamaphuth' ahlathi-nye nabo." 
Galatians4:18 Kuyinto entle ukuzixhamla komntu ngeenjongo ezilungileyo – ubunyaniso baloo nto buhlala buhleli nokuba andikho mna phakathi kwenu. 
Galatians4:19 Bantwana bam endibathandayo, ndiyaphinda ndiva intlungu kwakhona ngenxa yenu, kanye oku komfazi osikwa yinimba. Ndophumla sakwakheka isimilo sikaKrestu kuni." 
Galatians4:20 Andinqweni ngako ukunga ndingalapho kuni ngoku, khon' ukuze nive kwangelizwi eli lam ixhala endinalo; kaloku ndiyanoyikisela." 
Galatians4:21 Mandikhe ndibuze kwabo bafuna ukuba phantsi *komthetho kaMosis: Aniyiva na into ethethwa ngumthetho? 
Galatians4:22 Umthetho uthi uAbraham wayenoonyana ababini; omnye wayengunyana wesicakazana esilikhoboka, omnye engunyana womfazi wekhaya." 
Galatians4:23 Lo nyana wesicakazana yena wazalwa ngendlela azalwa ngayo wonke umntu, kodwa yena unyana womfazi wekhaya wazalwa ngenxa yesithembiso sikaThixo." 
Galatians4:24 Ngumfanekiso nje lo: aba bafazi babini bafuzisela iminqophiso emibini; omnye (uHagare ukutsho) uvela entabeni yeSinayi, obantwana bazalelwa ebukhobokeni." 
Galatians4:25 UHagare ufuzisela intaba yeSinayi kwelama-Arabhu, ekwafanekisa le dolophu yaseJerusalem ikhoyo ngoku, esebukhobokeni nabemi bayo bonke." 
Galatians4:26 Eyasezulwini yona iJerusalem ezayo ikhululekile, yaye ingumama wethu." 
Galatians4:27 Kuba *iziBhalo zithi: “Vuya, wena ludlolwazana! Memelela ngemincili, wena ungazange wayiva inimba! Kuba umfazi owalahlwa yindoda woba nabantwana abaninzi kunalowo uhlala nendoda yakhe.”" 
Galatians4:28 Nina ke ngoku, mawethu, ningabantwana bakaThixo ngenxa yesithembiso, kanye njengokuba noIsake wayengumntwana wesithembiso." 
Galatians4:29 Ngelo xesha unyana owazalwa ngendlela eqhelekileyo wamtshutshisa unyana owazalwa ngamandla oMoya kaThixo;kusenjalo ke nangoku. 
Galatians4:30 Kodwa ke zithini iziBhalo? Zithi: “Sikhuphele ngaphandle isicakazana esilikhoboka kunye nonyana waso; kaloku unyana wesicakazana makangalidli ilifa nonyana womfazi wekhaya.” 
Galatians4:31 Ke thina, mawethu, asingobantwana besicakazana esilikhoboka, singabomfazi wekhaya, oko kukuthi singabakhululekileyo." 
Galatians5:1 UKrestu wasikhulula ukuze sibe ngabantu abakhululekileyo mpela! Ngoko ke yimani ngxishi ningahexi, ningavumi ukuphindela kwidyokhwe yobukhoboka." 
Galatians5:2 Phulaphulani! Mna Pawulos ndithi kuni: Ukuba nithi ulwaluko luyimfuneko, loo nto ithetha ukuba uKrestu akaloncedo kuni mpela." 
Galatians5:3 Ndiyaphinda ndilumkisa wonke umntu ovuma ukwaluka ukuba uyanyanzeleka ukuba awuthobele wonke umthetho. 
Galatians5:4 Ukuba nifuna ukwamkeleka kuThixo ngokuthobela umthetho, nizahlukanisile noKrestu; ningaphandle kwesisa sikaThixo." 
Galatians5:5 Thina ke ngamandla oMoya asebenza ngokholo sinethemba, saye silindele ukulungiswa nguThixo." 
Galatians5:6 Kuba xa simanyene noKrestu, ukwaluka nokungaluki akubalulekanga, into ebalulekileyo lukholo olucaciswa luthando." 
Galatians5:7 Naniqhuba kakuhle kangaka nje! Ngubani ke ngoku oniyekisileyo ukuyithobela inyaniso? Uniqhathe kanjani? 
Galatians5:8 Loo nto ayenziwanga nguThixo lo unibizayo. 
Galatians5:9 Kaloku bathi: “Igwele elincinci liyinyusa yonke intlama.” 
Galatians5:10 Ukumanyana kwethu eNkosini kundenza ndinithembe ukuba aniyi kuhamba naluvo lulolunye. Naye loo mntu uniqunga-qungayo, nokuba ungubani na, uya kohlwaywa nguThixo." 
Galatians5:11 Mna ke, mawethu, ngaba ndisatshutshiselwa ntoni ukuba ndisashumayela ukuba ulwaluko luyimfuneko? Ukuba ibiyinyaniso loo nto, ukushumayela kwam umnqamlezo ngekungesiso isikhubekiso." 
Galatians5:12 Akwaba abo baniqunga-qungayo bebeya kusele beyihamba yonke loo ndlela, bazisike ngokwabo." 
Galatians5:13 Nina, mawethu, nibizelwe enkululekweni. Kodwa ke inkululeko yenu mayingabi lokroba lokuba nilawulwe sisimo esidala. Ndaweni yaloo nto khonzanani niqhutywa luthando." 
Galatians5:14 Kaloku umthetho xa uwonke ushwankathelwa ngomyalelo omnye othi: “Mthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela uzithanda ngayo nawe.” 
Galatians5:15 Kodwa ke ukuba niyalwa niqwengane, lumkani hleze nitshabalalisane kuphele." 
Galatians5:16 Nantsi ke into endithetha yona kuni: Ukuba nikhokelwa nguMoya kaThixo, aniyi kuzenza izinto ezinqwenelwa sisimo esidala." 
Galatians5:17 Kaloku ezo zinto zinxamnye nezifunwa nguMoya, ukanti nezifunwa nguMoya zinxamnye nezinqwenelwa sisimo esidala. Zizombini zichasene ngohlobo lokuba ningabi nako ukuzenza izinto enisukuba nifuna ukuzenza." 
Galatians5:18 Kodwa ke ukuba nikhokelwa nguMoya, anikho phantsi komthetho." 
Galatians5:19 Ke zona izinto ezibangwa sisimo esidala zicace mhlophe; nazi: ukurheletya, ukungcola, nobuhenyu;" 
Galatians5:20 unqulo-zithixo, nobugqwirha; ubutshaba, imbambano, ubukhwele, iphuku, ukubawa, amayelenqe, nezahlukano;" 
Galatians5:21 umona, ubunxila, nokuthanda iziyolo, njalo-njalo. Nangoku ke ndiyanilumkisa, njengoko besenditshilo ngaphambili, ukuba abo benza izinto ezinjengezi, soze babuxhamle ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguThixo." 
Galatians5:22 Nazi ke zona iziqhamo zoMoya: luthando, novuyo, noxolo; umonde, ububele, ukulunga, nentembeko;" 
Galatians5:23 ubulali, nokuzeyisa. Awukho ke umthetho ochasa izinto ezinjengezi." 
Galatians5:24 Abo ke bamanywe noKrestu uYesu basibhangisile isimo esidala kunye neminqweno neenkanuko zaso. 
Galatians5:25 Ukuba ke sidla ubomi ngoMoya kaThixo, masilawulwe nguye ke." 
Galatians5:26 Masingazigwagwisi, sicaphukisana, simonelana." 
Galatians6:1 Mawethu, ukuba kukho mntu nimbhaqe esona, nina balawulwa nguMoya mfakeni endleleni; kodwa loo nto niyenze ngobulali, nizilumkele nina ziqu, hleze nani nilingeke." 
Galatians6:2 Thwalisanani ubunzima; xa nenjenjalo ke nithobela umyalelo kaKrestu. 
Galatians6:3 Ukuba umntu uzicingela ukuba ubhetele, abe engento kodwa, uzikhohlisa nje ngokwakhe lowo." 
Galatians6:4 Umntu ngamnye makazivavanye ngokwakhe isimilo sakhe; andule ke azikhangele umngangatho akuwo ngokuzithelekisa yena siqu, nendawo afanele ukuba kuyo. Makangazilinganisi nomnye umntu." 
Galatians6:5 Kaloku wonke umntu unomthwalo wakhe ekufuneka awuthwale yedwa. 
Galatians6:6 Nawuphi na umntu ophantsi kwengqeqesho yelizwi likaThixo, umelwe kukwabelana nalowo umfundisayo ngeento zonke ezilungileyo anazo." 
Galatians6:7 Ningazikhohlisi! UThixo akanakwenziwa isidenge ngumntu. Umntu uya kuvuna kanye loo nto ayihlwayeleyo. 
Galatians6:8 Ukuba uhlwayela imbewu yesimo esidala, uya kuvuna ilahleko esa ekufeni; ukuba uhlwayela imbewu yesimo esitsha phantsi koMoya kaThixo, uya kuvuna indyebo esa kobona bomi bungenasiphelo." 
Galatians6:9 Masingadinwa ke kukwenza okulungileyo. Kuba xa sizingisa, lode lifike ixesha lokuvuna." 
Galatians6:10 Ngoko ke masisebenzele ukulungelwa komntu wonke, ngalo lonke ixesha esinethuba ngalo, ngokukodwa usapho lwamakholwa." 
Galatians6:11 Niyawabona la magama makhulu? Kubhala mna ngoku, ngesandla sam." 
Galatians6:12 Ngabo baqhayisa ngezinto zembonakalo yangaphandle, abo baninyanzela ngokwaluka. Into abayifunayo kuphela kukuzama ukuphepha ukutshutshiswa ngenxa yomnqamlezo kaYesu Krestu." 
Galatians6:13 Kuba nkqu nabo balukayo abawuthobeli ncam umthetho; bafuna nje ukuba naluke ukuze baqhayise ngento yokuba nilenzile isiko – eliyinto nje yangaphandle! 
Galatians6:14 Kodwa mna, mandingaqhayisi nganto ingenguwo umnqamlezo weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu; kuba ngalo mnqamlezo ihlabathi lifile kum, nam ndifile kulo." 
Galatians6:15 Nokuba umntu walukile, nokuba akalukanga, akunamsebenzi. Into ebalulekileyo kukuba yindalo entsha." 
Galatians6:16 Nabani na ohamba ngalo mgaqo ndimnqwenelela uxolo nenceba, kunye nalo lonke usapho lukaThixo – nguSirayeli omtsha ke lowo." 
Galatians6:17 Ndiphetha ngelithi: Mandingaphindi ndikhathazwe mntu, kuba iziva ezisemzimbeni wam zixela ukuba ndisisicaka sikaKrestu." 
Galatians6:18 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani nonke, mawethu. *Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Mna Pawulos, *umthunywa kaKrestu Yesu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, ndibhalela abantu bakaThixo [abahlala e-Efese,]abakholwayo kuYesu Krestu." 
Ephesians1:2 Ndithi: Wanga uThixo uBawo wethu, neNkosi uYesu Krestu, anganenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
Ephesians1:3 Makabongwe uThixo, uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu osibabale ngazo zonke izipho zoMoya zasezulwini, sakuba simanywe noKrestu." 
Ephesians1:4 UThixo wasinyula ngoKrestu kwangaphambi kokusekwa kwehlabathi, ukuze sibe ngabantu bakhe abangenasiphako ngenxa yothando." 
Ephesians1:5 UThixo akuba ethandile wagqiba kwangaphambili ukuba asenze oonyana bakhe ncakasana ngoYesu Krestu. 
Ephesians1:6 Ngoko ke masimdumise uThixo ngenxa yesisa sakhe esisodwa asenzele sona ngoNyana wakhe oyintanda! 
Ephesians1:7 Sikhululwe sazixolelwa izono zethu ngegazi likaKrestu. Siyaphuphuma kuthi isisa 
Ephesians1:8 asenzele sona uThixo ngokusazelelela. 
Ephesians1:9 Kaloku kwakholeka kuThixo ukusityhilela icebo lakhe athande ukulifezekisa ngoKrestu. 
Ephesians1:10 Eli cebo lithwasisa ukufezekiswa kwamaxesha ngenjongo yokubandakanya kuKrestu zonke izinto, ezisezulwini nezisemhlabeni." 
Ephesians1:11 Ngenene sifumene isabelo selifa lethu ngokumanywa noKrestu. UThixo owenza zonke izinto ngokwezigqibo necebo lakhe wasinyulela elo lifa kwantlandlolo. 
Ephesians1:12 Kuba kaloku yintando yakhe ukuba kuthi ngenxa yethu, thina sathembela kuKrestu kuqala, kuvakaliswe indumiso yesidima sakhe." 
Ephesians1:13 Nani ke, nimanywe noKrestu nje, nizivile iindaba ezimnandi, ezichaza ngenyaniso yosindiso, nazamkela. Ke ngoko uThixo waniphawula ngoMoya oyiNgcwele owathenjiswayo." 
Ephesians1:14 Lo Moya ke usisiqinisekiso selifa lethu esiya kulifumana lakufika ixesha lenkululeko yemilowo yakhe, ukuze kubongwe kudunyiswe isidima nesithozela sikaThixo!" 
Ephesians1:15 Ngenxa yezi zinto ke, ndakuba ndivile ngokholo eninalo kuYesu iNkosi yethu, nangendlela eniluthanda ngayo lonke usapho lukaThixo," 
Ephesians1:16 andiphezi ukumbulela uThixo ngenxa yenu, xa ndinikhumbulayo emthandazweni." 
Ephesians1:17 Ndiyamcela uThixo weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, uSosidima, ukuba aniphe uMoya wobulumko, anityhilele uThixo, ukuze nimazi." 
Ephesians1:18 Ndiyamcela ukuba anikhanyisele nibe nokuqonda, khon' ukuze nilazi ithemba anibizele kulo, niziqonde iintsikelelo ezingaka ezililifa lemilowo yakhe," 
Ephesians1:19 nikuve ukongama kwawo amandla akhe ngakuthi, thina bathembele kuye. La mandla ikwangalawa" 
Ephesians1:20 wavusa ngawo uKrestu ekufeni, waza wamthwesa ubukhosi ezulwini." 
Ephesians1:21 Ngenxa yobo bukhosi wongamele lonke ulawulo, negunya, nawo onke amandla nobukhosi. Ubukhosi bakhe bungaphezu kwawo onke amawonga obungangamsha nawo onke amagama anokukhankanywa kweli lizwe nakwelizayo." 
Ephesians1:22 Izinto zonke uThixo uzibeke phantsi kolawulo lukaKrestu, waza wammisela wayintloko yezinto zonke ebandleni." 
Ephesians1:23 Ibandla ke lingumzimba kaKrestu, liphuphuma bubukho bakhe lowo uphuphuma ubukho bukaThixo." 
Ephesians2:1 Benifudula nifile emoyeni ngenxa yeemposiso nokona," 
Ephesians2:2 ngokuya naniziphethe ngendlela yeli hlabathi. Naniphantsi komtyholi, umphathi wamagunya asesibhakabhakeni noweempembelelo ezilawula abo bangamthobeliyo uThixo." 
Ephesians2:3 Eneneni besinjalo sonke; besifudula silawulwa ziinkanuko zesimo sethu esidala, silandela nayiphi na iminqweno neengcinga zethu. Njengamntu wonke ke okuloo meko besiphantsi kwengqumbo kaThixo." 
Ephesians2:4 Kodwa ke uThixo onceba inkulu, ngenxa yendlela asithanda ngayo," 
Ephesians2:5 usidlise ubomi kunye noKrestu, naxa besinjengabafileyo nje ngenxa yezono zethu. Kambe ke nakhululwa ngenxa yesisa sikaThixo." 
Ephesians2:6 Njengoko simanyene noKrestu Yesu nje, uThixo usivuse ekufeni, saza saya kutsho ezulwini kunye noYesu." 
Ephesians2:7 Wênjenjalo ukuze ngamaxesha onke ahlale esibonisa ubukhulu besisa nobubele bakhe, thina bamanywe noYesu Krestu." 
Ephesians2:8 Ke kaloku nakhululwa ngesisa sikaThixo ngokholo; anikhululwanga ngemizamo yenu. Ewe, kungenxa yesisa sikaThixo." 
Ephesians2:9 Ngoko ke akukho nto ubani angaziqhayisa ngayo, kungekho migudu yakhe nje." 
Ephesians2:10 Singumsebenzi wezandla zikaThixo ke thina. Kaloku simanywe noYesu Krestu nje, uThixo wasidalela ukuba sizinikele ekwenzeni imisebenzi emihle awasimisela yona kwangaphambili." 
Ephesians2:11 Kaloku yikhumbuleni imeko yenu yangaphambili ngelaa xesha naningabahedeni. Kwakusithiwa ningabangalukanga ngabo bolwaluko (lwaluko olo lulisiko nje langaphandle). 
Ephesians2:12 Kaloku ngelo xesha nanikude kuKrestu. Naningenabudlelane nemilowo yakwaSirayeli. Naningaphandle kweminqophiso nezithembiso zikaThixo. Naningenathemba, ningenaThixo kweli hlabathi." 
Ephesians2:13 Kodwa ngoku, ngokumanywa noKrestu, nina kanye enanikade nikude lee, nisondeziwe ngokuphalala kwegazi likaKrestu." 
Ephesians2:14 Kuba kaloku nguye umxolelanisi. Iintlanga namaJuda uzenze zasisizwe esinye. Yena buqu waludiliza udonga lobutshaba obelusahlule. 
Ephesians2:15 Kaloku uwubhangisile umthetho nemiyalelo kwanemimiselo yawo, ukuze ngezi zizwe zibini adale isizwe esitsha esimanywe naye ngokwakhe. Ngaloo ndlela ke udale uxolo." 
Ephesians2:16 Ewe, ngomnqamlezo wakhe uKrestu ububhangisile ubutshaba, waza ezi zizwe zibini wazixolelanisa zayimbumba yamanyama kuThixo." 
Ephesians2:17 Ngoko ke weza washumayela iindaba ezimnandi zoxolo, kuni nina babekade bekude, nakwabo bebekufutshane kakade." 
Ephesians2:18 Kaloku sonke, amaJuda kwaneentlanga, singena ngoKrestu, siye kufikelela kuBawo ngenkqu, sikuMoya omnye." 
Ephesians2:19 Ngoko ke, nani zintlanga, anisengabo abasemzini neendwendwe. Niyimilowo nabantu bakaThixo; nilusapho lukaThixo." 
Ephesians2:20 Nani ke nakhelwe phezu kwesiseko *sabathunywa *nabashumayeli, kodwa ke elona litye lesiseko nguYesu Krestu ngokwakhe." 
Ephesians2:21 Ungoyena usixhasayo isakhiwo xa sisonke, ukuze sikhule sibe yindlu engcwele yeNkosi." 
Ephesians2:22 Ngokumanywa naye ke nani niyakhiwa nikunye nabanye, ukuze nibe sisakhiwo ahlala kuso uThixo ngoMoya." 
Ephesians3:1 Kungesi sizathu ke, mna Pawulos ongumbanjwa kaYesu Krestu ngenxa yenu zintlanga, ndimthandaza nje uThixo." 
Ephesians3:2 Kambe ndiyacinga ukuba nivile ukuba uThixo undimisele ndaba ligosa lobabalo lwakhe ngenxa yenu. 
Ephesians3:3 UThixo wandityhilela icebo lakhe ebelingaziwa mntu, njengoko sendichazile ngokufutshane." 
Ephesians3:4 Xa nithe nayifunda ke, noba nako ukuyilandela indlela endiluqonda ngayo udaba olungoKrestu." 
Ephesians3:5 Kwizizukulwana ezingaphambili abantu abazange balwaziswe olu daba. Kodwa ngoku uThixo ulutyhilile ngaye uMoya oyiNgcwele, kubo *abathunywa *nabashumayeli bakhe." 
Ephesians3:6 Olu daba ke lolokuba iintlanga ziziindlamafa ndawonye namaJuda, zibandakanywe nawo. Bonke bayimbumba yamanyama. Nazo ziyabuxhamla ubuncwane bezithembiso zikaThixo ezenziwa kuYesu Krestu." 
Ephesians3:7 Zinjalo ke iindaba ezimnandi endingumququzeleli wazo ngenxa yesisa uThixo andenzele sona ngokusebenza kwamandla akhe. 
Ephesians3:8 Mna ndingoyena mncinane kubantu bakaThixo. Kodwa uThixo undinike ilungelo lokuba ndishumayele iindaba ezimnandi ezintlangeni, ndithethe ngobubele obungaphicothekiyo bukaKrestu," 
Ephesians3:9 ndiqondise bonke abantu indlela esebenza ngayo imfihlelo yecebo likaThixo. UThixo onguMdali wezinto zonke walifihla eli cebo kuwo onke amaphakade adluleyo," 
Ephesians3:10 ukuze ngoku, ngalo ibandla, ubulumko bukaThixo obuntlobo-ntlobo buvakaliswe kuzo izilawuli nabasemagunyeni kweliphezulu." 
Ephesians3:11 Le nto uThixo wayenza ngokwenjongo yakhe engunaphakade awayimisa ngoYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu. 
Ephesians3:12 Ngokumanywa naye ke singena siyokutsho kuThixo ngenkqu sikhululekile, sinesibindi ngenxa yokukholwa kuye." 
Ephesians3:13 Ndiyanibongoza ke ukuba ningadakumbi kukuba ndixhwalekile ngenxa yenu; le meko iludumo lwenu. 
Ephesians3:14 Ngenxa yale nto ke, ndizikhahlela phantsi phambi koBawo," 
Ephesians3:15 uYise walo lonke usapho olusezulwini nasemhlabeni. 
Ephesians3:16 Ndiyambongoza ukuba ngobubele bakhe uSosidima anomeleze imo yenu entsha ngoMoya wakhe," 
Ephesians3:17 khon' ukuze ngokholo uKrestu ahlale ngaphakathi kuni. Nanga ningasekelwa eluthandweni nendele. 
Ephesians3:18 Nanga nina nosapho lukaThixo xa lulonke, ningalunakana ukuba lungakanani na ububanzi balo, lungakanani na ubude balo, kukwangakanani na ukuphakama kwalo nokuba nzulu kwalo uthando lukaKrestu," 
Ephesians3:19 nilwazi nakuba lungenakwaziwa nje. Ewe, niye niphuphuma bubukho bukaThixo obugqibeleleyo." 
Ephesians3:20 Ngoku ke, kulowo unako ukwenza ngaphezu kokuba sicela nokuba siqiqa, ngamandla akhe asebenza ngaphakathi kuthi:" 
Ephesians3:21 Makubekho udumo kuThixo ebandleni, nakuKrestu Yesu, kuse kuzo zonke izizukulwana ngonaphakade kanaphakade. *Amen." 
Ephesians4:1 Ngoko ke mna endingumbanjwa ngenxa yokuba ndisisicaka seNkosi, ndiyanibongoza: ziphatheni ngohlobo olungawuthobiyo umgangatho wendima enamiselwa yona nguThixo mhla wanibiza;" 
Ephesians4:2 nihlale nithobekile ngawo onke amaxesha, ninobulali nomonde, ninyamezelana ngothando." 
Ephesians4:3 Zamelani ukuhlala ngoxolo niyilaa mbumba yamanyama wanenza nayiyo uMoya oyiNgcwele. 
Ephesians4:4 Mnye umzimba kaloku, ukwamnye uMoya, kwanjengokuba lilinye nethemba enabizelwa kulo nguThixo." 
Ephesians4:5 INkosi inye, nokholo lunye, nobhaptizo lukwalunye." 
Ephesians4:6 Kanti ukwamnye noThixo onguYise woluntu luphela, olawula izinto zonke, esebenza ngezinto zonke, ekwakho kwiinto zonke." 
Ephesians4:7 Umntu ngamnye wabelwe isiphiwo esisodwa ngangobubele bukaKrestu. 
Ephesians4:8 Yiyo ke le nto *iziBhalo zithi: “Unyukele ezulwini eqhuba abathinjwa, waza wabela abantu izipho.”" 
Ephesians4:9 Kuthetha ukuthini ke ukuthi unyukile? Kuthetha ukuthi wehla kuqala waya emathunjini omhlaba. 
Ephesians4:10 Lowo ke wehlayo usekwangulo kanye wenyukela ngaphaya kwamazulu, khon' ukuze izinto zonke azizalise ngobukho bakhe." 
Ephesians4:11 Nguye ke lo wababelayo izipho ezizezi abantu: Wabamisela *bangabathunywa abanye, abanye *bangabashumayeli, bangabavakalisi beendaba ezimnandi abanye, abanye bangabelusi nabefundisi." 
Ephesians4:12 Wabanika ezi zipho zokulungiselela lonke usapho lukaThixo emsebenzini walo, ukuze kwakheke ibandla elingumzimba kaKrestu." 
Ephesians4:13 Ekugqibeleni ke sonke siya kuba yiloo mbumba yamanyama iqulethwe lukholo lwethu, kwakunye nokwazi kwethu uNyana kaThixo; sibe ngabantu abakhule bagqibelela, silingane noKrestu ogqibeleleyo." 
Ephesians4:14 Ngoku ke asisengobantwana abafane bakhukuliseke ngamaza, baphephetheke nayiyiphi na imimoya yeemfundiso zabakhohlisi abalahlekisa abantu ngobuqhetseba." 
Ephesians4:15 Ndaweni yaloo nto inyaniso masiyithethe siqhutywa luthando, khon' ukuze siye simfuza uYesu ngokupheleleyo. Kaloku nguye intloko." 
Ephesians4:16 Umzimba wonke uxhomekeke kuye; ilungu ngalinye limanywe namanye kuye. Ngoko ke le mbumba yamanyama ikhuliswa ngumsebenzi welungu ngalinye, izakhe ngothando." 
Ephesians4:17 Ngoko ke ndiyanibongoza ndinilumkisa egameni leNkosi. Yahlukanani nokuziphatha ngokwabahedeni abangqiqo ziphuthileyo," 
Ephesians4:18 abangqondo zimfiliba. Abananxaxheba kubomi bukaThixo, kuba basemnyameni ombonde-mbonde, baqaqadekile." 
Ephesians4:19 Baphelelwe ziintloni, bazilahlele emanyaleni nasekungcoleni, bangooncanyelweni." 
Ephesians4:20 Kodwa ke nina animfundanga ngolo hlobo uKrestu. 
Ephesians4:21 Kambe senivile ngaye, ibe ke njengamaKrestu niyifundisiwe inyaniso kaKrestu." 
Ephesians4:22 Ngoko ke silahleni isimo senu esidala. Besinilahlekisa ngeenkanuko ezingendawo ezinirhuqela ekufeni. 
Ephesians4:23 Iintliziyo zenu mazihlaziyeke ngokupheleleyo. 
Ephesians4:24 Thathani isimo esitsha esidalwe safuza uThixo, esizibonakalisa ngobomi obumsulwa, obungcwele, obunyanisekileyo." 
Ephesians4:25 Ngoko ke musani ukuba saxoka! Elowo makathethe inyaniso nowabo,kuba xa sisonke singamalungu omzimba kaKrestu." 
Ephesians4:26 Xa nicaphukile, umsindo mawunganiqweqwediseli esonweni; futhi malingade litshone ilanga ninomsindo." 
Ephesians4:27 Umtyholi musani ukumvulela indawo ebomini benu. 
Ephesians4:28 Umntu obekade elisela makahlukane nokuba. Ndaweni yaloo nto makasebenze enyanisekile, azixhase, abe nako nokunceda abahlelelekileyo." 
Ephesians4:29 Intetho ekrwada mayingaphumi emilonyeni yenu. Ukuthetha kwenu makuthambe, kube kokwakhayo, ukuze kube luncedo nentsikelelo kwabaphulaphuleyo." 
Ephesians4:30 Musani ukumdakumbisa uMoya oyiNgcwele kaThixo, kuba uniphawulele umhla wokugqibela wenkululeko." 
Ephesians4:31 Yahlukanani nayo yonke inzondo, iphuku, nomsindo; ukuthukisa, nokunyelisa nalo lonke ulunya." 
Ephesians4:32 Ndaweni yaloo nto yenzelanani ububele ninobulali, nixolelane, kwanjengokuba naye uThixo wanixolelayo ngoKrestu." 
Ephesians5:1 Njengoko ke ningabantwana bakaThixo abaziintanda, fuzani yena." 
Ephesians5:2 Hlalani nithandana kanye ngale ndlela wanithanda ngayo uKrestu. Yena wazincama ngenxa yenu, wazenza umnikelo nedini elivumba limnandi kuThixo." 
Ephesians5:3 Nanjengoko nilusapho lukaThixo, makungakhankanywa phakathi kwenu ukurheletya nako konke ukungcola nokunyoluka." 
Ephesians5:4 Izinto ezinjengokuthetha krwada, nokulavuza, neentetho ezingcolileyo, azinto zinifaneleyo konke. Nifanelwe kukuhlala nibulela uThixo nina endaweni yezi zinto." 
Ephesians5:5 Yiqondeni kakuhle into yokuba akukho mntu urheletyayo, nongcolileyo, nosisinyolunyolu, uya kubuxhamla ubuncwane bokulawulwa nguKrestu nanguThixo. Kaloku ukunyoluka yenye indlela yokunqula izithixo." 
Ephesians5:6 Ningavumeli bani anikhohlise ngentetho ephuthileyo. Zizinto ezinjalo kanye eziza nengqumbo kaThixo kwabo bangamthobeliyo. 
Ephesians5:7 Nina ke ningazibandakanyi nabantu abanjalo. 
Ephesians5:8 Nani benifudula nihleli ebumnyameni. Nithe ke nakuba ngamaKrestu, nasekukhanyeni. Ngoko ke ziphatheni ngokwabantu abaqheleneyo nokukhanya." 
Ephesians5:9 Kaloku apho kukhoyo ukukhanya, kulapho kuntshula khona konke ukulunga, nabo bonke ubulungisa, nenyaniso." 
Ephesians5:10 Zamani ukukuqonda ukuthanda kweNkosi; 
Ephesians5:11 ningazibandakanyi nezinto zobumnyama eziphuthileyo ezenziwa ngabantu. Ndaweni yaloo nto zibhenceni ekukhanyeni ezo zinto, zibonakale icace into eziyiyo." 
Ephesians5:12 Kungaziintloni nokuwathetha amanyundululu abawenza ngasese. 
Ephesians5:13 Kodwa ke xa zisekukhanyeni zonke izinto, ziyacaca into eziyiyo;" 
Ephesians5:14 kuba kaloku yonke into ecacileyo isekukhanyeni. Yiyo le nto kuthiwa: “Phaphama, thongorhandini, uvuke ekufeni; uKrestu wokukhanyisela.”" 
Ephesians5:15 Ngoko ke yigqaleni indlela eniziphatha ngayo. Yibani ngabantu abanengqondo; musani ukuba ziziyatha. 
Ephesians5:16 Eli thuba ninalo lisebenziseni kakuhle, kuba akho amaxesha amabi." 
Ephesians5:17 Musani ukuba zizidenge ke; nina zamani ukuqonda ukuthanda kweNkosi. 
Ephesians5:18 Musani ukunxila butywala obunonakalisayo. Ndaweni yaloo nto phuphumani nguMoya oyiNgcwele," 
Ephesians5:19 nincokola ngeendumiso namaculo, neengoma, nivuma iingoma niyidumisa iNkosi ngentliziyo." 
Ephesians5:20 Bulelani uThixo uBawo wethu imihla ngemihla ngenxa yeento zonke, ngegama leNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu." 
Ephesians5:21 Thobelanani, niqhutywa kukuba noKrestu nimthobela." 
Ephesians5:22 Nina makhosikazi, bathobeleni ngokuzinikela abayeni benu, kanye ngale ndlela niyithobela ngayo iNkosi." 
Ephesians5:23 Kaloku indoda iyintloko yomfazi, kanye njengokuba noKrestu eyintloko yebandla. Ke yena uKrestu ukwanguMhlanguli walo ibandla elingumzimba wakhe." 
Ephesians5:24 Ngoko ke abafazi mabawathobele ngokupheleleyo amadoda abo, kanye ngale ndlela ibandla lizinikele ngayo ekuthobeleni uKrestu." 
Ephesians5:25 Nina madoda, bathandeni abafazi benu, kanye ngale ndlela alithande ngayo uKrestu ibandla, waza wanikela ngobomi bakhe ngenxa yalo." 
Ephesians5:26 Le nto uyenze ukuze libe libango lakhe ibandla. Ulicocile walihlamba ngamanzi ngamandla elizwi lakhe," 
Ephesians5:27 khon' ukuze azithathele lona liyinzwakazi, linyulu, lingenasici, lingenabala nakushwabana nasinye isiphako." 
Ephesians5:28 Ngoko ke amadoda afanele ukuba nebhongo lokubathanda abafazi bawo, kanye ngale ndlela azithanda ngayo iziqu zawo. Indoda emthandayo umfazi wayo iyazithanda." 
Ephesians5:29 (Akakho umntu ongazithandiyo, endaweni yaloo nto uyazondla azixhase, kanye njengokuba noKrestu elilungiselela ibandla." 
Ephesians5:30 Kaloku singamalungu omzimba wakhe.) 
Ephesians5:31 Kunjengoko *neziBhalo zisitsho ukuthi: “Ngoko ke indoda iya kumshiya uyise nonina, imanywe nomfazi wayo, baze abo babini badibane babe banye.”" 
Ephesians5:32 La mazwi atyhila inyaniso enzulu; ke mna ndithi isingisele kuKrestu nebandla. 
Ephesians5:33 Kambe ke ikwasingisele nakuni. Ngoko ke yonke indoda mayimthande umfazi wayo, kanye ngale ndlela izithanda ngayo nayo. Ngokukwanjalo ke wonke umfazi makayihlonele indoda yakhe." 
Ephesians6:1 Bantwana, bathobeleni abazali benu nimanywe neNkosi nje, kuba kulunge kanye ukwenjenjalo." 
Ephesians6:2 “Beka uyihlo nonyoko.” Lo ngumyalelo wokuqala onesithembiso esithi: 
Ephesians6:3 “Uya kuba namathamsanqa, nemihla yakho yolulwe emhlabeni.”" 
Ephesians6:4 Nina ke, bazali, abantwana musani ukubaphatha gadalala, bade babe nenzondo, koko banikeni ingqeqesho nemiyalo yobuKrestu." 
Ephesians6:5 Nina zicaka, bathobeleni abaphathi benu balapha emhlabeni, ninentlonipho, niqhutywa kukunyaniseka, ngokungathi nikhonza uKrestu ngenkqu." 
Ephesians6:6 Ningatshakazi nenze izinto ngenjongo yokuzithandekisa ebantwini, koko yenzani ukuthanda kukaThixo ngomxhelo wenu wonke, njengezicaka zikaKrestu." 
Ephesians6:7 Umsebenzi wenu wenzeni ngemincili, ngokungathi niwenzela iNkosi, aniwenzeli mntu." 
Ephesians6:8 Ze nikhumbule ukuba umntu ngamnye uya kuvuzwa yiNkosi ngomsebenzi omhle, nokuba loo mntu sisicaka nokuba akasiso." 
Ephesians6:9 Nani baphathi yenzani kwangokunjalo ngokubhekiselele kwizicaka zenu. Yekani ukusoloko nizigrogrisa. Khumbulani ukuba nina kwakunye nezicaka zenu ningabeNkosi enye esezulwini, egweba wonke umntu ingenamkhethe." 
Ephesians6:10 Elokuphetha ndithi njengokuba nimanywe neNkosi nje, yomelelani nincedwa ngamandla ayo." 
Ephesians6:11 Nxibani sonke isikrweqe eninokusifumana kuThixo, ukuze nibe nako ukumelana nabo bonke ubuqhokolo bukaSathana."
