Ephesians6:12 Kuba kweli dabi lethu asilwi nabantu, kodwa silwa nemimoya ekhohlakeleyo esesibhakabhakeni, izilawuli, nabasemagunyeni, kunye nemimoya engcolileyo yeli phakade lobumnyama." 
Ephesians6:13 Ngoko ke xhobani ngezikrweqe zikaThixo, ukuze nibe nako ukuxhathisa xa kunyembelekile, nize nifeze konke nimile ngxishi." 
Ephesians6:14 Ngoko ke hlalani niqulile. Bhinqani ngenyaniso; ninxibe ubulungisa ukukhusela isifuba. 
Ephesians6:15 Ezinyaweni nxibani inkuthalo yokuhlala nichophele ukuvakalisa iindaba ezimnandi zoxolo. 
Ephesians6:16 Ngamaxesha onke ukukholwa makube likhaka lenu; ngokholo noba nako ukuzicima zonke iintolo ezivuthayo zikaSathana. 
Ephesians6:17 Entloko thwalani usindiso. Phathani ilizwi likaThixo libe likrele enilinikwa nguMoya. 
Ephesians6:18 Zinikeleni ngokupheleleyo ekuthandazeni. Thandazani maxa onke niqhutywa nguMoya. Ngesi sizathu ke hlalani nithe qwa, ningancami, nisoloko nibathandazela abantu bakaThixo." 
Ephesians6:19 Nam ndithandazeleni, ukuze uThixo andiphe udaba xa ndithethayo, ndibe nesibindi sokuyivakalisa injongo yakhe eyayifihlakele, ndixela iindaba ezimnandi." 
Ephesians6:20 Mna ndingunozakuzaku obanjiweyo ngenxa yazo. Ndithandazeleni ukuze ndithethe ngesibindi, njengoko kufuneka ndenjenjalo kakade." 
Ephesians6:21 Njengoko kuyimfanelo ukuba nive ngemeko nempilo yam, uTikiko uya kunazisa ngazo zonke ezo ndaba. Yena nguwethu othandekayo, isicaka esithembekileyo emsebenzini weNkosi." 
Ephesians6:22 Yiyo ke le nto ndimthuma kuni: ndenzele ukuba anazise ngayo yonke imeko yam, anivuselele." 
Ephesians6:23 Wanga uThixo uYise neNkosi uYesu Krestu angawapha uxolo nothando nokholo onke amawethu. 
Ephesians6:24 Lwanga ubabalo lukaThixo lungahlala kubo bonke abayithanda ngothando olungatshitshiyo iNkosi uYesu Krestu. 
Philippians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos kunye noTimoti, izicaka zikaKrestu. Sibhalela usapho lukaThixo olumanywe noKrestu, lungabemi eFilipi, ndawonye nabakhokeli bebandla kunye nabancedisi." 
Philippians1:2 Sithi: Wanga uThixo uBawo wethu neNkosi uYesu Krestu anganenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
Philippians1:3 Ndisoloko ndimbulela qho uThixo wam xa ndinicinga. 
Philippians1:4 Naxa ndinikhumbulayo emthandazweni, ndinithandazela nonke ngovuyo," 
Philippians1:5 ngenxa yendlela enasebenzisana ngayo nam kwamhla-mnene kumsebenzi wam wokuhambisa iindaba ezimnandi, kude kube ngoku." 
Philippians1:6 Yaye ndiqinisekile ngale ndawo yokuba lo msebenzi mhle awuqalileyo uThixo kuni, uya kude awuqabelise ngeMini kaKrestu uYesu." 
Philippians1:7 Nina kum nihlala nisenyongweni; yiyo ke le nto ndinyanzelekile ukuba ndinithathe ngolu hlobo. Kaloku nani niyixhamle inyhweba endiyinikwe nguThixo, ngoku kanye ndisentolongweni, naxa iindaba ezingoKrestu ndizilwelayo ndizimela kananjalo." 
Philippians1:8 UThixo uyazi ukuba ndinyanisile xa ndithi ndinilangazelela kanye ngale ndlela uKrestu anilangazelela ngayo. 
Philippians1:9 Umthandazo wam kukuba ze niye nikhula ngokukhula eluthandweni naselwazini oluphangaleleyo, nibe nombono onzulu," 
Philippians1:10 ukuze nibe nokukwazi ukuzicalu-calula izinto. Xa kunjalo ke iMini kaKrestu yofika ningenasiphako, nimsulwa," 
Philippians1:11 ubomi benu buqhelezela sisidima esinokuveliswa nguKrestu kuphela, ukuze uThixo abongwe adunyiswe." 
Philippians1:12 Ndifuna nazi, mawethu, ukuba izinto ezandihlelayo zanceda ekuziqhubeleni phambili, endaweni yokuzidodobalisa, iindaba ezingoKrestu." 
Philippians1:13 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke bonke abalindi bebhotwe, kunye nabo bonke abanye abalapha, bayazi ukuba ndisentolongweni nje kungenxa yokuba ndisisicaka sikaKrestu." 
Philippians1:14 Loo nto ke ibangela ukuba amakholwa ayithembe iNkosi, athathe unyawo ukulishumayela oku ilizwi likaThixo." 
Philippians1:15 Kanti ke abanye uKrestu bamshumayela ngomona nangolunya, bambi ke bona bamshumayela ngomoya omhle." 
Philippians1:16 Abo ke baqhutywa luthando, kuba bayazi ukuba uThixo undiphathise umsebenzi wokukhusela udaba olungoKrestu. Kodwa abanye aba bona uKrestu abamshumayeli benyanisekile, koko bamshumayela ngomoya wokuzigwagwisa, becinga ukuba bangandivusela inkathazo engaphezulu ngoku ndibanjiweyo kakade." 
Philippians1:17  
Philippians1:18 Akukhathaliseki! Nokuba bamshumayela ngomoya ombi okanye benyanisekile, oko nje eshunyayelwa uKrestu, ndiyavuya mna, ndaye ke ndisaya kuvuya." 
Philippians1:19 Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba ngemithandazo yenu, nangoncedo loMoya kaYesu Krestu ndiya kusinda." 
Philippians1:20 Umnqweno nethemba lam kukuba ndinganikezeli, kodwa ngamaxesha onke, ingakumbi ngoku, ndikhuthale, ukuze ubume bam bonke bunike isidima kuKrestu, ndiphila okanye ndifile." 
Philippians1:21 Kambe ke, ukudla ubomi, kum kukuthobela uKrestu. Ukufa ke kona kuzisa lukhulu." 
Philippians1:22 Kodwa ke ukuba ukudla kwam ubomi kululutho, ndingakhetha ndithini?" 
Philippians1:23 Ndixakiwe. Ndiyakulangazelela ukufuduka ndiye kuKrestu, nto leyo ibhetele kakhulu." 
Philippians1:24 Kodwa ngenxa yenu kubalulekile ngaphezulu ukuba ndidle ubomi. 
Philippians1:25 Ngale yona into ndiqinisekile, futhi ndiyazi ukuba ndisaza kuphila. Ndisaza kuhlala ndinincede, niqhubele phambili, lukhule uvuyo nokholo lwenu." 
Philippians1:26 Xa ndiphinde ndafika ke apho kuni noba nebhongo ngakumbi ngoYesu Krestu ngenxa yobukho bam. 
Philippians1:27 Ngoko ke ziphatheni ngendlela engqinelana neendaba ezingoKrestu. Nokuba ndizile ndanibona, okanye ndiyeva nje ngani, mandive ukuba nimi ngxishi moyeni mnye, ninenjongo enye yokuncedisana, nisilwela ukuthotyelwa kweendaba ezingoKrestu." 
Philippians1:28 Musani ukoyikiswa ziintshaba zenu. Loo nto iya kuzenza ziqonde ukuba ziya kwantshabalalo, nina niya elusindisweni, ibe ke uloyiso luvela kuThixo." 
Philippians1:29 Kuba kaloku ilungelo lenu njengabamanywe noKrestu alipheleli ekukholweni kuye kuphela, koko lifikelela nasekubeni nive ubunzima ngenxa yakhe." 
Philippians1:30 Nina nam sisedabini elinye. Nakha nandibona ndikulo, futhi ikwaleli nivayo ukuba nangoku ndisekulo." 
Philippians2:1 Njengoko kobu bomi bethu, simanywe noKrestu, kukho inkuthazo, kukho nokuvuseleleka kothando, nokudlelana koMoya, kukho nobubele novelwano," 
Philippians2:2 ngoko ke ndaneliseni nindivuyise ngokuba nibe banye ngezimvo nangothando, nibanye ngengqondo, nizamela ukuba nibe yimbumba yamanyama." 
Philippians2:3 Musani ukusunduzana. Izinto sanukuzenza ngokuzigwagwisa nangokuqhayisa. Ndaweni yaloo nto zithobeni, nibaphakamise kunani abanye abantu." 
Philippians2:4 Izinto abanomdla kuzo abanye zixabiseni nazo, ningakhathaleli izinto eninomdla kuzo kuphela." 
Philippians2:5 Njengoko nimanywe noYesu Krestu izimvo zenu mazifane nezakhe; kuba kaloku: 
Philippians2:6 Nakuba ubume bakhe babunguThixo ngenkqu, ukulingana noThixo akakubawelanga kangangokude afune ukusunduzana naye." 
Philippians2:7 Ndaweni yaloo nto waziqongqotha ubuyena, wathatha isimo sesicaka, waba ngumntu ncakasana. Engumntu ebantwini," 
Philippians2:8 wazambesa intobeko, ntobeko leyo yamsa ekufeni – ukufa kwasemnqamlezweni." 
Philippians2:9 Kungoko ke athe uThixo wamphakamisa kakhulu, wamthi jize ngelona gama lingaphezu kwawo onke amanye amagama," 
Philippians2:10 ukuze bonke abaphilayo, ezulwini, emhlabeni, naphantsi komhlaba, bagobe amadolo benika imbeko kwigama likaYesu;" 
Philippians2:11 bathi bebonke bavume bengafihlisi ukuba uYesu Krestu yiNkosi, bebonakalisa ubungangamsha bukaThixo onguBawo." 
Philippians2:12 Nani ke, zihlobo zam, njengoko nihlala nimthobela uThixo xa ndilapho, nangoku ke kubaluleke ngakumbi ukuba nimthobele nokuba ndikude. Lufezekiseni usindiso enilunikwe nguThixo, ninembeko nentlonipho." 
Philippians2:13 Kuba kaloku nguThixo ngokwakhe oninika amandla okuzimisela nokusebenza, ukuze nithobele injongo yakhe." 
Philippians2:14 Yonke into enimelwe kukuyenza yenzeni ngaphandle kokukhalaza nokuxambulisana," 
Philippians2:15 niziphathe nyulu ningenagxeke, njengosapho lukaThixo olungabekwa bala phakathi kwabantu abakhohlakeleyo beli phakade. Khanyani phakathi kwabo njengeenkwenkwezi zikhanya esibhakabhakeni," 
Philippians2:16 nibanika iindaba zobomi. Xa nenjenjalo ke, noba libhongo lam ngaloo Mini kaKrestu, kuba kaloku kobonakala ukuba andifumananga ndabulaleka elugqatsweni nasemsebenzini." 
Philippians2:17 Kodwa nokuba kutheni ndingavuya, nokuba igazi lam lingade liphalazwe njengomnikelo ngenxa yokholo lwenu – kholo olo lulidini enilinikela kuThixo. Ndiyavuya, kunjalonje nani vuyani." 
Philippians2:18 Kwakhona ndithi vuyani, nam nindonwabise." 
Philippians2:19 INkosi ivuma, ndinethemba lokuba kwakamsinya ndoba nako ukumthuma kuni uTimoti, khon' ukuze ndihlaziyeke ziindaba ezivela kuni." 
Philippians2:20 Kaloku uTimoti lo kuphela komntu ozimvo zinjengezam; yaye unomdla ngokwenene kuni. 
Philippians2:21 Bonke abanye aba baxakeke zizinto zabo, bengayinanze nganto ekaKrestu imicimbi." 
Philippians2:22 UTimoti yena nimazi kakuhle. Niyazi ukuba wayesoloko ejikeleza kunye nam ekuhambiseni iindaba ezimnandi, kanye oku konyana ethene nca noyise." 
Philippians2:23 Ndiza kumthuma kuni ke kamsinya, ndakuba ndiyiqondile imeko yokuhamba kwezinto ngakum;" 
Philippians2:24 ndaye ndinethemba lokuba emandleni eNkosi nam ngokwam ndiza kuza kungekudala. 
Philippians2:25 Ndiyabona ukuba uwethu uEpafrodito, ongumncedisi nogxa wam, enanimthumele kum, mandimthumele kwakuni." 
Philippians2:26 Ubesoloko enikhumbula gqitha, yaye uva intw' embi kuba nivile ukuba ubegula." 
Philippians2:27 Kambe wayegulela ukungabikho, kodwa uThixo wamenzela inceba, nam wandivela ngokundikhulula kusizi olungaphezu kolu ndinalo." 
Philippians2:28 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke ndikungxamele ngakumbi ukumthumela, ukuze nivuye kwakhona nakumbona, nam ndiphumle elusizini." 
Philippians2:29 Mamkeleni ke ngezandla ezingenamkhinkqi ebudlelaneni eninabo neNkosi. Bonke abantu abanjengaye nje benzeleni imbeko," 
Philippians2:30 kuba yena obakhe ubomi uphantse ukwahlukana nabo ngenxa yemicimbi kaKrestu, ebubeke esichengeni ukuze andincede apho beningenakundinceda khona nina." 
Philippians3:1 Ndiphetha ngelithi ke, mawethu, yanga iNkosi inganipha uvuyo. Akundixhamli konke ukuphinda ndibhale izinto ebekhe ndazibhala ngaphambili; iya kuninceda loo nto." 
Philippians3:2 Zilumkeleni ezo zinja, nemikhwa yazo emibi. Balumkeleni abo banimele ngokutsheca imizimba – soze ndithi lulwaluko loo nto yabo." 
Philippians3:3 Ábaluke ngenene sithi, thina bamnqula ngoMoya uThixo, thina baqhayiya labo linguKrestu Yesu, thina singaqhayisiyo ngento eyenziwe emzimbeni." 
Philippians3:4 Nam ngokwam bendingaqhayisayo ngezi zinto. Ukuba kukho bani uqhayisa ngembonakalo, mna ndingaqhayisa ngaphezulu:" 
Philippians3:5 Mna ndaluswa ndineentsuku ezisibhozo ndizelwe. NdingumSirayeli wesizwe sakwaBhenjamin ngokomlibo, umHebhere nozwane. Ndandingoweqela *labaFarasi ekugcineni *umthetho,ndinenzondelelo," 
Philippians3:6 ndada ndalitshutshisa ibandla. Ndandingabekwa bala ekuwugcineni umthetho. 
Philippians3:7 Kodwa zonke ezo zinto ndandisithi ziyinzuzo, ngoku ndizithatha njengelahleko ngenxa kaKrestu." 
Philippians3:8 Phofu asizizo zodwa, koko yonke into ndiyithatha njengelahleko mpela, kuba zonke izinto zigqithwa kude lee yinzuzo yokwazana noYesu Krestu iNkosi yam. Ndalahla yonke into ngenxa yakhe. Into yonke ndiyithatha njengomgquba ngenxa yokufuna ukuzuza uKrestu." 
Philippians3:9 Kaloku ndimanywe naye, ndingenabulungisa ndizifumanele bona ngokugcina kwam umthetho. Ndimanywe noKrestu nje, ndenziwe ilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokukholwa kuKrestu." 
Philippians3:10 Inye kuphela ke into endiyifunayo: kukwazana noKrestu, ndize nam ndiweve ukusebenza kwawo amandla okuvuka kwakhe, ndibe nenxaxheba kwiimbandezelo zakhe, ndimanywe naye ekufeni kwakhe," 
Philippians3:11 ndinethemba lokuba nam ndovuswa ekufeni. 
Philippians3:12 Asikuko nokuba ndithi sendiphumelele, okanye sendigqibelele, nto nje ndihlala ndixhinele phambili, ndizabalazela ukuba kubekho lutho ndiluzuzayo, kuba nam ndazuzwa nguKrestu Yesu." 
Philippians3:13 Hayi, mawethu, andizibaleli ekuthini sendizuzile, nto nje nantsi into endiyenzayo: ndithi ndizilibala izinto esezigqithile, nditsazele kwezo zingaphambili," 
Philippians3:14 ndixhinele entanjeni, ukuze ndilizuze ibhaso laphezulu asifunza kulo uThixo ngoYesu Krestu." 
Philippians3:15 Sonke ke thina bafikeleleyo kulo mgangatho masibe nale njongo. Kambe, ukuba bakho kuni abaneembono ezizezinye, uThixo uya kubatyhilela." 
Philippians3:16 Kodwa ke ukuziphatha kwethu makulungelelane nalo mgangatho sesifikelele kuwo. 
Philippians3:17 Mawethu, manyanani ekulinganiseni mna. Mna ndingumzekelo kuni; ngoko ke bagqaleni abo bahambo injengeyam." 
Philippians3:18 Njengoko ndasoloko ndinixelela, ngoku nditsho ndisenzinyembezini, ukuba baninzi abazimilo zibenza babe ziintshaba zomnqamlezo kaKrestu." 
Philippians3:19 Bafunzele entshabalalweni. Bona uThixo wabo sisisu sabo. Ihlazo labo baqhayisa ngalo. Iingqondo zabo bazimilisele ezintweni zalo mhlaba. 
Philippians3:20 Kanti ke thina ikomkhulu lethu lisezulwini, apho silindele ngolangazelelo ukuba uya kuvela khona uMsindisi wethu, iNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
Philippians3:21 Yena uya kuyiguqula le meko yethu iphuthileyo, ayifanise neyakhe enobungangamsha, esebenzisa kwaloo mandla awasebenzisayo xa afaka zonke izinto phantsi kolawulo lwakhe." 
Philippians4:1 Ewe ke, mawethu, zihlobo zam ezithandekayo, andisanikhumbuli ngako! Kaloku niluvuyo nesithsaba sam; ngoko ke, bathandwa, zingisani njengabeNkosi." 
Philippians4:2 UYodiya benoSintike ndibacela ndibacenga-cenga ukuba babe moya mnye ebudlelaneni beNkosi. 
Philippians4:3 Ewe, nawe mlingane wam, ndiyakubongoza ukuba uwalamle la makhosikazi, kuba nawo aba nenxaxheba kwimizamo yam yokuhambisa iindaba ezimnandi, enoKlemente nabanye oogxa bam abamagama abhaliweyo kumqulu wabaphilayo." 
Philippians4:4 Ngoko ke, nimanywe neNkosi nje, yonwabani! Ewe, ndiyaphinda ndithi vuyani!" 
Philippians4:5 Bazeleleleni bonke abantu. INkosi isemnyango. 
Philippians4:6 Sanukuba naxhala; kodwa iintswelo zenu ziseni kuThixo ngomthandazo, nimbongoze ninombulelo." 
Philippians4:7 Ke lona uxolo lukaThixo olungaphaya kokuqonda luya kuzalusa iintliziyo neengcinga zenu ningahlukani noKrestu. 
Philippians4:8 Mandiphethe ngelithi, mawethu, hlalani nicinga ngezinto eziyinyaniso nezindilekileyo nazo zonke izinto ezilungileyo nezinyulu, zonke ezithandekayo nezinesidima, nangezinto ezintle ngokupheleleyo kwanezincomekayo." 
Philippians4:9 Zenzeni zonke izinto enazivayo nezo nazibonela kum, amazwi kwanezenzo. Ke uThixo onika uxolo uya kuba nani." 
Philippians4:10 Ndimanyene neNkosi, yaye ndivuya gqitha kuba emva kwethuba elingaka kuphinde kwabalasela ukundikhathalela kwenu. Phofu kakade nanindikhathalele, koko niswele ithuba." 
Philippians4:11 Xa nditshoyo ke andikhalazeli kuswela. Kaloku mna ndafunda ukwanela nakuyiphi na imeko endikuyo. 
Philippians4:12 Ndiyazana nokuswela, kanti ke futhi ndikuqhelile ukuba nento yonke. Ndiwaqhelile amahlandinyuka obomi: intlutha nendlala, ubutyebi nokuswela." 
Philippians4:13 Ndinako ukumelana nayo nayiphi na imeko ngenxa yamandla alowo undomelezayo. 
Philippians4:14 Ngxatsho ke, intle into eniyenzileyo ngokundixhasa ezingxakini zam." 
Philippians4:15 Yayinini nodwa kakade enandincedayo, bantu baseFilipi, njengoko nani nisazi. Kuwo onke amabandla ethu nini kuphela enanijongene neendleko kunye nengenelo yam kwamhla ndaqalisa ukuhambisa iindaba ezimnandi, ndisuka eMakedoni." 
Philippians4:16 Naxa ndandiseTesalonika naphinda-phinda ukundithumela uncedo. 
Philippians4:17 Asikuko nokuba ndincwase ukuba nindikhongoze izipho, nto nje ndijonge ukuba ibe nini abafumana inzuzo." 
Philippians4:18 Ngoku sendifumene le mpahla ifike noEpafrodito, akukho nto ndingenayo. Nindixhase nangaphezu kokuba bendilindele. Ndiyifanisa nedini elivumba limnandi,umbingelelo owamkelekileyo nowanelisayo kuThixo." 
Philippians4:19 Yaye uThixo wam wonibonelela kuzo zonke iintswelo zenu ngendyikityha yendyebo yakhe ekuKrestu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Makadunyiswe uThixo uBawo wethu ngonaphakade kanaphakade! *Amen. 
Philippians4:21 Ndibulisa kusapho lonke lukaThixo olumanywe noKrestu Yesu. Bayabulisa nabo abantu bakaThixo abalapha kunye nam," 
Philippians4:22 nalo lonke usapho lukaThixo, ingakumbi abo bebhotwe *likaKhesare." 
Philippians4:23 Ubabalo lweNkosi uYesu Krestu malube nani nonke. 
Colossians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos, *umthunywa kaYesu owamiselwa ngentando kaThixo, ndikunye nomwethu uTimoti." 
Colossians1:2 Ndibhalela usapho lukaThixo, amawethu athembekileyo aseKolose, amanyene noKrestu. Ndithi: Ngamana uThixo uBawo wethu wanenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
Colossians1:3 Asinilibali emithandazweni yethu, singalibali nokumbulela uThixo uYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu," 
Colossians1:4 oko sevayo ngokukholwa nokuzinikela kwenu kuKrestu Yesu, nangokuluthanda kwenu usapho lukaThixo." 
Colossians1:5 Ewe, siyayibulela loo nto ngenxa yedinga eninalo kwaThixo, enaqala ukuva ngalo ngodaba lwenyaniso." 
Colossians1:6 Olu daba luvakala elizweni liphela, luvelisa iziqhamo, lunwenwe kanye ngale ndlela lenze ngayo naphakathi kwenu ukususela mhla neva naziqonda njengoko zinjalo izibele zikaThixo." 
Colossians1:7 Le nto nayiva ngoEpafra, umncedisi wethu othandekayo, osisicaka esithembekileyo sikaKrestu ngenxa yenu." 
Colossians1:8 Nathi ke usibalisele ngothando aniphe lona uMoya. 
Colossians1:9 Ngenxa yeso sizathu ke, ukususela mhla seva ngani, asiphezi ukunithandazela. Siyamcela uThixo ukuba aniphe ukuyazi intando yakhe, nibe nabo bonke ubulumko nokuqonda okuvela kuMoya." 
Colossians1:10 Ngoko ke niya kuba nako ukuziphatha ngendlela ethandekayo eNkosini, niyikholise ngeendlela zonke. Xa kunjalo ke ubomi benu buya kuqhama ziintlobo-ntlobo zemisebenzi elungileyo, nani nikhule ekumazini uThixo." 
Colossians1:11 Wanga anganomeleza ngamandla akhe agqitha ukuqonda, ukuze nibe nako ukunyamezela ninomonde novuyo." 
Colossians1:12 Bulelani kuBawo onenze nakufanela ukuba nenxaxheba kwilifa labantu bakhe ebuqaqawulini. 
Colossians1:13 Wasihlangula egunyeni lobumnyama, waza wasifudusela ekulawulweni nguNyana wakhe oyintanda," 
Colossians1:14 lo sifumene kuye inkululeko nokuxolelwa kwezono. 
Colossians1:15 UKrestu yimbonakalo kaThixo ongabanokaliyo; ingqalo nentloko yayo yonke indalo. 
Colossians1:16 Iinto zonke zadalwa ngaye, ezulwini nasemhlabeni, ezibonakalayo nezingabonakaliyo. Zonke zivela kuye: ooziphathamandla namatshawe, oozilawuli noomagunya. UThixo walidala ngaye elidalela yena ihlabathi liphela." 
Colossians1:17 Iinto zonke zingekabikho, yena wayekho kade. Nto zonke ziyondelelana zilungelelane kuye." 
Colossians1:18 Intloko yomzimba olibandla lakhe ikwanguye. Nguye ulibo, owokuqala ukuvuswa ekufeni, khon' ukuze yena abe sisiqalo ezintweni zonke." 
Colossians1:19 UThixo uthandile ukuba aphuphume ubuThixo. 
Colossians1:20 Yena ngulowo uThixo azixolelanise ngaye nehlabathi liphela; ewe, ngokuphalala kwegazi lakhe emnqamlezweni wazixolelanisa naye zonke izinto ezisezulwini nezisemhlabeni." 
Colossians1:21 Benifudula ninxaxhile, kungekho buhlobo phakathi kwenu noThixo, ngenxa yemikhwa emibi enaniyenza, niyicinga nokuyicinga." 
Colossians1:22 Kodwa ngoku uThixo udale ubuhlobo phakathi kwakhe nani ngokuphalala kwegazi likaKrestu, ukuze anisondeze ningabantu abanyuliweyo, ningenasiphako, nimsulwa phambi kwakhe." 
Colossians1:23 Nani ke yithini ngcembe elukholweni, nimi ngxishi phezu kwesiseko senu, ningagungqiswa nto kwithemba eninalo ngenxa yeendaba ezimnandi. Zezi ndaba kanye ke uThixo andithume ukuba ndizivakalise, ezi zishunyayezwa uwonke-wonke phantsi kwelanga." 
Colossians1:24 Kuyandonwabisa ukuhlupheka kwam ngenxa yenu. Kuba ngale ndlela ndithatha inxaxheba ngalo mzimba wam ubuthathaka ngokuzibandakanya neentlungu ezisilindeleyo zikaKrestu, ngenxa yomzimba wakhe, ibandla lakhe ke ukutsho." 
Colossians1:25 Ndenziwe umlungiseleli webandla nguThixo ondinike olu xanduva ukuba ndiluthwale ngenxa yenu. Luxanduva lodaba lwakhe ekufuneke ndiluvakalise ngokupheleleyo. 
Colossians1:26 Ndivakalisa loo mfihlelo yafihlwa mandulo kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana. Kodwa ke ngoku ityhilwe kubantu bakaThixo. 
Colossians1:27 Yinjongo yakhe uThixo ukuyazisa kubantu bakhe le mfihlelo ixabiseke kunene, iqaqambileyo, ayilungiselele uluntu luphela. Yiyo le ke loo mfihlelo: uKrestu ungaphakathi kuni, ulithemba lewonga eniya kulifumana kuThixo." 
Colossians1:28 Ngoko ke sishumayela uKrestu eluntwini. Silumkisa sifundise wonke ubani ngamava esinawo, khon' ukuze sibanikele kuThixo bonke ngabanye befezekile ngokumanywa noKrestu." 
Colossians1:29 Ndibila ndisoma ukufeza olu xanduva, ndisebenza ngamandla endiwaphiwa nguKrestu ongaphakathi kum." 
Colossians2:1 Ndifuna niyazi indlela endabulaleka nzima ngayo ngenxa yenu nabantu baseLawodike, kwanabo bangazanga bandibona ngamehlo." 
Colossians2:2 Ndifuna bahlale bomelele, bemanyene ngothando, ukuze bafikelele ekuqinisekeni ngokupheleleyo ngengqondo, beyiqiqa imfihlelo kaThixo. Loo mfihlelo ke nguKrestu ngenkqu." 
Colossians2:3 Nguye uvimba wendyebo kaThixo yobulumko nokuqonda. 
Colossians2:4 Ndinixelela le nto nje, ndifuna ze ningalahlekiswa bani ngeentetho ezilahlekisayo, nokokuba zivakala kakuhle kangakanani na." 
Colossians2:5 Nakuba ndingekho siqu apho, ndikho kodwa ngomoya, ndaye ndivuya kuba ndiyiphawule indlela enimi ngxishi ngayo, ningagungqi ekukholweni kuKrestu." 
Colossians2:6 Ngoko ke, njengoko namamkelayo uKrestu Yesu iNkosi, hlalani nimanyene naye." 
Colossians2:7 Iingcambu zenu mazendele, nakheke kuye, nomelele ngokomelela elukholweni njengoko nafundiswayo, niphuphume ngumbulelo." 
Colossians2:8 Zilumkeleni, ningathatheki iingqondo yimilavuzo engaphethe nto, engasekelwanga ngoKrestu, esekelwe ngezithethe neemfundiso zabantu, nangamagunya alawula ehlabathini." 
Colossians2:9 Kuba kaloku ubume bobomi bukaThixo bukho ngokupheleleyo kuKrestu ongumntu; 
Colossians2:10 yaye ke nimanywe naye nje, niphiwe ubomi obupheleleyo. Kaloku yena yintloko: liphantsi kwakhe lonke igunya namandla." 
Colossians2:11 Nakuba nimanyene naye naluswe ngolwaluko olungelulo olwabantu nje, kodwa olulolukaKrestu: lona kukukhululwa komntu kwigunya lesimo esidala." 
Colossians2:12 Kaloku ekubhaptizweni kwenu nangcwatywa kunye naye, kwangokunjalo navuswa kunye naye ngokuzinikela kumandla kaThixo asebenzayo, yena wamvusayo uKrestu ekufeni." 
Colossians2:13 Nangona nanifile ngenxa yeziphoso zenu, nto leyo icaciswa kukungaluki kwenu, uThixo univuse kunye noKrestu, waza wazixolela zonke izono zethu." 
Colossians2:14 Usicime mpela isityholo setyala lethu lokwaphula imiqathango yomthetho. Incwadi leyo yesityholo uyisuse kwaphela, wayibethelela emnqamlezweni." 
Colossians2:15 Uboyisile oomagunya nooziphathamandla, wabenza intlekisa esidlangalaleni, bekumngcelele wabathinjwa aboyisiweyo." 
Colossians2:16 Ngoko ke makungabikho bani unixoxisayo ngento emaniyitye, okanye niyisele, nangemisitho yokuthwasa kwenyanga *neyoMhla wokuPhumla." 
Colossians2:17 Ezi zinto zazisisithunzi nje sento eyayilindelekile – inkqu yayo nguKrestu. 
Colossians2:18 Musani ke ukuqhathwa ngabantu abazenza bhetele, beqhayisa ngemibono nangentobeko ethile, benqula izithunywa zezulu. Abantu abanjalo bafumana bezingca nje, bebambelele ezintweni ezibonakalayo zengqondo yabo." 
Colossians2:19 Baphuncukile kwintloko enguKrestu. Kanti ke umzimba namalungu nemisipha unxibelelana nentloko ukuze wondleke ubambene, ukhule ngendlela kaThixo." 
Colossians2:20 Kaloku nafa kunye noKrestu, nakhululeka ekulawulweni ziimpembelelo zeli phakade. Ngani ke ukuba niziphathe ngokwabantu beli phakade? Kutheni ukuba nibe ngoothoba-sikutyele, niphulaphula nje xa kusithiwa:" 
Colossians2:21 “Sanukuyiphatha le, sanukuyingcamla leya, enye sanukuyichukumisa”?" 
Colossians2:22 Xa zizonke ezi zinto ziyonakala zakuba zisetyenzisiwe. Injalo ke imithetho neemfundiso zabantu. 
Colossians2:23 Okunene le nkqubo yokuzenza ngcwele, nokuzicinezela, kunye nokungcungcuthekisa umzimba, ibonakala ngathi inobulumko, kodwa iyoyiswa kukulwa inkanuko yemvelo." 
Colossians3:1 Njengoko kaloku navuswa kunye noKrestu, yibani nomdla kwizinto zasezulwini, apho akhoyo uKrestu, ehleli kwiwonga alinikwe nguThixo." 
Colossians3:2 Iingqondo zenu zimiliseleni kwizinto zaphezulu, kungabi kwizinto zalo mhlaba." 
Colossians3:3 Kaloku nafa; ngoko ke ubomi benu busafihlakele kunye noKrestu kuThixo. 
Colossians3:4 UKrestu bubomi benu; ngoko ke, akubonakaliswa yena, nani niya kubonakala ningoomaqhuzu kunye naye." 
Colossians3:5 Ngoko ke yitshitshiseni iphele kuni imikhwa yeli hlabathi: ukurheletya, ukungcola, ukutshiseka, iinkanuko, nokunyoluka okukwalunqulo-zithixo." 
Colossians3:6 Izimilo ezinje zizondwa yingqumbo kaThixo. 
Colossians3:7 Nani ke ngokuyâ naningekaguquki naniziphethe ngolu hlobo. 
Colossians3:8 Kodwa ke ngoku zilumleni kuzo zonke ezi zinto: ingqumbo, iphuku, ububi, ukuthuka, nokuthetha krwada." 
Colossians3:9 Ngoku nisilahlileyo isimo esidala sanukuxokisana. 
Colossians3:10 Kaloku ngoku nambethe isimo esitsha, athe chu kuhle ukusihlaziya uThixo, ukuze sifuze yena mdali waso, nokuze nani nimazi ngokupheleleyo." 
Colossians3:11 Apho ke akusekho mahluko phakathi komGrike nomJuda, owalukileyo nongalukanga, abangaphucukanga nabaphantsi, ikhoboka nokhululekileyo; kuba uKrestu uyinto yonke, ekubo bonke." 
Colossians3:12 Ningabantu bakaThixo abanyuliweyo abathandiweyo nina, abakhe ngenkqu. Ngoko ke nxibani ezifanele abakhe: inceba, ububele, ukuthobeka, ubulali, nomonde." 
Colossians3:13 Nyamezelanani, nixolelane. Ukuba omnye ukhalazela omnye xolelanani kwanjengokuba nayo iNkosi yanixolelayo." 
Colossians3:14 Ngaphezu kwazo zonke ezi zinto yongezani uthando, lona lubopha izinto zonke zibe yimbumba egqibeleleyo." 
Colossians3:15 Uxolo eniluphiwa nguKrestu malube lulo olugweba iintliziyo zenu, kuba uThixo wanibizela kolu xolo ukuze nibe ngamalungu omzimba omnye. Phuphumani ke ngumbulelo." 
Colossians3:16 Maluhlale ngokupheleleyo ezintliziyweni zenu udaba lukaKrestu. Fundisanani, niyalane ngobulali. Culani iindumiso, nihlabele amaculo, nivuma iingoma zoMoya, nibulela uThixo ngentliziyo." 
Colossians3:17 Nantoni na ke eniyenzayo, nokuba niyathetha, nokuba niyenza, yenzeleni egameni leNkosi uYesu, nibulela uThixo uYise ngayo." 
Colossians3:18 Nina makhosikazi, bathobeleni ngokuzinikela abayeni benu, kuba yimfanelo yenu yobuKrestu leyo." 
Colossians3:19 Nina madoda, bathandeni abafazi benu, ningabi ngqwabalala." 
Colossians3:20 Bantwana, bathobeleni abazali benu maxa onke, kuba yeyona nto iyikholisayo iNkosi leyo." 
Colossians3:21 Bazali, nina musani ukubacaphukisa abantwana bade bakruquke." 
Colossians3:22 Nina zicaka, bathobeleni abaphathi benu balapha emhlabeni kuzo zonke izinto. Thembekani emsebenzini naxa ningajongwanga; ewe, sebenzani ngokungathi nikhonza iNkosi ngenkqu, ningajonge kunconywa ngabantu." 
Colossians3:23 Nayiphi na into eniyenzayo yenzeni ngomxhelo ngokungathi niyenzela iNkosi, aniyenzeli bantu." 
Colossians3:24 Ze nikhumbule ukuba iNkosi iya kunivuza ngelifa eligcinele abantu bayo. Kaloku uKrestu yeyona Nkosi nikhonza yona. 
Colossians3:25 Kodwa yena umenzi wobubi uya kuvuzwa ngokwemisebenzi yakhe emibi; kuba uThixo ugweba wonke ubani engakhethi buso. 
Colossians4:1 Nina basemagunyeni, izicaka zenu ziphatheni kakuhle, ngobulungisa. Ze nikhumbule ukuba nani nineNkosi esezulwini." 
Colossians4:2 Zingisani ukuthandaza, niphaphile, ninombulelo kuThixo." 
Colossians4:3 Nam nindikhumbule emthandazweni, ukuze uThixo andivulele ithuba lokushumayela, ndivakalise udaba olungoKrestu obelukade lungaziwa mntu. Ndikhonkxiwe nje kaloku yiloo nto." 
Colossians4:4 Ze nindithandazele ukuze ndiyithethe icace le mfihlelo, njengoko ndimelwe kukwenjenjalo." 
Colossians4:5 Yilumkeleni indlela eniziphatha ngayo phambi kwabo bangakholwayo, nilisebenzise kakuhle ithuba eninalo." 
Colossians4:6 Incoko yenu mayisoloko imnandi, inika umdla. Fundani ukucebisana kakuhle nomntu ngamnye enidibana naye." 
Colossians4:7 Umwethu oyintanda, uTikiko okholekileyo, umncedi nogxa wam emsebenzini weNkosi, uza kunibalisela ngemeko yam apha." 
Colossians4:8 Yiyo le nto ndimthumela kuni nje, ndifuna aze kunixelela ngempilo yethu, anivuselele." 
Colossians4:9 Uza kuba ehamba no-Onesimo, ikholwa eliyintanda lakuni. Bonixelela ke zonke iindaba zalapha." 
Colossians4:10 Uyanibulisa uAristarko ongumbanjwa kunye nam, kwanoMarko umzala kaBharnabha. (Beseniwufumene umyalezo ngaye, ngoko ke xa athe wafika mamkeleni azive esekhaya.)" 
Colossians4:10 Uyanibulisa uAristarko ongumbanjwa kunye nam, kwanoMarko umzala kaBharnabha. (Beseniwufumene umyalezo ngaye, ngoko ke xa athe wafika mamkeleni azive esekhaya.)" 
Colossians4:11 NoYesu onguYusto uyabulisa. Ngâba kuphela kumakholwa amaJuda abândincedisáyo emsebenzini wokuvakalisa ulawulo lukaThixo. Futhi ke bayintuthuzelo kum. 
Colossians4:12 Uyabulisa uEpafra, isicaka sikaKrestu Yesu, okwangowakuni. Uthe rhoqo ukunithandazela ukuba nime ningahexi, nikhule, nizinikele ngokupheleleyo ekwenzeni intando kaThixo." 
Colossians4:13 Nam ndiyangqina ukuba akaphumli esebenzela nina nabaseLawodike nabantu baseHirapoli. 
Colossians4:14 Nomhlobo wethu othandekayo ugqirha uLuka uyabulisa, ngokunjalo noDemas." 
Colossians4:15 Ndibuliseleni kumawethu aseLawodike, nakuNimfa nebandla elo lihlanganela endlwini yakhe." 
Colossians4:16 Xa seniyifundile le leta yigqithiseleni kwibandla laseLawodike, ifundwe nakhona. Ngokukwanjalo ke nani ze niyifunde laa leta yaseLawodike." 
Colossians4:17 Gqithisani lo myalezo kuArkipo: “Nakanjani na, umsebenzi owawunikwa yiNkosi wenze ngokufezekileyo.”" 
Colossians4:18 Umbuliso lo ubhalwa ndim mna Pawulos. Khumbulani ukuba ndikhonkxiwe! Ubabalo lukaThixo malube nani. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos, ndikunye noSilas noTimoti. Ndibhalela ibandla likaThixo uYise neNkosi uYesu Krestu, eliseTesalonika. Ndithi kuni: Makulawule ubabalo noxolo." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Ndisoloko ndimbulela uThixo ngenxa yenu nonke, ndinikhumbula njalo emithandazweni yam." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Ewe, andinilibali phambi koThixo onguBawo wethu. Ndikhumbula ukusebenza kwenu niqhutywa lukholo, ukubulaleka kwenu niqhutywa luthando, nomonde wenu ngenxa yethemba lenu eNkosini uYesu Krestu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Ndiqinisekile, mawethu athandiweyo nguThixo, ukuba uninyulele ukuze nibe ngabakhe." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Kaloku iindaba ezimnandi endaniphathela zona yayingengomlomo nje qha, koko ndazizisa ngamandla kaMoya oyiNgcwele, ndiqhutywa kukoyiseka bubunyaniso bazo. Niyayazi indlela endandiziphethe ngayo ngokuya ndandilapho phakathi kwenu. Yonke loo nto yayikukulungiselela nina." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nani ngokwenu nalandela ekhondweni lethu neleNkosi. Nangona naniphatheke kabuhlungu, udaba nalwamkela ngovuyo oluvela kuMoya oyiNgcwele." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Naza ngokwenjenjalo naba ngumzekelo kuwo onke amakholwa eMakedoni naseAkaya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Kuba kaloku udaba lweNkosi lwahlokoma luphuma kuni, alwaya eMakedoni naseAkaya kuphela, koko iindaba zokukholwa kwenu kuThixo zihlwayeleke kuyo yonke indawo, kangangokuba akusekho mfuneko yakuba sichaze nto thina." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Seyingundaba-mlonyeni kubo bonke abantu indlela enasamkela ngayo kutyelelo lwethu. Kanti nokulahla kwenu izithixo niguqukela kuThixo, ukuze nibe zizicaka zoThixo wenene ophilayo, kukwanjalo." 
1Thessalonians1:10 Nonke nihlala nilindele ukubuya koNyana wakhe ezulwini, lowo wamvusayo ekufeni; ewe uYesu, yena usihlangulayo kuyo yonke ingqumbo ezayo." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Nazi ngokwenu, mawethu, ukuba undwendwelo lwethu phakathi kwenu alubanga lilize konke-konke." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Emva kokuphathwa gadalala sinyeliswa nokunyeliswa eFilipi seza kuluphalaza kuni udaba lweendaba ezimnandi zikaThixo, singafihlisi, singenalo noloyiko, siphiwa amandla nguThixo wethu. Yaba ngumzamo onzimakazi lowo." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ewe kambe, ukushumayela kwam akuzanga kusekelwe ngabuxoki, kungazanga kwaba nazinjongo ziphuthileyo, ndaye ndingazanga ndalinga nakukhohlisa bani." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Koko ndityunjwe nguThixo nje, ndakufanela nokuphathiswa iindaba ezimnandi, ndisuka ndithethe ngezinto eziphathelele kwezo ndaba. Andizicengezeli mntwini, ndizicengezela kuThixo kuphela, yena ohleli ezazi iingcinga zethu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Niyazi kakuhle ukuba bendingankwalambisi ukuthetha nani. UThixo uyazi ukuba ukunyoluka bendingakwambesi ngentetho emnandi. 
1Thessalonians2:6 Bendingakuhoye nganto ukudunyiswa ngabantu, nditsho nani, nabani na." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Bendinako kambe ukunisinda ngesithinzi kuba *ndingumthunywa kaKrestu ngenkqu, koko ndisuke ndambuna kuni, ndaba yindlezana ibungezela iintsana zayo." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Bendinithanda kangangokuba andanelanga nje kukunishumayeza ngeendaba ezimnandi zikaThixo, koko ndazinikela mna siqu ngenxa yenu. Bendinithanda ke khona!" 
1Thessalonians2:9 Khanikhumbule, mawethu, indlela ebesisebenza nzima ngayo sibulaleka. Besisebenza ubusuku nemini, sisebenzela ukuzixhasa, size singabi ngomthwalo mntwini, lo gama sinishumayezayo ngeendaba ezimnandi zikaThixo." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Niyangqina nani, nditsho noThixo ngenkqu ulingqina ngendlela ebendihlala ngayo ndikholekile, ndililungisa, ndingabekwa bala phakathi kwenu makholwa." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Niyazi ukuba bendinjengoyihlo kuni nonke ngabanye. 
1Thessalonians2:12 Bendinithundeza nakutyhafa, ndiniluleka, ndiniyala ukuba nihlale ngendlela emanelisayo uThixo onibizela ewongeni kulawulo lwakhe." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Nasi esinye isizathu esibanga ukuba ndingaphezi ukumbulela uThixo: nathi sakuba siniphathele udaba lukaThixo, nalwamkela. Analwamkela ngokodaba nje lwabantu, koko nalwamkela njengoko lunjalo, lulilizwi likaThixo elisebenzayo kuni nina nikholwayo." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Nani mawethu, niphatheke ngohlobo awayephatheke ngalo amabandla akwaJuda, abantu bakaThixo abamanywe noYesu Krestu. Nani nitshutshiswa ngamawenu kanye ngalaa ndlela bona babetshutshiswa ngayo ngamaJuda," 
1Thessalonians2:15 lawo ayibulalayo iNkosi uYesu *nabashumayeli, nathi ngokwethu asigxotha. Lawo ke ngamaJuda angayikhathalelanga intando kaThixo, aziintshaba zoluntu." 
1Thessalonians2:16 Nathi asithintela, engafuni sithethe neentlanga sizikhokelele elusindisweni. Ngokwenjenje ke ayizalisile ibhekile yezono zawo. Kungokunje ingqumbo kaThixo iphezu kwawo." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Thina ke, mawethu, sithe sakuba sahlukene nani okomzuzwana – phofu ngembonakalo, hayi ngeentliziyo – sanxuba sinqwenela ukuphinda sinibone." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Sazama ukuza apho eTesalonika – ewe, kanye mna Pawulos akukanye ndizama – kodwa uSathana uxabile endleleni." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Kaloku ekubuyeni kweNkosi yethu uYesu, xa simi phambi kwayo, asinathemba naluvuyo naqhayiya ngaphandle kwenu!" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ewe, ngenene nini nedwa ibhongo novuyo lwethu!" 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ngoko ke ndithe ndakuqonda ukuba akunyamezeleki, ndabona ukuba mandisale ndedwa apha eAtene," 
1Thessalonians3:2 ndimthumele kuni uTimoti ongugxa wam kumsebenzi kaThixo wokushumayela iindaba ezimnandi ezingoKrestu. Ndimthumela ukuze anikhuthaze nime ngxishi elukholweni," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ningagungqiswa nto naxa nitshutshiswa. Njengoko nisazi, ezo ntshutshiso zisisabelo sethu kaloku." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ndatsho kuni oko bendiphakathi kwenu ukuthi simelwe kukubuva ubunzima. Kwenzeke kanye loo nto ke ngoku, njengoko nisazi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ndakungabi nakunyamezela ke ndithumele uTimoti ukuba akhe eze kuqonda ngombandela wokholo lwenu, hleze kuthi kanti unihendile uSathana, ndize mna ndibe ndifane ndabulaleka ndisebenza." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Ngoku uTimoti usandul' ukufika evela apho kuni eTesalonika, esiza neendaba ezindonwabisayo, endixelela ngokholo nangothando eninalo. Uthi nisoloko nineengcinga ezintle ngam; yaye uthi nani ninqwenela ukundibona kwanjengokuba ndinqwenela ukunibona nam." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Kuzo zonke ke ngoko iinkxwaleko neenzingo zam, ukholo lwenu, mawethu, luyandikhuthaza." 
1Thessalonians3:8 Kaloku ikukuphila kum into yokuba nina nihlale nithe zinzi nimanywe neNkosi. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ndingambulela ndithini uThixo ngenxa yenu? Ndingambulela ndithini ngenxa yolonwabo enindenzele lona? 
1Thessalonians3:10 Imini nobusuku ndihleli ndithandaza ngenyameko, ndicela ukuba ze ndibuye ndibonane nani, ndize ndilulungise ukholo lwenu apho lulambatha khona." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Wanga uThixo uYise ngenkqu, ekunye neNkosi uYesu, angayenza mhlophe indlela yam xa ndizayo apho kuni!" 
1Thessalonians3:12 Yanga ingalukhulisa iNkosi uthando eninalo luphuphume, nithandane, nithande naye wonke ubani, kanye ngale ndlela ndinithanda ngayo mna." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Ngamana iNkosi inganomeleza ngolu thando, ukuze xa nimi phambi koThixo uYise, nifunyanwe ninyulu, ningenabala ekufikeni kweNkosi uYesu, inabo bonke abo bamanywe nayo." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Ngaphezu koko, mawethu, sanifundisa indlela yobomi obumkholisayo uThixo. Le ke phofu yindlela ebeniphila ngayo kakade. Kodwa ke ngoku, njengoko nimanywe neNkosi uYesu, sinicela sinicenga-cenga ukuba nenze ngakumbi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Kaloku niyayazi imiyalelo esaninika yona ngegunya leNkosi uYesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 UThixo uthanda ukuba nibe nyulu, nikucezele ukurheletya." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Umntu ofuna umfazi makathathe umfazi ahlale naye ngobunyulu nembeko," 
1Thessalonians4:5 iinkanuko angaziphi nomtyhi lo njengâbo bangamaziyo uThixo. 
1Thessalonians4:6 Ngokukwanjalo ke makungabikho bani umonayo okanye umvuyelelayo umwabo kulo mbandela. Sesinilumkisile ngaphambili ukuba iNkosi iya kubohlwaya abo benza izinto ezinjalo. 
1Thessalonians4:7 Kaloku uThixo akasibizelanga ekungcoleni, koko ufuna sibe nyulu." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ngoko ke, nabani na ongayifuniyo le mfundiso akachasi mntu, uchasa uThixo lo unipha uMoya oyiNgcwele." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Akukho mfuneko yakuba ndinichazele ngoxanduva lokuthanda amanye amakholwa, kuba kaloku nina ngokwenu uThixo uyanifundisa ukuba nithandane." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Ibe ke ngenene nani niziphethe ngale ndlela kuwo onke amakholwa kulo lonke elaseMakedoni. Phofu ke, mawethu, ndiyanikhuthaza ukuba niqhubele phambili ukwenjenjalo." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Nokuba yintoni na imeko ibhongo lenu malibe kukuhlala ngoxolo, ningagxuphuleki kwimicimbi yabanye abantu. Philani kukubila kwamabunzi enu njengoko ndandiniyalele." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Ngale ndlela ke nabo bangakholwayo baya kutsho banihloniphe; futhi ke ningaxhomekeki mntwini ngeentswelo zenu. 
1Thessalonians4:13 Ndithanda ukunicacisela, mawethu, mayela nâbo bangasekhoyo, ukuze ningabi lusizi njengabantu abangenathemba." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Kaloku siyakholwa ukuba uYesu wafa, wabuya wavuka. Ngokukwanjalo ke nâbo bafe bemanywe noYesu uThixo uya kubabuyisa kunye noYesu." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Le nyaniso ndinixelela yona lilizwi leNkosi: Thina baya kuba besaphila ngemini yokubuya kweNkosi asiyi kufumana nto bangayi kuyifumana abo bangasekhoyo. 
1Thessalonians4:16 Liya kuhlokoma ilizwi lesiphatha-zithunywa, sivakale nesandi sexilongo likaThixo, ize iNkosi ngokwayo ihle ezulwini. Bothi abo bafa bemanywe noKrestu bavuke kuqala," 
1Thessalonians4:17 nathi ke baya kuba besaphila ngelo xesha sixhwilwe sidibane nabo emafini, size sihlangane neNkosi esibhakabhakeni. Ke siya kuhlala neNkosi njalo-njalo." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ngoko ke khuthazanani ngala mazwi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Mawethu, akukho mfuneko yakuba ndinibhalele mayela namaxesha namathuba." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Kaloku nazi kakuhle ukuba iMini yeNkosi ifika njengesela eliza ngobusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ngelo xesha akuyi kusinda mntu, kuba lo gama kanye abantu bathi lixolile, bakhuselekile, lifika ngequbuliso ishwangusha kubo, kanye njengentlungu eviwa ngumfazi oza kuzala." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ke nina, mawethu, anihambi emnyameni. Loo mini ke ayimelwe kunifikela ngebhaqo ngokwesela." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nina ningabantu bokukhanya, abantu abahamba emini. Thina asibantu bahamba ngobusuku, emnyameni." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Masingalali buthongo ke thina njengabanye abo; masiphaphe, singanxili." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Kulalwa ebusuku ngabalalayo; kunxilwa ebusuku ngamanxila. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ke thina bantu bahamba emini masinganxili, koko masambathe ukholo nothando njengesikhuselo-sifuba, sithwale ithemba lokusindiswa njengomnqwazi wokukhusela intloko." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Kuba kaloku uThixo akasinyulelanga ingqumbo, usinyulele ukuba sizuze usindiso ngoYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 owasifela ukuze sihlale kunye naye, nokuba silele nokuba asilele." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ngoko ke, njengoko senenjenjalo kakade, khuthazanani, nakhane omnye nomnye." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Ndiyanicenga, mawethu, babekeni abo babulaleka ngenxa yenu, betyunjwe yiNkosi ukuba banikhokele baniqeqeshe." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Bahloneleni nibathande ngenxa yomsebenzi abawenzayo. Nina hlalani ngoxolo omnye nomnye. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Ndiyanibongoza, mawethu, bakhalimeleni abanxaxhayo, nibakhuthaze abatyhafileyo, nibasekele ababuthathaka, nibaphathe ngomonde xa bebonke." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Makungabikho bani ubuyekeza ububi ngobubi, kodwa maxa onke zamani kangangoko ninako ukulungiselelana, nibanceda bonke abantu." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Vuyani maxa onke," 
1Thessalonians5:17 nithandaze njalo-njalo. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Nakuyiphi na imeko bulelani. UThixo uthanda ukuba nenjenjalo njengokuba nimanywe noKrestu Yesu nje. 
1Thessalonians5:19 UMoya oyiNgcwele sanukumminxa; 
1Thessalonians5:20 ilizwi elivela eNkosini sanukulidela. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Ziphicotheni zonke izinto, nize ninyamekele leyo ilungileyo." 
1Thessalonians5:22 Nayiphi na into embi yityesheleni. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Wanga ke uThixo osinika uxolo anganenza nyulu ngeendlela zonke, anigcine ngokupheleleyo, umoya nomphefumlo nomzimba, ningabi nabala ekufikeni kweNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Uthembekile lo unibizayo; uya kuyenza yonke le nto. 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nathi sithandazeleni, mawethu." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Wabuliseni ngokwamakholwa onke amawethu. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndiyaniyala ngegunya leNkosi ukuba le leta niyifundele onke amakholwa. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Lwanga ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu lungahlala nani. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos, ndikunye noSilas noTimoti. Ndibhalela ibandla likaThixo wethu elimanywe neNkosi uYesu Krestu eliseTesalonika." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ndithi: Wanga uThixo uYise neNkosi uYesu Krestu anganenzela isisa, aniphe uxolo." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Kufanelekile ukuba simbulele uThixo ngawo onke amaxesha ngenxa yenu, mawethu. Ewe, kulunge kanye ukuba simbulele ngenxa yokuba ukholo lwenu luya lusanda ngokwanda. Yaye nokuthandana kwenu kuya kukhula ngakumbi nangakumbi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Yiyo loo nto ke nilibhongo lethu esihamba siqhayisa ngalo kwamanye amabandla kaThixo. Kaloku nina ninomonde, nimi ngxishi elukholweni naphantsi kweentshutshiso enikuzo, kwakunye neenzingo enizithweleyo." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Yonke ke loo nto ibonakalisa ukuba uThixo ugweba kakuhle. Kaloku ngenxa yezi nkxwaleko nizithweleyo uThixo uya kunenza nikufanele ukulawulwa nguye. 
2Thessalonians1:6 Kulunge kanye ukuba uThixo asiphindezelele, abavise iinzingo abo banicinezelayo," 
2Thessalonians1:7 aze kuni nina nitsala nzima, nakuthi, enze kube hele, kube chosi. Loo nto woyenza mhla ifika iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, ivela emazulwini, ingqongwe zizithunywa zayo ezinamandla," 
2Thessalonians1:8 nangamadangatye omlilo. Abo bangamvumiyo uThixo yobagweba, kwanabo bangazithobeliyo iindaba ezimnandi zeNkosi yethu uYesu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Baya kohlwaywa ngentshabalalo yangonaphakade, basuswe phambi kweNkosi, basikwe kubuncwane bewonga layo." 
2Thessalonians1:10 Kaloku ngaloo mini iya kuba ize kunikwa imbeko ngabayo, bayinqule bonke abakholwayo. Iya kuba njalo ke nakuni, kuba nani nakholwa ludaba endaniphathela lona." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Yiyo ke le nto ndihlala ndinithandazela. Ndisoloko ndimcela uThixo ukuba anifanelise ubizo lwenu. Wanga anganipha amandla okunqwenela ukwenza okulungileyo, anigqibezelele umsebenzi eniwenze niqhutywa lukholo." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Ngamana ke ningalidumisa igama leNkosi yethu uYesu, nani niwongwe ngobabalo lukaThixo wethu neNkosi uYesu Krestu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Mayela nokubuya kweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, nokuhlangana kwethu nayo: ndiyanibongoza," 
2Thessalonians2:2 musani ukuthatheka msinya, okanye nidideke lula ngamarhe athi iMini yeNkosi isemnyango; noba kukho mntu uthi uyixelelwe ezulwini loo nto, okanye uyixelelwe ngomnye umntu, kanti noba ningade nifumane ileta engathi ivela kum isitsho, lumkani." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Sanukuvuma nilahlekiswe mntu. Kaloku loo Mini ayinako ukufika lungakhange lubekho uvukelo-mbuso lokugqibela, andule ke ukucaca umchasi-mthetho, umfo okhohlakeleyo ochasana noThixo, omiselwe intshabalalo, avele elubala." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Ulolona tshaba kaloku. Yena uya kuziphakamisa achase nantoni na ekuthiwa nguthixo, achase nantoni na enqulwa ngabantu, ade athathe isihlalo endlwini kaThixo, ezigwagwisa ngokuthi unguThixo ngenkqu." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Ngaba senilibele? Kaloku ndandinixelele yonke le nto ngokuya ndandilapho. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ngokunjalo nani niyayiqonda into embambileyo ukuba angaveli phambi kwexesha elimisiweyo. 
2Thessalonians2:7 Kuba selekho kambe amandla enkohlakalo asebenza ngokufihlakeleyo. Ewe, asebenza ngokufihlakeleyo okwangoku, elinde ukuba ade emke lowo umbambezeleyo." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Uya kuthi ke akuvela loo mchasi-mthetho, iNkosi uYesu imbulale ngelizwi layo nje kuphela, imtshabalalise ngobumenyemenye bobungangamsha bokufika kwayo." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Ukufika kwalo mchasi-mthetho ngumsebenzi kaSathana; yaye uya kuphelekwa yimisebenzi yamandla nemiqondiso nemimangaliso yenkohliso," 
2Thessalonians2:10 kubekho zonke iintlobo zolahlekiso ezinokwenziwa bububi kwabo baya kwantshabalalo. Ewe, baya kutshabalala, kuba kaloku bona abalwamkelanga uthando lukaKrestu nenyaniso yakhe, ukuze basindiswe." 
2Thessalonians2:11 Ngoko ke uThixo ubayekele ngolahlekiso olusebenza kubo, ukuze bamkele ubuxoki." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Ngenxa yale nto ke bonke abangayamkelanga inyaniso, abasuke bavuyela ukuxhamla isono, baya kugwetywa." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Sifanele ukuba simbulele uThixo singaphezi ngenxa yenu, mawethu athandiweyo yiNkosi. Kuba kaloku uThixo waninyula kwasekuqaleni ukuze nisindiswe ngokwenziwa nyulu nguMoya wakhe, nangokukholwa kuyo inyaniso." 
2Thessalonians2:14 UThixo wanibiza ngeendaba ezimnandi esazishumayelayo kuni; wanibiza ukuze nifumane isabelo kubuqaqawuli beNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ngoko ke, mawethu, yimani ningahexi kwizithethe esanifundisa zona ngomlomo nangeeleta." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Yanga iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu ngenkqu noThixo uBawo wethu, owasithandayo, ngesisa sakhe wasinika ukukhuthala nethemba eliyokozelayo," 
2Thessalonians2:17 wanga angaziphuphumisa iintliziyo zenu ngenkuthalo, anomeleze ukuze nenze, nithethe, izinto ezilungileyo." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Ndiphetha ngelithi ke, mawethu, sithandazeleni, khon' ukuze ilizwi lodaba lweNkosi likhawuleze ukunwenwa kuzo zonke iindawo, nokuze linikwe imbeko nanjengoko kwaba njalo phakathi kwenu." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Nam nindithandazele ukuze ndihlangulwe kubantu abakhohlakeleyo abanobuqhokolo. Kaloku asingabo bonke abantu abalwamkelayo udaba lweNkosi. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ithembekile yona kambe iNkosi. Yonikhusela inigcine kuhlaselo lwendoda enobuqhokolo. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ndinithembile, nimanywe neNkosi nje, ukuba nohlala nisenza izinto endiniyalele zona." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Ngamana yanithundeza iNkosi, nimthande uThixo, nibe nenyameko efuze ekaKrestu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Ndiyaniyala, mawethu, ngegunya legama leNkosi uYesu Krestu, ukuba nizikhwebule nakubani othi ulikholwa abe engenwe ngumkhwa wokungakhathali, nakulowo uyidelayo imfundiso yethu." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Nazi mhlophe ukuba nina nimelwe kukuhamba ekhondweni lam. Mna bendingavilaphi phakathi kwenu. 
2Thessalonians3:8 Bendingenanto ndiyifumana nje mahala, ndingayisebenzelanga. Bendisebenza nzima ubusuku nemini, endaweni yokuba ndibe ngumthwalo kuni." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Ewe, bendinalo ilungelo lokuyifumana kuni inkxaso, koko ndithande ukuninika umzekelo." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Kaloku ndandithe kuni: “Umntu olinqenerha makangaphiwa kutya.” 
2Thessalonians3:11 Le ntetho ndiyenziswa kukuba ndive ukuba abanye kuni bahlala ngokungakhathali. Akukho nto bayenzayo ngaphandle nje kokuzifaka kwimicimbi yabanye abantu. 
2Thessalonians3:12 Bonke ke abo ndibayala egameni leNkosi uYesu Krestu, ndisithi mabaziphathe kakuhle, basebenze, bazixhase." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Nina ke kodwa, zihlobo zam, maze ningadinwa kukwenza okulungileyo." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kungenzeka kubekho othe kanti uyayidela le miyalelo yale ncwadi. Ukuba ke kuthe kanti kunjalo, mqapheleni loo mntu, nimbukule phakathi kwenu, ade asidanele isimilo sakhe." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Anditsho phofu ukuba nimthathe njengotshaba. Hayi, ze nimcenge nina, nimluleke njengomntakwenu." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Ngamana iNkosi, ekuvela kuyo yonke inzolo, ingamana inipha uxolo njalo-njalo, ngeendlela zonke. INkosi mayibe nani." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Ndibhala ngesam isandla. Nasi ke isandla sam: Ndiyabulisa mna Pawulos. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ubabalo lweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu malube nani nonke. 
1Timothy1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos *umthunywa kaYesu Krestu ngokugunyaziswa nguThixo uMsindisi wethu, noKrestu Yesu ithemba lethu." 
1Timothy1:2 Ndibhalela uTimoti, unyana wam wenene ngokwaselukholweni. Ndithi: Kuwe makulawule isisa, inceba, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo, noKrestu Yesu iNkosi yethu." 
1Timothy1:3 Njengoko ndakuyalelayo ukuya kwam eMakedoni, nceda uhlale apho e-Efese. Kaloku kukho abantu abaneemfundiso zolahlekiso apho, ngoko ke banqande." 
1Timothy1:4 Yitsho bahlukane neentsomi, nemilibo yokuzalwa engaphele ndawo. Kaloku ezi zinto zikhuthaza iingxoxo ezingayi ndawo. Azikwazi ukulichaza icebo likaThixo elaziwa ngokholo." 
1Timothy1:5 Injongo yalo myalelo kukuvuselela uthando oluphuma kwintliziyo enyulu, nesazela esihlambulukileyo, kwanokholo olungazenzisiyo." 
1Timothy1:6 Abanye abantu bathe ngokuswela ezi mpawu balahleka. Beyela kwiingxoxo ezilambathayo. 
1Timothy1:7 Bazenza abafundisi bomthetho, kanti abawaqondi amazwi abawasebenzisayo, ngokukwanjalo nakuloo mibandela bathetha ngayo bangoozwi-lakhe." 
1Timothy1:8 Siyazi ke ukuba umthetho ulungile, ukuba usetyenziswa ngendlela efanelekileyo." 
1Timothy1:9 Masikhumbule ke kodwa ukuba umthetho awenzelwa bantu balungileyo. Umthetho wenzelwa izaphula-mthetho, nezikrelemnqa, abangcolileyo, nabonayo, abanganquliyo, nabakhohlakeleyo, abo babulala ooyise noonina, izigwinta," 
1Timothy1:10 nabarheletyayo, abalalana befana ngobuni, abaqweqwedisi, amaxoki, nabafunga bexoka, naye nabani na owenza into echasene nemfundiso yokwenene." 
1Timothy1:11 Loo mfundiso ke ifumaneka kwezi ndaba zimnandi ndazinikelwayo ukuba ndizivakalise – uncuthu lweendaba zikaThixo onobungangamsha omakadunyiswe. 
1Timothy1:12 Ndiyambulela uKrestu Yesu iNkosi yam, ngokundinika amandla okuwenza umsebenzi wam. Ndiyambulela kuba endibone ndifanelekile ukuba ndimiselwe ukumsebenzela." 
1Timothy1:13 Undalathile nangona ndandimngcikiva, ndimtshutshisa, ndimthuka. UThixo waba nenceba kum, kuba ndandingakholwa; ngoko ke ndandingayazi into endiyenzayo." 
1Timothy1:14 Ngesisa sayo iNkosi yandibabala, yandipha ukholo nothando, esizifumana ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu." 
1Timothy1:15 Nanga amazwi athembekileyo, afanele ukwamkelwa: UKrestu Yesu weza emhlabeni ukuze asindise aboni; ndingobalaseleyo ke mna." 
1Timothy1:16 Kodwa kungenxa yesi sizathu kanye ukuba uThixo andenzele inceba, ukuze umonde kaKrestu Yesu ubonakale ngokupheleleyo ngam. Undibizile, nangona ndingobalaseleyo nje umoni, ukuze ndibe ngumzekelo kubo bonke abasaza kukholwa kuye bafumane obona bomi bungenasiphelo." 
1Timothy1:17 Kuye uKumkani ongunaphakade, yena ongagugiyo, ongabonwayo, uThixo yedwa – kuye makubekho isidima nobungangamela kude kube ngunaphakade kanaphakade! *Amen." 
1Timothy1:18 Lo myalelo ndiwunika wena, Timoti, nyana wam, ngokwamazwi awodwa âvela kuThixo ethethwa ngawe mandulo. Ngoko ke loo mazwi makabe sisixhobo sakho edabini," 
1Timothy1:19 uxhobe ngokholo nangesazela esihlambulukileyo. Ngokudela isazela, abanye abantu balutyumza okweselwa elinamasi ukholo lwabo." 
1Timothy1:20 Phakathi kwabo ndingabalula uHimeniyo noAlesandire, esendide ndabanikela kuSathana, ukuze baqeqeshwe bakuyeke ukunyelisa." 
1Timothy2:1 Kuqala, ndiqononondisa ndisithi: izicelo, imithandazo, izikhungo, nemibulelo," 
1Timothy2:2 mazenzelwe bonke abantu. Iinkosi nabasemagunyeni bonke mabathandazelwe, ukuze kubekho inzolo noxolo ehlabathini, sihlale ngokoyika nangokuhlonela uThixo." 
1Timothy2:3 Yinto elungileyo nekholekileyo leyo kuThixo, uMsindisi wethu," 
1Timothy2:4 ofuna ukusindisa bonke abantu, baze bafikelele ekuyazini inyaniso." 
1Timothy2:5 Kaloku mnye uThixo, ukwamnye nalowo ungumxolelanisi kaThixo nomntu. NguKrestu Yesu ongumntu ncakasana," 
1Timothy2:6 owazenza intlawulelo yenkululeko yoluntu luphela. Wayingqinela injongo kaThixo kanye ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ngokwenjenjalo." 
1Timothy2:7 Mna ke ndalathwa ukuba ndibe sisigidimi sokufundisa iintlanga ukholo nenyaniso. Andixoki; ndinyanisile. 
1Timothy2:8 Ngoko ke ngumnqweno wam ukuba imithandazo yenziwe ngamadoda emabandleni onke, ethandaza ephakamise izandla ngeenjongo ezimsulwa, engahambisani neengxabano nomsindo." 
1Timothy2:9 Abafazi bona mabandileke, banxibe ngesidima, bathozame; iinwele bangazihombisi ngokugqithisileyo. Mabangayokozeli ngamaso egolide, nawamatye exabiso, bawunduzelise ngeelokhwe zeendleko." 
1Timothy2:10 Ndaweni yaloo nto mababe nemisebenzi emihle efanele amakhosikazi abanga igama lobuKrestu. 
1Timothy2:11 Umfazi makabe ngumfundi othe cwaka onentobeko. 
1Timothy2:12 Andimvumeli ukuba abe ngumfundisi; andithandi nokuba aphathe amadoda; hayi, makathi cwaka." 
1Timothy2:13 Andithi kanene nguAdam owadalwa kuqala, kwaza kwalandela uEfa?" 
1Timothy2:14 AsingoAdam owakhohliswayo, yaba ngumfazi owavuma inkohliso, waza wawa esonweni." 
1Timothy2:15 Kambe ke wosindiswa ngokuzala ukuba uthi rhoqo ukuhlala elukholweni, nothando, nobungcwalisa, ezinzile ngengqondo." 
1Timothy3:1 Liyinene eli lizwi lithi: “Ukunqwenela ukuba yinkokheli ziinjongo ezibalulekileyo.” 
1Timothy3:2 Ngoko ke inkokheli mayibe ngumntu ongenabala; mayibe ngumntu onomfazi omnye, ozinzileyo ngengqondo, oyingcathu; abe ngonocwangco, onobubele ekhaya, okwaziyo ukufundisa;" 
1Timothy3:3 engelilo inxila, okanye ocaphuka msinya, kodwa onobulali, ethanda inzolo; mayingabi ngoyinyolukeleyo imali." 
1Timothy3:4 Kufuneka ibe ngumntu okwaziyo ukulawula usapho lwakhe, ethotyelwa ngabantwana bakhe, umntu ovunyiweyo ngesimilo." 
1Timothy3:5 Kaloku umntu owoyiswayo kukulawula usapho lwakhe, angalilawula njani ibandla labantu bakaThixo?" 
1Timothy3:6 Kufuneka ingabi ngumntu osandul' ukuguquka, hleze athiwe lwale likratshi, aze agwetywe njengoSathana." 
1Timothy3:7 Makabe ngumntu ohlonitshwayo ngabangakholwayo, ukuze angabi sesichengeni sehlazo, eyele kwimigibe kaSathana." 
1Timothy3:8 Nabo abancedisi mababe ngabantu abasimilo sihle, benyanisekile; bengengawo amanxila okanye izinyolunyolu zemali." 
1Timothy3:9 Kufuneka babe ngamadoda azinikele ngokupheleleyo kwinyaniso yokholo, engenasazela nganto." 
1Timothy3:10 Nabo kwanjengabakhokeli, mabaphicothwe kuqala; ukuba ke abanabala bangeniswe emsebenzini." 
1Timothy3:11 Nabafazi babo mababe ngabazimilo zihle, bengahlebi; abazinzileyo ngengqondo, bethembekile ngeendlela zonke." 
1Timothy3:12 Umncedisi makabe nomfazi omnye kuphela, akwazi ukubaqeqesha abantwana bakhe, ayilawule nendlu yakhe iphela." 
1Timothy3:13 Abancedisi abawenza ngokufanelekileyo umsebenzi wabo, bazuza iwonga nelungelo lokuthetha ngesibindi kwimicimbi kaKrestu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Le leta ndiyibhala ndinethemba lokuza kukubona kamsinya. 
1Timothy3:15 Kodwa ke ukuba ndibambezelekile woyifunda kule leta indlela abafanele ukuziphatha ngayo abantu endlwini kaThixo, ibandla likaThixo ophilayo, intsika exhasa inyaniso." 
1Timothy3:16 Inkulu ngokungenambaliso imfihlelo yonqulo lwethu. Kaloku uKrestu Yesu: Wavela ngesimo sobuntu waza wangqinelwa nguMoya, wabonwa zizithunywa zezulu. Washunyayelwa ezizweni, wamkelwa lihlabathi, waza wawongwa ezulwini." 
1Timothy4:1 UMoya uxela ngokucacileyo ukuba kumaxesha ezayo abanye abantu baya kululahla ukholo, balandele imimoya yenkohliso, bathobele iimfundiso zeendimoni." 
1Timothy4:2 Ezo mfundiso ziya kuza nabantu abangamaxoki, abazazela ziphawulwe ngophawu lukaSathana." 
1Timothy4:3 Bayawuchasa umtshato, banqande abantu ekutyeni uhlobo oluthile lokutya. Kambe ke oku kutya kudalwe nguThixo, ekwenzela ukuba kwamkelwe ngombulelo ngabo bakholwayo, bayaziyo inyaniso." 
1Timothy4:4 Kaloku yonke into edalwe nguThixo ilungile. Makungabikho icalulwayo ke, xa yamkelwe ngombulelo." 
1Timothy4:5 Kuba kaloku ngelizwi likaThixo ndawonye nomthandazo, iyamkeleka loo nto kuThixo." 
1Timothy4:6 Woba usisicaka esikholekileyo sikaYesu Krestu xa uwanika le mfundiso amakholwa. Nawe wokondleka emoyeni ngamazwi okholo nawemfundiso yenyaniso oyilandelayo. 
1Timothy4:7 Wena uze uchasele kude lee kwezo ntsomi zifanele ukwenziwa ngamaxhegokazi. Hlala uzilungiselela inkonzo kaThixo. 
1Timothy4:8 Ewe, umthàmbo owenzelwa ukolula amalungu omzimba unendawo yawo. Kodwa ke uphelele apho. Kanti kona ukukhonza uThixo kunenzuzo egqithileyo, kuba akuthembisi bomi balapha kuphela, kuthembisa nobelizayo." 
1Timothy4:9 Athembekile la mazwi; afanelwe kukwamkelwa ngokupheleleyo. 
1Timothy4:10 Ndithetha ukuthi sisebenza nzima nje sibulaleka kungokuba sibeke ithemba kuThixo ophilayo, onguMsindisi walo lonke uluntu, ingakumbi abo bakholwayo." 
1Timothy4:11 Zigcine, uzibethelele emfundisweni yakho ezi ndawo." 
1Timothy4:12 Musa ukuvuma ukudelwa ngabantu ngenxa yokuba usemncinci. Yiba ngumzekelo kuwo onke amakholwa, ngentetho yakho, ngokuziphatha, ngothando, ngentembeko, nangobunyulu." 
1Timothy4:13 Hlala ubafundela *iziBhalo, ushumayela, ufundisa, ndide ndifike apho." 
1Timothy4:14 Uze ungadlali ngesipho sikaThixo osifumene ngenxa yamazwi awodwa âvela kuThixo xa wawubekwa izandla ngamadoda amakhulu ebandla. 
1Timothy4:15 Zetyise ezi ndawo, ungene nzulu kuzo, ukuze icace kuye wonke ubani inkqubela yakho." 
1Timothy4:16 Yinyamekele into oyenzayo, uyinyamekele nemfundiso yakho. Yithi rhoqo uyigcine le miyalelo, ukuze ngokwenjenjalo usinde, usindise nabo bakuphulaphulayo." 
1Timothy5:1 Ungaze uthethe rhabaxa nomntu omdala kunawe. Thetha naye ngokungathi uthetha noyihlo. Abafana abanganeno kuwe bathathe njengabaninawe," 
1Timothy5:2 abafazi abadala njengonyoko. Phakathi kwabafazana ziphathe nyulu njengakoodade wenu. 
1Timothy5:3 Bahlonele abahlolokazi; ndithetha abahlolokazi ngenene. 
1Timothy5:4 Ukuba umhlolokazi unabantwana okanye abazukulwana mabafunde ukwenza iimfanelo zabo ekhaya kuqala, baze ngokwenjenjalo babuyekeze abazali babo, bamkholise noThixo." 
1Timothy5:5 Kodwa umfazi ongumhlolokazi nene-nene ongenabani, ithemba lakhe ulibeke kuThixo. Uthandaza ubusuku nemini ecela uncedo lukaThixo." 
1Timothy5:6 Kanti ke umhlolokazi ozinikezele eziyolweni nasebumnandini, sewafayo naxa ngathi uhleli nje yena." 
1Timothy5:7 Baxelele ngezi zinto abahlolokazi, ukuze bangabekwa bala." 
1Timothy5:8 Umntu ongazikhathaleleyo izizalwane zakhe, ingakumbi ezihlala naye, selelulahlile ukholo, ungcole ngaphezu kwabangakholwayo." 
1Timothy5:9 Ubhaliso lwabahlolokazi lwenzelwa abo bangaphezu kwamashumi amathandathu eminyaka ubudala. Ngaphezu koko kufuneka babe babenyanisekile emadodeni abo," 
1Timothy5:10 bedumile nangemisebenzi emihle: ingqeqesho ebantwaneni, ukuphatha kakuhle iindwendwe emizini yabo, ukuhlamba iinyawo zabantu bakaThixo, ukuvelana nabasezingxakini, nokuzimanya kwiindidi ngeendidi zemisebenzi emihle." 
1Timothy5:11 Abahlolokazi abasebatsha uze ungababhalisi bona. Kaloku kuthi wakubavukela umnqweno bafune ukwenda, bamfulathele uKrestu," 
1Timothy5:12 baze ke babe netyala ngokwaphula isithembiso. 
1Timothy5:13 Ngaphandle kwaloo nto baziqhelisa nokuchitha ixesha behamba bejikeleza emizini, bagqibele benolwimi, behamba bethetha ngezinto zabantu." 
1Timothy5:14 Mna ndicebisa ukuba aba basebatsha abahlolokazi mabatshate, bazale, bahlale emizini yabo, ukuze iintshaba zethu zingafumani kroba lokusinyemba." 
1Timothy5:15 Kaloku sekukho abanye abahlolokazi abasebekhethe ukulandela uSathana. 
1Timothy5:16 Ukuba kukho inkosikazi elikholwa enezizalwana ezingabahlolokazi mayizijonge ngokwayo, ingathwalisi ibandla umthwalo, khon' ukuze libe nako ukujonga abo bangenamntu." 
1Timothy5:17 Abakhokeli abasebenza kakuhle ekuphatheni ibandla mabawongwe babonelelwe ngokwaneleyo; ngakumbi abo babulaleka ziintshumayelo nakukufundisa. 
1Timothy5:18 Kaloku zithi *iziBhalo: “Sukuyifaka isicheme inkabi ebhulayo.” Ziphinda kwakhona zithi: “Umsebénzi ufanelwe ngumvuzo wakhe.” 
1Timothy5:19 Isimangalo esenziwa ngomkhokeli uze ungasamkeli ngele kokuba sixhaswa ngamangqina amabini namathathu. 
1Timothy5:20 Abo bonayo, bangxolise ekuhleni, khon' ukuze nabanye boyike ukona." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndiyakuyala phambi koThixo, noYesu Krestu, kunye naphambi kwezithunywa zakhe, ukuba uyigcine le mithetho, ungabi namkhethe." 
1Timothy5:22 Uzungafan' ubeke izandla nayiphi na indoda. Zigcine nyulu, ungazidibanisi nasono samntu." 
1Timothy5:23 Yeka ukumana usela amanzi odwa; thatha intwana yewayini. Yosilungisa isisu sakho, ungasoloko ukhathazwa yimpilo." 
1Timothy5:24 Abanye abantu zidlula zingekakhalazelwa izinto ezimbi abazenzayo. Kanti ezabanye zihlala zifihlakele kude kube kudala beqhuba. 
1Timothy5:25 Ngokukwanjalo ke nezinto ezintle abazenzayo abantu zinokubonakala. Phofu naxa zingabonakali azinako ukufihlakala kuphele. 
1Timothy6:1 Bonke abantu abaphantsi kwedyokhwe yobucaka mababahloniphe ngokupheleleyo abaphathi babo, ukuze igama likaThixo kunye nemfundiso yobuKrestu zingajongelwa phantsi." 
1Timothy6:2 Naxa abaphathi bengamakholwa, izicaka mazingabadeli kuba bekholwa kunye. Ndaweni yaloo nto mazithembeke ngakumbi, kuba kaloku abo zibasebenzelayo banye kunye nazo elukholweni naseluthandweni. Shumayela ufundise ngale mibandela." 
1Timothy6:3 Nabani na ofundisa imfundiso enxamnye nale, okanye ongahambisaniyo neendaba zeNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, nemfundiso yonqulo olwamkelekileyo," 
1Timothy6:4 lowo uthiwe lwale likratshi nokungazi. Ungumntu osoloko enxanelwe ukuthetha amazwi alambathayo azala ingxabano nomona, ukungevisisani nokwenyelisa, ukukrokrelana" 
1Timothy6:5 neengxoxo ezingaphele ndawo. Zonke ezi zinto yimikhwa yabantu abangqondo zingasebenziyo, asebelahlekene nayo inyaniso. Benza ngathi unqulo yindlela yokuzuza ubutyebi." 
1Timothy6:6 Ewe kambe, unqulo luyamtyebisa umntu ukuba uyaneliswa zezo zinto anazo." 
1Timothy6:7 Kaloku zange size nanto ehlabathini; ngoko ke siya kumka singaphathanga nto. 
1Timothy6:8 Kambe ke, ukuba sinako ukutya nempahla yokunxiba masaneliswe." 
1Timothy6:9 Abo baxhinele ubutyebi beyela kwizilingo nemigibe, bathi bexinwe yiminqweno yobudenge eyingozi, batshone ebundlavinini nasekutshabalaleni." 
1Timothy6:10 Ukuthanda imali yingcambu yazo zonke iintlobo zobubi. Abanye bathe ngokusukelana nayo bahola elukholweni, baza bayingxwelerha imiphefumlo yabo ngeenzingo." 
1Timothy6:11 Kodwa ke, wena mntu uzinikele ngokupheleleyo kuThixo, zicezele zonke ezi zinto. Phuthuma ukulungisa, unqulo, ukuthemba, uthando, ukunyamezela, nobulali." 
1Timothy6:12 Kolu gqatso lokholo yenza konke okusemandleni ukuze ubufumane ubomi obungonaphakade. Ewe, kaloku wabizelwa yona le njongo, ngokuya wawusenza isivumo sokholo phambi kwamangqina amaninzi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ngoku ke ndiyakugunyazisa phambi koThixo umniki bomi kuzo zonke izinto, naphambi koYesu Krestu, owenza isivumo wangqina phambi koPontiyo Pilato." 
1Timothy6:14 Wuthobele umyalelo, uwuphathe nyulu ungenabala, kude kube yiMini yokubonakala kweNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu." 
1Timothy6:15 Le mbonakalo uThixo uya kuyizalisekisa ngexesha lakhe elifanelekileyo – ewe, uThixo ingangamsha yengangalala elawula konke, iKumkani yeekumkani, iNkosi yamakhosi!" 
1Timothy6:16 Nguye yedwa ongasoze afe; uhlala kubuqaqawuli obungafikelelwayo. Akukho mntu wakha wambona nonokuze ambone. Kuye makubekho isidima nobungangamsha ngoku kude kube ngunaphakade! *Amen. 
1Timothy6:17 Bayale abantu abanobutyebi beli hlabathi bangaziphakamisi baqamele ngento engaqinisekanga njengemali, koko mabathembele kuThixo, kuba yena unezinwe, unako ukusenza sixhamle zonke izinto sonwabile." 
1Timothy6:18 Bakhuthaze benze imisebenzi emihle, babe zizinhanha ngemisebenzi elungileyo, babe nezinwe, babaphe abasweleyo." 
1Timothy6:19 Ukuba benjenje ke boba bazigcinela indyebo eya kuba sisiseko sekamva labo. Ngokwenjenjalo bobuzuza ubomi bokwenyani. 
1Timothy6:20 Wa Timoti, loo nto uyiphathisiweyo yigcine! Ziphephe iincoko eziphuthileyo zeli hlabathi, ndawonye neengxoxo ezilambathayo “zolwazi,”" 
1Timothy6:21 kuba abaninzi bathe beqhayisa ngalo olu lwazi, suke baluphosa ukholo. Makube sisisa kuni nonke." 
2Timothy1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos *umthunywa kaYesu Krestu ngokuthanda kukaThixo, owandithuma ukuba ndishumayele isithembiso sobomi, esinabo ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Ndibhalela unyana wam endimthandayo uTimoti. Ndithi: Kuwe makube sisisa, inceba, noxolo oluvela kuThixo uYise noYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyambulela uThixo endimnqula ngokunyaniseka njengookhokho bam. Ubusuku nemini ndisoloko ndikukhankanya emithandazweni yam. 
2Timothy1:4 Ndithi ndakukhumbula ukulila kwakho ndinqwenele ngakumbi ukukubona, ukuze luzaliseke uvuyo lwam." 
2Timothy1:5 Ndicinga ukunyaniseka kokholo lwakho, olufana nolukanyokokhulu uLoyisi, ngokunjalo nonyoko uYunike. Andithandabuzi ukuba ukwanjalo nawe." 
2Timothy1:6 Ngenxa yeso sizathu ndiyakukhumbuza ukuba usivuselele eso sipho wasinikwa nguThixo ukukubeka kwam izandla. 
2Timothy1:7 Kuba kaloku uMoya esimnikwe nguThixo asingowobuphakuphaku, koko uvuselela isibindi, uthando, nokuzeyisa." 
2Timothy1:8 Ngoko ke sukuba nazintloni ukungqinela iNkosi, nangam mna mbanjwa wayo. Ndaweni yaloo nto yiba nenxaxheba ezimbandezelweni ezihamba nodaba lukaKrestu, usomelezwa nguThixo." 
2Timothy1:9 Nguye owasisindisayo wasibiza ukuba sibe ngabanyuliweyo, kungengamisebenzi yethu, kodwa ngenxa yenjongo nobubele bakhe. Wasenzela obu bubele ngoKrestu Yesu kwantlandlolo." 
2Timothy1:10 Ngoku ke butyhilekile kuthi ngokufika koMsindisi wethu uKrestu Yesu. Kaloku yena uwaphul' iimpondo amandla okufa, waza waveza ubomi nokungabhubhi ngeendaba ezimnandi." 
2Timothy1:11 UThixo wandimisela ukuba ndibe ngumbhengezi weendaba ezimnandi, *umthunywa, nomfundisi." 
2Timothy1:12 Yiyo le nto ndinyamezele le meko nje. Kanti ke andoyiki nto ngaloo nto, kuba ndiyamazi kaloku endimthembileyo. Ndimthembile kuba unako kaloku ukuyilondoloza loo nto andigcinise yona, kude kufike loo Mini yakhe." 
2Timothy1:13 Ke hlala ugcine umzekelo wemfundiso yenene owayiva ngam, uhlale unokholo nothando, izinto esinazo ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Yilondoloze kakuhle loo nto siyiphathisiweyo, uncedwa nguMoya oyiNgcwele ohleli kuthi." 
2Timothy1:15 Uyazi ukuba kwiphondo laseAsiya ndishiywe ngumntu wonke! Kumke nkqu noFilego noHermogene! 
2Timothy1:16 Kodwa usapho lwakwaOnesiforo lona uThixo unga angalenzela inceba. Kaloku yena wandinceda kaninzi-ninzi xa ndandineengxaki. Zange yena abe nazintloni ngokundihambela entolongweni. 
2Timothy1:17 Wathi efika nje eRoma, wandifuna wada wandifumana." 
2Timothy1:18 Wanga angenzelwa inceba ngaloo Mini yeNkosi! Ndiyayicela loo nto eNkosini! Izinto awayendenzela zona e-Efese zaziwa nguwe ngaphezu kokuba ndingakuxelelayo mna. 
2Timothy2:1 Ke ngoko, nyana wam, yomelela ngenxa yesisa sikaThixo esisifumana ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:2 Wayiva phambi kwamangqina amaninzi imfundiso yam. Loo mfundiso ke yinike amadoda onokuwathemba, ibe ngamadoda anako ukuyifundisa abanye." 
2Timothy2:3 Yiba nenxaxheba nawe ezinzingweni njengejoni elithembekileyo likaKrestu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:4 Ijoni elisemsini alizixakekisi ngezinto zentlalo yemihla-ngemihla. Kufuneka libe soloko lilinde ukuyalelwa ngumphathi walo. 
2Timothy2:5 Kwakhona imbaleki ayinako ukuthiwa jize ngembasa ingayithobeli imigaqo. 
2Timothy2:6 Umlimi osebenza nzima ufanelwe sisahlulo sokuqala esivunweni. 
2Timothy2:7 Zigqale ezi ndawo, yaye iNkosi yokunceda uziqonde kakuhle." 
2Timothy2:8 Khumbula ukuba uYesu Krestu wavuswa ekufeni, engumzukulwana kaDavide, njengoko nditshoyo xa ndishumayela iindaba ezimnandi." 
2Timothy2:9 Nditsala nzima ngenxa yokuzivakalisa. Sendide ndavalelwa entolongweni ngathi ndisisaphula-mthetho. Kodwa lona ilizwi likaThixo alivalelekanga. 
2Timothy2:10 Yonke loo nto ndiyinyamezele ngenxa yabanyulwa bakaThixo, ndinale njongo yokuba nabo balufumane usindiso newonga elingonaphakade ngokumanywa noKrestu Yesu." 
2Timothy2:11 Athembekile la mazwi athi: “Ukuba sife simanyene naye, sodla ubomi kwakunye naye." 
2Timothy2:12 Ukuba siyanyamezela, soxhamla ukulawula kwakunye naye. Ukuba siyamkhanyela, naye wosikhanyela." 
2Timothy2:13 Ukuba asinyaniseki, uhlala enyanisekile yena, kuba kaloku akanakuzikhanyela yena siqu.”" 
2Timothy2:14 Hlala ubakhumbuza abantu, ubalumkise phambi koThixo, bangenzi zingxoxo zixabanisayo, kuba azakhi, koko ziyabenzakalisa abaphulaphuli." 
2Timothy2:15 Zama kangangoko unako ukuba ukholeke kuThixo, ube ngumntu ongenadyudyu ngomsebenzi wakhe, uyifundisa ngokufanelekileyo inyaniso." 
2Timothy2:16 Sukungena kwiincoko ezilambathayo zeli phakade, kuba abo bangena kuzo baya bechasela kuThixo." 
2Timothy2:17 Ngokunjalo nemfundiso yabo inwenwa okwesilonda esibhidlayo. Banjalo ooHimeniyo noFileto. 
2Timothy2:18 Bayiphosile inyaniso, futhi bawawisile amanye amakholwa, besithi uvuko lwabafileyo selufikile." 
2Timothy2:19 Kodwa sona isiseko esimiswe nguThixo asigungqi, sinombhalo othi: “INkosi iyabazi abayo,” kwanothi: “Wonke umntu olibizayo igama leNkosi makahlukane nesono.”" 
2Timothy2:20 Uyabona ke, endlwini enkulu kubakho iindidi ngeendidi zezitya: ezinye zezegolide, ezinye zezesiliva, zimbi zezomthi, ezinye zezodongwe; ezinye zazo zixabisekile, kanti ke ezinye azixabisekanga." 
2Timothy2:21 Ukuba umntu uyazikhwebula ekungcoleni abe nyulu, uya kuxabiseka, iNkosi yakhe ibe nako ukumsebenzisa nakuwuphi na umsebenzi omhle." 
2Timothy2:22 Ziphephe iinkanuko zobutsha; phuthuma ukulungisa, ukholo, uthando, noxolo, umanyene nabo bonke abayinqula ngokunyaniseka iNkosi." 
2Timothy2:23 Sukuthatha nxaxheba kwiingxoxo ezilambathayo zobudenge! Kaloku zona isiphelo sazo yingxabano. 
2Timothy2:24 Isicaka seNkosi asifanele kulwa, koko sifanele ukuba nobubele kubantu bonke. Sifanele ukuba nemfundiso, sinomonde," 
2Timothy2:25 sithantamise xa siluleka abo bachasayo. Kaloku iNkosi isenokubapha inguquko, bayiqonde inyaniso," 
2Timothy2:26 baze babuyele ezingqondweni, benze intando kaThixo, basiphephe isabatha abebebanjiswe ngaso ngumtyholi." 
2Timothy3:1 Kucace mhlophe ukuba imihla yokugqibela iya kuba ngamaxesha anzima. 
2Timothy3:2 Abantu baya kuba ngabathandi beziqu zabo, bathande imali, bezigwagwisa, bengoozwi-labo. Baya kunyelisa, bangathobeli bazali, bengabuleli, beluchasa unqulo," 
2Timothy3:3 bengenabuntu, bengaxoleli mntu, behleba. Baya kuba nengcwangu, beziindlobongela, bayithiye into elungileyo." 
2Timothy3:4 Baya kuba ngabangcatshi, bafane benze, benekratshi. Baya kuthanda iziyolo kunoThixo." 
2Timothy3:5 Baya kulwamkela unqulo ngembonakalo, kodwa bewaphika amandla alo. Ke wena uze ungahambi nabantu abanjalo." 
2Timothy3:6 Abanye babo bahamba bechwechwela imizi, bexhaphaza abafazi abangenazimilo, ababotshwe zizono zabo, beluthuzeliswa ziinkanuko." 
2Timothy3:7 Aba ke bahlala befunda, kodwa abaze bafikelele ekuyazini inyaniso." 
2Timothy3:8 Abantu abanje bayayichasa inyaniso kwanjengokuba uJanes noJambres bamchasayo uMosis. Aba bantu abakwazi ukuqiqa, futhi ukholo lwabo luphuthile." 
2Timothy3:9 Abasoze bahambele ndawo, kuba ububhanxa babo buya kubonakala nakubani na kwanjengokuba kwaba njalo nakubachasi bakaMosis." 
2Timothy3:10 Kodwa ke wena, nyana wam, uze uhambe rhoqo ekhondweni lam, ngeemfundiso, ngokuziphatha, ngeenjongo, ngokholo, ngomonde, nangothando, nangokunyamezela" 
2Timothy3:11 ngexesha leentshutshiso, nasebunzimeni. Izinto ezandihlelayo eAntiyokwe, eIkoniyo, naseListra, uyazi ukuba ndazithwala, iNkosi indihlangula kuzo zonke." 
2Timothy3:12 Kambe intshutshiso yomfikela nawuphi na umKrestu ofuna ukuhlala esoyika iNkosi. 
2Timothy3:13 Kodwa zona izikhohlakali nezikrelemnqa ziya kuqhuba zisuka ebubini ziye kobungaphezulu ububi, zihamba zikhohlisa, zikhohliswa nazo." 
2Timothy3:14 Ke wena yayamana rhoqo neenyaniso ozifundileyo waqinisekiswa ngazo. Khumbula ukuba uzifunde kubani na. 
2Timothy3:15 Khumbula ukuba kwausengumntwana waqhelaniswa *neziBhalo eziNgcwele ezikunika ubulumko, khon' ukuze usindiswe ngokukholwa kuKrestu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Sonke isibhalo sinefuthe loMoya kaThixo. Siyanceda ekufundiseni inyaniso nokuchitha imposiso. Siyanceda ukulungisa isimilo, sinike ingqeqesho;" 
2Timothy3:17 ukuze lowo uzinikele kuThixo abe namandla okuwuphumeza nawuphi na umsebenzi omhle. 
2Timothy4:1 Ndiyakuyala phambi koThixo noYesu Krestu oza kugweba abahleliyo nabafileyo, xa afikayo eze kulawula." 
2Timothy4:2 Lushumayele udaba, zingisa ukuluvakalisa ngamathuba alungileyo naxakileyo. Baqononondise abantu, ukhalime, ubakhuthaze, ufundisa ngomonde." 
2Timothy4:3 Liyeza lona ixesha lokuba abantu banganeliswa konke yimfundiso emsulwa. Bosuka balandele iingqiqo zabo, bazifunele abafundisi abaninzi bokubafundisa izinto abazilangazelelayo." 
2Timothy4:4 Baya kuyifulathela inyaniso, baphulaphule iintsomi." 
2Timothy4:5 Kodwa ke wena zola; ngamaxesha onke hlala ugcisile. Khalipha xa kunzima. Iindaba ezimnandi zihambise, uzenze zonke iimfanelo zobizo lwakho." 
2Timothy4:6 Okokwam ke mna, ubomi bam sebuphalazwa njengedini; nexesha lam lokunduluka selisongekile." 
2Timothy4:7 Ndizabalazile elugqatsweni olukhulu; ngoku ndifikile entanjeni; ke lona ukholo ndilugcinile. 
2Timothy4:8 Ngoku ke sendilindelwe yimbasa, isithsaba esibonakalisa ubulungisa, eya kundithwesa sona ngaloo Mini inkulu iNkosi, uMgwebi ogweba engenaxanasi. Phofu ke asindim ndedwa olindelwe seso sithsaba, koko ngabo bonke abayithandayo iNkosi eza kufika." 
2Timothy4:9 Zama kangangoko unako ukuba uze kundibona ngokukhawuleza. 
2Timothy4:10 Kaloku uDemas undibalekile, waya eTesalonika ngenxa yokuthanda izinto zeli lizwe. UKreske yena useGalati, yena uTito useDalmati." 
2Timothy4:11 NguLuka yedwa okhoyo apha kum. Xa uzayo uze ungamshiyi uMarko, kuba uluncedo olukhulu kum emsebenzini." 
2Timothy4:11 NguLuka yedwa okhoyo apha kum. Xa uzayo uze ungamshiyi uMarko, kuba uluncedo olukhulu kum emsebenzini." 
2Timothy4:12 UTikiko ndimthume e-Efese. 
2Timothy4:13 Xa uzayo uze undiphathele ingubo yam endayishiya kuKarpo eTrowa, kunye neencwadi, ingakumbi ezamanqaku." 
2Timothy4:14 UAlesandire, ingcibi yezinto zekopolo, wandenza into embi. INkosi yondiphindezela kuye!" 
2Timothy4:15 Nawe kungakuhle umlumkele. Wayendiphikisa kakhulu kuyo yonke into endiyithethayo. 
2Timothy4:16 Akuzanga kubekho namnye umntu oweza kundixhasa ukuqala kokuvavanywa kwetyala lam. Bonke bandishiya enyanyeni. Wanga akangebohlwayi ngaloo nto uThixo! 
2Timothy4:17 INkosi yaba nam, yandomeleza phezu koko. Ndaba nako ukuzishumayela iindaba zayo ezimnandi, abantu beentlanga zonke bephulaphule. Yandihlangula emlonyeni wengonyama." 
2Timothy4:18 Yondikhusela iNkosi kulo naliphi na ilinge lokundenzakalisa. Yondikhusela ndide ndifike kulawulo lwayo ezulwini. Huntshu-u-u! Mayibongwe iNkosi ngonaphakade! *Amen. 
2Timothy4:19 Bulisa kuPriska nakuAkwila, nakusapho lukaOnesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 UErasto wasala eKorinte. Yena uTrofimo ndamshiya eMileto kuba wayengaphilanga. 
2Timothy4:21 Nceda ufike kungekabi sebusika. OoYubhulo noPudens noLino kunye noKlawudiya bayabulisa. Onke amakholwa ayabulisa ngokunjalo. 
2Timothy4:22 INkosi mayibe nawe. Makanenzele isisa uThixo nonke. 
Titus1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos osisicaka sikaThixo *nomthunywa kaYesu Krestu. Ndamiselwa ukholo lwabantu bakaThixo abanyuliweyo, nokwaziwa kwenyaniso njengoko injalo kunqulo lwethu," 
Titus1:2 kunye nethemba lobomi obungenasiphelo. Ewe, uThixo ongasoze axoke wasithembisa ngobomi obungenasiphelo kwakwizizukulwana zamandulo." 
Titus1:3 Ngoku ke uthe ngexesha lakhe elifanelekileyo wabutyhila ngokwakhe ngokuvakaliswa kodaba lwakhe andiphathise lona ngommiselo kaThixo onguMsindisi wethu. 
Titus1:4 Ndibhalela uTito, unyana wam ngenene ngokwaselukholweni esidlelana ngalo. Ndithi: Kuwe makube sisisa noxolo oluvela kuThixo uBawo wethu, noKrestu Yesu uMsindisi wethu." 
Titus1:5 Ndakushiya apho eKrete ngenjongo yokuba umise izinto ngendlela efanelekileyo, ngakumbi ke ukuba umisele amadoda amakhulu kuzo zonke iidolophu ngokomyalelo wam kuwe. Yiyo le loo miyalelo:" 
Titus1:6 Indoda leyo mayibe ngumntu ongenabala, oyindoda enomfazi omnye, obantwana bakholwayo, bangadumi ngobundlobongela, nentswela-mbeko." 
Titus1:7 Njengesicaka sikaThixo inkokheli mayibe ngumntu ovunyiweyo ngesimilo. Mayingabi nguzwi-lakhe, okanye umntu onephuku; mayingabi linxila okanye indlobongela, ingabi ngumntu olithandamali," 
Titus1:8 kodwa makabe nobubele, ayithande into entle, abe ngozinzileyo ngengqondo, ongenamkhethe, abe ngozinikeleyo, ezoyisa." 
Titus1:9 Kufuneka ayithande imfundiso yodaba oluthembekileyo, ukuze abanike imfundiso ephilileyo abaphulaphuli, akwazi ukubakhalimela abachasayo." 
Titus1:10 Ngenene baninzi abavukeli abalahlekisa abanye ngemfeketho, ingakumbi abo basuka kwinkolo yobuJuda." 
Titus1:11 Kufuneka ubavale imilomo abanjalo, kuba balukuhla imizi ngokufundisa izinto ezingafanelekanga, ngeenjongo zokuzuza imali." 
Titus1:12 Omnye umshumayeli wamaKrete wathi ukuthetha ngamawabo: “AmaKrete ngamaxoki, ziindlobongela, ngamanqenerha nezinyolu-nyolu.”" 
Titus1:13 Ngenene loo nto yinyaniso! Ngoko ke esi sisizathu esenza kube yimfuneko ukuba ubakhalimele ngqongqo, khon' ukuze bafumane ukholo oluphilileyo," 
Titus1:14 endaweni yokulandela iintsomi zobuJuda nemigaqo yabantu, engumsebenzi wabantu abayifulatheleyo inyaniso." 
Titus1:15 Yonke into inyulu kwabo banyulu; kodwa ke akukho nto inyulu kwabangqondo zingcolileyo, bengakholwa. Kaloku ingqiqo nezazela zabo zingcolile." 
Titus1:16 UThixo bayamvuma ngomlomo, kodwa bayamphika ngezenzo zabo. Iinkani zabo zenza bangabi nako mpela ukwenza umsebenzi omhle." 
Titus2:1 Wena ke, shumayela ngendlela engqinelana nemfundiso ephilileyo." 
Titus2:2 Amadoda amakhulu makangabi ngomanxila; makazimaseke, abe ngcathu; enokholo, nothando, nonyamezelo." 
Titus2:3 Nabo abafazi abakhulu mabandiliseke, bangabi nalulwimi, banganxili butywala, bakwazi ukufundisa," 
Titus2:4 ukuze babonise abafazana ukuthanda abayeni babo nabantwana babo. 
Titus2:5 Abafazana mababe ngcathu, bakwazi ukuziphatha nyulu, bakhuthale emizini yabo, balulamele amadoda abo, ukuze bangalihlazisi ilizwi likaThixo." 
Titus2:6 Kanti nabo abafana bafundise ukuziphatha ngobungcathu. 
Titus2:7 Kuyo yonke into oyenzayo yiba ngumzekelo omhle kubo. Xa ufundisa, mababone ukuzimisela nokundiliseka kwakho." 
Titus2:8 Yonke intetho yakho mayibe ngamazwi akhethiweyo, ukuze okuphikisayo akhohlwe kukuthetha, axakeke, angabi nandawo yakugxeka." 
Titus2:9 Izicaka zifundise ukuthobela abaphathi, zibakholise kwinto yonke. Mazingaphendulani nabo," 
Titus2:10 zingebi nokuba. Koko mazisoloko zinyanisekile, zibonakalisa intembeko, ukuze inconywe imfundiso engoThixo nangoMsindisi ngenxa yokuziphatha kwazo." 
Titus2:11 Kaloku uThixo usibonakalisile isisa sakhe, ukuze asindise lonke uluntu." 
Titus2:12 Ngaso safundiswa ukuzilumla kwizinto ezisahlukanisa noThixo, nakwiminqweno emibi. Sifundiswe nokuhlala singcathu sinyanisekile, nokuhlonela uThixo kobu bomi." 
Titus2:13 Senjenjalo sikhangele ngethemba kuloo mhla aya kuvela ngawo enobungangalala uThixo wethu omkhulu, uMsindisi wethu uYesu Krestu." 
Titus2:14 Nguye owazenza idini ngenxa yethu, wasikhupha ekudeleni umthetho. Wasenza abantu bakhe abanyulu, abalangazelela ukwenza okulungileyo." 
Titus2:15 Zizo ke ezo iingongoma omawuzifundise, usebenzisa igunya lakho, ukhuthaza, ungxolisa. Makungabikho mntu ukudelayo." 
Titus3:1 Bakhumbuze abantu ukuba yimfanelo yabo ukuthobela abasemagunyeni nabalawulayo, kwakunye nokwenza okulungileyo ngalo lonke ixesha." 
Titus3:2 Baxelele ukuba mabangahambi bethetha ulwimi ngabantu, behamba besilwa, koko mababe nobulali nembeko kuye wonke ubani." 
Titus3:3 Kaloku khumbula ukuba nathi bekhe sazizidenge, sineenkani, silahlekile. Sasibotshwe yiminqweno neziyolo zeendidi zonke. Sasihlala intlalo yasebubini, silawulwa ngumona. Sasicatshukelwa, nathi sibacaphukela abantu."
