Titus3:4 Kodwa kuthe lakuthi tha ehlabathini uthando nobubele bukaThixo, uMsindisi wethu" 
Titus3:5 wasisindisa. Kwakungengakuba senze misebenzi mihle, kodwa kwakungenxa yenceba yakhe. Wasihlamba ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, wasizala ngokutsha, saza safumana ubomi obutsha." 
Titus3:6 Kaloku uThixo usigalele uMoya wakhe ngobubele ngaye uYesu Krestu uMsindisi wethu. 
Titus3:7 Ngesisa sakhe senziwe amalungisa, ukuze sixhamle obo bomi bungapheliyo sibulindeleyo." 
Titus3:8 Athembekile loo mazwi. Iingongoma endifuna uzibethelele ke, zezi: Abo bantu bathe bafikelela ekukholweni kuThixo, kufuneka benze imisebenzi emihle – ndithetha imisebenzi eluncedo nakwabanye abantu." 
Titus3:9 Kodwa zona iingxoxo zobuhiba uze uziphephe, neenkcukacha zeminombo, iimbambano, neengxabano ngomthetho kaMosis; zizinto ezingenamsebenzi ezo." 
Titus3:10 Umntu odala uqhekeko mlumkise kude kube kabini, ungadlelani naye emva koko." 
Titus3:11 Umntu onjalo unengqondo engcolileyo, selezigwebe kwangezenzo zakhe." 
Titus3:12 Bakufika apho ooArtemas noTikiko, uze wena ukhawuleze undihlangabeze eNikopoli. Ndifuna ukuchitha ubusika khona." 
Titus3:13 Yenza unako-nako ukulungiselela igqwetha uZenas kunye noApolo kwihambo yabo. Mabangabi nanto bayiswelayo. 
Titus3:14 Abantu bethu bona mabafunde ukuzisebenzela iintswelo zabo, bangavilaphi nje bengenamveliso." 
Titus3:15 Bayabulisa bonke abalapha kunye nam. Ndibulisele kubahlobo bethu abakholwayo. INkosi mayinenzele isisa. 
Philemon1:1 Kubhala mna Pawulos, umbanjwa ngenxa kaYesu Krestu, ndikunye noTimoti umlingane wam. Ndibhalela wena mhlobo nogxa wam, Filmon," 
Philemon1:2 kunye nebandla elihlangana endlwini yakho, nodade uApiya, ngokunjalo nogxa wam uArkipo." 
Philemon1:3 Wanga uThixo uBawo wethu kunye neNkosi uYesu Krestu anganibabala, aniphe uxolo." 
Philemon1:4 Maxa onke ndithandaza, ndiyambulela uThixo ngenxa yakho." 
Philemon1:5 Ndiyivile kaloku indlela obathanda ngayo abantu bakaThixo, ngokunjalo nokholo onalo kwiNkosi uYesu." 
Philemon1:6 Umthandazo wam kukuba ubudlelane bethu enkolweni bunga bungakwenza uziqonde ngcono iintsikelelo esinazo thina bamanywe noKrestu. 
Philemon1:7 Ewe kambe, ndithathekile ndaye ndinemihlali ngenxa yothando onalo, mfondini; kaloku abantu bakaThixo bayahlaziyeka bakuhlangana nawe." 
Philemon1:8 Ngoku ke, nakuba bendingaba nesibindi, nanjengamntu umanywe noKrestu, sokuba ndikunyanzele ngento ofanelwe kukuyenza," 
Philemon1:9 kodwa imfobe yothando iyandinyanzela ukuba ndikubongoze. Ewe, mna kanye Pawulos, ndilixhego nje ngoku, futhi ndikwangumbanjwa ngenxa kaYesu Krestu," 
Philemon1:10 ndiyakubongoza ngenxa kaOnesimo, unyana wam endimzele ngokomoya, ngoku ndilapha entolongweni." 
Philemon1:11 Kambe ebekade engento konke kuwe, kodwa ngoku uxabisekile kuwe nakum." 
Philemon1:12 Ngoku ke nanko ndimthumela kwakuwe. Kambe ke xa wamkela yena, wamkela mna." 
Philemon1:13 Bendingathandayo ukumgcina apha ngoku ndingumbanjwa, ukuze athathe indawo yakho ekundincediseni ukuvakalisa iindaba ezimnandi." 
Philemon1:14 Kodwa andithandi ukuba ndenze nto ungavumanga; hayi, bendiya kuba ndiyakunyanzela ukuba wenze into entle, kungekuba kukholekile kuwe." 
Philemon1:15 Mhlawumbi uOnesimo wahlukaniswa nawe okwethutyana, ukuze ubuye umzuze ningasazi kwahlukana." 
Philemon1:16 Kaloku ngoku akaselokhoboka nje kuphela, ungaphezu kwekhoboka: ungumwethu othandekayo. Yaz'ba xa exabiseke kangaka nje kum, ubeke phi ke ukuxabiseka kuwe! Akaselokhoboka nje kuphela, ukwangumwethu omanywe neNkosi!" 
Philemon1:17 Ngoku ke, nanjengamntu undithatha njengesihlobo, naye ke mamkele kwangalaa ndlela ubuya kundamkela ngayo nam." 
Philemon1:18 Ukuba ke kukho nto awakona ngayo okanye kukho nto akutyala yona, libalele kum elo tyala." 
Philemon1:19 Ukukuqinisekisa ndibhala ngokwam, ndithi: Ndim mna Pawulos oya kukubuyisela. Phofu ke akukho mfuneko yakuba ndikukhumbuze ukuba nawe lowo ungowam, ndinebango kuwe." 
Philemon1:20 Ke, mfondini, ndiyakubongoza – kaloku sobabini simanywe noKrestu. Ngoko ke, velana nam kulo mbandela!" 
Philemon1:21 Ndibhala ndiqinisekile ukuba uza kuhlangabezana nayo iminqweno yam; ewe, ndiyazi ukuba usenokwenza nangaphezu kwesicelo sam." 
Philemon1:22 Nantsi enye indawo: Nceda undilungiselele indawo yokuhlala apho, kuba ndinethemba lokuba uThixo uza kuyiphendula imithandazo yenu, ndibuyele apho kuni." 
Philemon1:23 Uyabulisa uEpafra ongumbanjwa ngenxa kaKrestu njengam; 
Philemon1:24 ngokunjalo noMarko, uAristarko, uDemas, noLuka, abalingane bam." 
Philemon1:24 ngokunjalo noMarko, uAristarko, uDemas, noLuka, abalingane bam." 
Philemon1:25 Ubabalo lweNkosi uYesu Krestu maluhlale nani nonke. 
Hebrews1:1 Amaxesha ngamaxesha mandulo uThixo wathetha nookhokho bethu ngeendlela ezahlukeneyo ngomlomo *wabashumayeli. 
Hebrews1:2 Kodwa ke kula maxesha okugqibela uthethe nathi ngoNyana wakhe. UThixo wammisela ukuba abe yindlalifa yezinto zonke, kwaye futhi ihlabathi liphela walidala ngaye." 
Hebrews1:3 Ewe, uNyana lo uphuhlisa ubungangalala bukaThixo, ibe ke yena noThixo bangumceph' ucandiwe. Ihlabathi lixhaswe nguye ngamandla elizwi lakhe. Uthe ke akuba elwenzile uxolelo lwezono wahlala ewongeni kwaThixo kweliphezulu." 
Hebrews1:4 Kaloku uNyana yena mkhulu kunezithunywa zezulu, kwaye ke uzuze negama elibalaseleyo kunelazo." 
Hebrews1:5 UThixo akukho sithunywa wakha wathi kuso: “UnguNyana wam wena, ndikuzele namhlanje;” engazange atsho nokuthi: “Ndiya kuba nguYise, yena abe nguNyana wam.”" 
Hebrews1:6 Kwakhona ekuyiziseni kwakhe ehlabathini inkulu yakhe uThixo wathi: “Mazinqule yena zonke izithunywa zikaThixo.” 
Hebrews1:7 Ngokubhekiselele kwizithunywa zikaThixo kuthiwa: “Ulowenza imimoya izithunywa zakhe, nemibane elenyayo ibe zizicaka zakhe.”" 
Hebrews1:8 Kodwa uthi mayela noNyana: “Kambe, ulawulo lwakho, Thixo, àluphele ndawo! Kwaye futhi wena ulawula ngobulungisa." 
Hebrews1:9 Ungumathand' ubulungisa, uyithiyile inkohlakalo. Ngenxa yaloo nto ke, Thixo, uThixo wakho ukuthambisile. Ewe, ukuthe jize ngesihomo nesithozela esingaphezulu kwesoogxa bakho.”" 
Hebrews1:10 Uphinda athi: “Nguwe, Nkosi, owalidalayo ihlabathi ekuqalekeni; amazulu ênziwa zizandla zakho." 
Hebrews1:11 Xa zizonke ziya kudlula, kodwa wena uhlala uhleli; ziya kuguga njengeempahla." 
Hebrews1:12 Uya kuzisonga njengeengubo, zona ziya kutshintshwa njengesambatho; ube wena ungaguquki, ube wena ungagugi.”" 
Hebrews1:13 UThixo zange atsho nakusinye isithunywa ukuthi: “Hlala ngakum kweli wonga lo gama ndikoyisela iintshaba zakho.” 
Hebrews1:14 Kakade ke ngoobani izithunywa? Zingoomoya abathunywa nguThixo, benceda abo baziindlalifa zosindiso." 
Hebrews2:1 Kuyafuneka ke ngoko ukuba silumke, sibambelele nkqi emfundisweni esiyivileyo, hleze siluthuzeliswe." 
Hebrews2:2 Kaloku ukuba udaba olweza nezithunywa zezulu lwalulukhulu kangangokuba ukulutyeshela nokuludela bekuzisa isohlwayo esifaneleyo," 
Hebrews2:3 singaphuncuka njani ke thina xa siludela olungaka lona usindiso? YiNkosi ngokwayo eluvakalisileyo olu sindiso kuqala, baza ke abo bayivileyo babungqina ubunyani balo kuthi." 
Hebrews2:4 UThixo ke yena wongezelela ubungqina babo ngemiqondiso, imimangaliso, nangezenzo ezibonakalisa amandla akhe, ebanika neziphiwo zikaMoya oyiNgcwele ngohlobo athande ngalo." 
Hebrews2:5 UThixo kaloku akalinikanga izithunywa zakhe igunya lokulawula ilizwe elizayo – ngumxholo esithetha ngawo ke lowo. 
Hebrews2:6 Kukho indawo ekubhalwe kuyo *eziBhalweni kwathiwa: “Uyintoni na umntu, Thixo, le nto ude uzidube kangaka ngaye? Kutheni le nto ude uzikhathaze ngento nje engumntu?" 
Hebrews2:7 Umbeke ngaphantsi kuhle nje kwizithunywa zakho. Umthe jize ngesihomo nesithozela. 
Hebrews2:8 Umnike igunya lokulawula zonke izinto.” Ukuba ke uThixo umnike igunya lokulawula zonke izinto, akukho nanye into engekho ngaphantsi kolawulo lwakhe. Kambe ke ngenene, asikaziboni zonke izinto ziphantsi kwegunya lomntu okwangoku." 
Hebrews2:9 Nanku ke kodwa uYesu. Yena wabekwa ngaphantsi kuhle nje kwizithunywa zikaThixo. Ngoku uthiwe jize ngesihomo nesithozela, kuba ngenxa yesisa sikaThixo wavuma ukufa ngenxa yoluntu lonke." 
Hebrews2:10 Njengoko ke uThixo, ezikholo yena, zikho ngaye zonke izinto, ethande ukubanika iwonga abantwana bakhe abaninzi, bekufanelekile ukuba amsulungekisele ubunkokheli ngokuva ubunzima uYesu, lowo wayeza kubakhokelela elusindisweni." 
Hebrews2:11 Kaloku lowo ukhaphela kuThixo kwanabo bakhatshelwayo ngabamlibo mnye. Yiyo ke le nto uYesu angenazintloni ukuthi abantu ngabantakwabo 
Hebrews2:12 apho athi: “Ndolivakalisa, Thixo, igama lakho kubantakwethu; ndikudumise esidlangalaleni sabantu bakaThixo.”" 
Hebrews2:13 Uphinda athi: “Ndilibeka kuThixo ithemba lam;” aze aphinde athi: “Ndim lo, ndikunye nabantwana andinike bona uThixo.”" 
Hebrews2:14 Abantwana ke abo ngabantu. Naye ke uYesu waba ngumntu njengabo, khon' ukuze ngokufa kwakhe atshitshise igunya likaSathana lokuvuyelela abantu ngokufa." 
Hebrews2:15 Ngale ndlela ke wabakhulula abantu nakwiimbophelelo zokoyika ukufa ababephantsi kwazo bonke ubomi babo. 
Hebrews2:16 Ke aba abancedayo asizozithunywa zezulu, ngabantu abayinzala ka-Abraham." 
Hebrews2:17 Ngoko ke ubemele ukuba afane nqwa nabantakwabo, khon' ukuze abe ngumbingeleli onovelwano nothembekileyo emsebenzini kaThixo, onako ukungxengxezela izono zabantu." 
Hebrews2:18 Kaloku yena nanjengamntu oselephumelele ebunzimeni bokulingwa, unako ukubanceda abo basalingwayo." 
Hebrews3:1 Ngoko ke, mawethu abiziweyo ayimilowo yendlu kaThixo, khanimjongisise uYesu lo simvumayo thina makholwa ukuba *ungumthunywa kaThixo kwanombingeleli wethu omkhulu." 
Hebrews3:2 Yena wathembeka kuThixo owammiselayo, kwanjengokuba noMosis wayethembekile endlwini kaThixo." 
Hebrews3:3 Kakade umakhi wendlu uzuza udumo kunendlu leyo ayakhileyo. Ngokunjalo ke noYesu uzuze udumo olungaphezulu kolukaMosis. 
Hebrews3:4 Indlu nganye inomakhi wayo, kodwa ke nguThixo umseki wazo zonke izinto." 
Hebrews3:5 Ke yena uMosis wayethembekile endlwini kaThixo iphela, esisicaka esasimela ukwalatha izinto ezaziza kutyhilwa nguThixo." 
Hebrews3:6 Kodwa ke yena uKrestu uthembeke njengonyana endlwini yakhe. Indlu leyo ke síthí, ngakumbi ukuba sibambelele singenadyudyu kwithemba lethu esinebhongo ngalo." 
Hebrews3:7 Kungoko ke noMoya oyiNgcwele atshoyo ukuthi: “Nakuliva ilizwi lakhe namhlanje," 
Hebrews3:8 sanukuba neenkani njengakwimihla yesidube-dube entlango apho namlingayo uThixo. 
Hebrews3:9 ‘Apho bandivavanyayo bandilinga ooyihlo,’ utsho uThixo, ‘nakuba yaba ngamashumi amane eminyaka beyibona imisebenzi yam." 
Hebrews3:10 Nantso into eyandicaphukisayo kweso sizukulwana, ndaza ndathi: Basoloko besona; abaziqondi iindlela zam." 
Hebrews3:11 Futhi ndada ndafunga ndinomsindo, ndathi: Abasoze bangene ekuphumleni kwam.’ ”" 
Hebrews3:12 Niyabona ke, mawethu, lumkani kungabikho bani kuni ukhohlakeleyo, ungakholwayo, ongumkreqi kuThixo ophilayo." 
Hebrews3:13 Kambe ke, ngoku kusathiwa “namhlanje,” khuthazanani yonke imihla, ukuze kungabikho mntu uqaqadekiswa ngumtsalane wesono." 
Hebrews3:14 Kaloku nathi sinobudlelane noKrestu, xa sinamathele kwada kwasekupheleni kwisivumo sethu." 
Hebrews3:15 *IziBhalo xa zisithi: “Nakuliva ilizwi lakhe namhlanje, sanukuba neenkani njengakwimihla yesidube-dube,”" 
Hebrews3:16 zibhekisa kubani? Ngoobani abo bevayo kodwa bagwilika? Kaloku ngabo babephuma eJiputa bekhokelwa nguMosis. 
Hebrews3:17 Ingoobani abo bamcaphukisayo iminyaka engamashumi amane uThixo? Ngokuqinisekileyo ngabo bonayo, abazidumbu zathi waca entlango." 
Hebrews3:18 Ngoobani abo wabafungelayo uThixo esithi abasoze bangene ekuphumleni kwakhe? Wayexela abo bamvukeláyo. 
Hebrews3:19 Siyabona ke ukuba ababanga nako ukungena kuba bengakholwa. 
Hebrews4:1 Ngoko ke lumkani, hleze abanye benu baphoswe, kuba sisemi kaloku isithembiso sokungena ekuphumleni noThixo." 
Hebrews4:2 Kaloku nathi iindaba ezimnandi sizivile, kanye njengabo. Kodwa bona olu daba alubenzelanga nto, kuba abo baluvileyo abalwamkelanga ngokholo." 
Hebrews4:3 Kambe ke thina sikholwayo, singabo bangenayo koko kuphumla kuxelwayo xa kusithiwa: “Ndithe ke ngomsindo ndafunga ndathi: ‘Abasoze bangene ekuphumleni kwam.’ ” Ke wona umsebenzi wakhe uThixo wayesele wawugqiba kwasekusekweni kwehlabathi." 
Hebrews4:4 Zixela loo nto ke iziBhalo xa zithetha ngomhla wesixhenxe zisithi: “UThixo waphumla ngomhla wesixhenxe akugqiba ukudala.” 
Hebrews4:5 Ndiyaphinda ndithi umxholo esithetha ngawo uthi: “Abasoze bangene ekuphumleni.” 
Hebrews4:6 Kucacile ke kodwa ukuba bakho bona abaya kungena. Abo babezive kuqala iindaba ezimnandi baphoswa bona kukungena ngenxa yokungakholwa kwabo. 
Hebrews4:7 UThixo ke umise omnye u-“namhlanje.” Kaloku emva kweminyaka emininzi selesebenzisa uDavide; uthi: “Namhlanje nakuliva ilizwi lakhe, nize ningabi neenkani.”" 
Hebrews4:8 Ke ukuba uYoshuwa wabafikisa ekuphumleni, ubengathini uThixo emva koko ukuthetha ngomnye umhla?" 
Hebrews4:9 Usabalindele ke ngoko abantu bakaThixo omnye umhla wokuphumla. 
Hebrews4:10 Nabani na kaloku ongenayo ekuphumleni noThixo, uyaphumla kwimicimbi yakhe, njengoko noThixo waphumlayo kweyakhe." 
Hebrews4:11 Ngoko ke masizimisele ukuya kuphumla noThixo. Makungabikho bani ungathobeliyo, hleze naye aphulukane nokuphumla njengoko baphoswayo kuko ngenxa yokungeva kwabo." 
Hebrews4:12 Ilizwi likaThixo liyaphila, liyasebenza. Libukhali ngaphezu kwekrele elibazwe macala. Lihlabanisela liye kuthi xhokro embindini, phakathi komzimba nomphefumlo, nasekudibaneni kwamathambo nomongo. Liyazihluza lizicalu-calula iingcamango neminqweno yabantu." 
Hebrews4:13 Akukho nto ifihlakeleyo kuye: yonke into imi ze phambi koThixo. Silindelwe kukwenza ingxelo kuye xa sisonke. 
Hebrews4:14 Ngoko ke, sinombingeleli omkhulu nje, uDabulamazulu, uYesu uNyana kaThixo, masibambelele nkqi kwesi sivumo sethu." 
Hebrews4:15 Kaloku owethu umbingeleli omkhulu ngosivelayo ebuthathakeni bethu, kuba walingwa ngeendlela zonke njengathi, kodwa zange one." 
Hebrews4:16 Masisondele ke ngoko singenadyudyu apho ahleli khona esihlalweni sokulawula uThixo wethu onenceba; apho sakwenzelwa khona ububele nesisa, sincedakale ngoku kuselithuba." 
Hebrews5:1 Kaloku wonke umbingeleli omkhulu ukhethwa ebantwini, amiselwe ukuzakuza phakathi kwabantu noThixo. Unikela izipho namadini okungxengxezela izono." 
Hebrews5:2 Uyakwazi ukubanyamezela abo bazizityhifili nabo baphazamayo, kuba kaloku naye ngokwakhe unobuthathaka." 
Hebrews5:3 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke umelwe kukunikela amadini okungxengxezela izono zakhe kwakunye nezabantu. 
Hebrews5:4 Akukho mntu uzithathelayo eli wonga; elowo ubizwa nguThixo njengoAron. 
Hebrews5:5 Kunjalo ke nakuKrestu: naye akazange azithathele iwonga lokuba ngumbingeleli omkhulu. Walinikwa nguThixo, lo wathi kuye: “Wena unguNyana wam; namhlanje ndikuzele.”" 
Hebrews5:6 Kwenye indawo uthi: “Wena ungumbingeleli wodidi lukaMelkizedeki, oya kuhlala ehleli.”" 
Hebrews5:7 Esadla ubomi apha emhlabeni, wayedla ngokwenza imithandazo nezicelo, ekhala iinyembezi, ebhekisa kuThixo onamandla okumhlangula ekufeni. Wawuva uThixo umthandazo wakhe, ngenxa yokuzimisela kwakhe ukuthobela." 
Hebrews5:8 Ngoku kanye anguNyana kaThixo, intlupheko yamnika amava okuthobela." 
Hebrews5:9 Uthe ke akusulungeka wenziwa umthombo wosindiso olungapheliyo lwabo bamthobelayo," 
Hebrews5:10 emiselwe nguThixo waba ngumbingeleli omkhulu wodidi lukaMelkizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Zininzi iindawo ebesinokunichazela ngazo ngoMelkizedeki. Kodwa ke kusuke kwanzima nokunithela gqabagqaba oku, kuba kaloku nisuke naneentloko ezilukhuni." 
Hebrews5:12 Benifanelwe kukuba nifundisa ngokwenu ngoku. Kodwa kusuke kwafuneka ibe nini abafundiswayo, niqaliswe emva kwizifundo zokuqala ezingeendaba zikaThixo. Kusuke kwafuneka nisezwe ubisi endaweni yokuba ninikwe ukutya okuqinileyo." 
Hebrews5:13 Wonke umntu osezwa ubisi lusana; akakwazi okuhle nokubi. 
Hebrews5:14 Ngabantu abadala abatya ukutya okuqinileyo; bona sebenamava, bayawazi umahluko phakathi kokuhle nokubi." 
Hebrews6:1 Ngoko ke masizishiye iimfundiso zabaqalayo, siqhubele phambili kwezo zamakholwa akhulileyo. Masingabi saphindela emva, sibeka iziseko zokukholwa kuThixo, nenguquko kwimisebenzi ephuthileyo esasiyenza," 
Hebrews6:2 sifundisa ngobhaptizo, nokubekwa kwezandla, ngokuvuka kwabafileyo, nomgwebo ongunaphakade." 
Hebrews6:3 Emandleni eNkosi siya kuyenza ke loo nto. 
Hebrews6:4 Abantu ababekhe balungcamla ukhanyiselo, basiva isipho sasezulwini, baba nenxaxheba kuMoya oyiNgcwele, bakuva nokulunga kwelizwi likaThixo namandla ephakade elizayo, baza ke bakreqa, kungangenkankulu ukuba babuye baguqulwe. Kaloku kwabona baphinde bamxhoma uNyana kaThixo, bamenza isigculelo nentlekisa." 
Hebrews6:5  
Hebrews6:6  
Hebrews6:7 Intsimi ezifunxayo iimvula ezinayo, ize ivelise isivuno esimkholisayo umniniyo, iyathamsanqelwa nguThixo." 
Hebrews6:8 Kanti ke esuka ivelise ukhula nameva ayinto yanto, iphuthile, ifanelwe ngumlilo." 
Hebrews6:9 Zihlobo zam ezithandekayo, nakuba ndithetha ngolu hlobo nje, ndeyisekile kukuba nikwimeko efanelekileyo elusindisweni." 
Hebrews6:10 Kaloku yena uThixo akalotshijolo: akazange awulibale umsebenzi eniwenzileyo ngenxa yakhe, nothando enilubonakalise ngokulungiselela abantu bakhe – msebenzi lowo nisawuqhubayo unangoku." 
Hebrews6:11 Umnqweno wam kukuba nonke ngabanye ninga ningaqhubela phambili, nilubonakalisa olo langazelelo, lide lizaliseke ithemba lenu." 
Hebrews6:12 Andinqweneli ukuba nibe ngamanqenerha, koko ndifuna ukuba nilinganise abo bathe ngokholo nomonde balidla ilifa lezithembiso." 
Hebrews6:13 UThixo xa wayesenza isithembiso kuAbraham wazifunga kwayena; kaloku kwakungekho bani mkhulu kunaye wayengamfungayo. 
Hebrews6:14 Wenjenje ukuthetha: “Ndiya kukunisela amathamsanqa, sande sibe yinyambalala isizukulwana sakho.”" 
Hebrews6:15 Ngenxa yomonde uAbraham wasizuza eso sithembiso. 
Hebrews6:16 Abantu xa befunga, bafunga lowo mkhulu kunabo; futhi ke isifungo siyayinqanda impikiswano." 
Hebrews6:17 NoThixo ke, xa wayefuna ukucacisela iindlalifa zesithembiso sakhe ukungaguquki kwenjongo yakhe, wasebenzisa isifungo." 
Hebrews6:18 Nâzo ke izinto ezimbini ezingenakujikwa – isifungo nesithembiso – ibe ke noThixo akanakuxoka. Ngoko ke thina basindileyo siyakhuthazwa ukuba sibambelele nkqi kweli themba liphambi kwethu. 
Hebrews6:19 Eli themba ke liyintsika yobomi bethu. Liyasikhusela, futhi lisisiqinisekiso. Lingena liye kutsho ngaphaya komkhusane," 
Hebrews6:20 apho uYesu aye kungena khona njengovulindlela omele thina. Kaloku yena ungumbingeleli wodidi lukaMelkizedeki oya kuhlala ehleli. 
Hebrews7:1 UMelkizedeki lo ke wayengukumkani waseSalem, engumbingeleli kaThixo uPhezukonke. UAbraham wathi evela edabini apho wayoyise ookumkani, wadibana noMelkizedeki owasuka wamsikelela." 
Hebrews7:2 Ke yena uAbraham wamnika isishumi sawo onke amaxhoba. Eli gama linguMelkizedeki lithetha “ukumkani wobulungisa”. Kanti ke futhi ukwangukumkani waseSalem, oko kukuthi “ukumkani woxolo”." 
Hebrews7:3 UMelkizedeki lo ke akanayise nanina, namlibo wakuzalwa. Asaziwa isiqalo nesiphelo sobomi bakhe. Ufana noNyana kaThixo: uhlala engumbingeleli nanini-nanini." 
Hebrews7:4 Kucacile ke ukuba mkhulu, kuba nokhokho wethu uAbraham wanikela isishumi samaxhoba kuye." 
Hebrews7:5 Isizukulwana sikaLevi esingababingeleli siyagunyaziswa ngumthetho ukuba sithathe isishumi ebantwini, oko kukuthi kumawabo, nangona nawo ekwayinzala ka-Abraham." 
Hebrews7:6 UMelkizedeki akayiyo inzala kaLevi, kodwa nakuba kunjalo wathatha isishumi kuAbraham, waza wamsikelela; ngoko ke wasikelela umntu owanikwa izithembiso nguThixo." 
Hebrews7:7 Yinto engenakuphikwa ke ukuba osikelelayo mkhulu kunosikelelwayo. 
Hebrews7:8 Ngokwesiko lababingeleli izishumi zithathwa ngabantu abafayo, kanti ke yena uMelkizedeki uthathe izishumi engongqinelwa *naziziBhalo ukuba ungophilayo." 
Hebrews7:9 Ngoko ke singatsho ukuthi uLevi, nakuba zinikwa yena nje izishumi, kodwa wanikela izishumi ngoAbraham." 
Hebrews7:10 Kuba kaloku wayesesesinqeni sika-Abraham, ukudibana kwabo noMelkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:11 AmaSirayeli ukunikwa kwawo umthetho wawusekelwe ngobubingeleli bakwaLevi. Ke, ukuba ababingeleli babaLevi babegqibelele, ngekungabangakho mfuneko yakuba kuvele mbingeleli wumbi, nokwenza ingumbingeleli wodidi lukaMelkizedeki, ingelulo oluka-Aron." 
Hebrews7:12 Ngoko ke ukuguqulwa kobubingeleli kuveze imfuneko yokuba uguqulwe nomthetho. 
Hebrews7:13 Kaloku uYesu, lo kuthethwa ngaye apha, uphuma kwenye indlu, apho kungekho mntu wakha walungiselela eqongeni lamadini." 
Hebrews7:14 Iyaqondakala into yokuba iNkosi yethu yeyendlu kaJuda, ibe ke uMosis akazange ayikhankanye le ndlu malunga nobubingeleli." 
Hebrews7:15 Ngoku lo mcimbi ucaca ngakumbi, kuba kuvele mbingeleli wumbi ungowodidi lukaMelkizedeki." 
Hebrews7:16 Ububingeleli akabuzuzanga ngokwemigaqo nomthetho wabantu, koko ubufumene ngamandla obomi obungayi kuze bunqanyulwe." 
Hebrews7:17 Kaloku iziBhalo zithi: “Uya kuba ngumbingeleli wodidi lukaMelkizedeki ohlala ehleli.” 
Hebrews7:18 Lowa wokuqala umthetho udedisiwe ngenxa yokuba ungenamandla, usoyiswa." 
Hebrews7:19 Umthetho kaMosis ubungakwazi kusulungekisa nto. Ngoku ke kuvezwe ithemba elingcono elisisondezayo kuThixo. 
Hebrews7:20 Ngaphezu koko, ngoku kukho nesifungo sikaThixo; ukanti akuzange kubekho sifungo ukumiselwa kwabanye ababingeleli." 
Hebrews7:21 Kodwa ke kulo mbingeleli unguYesu kwenziwa isifungo, njengoko zisithi iziBhalo: “Ifungile iNkosi, futhi ayiyi kujika: ‘Ungumbingeleli ngonaphakade.’ ”" 
Hebrews7:22 Ngoko ke uYesu usisiqinisekiso somnqophiso ongcono. 
Hebrews7:23 Ababingeleli bokuqala bona babemiselwa balandelelane, kuba kaloku babesifa, bengenako ukuhlala behleli emsebenzini wabo." 
Hebrews7:24 Kodwa bona obukaYesu ububingeleli abupheli, kuba yena uhlala ehleli ngonaphakade." 
Hebrews7:25 Esi sisizathu esibangela ukuba abe nako ukubasindisa ngokupheleleyo abo beza ngaye kuThixo, njengoko ehlala ehleli ebathethelela." 
Hebrews7:26 Ngoko ke uYesu ngoyena mbingeleli mkhulu ukwaziyo ukuhlangabezana nemeko yethu. Ungcwele, akanasici, enyulu; futhi wahlukanisiwe naboni, wanyuselwa ezulwini." 
Hebrews7:27 Yena akafani nabanye ababingeleli. Akukho mfuneko yakuba asondeze amadini mihla le, ngenxa yezono zakhe nangenxa yezono zabantu. Wasondeza idini kwaba kanye qwaba, ukuzinikela kwakhe." 
Hebrews7:28 Umthetho kaMosis wona umisela abantu ababuthathaka ukuba babe ngababingeleli abakhulu. Kodwa sona isithembiso sikaThixo esinesifungo – eso sifike emva komthetho – simisele uNyana ohlala esulungekile nanini nanini. 
Hebrews8:1 Nguwo lo ke umongo wentetho yam: Sinongako ke ukuba mkhulu umbingeleli, ohleli ewongeni kunye neNgangalala yezulu!" 
Hebrews8:2 Ungena kweyona ingcwele indawo, intente eyakhiwe nguThixo, ingengabo abantu." 
Hebrews8:3 Wonke umbingeleli omkhulu umiselwe ukunikela izipho namadini. Nalo wethu umbingeleli umelwe kukuba nento ayinikelayo. 
Hebrews8:4 Ukuba ubelapha emhlabeni, ubengayi kuba ngumbingeleli konke. Kaloku apha bakho ababingeleli abanikela izipho ngokumiselwa ngumthetho kaMosis." 
Hebrews8:5 Phofu bona into abayenzayo ingumfuziselo nesithunzi nje sento yokwenene esezulwini. Wayexela loo nto uThixo ngamazwi awawabhekisa kuMosis, xa wayeza kwenza intente: “Qaphela ukuba yonke into uyenze ngokomzekelo owawuwuboniswe entabeni.”" 
Hebrews8:6 Ke yena uYesu unikwe ububingeleli obuphakamileyo kunobabo. Kanti ke nomnqophiso awuzakuzelayo phakathi koThixo nabantu ukwamkhulu, ngenxa yokubaluleka kwezithembiso osekelwe phezu kwazo." 
Hebrews8:7 Ukuba ubungenagxeke umnqophiso wokuqala, bekungayi kubakho mfuneko yokuba ithathwe ngomnye indawo yawo." 
Hebrews8:8 Kodwa ke uThixo uyabagxeka; uthi: “ ‘Kuza imihla,’ itsho iNkosi, ‘apho ndiya kwenza umnqophiso omtsha namaSirayeli kunye nabantu bakwaJuda." 
Hebrews8:9 Ngumnqophiso ongayi kufana nondawenzela ooyise-mkhulu, mhla ndabakhokela ndibakhupha eJiputa. Bayidela imimiselo yomnqophiso, nam ke ndabafulathela,’ itsho iNkosi." 
Hebrews8:10 ‘Nguwo lo ke umnqophiso endiya kuwenza namaSirayeli kwimihla ezayo,’ itsho iNkosi: ‘Ndoyifaka ezingqondweni zabo imiyalelo yam, ndiyishicilele ezintliziyweni zabo, ndibe nguThixo wabo, bona babe ngabantu bam." 
Hebrews8:11 Abayi kuba safundisana ngam elowo umntakwabo, elowo ummelwane wakhe, besithi: “Yazini iNkosi;” kuba bonke baya kundazi ukususela koyena mncinane kuse koyena mkhulu." 
Hebrews8:12 Ndiya kubenzela inceba kwizikreqo zabo, ndingabi sazikhumbula iziphoso zabo.’ ”" 
Hebrews8:13 Xa ke uThixo ethetha ngomnqophiso omtsha, loo nto ithetha ukuba uthi umnqophiso wokuqala ugugile, seluphelelwe, uza kutshitsha kwakamsinya." 
Hebrews9:1 Umnqophiso wokuqala wawunemimiselo eyayenzelwe unqulo. Wawunaso nesicamagushelo esasenziwe ngabantu. 
Hebrews9:2 Kaloku kwakukho intente eyenziweyo; igumbi layo lokuqala kwakusithiwa yindawo engcwele. Kulo kwakukho indawo yokubeka isibane, kukho netafile, kunye nesonka esinikelwe kuThixo." 
Hebrews9:3 Emva komkhusane wesibini kwakukho elinye igumbi. Le ndawo yona kwakusithiwa yeyona ndawo ingcwele. 
Hebrews9:4 Apho kwakukho iqonga legolide, elaliyindawo yesiqhumiso. Kwakukho netyesi yomnqophiso eyayiqatywe ngegolide. Ngaphakathi kuyo kwakukho isitya segolide esasiphethe *imana, kukho nenduku ka-Aron eyakha yantshula amagqabi, kukwakho namacwecwe omnqophiso." 
Hebrews9:5 Ngaphezu kwaloo tyesi kwakundanda imifanekiso *yezithunywa ezimaphiko ezibonakalisa isithozela nendili kaThixo, ithe naa amaphiko ngaphezu kwendawo yokucamagushela. Andizi kunika ncukacha ke ngalo mba." 
Hebrews9:6 Ngokwale nkqubo, ababingeleli babesoloko bengena kwelokuqala igumbi, baqhube khona iinkonzo zabo." 
Hebrews9:7 Kodwa kwelesibini igumbi kwakungena umbingeleli omkhulu kuphela, kanye ngonyaka. Naye kwakufuneka ephethe igazi aza kungxengxezela ngalo izono zakhe kwakunye nezo abantu bazenze bengaqondi ukuba bayona." 
Hebrews9:8 UMoya oyiNgcwele ubonisa ngokucacileyo ukuba ngale nkqubo, xa kusekho igumbi lokuqala, ayikatyhilwa indlela eya kweyona ingcwele indawo." 
Hebrews9:9 Yonke le nquleqhu yayingumfuziselo nje wala maxesha sikuwo. Loo minikelo naloo madini amiselweyo akanako ukuyenza ifezeke intliziyo yomnquli. 
Hebrews9:10 Ngamatile-tile nje lawo aphathelele kwizinto ezityiwayo neziselwayo, nentlambuluko yangaphandle – yimimiselo nje ekhoyo kude kufike ixesha lenguqulelo entsha." 
Hebrews9:11 Kodwa selefikile ngoku uKrestu, umbingeleli omkhulu wezinto ezintle ezikhoyo. Intente angena kuyo yena inkulu, iyayigqwesa eyomnqophiso wokuqala. Yona ayenziwanga mntu. Ndithetha ukuthi asiyiyo yeli hlabathi lidaliweyo." 
Hebrews9:12 Igazi ledini asililo leebhokwe namathole, ligazi lakhe buqu. Kungoko ke wangenayo kwaba kanye kuphela kweyona ingcwele indawo, wasizuzela inkululeko yamaxesha onke." 
Hebrews9:13 Ukuba kaloku kwakusenzeka ukuba abantu bahlanjululwe izisihla ngokutshizwa ngegazi leebhokhwe neleenkomo nangothuthu lwethokazi," 
Hebrews9:14 ingakanani ke yona inkululeko esiyifumana ngegazi likaKrestu? Yena wazinikela kuThixo emsulwa, ngoMoya ongunaphakade, wazenza idini. Ligazi lakhe eliya kuzihlambulula ezethu izazela emisebenzini efileyo, lisenze sikulungele ukukhonza uThixo ophilayo." 
Hebrews9:15 Ngoko ke yena uKrestu ungunozakuzaku womnqophiso omtsha, ukuze abantu ababiziweyo nguThixo balizuze ilifa laphakade ababelithenjisiwe. Kaloku ngokufa kwakhe uzicimile izono ababezenzile ngexesha lomnqophiso wokuqala." 
Hebrews9:16 Ke, apho kukho umyolelo kufuneka icace into yokuba umyoleli ufile." 
Hebrews9:17 Kaloku umyolelo awusebenzi xa esaphila umyoleli; kuphela usebenza akuba efile. 
Hebrews9:18 Seso sizathu ke esabangela ukuba nowokuqala umnqophiso usungulwe ngegazi. 
Hebrews9:19 UMosis waqala wabavakalisela abantu yonke imiyalelo njengoko ibhaliwe *emthethweni. Kamva ke walithatha igazi lamankonyana neleebhokhwe kunye namanzi, waza wathatha uboya obubomvu nobulawu, wayifefa ngegazi incwadi yomthetho ndawonye nabo bonke abantu," 
Hebrews9:20 esithi: “Eli ligazi lomnqophiso aniwisele wona uThixo.” 
Hebrews9:21 Kwangokunjalo wayifefa intente ababekhonzela kuyo, nazo zonke izitya ezazisetyenziswa kuyo." 
Hebrews9:22 Ewe, ngokomthetho phantse yonke into ihlanjululwa ngegazi; ngaphandle kokuphalala kwegazi akukho ukuxolelwa kwezono." 
Hebrews9:23 Ngoko ke ezi zinto zahlanjululwa ngolu hlobo. Kaloku zona ziyimifanekiso yezinto zokwenene ezisezulwini. Kodwa ke zona ezo zisezulwini zihlanjululwa ngamadini angcono. 
Hebrews9:24 Kaloku uKrestu le ndawo ingcwele angene kuyo ayenziwanga ngumntu, futhi ayingomfanekiso; koko ungene ezulwini phakathi. Ngoku umi khona phambi koThixo; uyasithethelela." 
Hebrews9:25 Yena akaphinda-phindi ukuzinikela njengombingeleli omkhulu ongena endaweni engcwele minyaka le negazi elingelilo nelakhe. 
Hebrews9:26 Kaloku ukuba bekungenjalo ubunzima nge-ebuve kaninzi, kususela ekusekweni kwehlabathi. Kodwa endaweni yaloo nto ungene kwaba kanye qwaba, ekusongweni kwamaxesha, ukuze isono asisuse ngedini elinguye buqu." 
Hebrews9:27 Umntu ngamnye ufa kube kanye, emva koko agwetywe." 
Hebrews9:28 Ngokunjalo ke noKrestu wanikelwa kwaba kanye ukuze athwale izono zabaninzi. Okwesibini uya kufika engenanto yakwenza nesono, koko eze kusindisa abo bamlindeleyo." 
Hebrews10:1 Kaloku wona umthetho ngumazi wendlela ungayihambi; uzoba umfanekiso nje wezinto zokwenene ezizayo. Ngamadini awo aphindwa-phindwa minyaka le awukwazi ukubenza bafaneleke abo banqulayo. 
Hebrews10:2 Ukuba ubukwazi, amadini lawo ngekukudala ayekwa. Kaloku abo banqulayo ngebehlanjululwe kwaba kanye qha, baba nyulu, saphela nesazela ngesono." 
Hebrews10:3 Kodwa, ndaweni yaloo nto, la madini abakhumbuza ngezono minyaka le." 
Hebrews10:4 Kaloku igazi leenkunzi zeenkomo, neleebhokwe, alisoze lizisuse izono." 
Hebrews10:5 UKrestu uthethe ngolu hlobo xa eza emhlabeni: “Wena akuwafuni amadini neminikelo, yiyo loo nto undilungiselele umzimba." 
Hebrews10:6 Akuwathandanga amadini atshiswayo nawesono; 
Hebrews10:7 ndaza ndathi ke mna, njengoko kubhaliwe encwadini: ‘Ndiyeza ukuze ndenze intando yakho, Thixo wam.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:8 Qaphela ke kuba uqala ngokuthi: “Wena akuwafuni amadini neminikelo; namadini atshiswayo nawesono akuwathandi,” nakuba egunyaziswa ngumthetho." 
Hebrews10:9 Kwakhona uthi: “Ndiyeza ukuze ndenze intando yakho.” Ngoko ke uThixo uyayitshitshisa le nkqubo yokuqala, umilisela le yesibini." 
Hebrews10:10 Yile ntando kaThixo ke esenza nyulu; kaloku uYesu Krestu yena uzinikele kwaba kanye qwaba. 
Hebrews10:11 Wonke umbingeleli uma mihla le ephinda-phinda enikela amadini angenako ukuzisusa izono. 
Hebrews10:12 Kodwa uKrestu yena wenze umnikelo wamnye qha ngenxa yezono, waza waya kuhlala kwiwonga alinikwe nguThixo." 
Hebrews10:13 Ngoku ke ulinde khona ukuba ade uThixo amoyisele iintshaba zakhe. 
Hebrews10:14 Kaloku yena ubenze bahlala besulungekile ngomnikelo omnye qha abo banyuliweyo. 
Hebrews10:15 UMoya oyiNgcwele ungqina athi kuqala: 
Hebrews10:16 “ ‘Nangu umnqophiso endiya kuwenza nabo emva kwaloo mihla,’ itsho iNkosi: ‘Ndiya kuyifaka ezintliziyweni zabo imithetho yam, ndiyishicilele ezingqondweni zabo imiyalelo yam.’ ”" 
Hebrews10:17 “Uphinda athi: “Izono zabo, ngokunjalo nenkohlakalo yabo, ndiya kuyilibala.”" 
Hebrews10:18 Zakuba zixolelwe ke izono akusafuneki minikelo ngenxa yazo. 
Hebrews10:19 Ngoko ke, mawethu, igazi likaYesu lisikhulule ukuze singene kweyona ndawo ingcwele singenaloyiko." 
Hebrews10:20 Le ndlela asivulele yona intsha, futhi iyaphila, ihamba iphumele ngaphaya kwekhuselo, ndithetha umzimba wakhe." 
Hebrews10:21 Ngaphezu koko ke sinombingeleli omkhulu owongamele indlu kaThixo. 
Hebrews10:22 Ngoko ke masisondele sinyanisekile kuThixo, siqinisekile ngokholo, izazela zethu ezinobutyala zihlanjululwe, ngokunjalo nemizimba yethu ihlanjwe ngamanzi amsulwa." 
Hebrews10:23 Masithi nca kwisivumo seli themba sinalo; kaloku unyanisekile lowo usithembisileyo. 
Hebrews10:24 Ngoko ke masikhathalelane, sivuselelane uthando, ngokunjalo nokwenza imisebenzi emihle." 
Hebrews10:25 Kananjalo masikuxabise ukudibana namanye amakholwa, siphefumlelane, singabi njengâbo bawutyeshelayo lo mkhwa. Ewe, masikhuthazane ngakumbi nangakumbi, kuba nani niyabona ukuba imini leyo iyasondela." 
Hebrews10:26 Kaloku xa singayeki ukona ngabom nangoku sesiyazi inyaniso, akusekho dini lingázisusayo izono zethu." 
Hebrews10:27 Into elindelekileyo ngumgwebo orhwaqelisayo nomlilo olenyayo oza kutshabalalisa abo bamchasayo uThixo. 
Hebrews10:28 Umntu owaphule umthetho kaMosis akenzelwa nceba, koko uyabulawa, akuba egwetywe ngobungqina babantu ababini okanye abathathu." 
Hebrews10:29 Ke, nicinga ukuba wothiwani umntu odela uNyana kaThixo, umntu olenza into engento igazi lomnqophiso ahlanjwe lilo? Ewe, lowo ungcikiva uMoya wesisa! Ngokuqinisekileyo umntu onjalo ufanelwe sisohlwayo esingqongqo." 
Hebrews10:30 Kaloku siyamazi lowo wathi: “Impindezelo yeyam; ndim oya kubuyekeza.” Kwakhona uphinda athi: “INkosi iya kubagweba abantu bayo.” 
Hebrews10:31 Kambe ke yinto eyoyikekayo ukugwetywa nguThixo ophilayo! 
Hebrews10:32 Ngoko ke yikhumbuleni imihla eyadlulayo. Kaloku nathi nakuvelelwa ngumsobomvu kaThixo nangena ebunzimeni obukhulu, phofu ke nalapho nazabalaza kwâkuko." 
Hebrews10:33 Nanidla ngokuba sesichengeni sengcikivo nokungcungcutheka, kanti nanide nizimisele ukuzibandakanya nâbo babephethwe kakubi." 
Hebrews10:34 Ewe kaloku, navelana nabo abo babesentolongweni; naloo nto yokohluthwa impahla yenu nayamkela ngovuyo, kuba nisazi ukuba nina ninento ebhetele eya kuhlala ihleli." 
Hebrews10:35 Ngoko ke sanukutyhafa, kuba nilindelwe ngumvuzo omkhulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Kaloku kufuneka nibe nomonde, ukuze niphumelele ukwenza ukuthanda kukaThixo, nisizuze nesithembiso sakhe." 
Hebrews10:37 Kaloku zithi *iziBhalo: “Kusasele umzuzwana nje aze lowo uzayo afike, angalibazisi." 
Hebrews10:38 Kambe ke yena olungisayo uya kuphila ngokholo; kodwa ke ukuba uthe warhoxa, andiyi kumkhathalela.”" 
Hebrews10:39 Phofu ke thina asingabo abo barhoxayo baze balahleke, koko singabo baya kudla ubomi kuba bethembele kuThixo." 
Hebrews11:1 Ukukholwa ke kukuqiniseka ngezinto esinethemba lazo; kukwakukuqiniseka nangobukho bezinto esingaziboniyo. 
Hebrews11:2 Abantu bamandulo bagqwesa ngenxa yokuthembela kwabo kuThixo. 
Hebrews11:3 Ngokholo siyaqonda ukuba indalo yavela ngelizwi likaThixo, zaza izinto ezibonakalayo zabakho kungekho nto ibonakalayo adala ngayo." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngokholo lagqwesa kuThixo elika-Abheli idini kunelikaKayin. Ngokholo uAbheli wamkelwa nguThixo waba lilungisa, kuba uThixo ngokwakhe wakholiswa ngumnikelo wakhe. Ngako ukukholwa kwakhe ke, naxa afileyo nje uAbheli, usathetha." 
Hebrews11:5 Ngokholo uInoki wathwetyulwa engakhange afe. *IziBhalo zithi: “Akazange aziwe bani apho akhoyo, kuba wayethathwe nguThixo.” Futhi ziyangqina iziBhalo ukuba uInoki wamkholisa uThixo ngaphambi kokuba athathwe." 
Hebrews11:6 Lungekho ke ukholo akukho ukumkholisa uThixo. Kaloku wonke ubani ozayo kuye kufuneka akholwe ukuba ukho uThixo, yaye uyabavuza abo bamlangazelelayo." 
Hebrews11:7 Ngokholo uNowa, xa wayexelelwa nguThixo ngezinto ezaziza kuhla, waphulaphula wakha inqanawa, walusindisa usapho lwakhe. Ngokholo lwakhe wabudandalazisa ubugwenxa behlabathi, waza wenziwa ilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yokuthembela kwakhe kuye." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngokholo uAbraham walusabela ubizo lokuya kuma kwilizwe elalithenjiswe nguThixo kuye nakwinzala yakhe. Walishiya elakowabo, engazi nokuba makabheke ngaphi na." 
Hebrews11:9 Ngokholo wahlala engumphambukeli kwilizwe lesithembiso. Wayehlala ezintenteni. Benjenjalo nooIsake noYakobi abakwaziindlamafa zeso sithembiso. 
Hebrews11:10 Kaloku wayenxubile elindele elo lizwe liziseko zingagungqiyo, lakhiwe nguThixo." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngokholo nkqu noSara owayengazali, naxa wayeselegugile nje, wafumana amandla, wakhawula, kuba wathemba ukuba uThixo lo uthembisileyo wosigcina isithembiso sakhe." 
Hebrews11:12 Yiyo ke loo nto kuthe kwindoda enye, naxa yayiselifana nofileyo nje kukwaluphala, kwavela inzala ebuninzi bungangeenkwenkwezi, ingenakubalwa okwentlabathi elunxwemeni lolwandle." 
Hebrews11:13 Bonke aba bantu bafa benokholo. Babengekazixhamli iziqhamo zesithembiso. Kodwa naxa zazikude babezibona, bezilangazelela, bevuma ukuba bona baziindwendwe nje ezidlulayo kweli lizwe." 
Hebrews11:14 Abantu abenjenje ukuthetha kucace mhlophe ukuba bafuna elakowabo," 
Hebrews11:15 bengalikhumbuli ilizwe abalishiyileyo. Kaloku ngebabebuyele ukuba kwakunjalo. 
Hebrews11:16 Koko sibabona benxubele ilizwe elihle – izulu. Yiyo ke loo nto angenazintloni uThixo xa kuthiwa unguThixo wabo; kaloku ubalungiselele isixeko. 
Hebrews11:17 Ngokholo uAbraham wamnikela uIsake akuvavanywa nguThixo. Lo Abraham zazenziwe kuye izithembiso, nguye kanye lo wayeselemnikela unyana okwakukuphela kwakhe;" 
Hebrews11:18 lo kanye kwakuthiwe ngaye: “Inzala yakho yokwaziwa ngomlibo kaIsake.” 
Hebrews11:19 Kaloku uAbraham yena wayeqonda ukuba uThixo unako ukubavusa abafileyo – ngathi ke uThixo wamvusa kwabafileyo noIsake. 
Hebrews11:20 Ngokholo uIsake walisikelela ikamva looYakobi noEsawu. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngokholo uYakobi wabasikelela bonke ngabanye, ngaphambi kokuba abhubhe, oonyana bakaJosefu. Wangqiyama ngomsimelelo wakhe, wanqula uThixo." 
Hebrews11:22 Xa wayeselukhukweni lokufa, uJosefu ngokholo wayolela ngemfuduko yamaSirayeli eJiputa, wayaleza namathambo akhe." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngokholo abazali bakaMosis bamfihla iinyanga ezintathu emva kokuba ezelwe. Kaloku wayelusana oluthandekayo, baza ke àbasithobela isimiselo sekumkani ngokwenza loo nto." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngokholo, akuba mdala uMosis, akazange avume ukuba kuthiwe ungunyana wentombi yokumkani waseJiputa." 
Hebrews11:25 Wakhetha ukuhlupheka kunye nabantu bakaThixo kunokuba axhamle isono nokuba ngumzuzwana nje. 
Hebrews11:26 Ingcikivo kaKrestu wayithatha njengento ebaluleke ngaphezu kwabo bonke ubutyebi baseJiputa, kuba wayenethemba lomvuzo ozayo." 
Hebrews11:27 Ngokholo uMosis wayishiya iJiputa, phofu kungengakuba wayesoyika umsindo wekumkani. Wayefunzele phambili ngokungathi wayembona uThixo ongabonwayo." 
Hebrews11:28 Ngokholo wamisela isidlo *sePasika. Wayalela ukuba makutshizwe imigubasi ngegazi, khon' ukuze isithunywa sokufa singawatshabalalisi amazibulo amaSirayeli." 
Hebrews11:29 Ngokholo amaSirayeli aluwela uLwandle oluBomvu ngokungathi ahamba emhlabeni owomileyo, kodwa wona amaJiputa eyela akuwalinganisa." 
Hebrews11:30 Lukholo olwadiliza iindonga zeJeriko, akuba amaSirayeli ezijikeleze iintsuku zasixhenxe." 
Hebrews11:31 Lukholo olwasindisa ihenyukazi uRahabhi ekutshabalaleni kunye nabo bangamthobeliyo uThixo, kuba lona lazamkela ngobubele iintlola." 
Hebrews11:32 Ndibalisa ntoni na? Lingaphela tu ixesha ndithetha ngoGidiyon, noBharaki, noSamson, uJafta, noDavide, uSamweli, *nabashumayeli bamandulo." 
Hebrews11:33 Ngokholo bona babhukuqa izikumkani, benza ubulungisa, bazuza izinto ezazithenjiswe nguThixo. Babevingca imilomo yeengonyama ezigqumayo," 
Hebrews11:34 bacime imililo edwanguzayo, basinde ekufeni ngekrele. Baphiwa amandla xa babengenawo. Babengamagorha emfazweni; babezichitha iintshaba zibe ziintsalu." 
Hebrews11:35 Ngokholo abafazi babebuyiselwa abafileyo babo bevuswe ekufeni. Abanye bâla ukukhululwa, bafa ngokungxwelerhwa, khon' ukuze bavukele kobona bomi." 
Hebrews11:36 Bambi babesenziwa intlekisa, bekatswa, bekhonkxwa ngamatyathanga, bevalelwa entolongweni." 
Hebrews11:37 Babekhandwa ngamatye, besarhwa kubini, bebulawa ngekrele. Babehamba benxibe iimfele zeegusha nezikhumba zeebhokhwe, beswele, betshutshiswa, bephethwe gadalala." 
Hebrews11:38 Babengafanelanga ukuhlala kweli hlabathi linje, ngenxa yokulunga kwabo. Babezizibhadu-bhadu ezazihamba zihlala koozintlango nasezintabeni, koomiqolomba nasemingxunyeni phantsi komhlaba." 
Hebrews11:39 Bayakhunjulwa bonke ngabanye aba, ngenxa yokugqwesa kokholo lwabo. Kambe ke abazizuzanga izinto ezathenjiswayo nguThixo," 
Hebrews11:40 kuba kaloku uThixo ube nacebo limbi lilungileyo: uthande ukuba bangazixhamli izithembiso zakhe ngaphandle kwethu. 
Hebrews12:1 Ngoko ke, thina siphahlwe ngamangqina amaninzi kangaka nje, masiyilahle ke yonke into enokusibambezela, ingakumbi isono, kuba sona siyarhintyela. Masingene kolu gqatso luphambi kwethu sizimisele." 
Hebrews12:2 Amehlo ethu makathi ntsho kuYesu; kaloku síxhomekeke kuye isiqalo ndawonye nekamva lokholo lwethu. Ewe kaloku, yena wathi, ngenxa yenyhweba eyayimlindele, wawunyamezela umnqamlezo, walidela nehlazo lawo; kungokunje uhleli ewongeni kwibhotwe likaThixo." 
Hebrews12:3 Ngenene mkhumbuleni yena, kuba wamelana nayo yonke inkcaso yaboni. Xa nisenjenjalo ke niya kukhuthala ningatyhafi." 
Hebrews12:4 Kuba kaloku kulo mzabalazo wokulwa isono anikazingisi kude kuphalale igazi. 
Hebrews12:5 Ngaba seniyilibele na indlela anikhuthaza ngayo uThixo ngokoonyana, esithi: “Nyana wam, sukuyidela ingqeqesho yeNkosi; futhi sukutyhafa yakukululeka." 
Hebrews12:6 Kuba iNkosi iyabaqeqesha abo ibathandayo, ize imohlwaye unyana owamkelekileyo kuyo.”" 
Hebrews12:7 Bunyamezeleni ubunzima, kuba yingqeqesho. Kaloku uThixo uniphethe njengoonyana bakhe. Nakha nambona phi unyana ongaqeqeshwayo nguYise?" 
Hebrews12:8 Ukuba ngaba aniqeqeshwa njengabo bonke oonyana, loo nto iya kuthetha ukuba aningabo oonyana ngenene, koko niyimigqakhwe." 
Hebrews12:9 Kaloku besifudula sinabo ootata apha emhlabeni, besiqeqesha, kodwa sibahlonipha. Kuyimfuneko ngakumbi ke ukuba simhloniphe ngentobeko lowo ungutata wethu ngokoMoya, khon' ukuze siphile." 
Hebrews12:10 Ootata bethu bona babesiqeqesha kangangoko, kodwa lilifutshane ixesha labo. Kambe ke yena uThixo, esiqeqesha nje, usilungiselela ukuba sibuxhamle ubungcwele bakhe." 
Hebrews12:11 Kambe ke, xa sisephantsi kwayo, ingqeqesho ayivakali iluyolo, koko ibuhlungu; kodwa ke abo bayinyamezelayo baba nobomi obusulungekileyo obuyondeleleneyo." 
Hebrews12:12 Ngoko ke dlamkani, zihlaziyeke iingalo ezinomkhinkqi namadolo anengevane." 
Hebrews12:13 Imizila yendlela yenu mayingabi goso, ukuze oqhwalelayo angenzakali, koko anyangeke." 
Hebrews12:14 Hlalani ngoxolo nabo bonke abantu. Yibani nyulu, kuba ngaphandle kobunyulu akukho mntu uya kuyibona iNkosi." 
Hebrews12:15 Lumkani kungabikho mntu uphulukana nalo ubabalo lukaThixo. Makungakhuli ngcambu yabubi inokuthi ibe yityhefu kwabaninzi. 
Hebrews12:16 Lumkani kungathi kanti kukho umntu olihilihili, okanye ophandl' apha njengoEsawu. Kaloku yena waphulukana nobuzibulo bakhe ngenxa yokutya." 
Hebrews12:17 Kananjalo niyazi ukuba kamva wathi efuna ukuyibanga intsikelelo akamkeleka. Ewe, wayeyifuna nangeenyembezi, kodwa akayizuzanga, kuba akazange alifumane ithuba lokuguquka." 
Hebrews12:18 Kambe nina anijongananga nanto iphathekayo njengamaSirayeli entabeni yeSinayi, eyayidangazela umlilo, inobumnyama obuzala isithokothoko, inoqhwithela," 
Hebrews12:19 nenzwinini yexilongo, nokuzongoma kwelizwi elabatsho bonke abalivayo bathi makungabi saphindwa kuthethwe nabo." 
Hebrews12:20 Kaloku barhwaqeliswa ngumyalelo othi: “Nesilwanyana esithe sasondela apho entabeni masikhandwe ngamatye sife.” 
Hebrews12:21 Lo mbono wawusoyikeka kangangokuba uMosis wavakala esithi: “Andoyiki ndiyagubha!” 
Hebrews12:22 Hayi kaloku, nina niphambi kwentaba iZiyon, nomzi kaThixo ophilayo, iJerusalem yaphezulu enamawaka-waka ezithunywa zezulu. Nifikile kwitheko" 
Hebrews12:23 leenginginya yeendlalifa zikaThixo ezingabemi baphezulu. Ewe, niphambi koThixo ongumgwebi wabo bonke, naphambi koomoya bamalungisa asulungekileyo." 
Hebrews12:24 Nifikile kuYesu unozakuzaku womnqophiso omtsha. Ukuchitheka kwelakhe igazi kusiphathele izinto ezinkulu kunelika-Abheli. 
Hebrews12:25 Ngoko ke sanukuba neenkani: phulaphulani xa athethayo. Abo babeneenkani, bangazange baliphulaphule ilizwi elalibalumkisa emhlabeni, abasindanga esohlwayweni. Ngokungakumbi ke nathi asiyi kusinda ukuba sineenkani, asiliphulaphuli ilizwi lalowo usilumkisayo ezulwini." 
Hebrews12:26 Kambe ke ngelo xesha ilizwi lakhe lawugungqisa umhlaba, kodwa ngoku uthembise wathi: “Ndiya kuphinda, phofu ndingagungqisi umhlaba wodwa, koko nezulu ngenkqu.”" 
Hebrews12:27 La mazwi athi “ndiya kuphinda” acacisa mhlophe ukuba izinto ezidaliweyo ziya kugungqiswa zisuswe, zize zithi izinto ezingagungqiyo zisale." 
Hebrews12:28 Ngoko ke masitsho ngongazenzisiyo umbulelo kuThixo, kuba kaloku siphantsi kombuso ongagungqiyo. Masidomboze simnqule ngendlela eya kumkholisa uThixo, simhlonela sinoloyiko." 
Hebrews12:29 Kaloku uThixo wethu ngumlilo olenyayo. 
Hebrews13:1 Hlalani nithandana okwabantu abazalanayo. 
Hebrews13:2 Zenzeleni ububele emakhaya iindwendwe. Ngokwenjenjalo abanye abantu kwathi kanti babuka izithunywa zezulu bengaqondi. 
Hebrews13:3 Wacingeni amabanjwa njengokungathi nani nibanjwe kunye nawo. Bacingeni nabo baphethwe kakubi ngokungathi nini abo banjalo. 
Hebrews13:4 Umtshato uxabisekile; mawuxatyiswe nguye wonke ubani. Amadoda nabafazi mabanyaniseke omnye komnye, bangasixabheli isilili sabo. Ingqumbo kaThixo ijinga phezu kwabo bakrexezayo kwakunye nabo barheletyayo." 
Hebrews13:5 Musani ukuba ngamathandamali. Yanelani yinto eninayo. Kaloku uThixo uthi: “Andiyi kukuyekela; ndingayi kukufulathela.” 
Hebrews13:6 Masitsho singenadyudyu ke sithi: “YiNkosi umncedi wam, andiyi koyika nto! Angandenza ntoni umntu?”" 
Hebrews13:7 Khumbulani iinkokheli zenu zamandulo, ezanixelela ngodaba lukaThixo. Cingani ngobomi bazo nempumelelo yemigudu yazo, nilinganise ukholo lwazo." 
Hebrews13:8 UYesu Krestu lo wayizolo, usekwanguye nanamhla, nangomso, nanini nanini." 
Hebrews13:9 Nize ningakhukuliswa enyanisweni ziimfundiso ezingabhadlanga. Kulungile ukuba somelezwe lubabalo lukaThixo, yaye imithetho ngezinto emazityiwe nemazingatyiwa ayincedi nto, ayizange ibancede nabo bayigcinayo." 
Hebrews13:10 Elethu iqonga lamadini linjengeliya ababingeleli bonqulo lwamaSirayeli babengenalungelo lakutya kulo. 
Hebrews13:11 Njengoko nisazi, umbingeleli omkhulu ubengena negazi leenkomo neleebhokhwe kweyona ingcwele indawo, aze angxengxezele izono ngelo gazi. Kodwa inyama yazo yona ibitshiselwa ngaphandle." 
Hebrews13:12 UYesu ke naye wafela ngaphandle kwamasango edolophu, khon' ukuze abangcwalise abantu ngegazi lakhe." 
Hebrews13:13 Nathi ke ngoko masiye kuye ngaphandle, silixhamle ihlazo lakhe." 
Hebrews13:14 Kaloku apha asinakhaya lisisigxina, koko sinxubele elizayo." 
Hebrews13:15 Ngawo onke amaxesha masenze umbongo kuThixo, ube lidini esilinikela kuye ngoYesu, silivuma ngomlomo wethu igama lakhe." 
Hebrews13:16 Masingaze siyeke ukwenzelana ububele, kuba leyo yeyona minikelo imkholisayo uThixo." 
Hebrews13:17 Zithobeleni iinkokheli zenu, nizihloniphe, kuba azilali lixhala ngenxa yenu. Kaloku kufuneka zenze ingxelo yomsebenzi wazo kuThixo. Ke ukuba niyazihlonela, woba khaphukhaphu umsebenzi wazo. Kanti ungaba nzima, ningancedeki nani, ukuba anizihloneli." 
Hebrews13:18 Nam ndithandazeleni. Ndiqinisekile ukuba mna andinasazela nganto; kaloku ndisoloko ndinqwenela ukwenza okulungileyo maxa onke. 
Hebrews13:19 Nditsho ngenene ukuba ze nindithandazele, ukuze uThixo andibuyisele kuni kamsinyane." 
Hebrews13:20 UThixo onika uxolo, owayivusa ekufeni iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, waba nguyena malusi womhlambi," 
Hebrews13:21 ngokuphalala kwegazi lomnqophiso ongasoze utshitshe, wanga anganomeleza ekwenzeni okulungileyo, khon' ukuze niyifeze intando yakhe. Wanga angasenza loo nto athanda ukuba sibe yiyo ngoYesu Krestu. Makadunyiswe uYesu Krestu ngonaphakade kanaphakade! *Amen." 
Hebrews13:22 Mawethu, ze niwanyamezele la mazwi enkuthazo. Kambe yileta emfutshane nje le." 
Hebrews13:23 Umhlobo wethu uTimoti ukhululwe entolongweni. Ndiza kuza naye apho ukuba ukhawuleze wafika. 
Hebrews13:24 Umbuliso kwiinkokheli zenu, nakulo lonke usapho lukaThixo. Amakholwa aseItali ayabulisa." 
Hebrews13:25 Wanga uThixo anganenzela isisa nonke. 
James1:1 Kubhala mna Yakobi, isicaka sikaThixo neNkosi uYesu Krestu. Ndibulisa bonke abantu bakaThixo abathe saa kulo lonke elimiweyo." 
James1:2 Mawethu, zithatheni njengabantu abanethamsanqa, xa nifikelwa zizilingo ngezilingo." 
James1:3 Kaloku isiqhamo sokumelana nezilingo ngokholo lunyamezelo. 
James1:4 Kona ke ukunyamezela kuzala isimilo esicikidekileyo, nesingalambathi nganto." 
James1:5 Ke ukuba kukho bani uswele ubulumko, makabucele kuThixo. UThixo onobubele nesisa kubo bonke abantu, womnika." 
James1:6 Kodwa ke loo mntu makacele ekholwa, engathandabuzi konke. Kaloku umntu othandabuzayo ufana namaza alatyuziswa ngumoya elwandle." 
James1:7 Umntu onjalo ke makangalindeli kwenzelwa nto yiNkosi. 
James1:8 Kaloku umntu ongqondo ilala neli, ivuke neli, akaze abe nazigqibo nganto." 
James1:9 Ikholwa elihlelelekileyo malivuye lakuphakanyiswa nguThixo. 
James1:10 Nekholwa elimi kakuhle nalo malizidle lakuthotywa nguThixo. Kaloku kwanesinhanha esi sithi shwaka njengentyatyambo esendle. 
James1:11 Yona ithi lakuvela ilanga liyigqatse, ibune, kuphele nokubukeka kwayo. Nesinhanha siya kutshabalala naso ngoku kanye sisaxakeke yimicimbi yaso." 
James1:12 Unoyolo lowo uzinyamezelayo izilingo, kuba kaloku, lakudlula uvavanyo, uya kuzuza umvuzo obubomi uThixo abuthembise abo bamthandayo." 
James1:13 Makungabikho mntu uthi ulukuhlwe nguThixo xa ahendwayo. UThixo akoyiswa bububi kaloku; yaye akalingi mntu yena. 
James1:14 Isilingo sivela ngokuthi umntu alukuhlwe yiminqweno yakhe egwenxa. 
James1:15 Loo minqweno yakhe ke iyakhawula, izale isono. Isono ke sona sithi sakuba nentshebe, sizale ukufa." 
James1:16 Musan' ukuphazama, mawethu!" 
James1:17 Konke ukupha naso sonke isipho esifezekileyo sivela phezulu kuThixo, umdali wezikhanyiso zesibhakabhaka. Yena akaguqu-guquki aphinzi-phinzize." 
James1:18 Wathi akuthanda uThixo wasizala ngokutsha ngelizwi lenyaniso, saza ke saba lulibo lwayo yonke indalo yakhe." 
James1:19 Khumbulani le nto, zihlobo zam: Wonke ubani makakhawuleze ukuva; kodwa makangakhawulezi ukuthetha, angakhawulezi nokucaphuka." 
James1:20 Kaloku into umntu ayenza enomsindo ayinakwamkeleka kuThixo. 
James1:21 Yahlukanani nemikhwa emibi nehambo engcolileyo. Mlulameleni uThixo, namkele ilizwi lakhe alifake kuni ezintliziyweni. Lilo elinamandla okunisindisa." 
James1:22 Musani ukuzikhohlisa ngokuliphulaphula nje qha ilizwi likaThixo. Endaweni yaloo nto nina yenzani oko likuthethayo. 
James1:23 Lowo uliphulaphula nje kuphela elo lizwi, angenzi nto ngalo, ufana nomntu ozijonga esipilini, abubone ubuso bakhe." 
James1:24 Loo mntu uzithi krwaqu nje, ahambe, aze kwangoko azilibale ukuba unjani na." 
James1:25 Kodwa loo mntu uthi awucoselele ukuwugcina umthetho osinika inkululeko, lowo uthe rhoqo ukuhamba ngawo engaphulaphuli nje aze alibale, lowo wosikelelwa nguThixo ngokwenjenjalo." 
James1:26 Ewe, umntu angázicingela ukuba ulikholwa; kodwa uyazikhohlisa ukuba akakwazi ukulawula ulwimi lwakhe. Ingamampunge nje into yokuba ulikholwa." 
James1:27 Inkolo enyanisekileyo nengenachaphaza kuThixo uBawo yile: kukubonelela iinkedama nabahlolokazi abahluphekileyo, nokuphepha ukudyojwa lihlabathi." 
James2:1 Mawethu, njengoko nikholwa kuYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu enobungangamsha – ninomkhethe kodwa nina." 
James2:2 Nakufikelwa ziindwendwe ezimbini endlwini yenkonzo, omnye enxibe kakuhle ehombe ngamaso egolide, omnye elihlwempu edlakazela," 
James2:3 nako ke nina nitatazela nilungiselela lo mfo ulinene, nimnika nesihlalo, nithi lona idlavu malime ngeenyawo okanye lihlale phantsi emhlabeni." 
James2:4 Aniziqondi ke ukuba xa nenjenjalo nina ngenkqu nimbaxa, nilawulwa yimigaqo ephuthileyo?" 
James2:5 Mamelani apha ndinixelele, zihlobo zam. Andibi kanene uThixo amahlwempu la uwanyulele ukuba atyebe ngokholo, aze afumane isabelo kulawulo oluthenjiswa abo bamthandayo?" 
James2:6 Kodwa nina niwenza intlekisa amahlwempu! Kanene ngoobani abanicinezelayo? Asizozityebi? Andithi kanene zizo ezinirhuqela enkundleni yamatyala," 
James2:7 zize zenyelise igama likaKrestu enibizwa ngalo? 
James2:8 Kodwa ukuba niyawuthobela umthetho weNkosi *oseziBhalweni othi: “Mthande ummelwane wakho kanye ngale ndlela nawe uzithanda ngayo,” noba niyakholisa." 
James2:9 Kodwa ukuba abantu niyabacalu-calula, noba netyala; nogwetywa njengezaphula-mthetho." 
James2:10 Lowo uwugcina wonke umthetho, aze aphule umyalelo omnye, unetyala lokuwaphula wonke." 
James2:11 Kaloku isekwanguloo mwisi-mthetho mnye lo uthi: “Ungakrexezi,” kwanothi: “Ungabulali.” Nokuba na akukrexezi, usisaphula-mthetho ukuba uyabulala." 
James2:12 Intetho yenu nezenzo zenu mazibe zezabantu abalindele ukugwetywa kwangulo mthetho usikhululayo. 
James2:13 Kaloku akayi kuba nanceba uThixo xa agweba umntu ongabanga nanceba. Kodwa yona inceba iyasongamela isigwebo. 
James2:14 Mawethu, kunceda ntoni ukuba athi umntu unokholo, zibe zona izenzo zakhe zingayingqini loo nto? Lunganceda ntoni olo kholo?" 
James2:15 Nanku umwethu, nanku nodade: bobabini bayadlakazela, bayalamba." 
James2:16 Kunceda ntoni ukubasizela, nokubacebisa ngento yokwambatha nangokutya, ube ungenzi nto konke ngale meko yabo?" 
James2:17 Lunjalo ke ukholo olungaqhubeli mntu kwenzeni nto; luyinto nje efileyo. 
James2:18 Ewe, ningatsho ukuthi omnye umntu unako ukuba nokholo, kanti nomnye unako ukwenza imisebenzi ethile. Kodwa ke mna ndithi ukuphendula: Khawundibonise ukuba ngaba lufezekile na olo kholo wena uthetha ngalo lungenamisebenzi lubonakala ngayo. Mna ndokubonisa ngemisebenzi ukholo endinalo." 
James2:19 Ewe, unalo ukholo ngokwaneleyo, ngangokude ukholwe ukuba ukho uThixo, yaye mnye. Uyalungisa kanye ngaloo nto! Kodwa ke neendimoni zinalo ukholo olukwanjalo phofu; lude luzinkwantyise kunjalonje." 
James2:20 Akuqondi ke kodwa, sidengendini, ukuba ukholo olungangqinelwa zizenzo luphunzile?" 
James2:21 Akuqondi na ukuba uAbraham ubawo wenziwa waba lilungisa nguThixo ngenxa yesenzo sokunikela uIsake unyana wakhe ukuba abe lidini? 
James2:22 Akuboni ukuba ngokwenjenjalo oku wayeqhutywa lukholo? Akuqondi ukuba ngesi senzo wangqina ukunyaniseka kokholo awayenalo? 
James2:23 Esi senzo sazalisekisa amazwi *eziBhalo athi: “UAbraham wakholwa kuThixo, waza ngenxa yokholo wenziwa ilungisa.” Kwenye indawo ubizwa ngokuba ngumhlobo kaThixo." 
James2:24 Ùyaqonda ke ukuba umntu uba lilungisa ngenxa yezenzo kungekuko ngokholo lodwa? 
James2:25 Nehenyukazi uRahabhi, andithi kanene naye waba lilungisa ngenxa yesenzo sakhe sokwamkela iintlola, wazizimelisa zasaba ngandlela yimbi?" 
James2:26 Njengoko ufile umzimba xa umphefumlo uphumile, ngokunjalo nokholo olungangqinelwa zizenzo lufana nesidumbu, lufile." 
James3:1 Mawethu, musani ukugagamela nifune ukufundisa nonke. Kaloku niyazi ukuba thina sifundisayo siya kugwetywa ngqongqo kunabanye." 
James3:2 Sonke ngabanye siyayenza impazamo amaxesha ngamaxesha. Ke yena umntu ongaphazamiyo ekuthetheni ugqibelele, uyakwazi ukuzilawula ngokupheleleyo." 
James3:3 Kaloku ihashe silifaka umkhala, ukuze lisilulamele, sikwazi ukulilawula ngokupheleleyo." 
James3:4 Okanye khanicinge ngenqanawa, inkulu injalo, noba ngade ityhalwe yimimoya emikhulu, kodwa ilawulwa ngentongana nje encinci, ize iye apho athanda ukuba iye khona umqhubi." 
James3:5 Lukwanjalo ke nalo ulwimi, nakuba luluncinci kangaka nje – luyagwagwisa kakhulu. Mhlawumbi makhe senze umzekelo ngehlathi: noba selilikhulu kangakanani na lingátshiswa yintlantsana nje yomlilo." 
James3:6 Nalo ke ulwimi lufana nqwa nomlilo; lululwandle lobubi. Lulelinye lamalungu omzimba wethu nje luphembelela ububi kubume bethu buphela. Ubomi bethu buphela libuntumeka ngomlilo eliwuthatha esihogweni. 
James3:7 Uluntu luyakwazi ukuzilulamisa zonke iintlobo zezidalwa – ezizitho zine kwaneentaka, ezirhubuluzayo kwanezaselwandle – yaye lukholisile ukwenjenjalo." 
James3:8 Kodwa akukho mntu ukwaziyo ukululawula ulwimi. Luyinkathazo engalawulekiyo, futhi luyityhefu." 
James3:9 Sisebenzisa lona xa sibonga sibulela iNkosi uTata wethu, ukanti sibaqalekisa kwangalo nabantu abadalwe bafuza uThixo." 
James3:10 Imibulelo neziqalekiso zimpompoza mlonyeni mnye. Mawethu, mayingenzeki le nto!" 
James3:11 Kaloku akwenzeki ukuba kumpompoze amanzi amnandi namtyuba mthonjeni mnye. 
James3:12 Mawethu, umkhiwane awukwazi kaloku ukuvelisa umnquma, nomdiliya awunako ukuvelisa amakhiwane. Ngokunjalo akukho mthombo unako ukuvelisa amanzi amtyuba namnandi." 
James3:13 Ukuba bakho abantu abalumkileyo nabaqondayo phakathi kwenu, loo nto mabayibonakalise ngobomi obumsulwa, nangezenzo zentobeko nobulumko." 
James3:14 Kodwa ke ukuba ninomona nolunya nizicingela, sanukuzigwagwisa nigqume inyaniso ngobuxoki." 
James3:15 Obu bulumko abuveli phezulu, koko bobehlabathi, bobeenkanuko, bobukaSathana." 
James3:16 Ke apho kukho umona nokuzigwagwisa kuba nguqulukubhode nazo zonke iintlobo zeentlondi. 
James3:17 Kodwa ke bona ubulumko obuvela phezulu bumsulwa; bunolungelelwano, nobubele, buyazelelela. Bona bunovelwano, yaye buvelisa imisebenzi emihle; abunamkhethe naluhanahaniso." 
James3:18 Ke bona abahlwayeli boxolo abaseluxolweni bavuna ubulungisa. 
James4:1 Yintoni edala iimfazwe neengxabano apha phakathi kwenu? Ngokuqinisekileyo zivela kwiinkanuko zenu ezisoloko zisenza imizabalazo ngaphakathi kwenu. 
James4:2 Xa ungazifumani izinto ozifunayo, ukhetha ukubulala; okanye xa ungafezeki umnqweno wakho, uyaxabana ulwe. Kanti ke, ungazifumani nje izinto ozifunayo, kungenxa yokuba awuziceli kuThixo." 
James4:3 Noba sowude wathandaza ucela, awuzuzi, kuba kaloku iinjongo zakho zimbi, ufuna nje ukufezekisa iinkanuko zakho." 
James4:4 Bantundini abangathembekanga, anazi kakade ukuba ngokuhlobana neli hlabathi nizenza iintshaba zikaThixo? Ewe, nabani na okhetha ukuvana neli hlabathi ulutshaba lukaThixo." 
James4:5 Mhlawumbi ngaba nicinga ukuba iziBhalo ziyalavuza xa zisithi: “UMoya esimnikiweyo uyakhweleta”? 
James4:6 Kodwa ke sona isisa asinika sona uThixo singaphezulu. Zitsho neziBhalo ukuthi: “UThixo uyabachasa abanekratshi, kodwa unesisa kwabathobekileyo.”" 
James4:7 Ngoko ke zinikeleni ngokupheleleyo kuThixo. Mchaseni uSathana azokunibaleka. 
James4:8 Sondelani kuThixo naye azokusondela kuni. Hlambani izandla zenu, nina bonindini! Nizenze nyulu iintliziyo zenu, nina bahanahanisi!" 
James4:9 Yibani lusizi nilile nintywizise! Ukuhleka makujike kube ziinyembezi, uvuyo lube lusizi!" 
James4:10 Ukuba niyazithoba kuye uThixo, uya kuniphakamisa." 
James4:11 Mawethu, musani ukugxekana. Nabani na oligxekayo okanye aligwebe elinye ikholwa, ugxeka ugweba umthetho. Ukuba ke uyawugxeka umthetho, akuwuthobeli, koko ungumgwebi wawo." 
James4:12 NguThixo kuphela umniki-mthetho nomgwebi. Nguye kuphela onelungelo lokusindisa okanye atshabalalise. Kuxa ungubani ke wena ude ugwebe ummelwana wakho nje? 
James4:13 Makhe ndibhekise kuni nina bathi: “Namhlanje okanye ngomso siya kuya kwidolophu ethile, sifike sihlale unyaka wonke, sirhwebe sizuze imali eninzi.”" 
James4:14 Nithetha nje ningayazi into eniza kuba yiyo ngomso. Nifana nje nomfa-nkungu othi uvele umzuzwana nje uphinde uphele. 
James4:15 Xa nithetha yithini: “INkosi ivuma, siya kwenza le naleya.”" 
James4:16 Kodwa ke endaweni yokwenjenjalo nisuka nibe nekratshi, niqhayise; ibe ke ukuqhayisa yinto egwenxa." 
James4:17 Phofu ke yena umntu ongayenziyo imfanelo yakhe nakuba eyazi, unetyala." 
James5:1 Ngoku makhe ndibhekise kwabo bemi kakuhle, izityebi. Hlahlambani ningqukruleke ngenxa yeenzingo ezinizelayo!" 
James5:2 Kaloku ubutyebi benu buyangunda, neempahla zenu zityiwa ngamanundu." 
James5:3 Igolide nesiliva yenu idliwa ngumhlwa. Ngulo mhlwa ke kanye obubungqina obunilahlayo, kuba uya kuyisuba njengomlilo inyama yenu. Kaloku nina nizifumbela ubutyebi ngoku sikwimihla yokugqibela." 
James5:4 Abasebenzi abalima amasimi enu anibahlawuli. Khanisive isikhalo sabo! Ewe, isililo sabavuni seside savakala nakuThixo, iNkosi uSomandla." 
James5:5 Kaloku obenu ubomi apha emhlabeni bubunewu-newu nobumnandi. Ewe, nizondle natyeba, kanti nizilungiselela umhla womgwebo." 
James5:6 Nimgwebile nambulala umntu ongenatyala. Kanti noko akaxhathisi. 
James5:7 Mawethu, yibani nomonde ide ifike iNkosi. Thathani umzekelo kumlimi: yena usilinda ngomonde isivuno asixabisileyo somhlaba wakhe. Ewe, yena uzilinda ngomonde iimvula zasentlakohlaza ngokunjalo nezasekwindla." 
James5:8 Ngoko ke nani yibani nomonde, ningatyhafi; kaloku iMini yokufika kweNkosi ikufuphi." 
James5:9 Mawethu, musani ukukhalazelana ukuze ningagwetywa nguThixo. Ngenene yena uMgwebi usemnyango." 
James5:10 Nanku ke umzekelo, mawethu: ndixela *abashumayeli bamandulo, abo babethetha egameni leNkosi. Bona mababe ngumzekelo wenu wokunyamezela ngomonde naxa kunzima." 
James5:11 Ewe, sithi banoyolo abo banyamezelayo. Seniyivile indlela awayenomonde ngayo uYobi; niyayazi indlela eyambuyekeza ngayo iNkosi. Kaloku iNkosi inenceba novelwano." 
James5:12 Ngaphezu koko ke, mawethu, musani ukufunga xa nisenza isithembiso; nditsho nangezulu, umhlaba, nangantoni na. Xa nivuma yithini: “Ewe,” nithi: “Hayi,” xa nisala, kube kuphela, ukuze ningabi sesichengeni sokugwetywa." 
James5:13 Ukuba kukho umntu osenkathazweni, makathandaze. Ukanti xa umntu evuya, makahlabele ingoma adumise." 
James5:14 Xa umntu egula, makabize amadoda amakhulu ebandla; wona aya kumthandazela, amthambise ngeoyile egameni leNkosi." 
James5:15 Lo mthandazo uphuma elukholweni uya kumnyanga umntu ogulayo, iNkosi imbuyisele empilweni, zithi nezono azenzileyo zixolelwe." 
James5:16 Ngoko ke zivumeni izono omnye komnye, nithandazelane, khon' ukuze ninyangeke. Kaloku umthandazo womntu olungileyo unamandla angummangaliso." 
James5:17 Ewe, uEliya wayengumntu efana nathi. Kodwa wathandaza ngokuzimisela ukuba ingani imvula, ngenene labalela iminyaka emithathu enesiqingatha." 
James5:18 Waphinda wathandaza, saza isibhakabhaka sayithoba imvula, lachuma ilizwe." 
James5:19 Mawethu, ukuba omnye wenu ulahlekile waphuma enyanisweni, waza omnye umntu wambuyisa," 
James5:20 qinisekani ngale ndawo: Nabani na oguqula umoni olahlekayo usindise umphefumlo ekufeni, watsho kwaxolelwa izono ezininzi." 
1Peter1:1 Kubhala mna Petros, *umthunywa kaYesu Krestu. Ndibhalela nina bantu bayimilowo yakwaThixo eniziimbacu ezithe saa kumaphondo asePonto, eGalati, eKapadoki, eAsiya, naseBhitini." 
1Peter1:2 Nakhethwa kwangaphambili ngokwentando kaThixo, nenziwa imilowo ngoMoya oyiNgcwele, ukuze nilulamele uYesu, nitshizwe ngegazi lakhe. Nanga ke ningenzelwa isisa niphiwe uxolo ngakumbi nangakumbi." 
1Peter1:3 Makabongwe uThixo noYise weNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu, othe ngenceba wasinika ubomi obutsha ngokuvusa uYesu Krestu ekufeni!" 
1Peter1:4 Kungenxa yaloo nto ke sinethemba elingagungqiyo nje, sihleli silinde ilifa leentsikelelo asigcinele zona uThixo. Azinakubola ezo ntsikelelo, azinakonakala, azinako nokutshitsha." 
1Peter1:5 Wonilondoloza uThixo ngamandla akhe, ngenxa yokholo eninalo, kude kufike loo nkululeko beniyilungiselelwe." 
1Peter1:6 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke vuyani, naxa phofu okwangoku ninyanzelekile ukuba nibe lusizi ngenxa yeentlupheko enizithweleyo." 
1Peter1:7 Ezo ntlupheko zicikida ukholo lwenu, lucace into oluyiyo. Negolide le iyinto etshabalalayo, iyacikidwa ngomlilo. Nalo ke ukholo lwenu oluxabiseke ngaphezu kwegolide lumelwe kukucikidwa, ukuze nibe nodumo, kwakunye newonga nesidima ngemini yokufika kukaYesu Krestu." 
1Peter1:8 Anikamboni nokumbona, kodwa niyamthanda. Niyakholwa nokukholwa kuye, naxa ningekamboni nje. Senizele naluchulumacho olungenakuchazwa," 
1Peter1:9 kuba seniyibona injongo yokholo lwenu; ndixela inkululeko yenu. 
1Peter1:10 Yile nkululeko kanye le babephengulula beyiphanda kunene *abashumayeli bamandulo. 
1Peter1:11 Babethetha ngesisa eniya kusenzelwa nguThixo. Babezama ukuphonononga ukuba zaziya kuhla nini na, njani na, ezo zigigaba. Kaloku uMoya kaKrestu wabatyhilela intlungu eyayiza kuhlela uKrestu ngeli thuba, newonga awayeza kulixhamla." 
1Peter1:12 Batyhilelwa ukuba ezo ndaba babezithetha ngezinto ngezinto, yayingezozabo, yayizezenu. Ezo ndaba ke zezi nizixelelwa ngabo bazivakalisayo kuni ngoku iindaba ezimnandi ngamandla kaMoya oyiNgcwele owavela ezulwini. Nditsho nkqu nezithunywa zezulu ziyakunqwenela ukuziqonda ezo zinto." 
1Peter1:13 Ngako ke finyezani umbhinqo, nibaze iingqondo, ningathembi nanye into ngaphandle kwesisa seentsikelelo eziza kuza noYesu ukufika kwakhe." 
1Peter1:14 Ziqheliseni ukululama, ningaziphathi ngendlela ebeniziphethe ngayo ngokuya beningekazi nto ngokholo." 
1Peter1:15 Kwinto yonke yibani ngcwele. Kaloku uThixo onibizileyo ungcwele. 
1Peter1:16 Kanti ke *neziBhalo zitsho ukuthi: “Yibani ngcwele, ngokuba mna ndingcwele.”" 
1Peter1:17 Xa nimnqula nithi uThixo nguBawo ongenamkhethe, ogweba lowo nalowo ngokwezenzo zakhe. Ngoko ke mnikeni imbeko lo gama nisesemhlabeni." 
1Peter1:18 Khumbulani ixabiso enakhululwa ngalo kwintlalo ebingento yookhokho benu. Anihlawulelwanga nganto itshitshayo, ifana nesiliva negolide." 
1Peter1:19 Nahlawulelwa ngegazi elixabisekileyo leXhwane elinguKrestu ongenasisihla nasiphako. 
1Peter1:20 Wanyulwa nguThixo, lingekadalwa ihlabathi, wabonakala ngenxa yenu kule mihla yokugqibela." 
1Peter1:21 Ke ngoku niyakholwa kuThixo ngenxa yakhe. Ke uThixo wamvusa ekufeni, wamnika iwonga, ukuze nijonge kuThixo ngethemba nangokholo." 
1Peter1:22 Njengoko ke nithe ngenxa yokululamela inyaniso nenziwa nyulu ukuze nithandane ngokwabazalanayo, thandanani ke ngoko ngokungazenzisiyo." 
1Peter1:23 Kaloku nizelwe ngelizwi likaThixo ophilayo, ongunaphakade, naba ngabantwana balowo ungasoze afe." 
1Peter1:24 Zitsho neziBhalo ukuthi: “Umntu unjengengca, nodumo lwakhe lunjengentyatyambo yengca. Iyabuna ingca, ivuthuluke intyatyambo," 
1Peter1:25 kodwa lona ilizwi leNkosi lihlala lihleli.” Elo lizwi ke lelo nalishunyayezwa ngeendaba ezimnandi. 
1Peter2:1 Ngoko ke yahlukanani nazo zonke ezi zinto: uchuku, inkohliso, ukuzenzisa, nomona, nako konke ukuphixanisa!" 
1Peter2:2 Njengamakholwa aseziintsana langazelelani ubisi olungangxengwanga: ndixela ilizwi likaThixo eliya kunikhulisa nide nisindiswe. 
1Peter2:3 “Kaloku senibungcamle ububele beNkosi,” njengoko *neziBhalo zisitsho kakade." 
1Peter2:4 Yizani eNkosini! Kaloku yona lilitye eliphilayo eladelwayo ngabantu; kambe ke lichongiwe, laye lixabisekile kuThixo." 
1Peter2:5 Yizani kaloku nani nibe ngamatye okwakha indlu kaMoya, khon' ukuze nibe ngababingeleli abanyulu bokwenza amadini kaMoya, amkelekileyo kuThixo ngenxa kaYesu Krestu." 
1Peter2:6 Kaloku iziBhalo zithi: “Ndikhethe ilitye elixabisekileyo. Lilitye lesiseko endilibeka eZiyon. Nabani na ozinikelayo kuye akayi kudana.” 
1Peter2:7 Kuni, nina bazinikeleyo, eli litye lixabisekile, kodwa kwabo bangakholwayo: “Kanye elo litye bâlideláyo abakhi suke laba lelona libalulekileyo lesiseko.”" 
1Peter2:8 Lona: “Lilitye elikhubekisayo, ulwalwa olutyibilikisayo.” Kaloku bayakhubeka kuba bengalithobeli ilizwi; phofu ke bamiselwe loo nto kakade." 
1Peter2:9 Kambe ke nina niluhlanga olukhethekileyo, ababingeleli basebhotwe, isizwe esinyulu, imilowo yakwaThixo. UThixo unikhethele ukuze nivakalise isidima nesihomo sakhe. Kaloku wanibiza nisebumnyameni, wanizisa ekukhanyeni okumangalisayo." 
1Peter2:10 Ngoku nilusapho lukaThixo, nangona nanikade ningelulo; benikade nikude nenceba yakhe, kodwa ngoku niyifumene." 
1Peter2:11 Ndiyanibongoza, zihlobo zam, kaloku niziimbacu nabaphambukeli kweli lizwe! Ngoko ke phikisanani nayo iminqweno yesimo senu esidala. Kaloku yona ilwa nani ziqu." 
1Peter2:12 Izimilo zenu mazibe zihle kangangokuba nabahedeni baniqonde ukuba aninabala. Xa kunjalo ke baya kuthi nokuba bayanityhola ngokungcola, babuye bavume ukuba nimsulwa. Ngaloo ndlela ke baya kumdumisa uThixo ngomhla wokufika kwakhe." 
1Peter2:13 Ngenxa yeNkosi wathobeleni onke amagunya akhoyo. Ukumkani mthobeleni njengowongamileyo," 
1Peter2:14 nerhuluneli njengomphathiswa wakhe wokohlwaya abonayo, ancome abo balungisayo." 
1Peter2:15 Kaloku uThixo ufuna ukuba nithi ngenxa yezimilo ezihle nibatsho basikwe umlomo abo bangaqondiyo, ndawonye nezibhanxa." 
1Peter2:16 Ziphatheni njengabantu abakhululekileyo. Kambe ke inkululeko leyo mayingabi lokhusi lokungcola; koko ziphatheni njengezicaka zikaThixo. 
1Peter2:17 Hloniphani wonke umntu; wathandeni amakholwa, nimoyike uThixo, nimthobele osemagunyeni." 
1Peter2:18 Nina zicaka, bahlonipheni abo baniqeshileyo, nibathobele kangangoko. Le nto ke sanukuyenza kwabo banobubele nobuntu kuphela, koko yenzeni nakwabo bakhohlakeleyo." 
1Peter2:19 Kaloku uThixo uyamthamsanqelisa umntu onyamezela ingcinezelo engonanga, kuba elangazelela okuthandwa nguThixo." 
1Peter2:20 Ewe, kaloku umntu akafumani nqaku xa enyamezela isohlwayo ngenxa yesono asenzileyo. Kodwa ke ukuba ùnyamezela ukuphatheka kabuhlungu naxa ungenzanga bubi, uThixo ungakuwe." 
1Peter2:21 Kakade nabizelwa loo nto; kaloku uKrestu waphatheka kabuhlungu ngenxa yenu, waza ngaloo ndlela wanishiya nomzekelo, ukuze nina nihambe ekhondweni lakhe." 
1Peter2:22 Yena zange one, engazange wakhohlisa." 
1Peter2:23 Naxa wayengcikivwa wayengaphindisi angcikive. Ngexesha lokuphatheka kabuhlungu akazange aqalekise, koko imeko yakhe wayinikela kulowo ugweba ngobulungisa." 
1Peter2:24 Izono zethu wazithathela kuye siqu, waxhonywa nazo emnqamlezweni, khon' ukuze thina siyeke ukuphilela ukona, koko siphilele ukulungisa. Ninyangwe ngamanxeba akhe." 
1Peter2:25 Nanilahlekile njengeegusha, kambe ke ngoku nibuyiselwe kuMalusi wenu onikhathaleleyo." 
1Peter3:1 Ngokukwanjalo ke amakhosikazi makawalulamele amadoda awo. Amanye amadoda angekakholwa, xa ebona ukuziphatha kakuhle kwamakhosikazi, angazibhaqa selekholwa engakhange awuvule umlomo wona amakhosikazi." 
1Peter3:2 Ukunyaniseka kwawo, nenzondelelo yawo, iya kuzibonakalisa." 
1Peter3:3 Musani ukuhombela ukubukwa ngokuluka iinwele, nitsho ngezacholo zegolide nempahla engayiwayo." 
1Peter3:4 Isihombo senu masibe sesangaphakathi, esingagugiyo. Umoya omhle wobulali yinto ayixabisileyo uThixo." 
1Peter3:5 Yayisisihombo samakhosikazi angcwele amandulo ke eso. Ayethembele kuThixo, elulamela amadoda awo." 
1Peter3:6 Wayenjalo uSara. Wayelulamela uAbraham esithi “mhlekazi” kuye. Niziintombi zakhe ke nina ukuba nenza okulungileyo ningenaxhala naloyiko. 
1Peter3:7 Amadoda ngokunjalo makahlalisane kakuhle namakhosikazi awo. Naxa ingabantu ababuthathaka amakhosikazi la, makahlonitshwe; aziindlamafa zesisa sikaThixo ngokulinganayo namadoda. Xa nenjenjalo ke akukho nto iya kuwuphazamisa umthandazo wenu." 
1Peter3:8 Ndiphetha ngelithi: Velanani, nibe moya mnye. Thandanani, nenzelane ububele, nilulamelane." 
1Peter3:9 Ningakhuphani zixhiba, nigwexane. Ndaweni yaloo nto thethani ngobulali. Eyona nto nibizelwe yona yeyokuba nifumane ilifa leentsikelelo," 
1Peter3:10 nanjengoko zitshoyo *iziBhalo ukuthi: “Lowo unga angabudla ubomi abe nenkqubela makazilumle ekuthetheni kakubi, ayeke ukuthetha ubuxoki." 
1Peter3:11 Makahlukane nobubi, enze okulungileyo; makaphuthume uxolo, ahlale kulo." 
1Peter3:12 Kaloku iNkosi iyawajonga amalungisa, iyiphulaphule imithandazo yawo. Kodwa iyabafulathela abenzi bobubi.”" 
1Peter3:13 Ngubani onganenzakalisayo xa nisenza okulungileyo? 
1Peter3:14 Phofu ke, nokuba ningatshutshiswa ngenxa yokwenza okulungileyo, ikwalithamsanqa naloo nto. Ze ningoyiki nina, ningaxhali nokuxhala oku." 
1Peter3:15 Hlonelani iNkosi uKrestu ehleli kuni ngaphakathi, nihlale nilungele ukuphendula nabani na onibuza ngethemba eniqamele ngalo." 
1Peter3:16 Kodwa loo nto ze niyenze ngobulali nangembeko, ningenasazela nganto, ukuze nokuba niyanyenjwa, abo banihlebayo badane ngenxa yendlela eniziphethe ngayo ukulandela uKrestu." 
1Peter3:17 Kaloku kungcono ukutshutshiswa ngenxa yobulungisa, xa kuyintando kaThixo oko, kunokutshutshiselwa izenzo ezibi." 
1Peter3:18 Andithi noKrestu wafela izono zethu kwaba kanye qwaba! Yena elilungisa nje wafela thina boni, esisondeza kuThixo! Wabulawa, kodwa wavuka ngoMoya kaThixo," 
1Peter3:19 waza waya kushumayeza imiphefumlo eseluvalelweni. 
1Peter3:20 Abo ke ngabo bantu bangazange bamthobele uThixo naxa wayebanyamezele ngemihla kaNowa. Ngabantu abambalwa nje – isibhozo kuphela – abasindiswayo ngamanzi. 
1Peter3:21 Wona angumqondiso owalatha ubhaptizo olusindisa nina ngoku. Ubhaptizo alukuko ukuhlanjwa kokungcola komzimba, lusisithembiso esenziwa kuThixo ngomxhelo wonke. Lusindisa ngamandla okuvuka kukaKrestu" 
1Peter3:22 owenyukela ezulwini, ohleli ewongeni ngakuThixo, elawula zonke izithunywa zezulu nooziphathamandla noomagunya bakhona." 
1Peter4:1 Njengoko noKrestu wamelanayo nale ntlupheko yalo mhlaba, ngokunjalo ke nani zimiseleni, nifuze yena. Kaloku umntu ocikidiweyo yintlupheko uyalumleka esonweni," 
1Peter4:2 aze athi ke ngexesha asenalo emhlabeni angaphileli ukwanelisa iminqweno yesimo esidala, koko aphilele ukwenza oko kuthandwa nguThixo." 
1Peter4:3 Ngoko ke lanele elaa xesha nilidlele ebuhedenini. Kaloku ngoko naningooandikhathali, nibawa, ninxila, nithanda iziyunguma; naningamakhoboka embarha; naninqula ngendlela elisikizi." 
1Peter4:4 Oontangandini ngoku bathe nqa kuba ningasahambi nabo kobo bundlobongela bokuzibhubhisa. Yiyo le nto baninyelisayo. 
1Peter4:5 Kambe ke baseza kunika ingxelo kulowo uhlalele ukugweba abahleliyo nabafileyo. 
1Peter4:6 Naso isizathu esabangela ukuba iindaba ezimnandi zishunyayelwe nakwabo bafileyo ngoku. Ewe, zashunyayelwa nakwabo babegwetyiwe njengamntu wonke, khon' ukuze ngokoMoya baphilele uThixo." 
1Peter4:7 Kuzo zonke izinto isiphelo sisemnyango. Ngoko ke hlalani nisezingqondweni, nikuqulele ukuthandaza." 
1Peter4:8 Ngaphezu koko ke hlalani nithandana, kuba kaloku uthando luyazingcwaba izono." 
1Peter4:9 Belezelanani ningenasikrokro. 
1Peter4:10 Umntu onikwe isiphiwo esithile nguThixo makasisebenzise ekuncedeni abanye, njengegosa lokwaba isisa sikaThixo esintlobo-ntlobo." 
1Peter4:11 Oshumayelayo makamele uThixo. Oncedisayo makancedise ngamandla awaphiwa nguThixo. Zonke izinto zenzeleni ukuze kunconywe uThixo ngenxa kaYesu Krestu. Kaloku sesakhe isidima namandla nanini nanini. *Amen. 
1Peter4:12 Zihlobo zam, sanukumangaliswa yile ngcinezelo ingaka niphantsi kwayo, ngokungathi nibona umhlola." 
1Peter4:13 Ndaweni yaloo nto vuyani kuba nani ninenxaxheba kwingcinezelo kaKrestu; nto leyo iya kunenza nichulumache ngakumbi ngomhla wokubonakala kobungangamsha bakhe. 
1Peter4:14 Nithamsanqelekile ukuba niyathukwa ngenxa yokuba ningabakaKrestu. Kaloku loo nto icacisa ukuba uMoya osinika isidima, onguMoya kaThixo, unifukamele." 
1Peter4:15 Xa nibandezeleka makungabi ngenxa yobugwinta, ukûba, ubuqili, okanye ukuphixanisa." 
1Peter4:16 Kodwa ke ukuba umntu ubandezeleka kuba engumKrestu, makangabi nazintloni, koko makadumise uThixo ngenxa yelo gama." 
1Peter4:17 Kaloku lifikile ixesha lokuba umgwebo uqale; ibe ke uza kuqala endlwini kaThixo ngenkqu. Ukuba ke uqala kuthi, soba yintoni ke isiphelo sabo bangavumiyo ukuzithobela iindaba ezimnandi zikaThixo?" 
1Peter4:18 Njengoko *neziBhalo zisithi: “Nelungisa eli lisindiswa nzima. Kobeka phi ke kumqhankqalazi nomoni?” 
1Peter4:19 Ngoko ke abo babandezeleka kuba uThixo ethanda, mabazinikele ngokupheleleyo ngemisebenzi emihle kuMdali wabo, kuba usoloko ethembekile." 
1Peter5:1 Ke kaloku ndibhenela kumadoda amakhulu alapho phakathi kwenu. Nam kaloku ndikwayindoda enkulu; futhi ndikwalingqina ngeembandezelo zikaKrestu. Kambe ke ndinaso nesabelo kubuqaqawuli obuza kuvela. 
1Peter5:2 Waluseni umhlambi kaThixo eniphakathi kwawo. Lo msebenzi ke sanukuwenza kuba ninyanzelekile, koko wenzeni nizimisele, njengoko noThixo ethanda njalo. Sanukusebenza kuba nincwase inzuzo, koko sebenzani ngokuzinikela." 
1Peter5:3 Sanukulawula ngegqudu, koko yibani ngumzekelo kuwo umhlambi." 
1Peter5:4 Uya kuthi ke akufika uMalusi omkhulu, nizuze isithsaba esinesidima, esingasoze sitshitshe." 
1Peter5:5 Kwangaloo ndlela ke nani, bafana, walulameleni amadoda amakhulu. Xa ninonke ke ngoko yithani wambu ukuthobelana. Kaloku uThixo ubachasile abo banekratshi, kodwa unesisa kwabathobekileyo." 
1Peter5:6 Ngoko ke zithobeni phantsi kwesandla sikaThixo esinamandla; yena ke uya kuniphakamisa ngexesha elifanelekileyo. 
1Peter5:7 Ziphoseni kuye zonke iingxaki zenu; kaloku nguye onalusayo. 
1Peter5:8 Hlalani nithe qwa, nilumke! Kaloku ummangaleli wenu umtyholi ugquma njengengonyama. Uyajikeleza; uzingela umntu angamqwengayo." 
1Peter5:9 Yimani ningahexi elukholweni, nimchase. Khumbulani ukuba namanye amakholwa athubeleza kwiimbandezelo ezikwanjalo apha emhlabeni." 
1Peter5:10 Kodwa ke, emva kwezo mbandezelo zomzuzwana, uThixo umthombo wesisa owanibizayo ngokumanywa kwenu noKrestu, khon' ukuze nibe nenxaxheba kubuqaqawuli bakhe obungapheliyo, uya kunihlaziya anomeleze, anixhobise, nime ngxishi." 
1Peter5:11 Kaloku akuye amandla ngoku nangonaphakade. *Amen. 
1Peter5:12 Ngoncedo lukaSilas, ikholwa elithembekileyo njengoko ndiqonda, ndinibhalele le ncwadana ndinikhuthaza. Ngokunjalo ndiyangqina ukuba esi sisisa sikaThixo ngenene. Ngoko ke yimani kuso ningahexi." 
1Peter5:13 Liyabulisa ibandla eliseBhabheli, nalo linyuliwe nguThixo njengani. Uyanibulisa nonyana wam uMarko." 
1Peter5:13 Liyabulisa ibandla eliseBhabheli, nalo linyuliwe nguThixo njengani. Uyanibulisa nonyana wam uMarko." 
1Peter5:14 Bulisanani niqhutywa luthando. Makube luxolo kuni nonke nina bakaKrestu! 
2Peter1:1 Kubhala mna sicaka sikaYesu Krestu *nomthunywa wakhe, uSimon Petros. Ndibhalela nina bathe ngenxa yobulungisa bukaThixo noMsindisi wethu uYesu Krestu nânokholo olunjengolwethu ukuxabiseka." 
2Peter1:2 Nanga ngenxa yokwazana kwenu noThixo kwakunye noYesu iNkosi yethu, ningenzelwa isisa, niphiwe noxolo ngakumbi nangakumbi." 
2Peter1:3 Ngamandla akhe uThixo usenzele zonke izinto eziyimfuneko ebomini, ukuze siziphathe ngokwentando yakhe; nokuze sazane nalowo usibizileyo, khon' ukuze sibuxhamle ubuqaqawuli nesidima sakhe." 
2Peter1:4 Ezi zipho zisisiqinisekiso sezinto ezinkulu nezimangalisayo asenzela zona: uThixo usenza sibe nenxaxheba kubomi bakhe, sikuphephe ukonakaliswa lihlabathi elikhohlakeleyo." 
2Peter1:5 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke kufuneka nenze unako-nako ukongezelela ukholo ngesidima, nesidima ngengqiqo," 
2Peter1:6 ingqiqo ngokuzeyisa, nokuzeyisa ngonyamezelo, unyamezelo ngembeko," 
2Peter1:7 nembeko ngokuhlobana, nokuhlobana ngokuthanda abantu bonke." 
2Peter1:8 Xa ninazo ngokwaneleyo, zisanda ngokwanda ezi zinto, zonenza nikhuthale nivelise neziqhamo, nazane nokwazana ngenene neNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu." 
2Peter1:9 Kaloku umntu ongenazo ezi mpawu, yimfama, ubona kufuphi, uyalibala nokuba izono zakhe zangaphambili sewazixolelwa." 
2Peter1:10 Ngoko ke, mawethu, kulangazeleleni ngakumbi ukuqinisekiswa kokubizwa nokunyulwa kwenu nguThixo. Kaloku ukuba niyayenza loo nto, aninakuze niwe konke." 
2Peter1:11 Leyo yindlela eniya kungena ngayo ekuxhamleni ubuncwane bokulawulwa amaxesha onke yiNkosi noMsindisi wethu uYesu Krestu. 
2Peter1:12 Ngenxa yaloo nto ke, ndiya kusoloko ndinikhumbuza ezi zinto, naxa nizaziyo nje, nisekelwe ngokuthe nkqi enyanisweni leyo ninayo." 
2Peter1:13 Ndiba yimfanelo yam, lo gama ndisaphilayo, ukuba ndinikhwezele ngokumana ndinikhumbuza." 
2Peter1:14 Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba sendiza kuwushiya lo mhlaba. Sele wandazisayo kaloku uYesu Krestu iNkosi. 
2Peter1:15 Ndaye ndiza kwenza indlela yokuba nihlale nizikhumbula ezi zinto naxa ndingasekhoyo. 
2Peter1:16 Ngokuya sasinixelela ngamandla eNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu nangokuza kwayo, sasinganenzeli ntsomi emini. Isihomo nesithozela sayo sasibona ngala wethu amehlo." 
2Peter1:17 Ngokuya yayinikwa iwonga nobuqaqawuli nguThixo uYise sasikho. Sasikho naxa kwakuvakala ilizwi livela kuSobuqaqawuli, lisithi: “Lo nguNyana wam oyintanda, ondikholisayo.”" 
2Peter1:18 Leviwa sithi aba elo lizwi lalivela ezulwini, sikunye naye uYesu phezu kwaloo ntaba ingcwele." 
2Peter1:19 Ngoko ke ubungqina bodaba *lwabashumayeli bamandulo bucaca ngakumbi. Ke xa niluthathela ingqalelo udaba lwabo noba niyakholisa. Olo daba ke luthatheni njengesibane sokukhanyisa ebumnyameni, lide livele ikhwezi lokusa, lithi chapha ezingqondweni zenu ilitha lomsobomvu." 
2Peter1:20 Kanti ke, ngaphezu koko, ze nikhumbule ukuba akukho *mshumayeli wakha wazihlalutyela ngokwakhe udaba *lweziBhalo." 
2Peter1:21 Kaloku udaba lukaThixo aluzanga ngokuzithandela komntu, koko abantu baluthetha udaba lukaThixo beqhutywa lifuthe loMoya oyiNgcwele." 
2Peter2:1 KwaSirayeli babekho *abashumayeli abaxokayo; ngokunjalo ke naphakathi kwenu baza kubakho abafundisa ubuxoki. Bona baza kunyebelezisa iimfundiso ezidala intshabalalo. Baya kuphika nkqu neNkosi le ibasindisileyo, baze ngokwenjenjalo bazibizele intshabalalo ekhawulezileyo." 
2Peter2:2 Baninzi abaya kubalandela kwezo ndlela zabo zokungcola. Yona indlela eyinyaniso baya kuyingcikiva. 
2Peter2:3 Ngenxa yokunyoluka kwabo aba bafundisi baya kuniqhatha, khon' ukuze banixhaphaze, bafumane inzuzo. Kodwa ke sona isigwebo abasimisélwa kwantlandlolo sijinga phezu kwabo; umtshabalalisi akalali, ulinde bona."
