2Peter2:4 Izithunywa ezathi zôna uThixo akazange abe natarhu kuzo, koko wazithatha waziqamangela ngamatyathanga, waziphosa esithokothokweni sesihogo; apho zihleli khona ngoku, zilinde umhla womgwebo." 
2Peter2:5 UThixo akazange alisindise ihlabathi lamandulo, koko wabatshabalalisa ngonogumbe abo bantu bangakhathalele Thixo. Abantu abasindayo nguNowa, umshumayeli wobulungisa, kunye nabanye abasixhenxe." 
2Peter2:6 Iidolophu zaseSodom naseGomora uThixo wazigweba wazitshabalalisa; ewe, wazitshisa zaluthuthu, khon' ukuze zibe ngumzekelo kumaxesha azayo, kwabo bangamthobeliyo uThixo." 
2Peter2:7 Kambe ke wamsindisa uLothe indoda eyayinembeko. Kaloku elo lunga lomfo lalingonwabanga phakathi kwabo bantu bangakhathalele mthetho, bengaloyiki nehlazo. Ewe, amanyundululu awayewabona, eweva mihla le, ayemngcungcuthekisa." 
2Peter2:8  
2Peter2:9 Kodwa ke iNkosi iyabahlangula ezilingweni abantu abayithobelayo. Ke bona abangayithobeliyo ibagcinele ukubohlwaya ngomhla womgwebo; 
2Peter2:10 ngakumbi ke abo baqweqwediswa ziinkanuko zokungcola, bedela noomagunya. Aba bafundisi ngoodelihlazo abakhukhumeleyo; abanambeko, futhi bayazingcikiva nezithwala-ndwe zaphezulu." 
2Peter2:11 Kanti ke nezithunywa zezulu nakuba zingaphezulu nje kubo ngamandla namagunya, azibenyelisi xa zibamangalela eNkosini." 
2Peter2:12 Aba bantu bafana nezilwanyana zasendle, zona zizalwa zibe ngoomabonwabulawe. Bayazenyelisa izinto abangaziqondiyo. Nabo baya kutshabalala njengezilwanyana." 
2Peter2:13 Ewe, isikhuni siya kubuya nomkhwezeli. Ngakwicala leziyolo namanyala bangooncanyelweni. Bayawaxabhela amatheko enu ngokuhlala nani nitye kunye. Kaloku abasenakuzinceda ngobundlobongela nenkohliso." 
2Peter2:14 Basoloko becel' amehlo kubafazi abangenazimo. Amehlo abo asoloko elambele ukona. Bayabathiyela bababambise abantu abangaqondiyo. Ukunyoluka ngumkhwa abawaziyo; kambe ke baphantsi kwesiqalekiso! 
2Peter2:15 Bayilahlile eyona ndlela, baza bahola. Bona bahamba ngendlela kaBhalam unyana kaBhehore owakhetha ukona, khon' ukuze azuze imali;" 
2Peter2:16 nto leyo yenza ukuba akhalinyelwe. Ewe, kaloku idonki yathetha ngelizwi lomntu ukugxotha ububhanxa baloo mshumayeli." 
2Peter2:17 Aba bafundisi bafana nemithombo engampompozi manzi; bafana namafu aqhutywa luqhwithela. Indawo abalungiselelwe yona sisithokothoko senzonzobila.

2Peter3:9 Ke iNkosi ayikubambezeli ukuzalisekiswa kwesithembiso esenzileyo, njengoko abanye baba kunjalo. Nto nje ininyamezele kuba ingafuni kutshabalale mntu. Koko ifuna wonke ubani afumane ithuba lokuguquka." 
2Peter3:10 Ke yona iMini yeNkosi iya kufika njengesela ingalindelekanga. Ngaloo mini amazulu aya kutsho ngenzwinini yengxolo, aze ke wona aphel' emehlweni. Ngokunjalo neziseko zawo ziya kutshiswa ngumlilo ziphele. Wona umhlaba nako konke okukuwo kuya kusala kuze; uya kunyamalala." 
2Peter3:11 Xa ke eli phakade liza kutshabalala kanje, ngaba kufuneka nithini nina? Kufuneka nizinikele ngokupheleleyo, niphile ubomi obunyulu." 
2Peter3:12 Kufuneka nenze unako-nako, nilangazelela ukuba ikhawuleze imini kaThixo. Ewe, loo mini iya kuwalenya ngomlilo amazulu atshabalale; ngokunjalo neziseko zawo ziya kunyibilika." 
2Peter3:13 Kambe ke thina silindele isithembiso sikaThixo, samazulu nehlabathi elitsha, apho kuya kulawula ucwangco."

2Peter3:16 Kambe ke unjalo kakade xa ethetha ngale nyewe. Phofu ke kukho iindawo ezinzima ezincwadini zakhe. Ke zona izityhakala nabathandabuzi bazitolika gwenxa, njengoko besenza kakade *eziBhalweni. Ngokwenjenjalo ke bazibizela intshabalalo." 
2Peter3:17 Ke nina, zihlobo zam, senilunyukisiwe. Ngoko ke lumkani, hleze aba basweli-kuqiqa banilukuhlele kwezo mpazamo zabo. Ngoko ke yimani ningagungqi."

3John1:3 Ndavuya gqitha xa kwakufika amawethu endixelela ngendlela othe ngcembe ngayo enyanisweni – njengoko uhlala usenza kakade. 
3John1:4 Akukho nto indonwabisa njengokuva ukuba abantwana bam bahlala bethe ngcembe enyanisweni. 
3John1:4 Akukho nto indonwabisa njengokuva ukuba abantwana bam bahlala bethe ngcembe enyanisweni. 
3John1:5 Mhlobo endimthandayo, hayi ukuba nenyameko kwakho kumsebenzi owenzela amakholwa – nditsho nalawo angabahambi!" 
3John1:5 Mhlobo endimthandayo, hayi ukuba nenyameko kwakho kumsebenzi owenzela amakholwa – nditsho nalawo angabahambi!" 
3John1:6 Ayibalisile apha ebandleni indlela obuwaphethe kakuhle ngayo. Seluwanceda ke naseluhambeni lwawo, ngohlobo olukholisa uThixo." 
3John1:6 Ayibalisile apha ebandleni indlela obuwaphethe kakuhle ngayo. Seluwanceda ke naseluhambeni lwawo, ngohlobo olukholisa uThixo." 
3John1:7 Kaloku ahamba esiya kwenza umsebenzi kaKrestu. Akafumani nkxaso ke kwabo bangengomakholwa. 
3John1:7 Kaloku ahamba esiya kwenza umsebenzi kaKrestu. Akafumani nkxaso ke kwabo bangengomakholwa. 
3John1:8 Kambe ke thina makholwa simelwe kukuwaxhasa, khon' ukuze sibe nenxaxheba kumsebenzi wokusasaza inyaniso." 
3John1:8 Kambe ke thina makholwa simelwe kukuwaxhasa, khon' ukuze sibe nenxaxheba kumsebenzi wokusasaza inyaniso." 
3John1:9 Bendibhalele ibandla ileta. Kodwa uDiyotrefe, ongugqada-mbekweni, akafuni kuva nento le ngam." 
3John1:9 Bendibhalele ibandla ileta. Kodwa uDiyotrefe, ongugqada-mbekweni, akafuni kuva nento le ngam." 
3John1:10 Ndothi ndakufika apho ndizibhengeze zonke izenzo zakhe: izinto ezimanyumnyezi azithethe ngam, kunye nobuxoki ahamba ebuphalaza ngam. Kanti ke ngaphezu koko uyala ukwamkela amawethu xa afikileyo; ude anqande nâbo bafuna ukuwamkela, afune ukubagxotha ebandleni." 
3John1:10 Ndothi ndakufika apho ndizibhengeze zonke izenzo zakhe: izinto ezimanyumnyezi azithethe ngam, kunye nobuxoki ahamba ebuphalaza ngam. Kanti ke ngaphezu koko uyala ukwamkela amawethu xa afikileyo; ude anqande nâbo bafuna ukuwamkela, afune ukubagxotha ebandleni." 
3John1:11 Mhlobo oyintanda, ungaze uyilinganise imikhwa emibi; uze ufunde umzekelo omhle. Wonke umntu owenza okulungileyo ngokaThixo. Kodwa lowo wenza okubi akakabonani noThixo." 
3John1:11 Mhlobo oyintanda, ungaze uyilinganise imikhwa emibi; uze ufunde umzekelo omhle. Wonke umntu owenza okulungileyo ngokaThixo. Kodwa lowo wenza okubi akakabonani noThixo." 
3John1:12 Kodwa wonke umntu uthetha kakuhle ngoDemetriyo. Inyaniso iyacaca ngaye. Nam ndiyayingqina loo nto, yaye uyazi ukuba andixoki." 
3John1:12 Kodwa wonke umntu uthetha kakuhle ngoDemetriyo. Inyaniso iyacaca ngaye. Nam ndiyayingqina loo nto, yaye uyazi ukuba andixoki." 
3John1:13 Zininzi izinto endifuna ukukuxelela zona, kodwa andithandi kuzibhala." 
3John1:13 Zininzi izinto endifuna ukukuxelela zona, kodwa andithandi kuzibhala." 
3John1:14 Ndinqwenela ukukubona kwakamsinya, khon' ukuze sithethe ubuso ngobuso." 
3John1:14 Ndinqwenela ukukubona kwakamsinya, khon' ukuze sithethe ubuso ngobuso." 
3John1:15 Uxolo malube nawe. Bayabulisa bonke oogxa bakho. Nawe bulisa kubahlobo bam bonke ngabanye. 
3John1:15 Uxolo malube nawe. Bayabulisa bonke oogxa bakho. Nawe bulisa kubahlobo bam bonke ngabanye. 
Jude1:1 Kubhala mna Juda osisicaka sikaYesu Krestu, nongumntakwabo-Yakobi. Ndibhalela abo babiziweyo nguThixo, abo bathandwayo nguThixo uBawo, belondolozwe nguYesu Krestu." 
Jude1:2 Ndithi: kuni makongame inceba, uxolo, nothando." 
Jude1:3 Zihlobo zam, besendizimisele ukunibhalela ndithethe ngosindiso olu lusidibanisileyo. Kuthe kusenjalo ndabona kuyimfuneko ngakumbi ukuba ndinibhalele ndinikhuthaze ukuba nizabalaze nilwele ukholo olu salunikezelwa ngokupheleleyo nguThixo, thina bantu bakhe." 
Jude1:4 Kaloku abantu abathile banyebeleze bangena ebandleni. Aba bantu bâphawulelwa intshabalalo kwantlandlolo *ziziBhalo. Bona baziintshaba zonqulo. Andithi kaloku bayasigqwetha isisa soThixo wethu, khon' ukuze bafumane ithuba lokurheletya! Ngokunjalo ke bayamchasa uMhlekazi, uYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu." 
Jude1:5 Nakuba niyazi nje le ndawo, ndifuna ukukhe ndinikhumbuze ngayo. Kaloku iNkosi yawahlangula amaSirayeli eJiputa, kodwa kamva yabatshabalalisa abo bathi baveza intswela-mbeko nokuqhankqalaza." 
Jude1:6 Khanikhumbule ngezithunywa zezulu. Kaloku inxalenye yazo zange yaneliseke zizikhundla zayo, yaza kananjalo yakreqa ekhayeni layo. Kungoku nje uThixo uzigcinele umhla omkhulu womgwebo. Ngoku zisesithokothokweni senzonzobila apho ziqanyangelwe ngamatyathanga angasoze akhululeke." 
Jude1:7 Kwakhona khumbulani ngeSodom neGomora nabamelwane bazo. Kaloku abantu bezi dolophu nabo babefana nezi zithunywa. Ewe, babephala phambili ekurheletyeni, bade bakhanukane ngokunxamnye nemvelo. Nabo abo ke basisilumkiso, kuba bawuzuza umvuzo wabo – umlilo ongacimiyo." 
Jude1:8 Kwangokunjalo ke naba banamaphupha, bangcolisa imizimba yabo, abakufuni ukulawulwa, futhi bayazingcikiva izithwala-ndwe zaphezulu." 
Jude1:9 Aba bantu benza into engazange yenziwe nayinqununu yezithunywa uMikayeli. Kaloku xa babebangisana nomtyholi ngomzimba kaMosis, uMikayeli zange amenze isigculelo amgwebe, koko wathi: “Yanga ingakukhalimela iNkosi.”" 
Jude1:10 Kodwa bona aba bantu bayazingcikiva izinto abangaziqondiyo. Kambe ke zona izinto ábazazi ngemvelo, oku kwezilwanyana, zezona zikukufa kwabo." 
Jude1:11 Yini le, bagabadele! Basekhondweni likaKayen. Bazintywilisele esonweni, khon' ukuze bazuze imali njengoBhalam. KwanjengoKora owayengafuni ukulawulwa, nabo bayagwayimba. Ngoko ke baya kutshabalala njengaye." 
Jude1:12 Aba bantu bayazixabhela izidlo zenu. Kaloku bangena kuzo beziindlobongela zeendlavini, ezingakhathalele mntu ngaphandle kweziqu zazo. Bafana neengqimba zamafu aphehluzeliswa ngumoya, engezi nayo namvula. Bayimithi engathwali ziqhamo nasekwindla. Bafana nemithi enqukrulwe neengcambu yaza yatshabalala." 
Jude1:13 Aba bantu bafana namaza alatyuzayo elwandle; ibe ke zona izenzo zabo ziyafumba njengogwebu. Bafana neenkwenkwezi ezibhadulayo, ziwuphosile umendo wazo. UThixo ubalungiselela indawo esithokothokweni senzonzobila." 
Jude1:14 Kambe ke uInoki, owesixhenxe kwisizukulwana sika-Adam, wathetha kwantlandlolo ngaba bantu, wathi: “Khawukhangele! INkosi iyeza ikunye namawaka-waka ezithunywa zayo ezingcwele." 
Jude1:15 Iza kugweba isingele phantsi bonke abantu abangamkhathalelanga uThixo. Aba bantu iza kubagweba ngenxa yezinto ezimanyumnyezi abazenzileyo; ngokunjalo nangenxa yezenyeliso abazithethileyo bengcikiva uThixo.” 
Jude1:16 Aba bantu into abayaziyo kukukhalaza besola. Barhorhozela emva kweminqweno yabo egwenxa. Ngamabhongo abo baqhayisa baqhathe abantu, khon' ukuze babaxhaphaze." 
Jude1:17 Kodwa ke, zihlobo zam, akulahlwa mbeleko ngakufelwa! Ngoko ke wakhumbuleni amazwi enawaxelelwa ngabathunywa beNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu." 
Jude1:18 Kaloku babetshilo ukuthi: “Ngemihla yokugqibela kuya kuvela abantu abalunyelisayo unqulo, bekhukuliswa yiminqweno yabo egwenxa.”" 
Jude1:19 Aba bantu badala iyantlukwano. Kaloku bona balawulwa yiminqweno yemvelo; abanalo ifuthe likaMoya. 
Jude1:20 Ngoko ke nina, zihlobo zam, zingisani nizakhe elukholweni lwenu olunyulu. Thandazani niqhutywa nguMoya oyiNgcwele." 
Jude1:21 Uthando lukaThixo maluhlale lunifumbathile ngoku nilinde iNkosi yethu uYesu Krestu. Kaloku yena unenceba, uya kunipha ubomi obungapheliyo." 
Jude1:22 Velanani nabo abathandabuzayo; 
Jude1:23 abanye nibarhiwule ngathi nibakhupha emlilweni, nibasindise. Kwabanye inceba yenu yixubeni noloyiko. Kaloku kufuneka nithiye kwanempahla le yomntu odyojwe kukungcola kwesimo sakhe esonakeleyo." 
Jude1:24 Ke kaloku, kulowo unako ukunigcina ningawi, aze animise ebuqaqawulini bakhe ningenabala, nichulumacha," 
Jude1:25 ewe, kuThixo okukuphela kwakhe, uMsindisi wethu ngaye uYesu Krestu iNkosi yethu, makubekho isidima nobungangamsha, amandla namagunya, kusukela ephakadeni, nanamhlanje, nanini-nanini na! *Amen!" 
Revelation1:1 Nasi isityhilelo esaboniswa uYesu Krestu nguThixo. Wasiboniswa khon' ukuze yena abonise izicaka zakhe izinto eziza kuhla kamsinya. Esi sityhilelo uYesu wasithumela ngesithunywa sezulu kwisicaka sakhe uYohane. 
Revelation1:2 Yena ke uYohane wayibhala wayixela yonke into awayibonayo. Ngoku ke uchaza udaba lukaThixo olo walutyhilelwa nguYesu Krestu. 
Revelation1:3 Unoyolo kambe umntu owafundayo amazwi olu daba, benoyolo nâbo bawaphulaphula bawathathele ingqalelo. Kaloku ixesha lokuzalisekiswa kwawo lisemnyango." 
Revelation1:4 Mna Yohane ndibhalela amabandla asixhenxe akwiphondo laseAsiya, ndisithi: Kuwo makube sisisa noxolo oluvela kuNdikhoyo, lowo wayekho, oya kusoloko ekho; nakubo ooMoya abasixhenxe abaphambi kwakhe ebhotwe;" 
Revelation1:5 ngokunjalo nakuYesu Krestu, olingqina elithembekileyo, inkulu yâbo bavuka bebefile, nomlawuli wezikumkani zehlabathi. Kaloku yena lowo usithandayo, ngokuphalala kwegazi lakhe, usikhulule ezonweni zethu." 
Revelation1:6 Ewe, yena usenze ababingeleli basebhotwe ukuze sikhonze uThixo uYise. Mabube kuye ke ubungangamsha nolawulo nanini-nanini! *Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Khawukhangele, nanko esiza ekhatshwa ngamafu! Lonke uluntu luya kumbona, nkqu nabo bâmhlabáyo. Ewe, zonke izizwe ziya kungqukruleka zizisola. Injalo ke loo nto! Amen." 
Revelation1:8 “Ndim isiqalo nesiphelo,” itsho iNkosi uThixo, uSomandla, uNdikhoyo, owayekho, lowo uya kusoloko ekho." 
Revelation1:9 NdinguYohane umwenu onenxaxheba ebunzimeni, kunyamezelo, nasekulawulweni – zinto ezo zisibandakanyayo thina bamanyiweyo noYesu. Ke kaloku ndazibona sendisesiqithini sePatimo ngenxa yokushumayela ilizwi likaThixo nokungqina ngoYesu." 
Revelation1:10 Kwathi ngomhla weCawe ndaba semandleni kaMoya, ndaza ndeva ilizwi lihlokoma ngathi lixilongo emva kwam." 
Revelation1:11 Lenjenje ukuthetha: “Ezi zinto uzibonayo zibhale encwadini, uzithumele kula mabandla osixhenxe: e-Efese, eSmirna, ePergamo, eTiyatire, eSardes, eFiladelfiya, naseLawodike.”" 
Revelation1:12 Ndakhangela ngasemva, ndifuna ukuqonda ukuba ngaba lalilelikabani na eli lizwi ndandiliva lithetha nam. Ndithe ndakubheka, ndabona kumi izibane ezisixhenxe zegolide." 
Revelation1:13 Phakathi kwazo kwakukho into engathi ngumntu, itsho ngezivatho ezaziye kuthi xhaxhe ezinyaweni, ithe thande ibhanti yegolide esifubeni." 
Revelation1:14 Iinwele zayo zazimhlophe okwekhephu, itsho ngamehlo abukhali, alenya okwamadangatye omlilo." 
Revelation1:15 Yayineenyawo ezibengezela okobhedu olugudisiweyo, ilizwi layo livakala ngathi sisandi samanzi engxangxasi." 
Revelation1:16 Yayiphethe iinkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ngesandla sokunene, emlonyeni kuphuma ikrele elibukhali, libazwe macala, ubuso bayo buqaqamba njengelanga mhla ligqats' ubhobhoyi." 
Revelation1:17 Ndithe ke ndakumbona, ndajuba ezinyaweni zakhe, ndanjengofileyo. Ke yena wasibeka phezu kwam isandla sakhe sokunene, wathi: “Musa ukoyika. Mna ndingowokuqala, ndikwangowokugqibela." 
Revelation1:18 Ndingohleliyo. Ndandifile. Kodwa khangela ndim lo ndikho, kuya kude kube nini-nini. Ukufa ndiyakulawula; kwanelabafileyo ndiyalilawula." 
Revelation1:19 Ngoko ke zibhale ezo zinto uzibone zisenzeka, kwanezo zenzekayo, neziya kuhla." 
Revelation1:20 Nantsi ke ingcaciso yento ethethwa ziinkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ezisesandleni sam sokunene, kwanezibane ezisixhenxe zegolide: Iinkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ngabameli bamabandla asixhenxe. Izibane ezisixhenxe zona ngamabandla lawo.”" 
Revelation2:1 “Bhalela ummeli webandla lase-Efese, uthi: ‘Nanga amazwi avela kulowo uphethe iinkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe ngesandla sokunene, ujikeleza phakathi kwezibane ezisixhenxe zegolide." 
Revelation2:2 Ndiyayazi indlela obusebenza ngayo ubulaleka, unenyameko. Ndiyazi ukuba akubanyamezeli abantu abakhohlakeleyo. Ubavavanyile abo babesithi *bangabathunywa bengengabo, wabafumanisa bengamaxoki." 
Revelation2:3 Ubunzima ubuthwele ngenyameko ngenxa yam, akoyiswa." 
Revelation2:4 Kodwa ke nantsi indawo ngakuwe: Akusandithandi njengoko wawundithanda ekuqaleni. 
Revelation2:5 Khawukhumbule indlela owawa bhaxa ngayo. Yahlukana nezono; qhuba ngendlela obuhamba ngayo ekuqaleni. Ukuba akuguquki, ndiya kuza ndisisuse isibane sakho endaweni yaso." 
Revelation2:6 Kambe ke nantsi indawo ekuthethelelayo: Imikhwa yamaNikolawo uyithiyile kanye njengam. 
Revelation2:7 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni! “ ‘Lowo woyisileyo ndomnika ilungelo lokutya kumthi wobomi osemyezweni kaThixo. ’ ” 
Revelation2:8 “Bhalela ummeli webandla laseSmirna, uthi: ‘Nanga amazwi alowo ungowokuqala ukwangowokugqibela, owayefile wabuya wavuka:" 
Revelation2:9 Ndiyayazi indlela ebenicinezeleke ngayo, nihlwempuzekile. Kodwa nizizityebi phezu koko. Ndiyayazi indlela ebenenyeliswa ngayo ngabo bazenza amaJuda – baligquba likaSathana!" 
Revelation2:10 Nize ningayoyiki intshutshiso ezayo. Abanye benu umtyholi uza kubaphosa entolongweni, enivavanya. Nophatheka nzima iintsuku ezilishumi. Nize ninyaniseke kude kuse ekufeni. Ndonithwesa imbasa yobomi." 
Revelation2:11 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni! “ ‘Lowo woyisileyo akanako ukwenziwa nto kukufa kwesibini. ’ ” 
Revelation2:12 “Bhalela ummeli webandla lasePergama, uthi: ‘Olu daba luvela kulowo unekrele elibukhali elibaze macala." 
Revelation2:13 Ndiyayazi le ndawo uhlala kuyo: Kusebhotwe kwaSathana! Kodwa nakuba kunjalo awundilahlanga. Awuzange utyhafe undikhanyele, nangethuba kwakubulawa ingqina lam elithembekileyo uAntipas, apho kuloo dolophu yakho ilikhaya likaSathana." 
Revelation2:14 Kambe ke ndineendawana ezingandikholisiyo apha kuwe: Kwalapho kuwe bakho abasabambelele kwimfundiso kaBhalam. Kaloku yena ngulowa wafundisa uBhalaki ukulukuhla amaSirayeli. Wawakhuthaza ukuba atye ukutya okwenzelwe izithixo, arheletye." 
Revelation2:15 Ngokukwanjalo ke nalapho kuni bakho ababambelele kwimfundiso yamaNikolawo. 
Revelation2:16 Ngoko ke guquka, kungenjalo abo bantu ndiya kubahlasela ngekrele lomlomo." 
Revelation2:17 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni! “ ‘Lowo woyisileyo ndiya kumpha *imana efihliweyo. Ndiya kumnika nelitye elimhlophe apho kukrolwe igama elitsha elingaziwa mntu ngaphandle kwalowo lilelakhe.’ ” 
Revelation2:18 “Bhalela ummeli webandla laseTiyatire, uthi: ‘Nalu udaba oluvela kuNyana kaThixo, yena unamehlo alenya ngathi ngamadangatye omlilo, onyawo zimenyezela ngathi lubhedu olugudisiweyo." 
Revelation2:19 Ndiyasazi isimo sakho: unothando; uthembekile, ukhuthele, unomonde. Futhi ndiyaqonda ukuba ngoku uthath' unyawo kunakuqala." 
Revelation2:20 Kambe ke ndinendawo ngakuwe: Kaloku awumchasi uJezebhele, intokazi ethi *ingumshumayeli. Ngemfundiso yakhe izicaka zam uziwexulela ekurheletyeni nasekutyeni ukutya okwenzelwe izithixo." 
Revelation2:21 Nakuba ndimnikile ithuba lokuguquka ezonweni zakhe, akazimiselanga ukwahlukana nokurheletya." 
Revelation2:22 Ngoku ke ndiya kumphosa emandlalweni apho aya kuthi yena kunye nabo arheletya nabo bangcungcutheke. Le nto ndiza kuyenza; ngaphandle kokuba bangaguquka kule nkohlakalo bayenza kunye naye. 
Revelation2:23 Ndiya kubabulala abalandeli bakhe. Onke amabandla aya kuqonda ukuba mna ndiyazazi iingcinga neenjongo zabantu. Umntu ngamnye ndiya kumamkelisa ngokwezenzo zakhe. 
Revelation2:24 “ ‘Kodwa ke abanye benu apha eTiyatire khange bayingene le mfundiso. Aninamava ngale nto abanye bathi yimfihlelo kaSathana. Nina andiyi kunibeka xanduva lumbi. 
Revelation2:25 Kambe ke namathelani kuloo nto ninayo ndide ndifike. 
Revelation2:26 Lowo woyisileyo, ewe, onyamezeleyo ekwenzeni ukuthanda kwam kwada kwasesiphelweni, ndiya kumnika amagunya phezu kwezizwe." 
Revelation2:27 Uya kuzilawula ngentonga yentsimbi izizwe, azintlekeze njengezitya zodongwe." 
Revelation2:28 Loo magunya ndawathatha kuBawo. Nam ke ndiya kumnika ikhwezi lokusa. 
Revelation2:29 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni!’ ” 
Revelation3:1 “Bhalela ummeli webandla laseSardes, uthi: ‘Nanga amazwi avela kulowo uphethe ooMoya abasixhenxe bakaThixo, neenkwenkwezi ezisixhenxe: Ndiyazazi iindlela zakho. Ndiyazi ukuba nakuba udume ngokuphila nje, ufile kodwa." 
Revelation3:2 Vuka, uhlaziye loo ntlantsana isahleliyo, hleze ife nayo! Akukho namnye umsebenzi wakho endiwufumene ugqibekile phambi kukaThixo." 
Revelation3:3 Ngoko ke khumbula iimfundiso ozifumeneyo; zilandele, uguquke. Ukuba akuvuki, ndofika njengesela – akuyi kwazi nokuba bendifike nini na." 
Revelation3:4 Phofu unabantu abambalwa eSardes abangazingcolisanga bona izambatho zabo. Bohamba bevathe ezimhlophe kunye nam, yaye ibafanele loo nto." 
Revelation3:5 Lowo woyisileyo wovatha ezimhlophe. Andisoze ndilicime igama lakhe kuludwe lwamagama abo baphilayo. Kaloku ndiya kumvuma ukuba ungowam phambi kukaBawo nezithunywa zakhe. 
Revelation3:6 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni!’ ” 
Revelation3:7 “Bhalela ummeli webandla laseFiladelfiya, uthi: ‘Nanga amazwi avela kulowo uyingcwele, ungowenene, uphethe izitshixo zakwaDavide; lowo uthi akuvula kungavali bani, athi akuvala kungavuli mntu." 
Revelation3:8 Ndiyazazi iindlela zakho. Khangela ndibeke ucango oluvuliweyo phambi kwakho. Akukho bani unako ukuluvala. Ndiyazi ukuba amandlana onawo akangako, kodwa ulithobele ilizwi lam, àkwandikhanyela." 
Revelation3:9 Ndiya kwenza le nto ke: Abo baligquba likaSathana, amamenemene azenza amaJuda engengawo, ndiya kubathoba, bakhahlele kuwe, bazi ukuba ndiyakuthanda." 
Revelation3:10 Ke ngenxa yokuba uzingisile ekulithobeleni ilizwi lam elikubizela ekunyamezeleni, ndiza kukuhlangula kwishwangusha eliza ehlabathini lize kulinga bonke abantu." 
Revelation3:11 Ndiyeza kwakamsinya. Yilondoloze imbo yakho. Lumka hleze ixhwilwe imbasa yakho. 
Revelation3:12 Lowo woyisayo ndiya kumenza intsika yendlu kaThixo wam, angaze ahlukane nayo. Ndiya kulibhala kuye igama likaThixo wam negama lesixeko sikaThixo wam. Ewe, ndixela iJerusalem entsha, leyo izayo, iphuma ezulwini kuThixo wam. Ngokunjalo ndiya kulibhala kuye negama lam elitsha." 
Revelation3:13 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni!’ ” 
Revelation3:14 “Bhalela ummeli webandla laseLawodike, uthi: ‘Nalu udaba oluvela *kuAmen, olingqina elithembekileyo nelinyanisekileyo. Yena ngumthombo wayo yonke indalo kaThixo." 
Revelation3:15 Ndiyasazi isimo sakho: Awubandi, awushushu. Akwaba ubushushu okanye ubanda!" 
Revelation3:16 Kodwa ke ngenxa yokuba udikidiki, ungeshushu ungabandi, ndiza kukutshica." 
Revelation3:17 Uzingca ngokuba usisityebi, umi kakuhle. Uthi awuswele nto. Enyanisweni nakuba ungaqondi nje ungowokusizelwa, impula kalujaca, kuba ulihlwempu, imfama, uzé." 
Revelation3:18 Ngoko ke ndikucebisa ukuba uthenge kum igolide enyityilikiswe ngomlilo yacwenga, ukuze ube sisityebi. Ngokunjalo thenga neempahla ezimhlophe, ukuze ubufihle ubuze bakho. Thenga nentambiso, uqabe amehlo akho, khon' ukuze ubone." 
Revelation3:19 Abo ndibathandayo ndiyabakhalimela ndibohlwaye. Ngoko ke zimisele, uguquke." 
Revelation3:20 Uyabona, ndimi emnyango ndinkqonkqoza. Ukuba umntu uyeva aze avule, ndiya kungena ndihlale naye, sitye kunye." 
Revelation3:21 Lowo woyisileyo uya kuba nenxaxheba ebhotwe. Kaloku nam ndoyisa ndaza ndafumana inxaxheba yokungqendeva noBawo ebhotwe. 
Revelation3:22 “ ‘Lowo uneendlebe zokuva makaluve udaba oluthethwa nguMoya ebandleni.’ ” 
Revelation4:1 Emva koko ndabona izulu livulekile phambi kwam. Ndeva eliya lizwi bendilive lithetha nam, lihlokoma okwexilongo lisithi kum: “Yiza ngapha ndikubonise izinto ezimelwe kukwenzeka emva kwezi.”" 
Revelation4:2 Ngoko nangoko ndaba semandleni kaMoya. Ndabona apho ezulwini kukho isihlalo sobukhosi. 
Revelation4:3 Kwakuhleli kuso ingangalala ekhazimla okwamatye exabiso, akudidi loozidayimani ngokumenyezela, ekuthiwa yijaspa nekorneli ukubizwa kwawo. Isihlalo eso sasinesangqa somnyama owawubengezela nawo oku kwelitye lexabiso eliluhlaza ekuthiwa yiemeraldi ukubizwa kwalo." 
Revelation4:4 Kwakukho nezinye izihlalo zithe thande, zingqonge isihlalo sobukhosi, zingamashumi mabini anesine; kukho namadoda amakhulu angamashumi mabini anesine awayethe nqwadalala kwezo zihlalo. Ayethe wambu ezimhlophe iingubo, ethwele izithsaba zegolide." 
Revelation4:5 Apho esihlalweni sobukhosi kwakutshawuza imibane, kugragrama iindudumo. Kwakukho nezibane ezisixhenxe ezivuthayo phambi kwaso, ezingooMoya abasixhenxe bakaThixo." 
Revelation4:6 Kwakukho nento eyayingathi lulwandle lweglasi, ithe thebelele apho ngasesihlalweni, icwenge ngathi ngumkhenkce. Esazulwini apho, kanye ngasesihlalweni, kwakuhleli izilwanyana ezine zinamehlo macala onke, zingqonge isihlalo eso kanye." 
Revelation4:7 Isilwanyana sokuqala sasifana nengonyama. Esesibini sasinjengenkomo. Esesithathu sasifana nomntu, esesine sinjengokhozi luphaphazela." 
Revelation4:8 Isilwanyana ngasinye sasinamaphiko amathandathu, sinamehlo ngapha nangapha. Zazidumisa zingayeki emini nasebusuku, zisithi: “Uyingcwele, uyingcwele, uyingcwele, Nkosi Thixo Somandla, wena ubukade ukho, wena ukhoyo, uya kuhlala ukho!”" 
Revelation4:9 Lo gama izilwanyana ezine zibongayo, zidumisa, zibulela kulowo unguSonini-nanini uhleli esihlalweni sokulawula," 
Revelation4:10 wona amadoda amakhulu angamashumi amabini anesine ayekhahlela, enqula kulowo uhleli esihlalweni, unguSonini-nanini. Ayedanduluka, atsho azibeke nezithsaba zawo phambi kwengangalala, athi:" 
Revelation4:11 “Ufanelwe, Nkosi, Thixo, ngumbongo; imbeko negunya zezakho! Kaloku iinto zonke zadalwa nguwe; zabakho, zanobomi ngokuthanda kwakho.”" 
Revelation5:1 Ke kaloku ndabona kukho ohleli esihlalweni sokulawula, esandleni sakhe sokunene ephethe incwadi. Yona ke yayibhalwe macala, futhi iyincwadi enamacandelo asixhenxe. Icandelo ngalinye lalinophawu olugunyazisa ukuba yovulwa ngonelungelo kuphela." 
Revelation5:2 Kananjalo ndabona ingwanyalala yesithunywa sezulu esakhwaza sabuza sathi: “Ngaba ngubani ofanelekileyo onokuluqhaqha uphawu, ayivule le ncwadi?”" 
Revelation5:3 Kambe ke zange afumaneke onako ukuyivula ayifunde, nditsho nasezulwini, emhlabeni, naphantsi komhlaba." 
Revelation5:4 Kuthe kwakungafumaneki bani ukufaneleyo ukuyivula ayifunde incwadi leyo, zehl' iinyembezi kum." 
Revelation5:5 Kodwa ke enye yamadoda amakhulu yandikhalimela yathi: “Musa ukulila. Kaloku iNgonyama yesizwe sikaJuda, umnombo kaDavide, igqwesile, ikufanele ukuluqhaqha uphawu ngalunye, iyivule incwadi.”" 
Revelation5:6 Ndaza ke ndabona iXhwane limi bhuxe esazulwini sebhotwe. Lalingqongwe zizilwanyana ezine, ngokunjalo nangamadoda amakhulu. IXhwane eli lalibonakala ngathi lagwintwa. Lalineempondo ezisixhenxe, namehlo asixhenxe, angooMoya abasixhenxe bakaThixo abathunyelwe ehlabathini liphela." 
Revelation5:7 IXhwane eli laya kulowo wayehleli esihlalweni sokulawula, lafika layithatha incwadi leyo esandleni sakhe sokunene." 
Revelation5:8 Lithe iXhwane lakuyithatha incwadi leyo, izilwanyana ezine ndawonye namashumi amabini anesine amadoda amakhulu, asuka ee guqaqa phambi kwalo. Indoda nganye yayinehapu nesitya segolide esizele ziziqhumiso eziyimithandazo yosapho lukaThixo." 
Revelation5:9 Ayevuma ingoma entsha, esithi: “Ukufanele wena ukuyithatha incwadi; ukufanele wena ukuluqhaqha uphawu lwayo. Ewe, kaloku wena wabulawa; ngegazi lakho waluthengela uThixo uluntu kuzo zonke iintlanga neelwimi, kubantu ngabantu nezizwe ngezizwe." 
Revelation5:10 Ubenze ababingeleli basebhotwe, ukuze bakhonze uThixo wethu. Ewe, baya kulilawula nehlabathi.”" 
Revelation5:11 Kwakhona ndakhangela, ndabona izigidi ngezigidi namawaka-waka ezithunywa zezulu! Zazingqonge ibhotwe, nezilwanyana ezine, ngokunjalo namadoda amakhulu." 
Revelation5:12 Zazidanduluka zicula zisithi: “IXhwane elabulawayo likufanele ukuba namandla, ubutyebi, nolwazi, ukomelela, isithozela, ubungangamsha, nodumo!”" 
Revelation5:13 Ke kaloku ndaziva izidalwa nayo yonke indalo, ezulwini nasemhlabeni, phantsi komhlaba naselwandle, zidanduluka zisithi: “Kulowo uhleli esihlalweni sokulawula, nakulo iXhwane, mayibekho indumiso nesithozela, ubungangamsha namandla, ngonaphakade kanaphakade!”" 
Revelation5:14 Zavakala izilwanyana zozine zisithi: “*Amen!” Wona amadoda amakhulu athi guqaqa, akhahlela." 
Revelation6:1 Ndalibona ke iXhwane liqhaqha uphawu lokuqala lwaloo macandelo asixhenxe. Ngokunjalo ndasiva esinye sezilwanyana ezine sithetha ngelizwi elizongomayo, sisithi: “Yiz' apha!”" 
Revelation6:2 Kwaza kwathi gqi ihashe elimhlophe, ophezu kwalo ephethe utolo. Ke kaloku wathiwa jize ngesithsaba. Waphuma noloyiso, wahamba esenza iziqwenga, kuj' ubugodo konke apho ahamba khona." 
Revelation6:3 Lithe iXhwane lakuqhaqha uphawu lwesibini, ndeva isilwanyana sesibini sisithi: “Yiz' apha!”" 
Revelation6:4 Kwathi gqi elinye ihashe, libomvu ngebala. Lowo wayephezu kwalo wanikwa ilungelo lokugxobha-gxobha inzolo ehlabathini liphela, khon' ukuze abantu bagebengane. Yena ke wanikwa ingxavula yekrele." 
Revelation6:5 IXhwane lithe lisakuluqhaqha uphawu lwesithathu, ndeva isilwanyana sesithathu sisithi: “Yiz' apha!” Ndithe ndakukhangela ndabona ihashe elimnyama. Lowo wayekhwele kulo wayephethe isikali sokulinganisa, ngesandla." 
Revelation6:6 Kananjalo ndeva isandi esingathi lilizwi, siphuma kweziya zilwanyana zine. Lathetha lathi: “Isitya sengqolowa singangomvuzo wemini enye; izitya ezithathu zamazimba zingangomvuzo wemini enye; kambe ke uze ungadlalisi ngawo amafutha ndawonye newayini.”" 
Revelation6:7 Kwakhona iXhwane laqhaqha uphawu lwesine, ndaza ndeva isilwanyana sesine sisithi: “Yiz' apha!”" 
Revelation6:8 Ndakukhangela ndabona elinye ihashe; lona lalimbatshile. Igama lalowo wayehleli phezu kwalo lalinguKufa, kanti ke ezinyaweni zakhe kwakulandela uLabafileyo. Banikwa amagunya phezu kwesiqingatha sesine sehlabathi, ukuze bageqe ngekrele, ngembalela, isibetho, nangamarhamncwa." 
Revelation6:9 Ngokunjalo iXhwane laluqhaqha nolwesihlanu uphawu. Ngaphantsi kweqonga lamadini ndababona abo babebulewe ngenxa yokushumayela ilizwi likaThixo, nangenxa yokungqina." 
Revelation6:10 Babhomboloza bathi: “Kakade ke, Nkosi, Somandla oyiNgcwele kanye, koda kube nini ungasiphindezeli ulibuyekeze igazi lethu elaphalazwa ngabantu beli hlabathi?”" 
Revelation6:11 Elowo nalowo kubo wathiwa wambu ngomnweba omhlophe. Ngokunjalo kwathiwa mabakhe balinde okwethutyana, bade baphelele abalingane namawabo asaza kubulawa kwanjengabo." 
Revelation6:12 Ndalibona ke ngoku iXhwane liqhaqha uphawu lwesithandathu. Suka yazama-zamisa inyikima, ilanga lafaka ezokuzila lathi thsu, inyanga yona yajika yaligazi." 
Revelation6:13 Iinkwenkwezi zona zavuthulukela emhlabeni, zaxel' amakhiwane egeqwa sisaqhwithi." 
Revelation6:14 Sona isibhakabhaka saphel' emehlweni, kwaba ngathi kusongwa umqulu, zonke iintaba neziqithi zanqukrulwa." 
Revelation6:15 Zasuka ke izikumkani zehlabathi, abasemagunyeni neengqwayi-ngqwayi zomkhosi, oozityebi nezinxiba-mxhaka, nalo lonke uluntu, oozicaka nabakhululekileyo, baya kuzímela emiqolombeni nasemiqhokrweni ezintabeni." 
Revelation6:16 Badanduluka bebhekisa ezintabeni nasemaweni, bathi: “Siweleni, ukuze sifihlakale kulowo uhleli esihlalweni sokulawula nakwingqumbo yeXhwane!" 
Revelation6:17 Ewe, kaloku iMini yabo yokuphindezela igalelekile. Yaz'ba ngubani na ke onokusinda kuyo?”" 
Revelation7:1 Emva koko ndabona izithunywa ezine zimi kwiikona zone zomhlaba. Zazivalele imimoya yomhlaba yomine apho, ukuze kungabikho nampunde yamoya uvela elwandle, okanye ucande emhlabeni, ungabhudli namnye umthi." 
Revelation7:2 Ndabona nesinye isithunywa sisithi gqi ngasempumalanga, siphethe uphawu lukaThixo ohlala ehleli. Samemeza sibhekisa kweziya zithunywa zine bezinikwe igunya lokonakalisa umhlaba nolwandle, sisithi:" 
Revelation7:3 “Khanikhe nime ngokonakalisa umhlaba nolwandle nemithi! Maside sigqibe ukubeka uphawu lukaThixo kumabunzi ezicaka zakhe!” 
Revelation7:4 Ndaliva lixelwa nenani labo baphawulwayo. Kwaphawulwa ikhulu elinamashumi mane anesine amawaka kuzo zonke izizwe zakwaSirayeli. 
Revelation7:5 Kwisizwe sakwaJuda kwaphawulwa ishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwaRubhen yaba lishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwaGadi yalishumi elinambini lamawaka," 
Revelation7:6 kwesakwa-Ashere yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwa-Nafetali yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwaManase yalishumi elinambini lamawaka," 
Revelation7:7 kwesakwa-Simon yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwaLevi yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwaIsakare yalishumi elinambini lamawaka," 
Revelation7:8 kwesakwaZebhulon yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwesakwaJosefu yalishumi elinambini lamawaka, kwaza nakwesakwaBhenjamin yalishumi elinambini lamawaka." 
Revelation7:9 Emva koko ndabona kusithi thu ihlokondiba elalingenakubalwa bani. Abo yayingabantu beentlanga ngeentlanga, izizwe ngezizwe, neelwimi ngeelwimi. Babemi phambi kwesihlalo sokulawula naphambi kweXhwane. Babevathe ezimhlophe, bephethe amasundu," 
Revelation7:10 bedanduluka besithi: “Huntshu! Usoyisele uThixo ohleli esihlalweni sakhe sokulawula, nalo iXhwane!”" 
Revelation7:11 Izithunywa zonke zazimi zingqonge isihlalo eso sokulawula namadoda amakhulu kwakunye nezilwanyana ezine, zathi qubudu phambi kukaThixo osesihlalweni sakhe, zanqula" 
Revelation7:12 zisithi: “*Amen! Umbongo, udumo, nolwazi, umbulelo, isithozela, igunya, namandla, mazinikwe uThixo kude kube ngunaphakade kanaphakade! Amen!”" 
Revelation7:13 Enye inkonde yathi kum: “Aba bantu bambethe iingubo ezimhlophe ngoobani, bevela phi?” Ndaphendula ndathi:" 
Revelation7:14 “Mhlekazi, kwazi wena.” Yona yathi: “Aba bantu ngabo baphume kwiinkxwaleko zengcinezelo. Bazihlambile zamhlophe iingubo zabo ngamandla egazi leXhwane." 
Revelation7:15 Yiyo loo nto bemi phambi kukaThixo bemnqula imini nobusuku endlwini yakhe. Lowo uhleli kwisihlalo sakhe sokulawula wobafukamela. 
Revelation7:16 Abayi kulamba, abayi kunxanwa, abayi kugqatswa lilanga, bengayi kuva bushushu." 
Revelation7:17 Kaloku iXhwane elimi esazulwini sebhotwe liza kubalúsa, libaqhubele kwimithombo yamanzi aphilisayo. Wobasul' iinyembezi uThixo.”" 
Revelation8:1 Ke kaloku iXhwane laluqhaqha uphawu lwesixhenxe. Kwathi nzwanga ezulwini isithuba esingangecala leawara enye. 
Revelation8:2 Emva koko ndabona izithunywa ezisixhenxe ezima phambi koThixo, zinikwa amaxilongo asixhenxe." 
Revelation8:3 Esinye isithunywa esasiphethe isitya sokuqhumisa segolide seza kuma ngaseqongeni lesiqhumiso. Sanikwa isiqhumiso esininzi, ukuze sisinikele kunye nemithandazo yayo yonke imilowo phezu kweqonga legolide elaliphambi kwesihlalo sokulawula." 
Revelation8:4 Umsi wenyukela kuThixo kunye nemithandazo yemilowo, isithunywa simenzela isiqhumiso." 
Revelation8:5 Isithunywa ke sithathe isitya sesiqhumiso sasizalisa ngomlilo esasiwuthathe eqongeni apho, sasiphosa ezantsi emhlabeni. Ngoko nangoko kwabakho ukugqekreza kweendudumo nokutshawuza kombane, wanyikima umhlaba." 
Revelation8:6 Izithunywa ezisixhenxe ezaziphethe amaxilongo asixhenxe, ngoku zalungela ukuwavuthela." 
Revelation8:7 Salivuthela esokuqala isithunywa ixilongo laso. Kwawa isichotho nomlilo, zixutywe negazi. Satsha nqu isiqingatha sesithathu somhlaba. Isiqingatha sesithathu seendidi zonke zemithi, nalo lonke uhlobo lwengca lwatsha lwaphela." 
Revelation8:8 Salivuthela ixilongo laso nesesibini isithunywa. Kwaba ngathi intabakazi enkulu iphoswe elwandle ivutha; sathi isiqingatha sesithathu solwandle saba ligazi. 
Revelation8:9 Kwafa isiqingatha sesithathu sazo zonke iindidi zezinto ezihlala elwandle. Kwatshabalala isiqingatha sesithathu sazo zonke iinqanawa. 
Revelation8:10 Nesesithathu salivuthela elaso ixilongo. Kwathi qithi into enkulu yenkwenkwezi ezulwini, ivutha ililahle. Yawela phezu kwesiqingatha sesithathu semilambo nemithombo." 
Revelation8:11 Le nkwenkwezi kwakusithiwa ukubizwa kwayo nguKrakrayo. Saza ke isiqingatha sesithathu sawo onke amanzi saba krakra njengokrakrayo, kwafa inyambalala yabantu ngokuwasela." 
Revelation8:12 Salivuthela nesesine isithunywa ixilongo laso. Kwabakho ukugqabhuka kwesiqingatha sesithathu selanga nenyanga neenkwenkwezi, isiqingatha sesithathu sazo asabi nakukhanya. Sathi ke nesiqingatha semini asabi nakukhanya, kwaba njalo nasebusuku." 
Revelation8:13 Kuthe kusenjalo ndabona ukhozi luphaphazela phezu kwam. Ndaluva lukhala lusithi: “Yhoo! Yhoo! Yhoo, abantu bomhlaba! Yazi boba yini na zakuvakala izandi zamanye amaxilongo amathathu xa ziwavuthela izithunywa ezithathu!”" 
Revelation9:1 Emva koko isithunywa sesihlanu salivuthela ixilongo laso. Ndabona inkwenkwezi eyayiwe emhlabeni, inikwa isitshixo somwonyo oya enzonzobileni." 
Revelation9:2 Yawuvula umwonyo wenzonzobila. Kwaphuma umsi kuwo, owawungathi uvela kwizikokazi lomlilo. Loo msi walisitha ilanga nomoya." 
Revelation9:3 Kwavela iinkumbi, ziphuma kuloo msi, zeza emhlabeni. Zazinolwamvila olufana nolukanomadudwane." 
Revelation9:4 Zaziyalelwe ukuba ze zingayichukumisi ingca, naso nasiphi na isityalo okanye umthi. Zazithunyelwe kubantu ababengaphawulwanga ngophawu lukaThixo ebunzi." 
Revelation9:5 Zazithunyelwe ukubathuthumbisa iinyanga ezintlanu ngobuhlungu obufana nolwamvila lukanomadudwane, kodwa zingabulali." 
Revelation9:6 Ngelo xesha abantu boba bekufuna ukufa, kube kona ukufa kungafumaneki. Bokunqwenela ukufa, kodwa kona kubaphambe." 
Revelation9:7 Ezo nkumbi zazikhangeleka ngathi ngumkhosi wamahashe uxhabashele emfazweni. Entloko zazitsho ngezinto ezazingathi zizithsaba zegolide, zinobuso obufana nobomntu." 
Revelation9:8 Zazitsho ngeenwele ezinde, zinamazinyo afana nawengonyama." 
Revelation9:9 Zazifake izikhuselo-sifuba ezingathi zezentsimbi. Isandi sokurhatshaza kwamaphiko azo sasivakala ngathi sisandi seenqwelo zamahashe zisinga edabini. 
Revelation9:10 Imisila yazo yayifana neyoonomadudwane, inolwamvila. Babusemsileni apho ubuhlungu bokuthuthumbisa abantu iinyanga ezintlanu." 
Revelation9:11 Inkosi yazo yayisisithunywa sasenzonzobileni. Igama layo lalinguAbhadon ngesiHebhere, uApoliyon ngesiGrike." 
Revelation9:12 Lidlule ishwangusha lokuqala. Kodwa aseza amabini. 
Revelation9:13 Salivuthela ixilongo laso isithunywa sesithandathu. Ndeva ilizwi livela phakathi kweempondo zeqonga lamadini legolide, elaliphambi kukaThixo." 
Revelation9:14 Lathi kwisithunywa sesithandathu esasiphethe ixilongo masizikhulule izithunywa ezine ezazibotshelelwe kumlambokazi iEfrati. 
Revelation9:15 Zakhululwa zozine ezo zithunywa ukuba zibulale isiqingatha sesithathu soluntu. Zazihleli zilimiselwe kakade eli thuba, kanye ngalo nyaka nangale nyanga, ngalo mhla kanye nangeli xesha." 
Revelation9:16 Ndalixelelwa inani lemikhosi yamahashe. Yayingamakhulu amabini ezigidi. 
Revelation9:17 Waba nje umbono endaba nawo wamahashe nabo bawakhweleyo: Babetsho ngezikhuselo-sifuba ezibomvu, nezizuba, nezimthubi. Amahashe iintloko zazifana nentloko yengonyama. Ayephuma umlilo ngomlomo, kuqhuma umsi nesalfa." 
Revelation9:18 Kwabulawa isiqingatha sesithathu soluntu ngezi zibetho zozithathu zomlilo, nomsi, nesalfa." 
Revelation9:19 Ubuhlungu bala mahashe babusemlonyeni nasemisileni. Imisila yayineentloko ngathi ziinyoka. Ayeluma ngayo imisila. 
Revelation9:20 Amasalela abantu abasindayo kweso sibetho akazange ahlukane nezithixo awayezenzele. Akazange ayeke ukunqula iindimoni nezithixo ezaziqingqwe ngegolide nesiliva nobhedu, amatye nangomthi, izinto ezazingenako nokubona nokuva nokushukuma oku." 
Revelation9:21 Akazange azisole nokuzisola ngobugebenga, nobugqwirha, ukurheletya, nobututu bawo." 
Revelation10:1 Ke kaloku ndabona enye ingwanyalala yesithunywa isihla iphuma ezulwini. Sasithiwe wambu lilifu, intloko yaso ithiwe thande ngumnyama. Ubuso babubengezela ngathi lilanga. Yona imilenze yayingathi ziintsika zomlilo." 
Revelation10:2 Esandleni sasiphethe incwadana, ivuliwe. Sasingxabalazile, unyawo lokunene lumi elwandle, olwasekhohlo lusemhlabeni." 
Revelation10:3 Sakhwaza ngelizwi elingathi ngumgqumo wengonyama. 
Revelation10:4 Emva kwaloo mkhwazo kwaphendula izithonga ezisixhenxe zendudumo. Ndithe xa ndiza kuyibhala into eyayithethwa ziindudumo ezisixhenxe, ndeva ilizwi liphuma ezulwini lisithi: “Into ethethwa ziindudumo musa ukuyibhala, ilihlebo.”" 
Revelation10:5 Isithunywa eso besingxabalazile ndasibona sisiphakamisela ezulwini isandla saso sokunene. 
Revelation10:6 Safunga uSonini-nanini, owadala izulu nehlabathi, ulwandle nezinto zonke ezilapho kuzo, sathi: “Ixesha limkile!" 
Revelation10:7 Liya kuthi lakufika ithuba lokuba isithunywa sesixhenxe sikhalise ixilongo laso, icebo elingaziwa mntu likaThixo lifezekiswe, kanye njengoko wayethembisile kwizicaka zakhe ezazivakalisa udaba.”" 
Revelation10:8 Kwakhona ilizwi elaliphuma ezulwini ndaliva lisithi kum: “Yiya uyithathe incwadi leyo ivulekileyo iphethwe sisithunywa esingxabalazele phezu kolwandle nomhlaba.” 
Revelation10:9 Ndiyile, ndacela ukuba isithunywa sindinike incwadana leyo. Sithe ke sona: “Yithathe uyitye. Yona yofana nobusi emlonyeni, kodwa iya kukuqumbela.”" 
Revelation10:10 Ndayithatha ke esandleni sesithunywa eso ndayitya. Okunene yaba mnandi njengobusi emlonyeni, kodwa ndithe ndakuyiginya ndaqunjelwa." 
Revelation10:11 Ndaxelelwa kwathiwa: “Kwakhona kufuneka uvakalise udaba lukaThixo olumayela nezizwe ngezizwe, iintlanga ngeentlanga, iilwimi, nezikumkani.”" 
Revelation11:1 Ke kaloku ndanikwa ingcongolo ende yokulinganisa, kwathiwa: “Hamba uye kulinganisa *indlu kaThixo, neqonga lamadini, ubale nabo banqulayo." 
Revelation11:2 Ke yona inkundla engaphandle uze ungazihluphi ngayo, kuba inikezelwe ezintlangeni. Zona ke ziya kusixusha ngeenyawo isixeko esingcwele isithuba esingangeenyanga ezingamashumi amane anambini." 
Revelation11:3 Ngokunjalo ndiya kumisa amangqina amabini, ukuze avakalise udaba. Ngazo zonke ezo ntsuku zilishumi elinambini lamakhulu, mashumi omathandathu, aya kuba enxibe ezirhwexayo zokuzila.”" 
Revelation11:4 La mangqina ke yiminquma emibini, kunye nezibane ezibini ezimi phambi kweNkosi yehlabathi." 
Revelation11:5 Ukuba kukho bani ufuna ukuwenzakalisa, emlonyeni wawo kuya kuphuma umlilo ulutshabalalise olo tshaba. Uya kufa ngolo hlobo ke umntu ofuna ukuwenzakalisa la mangqina." 
Revelation11:6 Ewe, aya kuba namagunya okusivala isibhakabhaka ingani imvula ngexesha lokuvakalisa kwawo udaba lukaThixo. Futhi anawo amagunya okuwajika amanzi abe ligazi; ihlabathi liphela aya kuba namagunya okulihlisela izibetho ngezibetho ngokuthanda kwawo." 
Revelation11:7 La mangqina aya kuthi akuba egqibile ukuluvakalisa udaba olo, kuphume irhamncwa enzonzobileni. Lona ke liya kulwa nawo liwabulale." 
Revelation11:8 Imizimba yawo iya kuqungquluza esitalatweni sesixeko esikhulu, apho yaxhonywa khona emnqamlezweni iNkosi yawo. Esi sixeko sifuziselwa yiSodom okanye iJiputa." 
Revelation11:9 Imizimba yala mangqina iya kuhlala apho iintsuku ezintathu ezinesiqingatha, baze abantu bezizwe ngezizwe, iintlanga ngeentlanga, neelwimi ngeelwimi, beze kuyibona, bangavumi ukuba ingcwatywe." 
Revelation11:10 Ukufa kwaba babini kuya kuba yinto emnandi ebantwini behlabathi. Baya kwenza itheko, banikane izipho. Kaloku la mangqina aya kubangcungcuthekisa abantu behlabathi." 
Revelation11:11 Emva kweentsuku ezintathu ezinesiqingatha uThixo wawaphefumlela la mangqina avuka, baza bonke abayibonileyo loo nto barhwaqela." 
Revelation11:12 Kwavakala umkhwazo ophuma ezulwini usithi kuwo: “Nyukani nize apha!” Zathi zisabukele iintshaba zawo, anyukela ezulwini ngelifu." 
Revelation11:13 Kanye ngawo loo mzuzu kwabakho inyikima eyoyikekayo, saza isahlulo seshumi sesixeko eso satshabalala. Kwafa abantu abangamawaka asixhenxe. Abaseleyo bangenwa lunkwantyo, baza badumisa ubukhulu boThixo osezulwini." 
Revelation11:14 Ngoku lidlule ishwangusha lesibini, kambe ke liyeza elesithathu kamsinya!" 
Revelation11:15 Ngokunjalo nesesixhenxe isithunywa salikhalisa ixilongo, kwaza kwavakala imikhwazo ezulwini, isithi: “Ngoku ihlabathi liza kulawulwa yiNkosi kunye noMthanjiswa wayo uKrestu, yaye ke iya kulawula kude kube ngunaphakade kanaphakade.”" 
Revelation11:16 Kananjalo amashumi amabini anesine amadoda amakhulu athe nqadalala phambi koThixo, athi qubudu phambi kwakhe, anqula embonga," 
Revelation11:17 esithi: “Siyakubulela, Nkosi Thixo uSomandla, wena Ndikhoyo owayekho kakade, kuba uwathathele kuwe amagunya, walawula!" 
Revelation11:18 Izizwe zagragrama; ke yona imini yempindezelo ifikile, abafileyo baza kugwetywa. *Abashumayeli, izicaka zakho, baza kwamkela, usapho lwakho, abakhulu kwanabanci, bebonke abakuthobelayo. Ewe, lifikile ixesha lokubatshabalalisa abo batshabalalisa ihlabathi!”" 
Revelation11:19 Yasuka yavuleka *indlu kaThixo esezulwini. Yatsho yabonakala ityesi yomnqophiso. Ngokunjalo ke kwabakho nezabhokwe zemibane, intswahla, ukugqekreza kweendudumo, nonyikimo-mhlaba, kunye nemvula yesichotho." 
Revelation12:1 Kwavela umqondiso ocacileyo esibhakabhakeni – umfazi wayambethe ilanga, inyanga isezinyaweni zakhe, nesithsaba seenkwenkwezi ezilishumi elinambini simthe jize intloko." 
Revelation12:2 Wayekhulelwe, ekhala ziintlungu zokubeleka." 
Revelation12:3 Kuvele omnye umqondiso esibhakabhakeni. Kuthe gqi igongqongqo elibomvu krwe. Lalineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi; linezithsaba ezisixhenxe kwezo ntloko. 
Revelation12:4 Umsila walo wavuthulula isiqingatha sesithathu seenkwenkwezi, waziwisela phantsi emhlabeni. Igongqongqo lema ngaphambi kwalo mfazi wayeza kubeleka, ukuze luluthi bimbilili usana olo xa luvelayo." 
Revelation12:5 Umfazi lowo wazala umntwana oyinkwenkwe, owayemiselwe ukuzilawula ngegunya elingqongqo zonke iintlanga. Kodwa olo sana lwathiwa xhwi lwasiwa ewongeni kuThixo ohleli kwibhotwe lakhe." 
Revelation12:6 Umfazi yena wabalekela entlango apho wayelungiselelwe indawo khona nguThixo. Wahlala apho egcinakele amakhulu alishumi elinambini namashumi amathandathu eentsuku. 
Revelation12:7 Kwabakho idabi ezulwini. UMikayeli nezithunywa zakhe balihlasela igongqongqo. Lazilwela nalo kunye nezithunywa zalo. 
Revelation12:8 Kodwa loyiswa, laza laphelelwa yindawo ezulwini." 
Revelation12:9 Ke igongqongqo – inyoka endala eyakhohlisa uluntu luphela, uSathana, umtyholi – laphoswa ezantsi emhlabeni kunye nezithunywa zalo." 
Revelation12:10 Kuvakele ilizwi lidanduluka livela ezulwini lisithi: “Luthwasile ngoku uloyiso negunya nolawulo lukaThixo wethu. Lithwasile ngoku igunya lomthanjiswa wakhe uKrestu. Kaloku umtyholi lo wayesoloko ewamangalela ubusuku nemini amawethu phambi kukaThixo wethu, ukhutshelwe ngaphandle ezulwini.”" 
Revelation12:11 Bamoyisile ngamandla edini leXhwane nangenyaniso kaThixo ebebekade beyingqinela, bengoyiki ukububeka esichengeni ubomi babo." 
Revelation12:12 Memelelani ke ngoko, mazulu kwakunye nabo bahlala khona! Kodwa, hayi ishwangusha elisemhlabeni naselwandle! Kaloku umtyholi uze kuzo egragrama ngumsindo, kuba uyazi ukuba selephelelwe lixesha." 
Revelation12:13 Lithe igongqongqo lakuqonda ukuba lilahlelwe emhlabeni, laphuthuma kulaa mfazi wayezele umntwana oyinkwenkwe." 
Revelation12:14 Kodwa wayenikwe amaphiko afana nawokhozi umfazi, ukuze abhabhele entlango apho wayeza kugcinakala khona iminyaka emithathu enesiqingatha engenakuhlaselwa ligongqongqo, inyoka endala." 
Revelation12:15 Ke lona igongqongqo, inyoka leyo, lahlanza umlambo wamanzi emva komfazi lowo ukuze akhukuliswe." 
Revelation12:16 Suka umhlaba wona wamnceda umfazi. Wavuleka, wawaginya loo manzi ayephume kwelo gongqongqo." 
Revelation12:17 Lamxhiba umfazi, lahamba laya kusikhuphela kwinzala yakhe eso sixhiba, engabo bonke abo bathobela imithetho kaThixo, bebambelele kwiimfundiso zikaYesu." 
Revelation12:18 Lafana lee nkamalala apho elunxwemeni igongqongqo. 
Revelation13:1 Ke kaloku ndabona irhamncwa liphuma elwandle. Lona ke lalineentloko ezisixhenxe; iimpondo zona zazilishumi. Uphondo ngalunye lwalunembasa; kanti ke iintloko zaziphawulwe ngamagama amanyumnyezi. 
Revelation13:2 Eli rhamncwa lalingathi lihlosi, koko iinyawo zalo zazifana nezebhere, wona umlomo ufana nowengonyama. Irhamncwa eli lafumana amagunya namandla ndawonye nobungangalala, libunikwa ligongqongqo." 
Revelation13:3 Enye yeentloko zalo yangxwelerheka, kodwa yabuya yaphila. Ihlabathi liphela lathatheka ngulo mmangaliso, latsho lalandela irhamncwa elo." 
Revelation13:4 Bonke abantu balinqula igongqongqo elo, kuba amagunya alo liwanike irhamncwa. Kanti ke balinqula nerhamncwa elo, belibonga besithi: “Ngubani onokulingana nerhamncwa; ingubani khona onokulwa nalo?”" 
Revelation13:5 Isithuba esingangeenyanga ezimashumi mane anambini irhamncwa lavunyelwa ukuba lisebenzise amagunya alo, lithethe izinto ezimanyumnyezi, liqalekise." 
Revelation13:6 Lasuka ke lamqalekisa uThixo, latshabhisa negama lakhe ndawonye nomzi wakhe ezulwini, kwakunye nâbo bahlala khona." 
Revelation13:7 Lavunyelwa ukuba lilwe nosapho lukaThixo liloyise. Ngokunjalo lanikwa amagunya kuzo zonke iintlanga, izizwe, iilwimi, noluntu." 
Revelation13:8 Bonke abantu behlabathi baya kulinqula. Abo ke ngabantu abamagama angabhalwanga encwadini yabaphilayo eyabhalwa kwangaphambi kokusekwa kwehlabathi. Incwadi le ke yeyeXhwane elabulawayo. 
Revelation13:9 “Oneendlebe zokuva makeve! 
Revelation13:10 Nabani na ofanele ukubanjwa uya kubanjwa; kanti ke nabani na oza kubulawa ngekrele uya kubulawa ngekrele. Le nto ke yenza kube yimfuneko ukuba abantu bakaThixo banyamezele, futhi babambelele elukholweni.”" 
Revelation13:11 Kwakhona ndabona elinye irhamncwa lisithi nyalulu emhlabeni. Lona lalineempondo ezifana nezetakane, kodwa lalithetha ngathi ligongqongqo." 
Revelation13:12 Eli rhamncwa lasebenzisa amagunya erhamncwa lokuqala, lijongile. Lanyanzela ihlabathi nabemi balo ukuba banqule irhamncwa lokuqala, ingxwelerha leyo yaphilayo." 
Revelation13:13 Lalisenza imimangaliso; ewe, lalide lenze ukuba kuhle umlilo ezulwini abantu bejongile." 
Revelation13:14 Ngale ndlela ke lavunyelwa ukuba libalahlekise abantu behlabathi. Kaloku le mimangaliso laliyenza likho neliya lokuqala irhamncwa. Eli rhamncwa lathi abantu behlabathi mabaqingqe umfanekiso wokuwonga elaa rhamncwa lalingxwelerhwe likrele kodwa laphila. 
Revelation13:15 Irhamncwa eli lanikwa amandla okuba liwuphefumlele umfanekiso lowo, ukuze uthethe; futhi ugunyazise ukuba babulawe abo babengawunquli." 
Revelation13:16 Ngaphezu koko ke lanyanzelisa ukuba bonke abantu, abancinci nabakhulu, izityebi namahlwempu, amakhoboka nabakhululekileyo, mabaphawulwe ezandleni zokunene okanye ebunzi." 
Revelation13:17 Ngaphandle kolu phawu lumele igama okanye inani elimele igama lerhamncwa, akukho mntu wayevunyelwa ukuba athenge okanye athengise." 
Revelation13:18 Le ndawo ke ifuna ingqiqo. Nabani na oqiqayo angalifumana inani elimele irhamncwa. Kaloku inani elo limele umntu. Lona ke inani elo ngamakhulu amathandathu anamashumi amathandathu anesithandathu. 
Revelation14:1 Kananjalo ndathi ndakujonga ndabona iXhwane lithe bhuxe entabeni iZiyon. Lalikunye nabantu abalikhulu elinamashumi amane anesine lamawaka. Bona babephawulwe ngegama lalo kunye nelikaYise ebunzi. 
Revelation14:2 Ndeva ukuhlokoma kwelizwi liphuma ezulwini. Lalingathi sisandi samanzi engxangxasi; lalingathi kukuqhaqhazelisa kweendudumo. Eli lizwi laba ngathi ziimvumi ezibetha iihapu. 
Revelation14:3 Babethe qwelele phambi kwebhotwe naphambi kwezilwanyana ezine, ndawonye namadoda amakhulu, bevuma ingoma entsha. Akukho bani wayenako ukuyilandela loo ngoma, ngaphandle kwabo bakhululekileyo emhlabeni; ewe, nditsho abo balikhulu elinamashumi amane anesine lamawaka." 
Revelation14:4 Aba ke ngabo bangazidyobhanga ngamabhinqa. Ewe, banyulu. Bona bathe ngcembe emva kweXhwane. Aba bakhululwe bephuma kulo lonke uluntu. Balulibo lukaThixo kunye neXhwane." 
Revelation14:5 Abazange bakhohlisa; bamsulwa. 
Revelation14:6 Ndabona isithunywa sindanda phezulu esibhakabhakeni. Sasithunywe ukuba siye kuvakalisa uncuthu lweendaba ezingasoze zithini. Zona zezabo bonke abantu behlabathi, iintlanga, iilwimi ngeelwimi, nezizwe ngezizwe." 
Revelation14:7 Sadanduluka samemeza sathi: “Thobelani uThixo, nimdumise ngenxa yobungangamsha bakhe! Kaloku ngoku lifikile ithuba lokuba alugwebe uluntu. Ngoko ke nqulani nimdumise umenzi wamazulu nomhlaba, ulwandle nemithombo empompozayo!”" 
Revelation14:8 Kwalandela esinye isithunywa sisithi: “Huntshu! Ithe folokohla yawa indlovukazi uBhabheli! Kaloku uluchwe lokurheletya kwakhe uluseze zonke izizwe!” 
Revelation14:9 Ngokukwanjalo salandela nesinye isithunywa simemeza sisithi: “Wonke umntu onqula irhamncwa kunye nomfanekiso walo, aze amkele uphawu lwalo ebunzi okanye esandleni," 
Revelation14:10 uya kutsarhwa yingqumbo kaThixo. Ewe kaloku, impindezelo kaThixo itsale yada yatshukula. Uya kugcadeka elangatyeni lomlilo wesalfa, iXhwane nezithunywa ezingcwele zibukele." 
Revelation14:11 Umsi waloo mlilo uya kutsho ngomlembelele unyuquza unyuka ungaze unqamke. Abo banqula irhamncwa nomfanekiso walo, abanophawu lwegama lalo, abasoze baphumle imini nobusuku.”" 
Revelation14:12 Le meko ke icela umngeni kusapho lukaThixo ukuba lube nomonde, luyithobele imiyalelo kaThixo, lunyaniseke kuYesu." 
Revelation14:13 Kwakhona ndeva ilizwi liphuma ezulwini lisithi: “Bhala uthi: ‘Ewe kambe, banoyolo abo bafa bezinikele eNkosini!’ Ewe, ukusukela ngoku uMoya uthi: ‘Baphumle ekubulalekeni kwabo, baphahlwe ziziqhamo zemisebenzi yabo.’ ”" 
Revelation14:14 Ndithe ndisajongile kwavela ilifu elimhlophe, kulo kuthe ngcu into engathi ngumntu. Intloko yakhe yayihonjiswe ngembasa yegolide, ephethe irhengqe ebukhali ngesandla." 
Revelation14:15 Kwaphuma isithunywa endlwini kaThixo, samemeza lowo wayehleli efini, sathi: “Yolula isandla sakho, uvune ngerhengqe leyo. Kaloku ixesha lokuvuna lifikile, ibe ke nesivuno sehlabathi sesilungile.”" 
Revelation14:16 Lowo wayehleli efini wasebenzisa irhengqe yakhe, wavuna ehlabathini." 
Revelation14:17 Kwakhona kwavela esinye isithunywa siphuma endlwini kaThixo esezulwini. Naso sasiphethe irhengqe ebukhali. 
Revelation14:18 Ngokunjalo kwathi thu esinye isithunywa eqongeni. Esi sona sasingumongameli womlilo. Sabhekisa kweso sasinerhengqe ebukhali, sikhwaza sisithi: “Yolula isandla sakho, uqokelele idiliya ehlabathini, kuba ivuthiwe ngoku.”" 
Revelation14:19 Senjenjalo ke isithunywa eso, sasika sayiqokelela idiliya yehlabathi. Sayithatha sayiphosa esixovulelweni sengqumbo kaThixo." 
Revelation14:20 Idiliya leyo yaxovulelwa ngaphandle kwesixeko. Isixovulelo eso sampompoza igazi langumgama oziikhilomitha ezingamakhulu alishumi elinesithandathu. Lalinzulu kangangokuba ihashe lalisithi gabhu ngomkhala. 
Revelation15:1 Ndiphinde ndabona umqondiso ocacileyo nomangalisayo esibhakabhakeni. Izithunywa ezisixhenxe zezisa ezokugqibela izibetho ezisixhenxe. Kaloku yayiza kufezekiswa ngazo ingqumbo kaThixo. 
Revelation15:2 Kwaba ngathi ndibona ulwandle olusabuglasi, luxutywe nomlilo. Kwakumi ngakulo abo babequbisene nerhamncwa baza boyisa, baphikisana nomfanekiso walo, ngokunjalo nenani legama lalo. Bonke babephethe iihapu," 
Revelation15:3 bevuma ingoma kaMosis isicaka sikaThixo neXhwane, besithi: “Mikhulu iyamangalisa imisebenzi yakho, Nkosi, Thixo Somandla! Zilungile, ziyinyaniso iindlela zakho, Kumkani weentlanga zonke!" 
Revelation15:4 Ngubani obengenakunkwantya aze akubonge wena, Nkosi? Kaloku nguwe wedwa oyingcwele. Zonke iintlanga ziya kunqula ziqubude kuwe, kuba izigqibo zakho ezilungileyo zicacile kubo bonke.”" 
Revelation15:5 Emva koko ndabona ingcwele yeengcwele, isibingelelo ahlala kuso uThixo, sivuleka ezulwini." 
Revelation15:6 Kwaphuma kuso izithunywa ezisixhenxe zezibetho ezisixhenxe, zivathe ezimhlophe zelinen, zibhinqe ngeebhanti zegolide." 
Revelation15:7 Esinye sezilwanyana ezine sazinika izithunywa ezisixhenxe izitya zegolide ezalatha ukuba yayiseligcwel' ibhekile yingqumbo kaThixo ohlal' ehleli. 
Revelation15:8 *Indlu kaThixo yayiqhuma ilitsili ngumsi wesihomo namandla kaThixo. Akuzange kubekho mntu waba nakungena, zada zaba zigqithile izibetho ezisixhenxe zezithunywa ezisixhenxe." 
Revelation16:1 Ndeva kudanduluka ilizwi kwindawo engcwele, lisithi izithunywa ezisixhenxe maziye kuzichitha ehlabathini izitya ezisixhenxe zengqumbo kaThixo." 
Revelation16:2 Sanduluka isithunywa sokuqala, sasichitha ehlabathini isitya saso. Abo babenophawu lwerhamncwa, nabo babenqula umfanekiso walo, baphuma izilonda ezibi neziqaqambayo." 
Revelation16:3 Esesibini isithunywa sasichithela elwandle isitya saso. Amanzi ajika afana negazi lomntu ofileyo. Kwafa zonke izinambuzane eziphila elwandle. 
Revelation16:4 Isithunywa sesithathu sasichithela emilanjeni nasemithonjeni isitya saso, yaza yajika yaba ligazi." 
Revelation16:5 Ndeva isithunywa esilawula amanzi sisithi: “Zilungile izigqibo zakho, wena ungcwele, uhleli ukho, nobukade ukho!" 
Revelation16:6 Baliphalaza igazi lemilowo kaThixo *nelabashumayeli, ngoku ke ubanika igazi ukuba basele. Ibafanele loo nto bayifumeneyo, tshotsho!”" 
Revelation16:7 Kwavakala ilizwi, liphuma eqongeni lamadini, lisithi: “Nkosi, Thixo Somandla, ngenene zinyanisekile, zilungile, izigqibo zakho!”" 
Revelation16:8 Sasichitha elangeni isitya saso isithunywa sesine. Laza ilanga lakhululelwa ukubatshisa ngengqantsini yobushushu abantu. 
Revelation16:9 Batsha abantu seso sihogo. Baliqalekisa igama likaThixo ezeza ngegunya lakhe ezo zibetho. Kodwa abazanga bahlukane nezono, banqule uThixo." 
Revelation16:10 Esesihlanu isithunywa sasichitha phezu kwesihlalo serhamncwa isitya saso. Kwaba mnyama tsiki kuloo mmandla wolawulo lwerhamncwa. Babengcungcutheka abantu ziintuthumbo. 
Revelation16:11 Kodwa uThixo wezulu babemqalekisa ngenxa yezilonda neengqaqambo, bengaguquki kwiindlela zabo ezigwenxa." 
Revelation16:12 Isithunywa sesithandathu sasichitha phezu komlambo omkhulu iEfrati isitya saso. Watsha umlambo, kwavuleka indlela yeekumkani ezivela empumalanga." 
Revelation16:13 Ndabona iindimoni ezintathu ezazingathi ngamasele. Zaphuma emlonyeni wegongqongqo, nowerhamcwa, nakowomshumayeli oxokayo." 
Revelation16:14 Yayiziindimoni ezinamandla okwenza imilingo. Zazithunywe ukuya kuqokelela edabini zonke iikumkani zelizwe ngaloo mini inkulu kaThixo uSomandla. 
Revelation16:15 “Uyabona ke, ngaloo mini ndiya kuza njengesela. Unoyolo ke lowo uhlala elindile, engazikhululi izambatho zakhe, ukuze angahambi ze, ahlazeke ebantwini.”" 
Revelation16:16 Iindimoni zaziqokelela ndawonye iikumkani, kwindawo ekuthiwa yiArmagedon ngesiHebhere." 
Revelation16:17 Isithunywa sesixhenxe sasichitha emoyeni isitya saso. Kwavakala ilizwi lidanduluka esihlalweni sobukhosi endlwini kaThixo lisithi: “Kuphelile.” 
Revelation16:18 Kwabakho ubumenye-menye bemibane, ukugqekreza, nezandi zeendudumo, kunye nenyikima eyoyikekayo. Akuzange kubekho nyikima yoyikeka njengaleyo ezimbalini!" 
Revelation16:19 Saqhekeka kathathu isixeko esikhulu. Izixeko zamazwe onke zadilika zangamabhodlo. UThixo akazanga asilibale isixeko esikhulu iBhabheli. Wayiseza impindezelo yakhe. 
Revelation16:20 Zonke iintaba zathi shwaka, neziqithi zaphel' emehlweni." 
Revelation16:21 Kwawa isichotho esingamatye amakhulu. Ilitye ngalinye lalimalunga namashumi amahlanu eekhilogram ubunzima. Sabatyhumfuza abantu. Bamqalekisa uThixo abantu ngenxa yesibetho seso sichotho soyikekayo. 
Revelation17:1 Esinye sezithunywa ezisixhenxe ezaziphethe izitya ezisixhenxe seza kum, sathi: “Yiza, ndiza kukubonisa ukugwetywa kwehenyukazi elimi phezu kwemilambo." 
Revelation17:2 Kaloku izikumkani zehlabathi zirheletya nalo. Ewe, ihlabathi liphela lithe thwanga kukurheletya nalo.”" 
Revelation17:3 Ke kaloku ndaba semandleni kaMoya, saza isithunywa eso sandisa entlango. Apho ke ndabona umfazi ekhwele phezu kwerhamncwa elibomvu elalinemibhalo emanyumnyezi. Lalineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi." 
Revelation17:4 Umfazi lowo wayevathe ezimfusa nezibomvu, eyokozela ngamaso egolide, intsimbi, namatye exabiso. Ngesandla wayephethe indebe yegolide eyayizele uluchwe lokungcola nokurheletya kwakhe." 
Revelation17:5 Ebunzi kwakubhalwe igama elingaziwa mntu: “UBhabheli, unina wamahenyukazi, nazo zonke iintlondi zehlabathi.”" 
Revelation17:6 Lo mfazi ndambonayo wayenxile ligazi losapho lukaThixo, ngokunjalo negazi labo babengqina ngoYesu. Ndithe ndakumbona ndamangaliswa, kodwa isithunywa eso sabuza sathi:" 
Revelation17:7 “Ngani ukuba umangaliswe? Phulaphula ke ndikuxelele ihlebo ngalo mfazi kunye nerhamncwa akhwele kulo elineentloko ezisixhenxe neempondo ezilishumi. 
Revelation17:8 Elo rhamncwa ulibonileyo lelo lalikho, lingasekhoyo ngoku; kambe ke lisaza kuphuma enzonzobileni, landule ke ukuya kwantshabalalo. Abo bamagama angazange abhalwe encwadini yabaphilayo, seloko lasekwayo ihlabathi, baya kumangaliswa bakulibona irhamncwa; kuba kaloku lalikhe ladla ubomi, kodwa ngoku alisekho, phofu lisaza kubuya livele." 
Revelation17:9 “Kwabo banako ukutolika nasi isitshixo. Iintloko ezisixhenxe ziinduli ezisixhenxe emi kuzo umfazi. Kwangokunjalo zimele ookumkani abasixhenxe. 
Revelation17:10 Isihlanu kubo asisekho, omnye usesezintanjeni, omnye useza, kambe naxa selefikile uya kulawula ixeshana nje." 
Revelation17:11 Ke lona irhamncwa, elo lalikhe lakho lingasekhoyo ngoku, lingowesibhozo – nakuba lingomnye wabasixhenxe nje – futhi liza kutshabalala." 
Revelation17:12 “Zona iimpondo ezilishumi ozibonileyo, ngookumkani abalishumi abangekaqali ukulawula. Kambe ke baya kwabelana ngolawulo kunye nerhamncwa okwethutyana nje." 
Revelation17:13 Kaloku boshumi injongo yabo iyafana: kukunikezela ulawulo kwirhamncwa. 
Revelation17:14 Baya kulwa neXhwane, kodwa liboyise. Kaloku lona liyiNkosi yamakhosi, iKumkani yeekumkani. Abalandeli balo baya kuba nenxaxheba kolo loyiso lwalo. Ewe, nditsho abanyulwa ababiziweyo nabathembekileyo.”" 
Revelation17:15 Isithunywa saqhuba sathi: “Amanzi emilambo lawo uwabonileyo, apho limi khona ihenyukazi, luluntu, iintlanga, izizwe, neelwimi ngeelwimi." 
Revelation17:16 Iimpondo ezilishumi ozibonileyo kunye nerhamncwa zosuka zilithiye ihenyukazi. Ziya kulihluba libe ze, zilishiye lingumpha ochutyiweyo; ewe, ziya kulitya inyama, zijike zilitshise libe luthuthu." 
Revelation17:17 Kaloku uThixo ukunikele kuzo ukufezekiswa kwecebo lakhe. Ziya kuvana, amagunya azo ziwanike irhamncwa, ade afezekiswe amazwi kaThixo." 
Revelation17:18 “Umfazi lowo umbonileyo sisixekokazi esilawula bonke ookumkani behlabathi.” 
Revelation18:1 Kamva ke ndabona esinye isithunywa sisiza siphuma ezulwini. Ke sona sasingusomagunya; futhi ukubengezela kwaso kwaqaqamba ehlabathini liphela. 
Revelation18:2 Sadanduluka samemeza sathi: “Siwile isikhulukazi uBhabheli! Ngoku sesilikhaya leendimoni. Igquba khona imimoya emibi, ngokunjalo nentaka yeshwangusha." 
Revelation18:3 Kaloku izizwe zilugongqozile uluchwe lokurheletya kwakhe. Ewe, izikumkani zehlabathi bezirheletya naye. Ngoku oosomashishini zizinhanha ngenxa yokuqhuba ngobuqili bakhe.”" 
Revelation18:4 Kwaphuma elinye ilizwi ezulwini lisithi: “Bantu bam, phumani kuye, hleze nide nithelele kwizono zakhe, nibe nenxaxheba nakwizibetho zakhe." 
Revelation18:5 Kaloku izono zakhe ziyimfumba eye kufikelela ezulwini. Kambe ke uThixo akawalibalanga amatyala akhe. 
Revelation18:6 Mbuyiseleni kwaizitya zakhe! Mbuyekezeni ngokuphindiweyo ngezenzo zakhe! Isikhuni masibuye nomkhwezeli! 
Revelation18:7 Iinzingo nokungcungcutheka kwakhe mazifane nodumo nozuko ebekade ekulo. Kaloku uthi xa ezithuthuzela: ‘Ndiyikumkanikazi, kukhonya mna! Soze ndigixe, andingomhlolokazi!’" 
Revelation18:8 Ngenxa yale nto ke, uya kuhlelwa zizibetho ngamini-nye: izifo, iinzingo, nendlala. Uya kutshiswa ngumlilo. Kaloku uThixo omgwebayo unamandla." 
Revelation18:9 “Ookumkani behlabathi ababerheletya naye, bexhamla intlala-kahle kunye naye, baya kukhala bakuwubona umsi womlilo omtshisayo." 
Revelation18:10 Baya kuhambela phaya bebindekile ngenxa yokungcungcutheka kwakhe. Baya kukhuza bathi: ‘Awu, kunyembelekile! Hayi kambe, sixekokazi singuBhabheli! Ngomzuzwana nje usuke wee shwaka!’" 
Revelation18:11 “Nditsho noosomashishini beli hlabathi baya kungqukruleka beselusizini ngenxa yakhe. Kaloku koba kungasekho bani uyithengayo imithwalo yorhwebo lwabo. 
Revelation18:12 Igolide, isiliva, amatye exabiso, nentsimbi; imichako yelinen, eyamalaphu amfusa, isilika, kunye nemichako ebomvu; imithi evumba limnandi, amazinyo endlovu, nazo zonke izinto ezenziwe ngemithi eyomeleleyo; ubhedu, intsimbi, nemabhile;" 
Revelation18:13 iziqholo zokutya, iziqhumiso, iziqholo zomzimba, intlaka emhlophe; iwayini namafutha, iflawa nengqolowa, iinkomo neegusha, amahashe neenqwelo, amakhoboka nobomi babantu; ewe, zonke ezi ntlobo-ntlobo zoba zingasenamthengi." 
Revelation18:14 Abantu baya kuphoxisa bathi: ‘Zonke izinto ezintle owawuzilangazelela ziphel' emehlweni; kanti nobutyebi nobuyokoyoko bakho bubhangile; futhi awusoze uphinde ubufumane!’ 
Revelation18:15 Oosomashishini abafumana ubutyebi beshishina kwesi sixeko baya kuhambela mgama bebindekile ngenxa yokungcungcutheka kwaso. Baya kungqukruleka beselusizini," 
Revelation18:16 bathi: ‘Heyi, kunyembelekile kwesi sixekokazi! Kaloku sona sasivethe ezelinen ecikiziweyo, ezimfusa nezibomvu; sasiyokozela yigolide, amatye exabiso nentsimbi!" 
Revelation18:17 Engaka yona ilahleko yobutyebi ngomzuzwana nje!’ “Abaphathi-nqanawa noomatiloshe, nabahamba ngolwandle, nabo bonke abaphila lulwandle, bahambela phaya," 
Revelation18:18 bekhuza kukubona umsi womlilo ositshisayo, besithi: ‘Sakhe sakho phi na isixeko esifana nesi sixekokazi?’" 
Revelation18:19 Bazigalela ngomhlaba, bengqukruleka beselusizini besithi: ‘Awu, kunyembelekile, sixekokazindini, apho bonke abahamba ngeenqanawa bamfimfithe khona ubutyebi! Ngomzuzwana nje usuke uthi shwaka.’" 
Revelation18:20 “Vuyani nimemelele, mazulu, ngenxa yokutshabalala kwakhe! Vuyani, lusapho lukaThixo, bathunywa, nani bavakalisi beendaba! Kaloku uThixo uyigwebile iBhabheli waniphindezela.”" 
Revelation18:21 Kananjalo enye ingwanyalala yesithunywa yathatha ilitye elingathi lilitye lokusila, yaliphosa elwandle, yathi: “Siya kwenziwa nje ke isixekokazi iBhabheli, sintlithwe phantsi, singaze siphinde sibonwe bani." 
Revelation18:22 Abadlali behapu, neemvumi, abakhalisa ifluti nexilongo, abasoze baphinde babe khona apho kuwe. Soze kuphinde kubekho magcisa alo naluphi na udidi apho kuwe, singasoze siphinde sivakale nesandi selitye lokusila!" 
Revelation18:23 Akusoze kuphinde kubonakale nalitha lesibane apho, engasoze eviwe namazwi omyeni nomtshakazi apho kwakho! Oosomashishini bakwakho bakhe bazizinhanha zehlabathi; ewe, ngemilingo yakho wazilahlekisa izizwe!" 
Revelation18:24 Nangoku lilapho kwakho igazi labavakalisi beendaba ezimnandi, nelosapho lukaThixo; ewe, nditsho nelabo bonke abakhe babulawa apha emhlabeni.”" 
Revelation19:1 Emva koko ndeva ngathi kukho intswahla yehlokondiba ezulwini, lidanduluka lisithi: “Mayibongwe iNkosi! Uloyiso nesihomo namandla ngakaThixo wethu." 
Revelation19:2 Kaloku zinyanisekile, zilungile izigqibo zakhe. Eli henyukazi ebelifudula lidyobha ihlabathi ngoluchwe lokurheletya uligwebile. Ulohlwayile ngenxa yokuphalala kwegazi lezicaka zakhe.”" 
Revelation19:3 Liphindile lathi kwakho ihlokondiba: “Huntshu! Nanko unyuka ngonaphakade umsi wesixeko esitshayo!” 
Revelation19:4 Iinkonde zomashumi omabini nane, nezilwanyana zozine, zathi qubudu zinqula uThixo osesihlalweni sobukhosi, zathi: “Ewe, kunjalo! Huntshu!”" 
Revelation19:5 Kwavakala ilizwi livela esihlalweni sobukhosi, lisithi: “Mbongeni uThixo wethu, nonke nina zicaka zakhe, nonke nina bamhlonelayo, baphakamileyo nabaphantsi!”" 
Revelation19:6 Ndibuye ndeva intswahla ekwangathi yeyehlokondiba. Yaba ngathi sisandi samanzi engxangxasi, nokugqekreza kweendudumo, isithi: “Huntshu! INkosi uThixo wethu onguSomandla yiKumkani." 
Revelation19:7 Vuyani, nimemelele yimincili, nimnike imbeko. Ifikile kaloku imini yomtshato weXhwane. Umtshakazi selezilungiselele." 
Revelation19:8 Wambeswe umwunduwundu omhle womchako omhlophe welinen eqaqambileyo.” (Kaloku ilinen entle yalatha imisebenzi elungileyo yemilowo kaThixo.) 
Revelation19:9 Sithe ke kum isithunywa: “Bhala uthi: ‘Banoyolo abo bamenyelwe kwisidlo somtshato weXhwane.’ ” Satsho sisithi: “Ngamazwi kaThixo ngenkqu lawo.” 
Revelation19:10 Ndazikhahlela ngasezinyaweni zaso ndinqula. Suka sathi sona kum: “Mus' ukuyenza loo nto. Nam ndisisicaka njengawe namawenu angamangqina kaYesu. NguThixo omakanqulwe. Abo bangamangqina kaYesu banikwa ifuthe loMoya *njengabashumayeli.” 
Revelation19:11 Ndabona izulu livuleka, kwathi gqi ihashe elimhlophe. Igama lalowo wayelikhwele ihashe elo nguThembekile noNyaniso. Kaloku ugweba ngobulungisa, enze nemfazwe kwangobulungisa." 
Revelation19:12 Wayetsho ngamehlo abukhali ngathi avutha umlilo; ethe jize izithsaba ezininzi entloko. Wayenombhalo wegama elalingaziwa bani ngaphandle kwakhe. 
Revelation19:13 Wayethe wambu ingubo eyayilijaja ligazi. Igama abizwa ngalo nguLizwi kaThixo. 
Revelation19:14 Wayelandelwa yimikhosi yasezulwini, ikhwele amahashe amhlophe, yambethe iingubo ezimhlophe eziqaqambileyo zelinen." 
Revelation19:15 Kwaphuma ikrele elibukhali emlonyeni wakhe. Wayeza kuxabela iintlanga ngalo, azifake phantsi kolawulo olungqongqo. Yena wozikhama iinkani ngesohlwayo sengqumbo kaThixo uSomandla." 
Revelation19:16 Engubeni yakhe nasethangeni kwakukho umbhalo othi: “IKumkani yeekumkani neNkosi yeenkosi.” 
Revelation19:17 Ndabona isithunywa simi elangeni. Sazikhwaza zonke iintaka ezazibhabha esibhakabhakeni, sathi: “Qokelelanani nize kwisidlo esenziwe nguThixo." 
Revelation19:18 Yizani nitye inyama yeekumkani neengqwayi-ngqwayi, eyamajoni amahashe nabo bawakhweleyo, eyabantu bonke: amakhoboka nabakhululekileyo, abakhulu nabaphantsi.”" 
Revelation19:19 Ndalibona irhamncwa neekumkani zehlabathi nemikhosi yazo zixhontelene. Zazize kuqubisana nalowo ukhwele ihashe elimhlophe, kunye nomkhosi wakhe." 
Revelation19:20 Lathinjwa irhamncwa, ngokunjalo *nomshumayeli oxokayo obefudula esenza imilingo phambi kwalo. (Wabalahlekisa ngemilingo abo babenophawu lwerhamncwa, benqula umfanekiso walo.) Elo rhamncwa ndawonye nomshumayeli oxokayo baphoswa edikeni lomlilo ovutha yisalfa besahleli." 
Revelation19:21 Imikhosi yabo yabulawa ngekrele elaliphuma emlonyeni walowo wayekhwele ihashe. Iintaka zonke zazitsho zabomvu izisu yinyama. 
Revelation20:1 Ndabona isithunywa sivela ezulwini sisiphethe ngesandla isitshixo senzonzobila. Sasiphethe nento enkulu yetyathanga. 
Revelation20:2 Salibamba igongqongqo, inyoka endala, umtyholi, uSathana. Salikhonkxa iwaka leminyaka." 
Revelation20:3 Salifaka enzonzobileni, sawuvala umnyango, sawutywina, sisenzela ukuba lingabe liphinde lilulahlekise uluntu kude kuphele iwaka leminyaka. Emva kwelo thuba igongqongqo limelwe kukukhululwa; phofu okwethutyana nje elingephi." 
Revelation20:4 Emva koko ndabona izihlalo. Ndabona kuhlala kuzo abo babenikwe igunya lokugweba. Ndababona nâbo babenqunyulwe iintloko ngenxa yokuba ngamangqina kaYesu nangenxa yokushumayela ilizwi likaThixo. Ndababona nabo bangavumanga ukulinqula irhamncwa okanye umfanekiso walo, kwanabo bangavumanga ukuphawulwa kumabunzi okanye esandleni ngophawu lwerhamncwa. Bavuka ekufeni, balawula kunye noKrestu iminyaka eliwaka." 
Revelation20:5 Luvuko lokuqala ke olu. Inxalenye yabafi yona ayizange ivuke kwade kwaphela iminyaka eliwaka. 
Revelation20:6 Unoyolo engokaThixo lowo uluxhamleyo uvuko lokuqala. Ukufa kwesibini akunamandla kuye. Kaloku woba ngumbingeleli kaThixo nokaKrestu, axhamle ulawulo kunye noKrestu iminyaka eliwaka." 
Revelation20:7 Iya kuthi ke yakuphela iminyaka eliwaka, akhululwe umtyholi enzonzobileni." 
Revelation20:8 Ekhululekile ke uya kuzilahlekisa izizwe kumagumbi omane ehlabathi; ezo ke nguGogi noMagogi. Umtyholi uya kuziqokelela zibe zininzi njengentlabathi eselunxwemeni lolwandle, aye nazo emfazweni." 
Revelation20:9 Nazo ke zicombuluka ehlabathini liphela, zirhawula impi yomkhosi wosapho lukaThixo, ndawonye neso sixeko asithandayo. Kuthe kusenjalo suka kwehla umlilo phezulu, wazithi lence-lence." 
Revelation20:10 Okokwakhe umtyholi, umlahlekisi wazo, yena wathiwa dywa echibini lomlilo onesalfa, apho irhamncwa kunye *nomshumayeli oxokayo bebesebephoswe khona. Apho ke baya kungcungcutheka imini nobusuku ngonaphakade kanaphakade." 
Revelation20:11 Ndaza ke ndabona isihlalo sokulawula esimhlophe, kukho ohleli kuso. Umhlaba namazulu ambaleka, awaba sabonakala." 
Revelation20:12 Ndababona abafileyo, abakhulu kwanabanci, bemile phambi kwesihlalo sokulawula. Zavulwa iincwadi, kwaza kwavulwa nenye incwadi eneenkcukacha zobomi. Abo bafileyo bagwetywa ngokwengxelo yezenzo zabo eyayibhalwe kwezo ncwadi." 
Revelation20:13 Ulwandle, ukufa, nelabafileyo labakhuphela ngaphandle abafileyo ababekulo. Umntu ngamnye wagwetywa ngokwezenzo zakhe." 
Revelation20:14 Ukufa nelabafileyo kwaphoswa echibini elivuthayo. Eli chibi lomlilo ke kukufa kwesibini. 
Revelation20:15 Wonke umntu ogama lingabhalwanga encwadini yeenkcukacha zobomi waphoswa echibini elivuthayo. 
Revelation21:1 Ndabona izulu elitsha nehlabathi elitsha. Kaloku elokuqala izulu nelokuqala ihlabathi laliselidlule. Kwakungasekho nolwandle olu. 
Revelation21:2 Ndabona nesixeko esingcwele, iJerusalem entsha, isihla ivela kuThixo ezulwini. Yayingasentle! Yayingathi ngumtshakazi ehombele umyeni." 
Revelation21:3 Ndive ilizwi elikhulu, livela ngasesihlalweni sokulawula, lisithi: “Uyasibona esi sixeko? Kulapho uThixo ahlala khona nabantu. Uya kuhlala phakathi kwabo, babe yimilowo yakhe, yena abe nguThixo wabo. UThixo ngenkqu uya kuhlala nabo." 
Revelation21:4 Uya kubosula zonke iinyembezi. Akusayi kubuye kubekho kufa, nalusizi, nasikhalo, nazintlungu. Kaloku lidlule ilizwe lokuqala.”" 
Revelation21:5 Ke lowo uhleli esihlalweni sokulawula wathi: “Ngoku yonke indalo ndiyenza ntsha.” Ubuye wathi: “Bhala kaloku! La mazwi ndiwathethayo athembekile, ayinyaniso.”" 
Revelation21:6 Wabuya wathi: “Sekwenzekile. Ndim u-A kwano-Z, ndim isiqalo nesiphelo. Nabani na onxaniweyo ndomnika ngesisa amanzi aphuma emthonjeni odlisa ubomi." 
Revelation21:7 Lowo woyisayo wozixhamla zibe lilifa lakhe ezi zinto. Mna ndoba nguThixo wakhe, yena abe ngunyana wam." 
Revelation21:8 Kodwa ilifa lamagwala, abangakholwayo, izingcoli, izigwinta, abarheletyi, amagqwirha, abanquli-zithixo, nawo onke amaxoki, loba kukufa kwesibini kwidike lomlilo ovutha yisalfa.”" 
Revelation21:9 Kusuke esinye sezithunywa ezisixhenxe ezaziphethe izitya ezisixhenxe zezibetho zokugqibela sathi kum: “Yiza ngapha ndikubonise umtshakazi walo iXhwane.” 
Revelation21:10 Sandithatha ndisemandleni kaMoya, sandisa encotsheni yentabakazi enkulu. Sandibonisa iJerusalem, isiXeko esiNgcwele, isihla ivela kuThixo ezulwini." 
Revelation21:11 Yayiqaqambile bubuqaqawuli bukaThixo, ibengezela okwelitye lexabiso elicwenge okwedayimani." 
Revelation21:12 Yayineendonga eziphakamileyo kakhulu, inamasango alishumi elinambini. Kwisango ngalinye kwakukho isithunywa. Phezu kwamasango kwakubhalwe amagama ezizwe ezilishumi elinambini zakwaSirayeli." 
Revelation21:13 Ngasempumalanga kwakukho amasango amathathu, emathathu emntla, emathathu emzantsi, nangasentshonalanga." 
Revelation21:14 Iindonga zesixeko zazimi phezu kweziseko zamatye alishumi elinambini. Ilitye ngalinye lalinegama *lomthunywa ngamnye kubathunywa beXhwane abalishumi elinambini. 
Revelation21:15 Isithunywa esasithetha nam sasiphethe induku yegolide yokulinganisa. Sasiza kulinganisa ngayo ubukhulu besixeko, amasango, neendonga zaso." 
Revelation21:16 Amacala omane ayelingana, ubude bungangobubanzi. Isithunywa salinganisa ubukhulu besixeko ngenduku yaso. Safumana buziikhilomitha ezilishumi elinesibini lamawaka, ubude kwanobubanzi baso. Sasikwangako ukuphakama." 
Revelation21:17 Salinganisa iindonga, sazifumana ziziinyawo ezilikhulu linamashumi mane anane ukuphakama. Sasisebenzisa umlinganiso oqhelekileyo ebantwini." 
Revelation21:18 Udonga lwalwenziwe ngeedayimani. Sona isixeko sasenziwe ngegolide; sasingathi siyiglasi egudisiweyo. 
Revelation21:19 Iziseko zaso zazihonjiswe ngazo zonke iintlobo zamatye exabiso. Kuqala yayiyidayimani, kulandele ilitye lexabiso ekuthiwa yisafire, iagati, iemeraldi," 
Revelation21:20 isadonisi, ikorneli, ikrizoli, ibherilo, itopazi, ikrizoprazi, ihakinto, eleshumi elinambini yayiametiste." 
Revelation21:21 Amasango alishumi elinambini *ayeziiperile ezilishumi elinambini. Isango ngalinye laliyiperile enye, nesitalato sesixeko siyigolide ecwengileyo, sifana neglasi." 
Revelation21:22 Andizange ndiyibone *indlu kaThixo esixekweni apho. Kaloku iNkosi uThixo uSomandla kunye nalo iXhwane ngabo ngenkqu loo ndlu. 
Revelation21:23 Isixeko sasingadingi langa nanyanga yakusikhanyisela. Sasikhanyiselwa bubuqaqawuli bukaThixo nalo iXhwane. 
Revelation21:24 Izizwe ziya kuhamba ekukhanyeni kwaso; iikumkani zehlabathi zowazisa kuso amagugu azo. 
Revelation21:25 Akasayi kuvalwa emini amasango aso, yaye akusayi kubakho busuku khona." 
Revelation21:26 Izizwe ziya kuza ziphethe amagugu azo neendyebo zazo. 
Revelation21:27 Akuyi kungena bubi khona; akuyi kungena nasingcoli naxoki; kuphela kongena abo babhaliweyo encwadini yeXhwane, leyo yeenkcukacha zobomi." 
Revelation22:1 Isithunywa eso sandibonisa umlambo onamanzi obomi ebengezela okweglasi. Ayempompoza evela kwibhotwe likaThixo kunye neXhwane. 
Revelation22:2 La manzi ayesihla phakathi kwisitalato sesixeko eso. Lo mlambo wawuphahlwe ngumthi wobomi. Lo mthi uvelisa iziqhamo ngazo zonke iinyanga zonyaka. Amagqabi alo mthi ayimpilo yezizwe. 
Revelation22:3 Nayiphi na into eqalekisiweyo ayisayi kubakho apho. Into ekhoyo apho libhotwe likaThixo kunye neXhwane. Izicaka zakhe ziya kuphithizela zimkhonza. 
Revelation22:4 Ziya kujongana naye ebusweni, zinegama lakhe ebunzi." 
Revelation22:5 Akusayi kubakho busuku khona; kungasayi kubakho mfuneko yasibane nalanga. Kaloku iNkosi uThixo uya kuzikhanyisela. Ziya kuxhamla ulawulo ngonaphakade kanaphakade. 
Revelation22:6 Kananjalo sathi kum: “La mazwi ayinyaniso, athembekile. INkosi uThixo obaxhobisayo ngefuthe loMoya abavakalisi belizwi, wathumela isithunywa sakhe ukuze sibonise izicaka zakhe izinto eziza kwenzeka kamsinya.”" 
Revelation22:7 “Uyabona ke, ndiyeza ngokukhawuleza! Unoyolo umntu owathobelayo amazwi odaba lwale ncwadi!”" 
Revelation22:8 Ndim mna Yohane ozivileyo wazibona ezi zinto. Ndakuba ndizivile ndazibona ezi zinto, ndawa ezinyaweni zesithunywa eso sandibonisayo, ndikhahlela." 
Revelation22:9 Kodwa sakhalima sathi: “Hayi bo! Sukwenjenjalo; kaloku nam ndisisicaka njengawe, ugxa wakho namawenu abavakalisi belizwi, nabo bonke abawathobelayo amazwi akule ncwadi. NguThixo ofanele ukumnqula wena.”" 
Revelation22:10 Saqhuba sathi: “Uze ungawafihli amazwi ale ncwadi; kaloku ithuba lokuzalisekiswa kwawo lisemnyango. 
Revelation22:11 Ke yena umenzi wobubi makaqhubele phambili, ngokunjalo nongcolileyo makaqhubele phambili; nalowo ulungisayo makathathe unyawo, kanti ke nonyulu makahlale enjalo." 
Revelation22:12 “Ewe, ndiyeza kamsinya! Ulowo nalowo ndiya kumphathela ibhaso ngokwemisebenzi yakhe!" 
Revelation22:13 Kaloku ndingu-A, ndikwangu-Z; ndingowokuqala, ndikwangowokugqibela, ndikwasisiqalo nesiphelo.”" 
Revelation22:14 Banoyolo abo bazabalazela ukuba bahlale benyulu! Baya kuba nelungelo kuwo umthi wobomi; baya kungena ngamasango esixekweni. 
Revelation22:15 Kambe ke ngaphandle zizinja, namagqwirha, abarheletyi, izigwinta, abanqula *izithixo, nabo bonke abathe phithi kukuxoka." 
Revelation22:16 “Ndim mna Yesu osithumileyo isithunywa sam ukuba siye kushumayela ezi ndaba emabandleni. Ndingumnombo nomzukulwana kaDavide, ikhwezi lokusa.”" 
Revelation22:17 UMoya kunye nomtshakazi bathi: “Yiza” Wonke umntu ovayo makathi: “Yiza!” Wonke umntu onxaniweyo makeze. Makawasele amanzi obomi; asisisa kwabo bawafunayo. 
Revelation22:18 Ndiyamlumkisa wonke umntu owevayo amazwi ale ncwadi: Ukuba ukhe wawongeza, uThixo uya kumhlisela zonke izibetho ezichaziweyo kule ncwadi." 
Revelation22:19 Kanti ke ukuba ukhe wawaphungula, uThixo uya kumvimba inxaxheba kuwo umthi wobomi, angabi nalungelo nakuso isiXeko esiNgcwele – zinto ezo zichaziweyo kule ncwadi." 
Revelation22:20 Lo unika obu bungqina uthi: “Nanjani na ndiza kufika ngokukhawuleza!” Makube njalo! Yiza, Nkosi Yesu!"
